// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #2
// Ruta relativa: merge-css-from-folder.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/merge-css-from-folder.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 287
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

#!/usr/bin/env node

import fs from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";

const inputFolder = process.argv[2];
const outputFile = process.argv[3] || "styles-unificados.css";

if (!inputFolder) {
  console.error("Uso:");
  console.error("node merge-css-from-folder.js ./src styles-unificados.css");
  process.exit(1);
}

const ROOT_DIR = path.resolve(inputFolder);

if (!fs.existsSync(ROOT_DIR)) {
  console.error(`La carpeta no existe: ${ROOT_DIR}`);
  process.exit(1);
}

if (!fs.statSync(ROOT_DIR).isDirectory()) {
  console.error(`La ruta no es una carpeta: ${ROOT_DIR}`);
  process.exit(1);
}

const VALID_EXT = new Set([".css"]);

const IGNORE_DIRS = new Set([
  "node_modules",
  ".git",
  "dist",
  "build",
  ".next",
  ".nuxt",
  "coverage",
  ".turbo",
  ".cache",
  ".idea",
  ".vscode",
  "out",
  "tmp",
  "temp",
]);

const IGNORE_FILES = new Set([
  outputFile,
]);

function safeReadDir(dir) {
  try {
    return fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
    console.warn(`No se pudo leer la carpeta: ${dir}. Motivo: ${message}`);
    return [];
  }
}

function normalizePath(p) {
  return p.split(path.sep).join("/");
}

function walkStyleFiles(dir, fileList = []) {
  const entries = safeReadDir(dir);

  entries.sort((a, b) =>
    a.name.localeCompare(b.name, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" })
  );

  for (const entry of entries) {
    const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      if (!IGNORE_DIRS.has(entry.name)) {
        walkStyleFiles(fullPath, fileList);
      }
      continue;
    }

    if (!entry.isFile()) {
      continue;
    }

    if (IGNORE_FILES.has(entry.name)) {
      continue;
    }

    const ext = path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase();
    if (VALID_EXT.has(ext)) {
      fileList.push(fullPath);
    }
  }

  return fileList;
}

/**
 * Orden para mantener la cascada lo más coherente posible:
 * 1. archivos globales/base/reset/theme primero
 * 2. luego por profundidad
 * 3. luego por ruta alfabética
 */
function getPriority(relativePath) {
  const name = relativePath.toLowerCase();

  if (
    name.includes("reset.css") ||
    name.includes("normalize.css") ||
    name.includes("base.css") ||
    name.includes("globals.css") ||
    name.includes("global.css") ||
    name.includes("theme.css") ||
    name.includes("variables.css")
  ) {
    return 0;
  }

  if (
    name.includes("layout.css") ||
    name.includes("grid.css") ||
    name.includes("utilities.css") ||
    name.includes("utils.css")
  ) {
    return 1;
  }

  return 2;
}

function sortFiles(files) {
  return [...files].sort((a, b) => {
    const relA = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, a));
    const relB = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, b));

    const priorityA = getPriority(relA);
    const priorityB = getPriority(relB);

    if (priorityA !== priorityB) {
      return priorityA - priorityB;
    }

    const depthA = relA.split("/").length;
    const depthB = relB.split("/").length;

    if (depthA !== depthB) {
      return depthA - depthB;
    }

    return relA.localeCompare(relB, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" });
  });
}

function buildDirectoryTree(dir, prefix = "") {
  const entries = safeReadDir(dir)
    .filter((entry) => {
      if (entry.isDirectory()) return !IGNORE_DIRS.has(entry.name);
      if (entry.isFile()) return VALID_EXT.has(path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase());
      return false;
    })
    .sort((a, b) =>
      a.name.localeCompare(b.name, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" })
    );

  const lines = [];

  entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
    const isLast = index === entries.length - 1;
    const connector = isLast ? "└── " : "├── ";
    const nextPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? "    " : "│   ");
    const entryPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    lines.push(`${prefix}${connector}${entry.name}`);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      lines.push(...buildDirectoryTree(entryPath, nextPrefix));
    }
  });

  return lines;
}

function countLines(content) {
  if (!content) return 0;
  return content.split(/\r?\n/).length;
}

function createTableOfContents(files) {
  const lines = ["/* TABLA DE CONTENIDOS */", ""];

  files.forEach((file, index) => {
    const relativePath = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, file));
    lines.push(`/* ${String(index + 1).padStart(4, "0")}. ${relativePath} */`);
  });

  return lines.join("\n");
}

function createMergedOutput(files) {
  const generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
  const toc = createTableOfContents(files);
  const treeLines = buildDirectoryTree(ROOT_DIR);

  const output = [
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   ARCHIVO UNIFICADO DE ESTILOS CSS",
    "   =====================================================================",
    `   Carpeta origen: ${normalizePath(ROOT_DIR)}`,
    `   Fecha de generación: ${generatedAt}`,
    `   Total de archivos incluidos: ${files.length}`,
    `   Extensiones incluidas: ${Array.from(VALID_EXT).join(", ")}`,
    "   Objetivo: consolidar estilos CSS respetando un orden estable de cascada",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    "",
    toc,
    "",
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   INICIO DE ESTILOS UNIFICADOS",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    "",
  ];

  files.forEach((file, index) => {
    const relativePath = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, file));
    const absolutePath = normalizePath(file);

    let content = "";
    try {
      content = fs.readFileSync(file, "utf8");
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
      content = `/* ERROR: no se pudo leer este archivo. Motivo: ${message} */\n`;
    }

    const lineCount = countLines(content);

    output.push(
      `/* ====================================================================`,
      `   ARCHIVO #${index + 1}`,
      `   Ruta relativa: ${relativePath}`,
      `   Ruta absoluta: ${absolutePath}`,
      `   Líneas aproximadas: ${lineCount}`,
      `   ==================================================================== */`,
      "",
      content,
      "",
      `/* ========================== FIN DE ${relativePath} ========================== */`,
      "",
      ""
    );
  });

  output.push(
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   ESTRUCTURA DE CARPETAS ANALIZADA",
    "   =====================================================================",
    "",
    `   ${normalizePath(path.basename(ROOT_DIR))}`,
    ...treeLines.map((line) => `   ${line}`),
    "",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    ""
  );

  return output.join("\n");
}

function main() {
  console.log(`Escaneando carpeta: ${ROOT_DIR}`);

  let files = walkStyleFiles(ROOT_DIR);
  files = sortFiles(files);

  console.log(`Archivos encontrados: ${files.length}`);

  if (files.length === 0) {
    console.warn("No se encontraron archivos .css");
  }

  const mergedContent = createMergedOutput(files);

  fs.writeFileSync(outputFile, mergedContent, "utf8");

  console.log(`Archivo generado correctamente: ${path.resolve(outputFile)}`);
}

main();

// ========================== FIN DE merge-css-from-folder.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #3
// Ruta relativa: merge-md-from-folder.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/merge-md-from-folder.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 247
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

#!/usr/bin/env node
/* global process */

import fs from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";

const inputFolder = process.argv[2];
const outputFile = process.argv[3] || "documentacion-unificada.md";

if (!inputFolder) {
  console.error("Uso: node merge-md-from-folder.js <carpeta-entrada> [archivo-salida.md]");
  process.exit(1);
}

const ROOT_DIR = path.resolve(inputFolder);

if (!fs.existsSync(ROOT_DIR)) {
  console.error(`La ruta no existe: ${ROOT_DIR}`);
  process.exit(1);
}

if (!fs.statSync(ROOT_DIR).isDirectory()) {
  console.error(`La ruta no es una carpeta válida: ${ROOT_DIR}`);
  process.exit(1);
}

const VALID_EXT = new Set([".md"]);

const IGNORE_DIRS = new Set([
  "node_modules",
  ".git",
  "dist",
  "build",
  ".next",
  "coverage",
  ".turbo",
  ".cache",
  ".idea",
  ".vscode",
  "out",
  "tmp",
  "temp"
]);

const IGNORE_FILES = new Set([outputFile]);

function safeReadDir(dir) {
  try {
    return fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

function normalizePath(p) {
  return p.split(path.sep).join("/");
}

function walkMarkdownFiles(dir, fileList = []) {
  const entries = safeReadDir(dir);

  entries.sort((a, b) =>
    a.name.localeCompare(b.name, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" })
  );

  for (const entry of entries) {
    const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      if (!IGNORE_DIRS.has(entry.name)) {
        walkMarkdownFiles(fullPath, fileList);
      }
      continue;
    }

    if (!entry.isFile()) {
      continue;
    }

    if (IGNORE_FILES.has(entry.name)) {
      continue;
    }

    const ext = path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase();
    if (VALID_EXT.has(ext)) {
      fileList.push(fullPath);
    }
  }

  return fileList;
}

function sortFiles(files) {
  return [...files].sort((a, b) => {
    const relA = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, a));
    const relB = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, b));

    const depthA = relA.split("/").length;
    const depthB = relB.split("/").length;

    if (depthA !== depthB) {
      return depthA - depthB;
    }

    return relA.localeCompare(relB, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" });
  });
}

function buildDirectoryTree(dir, prefix = "") {
  const entries = safeReadDir(dir)
    .filter((entry) => {
      if (entry.isDirectory()) return !IGNORE_DIRS.has(entry.name);
      if (entry.isFile()) return VALID_EXT.has(path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase());
      return false;
    })
    .sort((a, b) =>
      a.name.localeCompare(b.name, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" })
    );

  const lines = [];

  entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
    const isLast = index === entries.length - 1;
    const connector = isLast ? "└── " : "├── ";
    const nextPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? "    " : "│   ");
    const entryPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    lines.push(`${prefix}${connector}${entry.name}`);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      lines.push(...buildDirectoryTree(entryPath, nextPrefix));
    }
  });

  return lines;
}

function countLines(content) {
  if (!content) return 0;
  return content.split(/\r?\n/).length;
}

function createTableOfContents(files) {
  const lines = ["# Tabla de contenidos", ""];

  files.forEach((file, index) => {
    const relativePath = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, file));
    const anchor = `archivo-${String(index + 1).padStart(4, "0")}`;
    lines.push(`${String(index + 1).padStart(4, "0")}. [${relativePath}](#${anchor})`);
  });

  return lines.join("\n");
}

function createMergedOutput(files) {
  const generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
  const toc = createTableOfContents(files);
  const treeLines = buildDirectoryTree(ROOT_DIR);

  const output = [
    "# Documentación Markdown Unificada",
    "",
    `**Carpeta origen:** \`${normalizePath(ROOT_DIR)}\`  `,
    `**Fecha de generación:** \`${generatedAt}\`  `,
    `**Total de archivos incluidos:** \`${files.length}\`  `,
    `**Extensiones incluidas:** \`${Array.from(VALID_EXT).join(", ")}\``,
    "",
    "---",
    "",
    toc,
    "",
    "---",
    "",
    "# Contenido consolidado",
    ""
  ];

  files.forEach((file, index) => {
    const relativePath = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, file));
    const absolutePath = normalizePath(file);

    let content = "";
    try {
      content = fs.readFileSync(file, "utf8");
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
      content = `> ERROR: no se pudo leer este archivo. Motivo: ${message}\n`;
    }

    const lineCount = countLines(content);
    const sectionId = `archivo-${String(index + 1).padStart(4, "0")}`;

    output.push(
      `---`,
      ``,
      `<a id="${sectionId}"></a>`,
      `## Archivo #${index + 1}: ${relativePath}`,
      ``,
      `- **Ruta relativa:** \`${relativePath}\``,
      `- **Ruta absoluta:** \`${absolutePath}\``,
      `- **Extensión:** \`.md\``,
      `- **Líneas aproximadas:** \`${lineCount}\``,
      ``,
      `### Contenido original`,
      ``,
      content.trim(),
      ``,
      `[⬆ Volver a la tabla de contenidos](#tabla-de-contenidos)`,
      ``
    );
  });

  output.push(
    "---",
    "",
    "# Estructura de carpetas analizada",
    "",
    "```text",
    normalizePath(path.basename(ROOT_DIR)),
    ...treeLines,
    "```",
    ""
  );

  return output.join("\n");
}

function main() {
  console.log(`Buscando archivos .md en: ${ROOT_DIR}`);

  let files = walkMarkdownFiles(ROOT_DIR);
  files = sortFiles(files);

  if (files.length === 0) {
    console.error("No se encontraron archivos .md en la carpeta indicada.");
    process.exit(1);
  }

  const mergedContent = createMergedOutput(files);

  fs.writeFileSync(outputFile, mergedContent, "utf8");

  console.log(`Archivo generado correctamente: ${outputFile}`);
  console.log(`Total de archivos .md incluidos: ${files.length}`);
}

main();

// ========================== FIN DE merge-md-from-folder.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #4
// Ruta relativa: merge-react-from-folder.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/merge-react-from-folder.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 246
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

#!/usr/bin/env node

import fs from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";

const inputFolder = process.argv[2];
const outputFile = process.argv[3] || "codigo-unificado.txt";

if (!inputFolder) {
  
  
  process.exit(1);
}

const ROOT_DIR = path.resolve(inputFolder);

if (!fs.existsSync(ROOT_DIR)) {
  
  process.exit(1);
}

if (!fs.statSync(ROOT_DIR).isDirectory()) {
  
  process.exit(1);
}

const VALID_EXT = new Set([".tsx", ".ts", ".jsx", ".js"]);

const IGNORE_DIRS = new Set([
  "node_modules",
  ".git",
  "dist",
  "build",
  ".next",
  "coverage",
  ".turbo",
  ".cache",
  ".idea",
  ".vscode",
  "out",
  "tmp",
  "temp"
]);

const IGNORE_FILES = new Set([
  outputFile
]);

function safeReadDir(dir) {
  try {
    return fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

function normalizePath(p) {
  return p.split(path.sep).join("/");
}

function walkSourceFiles(dir, fileList = []) {
  const entries = safeReadDir(dir);

  entries.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" }));

  for (const entry of entries) {
    const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      if (!IGNORE_DIRS.has(entry.name)) {
        walkSourceFiles(fullPath, fileList);
      }
      continue;
    }

    if (!entry.isFile()) {
      continue;
    }

    if (IGNORE_FILES.has(entry.name)) {
      continue;
    }

    const ext = path.extname(entry.name);
    if (VALID_EXT.has(ext)) {
      fileList.push(fullPath);
    }
  }

  return fileList;
}

function sortFiles(files) {
  return [...files].sort((a, b) => {
    const relA = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, a));
    const relB = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, b));

    const depthA = relA.split("/").length;
    const depthB = relB.split("/").length;

    if (depthA !== depthB) {
      return depthA - depthB;
    }

    return relA.localeCompare(relB, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" });
  });
}

function buildDirectoryTree(dir, prefix = "") {
  const entries = safeReadDir(dir)
    .filter((entry) => {
      if (entry.isDirectory()) return !IGNORE_DIRS.has(entry.name);
      if (entry.isFile()) return VALID_EXT.has(path.extname(entry.name));
      return false;
    })
    .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" }));

  const lines = [];

  entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
    const isLast = index === entries.length - 1;
    const connector = isLast ? "└── " : "├── ";
    const nextPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? "    " : "│   ");
    const entryPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    lines.push(`${prefix}${connector}${entry.name}`);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      lines.push(...buildDirectoryTree(entryPath, nextPrefix));
    }
  });

  return lines;
}

function countLines(content) {
  if (!content) return 0;
  return content.split(/\r?\n/).length;
}

const COMMENT_PREFIX = "//";

function createTableOfContents(files) {
  const lines = ["## TABLA DE CONTENIDOS", ""];

  files.forEach((file, index) => {
    const relativePath = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, file));
    lines.push(`${String(index + 1).padStart(4, "0")}. ${relativePath}`);
  });

  return lines.join("\n");
}

function createMergedOutput(files) {
  const generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
  const toc = createTableOfContents(files);
  const treeLines = buildDirectoryTree(ROOT_DIR);

  const output = [
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   ARCHIVO UNIFICADO DE CÓDIGO PARA ANÁLISIS CON IA",
    "   =====================================================================",
    `   Carpeta origen: ${normalizePath(ROOT_DIR)}`,
    `   Fecha de generación: ${generatedAt}`,
    `   Total de archivos incluidos: ${files.length}`,
    `   Extensiones incluidas: ${Array.from(VALID_EXT).join(", ")}`,
    "   Objetivo: consolidar código fuente con contexto estructural para análisis",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    "",
    toc,
    "",
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   INICIO DEL CÓDIGO UNIFICADO",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    "",
  ];

  files.forEach((file, index) => {
    const relativePath = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, file));
    const absolutePath = normalizePath(file);
    const ext = path.extname(file);
    const commentPrefix = COMMENT_PREFIX;

    let content = "";
    try {
      content = fs.readFileSync(file, "utf8");
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
      content = `${commentPrefix} ERROR: no se pudo leer este archivo. Motivo: ${message}\n`;
    }

    const lineCount = countLines(content);

    output.push(
      `${commentPrefix} ====================================================================`,
      `${commentPrefix} ARCHIVO #${index + 1}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Ruta relativa: ${relativePath}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Ruta absoluta: ${absolutePath}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Extensión: ${ext}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Líneas aproximadas: ${lineCount}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "${normalizePath(ROOT_DIR)}"`,
      `${commentPrefix} ====================================================================`,
      "",
      content,
      "",
      `${commentPrefix} ========================== FIN DE ${relativePath} ==========================`,
      "",
      "",
    );
  });

  output.push(
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   ESTRUCTURA DE CARPETAS ANALIZADA",
    "   =====================================================================",
    "",
    normalizePath(path.basename(ROOT_DIR)),
    ...treeLines,
    "",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    "",
  );

  return output.join("\n");
}

function main() {
  

  let files = walkSourceFiles(ROOT_DIR);
  files = sortFiles(files);

  

if (files.length === 0) {
    process.exit(1);
  }

  const mergedContent = createMergedOutput(files);

  fs.writeFileSync(outputFile, mergedContent, "utf8");

  }

main();


// ========================== FIN DE merge-react-from-folder.js ==========================

// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/vite.config.js

import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
import react, { reactCompilerPreset } from '@vitejs/plugin-react'
import babel from '@rolldown/plugin-babel'
import { fileURLToPath, URL } from 'node:url'
import tailwindcss from '@tailwindcss/vite'

// https://vite.dev/config/
export default defineConfig({
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      '@': fileURLToPath(new URL('./src', import.meta.url)),
    },
  },
  server: {
    proxy: {
      '/Core/api': {
        target: 'https://app.sisad.com.ec:2096',
        changeOrigin: true,
        secure: false,
      },
    },
  },
  plugins: [
    react(),
        tailwindcss(),

    ...(process.env.REACT_COMPILER === 'true' ? [babel({ presets: [reactCompilerPreset()] })] : []),
  ],
  build: {
    chunkSizeWarningLimit: 500,
    rollupOptions: {
      output: {
        manualChunks(id) {
          if (!id.includes('node_modules')) return null;
          if (id.includes('react') || id.includes('react-dom')) return 'vendor_react';
          if (id.includes('jspdf') || id.includes('html2canvas') || id.includes('html2pdf')) return 'vendor_pdf';
          if (id.includes('pdf-lib')) return 'vendor_pdf-lib';
          if (id.includes('docxtemplater') || id.includes('pizzip')) return 'vendor_docx';
          if (id.includes('@reduxjs') || id.includes('react-redux')) return 'vendor_state';
          return 'vendor';
        }
      }
    }
  }
})


// ========================== FIN DE vite.config.js ==========================

#!/usr/bin/env node

import fs from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";

const inputFolder = process.argv[2];
const outputFile = process.argv[3] || "codigo-unificado-csharp.txt";

if (!inputFolder) {
  console.error("Uso:");
  console.error("node merge-csharp-from-folder.js ./src codigo-unificado-csharp.txt");
  process.exit(1);
}

const ROOT_DIR = path.resolve(inputFolder);

if (!fs.existsSync(ROOT_DIR)) {
  console.error(`La carpeta no existe: ${ROOT_DIR}`);
  process.exit(1);
}

if (!fs.statSync(ROOT_DIR).isDirectory()) {
  console.error(`La ruta no es una carpeta: ${ROOT_DIR}`);
  process.exit(1);
}

const VALID_EXT = new Set([".cs"]);

const IGNORE_DIRS = new Set([
  "node_modules",
  ".git",
  "dist",
  "build",
  ".next",
  "coverage",
  ".turbo",
  ".cache",
  ".idea",
  ".vscode",
  "out",
  "tmp",
  "temp",
  "bin",
  "obj",
  ".vs",
  "packages",
  "TestResults"
]);

const IGNORE_FILES = new Set([
  outputFile
]);

function safeReadDir(dir) {
  try {
    return fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
    console.warn(`No se pudo leer la carpeta: ${dir}. Motivo: ${message}`);
    return [];
  }
}

function normalizePath(p) {
  return p.split(path.sep).join("/");
}

function walkSourceFiles(dir, fileList = []) {
  const entries = safeReadDir(dir);

  entries.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" }));

  for (const entry of entries) {
    const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      if (!IGNORE_DIRS.has(entry.name)) {
        walkSourceFiles(fullPath, fileList);
      }
      continue;
    }

    if (!entry.isFile()) {
      continue;
    }

    if (IGNORE_FILES.has(entry.name)) {
      continue;
    }

    const ext = path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase();
    if (VALID_EXT.has(ext)) {
      fileList.push(fullPath);
    }
  }

  return fileList;
}

function sortFiles(files) {
  return [...files].sort((a, b) => {
    const relA = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, a));
    const relB = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, b));

    const depthA = relA.split("/").length;
    const depthB = relB.split("/").length;

    if (depthA !== depthB) {
      return depthA - depthB;
    }

    return relA.localeCompare(relB, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" });
  });
}

function buildDirectoryTree(dir, prefix = "") {
  const entries = safeReadDir(dir)
    .filter((entry) => {
      if (entry.isDirectory()) return !IGNORE_DIRS.has(entry.name);
      if (entry.isFile()) return VALID_EXT.has(path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase());
      return false;
    })
    .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name, undefined, { sensitivity: "base" }));

  const lines = [];

  entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
    const isLast = index === entries.length - 1;
    const connector = isLast ? "└── " : "├── ";
    const nextPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? "    " : "│   ");
    const entryPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    lines.push(`${prefix}${connector}${entry.name}`);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      lines.push(...buildDirectoryTree(entryPath, nextPrefix));
    }
  });

  return lines;
}

function countLines(content) {
  if (!content) return 0;
  return content.split(/\r?\n/).length;
}

const COMMENT_PREFIX = "//";

function createTableOfContents(files) {
  const lines = ["## TABLA DE CONTENIDOS", ""];

  files.forEach((file, index) => {
    const relativePath = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, file));
    lines.push(`${String(index + 1).padStart(4, "0")}. ${relativePath}`);
  });

  return lines.join("\n");
}

function createMergedOutput(files) {
  const generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
  const toc = createTableOfContents(files);
  const treeLines = buildDirectoryTree(ROOT_DIR);

  const output = [
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   ARCHIVO UNIFICADO DE CÓDIGO C# PARA ANÁLISIS CON IA",
    "   =====================================================================",
    `   Carpeta origen: ${normalizePath(ROOT_DIR)}`,
    `   Fecha de generación: ${generatedAt}`,
    `   Total de archivos incluidos: ${files.length}`,
    `   Extensiones incluidas: ${Array.from(VALID_EXT).join(", ")}`,
    "   Objetivo: consolidar archivos fuente C# con contexto estructural para análisis",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    "",
    toc,
    "",
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   INICIO DEL CÓDIGO UNIFICADO",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    "",
  ];

  files.forEach((file, index) => {
    const relativePath = normalizePath(path.relative(ROOT_DIR, file));
    const absolutePath = normalizePath(file);
    const ext = path.extname(file);
    const commentPrefix = COMMENT_PREFIX;

    let content = "";
    try {
      content = fs.readFileSync(file, "utf8");
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
      content = `${commentPrefix} ERROR: no se pudo leer este archivo. Motivo: ${message}\n`;
    }

    const lineCount = countLines(content);

    output.push(
      `${commentPrefix} ====================================================================`,
      `${commentPrefix} ARCHIVO #${index + 1}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Ruta relativa: ${relativePath}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Ruta absoluta: ${absolutePath}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Extensión: ${ext}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Líneas aproximadas: ${lineCount}`,
      `${commentPrefix} Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "${normalizePath(ROOT_DIR)}"`,
      `${commentPrefix} ====================================================================`,
      "",
      content,
      "",
      `${commentPrefix} ========================== FIN DE ${relativePath} ==========================`,
      "",
      "",
    );
  });

  output.push(
    "/* =====================================================================",
    "   ESTRUCTURA DE CARPETAS ANALIZADA",
    "   =====================================================================",
    "",
    normalizePath(path.basename(ROOT_DIR)),
    ...treeLines,
    "",
    "   ===================================================================== */",
    "",
  );

  return output.join("\n");
}

function main() {
  console.log(`Escaneando carpeta: ${ROOT_DIR}`);

  let files = walkSourceFiles(ROOT_DIR);
  files = sortFiles(files);

  console.log(`Archivos encontrados: ${files.length}`);

  if (files.length === 0) {
    console.warn("No se encontraron archivos .cs");
  }

  const mergedContent = createMergedOutput(files);

  fs.writeFileSync(outputFile, mergedContent, "utf8");

  console.log(`Archivo generado correctamente: ${path.resolve(outputFile)}`);
}

main();

/* global require, process */
const express = require("express");
const cors = require("cors");
const { v4: uuidv4 } = require("uuid");

const app = express();
app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());

const PORT = process.env.MOCK_BACKEND_PORT || 5001;

app.post("/forms/generatepin/firmasinverneg", (req, res) => {
  const { dcmt } = req.body || {};
  const idPinCode = `mock-${uuidv4()}`;
  // Return an informational message too
  res.json({ idPinCode, pinMessage: `PIN generado para dcmt=${dcmt || ""}` });
});

app.post("/forms/validatepin/firmasinverneg", (req, res) => {
  const { idPinCode, pinCode } = req.body || {};
  // Accept both the original mock (1234) and user's PIN 95990
  const validPins = new Set(["1234", "95990"]);
  if (validPins.has(String(pinCode))) {
    return res.json({ ok: true, idPinCode });
  }
  return res.status(401).json({ message: "PIN inválido" });
});

app.listen(PORT, () => {
});


// ========================== FIN DE scripts/mock-backend.js ==========================

import React from "react";
import { Navigate, Route, Routes } from "react-router-dom";
import FormsHomePage from "@/modules/forms/pages/FormsHomePage.jsx";
import {
  WorkflowExternosPage,
  InvalidLinkPage,
  UnauthorizedPage,
  SuccessPage,
  ErrorPage,
} from "@/modules/external-flow/pages/ExternalFlowPagesModule.jsx";

/**
 * App - Componente raíz de rutas de la aplicación.
 *
 * Define las rutas principales del SPA y las redirecciones por defecto.
 *
 * @returns {JSX.Element} Árbol de rutas para `react-router`
 */
export default function App() {
  return (
    <Routes>
      <Route path="/" element={<Navigate to="/WorkflowExternos" replace />} />
      <Route path="/WorkflowExternos" element={<WorkflowExternosPage />} />
      <Route path="/forms" element={<FormsHomePage />} />
      <Route path="/invalid-link" element={<InvalidLinkPage />} />
      <Route path="/unauthorized" element={<UnauthorizedPage />} />
      <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
      <Route path="/error" element={<ErrorPage />} />
      <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/WorkflowExternos" replace />} />
    </Routes>
  );
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/app/App.jsx ==========================

const parseBoolean = (value, defaultValue = false) => {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') return defaultValue;
  return ['1', 'true', 'yes', 'on'].includes(String(value).toLowerCase());
};

export const localProxyEnabled = parseBoolean(import.meta.env.VITE_LOCAL_PROXY_ENABLED, false);

export const resolveApiBase = (envValue, localPathPrefix) =>
  localProxyEnabled ? `${String(localPathPrefix || '').replace(/\/$/, '')}/` : String(envValue || '');

export const FormsManagement = resolveApiBase(import.meta.env.VITE_FORMS_MANAGMENT_URL, '/FormsManagement/api');
export const SecurityServer = resolveApiBase(import.meta.env.VITE_SECURITY_SERVER_URL, '/Security/api');
export const MiddlewareForms = resolveApiBase(
  import.meta.env.VITE_MIDDLEWARE_FORMS_URL || import.meta.env.VITE_NEW_SERVER_URL,
  'https://app.sisad.com.ec:2096/Middleware/api/forms',
);
export const DocumentaryServer = resolveApiBase(
  import.meta.env.VITE_DOCUMENT_SERVER_URL_2 || import.meta.env.VITE_DOCUMENT_SERVER_URL,
  'https://app.sisad.com.ec:2096/DocumentaryManagement/api/',
);
export const CoreServer = resolveApiBase(
  import.meta.env.VITE_CORE_SERVER_URL,
  'https://app.sisad.com.ec:2096/Core/api/',
);
export const WorkflowServer = resolveApiBase(
  import.meta.env.VITE_WORKFLOWS_SERVER_URL,
  'https://app.sisad.com.ec:2096/WorkFlows/api/',
);

export const MARKET_SEGMENTS = [
  'Almacén - Distribuidora',
  'Taller - Mecánica',
  'Lavadora-Lubricadora',
  'Transportista – Coop.',
  'Concesionaria',
  'Gasolinera',
  'Agrícola',
  'Industrial',
  'Empresa de Servicio',
  'Estatal',
  'Recorredor',
  'Otros',
];

export const CLIENT_CLASSIFICATION_OPTIONS = [
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Reventa', value: 'almacenes_repuestos', label: 'Almacenes de Repuestos | Ferretería' },
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Reventa', value: 'almacenes_accesorios', label: 'Almacenes de Accesorios' },
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Reventa', value: 'mayoristas', label: 'Mayoristas' },
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Reventa', value: 'recorredores', label: 'Recorredores' },
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Reventa', value: 'autoservicios_gasolineras', label: 'Autoservicios | Gasolineras' },
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Reventa', value: 'hipermercado', label: 'Hipermercado' },
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Consumo en Sitio', value: 'lubricadoras_lavadoras', label: 'Lubricadoras | Lavadoras' },
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Consumo en Sitio', value: 'tecnicentros', label: 'Tecnicentros' },
  { group: 'AUTOMOTRIZ / Consumo en Sitio', value: 'talleres_concesionarios', label: 'Talleres Mecánicos Concesionarios' },

// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #12
// Ruta relativa: src/infrastructure/formPersistence.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/infrastructure/formPersistence.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 325
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"

import { logger } from "@/shared/utils/common";

export const AUTH_STATE_STORAGE_KEY = "sisad_inverneg_external_state_v1";

const EXTERNAL_FLOW_CONTEXT_STORAGE_KEY =
  "sisad_inverneg_external_flow_context_v1";
const FORM_DRAFT_PREFIX = "inverneg_credit_form";

function normalizeExternalFlowContext(payload = {}) {
  return {
    exec: String(payload?.exec ?? payload?.businessId ?? "").trim() || null,
    wrk: String(payload?.wrk ?? payload?.requestId ?? "").trim() || null,
    dcmt:
      String(payload?.dcmt ?? payload?.validationId ?? "").trim() || null,
  };
}

export function buildExternalFlowContextKey(payload = {}) {
  return JSON.stringify(normalizeExternalFlowContext(payload));
}

function readExternalFlowFromLocation() {
  const browserWindow =
    typeof globalThis !== "undefined" ? globalThis.window : null;
  if (!browserWindow) return normalizeExternalFlowContext();
  const fromSearch = new URLSearchParams(browserWindow.location.search || "");
  const fromHash = browserWindow.location.hash.includes("?")
    ? new URLSearchParams(browserWindow.location.hash.split("?")[1] || "")
    : new URLSearchParams("");
  const read = (name) => fromSearch.get(name) || fromHash.get(name) || "";
  return normalizeExternalFlowContext({
    exec: read("exec"),
    wrk: read("wrk"),
    dcmt: read("dcmt"),
  });
}

function hasCompleteExternalFlowContext(flow = {}) {
  return Boolean(flow?.exec && flow?.wrk && flow?.dcmt);
}

function safeSessionStorage() {
  try {
    return typeof globalThis !== "undefined" && globalThis.window
      ? globalThis.window.sessionStorage
      : null;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function safeLocalStorage() {
  try {
    return typeof globalThis !== "undefined" && globalThis.window
      ? globalThis.window.localStorage
      : null;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function buildFormDraftScopeSuffix(scope = {}) {
  const documentId = String(
    scope?.dcmt ?? scope?.documentId ?? scope?.validationId ?? "",
  ).trim();
  if (documentId) return `:dcmt:${documentId}`;

  const workflowId = String(
    scope?.wrk ?? scope?.workflowId ?? scope?.requestId ?? "",
  ).trim();
  const exec = String(scope?.exec ?? scope?.businessId ?? "").trim();
  if (!workflowId && !exec) return "";

  return `:flow:${workflowId || "none"}:${exec || "none"}`;
}

export function buildFormDraftStorageKey(formType, scope = {}) {
  return `${FORM_DRAFT_PREFIX}:${formType}${buildFormDraftScopeSuffix(scope)}`;
}

export function buildExternalFlowKey(payload = {}) {
  const context = normalizeExternalFlowContext(payload);
  return JSON.stringify({
    ...context,
    viewFiles:
      payload?.viewFiles === true ||
      String(payload?.viewFiles).toLowerCase() === "true"
        ? "true"
        : "false",
  });
}

export function loadExternalFormsState() {
  const storage = safeSessionStorage();
  if (!storage) return undefined;
  try {
    const currentFlow = readExternalFlowFromLocation();
    const currentFlowKey = buildExternalFlowContextKey(currentFlow);
    const persistedFlowKey =
      storage.getItem(EXTERNAL_FLOW_CONTEXT_STORAGE_KEY) || null;
    if (
      hasCompleteExternalFlowContext(currentFlow) &&
      persistedFlowKey &&
      persistedFlowKey !== currentFlowKey
    ) {
      storage.removeItem(AUTH_STATE_STORAGE_KEY);
      storage.setItem(EXTERNAL_FLOW_CONTEXT_STORAGE_KEY, currentFlowKey);
      return undefined;
    }

    const raw = storage.getItem(AUTH_STATE_STORAGE_KEY);
    if (!raw) return undefined;
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== "object") return undefined;
    return parsed;
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

export function saveExternalFormsState(state) {
  const storage = safeSessionStorage();
  if (!storage) return;
  try {
    storage.setItem(AUTH_STATE_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(state));
  } catch {
    // ignore storage errors intentionally
  }
}

export function clearExternalFormsState() {
  const storage = safeSessionStorage();
  if (!storage) return;
  try {
    storage.removeItem(AUTH_STATE_STORAGE_KEY);
    storage.removeItem(EXTERNAL_FLOW_CONTEXT_STORAGE_KEY);
  } catch {
    // ignore storage errors intentionally
  }
}

export function saveExternalFormsFlowContext(payload) {
  const storage = safeSessionStorage();
  if (!storage) return;
  try {
    storage.setItem(
      EXTERNAL_FLOW_CONTEXT_STORAGE_KEY,
      buildExternalFlowContextKey(payload),
    );
  } catch {
    // ignore storage errors
  }
}

export function loadExternalFormsFlowContext() {
  const storage = safeSessionStorage();
  if (!storage) return null;
  try {
    return storage.getItem(EXTERNAL_FLOW_CONTEXT_STORAGE_KEY);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export function getPersistedSessionToken({ validateToken = null } = {}) {
  const storage = safeSessionStorage();
  if (!storage) return null;
  try {
    const raw = storage.getItem(AUTH_STATE_STORAGE_KEY);
    if (!raw) return null;
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    const token = String(
      parsed?.auth?.session?.token || parsed?.auth?.session?.accessToken || "",
    ).trim();
    if (!token) return null;

    if (
      typeof validateToken === "function" &&
      validateToken(token) === false
    ) {
      try {
        const cleaned = {
          ...parsed,
          auth: {
            ...parsed.auth,
            session: { ...parsed.auth?.session, token: null, accessToken: null },
          },
        };
        storage.setItem(AUTH_STATE_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(cleaned));
      } catch {
        try {
          storage.removeItem(AUTH_STATE_STORAGE_KEY);
        } catch {
          /* noop */
        }
      }
      return null;
    }

    return token;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export function selectExternalFormsPersistedState(state) {
  return {
    auth: {
      loading: false,
      error: state?.auth?.error || null,
      status: state?.auth?.status || null,
      session: state?.auth?.session || null,
      statusGeneratePin: state?.auth?.statusGeneratePin || null,
      dataGeneratePin: state?.auth?.dataGeneratePin || null,
      statusValidatePin: state?.auth?.statusValidatePin || null,
      dataValidatePin: state?.auth?.dataValidatePin || null,
      statusViewFiles: state?.auth?.statusViewFiles || null,
      dataViewFiles: state?.auth?.dataViewFiles || null,
      verifyRequestKey: null,
      generatePinRequestKey: null,
      summaryRequestKey: null,
    },
    request: {
      loading: false,
      error: state?.request?.error || null,
      status: state?.request?.status || null,
      dataRequest: state?.request?.dataRequest || null,
      workflowFiles: [],
      workflowDocTypes: [],
      workflowDocumentFiles: [],
      workflowPendingFiles: [],
      loadingWorkflowFiles: false,
      statusWorkflowFiles: state?.request?.statusWorkflowFiles || null,
      errorWorkflowFiles: state?.request?.errorWorkflowFiles || null,
      loadingWorkflowDocumentFiles: false,
      statusWorkflowDocumentFiles:
        state?.request?.statusWorkflowDocumentFiles || null,
      errorWorkflowDocumentFiles:
        state?.request?.errorWorkflowDocumentFiles || null,
      loadingUploadWorkflowFile: false,
      statusUploadWorkflowFile:
        state?.request?.statusUploadWorkflowFile || null,
      errorUploadWorkflowFile: state?.request?.errorUploadWorkflowFile || null,
      loadingSaveForm: false,
      errorSaveForm: state?.request?.errorSaveForm || null,
      statusSaveForm: state?.request?.statusSaveForm || null,
      workflowFilesRequestKey: null,
      validateRequestKey: null,
      sendRequestKey: null,
    },
  };
}

export function saveFormDraft(formType, data, scope = {}) {
  const storage = safeLocalStorage();
  if (!storage) return false;

  try {
    const key = buildFormDraftStorageKey(formType, scope);
    storage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data));
    return true;
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error("Error saving draft", error);
    return false;
  }
}

export function loadFormDraft(formType, scope = {}) {
  const storage = safeLocalStorage();
  if (!storage) return null;

  try {
    const key = buildFormDraftStorageKey(formType, scope);
    const raw = storage.getItem(key);
    if (!raw) return null;
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    return parsed;
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error("Error loading draft", error);
    return null;
  }
}

export function clearFormDraft(formType, scope = {}) {
  const storage = safeLocalStorage();
  if (!storage) return false;

  try {
    storage.removeItem(buildFormDraftStorageKey(formType, scope));
    return true;
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error("Error clearing draft", error);
    return false;
  }
}

export function listAllDraftKeys() {
  const storage = safeLocalStorage();
  if (!storage) return [];

  try {
    const keys = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < storage.length; i += 1) {
      const k = storage.key(i);
      if (typeof k === "string" && k.indexOf(FORM_DRAFT_PREFIX) === 0)
        keys.push(k);
    }
    return keys;
  } catch (error) {
    logger.warn("Error listing draft keys", error);
    return [];
  }
}

export function hasDraft(formType, scope = {}) {
  const storage = safeLocalStorage();
  if (!storage) return false;
  try {
    const key = buildFormDraftStorageKey(formType, scope);
    return storage.getItem(key) !== null;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 310
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { logger } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { getOrSetPending } from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";

export function cleanString(value) {
  return String(value ?? "").trim();
}

export function firstDefinedValue(...values) {
  return values.find((v) => v !== undefined && v !== null && v !== "") ?? null;
}

export function firstNonEmptyString(...values) {
  return values.map((v) => cleanString(v)).find((v) => v.length > 0) || "";
}

export function cleanUrlPart(value = "") {
  return String(value || "")
    .trim()
    .replace(/\/+$/, "");
}

export function buildUrlWithQuery(baseUrl, query = null) {
  const url =
    baseUrl instanceof URL
      ? new URL(baseUrl.href)
      : new URL(String(baseUrl || ""));
  if (query && typeof query === "object") {
    Object.entries(query).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") return;
      url.searchParams.set(key, String(value));
    });
  }
  return url;
}

export function buildAbsoluteUrl(base, path) {
  const cleanBase = String(base || "").trim();
  const cleanPath = String(path || "")
    .trim()
    .replace(/^\/+/, "");
  if (!cleanPath) return new URL(cleanBase);
  return new URL(`${cleanBase.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/${cleanPath}`);
}

async function parseResponseJson(response) {
  const text = await response.text().catch((err) => {
    logger?.warn?.(
      "httpTransport.parseResponseJson: failed to read text",
      err?.message,
    );
    return "";
  });
  try {
    return text ? JSON.parse(text) : {};
  } catch {
    return text ? { response: text } : {};
  }
}

function throwResponseError(
  data,
  status,
  defaultErrorPrefix = "Error from request",
) {
  const err = new Error(
    data?.response || data?.message || `${defaultErrorPrefix} (${status})`,
  );
  err.status = status;
  err.response = data;
  if (status === 401 || status === 403) err.auth = true;
  throw err;
}

export function parseJsonOrEmptyArray(rawBody) {
  const raw = String(rawBody || "");
  if (!raw.trim()) return [];
  const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
  return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
}

export function resolveJsonOrTextErrorMessage({
  rawBody,
  contentType,
  fallbackMessage,
}) {
  const raw = String(rawBody || "");
  const message = String(
    fallbackMessage || "No se pudo completar la solicitud.",
  );
  if (!raw.trim()) return message;
  if (String(contentType || "").includes("application/json")) {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      return parsed?.response || parsed?.message || message;
    } catch {
      return raw;
    }
  }
  return raw;
}

export const DEFAULT_ACCEPT_HEADER = "application/json, text/plain, */*";

function normalizeHeaders(headers = {}) {
  const result = {};
  Object.entries(headers || {}).forEach(([k, v]) => {
    if (v === undefined || v === null) return;
    result[String(k).trim()] = String(v);
  });
  return result;
}

export function isAuthError(err) {
  return Boolean(err && (err.status === 401 || err.status === 403 || err.auth));
}

export async function safeFetch(
  url,
  options = {},
  { timeoutMs = 0, signal: externalSignal = null } = {},
) {
  const hasTimeout = Number(timeoutMs) > 0;
  const hasExternalSignal = externalSignal != null;

  if (!hasTimeout && !hasExternalSignal) return fetch(url, options);

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const onExternalAbort = () => controller.abort();
  if (
    hasExternalSignal &&
    externalSignal &&
    typeof externalSignal.addEventListener === "function"
  ) {
    if (externalSignal.aborted) controller.abort();
    else externalSignal.addEventListener("abort", onExternalAbort);
  }

  const id = hasTimeout
    ? setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), Number(timeoutMs) || 0)
    : null;
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(url, { ...options, signal: controller.signal });
    return resp;
  } finally {
    if (id) clearTimeout(id);
    if (
      hasExternalSignal &&
      externalSignal &&
      typeof externalSignal.removeEventListener === "function"
    ) {
      externalSignal.removeEventListener("abort", onExternalAbort);
    }
  }
}

export async function fetchWithRetries(
  url,
  options = {},
  { retries = 2, retryDelayMs = 300, timeoutMs = 0, signal = null } = {},
) {
  let lastErr;
  for (let i = 0; i <= retries; i += 1) {
    try {
      const resp = await safeFetch(url, options, { timeoutMs, signal });
      return resp;
    } catch (err) {
      lastErr = err;
      if (i < retries) await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, retryDelayMs));
    }
  }
  throw lastErr;
}

export function createJsonRequester({
  baseUrl,
  apiKey,
  defaultErrorPrefix = "Error from request",
  headers: baseHeaders = {},
} = {}) {
  const cleanBaseUrl = cleanUrlPart(baseUrl);
  if (!cleanBaseUrl) {
    throw new Error("No se encontró la URL base del servicio.");
  }

  return async function requestJson(
    path = "",
    {
      method = "GET",
      body,
      headers = {},
      query = null,
      timeoutMs = 0,
      retries = 0,
      retryDelayMs = 300,
      signal = null,
      dedupe = false,
    } = {},
  ) {
    const cleanPath = String(path || "")
      .trim()
      .replace(/^\/+/, "");
    const url = buildUrlWithQuery(
      cleanPath ? `${cleanBaseUrl}/${cleanPath}` : cleanBaseUrl,
      query,
    );

    const requestHeaders = {
      Accept: DEFAULT_ACCEPT_HEADER,
      ...(body !== undefined ? { "Content-Type": "application/json" } : {}),
      ...baseHeaders,
      ...normalizeHeaders(headers),
    };

    if (apiKey && !requestHeaders["x-nexxit-key"]) {
      requestHeaders["x-nexxit-key"] = apiKey;
    }

    const fetchOptions = {
      method,
      headers: requestHeaders,
      body: body === undefined ? undefined : JSON.stringify(body),
    };

    const doFetch = async () => {
      const resp =
        retries > 0
          ? await fetchWithRetries(url, fetchOptions, {
              retries,
              retryDelayMs,
              timeoutMs,
              signal,
            })
          : await safeFetch(url, fetchOptions, { timeoutMs, signal });

      const data = await parseResponseJson(resp);
      if (!resp.ok) throwResponseError(data, resp.status, defaultErrorPrefix);
      return data;
    };

    if (dedupe) {
      let bodyKey = "";
      try {
        bodyKey = body === undefined ? "" : JSON.stringify(body);
      } catch {
        bodyKey = String(body || "");
      }
      const cacheKey = `${method}:${String(url)}:${bodyKey}`;
      return getOrSetPending(cacheKey, doFetch);
    }

    return doFetch();
  };
}

export async function requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl(
  url,
  {
    method = "GET",
    body,
    headers = {},
    query = null,
    defaultErrorPrefix = "Error from request",
    timeoutMs = 0,
    retries = 0,
    retryDelayMs = 300,
    signal = null,
    dedupe = false,
  } = {},
) {
  const nextUrl = buildUrlWithQuery(url, query);
  const fetchOptions = {
    method,
    headers: {
      Accept: DEFAULT_ACCEPT_HEADER,
      ...(body !== undefined ? { "Content-Type": "application/json" } : {}),
      ...normalizeHeaders(headers),
    },
    body: body === undefined ? undefined : JSON.stringify(body),
  };

  const doFetch = async () => {
    const resp =
      retries > 0
        ? await fetchWithRetries(nextUrl, fetchOptions, {
            retries,
            retryDelayMs,
            timeoutMs,
            signal,
          })
        : await safeFetch(nextUrl, fetchOptions, { timeoutMs, signal });

    const data = await parseResponseJson(resp);
    if (!resp.ok) throwResponseError(data, resp.status, defaultErrorPrefix);
    return data;
  };

  if (dedupe) {
    let bodyKey = "";
    try {
      bodyKey = body === undefined ? "" : JSON.stringify(body);
    } catch {
      bodyKey = String(body || "");
    }
    const cacheKey = `${method}:${String(nextUrl)}:${bodyKey}`;
    return getOrSetPending(cacheKey, doFetch);
  }

  return doFetch();
}

import React from "react";
import ReactDOM from "react-dom/client";
import { HashRouter } from "react-router-dom";
import { Provider } from "react-redux";
import { Toaster } from "react-hot-toast";
import App from "../app/App.jsx";
import { store } from "../store/store.js";
import "../styles/global/index.css";
import "../styles/forms-scoped.css";
import "../styles/forms-mobile.css";

function dismissPreload() {
  const el = document.getElementById("app-preload");
  if (!el) return;
  el.classList.add("fade-out");
  el.addEventListener("transitionend", () => el.remove(), { once: true });
  setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 400);
}

function ensurePreloadMarkup() {
  if (document.getElementById("app-preload")) return;
  const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
  wrapper.innerHTML = `
    <div id="app-preload">
      <div id="app-preload__card">
        <div id="app-preload__spinner"></div>
        <div>
          <h2 id="app-preload__title">Cargando aplicación</h2>
          <p id="app-preload__subtitle">Preparando los datos iniciales…</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  document.body.insertBefore(
    wrapper.firstElementChild,
    document.body.firstChild,
  );
}

export function startApp({ mountId = "root" } = {}) {
  ensurePreloadMarkup();

  const mountEl = document.getElementById(mountId);
  if (!mountEl) {
    throw new Error(`Mount element #${mountId} not found`);
  }

  ReactDOM.createRoot(mountEl).render(
    <React.StrictMode>
      <Provider store={store}>
        <HashRouter>
          <App />
          <Toaster position="top-right" />
        </HashRouter>
      </Provider>
    </React.StrictMode>,
  );

  // Dismiss after first paint
  dismissPreload();
}

export default startApp;


// ========================== FIN DE src/runtime/appRuntime.jsx ==========================

import { configureStore } from "@reduxjs/toolkit";
import authReducer from "./slices/authSlice";
import requestReducer from "./slices/requestSlice";
import {
  loadExternalFormsState,
  saveExternalFormsState,
  selectExternalFormsPersistedState,
} from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";

const persistedState = loadExternalFormsState();

export const store = configureStore({
  reducer: {
    auth: authReducer,
    request: requestReducer,
  },
  preloadedState: persistedState,
  middleware: (getDefaultMiddleware) =>
    getDefaultMiddleware({
      serializableCheck: {
        ignoredActions: ["auth/setSession"],
        ignoredPaths: ["auth.session"],
      },
    }),
});

store.subscribe(() => {
  saveExternalFormsState(selectExternalFormsPersistedState(store.getState()));
});

/**
 * Core document utilities: cache (LRU), pending promise dedup, hashing
 * and lightweight metrics. Also exposes a small document state coordinator.
 * This file consolidates previously-separated modules to reduce churn
 * and keep related logic together for easier grouping/refactor.
 */

// ===================== LRU Cache & Hashing =====================
export class LruCache {
  constructor(maxSize = 20) {
    this.maxSize = maxSize;
    this._cache = new Map();
  }

  get(key) {
    if (!this._cache.has(key)) return undefined;
    const value = this._cache.get(key);
    this._cache.delete(key);
    this._cache.set(key, value);
    return value;
  }

  set(key, value) {
    if (this._cache.has(key)) this._cache.delete(key);
    this._cache.set(key, value);
    if (this._cache.size > this.maxSize) {
      const oldest = this._cache.keys().next().value;
      this._cache.delete(oldest);
    }
  }

  has(key) {
    return this._cache.has(key);
  }

  delete(key) {
    this._cache.delete(key);
  }

  invalidate(predicate) {
    for (const [key, value] of this._cache) {
      if (predicate(key, value)) this._cache.delete(key);
    }
  }

  clear() {
    this._cache.clear();
  }

  get size() {
    return this._cache.size;
  }
}

export const htmlCache = new LruCache(20);
export const pdfCache = new LruCache(5);
export const anchorCache = new LruCache(10);

const pendingPromises = new Map();

/**
 * Deduplicates in-flight promises by cacheKey.
 * Adds lightweight metrics: counts inflight requests and failures.
 */
export async function getOrSetPending(cacheKey, factory) {
  if (pendingPromises.has(cacheKey)) {
    // Another caller already started this request — count as a dedupe
    incrementCounter && incrementCounter("inflightDedupes", { cacheKey });
    return pendingPromises.get(cacheKey);
  }

  // Record that a new inflight request was created
  incrementCounter && incrementCounter("inflightRequests", { cacheKey });

  const promise = (async () => {
    try {
      return await factory();
    } catch (err) {
      // Track failures of the underlying factory
      try {
        incrementCounter &&
          incrementCounter("fetchFailures", {
            cacheKey,
            message: String(err?.message || err),
          });
      } catch {
        // ignore metric failures
      }
      throw err;
    }
  })();

  pendingPromises.set(cacheKey, promise);
  try {
    return await promise;
  } finally {
    pendingPromises.delete(cacheKey);
  }
}

// Hash helpers
const hashCache = new WeakMap();
let hashCounter = 0;
const hashMap = new Map();

function stableSerialize(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (value == null) return "null";
  const valueType = typeof value;
  if (valueType === "number" || valueType === "boolean")
    return JSON.stringify(value);
  if (valueType === "string") return JSON.stringify(value);
  if (value instanceof Date) return JSON.stringify(value.toISOString());
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return `[${value.map((item) => stableSerialize(item, seen)).join(",")}]`;
  }
  if (valueType === "object") {
    if (seen.has(value)) return '"[Circular]"';
    seen.add(value);
    const keys = Object.keys(value).sort();
    const serialized = keys
      .filter(
        (key) => typeof value[key] !== "function" && value[key] !== undefined,
      )
      .map(
        (key) => `${JSON.stringify(key)}:${stableSerialize(value[key], seen)}`,
      )
      .join(",");
    seen.delete(value);
    return `{${serialized}}`;
  }
  return JSON.stringify(String(value));
}

function hashString(input = "") {
  let hash = 0x811c9dc5;
  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i += 1) {
    hash ^= input.charCodeAt(i);
    hash = Math.imul(hash, 0x01000193);
  }
  return (hash >>> 0).toString(36);
}

export function hashFormData(formData) {
  if (!formData || typeof formData !== "object")
    return hashString(JSON.stringify(formData));

  if (hashCache.has(formData)) {
    const hashId = hashCache.get(formData);
    if (hashMap.has(hashId)) return hashMap.get(hashId);
  }

  const serialized = stableSerialize(formData);
  const hash = hashString(serialized);
  const hashId = ++hashCounter;

  hashCache.set(formData, hashId);
  hashMap.set(hashId, hash);

  if (hashMap.size > 100) {
    const firstKey = hashMap.keys().next().value;
    hashMap.delete(firstKey);
  }

  return hash;
}

export function invalidateDocumentCache(documentId) {
  htmlCache.invalidate((key) => key.includes(documentId));
  pdfCache.invalidate((key) => key.includes(documentId));
  anchorCache.invalidate((key) => key.includes(documentId));
}

export function invalidateAllDocumentCache() {
  htmlCache.clear();
  pdfCache.clear();
  anchorCache.clear();
  pendingPromises.clear();
}

// ===================== Metrics =====================
const metricsStore = [];
const counters = new Map();

function now() {
  if (
    typeof performance !== "undefined" &&
    typeof performance.now === "function"
  )
    return performance.now();
  return Date.now();
}

export function startMetric(name, meta = {}) {
  const startAt = now();
  return {
    end(extra = {}) {
      const durationMs = Number((now() - startAt).toFixed(2));
      const entry = {
        ts: new Date().toISOString(),
        name,
        durationMs,
        ...meta,
        ...extra,
      };
      metricsStore.push(entry);
      if (metricsStore.length > 500) metricsStore.shift();
      return entry;
    },
  };
}

export function incrementCounter(name, meta = {}) {
  const current = counters.get(name) || 0;
  const next = current + 1;
  counters.set(name, next);
  const entry = {
    ts: new Date().toISOString(),
    type: "counter",
    name,
    value: next,
    ...meta,
  };
  metricsStore.push(entry);
  if (metricsStore.length > 500) metricsStore.shift();
  return next;
}

export function getDocumentMetricsSnapshot() {
  return {
    metrics: [...metricsStore],
    counters: Object.fromEntries(counters.entries()),
  };
}

export function clearDocumentMetrics() {
  metricsStore.length = 0;
  counters.clear();
}

export async function getApproxMemoryUsage() {
  if (typeof performance === "undefined" || !performance.memory) return null;
  const { usedJSHeapSize, totalJSHeapSize } = performance.memory;
  return { usedJSHeapSize, totalJSHeapSize };
}



// ===================== Document State Coordinator =====================
export const PREVIEW_STATE = Object.freeze({
  IDLE: "idle",
  DIRTY: "dirty",
  SYNCING: "syncing",
  READY: "ready",
  ERROR: "error",
  STALE: "stale",
});

export function createDocumentStateCoordinator() {
  let requestCounter = 0;
  const abortControllers = new Map();

  function nextRequestId() {
    requestCounter += 1;
    return requestCounter;
  }

  function cancelRequest(requestId) {
    if (!requestId) return;
    const controller = abortControllers.get(requestId);
    if (!controller) return;
    controller.abort();
    abortControllers.delete(requestId);
  }

  function beginRequest() {
    const requestId = nextRequestId();
    const controller = new AbortController();
    abortControllers.set(requestId, controller);
    return { requestId, signal: controller.signal };
  }

  function completeRequest(requestId) {
    abortControllers.delete(requestId);
  }

  function cancelAll() {
    for (const controller of abortControllers.values()) controller.abort();
    abortControllers.clear();
  }

  return {
    PREVIEW_STATE,
    beginRequest,
    completeRequest,
    cancelRequest,
    cancelAll,
  };
}

export default {
  LruCache,
  htmlCache,
  pdfCache,
  anchorCache,
  getOrSetPending,
  hashFormData,
  invalidateDocumentCache,
  invalidateAllDocumentCache,
  startMetric,
  incrementCounter,
  getDocumentMetricsSnapshot,
  clearDocumentMetrics,
  getApproxMemoryUsage,
  PREVIEW_STATE,
  createDocumentStateCoordinator,
};

// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 227

/**
 * Orquestador de documentos: coordina las capas template/rasterizer/pdf/cache
 * según el modo solicitado (preview, signing, export, print).
 */

import {
  htmlCache,
  pdfCache,
  hashFormData,
  getOrSetPending,
  invalidateDocumentCache,
  incrementCounter,
} from "./coreCacheMetrics.js";

/**
 * @typedef {'preview'|'signing'|'export'|'print'} RenderMode
 */

/**
 * @typedef {Object} PreviewResult
 * @property {string} [html]
 * @property {Uint8Array} [pdfBytes]
 * @property {string} [base64]
 * @property {boolean} fromCache
 */

/**
 * Genera la cache key para un documento.
 * @param {object} params
 * @returns {string}
 */
export function buildCacheKey({ formType, documentId, formData, mode }) {
  const dataHash = hashFormData(formData || {});
  return [
    mode || "screen",
    String(formType || "natural").trim() || "natural",
    String(documentId || "solicitud").trim() || "solicitud",
    dataHash,
  ].join("|");
}

/**
 * Renderiza HTML desde el template engine.
 * @param {object} params
 * @returns {Promise<{ html: string }>}
 */
async function renderHtml({ formType, formData, documentId }, options = {}) {
  const { renderHtmlDocument, applyPreviewMode } =
    await import("@/core/engines/documentEngine/documentRuntime.js");
  const html = await renderHtmlDocument(
    formType,
    formData,
    documentId,
    options,
  );
  return { html: applyPreviewMode ? applyPreviewMode(html, "screen") : html };
}

/**
 * Genera PDF desde HTML usando rasterizer + pdfGenerator.
 * @param {string} html
 * @param {object} [options]
 * @returns {Promise<{ pdfBytes: Uint8Array, base64: string }>}
 */
async function generatePdfFromHtml(html, options = {}) {
  const {
    renderHtmlToPdfViaApi,
    renderHtmlToPdfWithAnchorsViaApi,
    normalizePdfRenderResult,
  } = await import("@/core/document/services/remotePdfService.js");
  const {
    resolveAnchors = false,
    expectedAnchors = [],
    anchorSelector,
    documentId,
    metadata = {},
  } = options || {};
  // Delegate PDF rendering to remote service; keep same options shape where possible
  const renderPdf = resolveAnchors
    ? renderHtmlToPdfWithAnchorsViaApi
    : renderHtmlToPdfViaApi;
  const result = await renderPdf(html, {
    ...(options || {}),
    documentId,
    expectedAnchors,
    anchorSelector,
    metadata,
    locateStamps: Boolean(resolveAnchors),
  });
  return normalizePdfRenderResult(result, {
    fileName: options?.fileName,
  });
}

/**
 * Obtiene o genera preview de un documento según el modo.
 *
 * Modos:
 *  - preview: solo HTML (cacheado)
 *  - signing: solo HTML (cacheado)
 *  - export:  HTML → Canvas → PDF (cacheado)
 *  - print:   HTML (sin cache de PDF)
 *
 * @param {object} params
 * @param {string} params.documentId
 * @param {object} params.formData
 * @param {RenderMode} params.mode
 * @param {string} params.formType
 * @param {string} [params.fileName]
 * @returns {Promise<PreviewResult>}
 */
export async function getOrGeneratePreview({
  documentId,
  formData,
  mode = "preview",
  formType,
  fileName,
  forceRefresh = false,
  resolveAnchors = false,
  expectedAnchors = [],
  anchorSelector,
  metadata = {},
} = {}) {
  const cacheKey = buildCacheKey({ formType, documentId, formData, mode });

  // Preview y signing solo necesitan HTML
  if (mode === "preview" || mode === "signing") {
    const cached = htmlCache.get(cacheKey);
    if (cached?.html && !forceRefresh) {
      incrementCounter("cacheHits", { cacheKey, mode });
      return { html: cached.html, fromCache: true };
    }

    incrementCounter("cacheMisses", { cacheKey, mode });
    return getOrSetPending(cacheKey, async () => {
      const { html } = await renderHtml(
        { formType, formData, documentId },
        { forceRefresh },
      );
      htmlCache.set(cacheKey, { html, updatedAt: Date.now() });
      return { html, fromCache: false };
    });
  }

  // Export necesita HTML → Canvas → PDF
  if (mode === "export") {
    const cachedPdf = pdfCache.get(cacheKey);
    if (cachedPdf?.pdfBytes) {
      incrementCounter("cacheHits", { cacheKey, mode });
      const { normalizePdfRenderResult } = await import(
        "@/core/document/services/remotePdfService.js"
      );
      return {
        ...normalizePdfRenderResult(cachedPdf),
        fromCache: true,
      };
    }

    incrementCounter("cacheMisses", { cacheKey, mode });
    return getOrSetPending(cacheKey, async () => {
      // Reusar HTML cacheado si existe (a menos que forceRefresh esté activo)
      let html = !forceRefresh ? htmlCache.get(cacheKey)?.html : undefined;
      if (!html) {
        const rendered = await renderHtml(
          { formType, formData, documentId },
          { forceRefresh },
        );
        html = rendered.html;
        htmlCache.set(cacheKey, { html, updatedAt: Date.now() });
      }

      const rendered = await generatePdfFromHtml(html, {
        fileName: fileName || `${documentId}.pdf`,
        documentId,
        resolveAnchors,
        expectedAnchors,
        anchorSelector,
        metadata,
      });

      const cachedPayload = {
        ...rendered,
        updatedAt: Date.now(),
      };
      pdfCache.set(cacheKey, cachedPayload);
      return {
        ...cachedPayload,
        fromCache: false,
      };
    });
  }

  // Print reusa HTML (el navegador maneja la impresión)
  if (mode === "print") {
    let html = !forceRefresh ? htmlCache.get(cacheKey)?.html : undefined;
    if (html) {
      incrementCounter("cacheHits", { cacheKey, mode });
      return { html, fromCache: true };
    }

    incrementCounter("cacheMisses", { cacheKey, mode });
    const rendered = await renderHtml(
      { formType, formData, documentId },
      { forceRefresh },
    );
    html = rendered.html;
    htmlCache.set(cacheKey, { html, updatedAt: Date.now() });
    return { html, fromCache: false };
  }

  throw new Error(`Modo de preview no soportado: ${mode}`);
}

/**
 * Invalida cache cuando el formulario cambia significativamente.
 * @param {string} documentId
 */
export function invalidateDocument(documentId) {
  invalidateDocumentCache(documentId);
}

export default {
  buildCacheKey,
  getOrGeneratePreview,
  invalidateDocument,
};

// Extensión: .js

import {
  acquireIframe,
  loadIframeContent,
  releaseIframe,
  disposeIframe,
} from "@/core/document/runtime/safeIframePool";
import { incrementCounter } from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";

const RASTER_IFRAME_KEY = "rasterizer";

export function releaseRasterizerPool() {
  disposeIframe(RASTER_IFRAME_KEY);
}

/**
 * Limpia canvas para liberar memoria GPU.
 * @param {HTMLCanvasElement[]} canvases
 */
function cleanupCanvases(canvases) {
  for (const canvas of canvases) {
    canvas.width = 0;
    canvas.height = 0;
  }
}

/**
 * Carga HTML en el iframe compartido y espera a que esté listo.
 * @param {string} html
 * @returns {Promise<Document>}
 */
async function loadHtmlInIframe(html) {
  const iframe = acquireIframe(RASTER_IFRAME_KEY, { width: 794, height: 1123 });
  const doc = await loadIframeContent(iframe, { html });
  return doc;
}

/**
 * @typedef {Object} RasterOptions
 * @property {number} [scale=1.5] - Factor de escala (1.5 balance calidad/memoria)
 * @property {number} [pageHeight=1123] - Alto de página en px (A4 a 96dpi)
 * @property {number} [pageWidth=794] - Ancho de página en px (A4 a 96dpi)
 */

/**
 * Convierte HTML a array de canvases (uno por página A4).
 * @param {string} html - HTML completo del documento
 * @param {RasterOptions} [options]
 * @returns {Promise<{ canvases: HTMLCanvasElement[], cleanup: Function }>}
 */
export async function htmlToCanvases(html, options = {}) {
  const { scale = 1.5, pageHeight = 1123 } = options;

  const doc = await loadHtmlInIframe(html);
  const source = doc?.documentElement || doc?.body;
  if (!source)
    throw new Error("No se pudo preparar el documento para rasterización.");

  const [{ default: html2canvas }] = await Promise.all([import("html2canvas")]);

  const totalHeight = source.scrollHeight;
  const pages = Math.ceil(totalHeight / pageHeight);
  const canvases = [];

  // Renderizar canvas completo una vez
  const fullCanvas = await html2canvas(source, {
    scale,
    useCORS: true,
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    windowWidth: 794,
    scrollX: 0,
    scrollY: 0,
  });

  // Cortar en páginas
  for (let i = 0; i < pages; i++) {
    const sliceY = i * (pageHeight * scale);
    const sliceHeight = Math.min(
      fullCanvas.height - sliceY,
      pageHeight * scale,
    );

    if (sliceHeight <= 0) break;

    const pageCanvas = document.createElement("canvas");
    pageCanvas.width = fullCanvas.width;
    pageCanvas.height = sliceHeight;

    const ctx = pageCanvas.getContext("2d");
    if (!ctx)
      throw new Error("No se pudo preparar el canvas para exportación.");
    incrementCounter("canvasCreatedCount", { page: i + 1 });
    ctx.drawImage(
      fullCanvas,
      0,
      sliceY,
      fullCanvas.width,
      sliceHeight,
      0,
      0,
      fullCanvas.width,
      sliceHeight,
    );
    canvases.push(pageCanvas);
  }

  // Liberar canvas completo
  fullCanvas.width = 0;
  fullCanvas.height = 0;

  return {
    canvases,
    cleanup: () => {
      cleanupCanvases(canvases);
      releaseIframe(RASTER_IFRAME_KEY);
    },
  };
}

// Cleanup en unload de la página
if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
  window.addEventListener("beforeunload", releaseRasterizerPool);
}

export default { htmlToCanvases, releaseRasterizerPool };

export function getDocumentDefinition(documentId) {
  return DOCUMENT_DEFINITIONS[documentId] || null;
}

export function getDocumentTemplatePath(documentId, formType, engine = "html") {
  const config = getDocumentDefinition(documentId);
  if (!config?.requiredFor?.includes(formType)) return null;
  return (
    config.templates?.[formType]?.[engine] ||
    config.templates?.[formType]?.html ||
    null
  );
}

export function getAvailableDocumentDefinitions(formType) {
  return Object.entries(DOCUMENT_DEFINITIONS)
    .filter(([, cfg]) => cfg.requiredFor.includes(formType))
    .map(([id, cfg]) => ({
      id,
      label: cfg.labelsByFormType?.[formType] || cfg.label,
    }));
}

export function getFormTypeLabel(formType) {
  return (
    DOCUMENT_DEFINITIONS.solicitud.labelsByFormType?.[formType] ||
    "Solicitud de Crédito"
  );
}

export function getDocumentDisplayLabel(documentId, formType) {
  const config = getDocumentDefinition(documentId);
  if (!config) return "Documento";
  return config.labelsByFormType?.[formType] || config.label;
}

export function getSigningAnchorDefinitions(documentId, formType = "natural") {
  switch (documentId) {
    case "solicitud":
      return formType === "linked"
        ? [
            { key: "solicitud.applicant", label: "Firma del solicitante" },
            { key: "solicitud.principal", label: "Firma del cliente principal" },
        ]
        : [{ key: "solicitud.applicant", label: "Firma del solicitante" }];
    case "convenio":
      return [{ key: "convenio.customer", label: "Firma del cliente" }];
    case "declaracion":
      return [
        {
          key: "declaracion.legalRepresentative",
          label: "Firma del representante legal",
        },
      ];
    case "pagare":
      return [{ key: "pagare.signature", label: "Firma del pagaré" }];
    default:
      return [];
  }
}

export function getSigningAnchorKeys(documentId, formType = "natural") {
  return getSigningAnchorDefinitions(documentId, formType)
    .map((anchor) => String(anchor?.key || "").trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function buildNaturalPrimarySigner(formData = {}) {
  return {
    role: "Solicitante",
    name: formData?.representative?.fullName || formData?.applicantSignatureName || "",
    id: formData?.representative?.ci || formData?.applicantIdOrRuc || formData?.business?.ruc || "",
    company: formData?.business?.businessName || formData?.convenio?.representedCompanyName || "",
    date: formData?.applicantDate || "",
  };
}

function buildLinkedSigners(formData = {}) {
  const principalSigner = {
    role: "Cliente principal / garante",
    name: formData?.principalAccount?.principalFullName || formData?.applicantSignatureName || "",
    id: formData?.principalAccount?.principalCi || formData?.applicantIdOrRuc || "",
    company: formData?.principalAccount?.businessName || formData?.groupName || "",
    date: formData?.applicantDate || "",
  };
  const linkedSigner = {
    role: "Cliente vinculado",
    name: formData?.representative?.fullName || "",
    id: formData?.representative?.ci || formData?.businessToLink?.ruc || "",
    company: formData?.businessToLink?.businessName || "",
    date: formData?.applicantDate || "",
  };
  return [principalSigner, linkedSigner];
}

function isSignerComplete(signer = {}) {
  return Boolean(signer.name && signer.id && signer.date);
}

export function getSigningDocumentsChecklist(formType = "natural", formData = {}) {
  const baseDocs = getAvailableDocumentDefinitions(formType)
    .filter((doc) => ["solicitud", "convenio", "declaracion"].includes(doc.id))
    .map((doc) => ({
      id: doc.id,
      label: doc.label,
      required: true,
      policyNote: "Documento contractual que requiere firma para continuar el proceso.",
    }));

  const promissory = evaluatePromissoryNoteRequirement(formData);
  if (!promissory.exempted && (promissory.required || promissory.evaluation)) {
    baseDocs.push({
      id: "pagare",
      label: "Pagaré",
      required: Boolean(promissory.required),
      policyNote: promissory.evaluation
        ? "Pagaré sujeto a evaluación del Departamento de Crédito."
        : "Pagaré requerido por política de crédito.",
    });
  }

  const signers = formType === "linked"
    ? buildLinkedSigners(formData)
    : [buildNaturalPrimarySigner(formData)];

  return baseDocs.map((doc) => {
    const docSigners = doc.id === "declaracion" ? signers.slice(0, 1) : signers;
    return {
      ...doc,
      signers: docSigners,
      signatureAnchors: getSigningAnchorDefinitions(doc.id, formType),
      readyToSign: docSigners.every(isSignerComplete),
    };
  });
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/domain/documents/documentModule.js ==========================

  NATURAL: "natural",
  LINKED: "linked",
});

  CUSTOMER: "customer",
  SALES: "sales",
  CREDIT: "credit",
});

const DEFAULT_PRIORITY = 100;
const ALL_ROLES = [ROLES.CUSTOMER, ROLES.SALES, ROLES.CREDIT];
const LINKED_BUSINESS_RULES = Object.freeze([
  {
    path: "principalIsGuarantor",
    when: ({ formData }) =>
      String(formData?.clientClassification || "")
        .toLowerCase()
        .includes("reventa") ||
      (Array.isArray(formData?.businessToLink?.marketSegment)
        ? formData.businessToLink.marketSegment.some((value) =>

            .toLowerCase()
            .includes("reventa")),

    message:
      "Para clientes de reventa, el cliente principal debe asumir la responsabilidad como garante",

    required: true,
    message: "Debe indicar el nombre del Grupo Empresarial",

            .toLowerCase()
