function isTruthyValue(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.length > 0;
  if (typeof value === "string") return value.trim() !== "";
  return Boolean(value);
}

function evaluateRequiredRule(rule, formData) {
  if (typeof rule?.required === "function") return rule.required({ formData, rule });
  return Boolean(rule?.required);
}

function isRuleActive(rule, formData) {
  if (!rule?.when) return true;
  return Boolean(rule.when({ formData, rule }));
}

function toTitleCase(value) {
  return String(value ?? "")
    .toLowerCase()
    .replaceAll(/\b\w/g, (char) => char.toUpperCase())
    .replaceAll(/\bDe\b/g, "de")
    .replaceAll(/\bDel\b/g, "del")
    .replaceAll(/\bY\b/g, "y");
}

function resolveClassificationOption(value) {
  const normalizedValue = normalizeComparable(value);
  if (!normalizedValue) return value;

  const match = CLIENT_CLASSIFICATION_OPTIONS.find(
    (option) =>
      normalizeComparable(option.label) === normalizedValue ||
      normalizeComparable(option.value) === normalizedValue ||
      normalizeComparable(option.group) === normalizedValue,
  );

  return match?.value || value;
}

export const INDEX_VALUE_TRANSFORMS = Object.freeze({
  identity: (value) => value,
  trim: (value) => (typeof value === "string" ? value.trim() : value),
  upperTrim: (value) =>
    typeof value === "string" ? value.trim().toUpperCase() : value,
  lowercaseTrim: (value) =>
    typeof value === "string" ? value.trim().toLowerCase() : value,
  toMacroSegmentValue: (value) => {
    if (typeof value !== "string") return value;
    return value.replaceAll("_", " ").trim();
  },
  toBooleanYesNo: (value) => {
    if (typeof value === "boolean") return value;
    if (typeof value !== "string") return value;
    const normalized = normalizeComparable(value);
    if (["si", "yes", "true", "1"].includes(normalized)) return true;
    if (["no", "false", "0"].includes(normalized)) return false;
    return value;
  },
  toCreditDecision: (value) => {
    if (typeof value !== "string") return value;
    const normalized = normalizeComparable(value);
    if (normalized === "aprobado") return "approved";
    if (normalized === "rechazado" || normalized === "anulada" || normalized === "anulado")
      return "denied";
    return value;
  },
  toSegmentLabel: (value) => {
    if (typeof value !== "string") return value;
    const normalized = normalizeComparable(value);
    const map = {
      REVENTA: "Reventa",
      "CONSUMO EN SITIO": "Consumo en Sitio",
      TRANSPORTE: "Transporte",
      INDUSTRIAL: "Industrial",
      "VENTA DE MOSTRADOR": "Venta de Mostrador",
    };
    return map[normalized] || toTitleCase(value);
  },
  toClassificationValue: (value) =>
    typeof value === "string" ? resolveClassificationOption(value) : value,
  normalizeRuc: (value) =>
    typeof value === "string"
      ? value.replaceAll(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 13)
      : value,
  normalizePhone: (value) =>
    typeof value === "string" ? value.replaceAll(/\D/g, "") : value,
  toBooleanPersonTypeNatural: (value) => {
    if (typeof value !== "string") return value;
    return ["NATURAL", "PERSONA NATURAL", "PN"].includes(
      value.trim().toUpperCase(),
    );
  },
  toBooleanPersonTypeLegal: (value) => {
    if (typeof value !== "string") return value;
    return ["JURIDICA", "PERSONA JURIDICA", "PERSONA JURÍDICA", "PJ"].includes(
      value.trim().toUpperCase(),
    );
  },
});

const T = (formType, path, priority, roles = ALL_ROLES, transform) => ({
  formType,
  path,
  roles,
  priority,
  ...(transform ? { transform } : {}),
});

export function normalizeIndexName(value) {
  return normalizeComparable(value);
}

export function normalizeDataTypeName(value) {
  return String(value || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
}

function buildIndexLookupMap() {
  const lookup = new Map();
  Object.entries(INDEX_NAME_FIELD_MAP).forEach(([rawIndexName, config]) => {
    const canonicalKey = normalizeIndexName(rawIndexName);
    lookup.set(canonicalKey, { ...config, indexName: rawIndexName });
    (config.aliases || []).forEach((alias) => {
      lookup.set(normalizeIndexName(alias), {
        ...config,
        indexName: rawIndexName,
      });
    });
  });
  return lookup;
}

const INDEX_LOOKUP = buildIndexLookupMap();

export function getIndexConfig(indexName) {
  return INDEX_LOOKUP.get(normalizeIndexName(indexName)) || null;
}

export function isTargetVisibleForRole(target, role = ROLES.CUSTOMER) {
  const allowedRoles =
    Array.isArray(target?.roles) && target.roles.length
      ? target.roles
      : ALL_ROLES;
  return allowedRoles.includes(role);
}

export function getTargetsForIndex(indexName, options = {}) {
  const { formType, role = ROLES.CUSTOMER, dataTypeName } = options;
  const config = getIndexConfig(indexName);
  if (!config) return [];

  const normalizedDataType = normalizeDataTypeName(dataTypeName);
  const allowedDataTypes = (config.dataTypeName || []).map(
    normalizeDataTypeName,
  );
  if (
    normalizedDataType &&
    allowedDataTypes.length &&
    !allowedDataTypes.includes(normalizedDataType)
  )
    return [];

  return (config.targets || [])
    .filter(
      (target) =>
        (!formType || target.formType === formType) &&
        isTargetVisibleForRole(target, role),
    )
    .sort(
      (a, b) =>
        (a.priority ?? DEFAULT_PRIORITY) - (b.priority ?? DEFAULT_PRIORITY),
    );
}

export function getTransformForTarget(indexName, target = {}) {
  const config = getIndexConfig(indexName);
  const transformName = target.transform || config?.transform || "identity";
  return (
    INDEX_VALUE_TRANSFORMS[transformName] || INDEX_VALUE_TRANSFORMS.identity
  );
}

export function resolveIndexTargets(indexName, options = {}) {
  const config = getIndexConfig(indexName);
  return getTargetsForIndex(indexName, options).map((target) => ({
    ...target,
    indexName: config?.indexName || indexName,
    transform: target.transform || config?.transform || "identity",
    transformFn: getTransformForTarget(indexName, target),
  }));
}

export function buildAuthHeaders(token, baseHeaders = {}) {
  const browserWindow = globalThis.window;
  const storage = browserWindow?.localStorage;
  const persistedToken =
    token ||
    (storage ? storage.getItem("token") : "") ||
    (storage ? storage.getItem("accessToken") : "") ||
    (storage ? storage.getItem("bearerToken") : "") ||
    "";

  const cleanToken = String(persistedToken).trim();
  if (!cleanToken) return { ...baseHeaders };
  return { ...baseHeaders, Authorization: `Bearer ${cleanToken}` };
}

export function getSectionsByFormType(formType, options = {}) {
  const sections =
    formType === FORM_TYPES.LINKED ? linkedPersonSections : naturalPersonSections;
  const sectionTemplates = Array.isArray(options?.sectionTemplates)
    ? options.sectionTemplates
    : [];
  const schemaTemplates = Array.isArray(formTemplates?.[formType]?.schema?.sections)
    ? formTemplates[formType].schema.sections
    : [];
  const defaultTemplates = Array.isArray(formTemplates?.[formType]?.sections)
    ? formTemplates[formType].sections
    : [];
  const fragments =
    formTemplates?.[formType]?.fragments &&
    typeof formTemplates[formType].fragments === "object"
      ? formTemplates[formType].fragments
      : {};
  const mergedTemplates = [
    ...schemaTemplates,
    ...defaultTemplates,
    ...sectionTemplates,
  ];
  const registries = {
    optionSets: {
      provinceOptions,
      cityOptions,
      maritalStatusOptions,
      CLIENT_CLASSIFICATION_OPTIONS,
    },
    optionMaps: {
      citiesByProvince,
    },
  };
  if (!mergedTemplates.length) return sections;
  return compileSectionTemplates(
    sections.map((section) => mergeSectionTemplate(section, {})),
    mergedTemplates,
    { fragments, registries },
  );
}

export function hasSectionData(data, section) {
  if (!section.path) {
    return section.fields.some((field) => {
      const value = data[field.name];
      return value && value !== "" && value !== false;
    });
  }

  const sectionData = getValueByPath(data, section.path);
  if (!sectionData) return false;

  return Object.values(sectionData).some((value) => {
    if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.length > 0;
    if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null)
      return Object.values(value).some((nested) => nested !== "");
    return value && value !== "";
  });
}

export function getFieldError(errors, path) {
  return errors[path] || null;
}

export function validateLinkedBusinessRules(formData = {}) {
  const errors = [];
  const members = Array.isArray(formData.linkedMembers)
    ? formData.linkedMembers
    : [];
  members.forEach((member, index) => {
    if (!member.isLegalEntity) return;
    if (!isTruthyValue(member.ruc))
      errors.push({
        path: `linkedMembers.${index}.ruc`,
        message: "R.U.C. es obligatorio para persona jurídica",
      });

    const attachments = formData.attachments || {};
    const escrituraKey = `escritura_linked_${index}`;
    const nombramientoKey = `nombramiento_linked_${index}`;
    if (
      !(
        attachments[escrituraKey] &&
        (attachments[escrituraKey].url || attachments[escrituraKey].data)
      )
    ) {
      errors.push({
        path: `attachments.${escrituraKey}`,
        message:
          "Escritura de constitución requerida para persona jurídica vinculada",
      });
    }
    if (
      !(
        attachments[nombramientoKey] &&
        (attachments[nombramientoKey].url || attachments[nombramientoKey].data)
      )
    ) {
      errors.push({
        path: `attachments.${nombramientoKey}`,
        message:
          "Nombramiento del representante requerido para persona jurídica vinculada",
      });
    }
  });

  if (!isTruthyValue(formData.convenio?.clientDisplayName)) {
    errors.push({
      path: "convenio.clientDisplayName",
      message: "Convenio de Crédito relacionado debe estar presente",
    });
  }

  LINKED_BUSINESS_RULES.forEach((rule) => {
    if (!isRuleActive(rule, formData)) return;
    const path = rule.path;
    if (!path) return;
    const value = getValueByPath(formData, path);
    const required = evaluateRequiredRule(rule, formData);
    if (required && !isTruthyValue(value)) {
      errors.push({ path, message: rule.message });
    }
  });

  return errors;
}

export { naturalPersonSections, linkedPersonSections };


// ========================== FIN DE src/domain/forms/formsDomainModule.js ==========================

import {
  getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument,
  normalizeSignaturePositions,
  selectPreferredSignaturePosition,
} from "./signingUtils";

export function isFinalSigningResult(result) {
  if (!result || typeof result !== "object") return false;
  if (result.completed === true) return true;
  if (result.signatureBatch?.completed === true) return true;
  if (result.resumed && result.result)
    return isFinalSigningResult(result.result);
  if (result.result) return isFinalSigningResult(result.result);
  return false;
}

export function pickSigningDocument(documents = [], requestedDocumentId = "") {
  if (!Array.isArray(documents) || documents.length === 0) return null;
  if (requestedDocumentId) {
    const requested = documents.find((doc) => doc?.id === requestedDocumentId);
    if (requested) return requested;
  }
  return documents.find((doc) => doc?.readyToSign) || documents[0] || null;
}

export function getOfficialAnchorsByDocumentId(
  signingState = {},
  documentId = "",
) {
  const resolvedId = String(documentId || "").trim();
  if (!resolvedId) return [];
  const map = signingState?.officialPdfByDocumentId || {};
  const entry = map?.[resolvedId] || {};
  const anchors = entry?.resolvedAnchors || entry?.anchors || [];
  return Array.isArray(anchors) ? anchors : [];
}

export function getPrimaryOfficialAnchorByDocumentId(
  signingState = {},
  documentId = "",
  formType = "natural",
) {
  const anchors = getOfficialAnchorsByDocumentId(signingState, documentId);
  if (anchors.length === 0) return null;
  const normalizedAnchors = normalizeSignaturePositions(anchors);
  const expectedAnchors = getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(
    documentId,
    formType,
  );
  return (
    selectPreferredSignaturePosition(normalizedAnchors, expectedAnchors) ||
    normalizedAnchors[0] ||
    null
  );
}

export function getAnchorDiagnosticsByDocumentId(
  signingState = {},
  documentId = "",
) {
  const resolvedId = String(documentId || "").trim();
  if (!resolvedId) return {};
  const map = signingState?.officialPdfByDocumentId || {};
  const entry = map?.[resolvedId] || {};
  return entry?.anchorDiagnostics || entry?.diagnostics || {};
}

export function hasOfficialAnchorsReady(signingState = {}, documentId = "") {
  return getOfficialAnchorsByDocumentId(signingState, documentId).length > 0;
}

export function getMissingExpectedAnchorsDiagnostics(
  signingState = {},
  documentId = "",
  formType = "natural",
) {
  const expectedAnchors = getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(
    documentId,
    formType,
  );
  const expectedRequiredKeys = expectedAnchors
    .filter((anchor) => !anchor?.optional)
    .map((anchor) => String(anchor?.key || "").trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
  const resolvedKeys = new Set(
    getOfficialAnchorsByDocumentId(signingState, documentId)
      .map((anchor) => String(anchor?.key || "").trim())
      .filter(Boolean),
  );
  const missing = expectedRequiredKeys.filter((key) => !resolvedKeys.has(key));
  return {
    documentId: String(documentId || "").trim(),
    expectedRequiredKeys,
    missingRequiredKeys: missing,
    isReady: missing.length === 0,
  };
}

import { createId } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { readLivenessPendingSession } from "./signingLivenessStorage";

const LIVENESS_STATUS_COPY = {
  returned_ready: {
    tone: "success",
    label: "Prueba de vida completada",
    message: "La validación terminó. Ahora puedes firmar los documentos.",
  },
  signing: {
    tone: "warning",
    label: "Firmando",
    message: "Procesando la firma de documentos.",
  },
  opening: {
    tone: "warning",
    label: "Abriendo prueba de vida",
    message: "Se está abriendo la pestaña externa de verificación.",
  },
  popup_blocked: {
    tone: "warning",
    label: "Ventana bloqueada",
    message:
      "El navegador bloqueó la ventana emergente. Permite popups y vuelve a abrir la prueba de vida.",
  },
  in_liveness_tab: {
    tone: "info",
    label: "Prueba de vida en curso",
    message:
      "Completa la selfie en la pestaña nueva y vuelve automáticamente al flujo.",
  },
  video_check: {
    tone: "info",
    label: "Prueba de vida en proceso",
    message:
      "La validación sigue en proceso. Completa la prueba en la pestaña externa y vuelve al flujo.",
  },
  completed: {
    tone: "success",
    label: "Firmado",
    message: "El flujo de firma finalización correctamente.",
  },
  cancelled: {
    tone: "warning",
    label: "Cancelado",
    message: "La verificación fue cancelada.",
  },
  error: {
    tone: "warning",
    label: "Error",
    message: "No fue posible completar la verificación.",
  },
};

const DEFAULT_LIVENESS_COPY = {
  tone: "info",
  label: "Liveness",
  message: "Inicia la prueba de vida para continuar con la firma.",
};

function firstNonEmptyString(...values) {
  for (const value of values) {
    const normalized = String(value ?? "").trim();
    if (normalized) return normalized;
  }
  return "";
}

function getWindowRef() {
  return globalThis.window;
}

export function normalizeLivenessPhase(value = "") {
  return String(value || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
}

export function isLivenessTerminalPhase(value = "") {
  const phase = normalizeLivenessPhase(value);
  return phase === "completed" || phase === "cancelled" || phase === "error";
}

export function isLivenessReturnPayload(payload = {}) {
  const status = normalizeLivenessPhase(payload?.status);
  return (
    status === "returned_ready" ||
    status === "returned" ||
    status === "approved" ||
    status === "done"
  );
}

export function isLivenessReturnSignal(searchParams = new URLSearchParams()) {
  const status = normalizeLivenessPhase(
    searchParams.get("signatureLiveness") || searchParams.get("livenessStatus"),
  );
  const marker = normalizeLivenessPhase(searchParams.get("livenessReturn"));
  return (
    status === "returned" ||
    status === "returned_ready" ||
    status === "approved" ||
    status === "done" ||
    marker === "1" ||
    marker === "true"
  );
}

export function normalizeProviderLivenessStatus(response = {}) {
  const approvedSignals = new Set([
    "approved",
    "approved_ready",
    "done",
    "completed",
    "validated",
    "success",
    "ok",
    "true",
  ]);
  const rejectedSignals = new Set([
    "rejected",
    "reject",
    "failed",
    "failure",
    "denied",
    "error",
    "cancelled",
    "canceled",
    "timeout",
  ]);
  const pendingSignals = new Set([
    "pending",
    "in_progress",
    "processing",
    "running",
    "queued",
    "created",
    "video_check",
  ]);

  if (response?.approved === true || response?.details?.approved === true)
    return "approved";
  if (response?.rejected === true || response?.details?.rejected === true)
    return "rejected";

  const providerPassed =
    response?.details?.tests?.liveness_results?.passed ??
    response?.tests?.liveness_results?.passed ??
    response?.passed ??
    null;

  if (providerPassed === true) return "approved";
  if (providerPassed === false) return "rejected";

  const statusCandidates = [
    response?.status,
    response?.result?.status,
    response?.details?.status,
    response?.details?.result,
    response?.details?.livenessStatus,
    response?.livenessStatus,
    response?.state,
    response?.details?.state,
  ]
    .map(normalizeLivenessPhase)
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (statusCandidates.some((value) => pendingSignals.has(value)))
    return "pending";
  if (statusCandidates.some((value) => approvedSignals.has(value)))
    return "approved";
  if (statusCandidates.some((value) => rejectedSignals.has(value)))
    return "rejected";

  return "pending";
}

export function isLivenessRecoverableFailureMessage(message = "") {
  const normalized = normalizeLivenessPhase(message);
  return (
    normalized.includes("prueba de vida no se ha realizado o fallida") ||
    normalized.includes("liveness no se ha realizado") ||
    normalized.includes("liveness failed") ||
    normalized.includes("prueba de vida fallida")
  );
}

export function getLivenessStatusCopy(status = "") {
  return (
    LIVENESS_STATUS_COPY[String(status || "").trim()] || DEFAULT_LIVENESS_COPY
  );
}

export function resolveLivenessResumeUrl({
  livenessSession = null,
  formData = null,
  pendingSession = null,
} = {}) {
  return (
    String(livenessSession?.link || "").trim() ||
    String(formData?.signatureBatch?.livenessUrl || "").trim() ||
    String(pendingSession?.livenessUrl || "").trim() ||
    ""
  );
}

function readWorkflowIdentityFromRouteContext(routeContext = {}) {
  return {
    workflowId: firstNonEmptyString(
      routeContext?.wrk,
      routeContext?.workflowId,
      routeContext?.requestId,
      routeContext?.wrkl,
    ),
    executionId: firstNonEmptyString(
      routeContext?.exec,
      routeContext?.executionId,
    ),
    documentId: firstNonEmptyString(
      routeContext?.dcmt,
      routeContext?.documentId,
    ),
  };
}

export function resolveEffectiveWorkflowIdentity({
  routeContext = null,
  formData = null,
  livenessSession = null,
  pendingSession = null,
} = {}) {
  const routeIdentity = readWorkflowIdentityFromRouteContext(routeContext);
  const signatureBatch = formData?.signatureBatch || {};
  const signing = formData?.signing || {};
  const resolvedPendingSession =
    pendingSession || readLivenessPendingSession() || {};

  const restoredTransactionId = firstNonEmptyString(
    signatureBatch.transactionId,
    signing.transactionId,
    livenessSession?.transactionId,
    resolvedPendingSession?.workflowId,
    resolvedPendingSession?.transactionId,
  );
  const restoredExecutionId = firstNonEmptyString(
    resolvedPendingSession?.executionId,
    resolvedPendingSession?.exec,
  );
  const restoredDocumentId = firstNonEmptyString(
    resolvedPendingSession?.documentId,
    resolvedPendingSession?.dcmt,
  );

  const workflowId = firstNonEmptyString(
    routeIdentity.workflowId,
    restoredTransactionId,
  );
  const executionId = firstNonEmptyString(
    routeIdentity.executionId,
    restoredExecutionId,
  );
  const documentId = firstNonEmptyString(
    routeIdentity.documentId,
    restoredDocumentId,
  );
  const workflowMismatch =
    Boolean(routeIdentity.workflowId) &&
    Boolean(restoredTransactionId) &&
    routeIdentity.workflowId !== restoredTransactionId;

  return {
    workflowId,
    transactionId: workflowId,
    executionId,
    documentId,
    routeIdentity,
    restoredTransactionId,
    workflowMismatch,
    source: routeIdentity.workflowId ? "route" : "restored",
  };
}

export function resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState({
  formData = null,
  livenessSession = null,
  pendingSession = null,
  providerCheck = null,
  routeContext = null,
} = {}) {
  const resolvedPendingSession =
    pendingSession || readLivenessPendingSession() || {};
  const signatureBatch = formData?.signatureBatch || {};
  const routeIdentity = readWorkflowIdentityFromRouteContext(routeContext);

  const currentStatus = normalizeLivenessPhase(
    signatureBatch.livenessStatus ||
      livenessSession?.status ||
      resolvedPendingSession?.status ||
      "",
  );

  const resumeUrl = resolveLivenessResumeUrl({
    livenessSession,
    formData,
    pendingSession: resolvedPendingSession,
  });

  const livenessId = String(
    signatureBatch.livenessId ||
      livenessSession?.livenessId ||
      resolvedPendingSession?.livenessId ||
      "",
  ).trim();

  const transactionId = String(
    signatureBatch.transactionId ||
      livenessSession?.transactionId ||
      resolvedPendingSession?.workflowId ||
      resolvedPendingSession?.transactionId ||
      "",
  ).trim();

  const callbackUrl = String(
    signatureBatch.callbackUrl ||
      livenessSession?.callbackUrl ||
      resolvedPendingSession?.callbackUrl ||
      "",
  ).trim();

  const returnToken = String(
    signatureBatch.returnToken ||
      livenessSession?.returnToken ||
      resolvedPendingSession?.returnToken ||
      "",
  ).trim();

  const providerStatus = providerCheck
    ? normalizeProviderLivenessStatus(providerCheck)
    : "pending";

  const completed =
    signatureBatch.completed === true || currentStatus === "completed";
  const readyByStatus =
    currentStatus === "returned_ready" || currentStatus === "approved";
  const activeStatus = new Set(["opening", "in_liveness_tab", "popup_blocked"]);
  const isActive = activeStatus.has(currentStatus);
  const restartableFailure =
    providerStatus === "rejected" ||
    currentStatus === "error" ||
    isLivenessRecoverableFailureMessage("");

  let kind = "idle";
  if (completed) kind = "completed";
  else if (readyByStatus) kind = "ready_to_sign";
  else if (isActive && resumeUrl) kind = "active_with_link";
  else if (isActive || (livenessId && currentStatus))
    kind = "active_without_link";
  else if (restartableFailure) kind = "rejected_restartable";

  return {
    kind,
    status: currentStatus,
    resumeUrl,
    livenessId,
    transactionId,
    effectiveTransactionId: routeIdentity.workflowId || transactionId,
    callbackUrl,
    returnToken,
    providerStatus,
    completed,
    isActive,
    routeIdentity,
    canRestart:
      kind === "rejected_restartable" || kind === "active_without_link",
    canResume: kind === "active_with_link",
    canSign: kind === "ready_to_sign",
  };
}

export function buildLivenessCheckSnapshot({
  status = "",
  checkedAt = new Date().toISOString(),
  source = "",
  transactionId = "",
  livenessId = "",
  callbackUrl = "",
  returnToken = "",
  projectReference = "",
  passed = null,
  response = null,
} = {}) {
  return {
    status: normalizeLivenessPhase(status),
    checkedAt,
    source,
    transactionId,
    livenessId,
    callbackUrl,
    returnToken,
    projectReference,
    passed,
    response,
  };
}

export const createLivenessReturnToken = createId;

export function buildLivenessCallbackUrl({
  origin,
  pathname = "/forms",
  search = "",
  params = {},
} = {}) {
  const browserWindow = getWindowRef();
  const baseOrigin = String(origin || browserWindow?.location?.origin || "")
    .trim()
    .replace(/\/+$/, "");
  if (!baseOrigin) return "";

  const query = new URLSearchParams(String(search || "").replace(/^\?/, ""));
  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value == null || value === "") return;
    query.set(key, String(value));
  });

  return `${baseOrigin}/#${String(pathname || "/forms").trim() || "/forms"}${query.toString() ? `?${query.toString()}` : ""}`;
}

// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #23
// Ruta relativa: src/domain/signing/signingLivenessStorage.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/domain/signing/signingLivenessStorage.js
// Extensión: .js

// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"

import { createId, safeParseJson } from "@/shared/utils/common";
const LIVENESS_BRIDGE_STORAGE_KEY = "sisad:uanataca:liveness:return";
const LIVENESS_PENDING_STORAGE_KEY = "sisad:uanataca:liveness:pending";
const LIVENESS_BRIDGE_EVENT_NAME = "sisad-uanataca-liveness-return";
const SIGNING_PROCESS_STORAGE_KEY = "sisad:uanataca:signing:process";
const SIGNING_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY = "sisad:uanataca:signing:device";
const SIGNING_STORAGE_PREFIX = "sisad:uanataca:";
const SIGNING_MIRROR_MAX_AGE_MS = 6 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
const SIGNING_STORAGE_FORBIDDEN_KEYS = new Set([
  "",
  "webhook",
  "webhookurl",
  "webhook_url",
  "webhookcallback",
]);
let inMemorySigningDeviceId = "";
let activeSigningStorageScope = null;
function firstNonEmptyString(...values) {
  for (const value of values) {
    const normalized = String(value ?? "").trim();
    if (normalized) return normalized;
  }
  return "";
}
function getWindowRef() {
  return globalThis.window;
}
function hashSigningStorageIdentity(value = "") {
  const normalized = String(value || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  if (!normalized) return "";
  let hash = 0;
  for (let index = 0; index < normalized.length; index += 1)
    hash = (hash * 33 + normalized.charCodeAt(index)) >>> 0;
  return hash.toString(36);
}
function normalizeSigningStorageScope(scope = {}) {
  const workflowId = firstNonEmptyString(
    scope?.workflowId,
    scope?.wrk,
    scope?.requestId,
  );
  const executionId = firstNonEmptyString(scope?.executionId, scope?.exec);
  const documentId = firstNonEmptyString(scope?.documentId, scope?.dcmt);
  const formType = firstNonEmptyString(scope?.formType, scope?.flowType);
  const rawAuthScope = firstNonEmptyString(
    scope?.folderId,
    scope?.email,
    scope?.cedula,
    scope?.dni,
  );
  const authScope = rawAuthScope
    ? hashSigningStorageIdentity(rawAuthScope)
    : firstNonEmptyString(scope?.authScope);
  return { workflowId, executionId, documentId, formType, authScope };
}
function hasSigningStorageScope(scope = {}) {
  return Object.values(scope || {}).some((value) => String(value || "").trim());
}
function areSigningStorageScopesEqual(left = {}, right = {}) {
  const normalizedLeft = normalizeSigningStorageScope(left);
  const normalizedRight = normalizeSigningStorageScope(right);
  return (
    normalizedLeft.workflowId === normalizedRight.workflowId &&
    normalizedLeft.executionId === normalizedRight.executionId &&
    normalizedLeft.documentId === normalizedRight.documentId &&
    normalizedLeft.formType === normalizedRight.formType &&
    normalizedLeft.authScope === normalizedRight.authScope
  );
}
function hashSigningStorageScope(scope = {}) {
  const normalized = normalizeSigningStorageScope(scope);
  const raw = [
    normalized.workflowId,
    normalized.executionId,
    normalized.documentId,
    normalized.formType,
    normalized.authScope,
  ].join("|");
  let hash = 0;
  for (let index = 0; index < raw.length; index += 1)
    hash = (hash * 31 + raw.charCodeAt(index)) >>> 0;
  return hash.toString(36);
}
function getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope = activeSigningStorageScope) {
  const normalizedScope = normalizeSigningStorageScope(scope);
  if (!hasSigningStorageScope(normalizedScope)) return baseKey;
  return `${baseKey}:${hashSigningStorageScope(normalizedScope)}`;
}
function attachSigningStorageScope(
  payload = {},
  scope = activeSigningStorageScope,
) {
  const normalizedScope = normalizeSigningStorageScope(scope);
  if (!hasSigningStorageScope(normalizedScope)) return payload;
  return { ...(payload || {}), scope: normalizedScope };
}
function isSigningStoragePayloadInScope(
  payload = {},
  scope = activeSigningStorageScope,
) {
  const normalizedScope = normalizeSigningStorageScope(scope);
  if (!hasSigningStorageScope(normalizedScope)) return true;
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object") return false;
  if (!payload.scope) return false;
  return areSigningStorageScopesEqual(payload.scope, normalizedScope);
}
function isFreshSigningStoragePayload(payload = {}) {
  const storedAtMs = Date.parse(
    String(payload?.ts || payload?.updatedAt || ""),
  );
  if (!Number.isFinite(storedAtMs)) return true;
  return Date.now() - storedAtMs <= SIGNING_MIRROR_MAX_AGE_MS;
}
function resolveBrowserStorage(kind = "local") {
  const win = getWindowRef();
  if (!win) return null;
  return kind === "session" ? win.sessionStorage : win.localStorage;
}
function writeToBrowserStorage(kind, key, payload) {
  try {
    resolveBrowserStorage(kind)?.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(payload));
  } catch {
    /* noop */
  }
}
function readFromBrowserStorage(kind, key) {
  try {
    return safeParseJson(resolveBrowserStorage(kind)?.getItem(key) || "");
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}
function clearBrowserStorageKey(kind, key) {
  try {
    resolveBrowserStorage(kind)?.removeItem(key);
  } catch {
    /* noop */
  }
}
function clearBrowserStorageKeysByPrefix(kind, prefix) {
  try {
    const storage = resolveBrowserStorage(kind);
    if (!storage) return;
    const keys = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < storage.length; i += 1) {
      const key = storage.key(i);
      if (key && key.startsWith(prefix)) keys.push(key);
    }
    keys.forEach((key) => storage.removeItem(key));
  } catch {
    /* noop */
  }
}
function writeToStorage(key, payload) {
  writeToBrowserStorage("local", key, payload);
}
function readFromStorage(key) {
  return readFromBrowserStorage("local", key);
}
function clearStorageKey(key) {
  clearBrowserStorageKey("local", key);
}
function clearStorageKeysByPrefix(prefix) {
  clearBrowserStorageKeysByPrefix("local", prefix);
}
function writeToSessionStorage(key, payload) {
  writeToBrowserStorage("session", key, payload);
}
function readFromSessionStorage(key) {
  return readFromBrowserStorage("session", key);
}
function clearSessionStorageKey(key) {
  clearBrowserStorageKey("session", key);
}
function clearSessionStorageKeysByPrefix(prefix) {
  clearBrowserStorageKeysByPrefix("session", prefix);
}
function writeScopedLocalStorage(
  baseKey,
  payload,
  scope = activeSigningStorageScope,
) {
  writeToStorage(
    getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope),
    attachSigningStorageScope(payload, scope),
  );
}
function readScopedLocalStorage(baseKey, scope = activeSigningStorageScope) {
  const payload = readFromStorage(getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope));
  if (!payload) return null;
  if (
    !isSigningStoragePayloadInScope(payload, scope) ||
    !isFreshSigningStoragePayload(payload)
  ) {
    clearStorageKey(getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope));
    return null;
  }
  return payload;
}
function clearScopedLocalStorage(baseKey, scope = activeSigningStorageScope) {
  clearStorageKey(getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope));
}
function writeScopedSessionStorage(
  baseKey,
  payload,
  scope = activeSigningStorageScope,
) {
  writeToSessionStorage(
    getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope),
    attachSigningStorageScope(payload, scope),
  );
}
function readScopedSessionStorage(baseKey, scope = activeSigningStorageScope) {
  const payload = readFromSessionStorage(getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope));
  if (!payload) return null;
  if (
    !isSigningStoragePayloadInScope(payload, scope) ||
    !isFreshSigningStoragePayload(payload)
  ) {
    clearSessionStorageKey(getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope));
    return null;
  }
  return payload;
}
function clearScopedSessionStorage(baseKey, scope = activeSigningStorageScope) {
  clearSessionStorageKey(getScopedStorageKey(baseKey, scope));
}
function readWorkflowIdentityFromRouteContext(routeContext = {}) {
  return {
    workflowId: firstNonEmptyString(
      routeContext?.wrk,
      routeContext?.workflowId,
      routeContext?.requestId,
      routeContext?.wrkl,
    ),
    executionId: firstNonEmptyString(
      routeContext?.exec,
      routeContext?.executionId,
    ),
    documentId: firstNonEmptyString(
      routeContext?.dcmt,
      routeContext?.documentId,
    ),
  };
}
function getOrCreateSigningDeviceId() {
  const win = getWindowRef();
  try {
    const storage = win?.localStorage;
    if (!storage) {
      if (!inMemorySigningDeviceId) inMemorySigningDeviceId = createId();
      return inMemorySigningDeviceId;
    }
    const existing = String(
      storage.getItem(SIGNING_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY) || "",
    ).trim();
    if (existing) return existing;
    const next = createId();
    storage.setItem(SIGNING_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY, next);
    return next;
  } catch {
    if (!inMemorySigningDeviceId) inMemorySigningDeviceId = createId();
    return inMemorySigningDeviceId;
  }
}

export function getActiveSigningStorageScope() {
  return activeSigningStorageScope;
}

export function isSigningRuntimeStateFromCurrentDevice(runtimeState = {}) {
  const currentDeviceId = getOrCreateSigningDeviceId();
  const candidateDeviceId = firstNonEmptyString(
    runtimeState?.deviceId,
    runtimeState?.processState?.deviceId,
    runtimeState?.pendingSession?.deviceId,
    runtimeState?.returnPayload?.deviceId,
  );
  return Boolean(currentDeviceId) && candidateDeviceId === currentDeviceId;
}

export function storeSigningProcessState(payload = {}) {
  return writeSigningProcessState(payload);
}

export function sanitizeSigningStoragePayload(payload = {}) {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || Array.isArray(payload))
    return payload;
  const cleaned = {};
  Object.entries(payload).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    const normalizedKey = String(key || "").trim();
    const comparableKey = normalizedKey.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, "");
    if (!normalizedKey || SIGNING_STORAGE_FORBIDDEN_KEYS.has(comparableKey))
      return;
    cleaned[normalizedKey] = value;
  });
  return cleaned;
}
export function buildSigningStorageScope({
  routeContext = null,
  session = null,
  formType = "",
  workflowId = "",
  executionId = "",
  documentId = "",
} = {}) {
  const routeIdentity = readWorkflowIdentityFromRouteContext(
    routeContext || {},
  );
  return normalizeSigningStorageScope({
    workflowId: workflowId || routeIdentity.workflowId,
    executionId: executionId || routeIdentity.executionId,
    documentId: documentId || routeIdentity.documentId,
    formType: formType || session?.formType || session?.flowType,
    folderId: session?.folderId,
    email: session?.email,
    cedula: session?.cedula,
    dni: session?.dni,
  });
}
export function setActiveSigningStorageScope(scope = null) {
  const nextScope = normalizeSigningStorageScope(scope);
  activeSigningStorageScope = hasSigningStorageScope(nextScope)
    ? nextScope
    : null;
  return activeSigningStorageScope;
}
export const getSigningDeviceId = getOrCreateSigningDeviceId;
export function readLivenessReturnPayload() {
  return readScopedLocalStorage(LIVENESS_BRIDGE_STORAGE_KEY);
}
function readSigningProcessState() {
  const value = readScopedLocalStorage(SIGNING_PROCESS_STORAGE_KEY);
  return value && typeof value === "object" ? value : null;
}
export function readLivenessPendingSession() {
  return readScopedSessionStorage(LIVENESS_PENDING_STORAGE_KEY);
}
export function buildSigningRuntimeState(extra = {}) {
  const pendingSession = readLivenessPendingSession();
  const returnPayload = readLivenessReturnPayload();
  const processState = readSigningProcessState();
  return {
    deviceId: getOrCreateSigningDeviceId(),
    scope: activeSigningStorageScope,
    pendingSession,
    returnPayload,
    processState,
    capturedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    ...extra,
  };
}
export const getSigningRuntimeState = buildSigningRuntimeState;
function writeSigningProcessState(payload = {}) {
  const nextPayload = {
    ...attachSigningStorageScope(payload),
    deviceId: getOrCreateSigningDeviceId(),
    ts: new Date().toISOString(),
  };
  writeScopedLocalStorage(SIGNING_PROCESS_STORAGE_KEY, nextPayload);
  return nextPayload;
}
export function updateSigningProcessState(updates = {}) {
  const existing = readSigningProcessState() || {};
  return writeSigningProcessState({ ...existing, ...(updates || {}) });
}
export function clearSigningProcessState() {
  clearScopedLocalStorage(SIGNING_PROCESS_STORAGE_KEY);
}
export function clearLivenessReturnPayload() {
  clearScopedLocalStorage(LIVENESS_BRIDGE_STORAGE_KEY);
}
export function clearLivenessPendingSession() {
  clearScopedSessionStorage(LIVENESS_PENDING_STORAGE_KEY);
}
export function clearSigningProcessStorage() {
  const activeScope = activeSigningStorageScope;
  if (!hasSigningStorageScope(activeScope)) {
    clearStorageKeysByPrefix(SIGNING_STORAGE_PREFIX);
    clearSessionStorageKeysByPrefix(SIGNING_STORAGE_PREFIX);
    clearStorageKey(LIVENESS_BRIDGE_STORAGE_KEY);
    clearSessionStorageKey(LIVENESS_PENDING_STORAGE_KEY);
    clearStorageKey(SIGNING_PROCESS_STORAGE_KEY);
    return;
  }
  clearScopedLocalStorage(LIVENESS_BRIDGE_STORAGE_KEY, activeScope);
  clearScopedSessionStorage(LIVENESS_PENDING_STORAGE_KEY, activeScope);
  clearScopedLocalStorage(SIGNING_PROCESS_STORAGE_KEY, activeScope);
}
export function resetSigningProcessAfterRecoverableFailure({
  setLivenessSession,
  setFormData,
  toast,
  livenessStatus = "idle",
  message = "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo.",
} = {}) {
  clearSigningProcessStorage();
  setLivenessSession?.((prev) => ({
    ...prev,
    open: Boolean(prev?.open),
    status: livenessStatus,
    message,
    returnToken: "",
    callbackUrl: "",
  }));
  setFormData?.((prev) => ({
    ...(prev || {}),
    signatureBatch: {
      ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
      livenessStatus,
      livenessId: "",
      transactionId: "",
      callbackUrl: "",
      returnToken: "",
    },
    signing: {
      ...(prev?.signing || {}),
      livenessStatus,
      livenessId: "",
      transactionId: "",
      returnToken: "",
    },
  }));
  toast?.error(message);
}
export function broadcastLivenessReturn(
  payload = {},
  { skipCustomEvent = false } = {},
) {
  const browserWindow = getWindowRef();
  const eventPayload = { ...payload, ts: new Date().toISOString() };
  writeScopedLocalStorage(LIVENESS_BRIDGE_STORAGE_KEY, eventPayload);
  if (!skipCustomEvent) {
    try {
      browserWindow?.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent(LIVENESS_BRIDGE_EVENT_NAME, { detail: eventPayload }),
      );
    } catch {
      /* noop */
    }
  }
  return eventPayload;
}
export function subscribeToLivenessReturn(callback) {
  const browserWindow = getWindowRef();
  if (!browserWindow || typeof callback !== "function") return () => {};
  const handleStorage = (event) => {
    if (
      event?.key !== getScopedStorageKey(LIVENESS_BRIDGE_STORAGE_KEY) ||
      !event.newValue
    )
      return;
    const payload = safeParseJson(event.newValue);
    if (payload && isSigningStoragePayloadInScope(payload)) callback(payload);
  };
  const handleCustomEvent = (event) => {
    if (event?.detail && isSigningStoragePayloadInScope(event.detail))
      callback(event.detail);
  };
  browserWindow.addEventListener("storage", handleStorage);
  browserWindow.addEventListener(LIVENESS_BRIDGE_EVENT_NAME, handleCustomEvent);
  return () => {
    browserWindow.removeEventListener("storage", handleStorage);
    browserWindow.removeEventListener(
      LIVENESS_BRIDGE_EVENT_NAME,
      handleCustomEvent,
    );
  };
}
export function focusOpenerAndCloseWindow({ delayMs = 0 } = {}) {
  const run = () => {
    const win = getWindowRef();
    if (!win) return;
    try {
      if (win.opener && !win.opener.closed) win.opener.focus();
    } catch {
      /* noop */
    }
    try {
      win.close();
    } catch {
      /* noop */
    }
  };
  if (Number(delayMs) > 0) {
    setTimeout(run, Number(delayMs));
    return;
  }
  run();
}
export function storeLivenessPendingSession(payload = {}) {
  const nextPayload = attachSigningStorageScope({
    ...sanitizeSigningStoragePayload(payload),
    ts: new Date().toISOString(),
  });
  writeScopedSessionStorage(LIVENESS_PENDING_STORAGE_KEY, nextPayload);
  return nextPayload;
}
export function updateLivenessPendingSession(updates = {}) {
  try {
    const existing = sanitizeSigningStoragePayload(
      readScopedSessionStorage(LIVENESS_PENDING_STORAGE_KEY) || {},
    );
    const sanitizedUpdates = sanitizeSigningStoragePayload(updates || {});
    const next = attachSigningStorageScope({
      ...existing,
      ...sanitizedUpdates,
      ts: new Date().toISOString(),
    });
    if (JSON.stringify(existing) !== JSON.stringify(next))
      writeScopedSessionStorage(LIVENESS_PENDING_STORAGE_KEY, next);
    return next;
  } catch {
    return storeLivenessPendingSession(updates);
  }
}
export async function copyTextToClipboard(text = "") {
  const value = String(text || "").trim();
  if (!value) return false;
  try {
    if (navigator?.clipboard?.writeText) {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(value);
      return true;
    }
  } catch {
    /* fall through */
  }
  try {
    const textarea = document.createElement("textarea");
    textarea.value = value;
    textarea.setAttribute("readonly", "true");
    textarea.style.position = "fixed";
    textarea.style.opacity = "0";
    document.body.appendChild(textarea);
    textarea.focus();
    textarea.select();
    const ok = document.execCommand("copy");
    textarea.remove();
    return Boolean(ok);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}
export { LIVENESS_BRIDGE_STORAGE_KEY };

const PT_PER_PX = 72 / 96;
const PAGE_WIDTH_PT = 595;
const PAGE_HEIGHT_PT = 842;
const DEFAULT_PAGE_HEIGHT_PX = 1123;
const DEFAULT_PAGE_WIDTH_PX = 794;
const CHUNK_SIZE = 0x8000;

  HANDWRITTEN: "handwritten",

  ELECTRONIC: "electronic",

  "application/x-pkcs12",
  "application/pkcs12",

  convenio: "CONVENIO DE CRÉDITO",
  declaracion: "PROTECCION DE DATOS",
  pagare: "PAGARÉ",
});

// Generic Helpers
// ============================================================================

function clamp(value, min, max) {
  return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
}
function toFiniteNumber(value, fallback = null) {
  const num = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(num) ? num : fallback;
}
function toOptionalString(value) {
  const normalized = String(value || "").trim();
  return normalized || null;
}

function firstNonEmptyString(...values) {
  for (const value of values) {
    const normalized = String(value ?? "").trim();
    if (normalized) return normalized;
  }
  return "";
}

function pickFirstString(...values) {
  return firstNonEmptyString(...values);
}

function stripTrailingPdfExtensions(value = "") {
  return String(value || "")
    .trim()
    .replace(/(?:\.pdf)+$/i, "")
    .trim();
}

function ensureSinglePdfExtension(value = "") {
  const base = stripTrailingPdfExtensions(value);
  return base ? `${base}.pdf` : "";
}

function looksLikeIdentifier(value = "") {
  const normalized = stripTrailingPdfExtensions(value);
  return (
    /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(
      normalized,
    ) || /^[0-9a-f]{24,}$/i.test(normalized)
  );
}

function getDocumentSignatureTypeKey(value = "") {
  return resolveDocumentSemanticId(value) || "";
}

function resolveDocumentSignatureKey(documentEntry = {}) {
  const strings = [
    documentEntry?.id,
    documentEntry?.fileTypeId,
    documentEntry?.workflowFileTypeId,
    documentEntry?.fileTypeName,
    documentEntry?.filename,
    documentEntry?.fileName,
    documentEntry?.name,
    documentEntry?.label,
    documentEntry?.documentLabel,
    documentEntry?.documentId,
    documentEntry?.meta?.documentId,
    documentEntry?.meta?.fileTypeName,
    documentEntry?.meta?.fileTypeId,
  ];
  return strings.map(getDocumentSignatureTypeKey).find(Boolean) || "";
}

//   };
