function isTruthyResult(value) {
  if (value === true) return true;
  if (value === false) return false;
  return null;
}

// ============================================================================
// Coordinate Mapping
// ============================================================================

function normalizeCoordinate(input = {}) {
  if (!input || typeof input !== "object") return null;
  const page = Math.max(
    1,
    Math.trunc(
      toFiniteNumber(input.page ?? input.page ?? input.pageIndex ?? 1, 1),
    ),
  );
  const pagePoints =
    input.pagePoints && typeof input.pagePoints === "object"
      ? input.pagePoints
      : {};
  const pagePixels =
    input.pagePixels && typeof input.pagePixels === "object"
      ? input.pagePixels
      : {};
  const xPt = Math.round(
    toFiniteNumber(
      input.xPt ?? input.posX ?? pagePoints.x ?? pagePixels.x ?? input.x,
      0,
    ),
  );
  const yPt = Math.round(
    toFiniteNumber(
      input.yPt ?? input.posY ?? pagePoints.y ?? pagePixels.y ?? input.y,
      0,
    ),
  );
  const widthPtRaw = toFiniteNumber(
    input.widthPt ?? input.width ?? pagePoints.width ?? pagePixels.width,
    null,
  );
  const heightPtRaw = toFiniteNumber(
    input.heightPt ?? input.height ?? pagePoints.height ?? pagePixels.height,
    null,
  );
  const result = { page, xPt, yPt };
  const key =
    input.key ?? input.anchorKey ?? input.anchor ?? input.dataSignAnchor;
  if (key) result.key = String(key || "").trim();
  if (widthPtRaw != null) result.widthPt = Math.round(widthPtRaw);
  if (heightPtRaw != null) result.heightPt = Math.round(heightPtRaw);
  if (input.pagePixels && typeof input.pagePixels === "object")
    result.pagePixels = {
      x: toFiniteNumber(input.pagePixels.x, 0),
      y: toFiniteNumber(input.pagePixels.y, 0),
      width: toFiniteNumber(input.pagePixels.width, 0),
      height: toFiniteNumber(input.pagePixels.height, 0),
    };
  if (input.pagePoints && typeof input.pagePoints === "object")
    result.pagePoints = {
      x: toFiniteNumber(input.pagePoints.x, 0),
      y: toFiniteNumber(input.pagePoints.y, 0),
      width: toFiniteNumber(input.pagePoints.width, 0),
      height: toFiniteNumber(input.pagePoints.height, 0),
    };
  return result;
}

export function toPdfCoordinate(coord = {}, pdfMeta = {}, options = {}) {
  if (!coord || typeof coord !== "object") return null;
  const pageHeightPx =
    typeof pdfMeta.pageHeightPx === "number"
      ? pdfMeta.pageHeightPx
      : DEFAULT_PAGE_HEIGHT_PX;
  const pageRect = pdfMeta.pageRect || null;
  const pageIndex = pdfMeta.pageIndex != null ? pdfMeta.pageIndex : null;
  const cssScale = typeof options.cssScale === "number" ? options.cssScale : 1;

  if (typeof coord.top === "number" || typeof coord.left === "number") {
    const top = Number(coord.top || 0),
      left = Number(coord.left || 0),
      width = Number(coord.width || 0),
      height = Number(coord.height || 0);
    const key = coord.key ? String(coord.key) : "";
    const resolvedPageWidthPx = Number.isFinite(Number(pageRect?.width))
      ? Number(pageRect.width)
      : DEFAULT_PAGE_WIDTH_PX;
    const resolvedPageHeightPx = Number.isFinite(Number(pageRect?.height))
      ? Number(pageRect.height)
      : pageHeightPx;
    const page =
      Number.isFinite(Number(pageIndex)) && Number(pageIndex) >= 0
        ? Math.trunc(Number(pageIndex)) + 1
        : Math.floor(top / pageHeightPx) + 1;
    const xPx = pageRect
      ? clamp(
          (left - Number(pageRect.left || 0)) / cssScale,
          0,
          resolvedPageWidthPx,
        )
      : clamp(left / cssScale, 0, resolvedPageWidthPx);
    const yPx = pageRect
      ? clamp(
          (top - Number(pageRect.top || 0)) / cssScale,
          0,
          resolvedPageHeightPx,
        )
      : clamp((top % pageHeightPx) / cssScale, 0, resolvedPageHeightPx);
    const widthPx = clamp(width / cssScale, 0, resolvedPageWidthPx),
      heightPx = clamp(height / cssScale, 0, resolvedPageHeightPx);
    const xPtRaw = clamp(xPx * PT_PER_PX, 0, PAGE_WIDTH_PT),
      yPtRaw = clamp(yPx * PT_PER_PX, 0, PAGE_HEIGHT_PT);
    const widthPtRaw = clamp(widthPx * PT_PER_PX, 0, PAGE_WIDTH_PT),
      heightPtRaw = clamp(heightPx * PT_PER_PX, 0, PAGE_HEIGHT_PT);
    return {
      key: key ? String(key).trim() : undefined,
      page,
      pagePixels: {
        x: Number(xPx.toFixed(3)),
        y: Number(yPx.toFixed(3)),
        width: Number(widthPx.toFixed(3)),
        height: Number(heightPx.toFixed(3)),
      },
      pagePoints: {
        x: Number(((xPx * 25.4) / 96).toFixed(3)),
        y: Number(((yPx * 25.4) / 96).toFixed(3)),
        width: Number(((widthPx * 25.4) / 96).toFixed(3)),
        height: Number(((heightPx * 25.4) / 96).toFixed(3)),
      },
      pagePointsRaw: {
        xPt: Number(xPtRaw.toFixed(3)),
        yPt: Number(yPtRaw.toFixed(3)),
        widthPt: Number(widthPtRaw.toFixed(3)),
        heightPt: Number(heightPtRaw.toFixed(3)),
      },
      posX: Math.round(xPtRaw),
      posY: Math.round(yPtRaw),
      width: Math.round(widthPtRaw),
      height: Math.round(heightPtRaw),
      xPt: Math.round(xPtRaw),
      yPt: Math.round(yPtRaw),
      widthPt: Math.round(widthPtRaw),
      heightPt: Math.round(heightPtRaw),
    };
  }

  if (coord.pagePixels && typeof coord.pagePixels === "object") {
    const px = coord.pagePixels;
    const xPx = toFiniteNumber(px.x, 0) / cssScale,
      yPx = toFiniteNumber(px.y, 0) / cssScale,
      widthPx = toFiniteNumber(px.width, 0) / cssScale,
      heightPx = toFiniteNumber(px.height, 0) / cssScale;
    const xPtRaw = clamp(xPx * PT_PER_PX, 0, PAGE_WIDTH_PT),
      yPtRaw = clamp(yPx * PT_PER_PX, 0, PAGE_HEIGHT_PT);
    const widthPtRaw = clamp(widthPx * PT_PER_PX, 0, PAGE_WIDTH_PT),
      heightPtRaw = clamp(heightPx * PT_PER_PX, 0, PAGE_HEIGHT_PT);
    const page = Math.max(1, Math.trunc(toFiniteNumber(coord.page ?? 1, 1)));
    return {
      page,
      pagePixels: { x: xPx, y: yPx, width: widthPx, height: heightPx },
      pagePoints: {
        x: Number(((xPx * 25.4) / 96).toFixed(3)),
        y: Number(((yPx * 25.4) / 96).toFixed(3)),
        width: Number(((widthPx * 25.4) / 96).toFixed(3)),
        height: Number(((heightPx * 25.4) / 96).toFixed(3)),
      },
      xPt: Math.round(xPtRaw),
      yPt: Math.round(yPtRaw),
      widthPt: Math.round(widthPtRaw),
      heightPt: Math.round(heightPtRaw),
    };
  }

  if (coord.pagePoints && typeof coord.pagePoints === "object") {
    const p = coord.pagePoints;
    const page = Math.max(1, Math.trunc(toFiniteNumber(coord.page ?? 1, 1)));
    const xPtRaw = toFiniteNumber(p.x, 0),
      yPtRaw = toFiniteNumber(p.y, 0),
      widthPtRaw = toFiniteNumber(p.width, null),
      heightPtRaw = toFiniteNumber(p.height, null);
    return {
      page,
      pagePoints: { x: p.x, y: p.y, width: p.width, height: p.height },
      xPt: Math.round(xPtRaw),
      yPt: Math.round(yPtRaw),
      widthPt: widthPtRaw != null ? Math.round(widthPtRaw) : undefined,
      heightPt: heightPtRaw != null ? Math.round(heightPtRaw) : undefined,
    };
  }

  return normalizeCoordinate(coord, options);
}
function convertBoundingBoxToPdfPosition(
  bbox,
  {
    pageHeightPx = DEFAULT_PAGE_HEIGHT_PX,
    pageRect = null,
    pageIndex = null,
  } = {},
) {
  return toPdfCoordinate(bbox, { pageHeightPx, pageRect, pageIndex }, {});
}

// ============================================================================
// Anchor Resolution
// ============================================================================

export async function resolveAnchorsFromDocument(doc, options = {}) {
  if (!doc) return [];
  const pageHeightPx =
    typeof options.pageHeightPx === "number"
      ? options.pageHeightPx
      : DEFAULT_PAGE_HEIGHT_PX;
  try {
    const pages = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll(".page"));
    const nodes = Array.from(
      doc.querySelectorAll("[data-sign-anchor], .sign-anchor-marker"),
    );
    return nodes.map((element) => {
      const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
      const pageElement =
        element.closest(".page") ||
        pages.find((page) => {
          const pageRect = page.getBoundingClientRect();
          return rect.top >= pageRect.top && rect.top <= pageRect.bottom;
        }) ||
        null;
      const pageRect = pageElement?.getBoundingClientRect() || null;
      const pageIndex = pageElement
        ? Math.max(pages.indexOf(pageElement), 0)
        : null;
      return convertBoundingBoxToPdfPosition(
        {
          key: element.getAttribute("data-sign-anchor") || "",
          top: pageRect
            ? rect.top
            : rect.top +
              (doc.documentElement?.scrollTop || doc.body?.scrollTop || 0),
          left: pageRect
            ? rect.left
            : rect.left +
              (doc.documentElement?.scrollLeft || doc.body?.scrollLeft || 0),
          width: rect.width || 0,
          height: rect.height || 0,
        },
        { pageHeightPx, pageRect, pageIndex },
      );
    });
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

export async function extractSignaturePositionsFromHtml(html) {
  const frame = document.createElement("iframe");
  frame.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
  Object.assign(frame.style, {
    position: "fixed",
    left: "-100vw",
    top: "0",
    width: `${DEFAULT_PAGE_WIDTH_PX}px`,
    height: `${DEFAULT_PAGE_HEIGHT_PX}px`,
    visibility: "hidden",
  });
  document.body.appendChild(frame);
  try {
    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      frame.addEventListener("load", resolve, { once: true });
      frame.addEventListener("error", reject, { once: true });
      frame.srcdoc = html;
    });
    const frameDoc = frame.contentDocument || frame.contentWindow?.document;
    return await resolveAnchorsFromDocument(frameDoc);
  } finally {
    frame.remove();
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// File Naming
// ============================================================================

function resolveSigningFileTypeName(documentEntry = {}) {
  const apiRaw = pickFirstString(
    documentEntry?.fileTypeName,
    documentEntry?.meta?.fileTypeName,
    documentEntry?.workflowFileTypeName,
  );
  if (apiRaw) return stripTrailingPdfExtensions(apiRaw);
  const inferredName = stripTrailingPdfExtensions(
    pickFirstString(
      documentEntry?.name,
      documentEntry?.filename,
      documentEntry?.fileName,
    ),
  );
  if (inferredName) return inferredName;
  return pickFirstString(
    SIGNING_FILE_TYPE_NAME_BY_DOCUMENT_ID[documentEntry?.id],
    documentEntry?.label,
    documentEntry?.documentLabel,
    documentEntry?.documentId,
    "Documento",
  );
}

export function resolveFileName(file = {}, fallback = "document.pdf") {
  const resolvedFileTypeId = resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(file, {
    allowIdFallback: false,
  });
  const explicitFileName = pickFirstString(
    file?.filename,
    file?.fileName,
    file?.name,
  );
  const explicitIsRawId = Boolean(
    explicitFileName &&
    (looksLikeIdentifier(explicitFileName) ||
      stripTrailingPdfExtensions(explicitFileName) === resolvedFileTypeId),
  );
  if (explicitFileName && !explicitIsRawId)
    return ensureSinglePdfExtension(explicitFileName);
  const fileTypeName = resolveSigningFileTypeName(file);
  if (fileTypeName) return ensureSinglePdfExtension(fileTypeName);
  if (resolvedFileTypeId) return ensureSinglePdfExtension(resolvedFileTypeId);
  return ensureSinglePdfExtension(fallback);
}

export function resolveSigningSemanticId(label = "") {
  return resolveDocumentSemanticId(label);
}

// ============================================================================
// Position Resolution
// ============================================================================

export function normalizeAnchorKey(value = "") {
  return String(value || "").trim();
}

export function getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(
  documentId,
  formType = "natural",
) {
  const semanticId = resolveDocumentSemanticId(documentId) || "";
  const baseConfig = {
    solicitud: [
      {
        key: "solicitud.applicant",
        optional: false,
        expectedPage: 1,
        metadata: { documentId: "solicitud" },
      },
      ...(formType === "linked"
        ? [
            {
              key: "solicitud.principal",
              optional: false,
              expectedPage: 1,
              metadata: { documentId: "solicitud" },
            },
          ]
        : []),
    ],
    convenio: [
      {
        key: "convenio.customer",
        optional: false,
        expectedPage: 1,
        metadata: { documentId: "convenio" },
      },
    ],
    declaracion: [
      {
        key: "declaracion.legalRepresentative",
        optional: false,
        expectedPage: 1,
        metadata: { documentId: "declaracion" },
      },
    ],
  };
  const configured = Array.isArray(baseConfig[semanticId])
    ? baseConfig[semanticId]
    : [];
  if (configured.length > 0) return configured;
  const fallbackKeys = getSigningAnchorKeys(documentId, formType)
    .map(normalizeAnchorKey)
    .filter(Boolean);
  return fallbackKeys.map((key) => ({ key, optional: false }));
}

export function getExpectedAnchorKeys(documentId, formType = "natural") {
  return getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(documentId, formType)
    .map((item) => normalizeAnchorKey(item?.key))
    .map(normalizeAnchorKey)
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function getPositionAnchorKey(position = {}) {
  return normalizeAnchorKey(
    position?.key || position?.anchorKey || position?.anchor,
  );
}

function normalizeExpectedAnchorSelection(input = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(input) || input.length === 0) return [];
  const seen = new Set();
  return input.reduce((acc, item, index) => {
    const key =
      typeof item === "string"
        ? normalizeAnchorKey(item)
        : normalizeAnchorKey(item?.key ?? item?.anchorKey ?? item?.anchor);
    if (!key) return acc;
    const expectedPage = toFiniteNumber(
      typeof item === "object"
        ? (item?.expectedPage ?? item?.pageIndex ?? item?.page)
        : null,
      null,
    );
    const normalized = {
      key,
      expectedPage:
        expectedPage !== null ? Math.max(1, Math.trunc(expectedPage)) : null,
      optional: typeof item === "object" ? Boolean(item?.optional) : false,
      index,
    };
    const fingerprint = `${normalized.key}:${normalized.expectedPage ?? ""}`;
    if (seen.has(fingerprint)) return acc;
    seen.add(fingerprint);
    acc.push(normalized);
    return acc;
  }, []);
}

function compareSignaturePositionPriority(a = {}, b = {}) {
  if (a.keyMatched !== b.keyMatched) return a.keyMatched ? -1 : 1;
  if (a.keyMatched && b.keyMatched) {
    if (a.expectedIndex !== b.expectedIndex)
      return a.expectedIndex - b.expectedIndex;
    if (a.pageMatch !== b.pageMatch) return a.pageMatch ? -1 : 1;
  }
  if (a.pageMatch !== b.pageMatch) return a.pageMatch ? -1 : 1;
  return a.index - b.index;
}

function rankSignaturePositions(
  signaturePositions = [],
  expectedAnchorsOrKeys = [],
) {
  if (!Array.isArray(signaturePositions) || signaturePositions.length === 0)
    return [];
  const expectedSelections = normalizeExpectedAnchorSelection(
    expectedAnchorsOrKeys,
  );
  if (expectedSelections.length === 0) {
    return signaturePositions.map((position, index) => ({
      position,
      index,
      key: getPositionAnchorKey(position),
      page: Math.max(
        1,
        Math.trunc(Number(position?.page ?? position?.pageIndex ?? 1) || 1),
      ),
      keyMatched: false,
      expectedIndex: Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY,
      pageMatch: false,
    }));
  }

  return signaturePositions.map((position, index) => {
    const key = getPositionAnchorKey(position);
    const page = Math.max(
      1,
      Math.trunc(Number(position?.page ?? position?.pageIndex ?? 1) || 1),
    );
    const expectedIndex = expectedSelections.findIndex(
      (entry) => entry.key === key,
    );
    const expectedEntry =
      expectedIndex >= 0 ? expectedSelections[expectedIndex] : null;
    const pageMatch =
      expectedEntry?.expectedPage != null &&
      page === expectedEntry.expectedPage;
    return {
      position,
      index,
      key,
      page,
      keyMatched: expectedIndex >= 0,
      expectedIndex:
        expectedIndex >= 0 ? expectedIndex : expectedSelections.length + index,
      pageMatch,
    };
  });
}

function resolveAnchorsFromRenderResult(
  renderResult = {},
  expectedAnchorKeys = [],
) {
  const resolvedAnchors = normalizeSignaturePositions(
    renderResult?.resolvedAnchors || renderResult?.anchors || [],
  );
  const rankedAnchors = rankSignaturePositions(
    resolvedAnchors,
    expectedAnchorKeys,
  );
  return {
    resolvedAnchors,
    normalizedPositions: rankedAnchors
      .slice()
      .sort(compareSignaturePositionPriority)
      .map((item) => item.position),
    primaryPosition: getPrimarySignaturePosition(
      resolvedAnchors,
      expectedAnchorKeys,
    ),
  };
}

export function orderSignaturePositions(
  signaturePositions = [],
  expectedAnchorKeys = [],
) {
  return rankSignaturePositions(signaturePositions, expectedAnchorKeys)
    .slice()
    .sort(compareSignaturePositionPriority)
    .map((item) => item.position);
}

export function selectPreferredSignaturePosition(
  signaturePositions = [],
  expectedAnchorKeys = [],
) {
  const ranked = rankSignaturePositions(signaturePositions, expectedAnchorKeys)
    .slice()
    .sort(compareSignaturePositionPriority);
  return ranked[0]?.position || null;
}

export function getPrimarySignaturePosition(
  signaturePositions = [],
  expectedAnchorKeys = [],
) {
  const primary = selectPreferredSignaturePosition(
    signaturePositions,
    expectedAnchorKeys,
  );
  if (!primary) return null;
  const page = Math.trunc(Number(primary.page ?? primary.pageIndex));
  const posX = Math.round(Number(primary.posX ?? primary.xPt ?? primary.x));
  const posY = Math.round(Number(primary.posY ?? primary.yPt ?? primary.y));
  if (
    !Number.isFinite(page) ||
    !Number.isFinite(posX) ||
    !Number.isFinite(posY)
  )
    return null;
  return { page, posX, posY, key: primary.key || null };
}

// ============================================================================
// Signature Position Normalization
// ============================================================================

export function normalizeSignaturePositions(input = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(input)) return [];
  return input.reduce((acc, item) => {
    if (!item || typeof item !== "object") return acc;
    const page = Math.max(
      1,
      Math.trunc(Number(item?.page ?? item?.pageIndex ?? 1) || 1),
    );
    const xPt = Math.round(
      Number(item.pdfXPt ?? item.xPt ?? item.posX ?? item.x ?? 0) || 0,
    );
    const yPt = Math.round(
      Number(item.pdfYPt ?? item.yPt ?? item.posY ?? item.y ?? 0) || 0,
    );
    const entry = { page, xPt, yPt };
    if (item.key) entry.key = String(item.key || "").trim();
    if (item.anchorKey) entry.anchorKey = String(item.anchorKey || "").trim();
    if (item.pdfXPt != null && Number.isFinite(Number(item.pdfXPt)))
      entry.pdfXPt = Math.round(Number(item.pdfXPt));
    if (item.pdfYPt != null && Number.isFinite(Number(item.pdfYPt)))
      entry.pdfYPt = Math.round(Number(item.pdfYPt));
    if (item.widthPt != null) entry.widthPt = item.widthPt;
    if (item.heightPt != null) entry.heightPt = item.heightPt;
    if (item.acrobatXPt != null) {
      const acrobatXPt = Number(item.acrobatXPt);
      if (Number.isFinite(acrobatXPt))
        entry.acrobatXPt = Math.round(acrobatXPt);
    }
    if (item.acrobatYPt != null) {
      const acrobatYPt = Number(item.acrobatYPt);
      if (Number.isFinite(acrobatYPt))
        entry.acrobatYPt = Math.round(acrobatYPt);
    }
    acc.push(entry);
    return acc;
  }, []);
}

export function normalizeAnchorToProviderPosition(anchor = {}, options = {}) {
  if (!anchor || typeof anchor !== "object") return null;
  const pageHeightPt = Math.max(
    1,
    Number(options?.pageHeightPt || PAGE_HEIGHT_PT) || PAGE_HEIGHT_PT,
  );
  const page = Math.max(
    1,
    Math.trunc(Number(anchor.page ?? anchor.pageIndex ?? 1) || 1),
  );
  const xPt = toFiniteNumber(
    anchor.xPt ?? anchor.XPt ?? anchor.posX ?? anchor.x,
    0,
  );
  const yPt = toFiniteNumber(
    anchor.yPt ?? anchor.YPt ?? anchor.posY ?? anchor.y,
    0,
  );
  const widthPt = toFiniteNumber(
    anchor.widthPt ?? anchor.WidthPt ?? anchor.width,
    0,
  );
  const heightPt = toFiniteNumber(
    anchor.heightPt ?? anchor.HeightPt ?? anchor.height,
    0,
  );
  const acrobatXPt = toFiniteNumber(
    anchor.acrobatXPt ?? anchor.AcrobatXPt,
    null,
  );
  const acrobatYPt = toFiniteNumber(
    anchor.acrobatYPt ?? anchor.AcrobatYPt,
    null,
  );
  const computedPosY = pageHeightPt - yPt - heightPt;
  return {
    page,
    posX: Math.round(acrobatXPt ?? xPt ?? 0),
    posY: Math.round(acrobatYPt ?? computedPosY),
    key: normalizeAnchorKey(anchor.key ?? anchor.anchorKey ?? anchor.anchor),
    xPt: Math.round(xPt ?? 0),
    yPt: Math.round(yPt ?? 0),
    widthPt: Math.round(widthPt ?? 0),
    heightPt: Math.round(heightPt ?? 0),
    acrobatXPt: acrobatXPt != null ? Math.round(acrobatXPt) : null,
    acrobatYPt: acrobatYPt != null ? Math.round(acrobatYPt) : null,
  };
}

// ============================================================================
// Document Normalization
// ============================================================================

export function normalizeSigningDocument(file = {}, fallbackFilename = null) {
  const base64 =
    file?.contentBase64 || file?.base64 || file?.arrayBuffer || null;
  const signaturePositions = normalizeSignaturePositions(
    Array.isArray(file?.signaturePositions)
      ? file.signaturePositions
      : file?.positions,
  );
  const signatureAnchorKeys = Array.isArray(file?.signatureAnchorKeys)
    ? file.signatureAnchorKeys
        .map((k) => String(k || "").trim())
        .filter(Boolean)
    : [];
  const fileTypeId = pickFirstString(
    file?.fileTypeId,
    file?.workflowFileTypeId,
    file?.meta?.fileTypeId,
    file?.raw?.fileTypeId,
    file?.fileType?.id,
  );
  const fileTypeName = resolveSigningFileTypeName(file);
  const filename = resolveFileName(file, fallbackFilename || `document.pdf`);
  const entry = { base64, filename, signaturePositions };
  const primaryFromSignaturePositions =
    getPrimarySignaturePosition(signaturePositions, signatureAnchorKeys) ||
    signaturePositions[0] ||
    null;
  const primaryPage = toFiniteNumber(
    primaryFromSignaturePositions?.page ??
      primaryFromSignaturePositions?.pageIndex,
  );
  const primaryPosX = toFiniteNumber(
    primaryFromSignaturePositions?.xPt ??
      primaryFromSignaturePositions?.posX ??
      primaryFromSignaturePositions?.x,
  );
  const primaryPosY = toFiniteNumber(
    primaryFromSignaturePositions?.yPt ??
      primaryFromSignaturePositions?.posY ??
      primaryFromSignaturePositions?.y,
  );
  if (primaryPage !== null && primaryPosX !== null && primaryPosY !== null) {
    entry.page = Math.max(1, Math.trunc(primaryPage));
    entry.posX = Math.round(primaryPosX);
    entry.posY = Math.round(primaryPosY);
  }
  if (fileTypeId) entry.fileTypeId = fileTypeId;
  if (fileTypeName)
    entry.fileTypeName = stripTrailingPdfExtensions(fileTypeName);
  if (signatureAnchorKeys.length > 0)
    entry.signatureAnchorKeys = signatureAnchorKeys;
  if (file?.primarySignaturePosition)
    entry.primarySignaturePosition =
      normalizeSignaturePositions([file.primarySignaturePosition])[0] || null;
  else if (primaryFromSignaturePositions) {
    entry.primarySignaturePosition = {
      page: entry.page,
      posX: entry.posX,
      posY: entry.posY,
      key: primaryFromSignaturePositions.key || null,
    };
  }
  return entry;
}

export function buildProviderPositions(normalizedPositions = [], options = {}) {
  const expectedAnchorKeys = Array.isArray(options.expectedAnchorKeys)
    ? options.expectedAnchorKeys
    : [];
  const normalizeOneshotPage = (value, fallback = 1) =>
    Math.max(1, Math.trunc(Number(value) || fallback));
  const oneshotPositions = Array.isArray(normalizedPositions)
    ? normalizedPositions.map((position) => ({
        page: normalizeOneshotPage(position.page, 1),
        posX: Math.round(
          Number(position.xPt ?? position.posX ?? position.x ?? 0),
        ),
        posY: Math.round(
          Number(position.yPt ?? position.posY ?? position.y ?? 0),
        ),
        key: position.key || undefined,
      }))
    : [];
  let primary = null;
  if (options.choosePrimary) {
    const primaryNormalized =
      options.primaryNormalized ??
      getPrimarySignaturePosition(normalizedPositions, expectedAnchorKeys);
    if (primaryNormalized)
      primary = {
        page: normalizeOneshotPage(primaryNormalized.page, 1),
        posX: Math.round(
          Number(primaryNormalized.xPt ?? primaryNormalized.posX ?? 0),
        ),
        posY: Math.round(
          Number(primaryNormalized.yPt ?? primaryNormalized.posY ?? 0),
        ),
        key: primaryNormalized.key || undefined,
      };
    if (oneshotPositions.length === 0 && primary)
      oneshotPositions.push(primary);
  }
  return { oneshotPositions, primary };
}

export async function getSignaturePositionsForDocument(
  formType,
  formData,
  documentId,
  expectedAnchorKeys = null,
) {
  if (!documentId)
    return {
      normalizedPositions: [],
      oneshotPositions: [],
      primarySignaturePosition: null,
    };
  try {
    const context = await buildDocumentSigningContext({
      formType,
      formData,
      documentEntry: { id: documentId, formType },
      expectedAnchorKeys,
      includePdfBase64: false,
    });
    return {
      normalizedPositions: context.normalizedPositions,
      oneshotPositions: context.oneshotPositions,
      primarySignaturePosition: context.primaryPosition,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error(`Error getting signature positions for ${documentId}:`, error);
    return {
      normalizedPositions: [],
      oneshotPositions: [],
      primarySignaturePosition: null,
    };
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// Batch Payload
// ============================================================================

async function generateDocumentPdfWithOfficialAnchors({
  html,
  documentId,
  expectedAnchors = [],
} = {}) {
  if (!html || !documentId) return null;
  return renderHtmlToPdfWithAnchorsViaApi(html, {
    documentId,
    fileName: `${documentId}.pdf`,
    mediaType: "print",
    hideSignatureMarkers: true,
    waitForSelector:
      ".sign-anchor-marker[data-sign-anchor], [data-sign-anchor]",
    waitForTimeoutMs: 15000,
    anchorSelector: ".sign-anchor-marker[data-sign-anchor], [data-sign-anchor]",
    expectedAnchors: Array.isArray(expectedAnchors) ? expectedAnchors : [],
    returnBase64: true,
    returnBuffer: false,
    pdfOptions: {
      format: "A4",
      printBackground: true,
      preferCssPageSize: true,
    },
    metadata: {
      hideAnchorMarkersBeforePdf: true,
      resolveAnchorsInBackend: true,
      documentId,
    },
  });
}

export async function buildDocumentSigningContext({
  formType,
  formData,
  documentEntry = {},
  expectedAnchorKeys = null,
  includePdfBase64 = false,
} = {}) {
  const documentId = documentEntry?.id || documentEntry?.documentId;
  if (!documentId) {
    return {
      html: "",
      pdfBase64: null,
      normalizedPositions: [],
      oneshotPositions: [],
      primaryPosition: null,
      anchorKeys: [],
      semanticDocKey: "",
    };
  }

  const html = await renderHtmlDocument(formType, formData, documentId);
  const expectedAnchorConfig = Array.isArray(expectedAnchorKeys)
    ? expectedAnchorKeys
        .map((key) => ({ key: normalizeAnchorKey(key), optional: false }))
        .filter((item) => item.key)
    : getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(documentId, formType);
  const resolvedExpectedAnchorKeys = expectedAnchorConfig
    .map((item) => normalizeAnchorKey(item?.key))
    .filter(Boolean);

  let officialPdfResult = null;
  try {
    officialPdfResult = await generateDocumentPdfWithOfficialAnchors({
      html,
      documentId,
      expectedAnchors: expectedAnchorConfig,
    });
  } catch (backendError) {
    logger.error(
      `Failed to resolve anchors from backend for ${documentId}:`,
      backendError,
    );
    throw new Error(
      `Error al resolver anchors del documento ${documentId}: ${backendError?.message || backendError}`,
    );
  }

  const {
    resolvedAnchors: anchorPositions,
    normalizedPositions,
    primaryPosition,
  } = resolveAnchorsFromRenderResult(officialPdfResult, expectedAnchorConfig);

  if (!Array.isArray(anchorPositions) || anchorPositions.length === 0) {
    throw new Error(
      `No se pudieron resolver las coordenadas de firma para el documento ${documentId}. Verifique que el HTML contenga los marcadores de firma.`,
    );
  }

  const officialPdfBytes =
    officialPdfResult?.pdfBytes ||
    (officialPdfResult?.arrayBuffer
      ? new Uint8Array(officialPdfResult.arrayBuffer)
      : null);
  const officialPdfBase64 =
    officialPdfResult?.pdfBase64 ||
    officialPdfResult?.base64 ||
    (officialPdfBytes instanceof Uint8Array && officialPdfBytes.byteLength > 0
      ? arrayBufferToBase64(officialPdfBytes.buffer)
      : null);

  const oneshot = buildProviderPositions(normalizedPositions, {
    choosePrimary: true,
    expectedAnchorKeys: resolvedExpectedAnchorKeys,
    primaryNormalized: primaryPosition,
  });

  return {
    html,
    pdfBase64: includePdfBase64 ? officialPdfBase64 : null,
    officialPdfBase64,
    officialPdfBytes,
    resolvedAnchors: anchorPositions,
    normalizedPositions,
    oneshotPositions: oneshot.oneshotPositions,
    primaryPosition: primaryPosition || oneshot.primary,
    anchorKeys: resolvedExpectedAnchorKeys,
    semanticDocKey: resolveDocumentSignatureKey({
      ...documentEntry,
      id: documentId,
      formType,
      fileTypeName: documentEntry?.fileTypeName || documentId,
    }),
    anchorSource: "backend",
    anchorDiagnostics: {
      source: "backend",
      ...(officialPdfResult?.diagnostics || {}),
    },
    renderDiagnostics: officialPdfResult?.diagnostics || { source: "backend" },
    renderMetadata:
      officialPdfResult?.technicalMetadata || officialPdfResult?.metadata || {},
    anchorValidation: validateAnchorResolution(
      expectedAnchorConfig,
      anchorPositions,
      officialPdfResult?.technicalMetadata,
    ),
  };
}

function validateAnchorResolution(
  expectedAnchors = [],
  resolvedPositions = [],
  technicalMetadata = {},
) {
  const resolvedCount = resolvedPositions.length;
  const expectedCount =
    technicalMetadata?.expectedAnchorsCount ?? expectedAnchors.length;
  const missingCount = technicalMetadata?.missingAnchorsCount ?? 0;

  const requiredAnchors = expectedAnchors.filter((a) => !a.optional);
  const foundRequiredKeys = new Set(resolvedPositions.map((p) => p.key));
  const missingRequired = requiredAnchors.filter(
    (a) => !foundRequiredKeys.has(a.key),
  );

  return {
    expectedCount,
    resolvedCount,
    missingCount,
    hasRequiredAnchors: missingRequired.length === 0,
    missingRequiredAnchors: missingRequired.map((a) => a.key),
    isValid: missingRequired.length === 0,
  };
}

export function arrayBufferToBase64(buffer) {
  if (!buffer) return null;
  const bytes = new Uint8Array(buffer);
  let binary = "";
  for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i += CHUNK_SIZE)
    binary += String.fromCharCode(...bytes.subarray(i, i + CHUNK_SIZE));
  return btoa(binary);
}

export async function buildBatchPayload({
  documents = [],
  formType,
  formData,
} = {}) {
  const payload = [];
  for (const doc of documents) {
    const documentId = doc?.id || doc?.documentId;
    if (!documentId) continue;
    try {
      const context = await buildDocumentSigningContext({
        formType,
        formData,
        documentEntry: doc,
        includePdfBase64: true,
      });
      const pdfBase64 = context.pdfBase64;
      if (!pdfBase64) continue;
      const fileTypeName = resolveSigningFileTypeName(doc);
      const fileTypeId =
        resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(doc, { allowIdFallback: true }) ||
        doc?.fileTypeId ||
        doc?.workflowFileTypeId ||
        null;
      const filename = resolveOneshotFilename(
        { fileTypeId },
        `${documentId}.pdf`,
      );
      const docForResolver = {
        ...doc,
        id: documentId,
        fileTypeId,
        fileTypeName,
        filename,
        formType,
        signaturePositions: context.normalizedPositions,
      };
      const normalizedDocEntry = normalizeSigningDocument(
        { ...docForResolver, contentBase64: pdfBase64 },
        filename,
      );
      const effectivePositions = context.primaryPosition
        ? [context.primaryPosition]
        : context.normalizedPositions;
      const providerPosition =
        context.primaryPosition || effectivePositions[0] || null;
      payload.push({
        filename: normalizedDocEntry.filename,
        fileTypeName: normalizedDocEntry.fileTypeName || fileTypeName,
        fileTypeId:
          normalizedDocEntry.fileTypeId ||
          doc?.fileTypeId ||
          doc?.workflowFileTypeId ||
          null,
        mime: "application/pdf",
        contentBase64: normalizedDocEntry.base64 || pdfBase64,
        base64: normalizedDocEntry.base64 || pdfBase64,
        page: providerPosition?.page ?? null,
        posX: providerPosition?.posX ?? null,
        posY: providerPosition?.posY ?? null,
        signaturePositions: effectivePositions,
        signatureAnchorKeys: context.anchorKeys,
        primarySignaturePosition: context.primaryPosition,
        meta: {
          ...doc.meta,
          documentId,
          generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          signaturePositionsVersion: "v2-pt",
          signaturePositionsSource: context.anchorSource || "backend",
          signatureAnchorDiagnostics: context.anchorDiagnostics || {},
          pdfRenderMetadata: context.renderMetadata || {},
        },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error(
        `Error processing document ${documentId} for batch signature:`,
        error,
      );
    }
  }
  return payload;
}

// ============================================================================
// Downloaded Files
// ============================================================================

function resolveOneshotFilename(file = {}, fallbackFilename = "document.pdf") {
  const preferredType = toOptionalString(
    file?.fileTypeId ||
      file?.fileType?.id ||
      resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(file, { allowIdFallback: true }),
  );
  const fallback = toOptionalString(fallbackFilename);
  return ensureSinglePdfExtension(preferredType || fallback || "document");
}

function buildNormalizedOneshotFile(
  file = {},
  fallbackFilename = "document.pdf",
  coordinates = null,
) {
  const normalized = coordinates
    ? {
        base64: String(file?.base64 || file?.contentBase64 || "").trim(),
        filename: resolveOneshotFilename(file, fallbackFilename),
        fileTypeId: toOptionalString(file?.fileTypeId),
        fileTypeName: toOptionalString(file?.fileTypeName),
        page: coordinates.page,
        posX: coordinates.posX,
        posY: coordinates.posY,
      }
    : normalizeSigningDocument(file, fallbackFilename);
  if (!normalized) return normalized;
  return {
    ...normalized,
    filename: resolveOneshotFilename(normalized, fallbackFilename),
    page: normalized.page ?? coordinates?.page ?? null,
    posX: normalized.posX ?? coordinates?.posX ?? null,
    posY: normalized.posY ?? coordinates?.posY ?? null,
  };
}

function resolveProviderCoordinates(file = {}, fallbackPage = null) {
  const normalizeOneshotPage = (value, fallback = 1) =>
    Math.max(1, Math.trunc(Number(value) || fallback));
  const readNumericCoordinates = (source = {}) => {
    const directPage = toFiniteNumber(source?.page ?? source?.pageIndex, null);
    const directPosX = toFiniteNumber(
      source?.pdfXPt ?? source?.posX ?? source?.xPt ?? source?.x,
      null,
    );
    const directPosY = toFiniteNumber(
      source?.pdfYPt ?? source?.posY ?? source?.yPt ?? source?.y,
      null,
    );
    if (directPage !== null && directPosX !== null && directPosY !== null) {
      return {
        page: normalizeOneshotPage(directPage, fallbackPage ?? 1),
        posX: Math.round(directPosX),
        posY: Math.round(directPosY),
      };
    }

    const page = toFiniteNumber(source?.page ?? source?.pageIndex, null);
    const posX = toFiniteNumber(
      source?.pdfXPt ?? source?.xPt ?? source?.posX ?? source?.x,
      null,
    );
    const posY = toFiniteNumber(
      source?.pdfYPt ?? source?.yPt ?? source?.posY ?? source?.y,
      null,
    );
    if (page === null || posX === null || posY === null) return null;
    return {
      page: normalizeOneshotPage(page, fallbackPage ?? 1),
      posX: Math.round(posX),
      posY: Math.round(posY),
    };
  };
  const resolveFromPrimarySignaturePosition = () =>
    readNumericCoordinates(file?.primarySignaturePosition);
  const directPage = toFiniteNumber(file?.page);
  const directPosX = toFiniteNumber(file?.posX);
  const directPosY = toFiniteNumber(file?.posY);
  const directCoordinates =
    directPage !== null && directPosX !== null && directPosY !== null
      ? {
          page: normalizeOneshotPage(directPage, fallbackPage ?? 1),
          posX: Math.round(directPosX),
          posY: Math.round(directPosY),
        }
      : null;
  if (directCoordinates) return directCoordinates;
  const signaturePositions = Array.isArray(file?.signaturePositions)
    ? file.signaturePositions
    : [];
  const expectedAnchorKeys = Array.isArray(file?.signatureAnchorKeys)
    ? file.signatureAnchorKeys
    : [];
  const primarySignaturePosition =
    resolveFromPrimarySignaturePosition() ||
    readNumericCoordinates(file?.primaryPosition);
  const bestPosition =
    primarySignaturePosition ||
    getPrimarySignaturePosition(signaturePositions, expectedAnchorKeys) ||
    signaturePositions[0] ||
    {};
  const signatureCoordinates = readNumericCoordinates(bestPosition);
  if (signatureCoordinates) return signatureCoordinates;
  return {
    page: normalizeOneshotPage(fallbackPage ?? 1, 1),
    posX: null,
    posY: null,
  };
}

export function isNormalizedOneshotFile(file = {}) {
  if (!file || typeof file !== "object") return false;
  const base64 = String(file?.base64 || file?.contentBase64 || "").trim();
  const filename = String(file?.filename || file?.fileName || "").trim();
  const page = toFiniteNumber(file?.page),
    posX = toFiniteNumber(file?.posX),
    posY = toFiniteNumber(file?.posY);
  return (
    Boolean(base64 && filename) &&
    page !== null &&
    posX !== null &&
    posY !== null
  );
}

export function toNormalizedOneshotFile(
  file = {},
  fallbackFilename = "document.pdf",
) {
  const directCoordinates = resolveProviderCoordinates(file, 1);
  return buildNormalizedOneshotFile(
    file,
    fallbackFilename,
    directCoordinates,
  );
}

export function normalizeOneshotFiles(files = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(files)) return [];
  return files.reduce((acc, file, index) => {
    const normalized = toNormalizedOneshotFile(
      file,
      `document-${index + 1}.pdf`,
    );
    if (!normalized || !normalized.base64) return acc;
    acc.push(normalized);
    return acc;
  }, []);
}

export function normalizeDownloadedOneshotFiles(
  response = {},
  fallbackFiles = [],
) {
  const details = response?.details || response || {};
  const candidates =
    [
      details?.files,
      details?.signedFiles,
      response?.files,
      response?.signedFiles,
      fallbackFiles,
    ].find(Array.isArray) || [];
  return candidates.map((item, index) => ({
    path: item?.path || item?.filePath || null,
    fileName:
      item?.fileName ||
      item?.filename ||
      item?.name ||
      fallbackFiles?.[index]?.filename ||
      fallbackFiles?.[index]?.fileName ||
      `signed-${index + 1}.pdf`,
    base64: item?.base64 || item?.contentBase64 || "",
    raw: item,
    documentId: item?.documentId || item?.docId || null,
    fileTypeId: item?.fileTypeId || fallbackFiles?.[index]?.fileTypeId || null,
    fileTypeName:
      item?.fileTypeName || fallbackFiles?.[index]?.fileTypeName || null,
  }));
}

export function buildSignedFilesIndex(downloadedFiles = []) {
  return downloadedFiles.map((file, index) => ({
    index,
    path: file.path,
    fileName: file.fileName || `signed-${index + 1}.pdf`,
    documentId: file.documentId || null,
    fileTypeId: file.fileTypeId || null,
    fileTypeName: file.fileTypeName || null,
    hasBase64: Boolean(file.base64),
  }));
}

export function assertHasFilenames(normalizedFiles = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(normalizedFiles)) return;
  if (
    normalizedFiles.some(
      (file) => !String(file?.filename || file?.fileName || "").trim(),
    )
  )
    throw new Error(
      "files.filename requerido para cada documento en la firma oneshot.",
    );
}

export function assertHasCoordinates(normalizedFiles = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(normalizedFiles)) return;
  if (
    normalizedFiles.some((file) => {
      const page = Number(file?.page),
        posX = Number(file?.posX),
        posY = Number(file?.posY);
      return (
        !Number.isFinite(page) ||
        page < 1 ||
        !Number.isFinite(posX) ||
        !Number.isFinite(posY)
      );
    })
  )
    throw new Error(
      "files.page, files.posX y files.posY requeridos para cada documento en la firma oneshot.",
    );
}

export function findInvalidFileType(
  normalizedFiles = [],
  allowedFileTypeIds = new Set(),
) {
  if (!Array.isArray(normalizedFiles)) return undefined;
  return normalizedFiles.find((file) => {
    const fileTypeId = String(file?.fileTypeId || "").trim();
    return !fileTypeId || !allowedFileTypeIds.has(fileTypeId);
  });
}

// ============================================================================
// Validation
// ============================================================================

export function isFinalSigningResult(result) {
  if (!result || typeof result !== "object") return false;
  if (result.completed === true) return true;
  if (result.signatureBatch?.completed === true) return true;
  if (result.resumed && result.result)
    return isFinalSigningResult(result.result);
  if (result.result) return isFinalSigningResult(result.result);
  return false;
}

export function hasSigningError(result) {
  if (!result || typeof result !== "object") return false;
  if (result.error) return true;
  if (result.signatureBatch?.error) return true;
  if (result.result) return hasSigningError(result.result);
  return false;
}

export function extractSigningError(result) {
  if (!result || typeof result !== "object") return null;
  if (result.error) return String(result.error);
  if (result.signatureBatch?.error) return String(result.signatureBatch.error);
  if (result.result) return extractSigningError(result.result);
  return null;
}

export function pickSigningDocument(documents = [], requestedDocumentId = "") {
  if (!Array.isArray(documents) || documents.length === 0) return null;
  if (requestedDocumentId) {
    const requested = documents.find((doc) => doc?.id === requestedDocumentId);
    if (requested) return requested;
  }
  return documents.find((doc) => doc?.readyToSign) || documents[0] || null;
}

export function filterSignableDocuments(documents = []) {
  return Array.isArray(documents)
    ? documents.filter((doc) => doc?.readyToSign)
    : [];
}
export function resolveDocumentId(doc = null) {
  return doc?.id || doc?.documentId || null;
}

export function validateDniEligibility(dniResponse) {
  const details = dniResponse?.details || dniResponse || {};
  if (isTruthyResult(details?.result) !== true)
    throw new Error("La validación de cédula fue rechazada por el proveedor.");
  const expiration = parseDmyDate(details?.FechaExpiracion);
  const expedition = parseDmyDate(details?.FechaExpedicion);
  if (expiration) {
    if (expiration.getTime() < Date.now())
      throw new Error("La cédula se encuentra vencida.");
    return true;
  }
  if (!expedition)
    throw new Error(
      "El proveedor no retornó fechas válidas para validar la vigencia de la cédula.",
    );
  const years = differenceInWholeYears(expedition, new Date());
  if (years == null)
    throw new Error("No se pudo calcular la vigencia de la cédula.");
  if (years >= 10)
    throw new Error(
      "La cédula supera el límite de vigencia permitido por el flujo.",
    );
  return true;
}

export function isValidP12File(file) {
  if (!file) return false;
  const name = String(file.name || "").toLowerCase();
  return ALLOWED_P12_MIME_TYPES.has(file.type) || name.endsWith(".p12");
}

export function validateSigningInput({ signType, password, p12File } = {}) {
  if (!signType) return "Seleccione un tipo de firma.";
  if (signType !== SIGN_TYPES.ELECTRONIC) return null;
  if (!isValidP12File(p12File)) return "Adjunte un archivo .p12 valido.";
  if (!password || String(password).trim().length < 8)
    return "La contrasena del certificado debe tener al menos 8 caracteres.";
  return null;
}

export function validateSigningPayload({ documents = [], signer = {} } = {}) {
  const errors = [];
  if (!Array.isArray(documents) || documents.length === 0)
    errors.push("No hay documentos para firmar.");
  if (!signer.cedula)
    errors.push("No se pudo resolver la cédula del firmante.");
  if (!signer.codigoDactilar)
    errors.push(
      "Falta el código dactilar requerido para validar la identidad.",
    );
  return errors;
}

export function isSigningCompleted(status = "") {
  const s = String(status || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  return s === "completed" || s === "done" || s === "signed";
}
export function isSigningPending(status = "") {
  const s = String(status || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  return (
    s === "pending" ||
    s === "liveness_pending" ||
    s === "validating_dni" ||
    s === "signing_request"
  );
}
export function isSigningFailed(status = "") {
  const s = String(status || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  return (
    s === "failed" || s === "error" || s === "rejected" || s === "cancelled"
  );
}
export function generateTransactionId(prefix = "") {
  const id = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}`;
  return prefix ? `${prefix}-${id}` : id;
}

// ============================================================================
// Workflow Resolution
// ============================================================================

export function extractSignableStepFileTypes(
  workflowDefinition = null,
  editableConfig = {},
) {
  const configProvided =
    editableConfig && Object.keys(editableConfig).length > 0;
  const source = configProvided ? editableConfig : workflowDefinition || {};
  const execution =
    source?.execution ||
    source?.Execution ||
    source?.editableConfig?.execution ||
    source?.editableConfig?.Execution ||
    null;
  let stepFileTypes = [];
  if (Array.isArray(execution?.stepFileTypes))
    stepFileTypes = execution.stepFileTypes;
  else if (Array.isArray(execution?.StepFileTypes))
    stepFileTypes = execution.StepFileTypes;
  return (stepFileTypes || [])
    .filter((item) => {
      if (!item || typeof item !== "object") return false;
      if (item.deleted === true || item.Deleted === true) return false;
      return normalizeWorkflowFlag(
        item.requiresSignature ?? item.RequiresSignature,
      );
    })
    .map((item) => {
      const fileTypeId =
        resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(item, { allowIdFallback: false }) || "";
      const fileTypeName =
        firstNonEmptyWorkflowText(
          item?.fileTypeName,
          item?.FileTypeName,
          item?.name,
        ) || "";
      const semanticId =
        resolveSigningSemanticId(fileTypeName) ||
        resolveSigningSemanticId(String(item?.id || "")) ||
        null;
      return {
        id: String(fileTypeId || "").trim(),
        name: String(fileTypeName || "").trim(),
        semanticId,
      };
    });
}

export function resolveSignableWorkflowFileTypes(
  workflow = {},
  checklist = [],
  attachments = [],
) {
  const signableStepFileTypes = extractSignableStepFileTypes(workflow);
  void checklist;
  void attachments;
  const bySemantic = new Map();
  const byFileTypeId = new Map();
  signableStepFileTypes.forEach((item) => {
    const fileTypeId = String(item?.id || "").trim();
    const fileTypeName = String(item?.name || "").trim();
    if (!fileTypeId || !fileTypeName) return;
    const semanticId =
      item.semanticId || resolveSigningSemanticId(fileTypeName);
    if (!semanticId) return;
    const normalized = { semanticId, fileTypeId, fileTypeName };
    byFileTypeId.set(fileTypeId, normalized);
    if (!bySemantic.has(semanticId)) bySemantic.set(semanticId, normalized);
  });
  if (bySemantic.size === 0)
    throw new Error(
      "No se encontraron tipos de archivo configurados para firma (requiresSignature=true).",
    );
  return { bySemantic, byFileTypeId, signableStepFileTypes };
}

export function filterWorkflowSignableDocuments(
  documents = [],
  allowedFileTypeIds = new Set(),
) {
  if (!Array.isArray(documents)) return [];
  const allowed =
    allowedFileTypeIds instanceof Set
      ? allowedFileTypeIds
      : new Set(Array.from(allowedFileTypeIds || []));
  return documents.filter((doc) => {
    const fileTypeId =
      resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(doc, { allowIdFallback: false }) ||
      doc?.fileTypeId ||
      doc?.workflowFileTypeId ||
      "";
    if (fileTypeId && allowed.has(String(fileTypeId).trim())) return true;
    const semanticFromId =
      resolveSigningSemanticId(String(doc?.id || "")) ||
      resolveSigningSemanticId(
        doc?.fileTypeName || doc?.name || doc?.label || "",
      );
    return Boolean(semanticFromId);
  });
}

const SEMANTIC_ID_MAPPING = Object.freeze({
  solicitud: "SOLICITUD DE CRÉDITO",
  convenio: "CONVENIO DE CRÉDITO",
  declaracion: "PROTECCION DE DATOS",
});

export const resolveSemanticIdMapping = () => SEMANTIC_ID_MAPPING;

export async function copyTextToClipboard(text = "") {
  const value = String(text || "").trim();
  if (!value) return false;
  try {
    if (navigator?.clipboard?.writeText) {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(value);
      return true;
    }
  } catch {
    /* fall through */
  }
  try {
    const textarea = document.createElement("textarea");
    textarea.value = value;
    textarea.setAttribute("readonly", "true");
    textarea.style.position = "fixed";
    textarea.style.opacity = "0";
    document.body.appendChild(textarea);
    textarea.focus();
    textarea.select();
    const ok = document.execCommand("copy");
    textarea.remove();
    return Boolean(ok);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import {
  getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument,
  getPrimarySignaturePosition,
  toNormalizedOneshotFile,
  selectPreferredSignaturePosition,
} from "./signingUtils.js";
import {
  getPrimaryOfficialAnchorByDocumentId,
  getOfficialAnchorsByDocumentId,
} from "./signingFlowSelectors.js";

describe("signing anchor selection", () => {
  it("prefers convenio.customer and uses expectedPage as the tie-breaker", () => {
    const expectedAnchors = getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(
      "convenio",
      "natural",
    );
    const anchors = [
      {
        key: "convenio.inverneg",
        page: 1,
        posX: 116,
        posY: 300,
      },
      {
        key: "convenio.customer",
        page: 2,
        posX: 399,
        posY: 301,
      },
      {
        key: "convenio.customer",
        page: 1,
        posX: 401,
        posY: 302,
      },
    ];

    const preferred = selectPreferredSignaturePosition(anchors, expectedAnchors);
    const primary = getPrimarySignaturePosition(anchors, expectedAnchors);

    expect(preferred).toMatchObject({
      key: "convenio.customer",
      page: 1,
      posX: 401,
      posY: 302,
    });
    expect(primary).toMatchObject({
      key: "convenio.customer",
      page: 1,
      posX: 401,
      posY: 302,
    });
  });

  it("includes both solicitud anchors for linked forms", () => {
    const expectedAnchors = getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(
      "solicitud",
      "linked",
    );

    expect(expectedAnchors.map((anchor) => anchor.key)).toEqual([
      "solicitud.applicant",
      "solicitud.principal",
    ]);
  });

  it("keeps the first stable match when duplicated anchors share the same key and page", () => {
    const anchors = [
      {
        key: "convenio.customer",
        page: 1,
        posX: 200,
        posY: 250,
      },
      {
        key: "convenio.customer",
        page: 1,
        posX: 220,
        posY: 252,
      },
    ];

    const primary = selectPreferredSignaturePosition(anchors, [
      { key: "convenio.customer", expectedPage: 1 },
    ]);

    expect(primary).toMatchObject({
      key: "convenio.customer",
      page: 1,
      posX: 200,
      posY: 250,
    });
  });

  it("exposes the normalized primary official anchor for a document", () => {
    const signingState = {
      officialPdfByDocumentId: {
        convenio: {
          resolvedAnchors: [
            {
              key: "convenio.inverneg",
              page: 1,
              xPt: 116,
              yPt: 300,
            },
            {
              key: "convenio.customer",
              page: 1,
              xPt: 399,
              yPt: 301,
            },
            {
              key: "convenio.customer",
              page: 2,
              xPt: 401,
              yPt: 302,
            },
          ],
        },
      },
    };

    const anchors = getOfficialAnchorsByDocumentId(signingState, "convenio");
    const primary = getPrimaryOfficialAnchorByDocumentId(
      signingState,
      "convenio",
      "natural",
    );

    expect(anchors).toHaveLength(3);
    expect(primary).toMatchObject({
      key: "convenio.customer",
      page: 1,
      xPt: 399,
      yPt: 301,
    });
  });

  it("normalizes oneshot filenames from the file type name", () => {
    const normalized = toNormalizedOneshotFile(
      {
        base64: "QUJD",
        fileTypeId: "4c571d9d-2a79-4af1-91d4-397dee553fa5",
        fileTypeName: "CONVENIO DE CRÉDITO",
        page: 1,
        posX: 399,
        posY: 301,
      },
      "fallback.pdf",
    );

    expect(normalized).toMatchObject({
      filename: "4c571d9d-2a79-4af1-91d4-397dee553fa5.pdf",
      page: 1,
      posX: 399,
      posY: 301,
    });
  });
});


// ========================== FIN DE src/domain/signing/signingUtils.test.js ==========================

// ARCHIVO #26
// Ruta relativa: src/infrastructure/signature/signatureBatchService.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/infrastructure/signature/signatureBatchService.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 567
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"

import { getSigningDocumentsChecklist } from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import {
  buildBatchPayload,
  normalizeDownloadedOneshotFiles,
  assertHasFilenames,
  assertHasCoordinates,
  buildSignedFilesIndex,
  findInvalidFileType,
  resolveSigningSemanticId,
  resolveSignableWorkflowFileTypes,
  filterSignableDocuments,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingUtils.js";
import { buildLivenessCallbackUrl } from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessState";
import {
  createLivenessTransaction,
  requestOneshotSign,
} from "./signatureProviderApi";
import { firstNonEmptyString } from "@/infrastructure/httpTransport";
import { fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowCrud";
import {
  splitFullName,
  normalizeEcuadorPhone,
} from "@/shared/utils/personHelpers";

const DEFAULT_PROJECT_REFERENCE = "FirmasInverneg";
const ACTIVE_ONESHOT_REQUESTS = new Set();
const SIGNING_FILE_TYPE_NAME_BY_SEMANTIC_ID = Object.freeze({
  solicitud: "SOLICITUD DE CRÉDITO",
  convenio: "CONVENIO DE CRÉDITO",
  declaracion: "PROTECCION DE DATOS",
});

// NOTE: inlined session token resolution where used to avoid trivial wrappers

export function resolvePrimarySigner({
  formType,
  formData,
  session = null,
  dniDetails = null,
} = {}) {
  const source =
    formData && typeof formData === "object" && formData.formData
      ? formData.formData
      : formData || {};
  const details = dniDetails?.details || dniDetails || {};
  const dniFullName = firstNonEmptyString(details?.Nombre);
  const dniNameParts = dniFullName
    ? splitFullName(dniFullName)
    : { nombres: "", apellido1: "", apellido2: "" };

  const naturalFullName = firstNonEmptyString(
    source?.representative?.fullName,
    source?.applicantSignatureName,
    session?.fullName,
  );
  const linkedPrincipalFullName = firstNonEmptyString(
    source?.principalAccount?.principalFullName,
    source?.convenio?.signerName,
    source?.dataDeclaration?.legalRepresentative,
    source?.representative?.fullName,
    session?.fullName,
  );
  const fallbackFullName =
    formType === "linked" ? linkedPrincipalFullName : naturalFullName;
  const fallbackNameParts = fallbackFullName
    ? splitFullName(fallbackFullName)
    : { nombres: "", apellido1: "", apellido2: "" };

  const cedula = firstNonEmptyString(
    source?.principalAccount?.principalCi,
    source?.representative?.ci,
    source?.applicantIdOrRuc,
    source?.guarantor?.ci,
    session?.cedula,
    session?.ci,
  );

  const codigoDactilar = firstNonEmptyString(
    source?.codigoDactilar,
    source?.codDactilar,
    source?.representative?.codigoDactilar,
    source?.representative?.codDactilar,
    source?.principalAccount?.codigoDactilar,
    source?.principalAccount?.codDactilar,
    session?.codigoDactilar,
    session?.codDactilar,
    details?.CodDactilar,
  );

  return {
    cedula,
    codigoDactilar,
    nombres: firstNonEmptyString(
      fallbackNameParts.nombres,
      dniNameParts.nombres,
      dniFullName,
    ),
    apellido1: firstNonEmptyString(
      fallbackNameParts.apellido1,
      dniNameParts.apellido1,
      session?.apellido1,
      session?.lastName,
    ),
    apellido2: firstNonEmptyString(
      fallbackNameParts.apellido2,
      dniNameParts.apellido2,
      session?.apellido2,
      session?.lastName2,
    ),
    env: "produ",
    email: firstNonEmptyString(
      source?.representative?.email,
      source?.convenio?.email,
      source?.collectionContact?.email,
      source?.business?.electronicInvoiceEmail,
      source?.businessToLink?.electronicInvoiceEmail,
      source?.guarantor?.email,
      source?.email,
      session?.email,
    ),
    celular: firstNonEmptyString(
      source?.representative?.cellPhone,
      source?.representative?.homePhone,
      source?.principalAccount?.principalCellPhone,
      source?.principalAccount?.principalHomePhone,
      source?.collectionContact?.directPhone,
      source?.business?.phone,
      source?.businessToLink?.phone,
      source?.guarantor?.cellPhone,
      source?.guarantor?.homePhone,
      session?.cellPhone,
      session?.phone,
    ),
    direccion: firstNonEmptyString(
      source?.representative?.homeAddress,
      source?.guarantor?.address,
      source?.principalAccount?.principalHomeAddress,
      source?.business?.commercialAddress,
      source?.businessToLink?.commercialAddress,
      source?.locationReference?.otherReferences,
      source?.locationReference?.secondaryStreet,
      source?.locationReference?.sector,
      details?.Domicilio,
    ),
    ciudad: firstNonEmptyString(
      source?.business?.city,
      source?.businessToLink?.city,
      source?.principalAccount?.city,
      source?.convenio?.signerCity,
      source?.city,
      session?.city,
    ),
    provincia: firstNonEmptyString(
      source?.business?.province,
      source?.businessToLink?.province,
      source?.principalAccount?.province,
      source?.province,
      session?.province,
    ),
    pais:
      firstNonEmptyString(
        source?.pais,
        source?.country,
        source?.business?.country,
        session?.country,
        "EC",
      ) || "EC",
  };
}

function ensureBatchDocuments({
  documents = [],
  formType,
  formData,
  signableWorkflowFileTypes,
}) {
  const bySemantic = signableWorkflowFileTypes?.bySemantic || new Map();
  const sourceDocuments =
    Array.isArray(documents) && documents.length > 0
      ? documents
      : (getSigningDocumentsChecklist(formType, formData) || [])
          .filter((item) => item.readyToSign)
          .map((item) => ({
            id: item.id,
            signaturePositions: item.signaturePositions || [],
            label: item.label || "",
          }));

  const candidateDocuments = filterSignableDocuments(
    sourceDocuments,
    new Set(Array.from(signableWorkflowFileTypes?.byFileTypeId?.keys() || [])),
  );

  const resolvedDocuments = candidateDocuments
    .map((doc) => {
      const semanticFromId = resolveSigningSemanticId(String(doc?.id || ""));
      const semanticId =
        (semanticFromId ? String(doc.id).trim() : "") ||
        resolveSigningSemanticId(
          firstNonEmptyString(doc?.fileTypeName, doc?.name, doc?.label),
        );
      if (!semanticId) return null;

      const workflowType = bySemantic.get(semanticId) || null;
      if (!workflowType?.fileTypeId) {
        throw new Error(
          `No se encontró fileTypeId firmable para el documento "${semanticId}".`,
        );
      }

      return {
        ...doc,
        fileTypeId: workflowType.fileTypeId,
        workflowFileTypeId: workflowType.fileTypeId,
        fileTypeName:
          firstNonEmptyString(doc?.fileTypeName, workflowType.fileTypeName) ||
          SIGNING_FILE_TYPE_NAME_BY_SEMANTIC_ID[semanticId],
      };
    })
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (resolvedDocuments.length === 0) {
    throw new Error("No hay documentos con tipo firmable para enviar a firma.");
  }

  return resolvedDocuments;
}

export async function prepareDocumentsForSigning({
  documents = [],
  formType,
  formData,
  routeContext = null,
  session = null,
} = {}) {
  const workflowId = firstNonEmptyString(
    routeContext?.wrk,
    routeContext?.workflowId,
    routeContext?.requestId,
  );
  if (!workflowId) {
    throw new Error(
      "No se encontró el workflowId para resolver los tipos firmables.",
    );
  }
  const editableConfig = await fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest(workflowId, {
    exec: routeContext?.exec,
    wrk: workflowId,
    dcmt: routeContext?.dcmt || routeContext?.documentId,
    documentId: routeContext?.dcmt || routeContext?.documentId,
    folderId: session?.folderId,
    token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || session?.bearerToken || "",
  });

  const signableWorkflowFileTypes = resolveSignableWorkflowFileTypes(
    editableConfig,
    getSigningDocumentsChecklist(formType, formData),
    [],
  );
  const signableDocuments = ensureBatchDocuments({
    documents,
    formType,
    formData,
    signableWorkflowFileTypes,
  });
  if (signableDocuments.length === 0)
    throw new Error("No hay documentos listos para firmar.");
  const filesPayload = await buildBatchPayload({
    documents: signableDocuments,
    formType,
    formData,
  });
  if (!Array.isArray(filesPayload) || filesPayload.length === 0)
    throw new Error("No se generaron documentos para firmar.");
  return { signableDocuments, filesPayload, signableWorkflowFileTypes };
}

export async function executeProviderSigningBatch({
  formType,
  formData,
  routeContext = null,
  session = null,
  documents = [],
  continueAfterLiveness = false,
  livenessId = null,
  livenessApproved = false,
  transactionId = null,
  callbackURL = null,
  dniDetails = null,
  onStatus = null,
} = {}) {
  const sessionToken = firstNonEmptyString(
    session?.token,
    session?.accessToken,
    session?.bearerToken,
  );
  if (typeof onStatus === "function")
    onStatus({ running: true, message: "Preparando paquete de documentos..." });
  const { filesPayload, signableWorkflowFileTypes } =
    await prepareDocumentsForSigning({
      documents,
      formType,
      formData,
      routeContext,
      session,
    });

  const signer = resolvePrimarySigner({
    formType,
    formData,
    session,
    dniDetails,
  });
  if (!signer.cedula)
    throw new Error("No se pudo resolver la cédula del firmante.");
  if (!signer.codigoDactilar)
    throw new Error(
      "Falta el código dactilar requerido para validar la identidad.",
    );

  const workflowIdFromRoute = firstNonEmptyString(
    routeContext?.wrk,
    routeContext?.workflowId,
    routeContext?.requestId,
  );
  const resolvedTransactionId = firstNonEmptyString(
    transactionId,
    workflowIdFromRoute,
  );
  if (!resolvedTransactionId)
    throw new Error(
      "workflowId/transactionId requerido. No se permite generar IDs aleatorios para firma.",
    );
  const resolvedCallbackUrl =
    callbackURL || buildLivenessCallbackUrl({ pathname: "/forms" });
  const resolvedProjectReference =
    firstNonEmptyString(
      formData?.signatureBatch?.projectReference,
      formData?.signing?.projectReference,
      DEFAULT_PROJECT_REFERENCE,
    ) || DEFAULT_PROJECT_REFERENCE;

  const signatureBatch = {
    status: "validating_dni",
    transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
    projectReference: resolvedProjectReference,
    livenessId: null,
    livenessUrl: null,
    dniValidated: false,
    livenessApproved: false,
    signRequestAccepted: false,
    signedFilesIndex: [],
    signedFilesBase64: [],
    error: null,
  };

  if (!continueAfterLiveness) {
    return startLivenessStep({
      signer,
      dniDetails,
      filesPayload,
      resolvedTransactionId,
      resolvedCallbackUrl,
      resolvedProjectReference,
      sessionToken,
      signatureBatch,
      onStatus,
    });
  }

  const effectiveLivenessId = firstNonEmptyString(
    livenessId,
    signatureBatch.livenessId,
  );
  if (!effectiveLivenessId)
    throw new Error("No se recibió el livenessId para continuar con la firma.");
  if (!livenessApproved) {
    throw new Error(
      "No se puede continuar la firma: el liveness no está aprobado.",
    );
  }

  if (typeof onStatus === "function")
    onStatus({ running: true, message: "Solicitando firma masiva..." });

  const canonicalOneshotFiles = filesPayload;
  if (canonicalOneshotFiles.length === 0) {
    throw new Error(
      "No se pudieron normalizar documentos con coordenadas de firma válidas.",
    );
  }
  assertHasFilenames(canonicalOneshotFiles);
  assertHasCoordinates(canonicalOneshotFiles);
  const allowedFileTypeIds = new Set(
    Array.from(signableWorkflowFileTypes?.byFileTypeId?.keys?.() || []),
  );
  const invalidFileType = findInvalidFileType(
    canonicalOneshotFiles,
    allowedFileTypeIds,
  );
  if (invalidFileType) {
    throw new Error(
      "El payload de firma contiene un fileTypeId fuera del conjunto requiresSignature=true.",
    );
  }
  const mismatchedFileName = canonicalOneshotFiles.find((file) => {
    const fileTypeId = String(file?.fileTypeId || "").trim();
    const expected = signableWorkflowFileTypes?.byFileTypeId?.get(fileTypeId);
    const semanticFromFilename = resolveSigningSemanticId(file?.filename || "");
    return (
      Boolean(expected?.semanticId && semanticFromFilename) &&
      semanticFromFilename !== expected.semanticId
    );
  });
  if (mismatchedFileName) {
    throw new Error(
      "El payload de firma tiene un cruce entre fileTypeId y filename.",
    );
  }

  const oneshotRequestKey = [
    resolvedTransactionId,
    effectiveLivenessId,
    signer.cedula,
  ].join(":");
  if (ACTIVE_ONESHOT_REQUESTS.has(oneshotRequestKey)) {
    throw new Error(
      "Ya existe una solicitud de firma en curso para esta transacción. Espera unos segundos e inténtalo nuevamente.",
    );
  }
  ACTIVE_ONESHOT_REQUESTS.add(oneshotRequestKey);

  let oneshotResponse;
  try {
    oneshotResponse = await requestOneshotSign(
      {
        cedula: signer.cedula,
        livenessId: effectiveLivenessId,
        nombres: signer.nombres,
        apellido1: signer.apellido1,
        apellido2: signer.apellido2,
        email: signer.email,
        celular: normalizeEcuadorPhone(signer.celular),
        direccion: signer.direccion,
        ciudad: signer.ciudad,
        provincia: signer.provincia,
        pais: signer.pais || "EC",
        transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
        qrString:
          firstNonEmptyString(
            formData?.signatureBatch?.qrString,
            formData?.qrString,
          ) || null,
        projectReference: resolvedProjectReference,
        files: canonicalOneshotFiles,
      },
      { token: sessionToken, projectReference: resolvedProjectReference },
    );
  } finally {
    ACTIVE_ONESHOT_REQUESTS.delete(oneshotRequestKey);
  }

  const downloadedFiles = normalizeDownloadedOneshotFiles(
    oneshotResponse,
    filesPayload,
  );
  const signedFilesIndex = buildSignedFilesIndex(downloadedFiles);

  return {
    completed: true,
    transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
    livenessId: effectiveLivenessId,
    signer,
    dniResponse: dniDetails,
    oneshotResponse,
    signedFiles: downloadedFiles,
    signatureBatch: {
      ...signatureBatch,
      status: "completed",
      completed: true,
      completedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
      livenessId: effectiveLivenessId,
      dniValidated: true,
      livenessApproved: true,
      signRequestAccepted: true,
      signedFilesIndex,
      signedFilesBase64: downloadedFiles,
      signRequestResponse: oneshotResponse,
    },
  };
}

export async function startLivenessStep({
  signer,
  dniDetails,
  filesPayload = [],
  resolvedTransactionId,
  resolvedCallbackUrl,
  resolvedProjectReference,
  sessionToken,
  signatureBatch,
  onStatus,
} = {}) {
  if (typeof onStatus === "function")
    onStatus({
      running: true,
      message: "Iniciando verificación de liveness...",
    });
  const startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
  const livenessResponse = await createLivenessTransaction(
    {
      cedula: signer.cedula,
      fingerprintCode: signer.codigoDactilar,
      transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
      callbackURL: resolvedCallbackUrl,
      projectReference: resolvedProjectReference,
    },
    {
      token: sessionToken,
      fingerprintCode: signer.codigoDactilar,
      projectReference: resolvedProjectReference,
    },
  );

  const livenessDetails = livenessResponse?.details || livenessResponse || {};
  const nextLivenessId = firstNonEmptyString(
    livenessDetails?.livenessId,
    livenessResponse?.livenessId,
    livenessResponse?.id,
  );
  const livenessUrl = firstNonEmptyString(
    livenessDetails?.link,
    livenessResponse?.link,
    livenessResponse?.url,
    livenessResponse?.livenessUrl,
  );

  return {
    requiresLiveness: true,
    transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
    livenessId: nextLivenessId,
    livenessUrl,
    callbackUrl: resolvedCallbackUrl,
    startedAt,
    signer,
    dniDetails,
    livenessResponse,
    filesPayload,
    signatureBatch: {
      ...signatureBatch,
      status: "liveness_pending",
      livenessStatus: "pending",
      livenessId: nextLivenessId,
      livenessUrl,
      callbackUrl: resolvedCallbackUrl,
      startedAt,
      dniValidated: Boolean(dniDetails),
      signaturePositionsVersion: "v2-pt",
      projectReference: resolvedProjectReference,
    },
  };
}

// continueAfterLiveness was a trivial wrapper around executeProviderSigningBatch
// Callers should invoke `executeProviderSigningBatch({ ..., continueAfterLiveness: true })` directly.


// ========================== FIN DE src/infrastructure/signature/signatureBatchService.js ==========================
