import {
  cleanString,
  createJsonRequester,
  requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl,
} from "@/infrastructure/httpTransport";
import { logger } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import {
  normalizeOneshotFiles,
  assertHasFilenames,
  assertHasCoordinates,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingUtils.js";
import { normalizeProviderLivenessStatus } from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessState";

const SIGNATURE_PROVIDER_DEBUG =
  cleanString(import.meta.env.VITE_SIGNATURE_PROVIDER_DEBUG).toLowerCase() ===
  "true";

// Lightweight debug logger for this module — disabled by default
const debugLog = (...args) => {
  if (!SIGNATURE_PROVIDER_DEBUG) return;
  try {
    if (logger && typeof logger.info === "function") {
      logger.info("[signatureProviderApi]", ...args);
    }
  } catch {
    /* ignore logging errors */
  }
};

// ============================================================================
// 1. ENVIRONMENT CONFIG
// ============================================================================

function resolveEnvSignatureBaseUrl() {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] resolveEnvSignatureBaseUrl called");
  debugLog("enter resolveEnvSignatureBaseUrl");
  const explicit = cleanString(
    import.meta.env.VITE_SIGNATURE_API_BASE_URL,
  ).replace(/\/+$/, "");
  debugLog("explicit", explicit);
  if (explicit) {
    debugLog("resolveEnvSignatureBaseUrl -> explicit", explicit);
    return explicit;
  }
  const sigProto = cleanString(
    import.meta.env.VITE_SIG_PROTO || "https",
  ).replace(/:\/\//, "");
  debugLog("sigProto", sigProto);
  const sigHost = cleanString(import.meta.env.VITE_SIG_HOST).replace(
    /\/+$/,
    "",
  );
  debugLog("sigHost", sigHost);
  const result = sigHost ? `${sigProto}://${sigHost}`.replace(/\/+$/, "") : "";
  debugLog("resolveEnvSignatureBaseUrl -> result", result);
  return result;
}

function resolveEnvSignatureApiKey() {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] resolveEnvSignatureApiKey called");
  const key = cleanString(
    import.meta.env.VITE_X_NEXXIT_KEY || import.meta.env.VITE_NEXXIT_KEY,
  );
  debugLog("resolveEnvSignatureApiKey", key);
  return key;
}

export function resolveSignatureRuntimeConfig(source = null) {
  debugLog(
    "[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] resolveSignatureRuntimeConfig called",
    { source },
  );
  debugLog("enter resolveSignatureRuntimeConfig", { source });
  const runtime = source && typeof source === "object" ? source : {};
  debugLog("runtime", runtime);
  const runtimeBaseUrl = cleanString(
    runtime.baseUrl ||
      runtime.uatacaCl ||
      runtime.uatacaCL ||
      runtime.signatureBaseUrl ||
      runtime.providerBaseUrl,
  ).replace(/\/+$/, "");
  debugLog("runtimeBaseUrl", runtimeBaseUrl);
  const runtimeApiKey = cleanString(
    runtime.apiKey ||
      runtime["x-nexxit-key"] ||
      runtime.xNexxitKey ||
      runtime.x_nexxit_key,
  );
  debugLog("runtimeApiKey", runtimeApiKey);
  const baseUrl = runtimeBaseUrl || resolveEnvSignatureBaseUrl();
  const apiKey = runtimeApiKey || resolveEnvSignatureApiKey();
  debugLog("resolved baseUrl and apiKey", { baseUrl, apiKey });
  if (!baseUrl)
    throw new Error("No se encontró la URL base del proveedor de firma.");
  if (!apiKey)
    throw new Error("No se encontró la x-nexxit-key del proveedor de firma.");
  return { baseUrl, apiKey };
}

// ============================================================================
// 2. PROVIDER REQUESTER
// ============================================================================

const DEFAULT_ENDPOINTS = {
  createTransaction:
    "https://app.sisad.com.ec:2096/Middleware/api/uanataca/oneshotv2/createtransaction",
  createRequest:
    "https://app.sisad.com.ec:2096/Middleware/api/uanataca/oneshotv2/createrequestoneshot",
  checkLiveness:
    "https://app.sisad.com.ec:2096/Middleware/api/uanataca/oneshotv2/checkliveness3d",
};

debugLog("DEFAULT_ENDPOINTS", DEFAULT_ENDPOINTS);

function resolveUanatacaEndpointUrl(kind) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] resolveUanatacaEndpointUrl called", {
    kind,
  });
  const envOverrides = {
    createTransaction: cleanString(
      import.meta.env.VITE_UANATACA_CREATE_TRANSACTION_URL,
    ),
    createRequest: cleanString(
      import.meta.env.VITE_UANATACA_CREATE_REQUEST_URL,
    ),
    checkLiveness: cleanString(
      import.meta.env.VITE_UANATACA_CHECK_LIVENESS_URL,
    ),
  };
  debugLog("enter resolveUanatacaEndpointUrl", { kind, envOverrides });
  if (envOverrides[kind]) return envOverrides[kind];
  if (DEFAULT_ENDPOINTS[kind]) return DEFAULT_ENDPOINTS[kind];
  throw new Error(`No se encontró endpoint para ${kind}.`);
}

let cachedProviderRequester = null;
let cachedProviderRequesterConfig = null;

debugLog("cachedProviderRequester (initial)", cachedProviderRequester);
debugLog(
  "cachedProviderRequesterConfig (initial)",
  cachedProviderRequesterConfig,
);

function getProviderRequester(runtimeConfig = null) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] getProviderRequester called", {
    runtimeConfig,
  });
  debugLog("enter getProviderRequester", { runtimeConfig });
  const { baseUrl, apiKey } = resolveSignatureRuntimeConfig(runtimeConfig);
  debugLog("getProviderRequester resolved", { baseUrl, apiKey });
  if (
    cachedProviderRequester &&
    cachedProviderRequesterConfig?.baseUrl === baseUrl &&
    cachedProviderRequesterConfig?.apiKey === apiKey
  ) {
    debugLog("getProviderRequester -> returning cached requester");
    return cachedProviderRequester;
  }
  cachedProviderRequester = createJsonRequester({
    baseUrl,
    apiKey,
    defaultErrorPrefix: "Error from signature provider",
  });
  cachedProviderRequesterConfig = { baseUrl, apiKey };
  debugLog(
    "getProviderRequester -> created new requester",
    cachedProviderRequesterConfig,
  );
  return cachedProviderRequester;
}

async function requestJson(
  path,
  {
    method = "GET",
    body,
    headers = {},
    query = null,
    runtimeConfig = null,
  } = {},
) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] requestJson called", {
    path,
    method,
    body,
    headers,
    query,
    runtimeConfig,
  });
  debugLog("enter requestJson", { path, method, body, headers, query });
  const requester = getProviderRequester(runtimeConfig);
  debugLog("requester obtained", { requester: !!requester });
  return requester(path, {
    method,
    body,
    headers,
    query,
  });
}

function buildAuthHeaders(token) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] buildAuthHeaders called", { token });
  const clean = cleanString(token);
  debugLog("buildAuthHeaders token", { raw: token, clean });
  if (!clean) {
    debugLog("buildAuthHeaders -> empty token, returning {}");
    return {};
  }
  const header = {
    Authorization: clean.toLowerCase().startsWith("bearer ")
      ? clean
      : `Bearer ${clean}`,
  };
  debugLog("buildAuthHeaders -> header", header);
  return header;
}

function resolveRuntimeToken(runtimeConfig = null) {
  return cleanString(
    runtimeConfig?.token ||
      runtimeConfig?.accessToken ||
      runtimeConfig?.bearerToken ||
      resolveFallbackTokenFromStorage(),
  );
}

function resolveRuntimeProjectReference(
  explicitProjectReference,
  runtimeConfig = null,
) {
  return (
    cleanString(
      explicitProjectReference ||
        runtimeConfig?.projectReference ||
        "FirmasInverneg",
    ) || "FirmasInverneg"
  );
}

function normalizeOneshotScalar(value, fallback = "") {
  return cleanString(value) || fallback;
}

function buildOneshotProviderFile(file = {}) {
  return {
    base64: normalizeOneshotScalar(file?.base64 || file?.contentBase64),
    filename: normalizeOneshotScalar(file?.filename || file?.fileName),
    page: Number(file?.page || 0),
    posX: Number(file?.posX || 0),
    posY: Number(file?.posY || 0),
  };
}

function buildOneshotRequestBody(input = {}) {
  const files = Array.isArray(input.files)
    ? input.files.map(buildOneshotProviderFile)
    : [];
  return {
    cedula: input.cedula,
    livenessId: input.livenessId,
    nombres: input.nombres,
    apellido1: input.apellido1,
    apellido2: input.apellido2,
    email: input.email,
    celular: input.celular,
    direccion: input.direccion,
    ciudad: input.ciudad,
    provincia: input.provincia,
    pais: input.pais,
    transactionId: input.transactionId,
    projectReference: input.projectReference,
    env: input.env,
    qrString: input.qrString,
    files,
  };
}

function safeReadJsonStorage(storage, key) {
  try {
    const raw = storage?.getItem?.(key);
    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function resolveFallbackTokenFromStorage() {
  try {
    const win = globalThis?.window;
    const pending =
      safeReadJsonStorage(
        win?.sessionStorage,
        "sisad:uanataca:liveness:pending",
      ) || {};
    const authState =
      safeReadJsonStorage(
        win?.sessionStorage,
        "sisad_inverneg_external_state_v1",
      ) || {};
    return cleanString(
      pending?.authToken ||
        authState?.auth?.session?.token ||
        authState?.auth?.session?.accessToken ||
        authState?.auth?.session?.Token ||
        "",
    );
  } catch {
    return "";
  }
}

function normalizeDownloadedFileResponse(payload) {
  debugLog(
    "[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] normalizeDownloadedFileResponse called",
    { payload },
  );
  debugLog("enter normalizeDownloadedFileResponse", { payload });
  let result;
  if (payload == null) result = { base64: "", raw: payload };
  else if (typeof payload === "string")
    result = { base64: payload.trim(), raw: payload };
  else if (typeof payload !== "object")
    result = { base64: String(payload), raw: payload };
  else
    result = {
      base64: String(
        payload.base64 ||
          payload.contentBase64 ||
          payload.fileBase64 ||
          payload.data ||
          payload.response ||
          "",
      ).trim(),
      fileName: payload.fileName || payload.filename || payload.name || null,
      path: payload.path || payload.filePath || null,
      raw: payload,
    };
  debugLog("normalizeDownloadedFileResponse -> result", result);
  return result;
}

// 3. API OPERATIONS
// ============================================================================

export async function validateDni(
  { cedula, codigoDactilar, transactionId },
  runtimeConfig = null,
) {
  debugLog("enter validateDni", {
    cedula,
    codigoDactilar,
    transactionId,
    runtimeConfig,
  });
  const body = {
    cedula: cedula || null,
    codigoDactilar: codigoDactilar || null,
    transactionId: transactionId || null,
  };
  debugLog("validateDni body", body);
  return requestJson("/services/dni-validate", {
    method: "POST",
    body,
    runtimeConfig,
  });
}

export async function createLivenessTransaction(
  {
    cedula,
    fingerprintCode,
    projectReference,
    transactionId,
    callbackUrl,
    callbackURL,
    env,
  },
  runtimeConfig = null,
) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] createLivenessTransaction called", {
    cedula,
    fingerprintCode,
    projectReference,
    transactionId,
    callbackUrl,
    callbackURL,
    env,
    runtimeConfig,
  });
  debugLog("enter createLivenessTransaction", {
    cedula,
    fingerprintCode,
    projectReference,
    transactionId,
    callbackUrl,
    callbackURL,

    env,
    runtimeConfig,
  });
  const resolvedTransactionId = cleanString(transactionId);
  if (!resolvedTransactionId)
    throw new Error("transactionId requerido para crear liveness.");
  const endpointUrl = resolveUanatacaEndpointUrl("createTransaction");
  debugLog("createLivenessTransaction endpointUrl", endpointUrl);
  const token = cleanString(resolveRuntimeToken(runtimeConfig));
  debugLog("createLivenessTransaction token (clean)", token);
  const body = {
    dni: cedula || null,
    fingerprintCode: cleanString(
      fingerprintCode ||
        runtimeConfig?.fingerprintCode ||
        runtimeConfig?.codigoDactilar ||
        runtimeConfig?.codDactilar,
    ),
    projectReference: resolveRuntimeProjectReference(
      projectReference,
      runtimeConfig,
    ),
    transactionId: resolvedTransactionId || undefined,
    callbackUrl:
      cleanString(callbackUrl || callbackURL || runtimeConfig?.callbackUrl) ||
      undefined,

    ...(env ? { env } : {}),
  };
  debugLog("createLivenessTransaction body", body);
  return requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl(endpointUrl, {
    method: "POST",
    body,
    headers: buildAuthHeaders(token),
    defaultErrorPrefix: "Error from middleware liveness",
  });
}

export async function checkLivenessTransaction(
  payload = {},
  runtimeConfig = null,
) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] checkLivenessTransaction called", {
    payload,
    runtimeConfig,
  });
  debugLog("enter checkLivenessTransaction", { payload, runtimeConfig });
  const livenessId = cleanString(payload?.livenessId || payload?.id);
  debugLog("livenessId", livenessId);
  if (!livenessId) throw new Error("No se recibió el livenessId.");
  const projectReference =
    cleanString(
      payload?.projectReference ||
        runtimeConfig?.projectReference ||
        import.meta.env.VITE_UANATACA_PROJECT_REFERENCE ||
        "FirmasInverneg",
    ) || "FirmasInverneg";
  debugLog("projectReference", projectReference);
  const endpointUrl = resolveUanatacaEndpointUrl("checkLiveness");
  debugLog("checkLivenessTransaction endpointUrl", endpointUrl);
  const token = cleanString(resolveRuntimeToken(runtimeConfig));
  debugLog("checkLivenessTransaction token (clean)", token);
  const reqOptions = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: buildAuthHeaders(token),
    query: { projectReference, livenessId },
    defaultErrorPrefix: "Error from middleware check liveness",
  };
  debugLog("checkLivenessTransaction reqOptions", reqOptions);
  const response = await requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl(endpointUrl, reqOptions);
  const normalizedStatus = normalizeProviderLivenessStatus(response);
  return {
    ...response,
    normalizedStatus,
    approved: normalizedStatus === "approved",
    rejected: normalizedStatus === "rejected",
  };
}

function resolveNormalizedOneshotInput({
  cedula,
  livenessId,
  nombres,
  apellido1,
  apellido2,
  email,
  celular,
  direccion,
  ciudad,
  provincia,
  pais,
  transactionId,
  projectReference,
  qrString,
  env,
  files = [],
}) {
  const cleanCedula = normalizeOneshotScalar(cedula);
  const cleanLivenessId = normalizeOneshotScalar(livenessId);
  const cleanNombres = normalizeOneshotScalar(nombres);
  const cleanApellido1 = normalizeOneshotScalar(apellido1);
  const cleanApellido2 = normalizeOneshotScalar(apellido2);
  const cleanEmail = normalizeOneshotScalar(email);
  const cleanCelular = normalizeOneshotScalar(celular);
  const cleanDireccion = normalizeOneshotScalar(direccion);
  const cleanCiudad = normalizeOneshotScalar(ciudad);
  const cleanProvincia = normalizeOneshotScalar(provincia);
  const cleanPais = normalizeOneshotScalar(pais, "EC") || "EC";
  const cleanTransactionId = normalizeOneshotScalar(transactionId);
  const cleanProjectReference = normalizeOneshotScalar(
    projectReference,
    "FirmasInverneg",
  );
  const cleanQrString = normalizeOneshotScalar(qrString);
  const cleanEnv = normalizeOneshotScalar(
    env || import.meta.env.VITE_UANATACA_ENV,
    "produ",
  );
  const rawFiles = Array.isArray(files) ? files.filter(Boolean) : [];
  const normalizedFiles = normalizeOneshotFiles(rawFiles);

  for (const [value, message] of [
    [cleanCedula, "cedula requerida para firmar."],
    [cleanLivenessId, "livenessId requerido para firmar."],
    [cleanNombres, "nombres requeridos para solicitar firma oneshot."],
    [cleanTransactionId, "transactionId requerido para firmar."],
  ]) {
    if (!value) throw new Error(message);
  }
  if (normalizedFiles.length === 0)
    throw new Error("files requerido para solicitar firma oneshot.");

  assertHasFilenames(normalizedFiles);
  assertHasCoordinates(normalizedFiles);

  return {
    cedula: cleanCedula,
    livenessId: cleanLivenessId,
    nombres: cleanNombres,
    apellido1: cleanApellido1,
    apellido2: cleanApellido2,
    email: cleanEmail,
    celular: cleanCelular,
    direccion: cleanDireccion,
    ciudad: cleanCiudad,
    provincia: cleanProvincia,
    pais: cleanPais,
    transactionId: cleanTransactionId,
    projectReference: cleanProjectReference,
    env: cleanEnv,
    qrString: cleanQrString,
    files: normalizedFiles,
  };
}

export async function requestOneshotSign(
  {
    cedula,
    livenessId,
    nombres,
    apellido1,
    apellido2,
    email,
    celular,
    direccion,
    ciudad,
    provincia,
    pais = "EC",
    transactionId,
    projectReference = "FirmasInverneg",
    files = [],
    qrString,
  } = {},
  runtimeConfig = null,
) {
  const filesCount = Array.isArray(files) ? files.length : 0;
  const filesShapePreview = SIGNATURE_PROVIDER_DEBUG
    ? (Array.isArray(files) ? files : []).slice(0, 3).map((file) => ({
        fileTypeId: cleanString(file?.fileTypeId),
        filename: cleanString(file?.filename || file?.fileName),
        hasBase64: Boolean(file?.base64 || file?.contentBase64),
      }))
    : [];
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] requestOneshotSign called", {
    cedula,
    livenessId,
    nombres,
    apellido1,
    apellido2,
    email,
    celular,
    direccion,
    ciudad,
    provincia,
    pais,
    transactionId,
    projectReference,
    filesCount,
    filesShapePreview,
    qrString,
    hasRuntimeConfig: Boolean(runtimeConfig),
  });
  const endpointUrl = cleanString(
    cleanString(
      runtimeConfig?.createRequestUrl ||
        runtimeConfig?.requestUrl ||
        import.meta.env.VITE_UANATACA_CREATE_REQUEST_URL,
    ) || resolveUanatacaEndpointUrl("createRequest"),
  );
  debugLog("requestOneshotSign endpointUrl", endpointUrl);
  if (!endpointUrl)
    throw new Error("No se encontró el endpoint CreateRequestOneshot.");
  const normalizedInput = resolveNormalizedOneshotInput({
    cedula,
    livenessId,
    nombres,
    apellido1,
    apellido2,
    email,
    celular,
    direccion,
    ciudad,
    provincia,
    pais,
    files,
    transactionId,
    projectReference,
    qrString,
    env: runtimeConfig?.env,
  });
  const token = cleanString(resolveRuntimeToken(runtimeConfig));
  debugLog("requestOneshotSign token (clean)", token);
  const body = buildOneshotRequestBody(normalizedInput);
  const providerFiles = body.files;
  debugLog("requestOneshotSign body metadata", {
    transactionId: body.transactionId,
    livenessId: body.livenessId,
    projectReference: body.projectReference,
    env: body.env,
    filesCount: providerFiles.length,
  });
  debugLog("requestOneshotSign provider files payload", {
    files: providerFiles.slice(0, 10).map((file, index) => ({
      index,
      filename: cleanString(file?.filename),
      page: Number(file?.page || 0),
      posX: Number(file?.posX || 0),
      posY: Number(file?.posY || 0),
      hasBase64: Boolean(file?.base64),
    })),
  });
  return requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl(endpointUrl, {
    method: "POST",
    body,
    headers: buildAuthHeaders(token),
    defaultErrorPrefix: "Error from middleware oneshot v2",
  });
}

export async function getSignedFiles(livenessId, runtimeConfig = null) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] getSignedFiles called", {
    livenessId,
    runtimeConfig,
  });
  debugLog("enter getSignedFiles", { livenessId, runtimeConfig });
  const cleanId = String(livenessId || "").trim();
  debugLog("getSignedFiles cleanId", cleanId);
  if (!cleanId) throw new Error("No se recibió el livenessId.");
  return requestJson(`/services/signed-files/${encodeURIComponent(cleanId)}`, {
    method: "GET",
    runtimeConfig,
  });
}

export async function downloadSignedFile(path, runtimeConfig = null) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] downloadSignedFile called", {
    path,
    runtimeConfig,
  });
  debugLog("enter downloadSignedFile", { path, runtimeConfig });
  const cleanPath = String(path || "").trim();
  debugLog("downloadSignedFile cleanPath", cleanPath);
  if (!cleanPath) throw new Error("No se recibió el path del archivo firmado.");
  return requestJson("/services/file", {
    method: "POST",
    body: { path: cleanPath },
    runtimeConfig,
  }).then((r) => {
    const normalized = normalizeDownloadedFileResponse(r);
    debugLog("downloadSignedFile normalized", normalized);
    return normalized;
  });
}

export function normalizeSignedFilesList(response) {
  debugLog("[TRACE][signatureProviderApi] normalizeSignedFilesList called", {
    response,
  });
  debugLog("enter normalizeSignedFilesList", { response });
  let rawList = [];
  if (Array.isArray(response)) rawList = response;
  else if (Array.isArray(response?.details)) rawList = response.details;
  else if (Array.isArray(response?.details?.files))
    rawList = response.details.files;
  else if (Array.isArray(response?.files)) rawList = response.files;
  else if (Array.isArray(response?.data)) rawList = response.data;
  else if (Array.isArray(response?.items)) rawList = response.items;
  else if (Array.isArray(response?.response)) rawList = response.response;
  const list = rawList
    .map((item) => ({
      path:
        item?.path ||
        item?.filePath ||
        item?.signedPath ||
        item?.file ||
        item?.documentPath ||
        null,
      fileName: item?.fileName || item?.filename || item?.name || null,
      documentId: item?.documentId || item?.docId || item?.id || null,
      raw: item,
    }))
    .filter((item) => Boolean(item.path));
  debugLog("normalizeSignedFilesList -> resultCount", list.length);
  debugLog("normalizeSignedFilesList -> sample", list.slice(0, 5));
  return list;
}

import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";

  cleanString: (value) => String(value ?? ""),
  createJsonRequester: vi.fn(),
  requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl: vi.fn(),
}));

const { requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl } = await import(
  "@/infrastructure/httpTransport"
);
const { requestOneshotSign } = await import("./signatureProviderApi.js");

  requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl.mockReset();
});

describe("signatureProviderApi requestOneshotSign", () => {

      response: "ok",

        nombres: "Brady",

            page: 1,
            posX: 50,

        ],

      { token: "token" },
    );

    const [endpoint, options] = requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl.mock.calls[0];
    expect(endpoint).toContain("/oneshotv2/createrequestoneshot");
    expect(options.body).toEqual({
      cedula: "0953895570",
      livenessId: "liv-1",
      nombres: "Brady",
      apellido1: "Gutierrez",
      apellido2: "Cornejo",
      email: "desarrollo@centralfile.com.ec",
      celular: "593979328153",
      direccion: "Guayaquil EC",
      ciudad: "Guayaquil",
      provincia: "Guayas",
      pais: "EC",
      transactionId: "test_1",
      projectReference: "FirmasInverneg",
      env: "produ",

// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #29
// Ruta relativa: src/infrastructure/signature/signingUtils.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/infrastructure/signature/signingUtils.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 46

// ====================================================================

import { logger } from "@/shared/utils/common";

export async function submitSigningRequest(payload) {
  const endpoint = import.meta.env.VITE_SIGNATURE_ENDPOINT;
  if (!endpoint)
    throw new Error(
      "VITE_SIGNATURE_ENDPOINT no está configurado. No se puede enviar la solicitud de firma.",
    );
  const formData = new FormData();
  const appendValue = (key, value) => {
    if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") return;
    formData.append(key, value);
  };
  const appendAliases = (aliases = [], value) => {
    aliases.forEach((key) => appendValue(key, value));
  };
  appendValue("p12File", payload?.p12File);
  appendValue("signatureImage", payload?.signatureImage);
  appendAliases(["password", "clave"], payload?.password);
  appendAliases(["signType", "tipoFirma"], payload?.signType);
  appendAliases(["exec"], payload?.exec);
  appendAliases(["wrk"], payload?.wrk);
  appendAliases(["dcmt"], payload?.dcmt);
  appendAliases(["token"], payload?.token);
  Object.entries(payload?.metadata || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") return;
    formData.append(
      key,
      typeof value === "string" ? value : JSON.stringify(value),
    );
  });
  const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
    method: "POST",
    body: formData,
  });
  const data = await response.json().catch((err) => {
    logger.warn("Failed to parse signing response JSON:", err?.message);
    return {};
  });
  if (!response.ok)
    throw new Error(
      data.response || data.message || "No se pudo completar la firma",
    );
  return { ok: true, data };
}

/**
 * workflowCrud.js — Operaciones CRUD y contexto de flujo para workflow.
 *
 * Contenido:
 *   1. CRUD operations
 *   2. Flow context / navigation
 */
import { WorkflowServer } from "@/config/api";
import { logger } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { firstDefinedValue } from "@/infrastructure/httpTransport";
import {
  requestData,
  getWindowRef,
  getLocationOrigin,
  normalizePayload,
  WORKFLOW_EXTERNOS_CANONICAL_PATH,
  DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW,
} from "./workflowTransport";

// ============================================================================
// 1. CRUD OPERATIONS
// ============================================================================

function normalizeWorkflowExecutionStepItems(items = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(items)) return [];
  return items.map((item) => (item ? { ...item } : {}));
}

function mergeWorkflowEditStepFileTypes(
  baseStepFileTypes = [],
  executionStepFileTypes = [],
  documentFilesSnapshot = [],
) {
  const pickNonEmpty = (...values) => {
    for (const value of values) {
      const normalized =
        typeof value === "string" ? value.trim() : (value ?? null);
      if (
        normalized !== null &&
        normalized !== undefined &&
        normalized !== ""
      ) {
        return value;
      }
    }
    return null;
  };

  const enrichedByKey = new Map();
  [
    ...normalizeWorkflowExecutionStepItems(executionStepFileTypes),
    ...normalizeWorkflowExecutionStepItems(documentFilesSnapshot),
  ].forEach((item) => {
    const keys = [
      item.id,
      item.fileId,
      item.fileTypeId,
      item.fileTypeName,
      item.name,
    ]
      .map((value) => String(value || "").trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
    keys.forEach((key) => {
      if (!enrichedByKey.has(key)) enrichedByKey.set(key, item);
    });
  });
  return normalizeWorkflowExecutionStepItems(baseStepFileTypes).map(
    (baseItem) => {
      const keys = [
        baseItem.id,
        baseItem.fileTypeId,
        baseItem.fileTypeName,
        baseItem.name,
      ]
        .map((value) => String(value || "").trim())
        .filter(Boolean);
      const enrichedItem =
        keys.map((key) => enrichedByKey.get(key)).find(Boolean) || null;
      const merged = { ...(baseItem ?? {}), ...(enrichedItem ?? {}) };
      merged.id = baseItem?.id ?? enrichedItem?.id ?? null;
      merged.fileTypeId = pickNonEmpty(
        baseItem?.fileTypeId,
        enrichedItem?.fileTypeId,
      );
      merged.fileTypeName =
        pickNonEmpty(baseItem?.fileTypeName, enrichedItem?.fileTypeName) || "";
      if (!merged.name)
        merged.name = enrichedItem?.name ?? baseItem?.name ?? "";
      if (!merged.fileId)
        merged.fileId = enrichedItem?.fileId ?? baseItem?.fileId ?? null;
      if (!merged.path)
        merged.path = enrichedItem?.path ?? baseItem?.path ?? "";
      if (!merged.folderPath)
        merged.folderPath =
          enrichedItem?.folderPath ?? baseItem?.folderPath ?? "";
      if (
        merged.action === undefined ||
        merged.action === null ||
        merged.action === ""
      )
        merged.action = enrichedItem?.action ?? "CREATE";
      if (merged.file === undefined && (merged.fileId || merged.path))
        merged.file = enrichedItem?.file ?? {};
      return merged;
    },
  );
}

function normalizeWorkflowEditExecution(
  execution = {},
  executionSnapshot = null,
  documentFilesSnapshot = [],
) {
  const source = execution && typeof execution === "object" ? execution : {};
  const snapshot =
    executionSnapshot && typeof executionSnapshot === "object"
      ? executionSnapshot
      : {};
  const stepIndexForms = normalizeWorkflowExecutionStepItems(
    source.stepIndexForms || source.StepIndexForms || [],
  );
  const stepFileTypes = mergeWorkflowEditStepFileTypes(
    source.stepFileTypes || source.StepFileTypes || [],
    snapshot.stepFileTypes || snapshot.StepFileTypes || [],
    Array.isArray(documentFilesSnapshot) ? documentFilesSnapshot : [],
  );
  const stepFileTypesAddToMails = normalizeWorkflowExecutionStepItems(
    source.stepFileTypesAddToMails || source.StepFileTypesAddToMails || [],
  );
  return {
    id: firstDefinedValue(source.id, source.Id),
    Observations: source.Observations ?? source.observations ?? "",
    DelegatedUserId: firstDefinedValue(
      source.DelegatedUserId,
      source.delegatedUserId,
    ),
    DelegatedUserName: firstDefinedValue(
      source.DelegatedUserName,
      source.delegatedUserName,
    ),
    StartTime: firstDefinedValue(source.StartTime, source.startTime),
    EndTime: firstDefinedValue(source.EndTime, source.endTime),
    PredecessorStepId: firstDefinedValue(
      source.PredecessorStepId,
      source.predecessorStepId,
    ),
    RetryCount: firstDefinedValue(source.RetryCount, source.retryCount, 0),
    EdgeConditionId: firstDefinedValue(
      source.EdgeConditionId,
      source.edgeConditionId,
    ),
    Status: firstDefinedValue(source.Status, source.status),
    StatusName: firstDefinedValue(source.StatusName, source.statusName),
    Active: firstDefinedValue(source.Active, source.active),
    IsStarted: firstDefinedValue(source.IsStarted, source.isStarted),
    WorkflowId: firstDefinedValue(source.WorkflowId, source.workflowId),
    CurrentStepId: firstDefinedValue(
      source.CurrentStepId,
      source.currentStepId,
    ),
    CurrentStepName: firstDefinedValue(
      source.CurrentStepName,
      source.currentStepName,
    ),
    ScheduledDate: firstDefinedValue(
      source.ScheduledDate,
      source.scheduledDate,
    ),
    StepIndexForms: stepIndexForms,
    StepFileTypes: stepFileTypes,
    StepFileTypesAddToMails: stepFileTypesAddToMails,
  };
}

export function buildWorkflowEditPayload({
  workflowStatus = null,
  editableConfig = null,
  executionSnapshot = null,
  documentFilesSnapshot = null,
} = {}) {
  const editable = editableConfig || {};
  const status = workflowStatus || {};
  const editableExecution = editable.execution || editable.Execution || {};
  const normalizedExecution = normalizeWorkflowEditExecution(
    { ...editableExecution },
    executionSnapshot || editableExecution,
    documentFilesSnapshot || [],
  );
  return {
    DefinitionId: firstDefinedValue(
      status?.definitionId,
      status?.DefinitionId,
      editable?.definitionId,
      editable?.DefinitionId,
    ),
    Description: firstDefinedValue(
      status?.description,
      status?.Description,
      editable?.description,
      editable?.Description,
    ),
    Name: firstDefinedValue(
      status?.name,
      status?.Name,
      editable?.name,
      editable?.Name,
    ),
    Version: firstDefinedValue(
      status?.version,
      status?.Version,
      editable?.version,
      editable?.Version,
    ),
    CabinetId: firstDefinedValue(
      editable?.cabinetId,
      editable?.CabinetId,
      status?.cabinetId,
      status?.CabinetId,
    ),
    CabinetName: firstDefinedValue(
      status?.cabinetName,
      status?.CabinetName,
      editable?.cabinetName,
      editable?.CabinetName,
    ),
    FolderId: firstDefinedValue(
      editable?.folderId,
      editable?.FolderId,
      status?.folderId,
      status?.FolderId,
    ),
    FolderPath: firstDefinedValue(
      status?.folderPath,
      status?.FolderPath,
      editable?.folderPath,
      editable?.FolderPath,
    ),
    DocumentId: firstDefinedValue(
      editable?.documentId,
      editable?.DocumentId,
      status?.documentId,
      status?.DocumentId,
    ),
    IsStarted: normalizedExecution.IsStarted,
    Active: normalizedExecution.Active,
    Observations: normalizedExecution.Observations ?? "",
    CurrentStepId: firstDefinedValue(
      editable?.currentStepId,
      editable?.CurrentStepId,
      normalizedExecution.CurrentStepId,
      status?.currentStepId,
      status?.CurrentStepId,
    ),
    Id: firstDefinedValue(editable?.id, editable?.Id, status?.id, status?.Id),
    ExecutionId: firstDefinedValue(
      normalizedExecution.id,
      editableExecution?.id,
      editableExecution?.Id,
      executionSnapshot?.id,
      executionSnapshot?.Id,
    ),
    Secuence: firstDefinedValue(
      status?.secuence,
      status?.Secuence,
      editable?.secuence,
      editable?.Secuence,
    ),
    Execution: normalizedExecution,
  };
}

export async function bindWorkflowFilesRequest(workflowId, payload = {}) {
  const id = String(workflowId || "").trim();
  if (!id) return null;
  const url = new URL(`${WorkflowServer}workflow/exec/files/bind/${id}`);
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    {
      method: "PUT",
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(id),
    },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function fetchWorkflowExecutionByIdRequest(
  executionId,
  payload = {},
) {
  const id = String(executionId || "").trim();
  if (!id) return null;
  const url = new URL(`${WorkflowServer}workflow/exec/byId/${id}`);
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    { method: "GET", headers: { Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*" } },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function fetchWorkflowByIdRequest(workflowId, payload = {}) {
  const id = String(workflowId || "").trim();
  if (!id) return null;
  const url = new URL(`${WorkflowServer}workflow/${id}`);
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    { method: "GET", headers: { Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*" } },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest(
  workflowId,
  payload = {},
) {
  const id = String(workflowId || "").trim();
  if (!id) return null;
  const url = new URL(`${WorkflowServer}workflow/editable/${id}`);
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    { method: "GET", headers: { Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*" } },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function fetchWorkflowEditSnapshotRequest(
  workflowId,
  payload = {},
) {
  const id = String(workflowId || "").trim();
  if (!id) return { workflowStatus: null, editableConfig: null };
  const workflowStatus = await fetchWorkflowByIdRequest(id, payload).catch(
    (err) => {
      logger.warn("fetchWorkflowByIdRequest failed:", err?.message);
      return null;
    },
  );
  const editableConfig = await fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest(
    id,
    payload,
  ).catch((err) => {
    logger.warn("fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest failed:", err?.message);
    return null;
  });
  return { workflowStatus, editableConfig };
}

export async function updateWorkflowExecutionRequest(payload = {}) {
  const url = new URL(`${WorkflowServer}workflow/edit`);
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(normalizePayload(payload)),
    },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function fetchWorkflowRequiredFilesRequest(payload = {}) {
  const workflowId = String(payload.wrk ?? payload.workflowId ?? "").trim();
  if (!workflowId) return [];
  const url = new URL(`${WorkflowServer}workflow/files/byWfId/${workflowId}`);
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    { method: "GET", headers: { Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*" } },
    { payload },
  );
  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;
  if (Array.isArray(data?.stepFileTypes)) return data.stepFileTypes;
  if (Array.isArray(data?.files)) return data.files;
  if (Array.isArray(data?.data)) return data.data;
  return [];
}

// ============================================================================
// 2. FLOW CONTEXT / NAVIGATION
// ============================================================================

function readFlowParamsFromLocation() {
  const browserWindow = getWindowRef();
  if (!browserWindow) return { ...DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW };
  const fromSearch = new URLSearchParams(browserWindow.location.search || "");
  const fromHash = browserWindow.location.hash.includes("?")
    ? new URLSearchParams(browserWindow.location.hash.split("?")[1])
    : new URLSearchParams("");
  return {
    exec:
      fromSearch.get("exec") ||
      fromHash.get("exec") ||
      DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW.exec,
    wrk:
      fromSearch.get("wrk") || fromHash.get("wrk") || DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW.wrk,
    dcmt:
      fromSearch.get("dcmt") ||
      fromHash.get("dcmt") ||
      DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW.dcmt,
  };
}

export function buildWorkflowExternosUrl(flow = {}) {
  const resolved = { ...readFlowParamsFromLocation(), ...flow };
  const query = new URLSearchParams({
    exec: String(resolved.exec || DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW.exec),
    wrk: String(resolved.wrk || DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW.wrk),
    dcmt: String(resolved.dcmt || DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW.dcmt),
  });
  return `${getLocationOrigin()}${WORKFLOW_EXTERNOS_CANONICAL_PATH}?${query.toString()}`;
}

export function redirectToWorkflowExternos(flow = {}) {
  const browserWindow = getWindowRef();
  if (!browserWindow) return;
  const current = String(browserWindow.location.href || "");
  if (current.includes(WORKFLOW_EXTERNOS_CANONICAL_PATH)) return;
  browserWindow.location.replace(buildWorkflowExternosUrl(flow));
}

export function getExternalFlowContext(location) {
  const fromSearch = new URLSearchParams(location?.search || "");
  const fromHash = location?.hash?.includes("?")
    ? new URLSearchParams(location.hash.split("?")[1])
    : new URLSearchParams("");
  const readOne = (name) => fromSearch.get(name) || fromHash.get(name) || null;
  const readAny = (...names) => {
    for (const name of names) {
      const value = readOne(name);
      if (value != null && String(value).trim()) return value;
    }
    return null;
  };
  return {
    exec: readAny("exec", "executionId"),
    wrk: readAny("wrk", "workflowId", "requestId", "wrkl"),
    dcmt: readAny("dcmt", "documentId"),
    viewFiles: String(readOne("viewFiles") || "").toLowerCase() === "true",
  };
}

/**
 * workflowDocumentOps.js — Operaciones de documentos y estado de formularios
 * para la capa de infraestructura de workflow.
 */
import { DocumentaryServer } from "@/config/api";
import { logger } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import {
  parseJsonOrEmptyArray,
  resolveJsonOrTextErrorMessage,
} from "@/infrastructure/httpTransport";
import {
  requestData,
  getWindowRef,
  generateGuid,
  isGuidLike,
  getWorkflowFileTypesCatalog,
  resolveEffectiveWorkflowFileTypeId,
  normalizeWorkflowUploadedFile,
  fetchJsonFileFromUrl,
  isWorkflowFormStateFile,
  WORKFLOW_FORM_STATE_FILE_TYPE_ID,
  WORKFLOW_FORM_STATE_FILE_DESCRIPTION,
  withAuthInterceptor,
} from "./workflowTransport";
import { fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest } from "./workflowCrud";
import { redirectToWorkflowExternos } from "./workflowCrud";

function resolveWorkflowIdFromPayload(payload = {}) {
  return String(
    payload.wrk ?? payload.workflowId ?? payload.requestId ?? "",
  ).trim();
}

function extractWorkflowEditableContext(editable = {}) {
  const execution = editable?.execution || editable?.Execution || {};
  const stepFileTypes = Array.isArray(execution?.stepFileTypes)
    ? execution.stepFileTypes
    : Array.isArray(execution?.StepFileTypes)
      ? execution.StepFileTypes
      : [];
  return {
    documentId: String(
      editable?.documentId ??
        editable?.DocumentId ??
        execution?.documentId ??
        execution?.DocumentId ??
        "",
    ).trim(),
    folderId: String(
      editable?.folderId ??
        editable?.FolderId ??
        execution?.folderId ??
        execution?.FolderId ??
        "",
    ).trim(),
    stepFileTypes,
  };
}

async function resolveWorkflowEditableDocumentContext(payload = {}) {
  const workflowId = resolveWorkflowIdFromPayload(payload);
  if (!workflowId) return null;
  return fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest(workflowId, payload)
    .then((editable) => {
      if (!editable || typeof editable !== "object") return null;
      return extractWorkflowEditableContext(editable);
    })
    .catch((err) => {
      logger.warn(
        "resolveWorkflowEditableDocumentContext failed:",
        err?.message,
      );
      return null;
    });
}

function resolveDocumentIdFromPayloadOrEditable(
  payload = {},
  editableContext = null,
) {
  const fromEditable = String(editableContext?.documentId || "").trim();
  if (fromEditable) return fromEditable;
  return String(payload.dcmt ?? payload.documentId ?? "").trim();
}

function resolveExistingStepFileTypeFromEditable(
  editableContext = null,
  preferredFileTypeId = "",
) {
  const targetFileTypeId = String(preferredFileTypeId || "").trim();
  if (!targetFileTypeId) return null;
  const stepFileTypes = Array.isArray(editableContext?.stepFileTypes)
    ? editableContext.stepFileTypes
    : [];
  const candidates = stepFileTypes.filter((item) => {
    const fileTypeId = String(
      item?.fileTypeId ?? item?.FileTypeId ?? "",
    ).trim();
    const deleted = Boolean(item?.deleted || item?.Deleted);
    return !deleted && fileTypeId === targetFileTypeId;
  });
  if (candidates.length === 0) return null;
  const sorted = [...candidates].sort((left, right) => {
    const leftUpdated =
      Date.parse(left?.updatedAt || left?.UpdatedAt || "") || 0;
    const rightUpdated =
      Date.parse(right?.updatedAt || right?.UpdatedAt || "") || 0;
    if (rightUpdated !== leftUpdated) return rightUpdated - leftUpdated;
    const leftFileId = String(left?.fileId || left?.FileId || "");
    const rightFileId = String(right?.fileId || right?.FileId || "");
    return rightFileId.localeCompare(leftFileId);
  });
  return sorted[0];
}

function isWorkflowFilePersisted(file = {}) {
  const fileId = String(file?.fileId || file?.FileId || "").trim();
  const path = String(
    file?.path || file?.Path || file?.url || file?.Url || "",
  ).trim();
  return Boolean(fileId || path);
}

function splitPersistedAndPendingWorkflowFiles(files = []) {
  const normalized = (Array.isArray(files) ? files : [])
    .map(normalizeWorkflowUploadedFile)
    .filter(Boolean);
  return {
    uploadedFiles: normalized.filter(isWorkflowFilePersisted),
    pendingFiles: normalized.filter((file) => !isWorkflowFilePersisted(file)),
  };
}

// ============================================================================
// DOCUMENT OPERATIONS
// ============================================================================

async function requestWorkflowDocumentFilesByTypeIds(
  url,
  fileTypeIds,
  payload,
) {
  return fetch(
    url,
    withAuthInterceptor(
      {
        method: "PUT",
        headers: { Accept: "text/plain", "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify(fileTypeIds),
      },
      { payload },
    ),
  );
}

async function ensureWorkflowDocumentFilesLookupSucceeded(
  response,
  rawBody,
  contentType,
  payload,
) {
  if (response.ok) return;
  if (response.status === 400) return;
  const href = String(getWindowRef()?.location?.href || "");
  const isOnWorkflowExternosScreen = href.includes("/#/WorkflowExternos");
  if (
    (response.status === 401 || response.status === 403) &&
    !isOnWorkflowExternosScreen
  ) {
    redirectToWorkflowExternos(payload);
    throw new Error(
      "Token invalido o expirado. Debe volver a ingresar el PIN.",
    );
  }
  throw new Error(
    resolveJsonOrTextErrorMessage({
      rawBody,
      contentType,
      fallbackMessage:
        "No se pudo consultar la existencia del archivo del formulario.",
    }),
  );
}

async function fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesByTypeIdsRequest(payload = {}) {
  const documentId = String(payload.dcmt ?? payload.documentId ?? "").trim();
  const fileTypeIds = Array.isArray(payload.fileTypeIds)
    ? payload.fileTypeIds.map((v) => String(v || "").trim()).filter(Boolean)
    : [];
  if (!documentId || fileTypeIds.length === 0) return [];
  const url = new URL(
    `${DocumentaryServer}file/bydocumentandfiletypes/${documentId}`,
  );
  const response = await requestWorkflowDocumentFilesByTypeIds(
    url,
    fileTypeIds,
    payload,
  );
  if (response.status === 400 || response.status === 404) return [];
  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") || "";
  const rawBody = await response.text().catch(() => "");
  await ensureWorkflowDocumentFilesLookupSucceeded(
    response,
    rawBody,
    contentType,
    payload,
  );
  return parseJsonOrEmptyArray(rawBody)
    .map(normalizeWorkflowUploadedFile)
    .filter(Boolean);
}

const missingFileByTypeLookupWarnings = new Set();

function warnMissingFileByTypeLookupOnce({ documentId, fileTypeIds = [] } = {}) {
  const key = `${String(documentId || "").trim()}|${[...fileTypeIds]
    .map((value) => String(value || "").trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .sort()
    .join(",")}`;
  if (!key || missingFileByTypeLookupWarnings.has(key)) return;
  missingFileByTypeLookupWarnings.add(key);
  logger.warn(
    `No se encontraron archivos remotos para documentId=${documentId} y fileTypeIds=[${fileTypeIds.join(", ")}].`,
  );
}

async function resolveExistingWorkflowDocumentFileByType(
  preferredFileTypeId,
  payload = {},
) {
  const targetFileTypeId = String(preferredFileTypeId || "").trim();
  if (!targetFileTypeId) return null;
  const files = await fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesByTypeIdsRequest({
    ...payload,
    fileTypeIds: [targetFileTypeId],
  }).catch((err) => {
    logger.warn(
      "fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesByTypeIdsRequest failed:",
      err?.message,
    );
    return [];
  });
  if (files.length === 0) {
    warnMissingFileByTypeLookupOnce({
      documentId: payload?.dcmt || payload?.documentId || "",
      fileTypeIds: [targetFileTypeId],
    });
  }
  const matchingFiles = Array.isArray(files)
    ? files.filter(
        (file) => String(file?.fileTypeId || "").trim() === targetFileTypeId,
      )
    : [];
  if (matchingFiles.length === 0) return null;
  const sortedFiles = [...matchingFiles].sort((left, right) => {
    const leftDate =
      Date.parse(left?.raw?.createdAt || left?.raw?.CreatedAt || "") || 0;
    const rightDate =
      Date.parse(right?.raw?.createdAt || right?.raw?.CreatedAt || "") || 0;
    const leftSequential = Number(
      left?.raw?.sequential ?? left?.raw?.Sequential ?? 0,
    );
    const rightSequential = Number(
      right?.raw?.sequential ?? right?.raw?.Sequential ?? 0,
    );
    if (rightDate !== leftDate) return rightDate - leftDate;
    return rightSequential - leftSequential;
  });
  return sortedFiles[0];
}

export async function fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesRequest(payload = {}) {
  const editableContext = await resolveWorkflowEditableDocumentContext(payload);
  const documentId = resolveDocumentIdFromPayloadOrEditable(
    payload,
    editableContext,
  );
  const normalizedPayload = {
    ...payload,
    dcmt: documentId,
    documentId,
    folderId:
      payload?.folderId || editableContext?.folderId || payload?.FolderId,
  };
  if (!documentId) return { uploadedFiles: [], pendingFiles: [] };

  try {
    let requestedTypeIds = Array.isArray(payload.fileTypeIds)
      ? payload.fileTypeIds.map((v) => String(v || "").trim()).filter(Boolean)
      : [];
    if (requestedTypeIds.length === 0) {
      const catalog = await getWorkflowFileTypesCatalog(payload);
      requestedTypeIds = Array.isArray(catalog)
        ? catalog.map((t) => String(t?.id || "").trim()).filter(Boolean)
        : [];
    }
    if (requestedTypeIds.length === 0)
      return { uploadedFiles: [], pendingFiles: [] };
    const files = await fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesByTypeIdsRequest({
      ...normalizedPayload,
      fileTypeIds: requestedTypeIds,
    });
    return splitPersistedAndPendingWorkflowFiles(files);
  } catch (outerErr) {
    try {
      const fallbackUrl = new URL(
        `${DocumentaryServer}file/bydocument/${documentId}`,
      );
      const { data } = await requestData(
        fallbackUrl,
        {
          method: "GET",
          headers: { Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*" },
        },
        { payload: normalizedPayload },
      );
      return splitPersistedAndPendingWorkflowFiles(data);
    } catch {
      throw outerErr;
    }
  }
}

export async function uploadWorkflowDocumentFileRequest(payload = {}) {
  const file = payload.file;
  const editableContext = await resolveWorkflowEditableDocumentContext(payload);
  const documentId = resolveDocumentIdFromPayloadOrEditable(
    payload,
    editableContext,
  );
  const providedFileId = String(
    payload.fileId ?? payload.idFile ?? payload.Id ?? "",
  ).trim();
  const fileTypeId = await resolveEffectiveWorkflowFileTypeId(payload);
  const name = String(payload.name || file?.name || "Archivo").trim();
  const isUploadableFile =
    typeof Blob !== "undefined" && file instanceof Blob;
  if (!isUploadableFile)
    throw new Error("No se recibió un archivo válido para cargar.");
  if (!documentId) throw new Error("No se recibió el documentId del workflow.");
  if (!isGuidLike(documentId))
    throw new Error("El documentId del workflow no tiene formato válido.");
  if (!fileTypeId) throw new Error("No se recibió el FileTypeId del workflow.");
  const existingFileFromEditable = resolveExistingStepFileTypeFromEditable(
    editableContext,
    fileTypeId,
  );
  const existingRemoteFile = !providedFileId
    ? await resolveExistingWorkflowDocumentFileByType(fileTypeId, {
        ...payload,
        dcmt: documentId,
        documentId,
        folderId:
          payload?.folderId || editableContext?.folderId || payload?.FolderId,
        fileTypeId,
      }).catch((err) => {
        logger.warn(
          "resolveExistingWorkflowDocumentFileByType failed:",
          err?.message,
        );
        return null;
      })
    : null;
  const resolvedFileId =
    providedFileId ||
    String(
      existingFileFromEditable?.fileId ||
        existingFileFromEditable?.FileId ||
        existingFileFromEditable?.id ||
        existingFileFromEditable?.Id ||
        "",
    ).trim() ||
    existingRemoteFile?.id ||
    existingRemoteFile?.fileId ||
    generateGuid();
  const form = new FormData();
  form.append("Id", resolvedFileId);
  form.append("Name", name);
  form.append("Description", String(payload.description || name));
  form.append("File", file);
  form.append("FileTypeId", fileTypeId);
  form.append("DocumentId", documentId);
  const requiredKeys = ["Id", "Name", "Description", "File", "FileTypeId", "DocumentId"];
  const missingFormKeys = requiredKeys.filter((key) => !form.has(key));
  if (missingFormKeys.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(
      `No se pudo construir el payload de adjunto. Campos faltantes: ${missingFormKeys.join(", ")}`,
    );
  }
  const endpointFileId =
    providedFileId ||
    existingFileFromEditable?.fileId ||
    existingFileFromEditable?.FileId;
  const endpointUrl = endpointFileId
    ? new URL(`${DocumentaryServer}file/${endpointFileId}`)
    : new URL(`${DocumentaryServer}file`);
  const { data } = await requestData(
    endpointUrl,
    { method: "PUT", headers: { Accept: "application/json" }, body: form },
    { payload },
  );
  return {
    savedFileId:
      data?.SavedFileId ||
      data?.savedFileId ||
      data?.id ||
      endpointFileId ||
      resolvedFileId ||
      null,
    fileTypeId,
    documentId,
    fileName: name,
    data,
  };
}

export async function loadWorkflowFormStateDraft(payload = {}) {
  const documentId = String(payload.dcmt ?? payload.documentId ?? "").trim();
  if (!documentId) return null;
  const remoteFile = await resolveExistingWorkflowDocumentFileByType(
    WORKFLOW_FORM_STATE_FILE_TYPE_ID,
    payload,
  );
  if (remoteFile?.path) {
    const formData = await fetchJsonFileFromUrl(remoteFile.path);
    if (formData && typeof formData === "object")
      return { formData, remoteFile };
  }
  const { uploadedFiles } = await fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesRequest(payload);
  const fallbackRemoteFile = uploadedFiles.find((file) =>
    isWorkflowFormStateFile(file, documentId),
  );
  const resolvedRemoteFile = fallbackRemoteFile || remoteFile;
  if (!resolvedRemoteFile?.path) return null;
  const formData = await fetchJsonFileFromUrl(resolvedRemoteFile.path);
  if (!formData || typeof formData !== "object") return null;
  return { formData, remoteFile: resolvedRemoteFile };
}

export async function saveWorkflowFormStateDraft(payload = {}) {
  const documentId = String(payload.dcmt ?? payload.documentId ?? "").trim();
  const formData = payload.formData;
  if (!documentId || !formData || typeof formData !== "object") return null;
  const fileName = `__inverneg_form_state__-${documentId}.txt`;
  const fileBody = JSON.stringify(
    {
      version: 1,
      documentId,
      workflowId: payload.wrk ?? payload.workflowId ?? null,
      executionId: payload.exec ?? payload.businessId ?? null,
      formType: payload.formType ?? null,
      savedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      formData,
    },
    null,
    2,
  );
  const file = new File([fileBody], fileName, { type: "text/plain" });
  return uploadWorkflowDocumentFileRequest({
    ...payload,
    file,
    name: fileName,
    description: `${WORKFLOW_FORM_STATE_FILE_DESCRIPTION}:${documentId}`,
    fileId: payload.fileId,
    fileTypeId: payload.fileTypeId || WORKFLOW_FORM_STATE_FILE_TYPE_ID,
  });
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/infrastructure/workflow/workflowDocumentOps.js ==========================

/**
 * workflowSigningOps.js — Operaciones de firma digital, validación de acceso y adjuntos
 * para la capa de infraestructura de workflow.
 */
import { FormsManagement, MiddlewareForms } from "@/config/api";
import {
  firstDefinedValue,
  firstNonEmptyString,
} from "@/infrastructure/httpTransport";
import {
  createLivenessTransaction as createMiddlewareLivenessTransaction,
  requestOneshotSign,
  checkLivenessTransaction as checkProviderLivenessTransaction,
} from "@/infrastructure/signature/signatureProviderApi";
import { requestData, normalizePayload } from "./workflowTransport";

// ============================================================================
// SIGNING OPERATIONS
// ============================================================================

export async function verifyAccessFormRequest(payload) {
  const params = new URLSearchParams();
  Object.entries(normalizePayload(payload)).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== "")
      params.set(key, String(value));
  });
  const url = new URL(`${FormsManagement}form/verifyaccess`);
  url.search = params.toString();
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function validateAccessDataFormRequest(payload) {
  const base = String(MiddlewareForms).replace(/\/$/, "");
  const url = new URL(`${base}/forms/validatepin/firmasinverneg`);
  const body = {
    idPinCode: payload.idPinCode ?? payload.validationId ?? null,
    pinCode: payload.pinCode ?? null,
  };
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
    },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function viewSummaryFilesRequest(payload) {
  const params = new URLSearchParams();
  Object.entries(normalizePayload(payload)).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== "")
      params.set(key, String(value));
  });
  const url = new URL(`${FormsManagement}form/viewfiles`);
  url.search = params.toString();
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function sendFormRequest(payload) {
  const url = new URL(`${FormsManagement}form/send`);
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { Accept: "text/plain", "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify(normalizePayload(payload)),
    },
    { payload },
  );
  return data;
}

export async function generatePinRequest(payload = {}) {
  const base = String(MiddlewareForms).replace(/\/$/, "");
  const url = new URL(`${base}/forms/generatepin/firmasinverneg`);
  url.searchParams.set(
    "dcmt",
    String(payload.dcmt ?? payload.validationId ?? ""),
  );
  url.searchParams.set("wrk", String(payload.wrk ?? payload.requestId ?? ""));
  url.searchParams.set(
    "exec",
    String(payload.exec ?? payload.businessId ?? ""),
  );
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      },
    },
    { payload, skipAuth: true },
  );
  const idPinCode =
    (typeof data === "string" && data.trim()) ||
    data?.idPinCode ||
    data?.response ||
    data?.data?.idPinCode ||
    null;
  return { idPinCode, data };
}

export async function submitBatchSigning(payload = {}) {
  const files = Array.isArray(payload.files) ? payload.files : [];
  const signer = payload.signer || {};
  const strictTransactionId = firstNonEmptyString(
    payload.transactionId,
    payload.workflowId,
    payload.wrk,
    signer.transactionId,
  );
  if (!strictTransactionId) {
    throw new Error("workflowId/transactionId requerido para firmar.");
  }
  const body = {
    cedula: firstDefinedValue(
      payload.cedula,
      payload.cedulaSigner,
      signer.cedula,
    ),
    livenessId: firstDefinedValue(payload.livenessId, signer.livenessId),
    nombres: firstDefinedValue(
      payload.nombres,
      payload.firstName,
      signer.nombres,
    ),
    apellido1: firstDefinedValue(
      payload.apellido1,
      payload.lastName,
      signer.apellido1,
    ),
    apellido2: firstDefinedValue(
      payload.apellido2,
      payload.lastName2,
      signer.apellido2,
    ),
    email: firstDefinedValue(payload.email, signer.email),
    celular: firstDefinedValue(payload.celular, payload.phone, signer.celular),
    direccion: firstDefinedValue(payload.direccion, signer.direccion),
    ciudad: firstDefinedValue(payload.ciudad, signer.ciudad),
    provincia: firstDefinedValue(payload.provincia, signer.provincia),
    pais: firstNonEmptyString(payload.pais, signer.pais, "EC") || "EC",
    transactionId: strictTransactionId,
    qrString: firstDefinedValue(payload.qrString, signer.qrString),
    env: payload.env || signer.env || undefined,
    projectReference:
      firstNonEmptyString(
        payload.projectReference,
        signer.projectReference,
        "FirmasInverneg",
      ) || "FirmasInverneg",
    files,
  };
  return requestOneshotSign(body, {
    token:
      payload.token ||
      payload.accessToken ||
      payload.bearerToken ||
      signer.token ||
      null,
    projectReference: body.projectReference,
  });
}

export async function createLivenessTransaction(payload = {}) {
  const strictTransactionId = firstNonEmptyString(
    payload?.transactionId,
    payload?.workflowId,
    payload?.wrk,
  );
  if (!strictTransactionId) {
    throw new Error(
      "workflowId/transactionId requerido para crear transacción de liveness.",
    );
  }
  return createMiddlewareLivenessTransaction(
    {
      cedula: firstDefinedValue(payload?.cedula, null),
      transactionId: strictTransactionId,
      callbackURL: firstDefinedValue(
        payload?.callbackURL,
        payload?.callbackUrl,
      ),
      projectReference:
        firstNonEmptyString(payload?.projectReference, "FirmasInverneg") ||
        "FirmasInverneg",
      fingerprintCode: firstDefinedValue(
        payload?.fingerprintCode,
        payload?.codigoDactilar,
        payload?.codDactilar,
      ),
    },
    {
      token: firstDefinedValue(
        payload?.token,
        payload?.accessToken,
        payload?.bearerToken,
      ),
      fingerprintCode: firstDefinedValue(
        payload?.fingerprintCode,
        payload?.codigoDactilar,
        payload?.codDactilar,
      ),
      projectReference:
        firstNonEmptyString(payload?.projectReference, "FirmasInverneg") ||
        "FirmasInverneg",
    },
  );
}

export async function checkLivenessTransaction(payload = {}) {
  const livenessId = firstNonEmptyString(payload?.livenessId, payload?.id);
  if (!livenessId) throw new Error("No se recibió el livenessId.");
  const projectReference =
    firstNonEmptyString(
      payload?.projectReference,
      payload?.signatureBatch?.projectReference,
      "FirmasInverneg",
    ) || "FirmasInverneg";
  const token = firstDefinedValue(
    payload?.token,
    payload?.accessToken,
    payload?.bearerToken,
  );
  return checkProviderLivenessTransaction(
    {
      livenessId,
      projectReference,
    },
    {
      token,
      projectReference,
    },
  );
}

/**
 * workflowTransport.js — Constantes, transporte HTTP, utilidades y catálogo de
 * tipos de archivo para la capa de infraestructura de workflow.
 *
 * Contenido:
 *   1. Constantes
 *   2. Window / JWT utilities

 *   6. File type catalog

import { CoreServer } from "@/config/api";
import {
  normalizeAttachmentsInput,
  normalizeComparable,
} from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl } from "@/infrastructure/httpTransport";

  getPersistedSessionToken as getPersistedTokenFromStorage,
  loadFormDraft,
  saveFormDraft,
} from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";

export const WORKFLOW_EXTERNOS_CANONICAL_PATH = "/#/WorkflowExternos";
export const ATTACHMENTS_DRAFT_KEY = "attachments";
export const FILE_TYPES_CACHE_STORAGE_KEY =
  "sisad_inverneg_filetypes_catalog_v1";
export const WORKFLOW_FORM_STATE_FILE_DESCRIPTION = "SISAD_INVERNEG_FORM_STATE";
export const WORKFLOW_FORM_STATE_FILE_TYPE_ID =
  "832e1f04-6acd-4578-8094-5dfd7b8c5443";
export const DEFAULT_REAUTH_FLOW = {
  exec: "3ea8541a-8262-4ff2-b4cb-4dda516dab82",
  wrk: "2307c05e-721e-4ea7-820a-f84c9af9b216",
  dcmt: "d8581e1d-7dde-463e-8af5-a74c25017643",

// ============================================================================
// 2. WINDOW / JWT UTILITIES

export const getWindowRef = () => globalThis.window;
export const getLocationOrigin = () => getWindowRef()?.location?.origin || "";
export const getLocalStorageRef = () => getWindowRef()?.localStorage;

export const WINDOW_REFS = {
  getWindowRef,
  getLocationOrigin,
  getLocalStorageRef,
};

export const decodeJwtPayload = (token = "") => {
  try {
    const parts = String(token).split(".");
    if (parts.length < 2) return null;
    const base64 = parts[1].replaceAll("-", "+").replaceAll("_", "/");
    const padded = base64.padEnd(
      base64.length + ((4 - (base64.length % 4)) % 4),
      "=",
    );
    return JSON.parse(atob(padded));
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
};

export function isTokenValid(token) {
  const clean = String(token || "").trim();
  if (!clean) return false;
  const payload = decodeJwtPayload(clean);
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || !payload.exp) return true;
  const expMs = Number(payload.exp) * 1000;
  return !Number.isFinite(expMs) || Date.now() < expMs;
}

export function getPersistedSessionToken() {
  return getPersistedTokenFromStorage({ validateToken: isTokenValid });
}

export function resolveTokenFromContext(auth = {}) {
  const fromPayload = String(
    auth?.session?.token || auth?.session?.accessToken || "",
  ).trim();
  return fromPayload || getPersistedSessionToken();
}

// ============================================================================
// 3. HTTP CLIENT WITH AUTH
// ============================================================================

export function withAuthInterceptor(options = {}, auth = {}) {
  const skipAuth = Boolean(
    auth?.skipAuth || auth?.skipAuthCheck || auth?.noAuth,
  );
  const headers = { ...(options.headers ?? undefined) };
  if (skipAuth) return { ...options, headers };

  const token = resolveTokenFromContext(auth);
  if (!token) return { ...options, headers };
  if (!isTokenValid(token))
    throw new Error("Sesion expirada o token invalido.");
  if (!headers.Authorization && !headers.authorization)
    headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
  return { ...options, headers };
}

function stripAzureBlobHeaders(headers = {}) {
  const safeHeaders = { ...(headers || {}) };
  [
    "Authorization",
    "authorization",
    "x-client-ip",
    "x-client-location",
    "x-client-location-accuracy",
    "x-client-location-timestamp",
    "x-client-platform",
    "x-client-timestamp",
    "x-client-timezone",
    "x-device-id",
    "custom-header",
  ].forEach((header) => {
    if (header in safeHeaders) delete safeHeaders[header];
  });
  return safeHeaders;
}

function normalizeRequestBody(body) {
  if (typeof body !== "string") return body;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(body);
  } catch {
    return body;
  }
}

function isBinaryRequestBody(body) {
  return (
    body instanceof FormData ||
    body instanceof Blob ||
    body instanceof ArrayBuffer
  );
}

async function parseRequestDataResponse(response) {
  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") || "";
  if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
    return response.json().catch(() => ({}));
  }
  const text = await response.text().catch(() => "");
  if (!text) return {};
  try {
    return JSON.parse(text);
  } catch {
    return { response: text };
  }
}

export async function requestData(url, options = {}, auth = {}) {
  const urlString = String(url || "");
  const isAzureBlob = urlString.includes(".blob.core.windows.net");

  const baseOptions = isAzureBlob
    ? {
        ...options,
        headers: stripAzureBlobHeaders(options.headers),
      }
    : withAuthInterceptor(options, auth);

  const method = baseOptions.method || "GET";
  const timeoutMs = Number(baseOptions?.timeoutMs || 30000);
  const normalizedBody = normalizeRequestBody(baseOptions.body);

  try {
    if (isBinaryRequestBody(normalizedBody)) {
      const controller = new AbortController();
      const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
      try {
        const headers = { ...(baseOptions.headers || {}) };
        if (normalizedBody instanceof FormData) {
          delete headers["Content-Type"];
          delete headers["content-type"];
        }
        const response = await fetch(url, {
          ...baseOptions,
          method,
          headers,
          body: normalizedBody,
          signal: baseOptions?.signal || controller.signal,
        });
        const data = await parseRequestDataResponse(response);
        if (!response.ok) {
          const err = new Error(
            data?.message || data?.response || `HTTP ${response.status}`,
          );
          err.status = response.status;
          err.response = data;
          if (response.status === 401 || response.status === 403) err.auth = true;
          throw err;
        }
        return { response, data };
      } finally {
        clearTimeout(timeoutId);
      }
    }

    const data = await requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl(url, {
      method,
      body: normalizedBody,
      headers: baseOptions.headers || {},
      query: baseOptions.query,
      defaultErrorPrefix: baseOptions.defaultErrorPrefix,
      timeoutMs,
      retries: baseOptions?.retries,
      retryDelayMs: baseOptions?.retryDelayMs,
      dedupe: baseOptions?.dedupe,
      signal: baseOptions?.signal || null,
    });
    return { response: null, data };
  } catch (err) {
    if (err.name === "AbortError") {
      const e = new Error("Request aborted by timeout");
      e.code = "ETIMEDOUT";
      throw e;
    }
    throw err;
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// 4. FILE NAMING HELPERS
// ============================================================================

export function resolveWorkflowFormStateFileName(documentId) {
  return `__inverneg_form_state__-${documentId}.txt`;
}

export function isWorkflowFormStateFile(file, documentId) {
  const expectedName = resolveWorkflowFormStateFileName(documentId);
  const fileName = String(file?.name || "").trim();
  const description = String(file?.description || "").trim();
  return (
    fileName === expectedName ||
    description === `${WORKFLOW_FORM_STATE_FILE_DESCRIPTION}:${documentId}`
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// 5. WORKFLOW UTILITIES
// ============================================================================

export const normalizePayload = (payload = {}) => {
  const normalized = {
    ...payload,
    businessId: payload.businessId ?? payload.exec ?? null,
    requestId: payload.requestId ?? payload.wrk ?? null,
    validationId: payload.validationId ?? payload.dcmt ?? null,
    exec: payload.exec ?? payload.businessId ?? null,
    wrk: payload.wrk ?? payload.requestId ?? null,
    dcmt: payload.dcmt ?? payload.validationId ?? null,
  };
  const pascalKeys = [
    "DefinitionId",
    "Description",
    "Name",
    "Version",
    "CabinetId",
    "CabinetName",
    "FolderId",
    "FolderPath",
    "DocumentId",
    "IsStarted",
    "Active",
    "Observations",
    "CurrentStepId",
    "Id",
    "ExecutionId",
    "Secuence",
    "Execution",
  ];
  pascalKeys.forEach((key) => {
    if (key in payload) normalized[key] = payload[key];
  });
  return normalized;
};

export const isGuidLike = (value) =>
  /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/iu.test(
    String(value || "").trim(),
  );

export function generateGuid() {
  if (typeof globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID === "function")
    return globalThis.crypto.randomUUID();
  const randomValues = globalThis.crypto?.getRandomValues
    ? globalThis.crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(16))
    : Array.from({ length: 16 }, () => Math.floor(Math.random() * 256));
  randomValues[6] = (randomValues[6] & 0x0f) | 0x40;
  randomValues[8] = (randomValues[8] & 0x3f) | 0x80;
  const hex = Array.from(randomValues, (value) =>
    value.toString(16).padStart(2, "0"),
  );
  return [
    hex.slice(0, 4).join(""),
    hex.slice(4, 6).join(""),
    hex.slice(6, 8).join(""),
    hex.slice(8, 10).join(""),
    hex.slice(10, 16).join(""),
  ].join("-");
}

export function normalizeWorkflowUploadedFile(file) {
  if (!file || typeof file !== "object") return null;
  return {
    id: file.id ?? file.fileId ?? file.FileId ?? file.Id ?? null,
    fileId: file.fileId ?? file.FileId ?? file.id ?? file.Id ?? null,
    name: file.name ?? file.Name ?? "",
    description: file.description ?? file.Description ?? "",
    fileTypeId: file.fileTypeId ?? file.FileTypeId ?? file.fileType ?? null,
    fileTypeName:
      file.fileTypeName ??
      file.FileTypeName ??
      file.fileType ??
      file.name ??
      "",
    documentId: file.documentId ?? file.DocumentId ?? null,
    folderId: file.folderId ?? file.FolderId ?? null,
    path: file.path ?? file.Path ?? file.file ?? file.File ?? "",
    folderPath: file.folderPath ?? file.FolderPath ?? "",
    extension: file.extension ?? file.Extension ?? "",
    raw: file,
  };
}

export async function fetchJsonFileFromUrl(url) {
  try {
    const parsed = await requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl(url, { method: "GET" });
    if (!parsed) return null;
    return parsed?.formData ?? parsed?.data ?? parsed;
  } catch {
    throw new Error("No se pudo descargar el borrador remoto del formulario.");
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// 6. FILE TYPE CATALOG
// ============================================================================

function loadCachedWorkflowFileTypes() {
  const storage = getLocalStorageRef();
  if (!storage) return [];
  try {
    const raw = storage.getItem(FILE_TYPES_CACHE_STORAGE_KEY);
    if (!raw) return [];
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

function saveCachedWorkflowFileTypes(fileTypes = []) {
  const storage = getLocalStorageRef();
  if (!storage) return;
  try {
    storage.setItem(FILE_TYPES_CACHE_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(fileTypes));
  } catch {
    /* ignore */
  }
}

function resolveDefaultWorkflowFileType(fileTypes = []) {
  return (
    fileTypes.find((item) => item?.isDefault === true) ||
    fileTypes.find((item) => normalizeComparable(item?.name) === "pdf") ||
    null
  );
}

async function fetchWorkflowFileTypesRequest(payload = {}) {
  const url = new URL(`${CoreServer}filetype`, getLocationOrigin());
  const { data } = await requestData(
    url,
    { method: "GET", headers: { Accept: "text/plain, application/json, */*" } },
    { payload },
  );
  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;
  if (Array.isArray(data?.data)) return data.data;
  return [];
}

export async function getWorkflowFileTypesCatalog(payload = {}) {
  const cached = loadCachedWorkflowFileTypes();
  if (cached.length > 0) return cached;
  const remote = await fetchWorkflowFileTypesRequest(payload);
  if (remote.length > 0) saveCachedWorkflowFileTypes(remote);
  return remote;
}

export async function resolveEffectiveWorkflowFileTypeId(payload = {}) {
  const rawFileTypeId = String(payload.fileTypeId ?? payload.id ?? "").trim();
  if (isGuidLike(rawFileTypeId)) return rawFileTypeId;
  const fileTypes = await getWorkflowFileTypesCatalog(payload);
  const candidates = [
    payload.fileTypeName,
    payload.label,
    payload.description,
    payload.name,
    rawFileTypeId,
  ]
    .map((value) => normalizeComparable(value))
    .filter(Boolean);
  const matched = fileTypes.find((item) => {
    const itemName = normalizeComparable(item?.name);
    const itemDescription = normalizeComparable(item?.description);
    return candidates.some(
      (candidate) =>
        candidate === itemName ||
        candidate === itemDescription ||
        itemName.includes(candidate) ||
        itemDescription.includes(candidate) ||
        candidate.includes(itemName) ||
        candidate.includes(itemDescription),
    );
  });
  if (matched?.id) return String(matched.id).trim();
  const fallback = resolveDefaultWorkflowFileType(fileTypes);
  if (fallback?.id) return String(fallback.id).trim();
  return rawFileTypeId;
}

// ============================================================================
// 7. ATTACHMENT DRAFT HELPERS
// ============================================================================

export function loadAttachmentsDraft() {
  return loadFormDraft(ATTACHMENTS_DRAFT_KEY) || {};
}

export function saveAttachmentsDraft(value = {}) {
  return saveFormDraft(ATTACHMENTS_DRAFT_KEY, value);
}

// ============================================================================
