export function getValueByPath(target, path) {
  if (!path) return target;
  if (!target || typeof target !== 'object') return undefined;
  return path.split('.').reduce((acc, key) =>
    (acc == null || typeof acc !== 'object') ? undefined : acc[key],
    target
  );
}

export function setValueByPath(target, path, value) {
  const safeTarget = target ?? {};
  const keys = path.split('.');
  const clone = structuredClone(safeTarget);
  let cursor = clone;
  keys.forEach((key, index) => {
    if (index === keys.length - 1) { cursor[key] = value; return; }
    cursor[key] = Array.isArray(cursor[key]) ? [...cursor[key]] : { ...cursor[key] };
    cursor = cursor[key];
  });
  return clone;
}

export function setValuesByPath(target = {}, entries = []) {
  return entries.reduce((acc, entry) => {
    if (!entry?.path) return acc;
    return setValueByPath(acc, entry.path, entry.value);
  }, target);
}

export function updateArrayItem(target, path, index, field, value) {
  const clone = structuredClone(target);
  const array = getValueByPath(clone, path);
  array[index] = { ...array[index], [field]: value };
  return clone;
}

export function addArrayItem(target, path, newItem = {}) {
  const clone = structuredClone(target);
  const keys = path.split('.');
  let cursor = clone;
  keys.forEach((key, index) => {
    if (index === keys.length - 1) { cursor[key] = [...(cursor[key] || []), newItem]; }
    else { cursor[key] = Array.isArray(cursor[key]) ? [...cursor[key]] : { ...cursor[key] }; cursor = cursor[key]; }
  });
  return clone;
}

export function removeArrayItem(target, path, index) {
  const clone = structuredClone(target);
  const keys = path.split('.');
  let cursor = clone;
  keys.forEach((key, idx) => {
    if (idx === keys.length - 1) { cursor[key] = cursor[key].filter((_, i) => i !== index); }
    else { cursor[key] = Array.isArray(cursor[key]) ? [...cursor[key]] : { ...cursor[key] }; cursor = cursor[key]; }
  });
  return clone;
}

// ============================================================================
// Date Utilities
// ============================================================================

export function formatDateWords(value) {
  if (!value) return '';
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return String(value);
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('es-EC', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }).format(date);
}

export function splitDateParts(value) {
  if (!value) return { day: '', month: '', year: '' };
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return { day: '', month: '', year: '' };
  return { day: String(date.getDate()), month: new Intl.DateTimeFormat('es-EC', { month: 'long' }).format(date), year: String(date.getFullYear()) };
}

// ============================================================================
// Visibility Utilities
// ============================================================================

export function isVisible(condition, formData = {}, sectionPath = '') {
  if (!condition) return true;
  let targetPath = null;
  if (condition.path) targetPath = condition.path;
  else if (condition.field) targetPath = sectionPath ? `${sectionPath}.${condition.field}` : condition.field;
  else return true;
  const val = getValueByPath(formData, targetPath);
  if (Object.hasOwn(condition, 'equals')) return val === condition.equals;
  if (Object.hasOwn(condition, 'notEquals')) return val !== condition.notEquals;
  if (Object.hasOwn(condition, 'includes')) { if (!val) return false; if (Array.isArray(val)) return val.includes(condition.includes); return String(val).includes(condition.includes); }
  return !!val;
}

// ============================================================================
// Text Normalization - Shared across modules
// ============================================================================

export function normalizeComparable(value) {
  const s = String(value ?? '');
  return s.normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '').replace(/\([^)]*\)/g, ' ').replace(/[._-]/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().toLowerCase();
}

export function safeParseJson(value) {
  if (!value) return null;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(value);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export function createId() {
  if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && typeof crypto.randomUUID === 'function') {
    return crypto.randomUUID();
  }
  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 12)}`;
}

// ============================================================================
// Option Parsing
// ============================================================================

function normalizeOption(option) {
  return typeof option === 'string' ? { label: option, value: option } : option;
}

export function normalizeOptions(options = []) {
  return options.map(normalizeOption);
}

  error: () => {},
  warn: () => {},
  info: () => {},
};

// ============================================================================
// Session Helpers

export function getSessionToken(session) {
  return String(session?.token || session?.accessToken || '').trim();
}

// ============================================================================
// Attachment Helpers
// ============================================================================

export function normalizeAttachmentsInput(attachments = {}) {
  return Object.fromEntries(
    Object.entries(attachments).filter(([, value]) => value && typeof value === 'object'),
  );
}

export function parseDmyDate(value) {
  const raw = String(value || '').trim();
  if (!raw) return null;
  const match = raw.match(/^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})$/u);
  if (match) {
    const [, dd, mm, yyyy] = match;
    const date = new Date(Number(yyyy), Number(mm) - 1, Number(dd));
    return Number.isNaN(date.getTime()) ? null : date;
  }

  const fallback = new Date(raw);
  return Number.isNaN(fallback.getTime()) ? null : fallback;
}

export function differenceInWholeYears(fromDate, toDate = new Date()) {
  if (!(fromDate instanceof Date) || Number.isNaN(fromDate.getTime())) return null;
  if (!(toDate instanceof Date) || Number.isNaN(toDate.getTime())) return null;

  let years = toDate.getFullYear() - fromDate.getFullYear();
  const anniversary = new Date(toDate.getFullYear(), fromDate.getMonth(), fromDate.getDate());
  if (toDate < anniversary) years -= 1;
  return years;
}

import { getValueByPath, normalizeComparable } from "@/shared/utils/common";

export const DOCUMENT_SEMANTIC_ID = Object.freeze({
  SOLICITUD: "solicitud",
  CONVENIO: "convenio",
  DECLARACION: "declaracion",
  PAGARE: "pagare",
});

export function resolveDocumentSemanticId(rawLabel = "") {
  const label = normalizeComparable(rawLabel);
  if (!label) return null;
  if (label.includes("solicitud")) return DOCUMENT_SEMANTIC_ID.SOLICITUD;
  if (label.includes("convenio")) return DOCUMENT_SEMANTIC_ID.CONVENIO;
  if (
    label.includes("proteccion") ||
    label.includes("tratamiento de datos") ||
    label.includes("datos personales") ||
    label.includes("declaracion")
  ) {
    return DOCUMENT_SEMANTIC_ID.DECLARACION;
  }
  if (label.includes("pagare") || label.includes("pagar")) {
    return DOCUMENT_SEMANTIC_ID.PAGARE;
  }
  return null;
}

const SEMANTIC_FAMILIES = Object.freeze({
  company: {
    hints: [
      "business",
      "company",
      "empresa",
      "negocio",
      "razon social",
      "razonSocial",
      "nombre social",
      "nombreEmpresa",
    ],
    excludes: ["representative", "representante", "principal", "signer", "client"],
  },
  person: {
    hints: [
      "representative",
      "representante",
      "principal",
      "signer",
      "client",
      "full name",
      "fullname",
      "nombre completo",
      "nombre",
      "apellidos",
      "legal representative",
    ],
    excludes: ["business", "company", "empresa", "negocio", "razon social"],
  },
  id: {
    hints: [
      "ruc",
      "ci",
      "cedula",
      "cédula",
      "document",
      "identification",
      "tax",
      "id",
    ],
    excludes: ["address", "city", "company", "business"],
  },
  address: {
    hints: ["address", "direccion", "dirección", "domicilio", "home"],
    excludes: ["city", "ciudad"],
  },
  city: {
    hints: ["city", "ciudad", "town", "municipality"],
    excludes: ["address", "direccion", "domicilio"],
  },
});

function tokenizeSemanticValue(value = "") {
  return String(value || "")
    .replace(/([a-z0-9])([A-Z])/g, "$1 $2")
    .replace(/([A-Z]+)([A-Z][a-z])/g, "$1 $2")
    .normalize("NFD")
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")
    .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]+/g, " ")
    .toLowerCase()
    .split(/\s+/)
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function normalizeSemanticPath(value = "") {
  return tokenizeSemanticValue(value).join(" ");
}

function collectSemanticLeafEntries(value, basePath = "", out = []) {
  if (value == null) return out;
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    value.forEach((item, index) => {
      const nextPath = basePath ? `${basePath}.${index}` : String(index);
      collectSemanticLeafEntries(item, nextPath, out);
    });
    return out;
  }
  if (typeof value !== "object") {
    const normalized = String(value).trim();
    if (normalized) out.push({ path: basePath, value });
    return out;
  }
  Object.entries(value).forEach(([key, child]) => {
    const nextPath = basePath ? `${basePath}.${key}` : String(key);
    collectSemanticLeafEntries(child, nextPath, out);
  });
  return out;
}

function inferSemanticFamily(path = "") {
  const tokens = tokenizeSemanticValue(path);
  if (!tokens.length) return "generic";
  if (
    tokens.includes("ruc") ||
    tokens.includes("ci") ||
    tokens.includes("cedula") ||
    tokens.includes("dni") ||
    tokens.includes("identification") ||
    tokens.includes("document")
  ) {
    return "id";
  }
  if (
    tokens.includes("address") ||
    tokens.includes("direccion") ||
    tokens.includes("domicilio")
  ) {
    return "address";
  }
  if (tokens.includes("city") || tokens.includes("ciudad")) {
    return "city";
  }
  if (
    tokens.includes("company") ||
    tokens.includes("business") ||
    tokens.includes("empresa") ||
    tokens.includes("negocio") ||
    tokens.includes("razon") ||
    tokens.includes("social")
  ) {
    return "company";
  }
  if (
    tokens.includes("representative") ||
    tokens.includes("representante") ||
    tokens.includes("principal") ||
    tokens.includes("signer") ||
    tokens.includes("full") ||
    tokens.includes("nombre") ||
    tokens.includes("name") ||
    tokens.includes("legal")
  ) {
    return "person";
  }
  return "generic";
}

function getSemanticFamilyConfig(family = "generic") {
  return SEMANTIC_FAMILIES[family] || { hints: [], excludes: [] };
}

function scoreSemanticPath(path, family = "generic") {
  const normalizedPath = normalizeSemanticPath(path);
  if (!normalizedPath) return 0;
  const { hints = [], excludes = [] } = getSemanticFamilyConfig(family);
  let score = 0;
  for (const hint of hints) {
    const normalizedHint = normalizeSemanticPath(hint);
    if (!normalizedHint) continue;
    if (normalizedPath.includes(normalizedHint)) score += 3;
  }
  for (const exclude of excludes) {
    const normalizedExclude = normalizeSemanticPath(exclude);
    if (!normalizedExclude) continue;
    if (normalizedPath.includes(normalizedExclude)) score -= 5;
  }
  const lastSegment = normalizedPath.split(" ").slice(-1)[0] || "";
  if (lastSegment && hints.some((hint) => normalizeSemanticPath(hint).includes(lastSegment)))
    score += 1;
  return score;
}

export function resolveSemanticFieldValue(
  data = {},
  preferredPath = "",
  fallbackPaths = [],
  options = {},
) {
  const paths = [preferredPath, ...(Array.isArray(fallbackPaths) ? fallbackPaths : [])]
    .map((path) => String(path || "").trim())
    .filter(Boolean);

  for (const path of paths) {
    const value = getValueByPath(data, path);
    if (value == null) continue;
    const normalized = String(value).trim();
    if (normalized) return value;
  }

  const semanticFamily =
    String(options?.family || "").trim() || inferSemanticFamily(preferredPath);
  const entries = collectSemanticLeafEntries(data);
  let bestValue = "";
  let bestScore = 0;
  let bestPathLength = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;

  for (const entry of entries) {
    if (!entry?.path) continue;
    const score = scoreSemanticPath(entry.path, semanticFamily);
    if (score <= 0) continue;
    const normalizedValue = String(entry.value ?? "").trim();
    if (!normalizedValue) continue;
    const pathLength = tokenizeSemanticValue(entry.path).length;
    if (
      score > bestScore ||
      (score === bestScore && pathLength < bestPathLength)
    ) {
      bestScore = score;
      bestPathLength = pathLength;
      bestValue = entry.value;
    }
  }

  return bestValue;
}

import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { resolveSemanticFieldValue } from "./documentSemantic";

describe("resolveSemanticFieldValue", () => {
  it("resolves semantically similar company and person fields", () => {
    const data = {
      business: {
        razonSocial: "INVERNEG S.A.",
        ruc: "0991535970001",
      },
      principalAccount: {
        nombreCompleto: "Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano",
        cedula: "0951535970",
      },
      representative: {
        nombreCompleto: "Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano",
      },
    };

    expect(
      resolveSemanticFieldValue(
        data,
        "dataDeclaration.companyName",
        ["business.businessName"],
      ),
    ).toBe("INVERNEG S.A.");
    expect(
      resolveSemanticFieldValue(
        data,
        "dataDeclaration.legalRepresentative",
        ["representative.fullName"],
      ),
    ).toBe("Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano");
    expect(
      resolveSemanticFieldValue(data, "dataDeclaration.ruc", [
        "business.ruc",
      ]),
    ).toBe("0991535970001");
  });
});

export function splitFullName(fullName = "") {
  const tokens = String(fullName || "")
    .trim()
    .split(/\s+/u)
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (tokens.length === 0) return { nombres: "", apellido1: "", apellido2: "" };
  if (tokens.length === 1)
    return { nombres: tokens[0], apellido1: "", apellido2: "" };
  if (tokens.length === 2)
    return { nombres: tokens[0], apellido1: tokens[1], apellido2: "" };
  if (tokens.length === 3)
    return { nombres: tokens[0], apellido1: tokens[1], apellido2: tokens[2] };

  return {
    nombres: tokens.slice(0, -2).join(" "),
    apellido1: tokens.at(-2) || "",
    apellido2: tokens.at(-1) || "",
  };
}

/**
 * Normalize an Ecuadorian phone number to the canonical form: 593 + local-number
 * Rules:
 * - Strip all non-digit characters
 * - If the number already starts with '593', keep country code and remove leading zeros from local part
 * - If the number starts with '0', remove leading zeros and prefix with '593'
 * - If the number is a 9-digit local mobile (e.g. '9XXXXXXXX'), prefix with '593'
 * - If longer than 9 digits and no explicit country code, take the last 9 digits as the local number
 * - Returns an empty string when no digits are present
 *
 * Examples:
 * - '0999999999' -> '593999999999'
 * - '+593 99 999 9999' -> '593999999999'
 */
export function normalizeEcuadorPhone(raw = "") {
  if (raw === null || raw === undefined) return "";
  let digits = String(raw).replace(/\D/g, "");
  if (!digits) return "";

  // Remove any leading international 00 prefix
  if (digits.startsWith("00")) {
    digits = digits.replace(/^0+/, "");
  }

  // If starts with country code 593, treat remainder as local
  if (digits.startsWith("593")) {
    let local = digits.slice(3).replace(/^0+/, "");
    return local ? `593${local}` : "";
  }

  // National format with leading zero (e.g., 09XXXXXXXX)
  if (digits.startsWith("0")) {
    const local = digits.replace(/^0+/, "");
    return local ? `593${local}` : "";
  }

  // Already a 9-digit local mobile (e.g., 9XXXXXXXX)
  if (digits.length === 9) {
    return `593${digits}`;
  }

  // If longer than 9 digits and no country code, take last 9 digits as fallback
  if (digits.length > 9) {
    const local = digits.slice(-9).replace(/^0+/, "");
    return local ? `593${local}` : "";
  }

  // Fallback best-effort
  return `593${digits}`;
}

export function getQueryParams(search = '') {
  return new URLSearchParams(String(search || '').startsWith('?') ? String(search || '').slice(1) : String(search || ''));
}

export function buildSearchWithParams(baseSearch = '', params = {}) {
  const searchParams = getQueryParams(baseSearch);
  Object.entries(params).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value == null || value === '') {
      searchParams.delete(key);
      return;
    }
    searchParams.set(key, String(value));
  });
  const nextSearch = searchParams.toString();
  return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : '';
}

export function getSearchWithoutSigningReviewParams(search = '') {
  const searchParams = getQueryParams(search);
  ['panel', 'doc', 'formType', 'step'].forEach((key) => searchParams.delete(key));
  const nextSearch = searchParams.toString();
  return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : '';
}

// Named exports only; removed trivial default export to avoid aliasing.

function toComparableString(value = "") {
  return String(value || "").trim();
}

export function normalizeWorkflowFlag(value) {
  if (value === true) return true;
  if (value === false) return false;

  const normalized = toComparableString(value).toLowerCase();
  return normalized === "true" || normalized === "1" || normalized === "yes";
}

export function resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(item = {}, options = {}) {
  const { allowIdFallback = false } = options;

  const direct = [
    item?.workflowFileTypeId,
    item?.fileTypeId,
    item?.FileTypeId,
    item?.workflowMeta?.fileTypeId,
    item?.workflowMeta?.FileTypeId,
  ]
    .map((value) => toComparableString(value))
    .find(Boolean);

  if (direct) return direct;
  if (!allowIdFallback) return "";

  return toComparableString(item?.id);
}

export function firstNonEmptyWorkflowText(...values) {
  return values.map((value) => toComparableString(value)).find(Boolean) || "";
}

import { createAsyncThunk, createSlice } from "@reduxjs/toolkit";
import { toast } from "react-hot-toast";
import {
  buildExternalFlowKey,
  clearExternalFormsState,
  saveExternalFormsFlowContext,
} from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";
import {
  generatePinRequest,
  validateAccessDataFormRequest,
  verifyAccessFormRequest,
  viewSummaryFilesRequest,
} from "../../infrastructure/workflow/workflowSigningOps";

const initialState = {
  loading: false,
  error: null,
  status: null,
  session: null,
  statusGeneratePin: null,
  dataGeneratePin: null,
  statusValidatePin: null,
  dataValidatePin: null,
  statusViewFiles: null,
  dataViewFiles: null,
  verifyRequestKey: null,
  generatePinRequestKey: null,
  validatePinRequestKey: null,
  summaryRequestKey: null,
};

export const generatePinForm = createAsyncThunk(
  "auth/generatePinForm",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const data = await generatePinRequest(payload);
      // If the backend returns an informational message (e.g. PIN still valid), show it to the user
      const infoMessage =
        data?.pinMessage ||
        data?.message ||
        (data?.data && (data.data.pinMessage || data.data.message));
      if (infoMessage) {
        toast.success(String(infoMessage));
      }

      saveExternalFormsFlowContext({
        ...payload,
        ...data,
      });
      return {
        status: 200,
        data: data.data ?? data,
        idPinCode: data.idPinCode ?? null,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      const status = error?.status || 500;
      const resp = error?.response || {};
      const infoMessage = resp?.pinMessage || resp?.message || error?.message;
      // If backend returns 400 with an informational message (PIN already valid), surface it as an info/success
      if (status === 400 && infoMessage) {
        try {
          toast.success(String(infoMessage));
        } catch {
          /* ignore toast errors */
        }
        try {
          saveExternalFormsFlowContext({ ...payload, ...resp });
        } catch {
          /* ignore */
        }
        return { status, data: resp, idPinCode: resp?.idPinCode ?? null };
      }
      return rejectWithValue({
        status,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
  {
    condition: (payload, { getState }) => {
      const state = getState()?.auth || {};
      const requestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(payload);
      return !(state.loading && state.generatePinRequestKey === requestKey);
    },
  },
);

export const verifyAccessForm = createAsyncThunk(
  "auth/verifyAccessForm",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const data = await verifyAccessFormRequest(payload);
      if (data?.pinMessage) {
        toast.success(data.pinMessage);
      }
      return { status: 200, data };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
  {
    condition: (payload, { getState }) => {
      const state = getState()?.auth || {};
      const requestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(payload);
      return !(state.loading && state.verifyRequestKey === requestKey);
    },
  },
);

export const validateAccessDataForm = createAsyncThunk(
  "auth/validateAccessDataForm",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const data = await validateAccessDataFormRequest(payload);
      return { status: 200, data };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
  {
    condition: (payload, { getState }) => {
      const state = getState()?.auth || {};
      const requestKey = `${buildExternalFlowKey(payload)}|${String(payload?.pinCode || "").trim()}`;
      return !(state.loading && state.validatePinRequestKey === requestKey);
    },
  },
);

export const viewSummaryFiles = createAsyncThunk(
  "auth/viewSummaryFiles",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const data = await viewSummaryFilesRequest(payload);
      return { status: 200, data };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
  {
    condition: (payload, { getState }) => {
      const state = getState()?.auth || {};
      const requestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(payload);
      return !(state.loading && state.summaryRequestKey === requestKey);
    },
  },
);

const authSlice = createSlice({
  name: "auth",
  initialState,
  reducers: {
    logout() {
      clearExternalFormsState();
      return initialState;
    },
  },
  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    builder
      .addCase(verifyAccessForm.pending, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.status = null;
        state.verifyRequestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(action.meta.arg);
      })
      .addCase(verifyAccessForm.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = null;
        state.status = action.payload.status;
        state.session = action.payload.data;
        state.verifyRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(verifyAccessForm.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
        state.status = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.verifyRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(generatePinForm.pending, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.status = null;
        state.generatePinRequestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(action.meta.arg);
      })
      .addCase(generatePinForm.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = null;
        state.statusGeneratePin = action.payload.status;
        state.dataGeneratePin = action.payload.data;
        state.session = {
          ...(state.session || {}),
          ...(action.payload.data || {}),
          idPinCode:
            action.payload.idPinCode ||
            action.payload.data?.idPinCode ||
            action.payload.data?.response ||
            null,
        };
        state.generatePinRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(generatePinForm.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
        state.statusGeneratePin = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.generatePinRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(validateAccessDataForm.pending, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.validatePinRequestKey = `${buildExternalFlowKey(action.meta.arg)}|${String(action.meta.arg?.pinCode || "").trim()}`;
      })
      .addCase(validateAccessDataForm.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = null;
        state.status = action.payload.status;
        state.statusValidatePin = action.payload.status;
        state.dataValidatePin = action.payload.data;
        const responseData = action.payload.data || {};
        state.session = {
          ...(state.session || {}),
          ...responseData,
          documentId:
            responseData.DocumentId || responseData.documentId || null,
          folderId: responseData.FolderId || responseData.folderId || null,
          personData:
            responseData.PersonData || responseData.personData || null,
          accessToken: responseData.Token || responseData.token || null,
          token:
            responseData.Token ||
            responseData.token ||
            state.session?.token ||
            null,
          validated: true,
        };
        state.validatePinRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(validateAccessDataForm.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
        state.status = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.statusValidatePin = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.validatePinRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(viewSummaryFiles.pending, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.statusViewFiles = null;
        state.summaryRequestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(action.meta.arg);
      })
      .addCase(viewSummaryFiles.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = null;
        state.statusViewFiles = action.payload.status;
        state.dataViewFiles = action.payload.data;
        state.summaryRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(viewSummaryFiles.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loading = false;
        state.error = action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
        state.statusViewFiles = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.summaryRequestKey = null;
      });
  },
});

export const { logout } = authSlice.actions;
export default authSlice.reducer;


// ========================== FIN DE src/store/slices/authSlice.js ==========================

import { createAsyncThunk, createSlice } from "@reduxjs/toolkit";
import {
  fetchWorkflowByIdRequest,
  fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest,
  fetchWorkflowRequiredFilesRequest,
} from "../../infrastructure/workflow/workflowCrud";
import {
  fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesRequest,
  uploadWorkflowDocumentFileRequest,
} from "../../infrastructure/workflow/workflowDocumentOps";
import { sendFormRequest } from "../../infrastructure/workflow/workflowSigningOps";
import { buildExternalFlowKey } from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";
import { mapWorkflowFilesToDocTypes } from "../../domain/forms/rules/documentStatus";

const initialState = {
  loading: false,
  error: null,
  status: null,
  dataRequest: null,
  workflowFiles: [],
  workflowDocTypes: [],
  workflowDocumentFiles: [],
  workflowPendingFiles: [],
  loadingWorkflowFiles: false,
  statusWorkflowFiles: null,
  errorWorkflowFiles: null,
  loadingWorkflowDocumentFiles: false,
  statusWorkflowDocumentFiles: null,
  errorWorkflowDocumentFiles: null,
  loadingUploadWorkflowFile: false,
  statusUploadWorkflowFile: null,
  errorUploadWorkflowFile: null,
  loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch: false,
  statusUploadWorkflowFilesBatch: null,
  errorUploadWorkflowFilesBatch: null,
  loadingSaveForm: false,
  errorSaveForm: null,
  statusSaveForm: null,
  workflowFilesRequestKey: null,
  validateRequestKey: null,
  sendRequestKey: null,
  workflowStatus: null,
  loadingWorkflowStatus: false,
  errorWorkflowStatus: null,
  workflowEditableConfig: null,
  loadingWorkflowEditableConfig: false,
  errorWorkflowEditableConfig: null,
};

export const sendForm = createAsyncThunk(
  "request/sendForm",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const data = await sendFormRequest(payload);
      return { status: 200, data };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
  {
    condition: (_, { getState }) => {
      const state = getState()?.request || {};
      return !state.loadingSaveForm;
    },
  },
);

/**
 * fetchWorkflowRequiredFiles - Carga archivos del workflow y los normaliza
 * como docTypes para la UI (requerido/opcional). Se apoya en la API byWfId.
 */
export const fetchWorkflowRequiredFiles = createAsyncThunk(
  "request/fetchWorkflowRequiredFiles",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const data = await fetchWorkflowRequiredFilesRequest(payload);
      const docTypes = mapWorkflowFilesToDocTypes(
        Array.isArray(data) ? data : [],
      );
      return { status: 200, data, docTypes };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
  {
    condition: (payload, { getState }) => {
      const state = getState()?.request || {};
      const requestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(payload);
      if (state.workflowFilesRequestKey === requestKey) return false;
      return true;
    },
  },
);

/**
 * fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles
 * Obtiene del backend los archivos ya subidos y los pendientes para el documento
 * actual del workflow.
 */
export const fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles = createAsyncThunk(
  "request/fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const data = await fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesRequest(payload);
      return { status: 200, data };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
);

/**
 * fetchWorkflowStatus
 * Obtiene el estado general del workflow (GET /api/workflow/{id}).
 */
export const fetchWorkflowStatus = createAsyncThunk(
  "request/fetchWorkflowStatus",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const workflowId = payload.wrk ?? payload.workflowId;
      const data = await fetchWorkflowByIdRequest(workflowId, payload);
      return { status: 200, data };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
);

/**
 * fetchWorkflowEditableConfig
 * Obtiene la configuración completa del workflow (incluyendo archivos y variables)
 * desde el endpoint /workflow/editable/{id}.
 */
export const fetchWorkflowEditableConfig = createAsyncThunk(
  "request/fetchWorkflowEditableConfig",
  async (payload, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const workflowId = payload.wrk ?? payload.workflowId;
      const data = await fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest(
        workflowId,
        payload,
      );
      const docTypes = mapWorkflowFilesToDocTypes(
        Array.isArray(data?.execution?.stepFileTypes)
          ? data.execution.stepFileTypes
          : [],
      );
      return { status: 200, data, docTypes };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
);
/**
 * fetchWorkflowConfig (Orchestrator)
 * Ejecuta primero la obtención del estado (Status) y luego la configuración editable.
 */
export const fetchWorkflowConfig = createAsyncThunk(
  "request/fetchWorkflowConfig",
  async ({ wrk, token }, { dispatch, rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const [status, config] = await Promise.all([
        dispatch(fetchWorkflowStatus({ wrk, token })).unwrap(),
        dispatch(fetchWorkflowEditableConfig({ wrk, token })).unwrap(),
      ]);
      return { status, config };
    } catch (err) {
      return rejectWithValue(err);
    }
  },
);

/**
 * uploadWorkflowDocumentFile
 * Carga un archivo del workflow al servidor documental y refresca luego la
 * lista de archivos del documento para mantener la UI sincronizada.
 */
export const uploadWorkflowDocumentFile = createAsyncThunk(
  "request/uploadWorkflowDocumentFile",
  async (payload, { dispatch, rejectWithValue }) => {
    try {
      const data = await uploadWorkflowDocumentFileRequest(payload);
      await dispatch(fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles(payload));
      return { status: 200, data };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
  {
    condition: (_, { getState }) => {
      const state = getState()?.request || {};
      return !state.loadingUploadWorkflowFile;
    },
  },
);

/**
 * uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch
 * Ejecuta una carga masiva desde la UI usando el contrato individual de subida
 * del workflow. Agrupa múltiples archivos, los envía en paralelo y refresca una
 * sola vez el listado remoto al finalizar para evitar repintados intermedios.
 */
export const uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch = createAsyncThunk(
  "request/uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch",
  async (payload, { dispatch, rejectWithValue }) => {
    const uploads = Array.isArray(payload?.uploads) ? payload.uploads : [];
    const refreshPayload = payload?.refreshPayload || payload;

    try {
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        uploads.map((uploadPayload) =>
          uploadWorkflowDocumentFileRequest(uploadPayload),
        ),
      );

      const failures = results
        .map((result, index) => ({ result, upload: uploads[index] }))
        .filter(({ result }) => result.status === "rejected");

      const refreshTasks = [
        dispatch(fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles(refreshPayload)),
      ];
      if (refreshPayload?.wrk || refreshPayload?.workflowId) {
        refreshTasks.push(dispatch(fetchWorkflowConfig(refreshPayload)));
      }
      await Promise.all(refreshTasks);

      if (failures.length > 0) {
        return rejectWithValue({
          status: 500,
          message: `No se pudieron subir ${failures.length} adjunto(s).`,
          failures: failures.map(({ result, upload }) => ({
            fileTypeId: upload?.fileTypeId || null,
            name: upload?.name || "",
            message: result.reason?.message || "Error de servidor",
          })),
        });
      }

      return {
        status: 200,
        data: results.map((result) => result.value),
        uploadedCount: uploads.length,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      return rejectWithValue({
        status: error?.status || 500,
        message: error?.message || "Error de servidor",
      });
    }
  },
  {
    condition: (_, { getState }) => {
      const state = getState()?.request || {};
      return !state.loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch;
    },
  },
);

const requestSlice = createSlice({
  name: "request",
  initialState,
  reducers: {
    resetRequest() {
      return initialState;
    },
  },
  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    builder
      .addCase(sendForm.pending, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingSaveForm = true;
        state.errorSaveForm = null;
        state.statusSaveForm = null;
        state.sendRequestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(action.meta.arg);
      })
      .addCase(sendForm.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingSaveForm = false;
        state.errorSaveForm = null;
        state.statusSaveForm = action.payload.status;
        state.sendRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(sendForm.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingSaveForm = false;
        state.errorSaveForm = action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
        state.statusSaveForm = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.sendRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowRequiredFiles.pending, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowFiles = true;
        state.statusWorkflowFiles = null;
        state.errorWorkflowFiles = null;
        state.workflowFilesRequestKey = buildExternalFlowKey(action.meta.arg);
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowRequiredFiles.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowFiles = false;
        state.statusWorkflowFiles = action.payload.status;
        state.workflowFiles = Array.isArray(action.payload.data)
          ? action.payload.data
          : [];
        state.workflowDocTypes = Array.isArray(action.payload.docTypes)
          ? action.payload.docTypes
          : [];
        state.errorWorkflowFiles = null;
        state.workflowFilesRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowRequiredFiles.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowFiles = false;
        state.statusWorkflowFiles = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.errorWorkflowFiles =
          action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
        state.workflowFilesRequestKey = null;
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles.pending, (state) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowDocumentFiles = true;
        state.statusWorkflowDocumentFiles = null;
        state.errorWorkflowDocumentFiles = null;
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowDocumentFiles = false;
        state.statusWorkflowDocumentFiles = action.payload.status;
        state.errorWorkflowDocumentFiles = null;
        state.workflowDocumentFiles = Array.isArray(
          action.payload.data?.uploadedFiles,
        )
          ? action.payload.data.uploadedFiles
          : [];
        state.workflowPendingFiles = Array.isArray(
          action.payload.data?.pendingFiles,
        )
          ? action.payload.data.pendingFiles
          : [];
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowDocumentFiles = false;
        state.statusWorkflowDocumentFiles = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.errorWorkflowDocumentFiles =
          action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
      })
      .addCase(uploadWorkflowDocumentFile.pending, (state) => {
        state.loadingUploadWorkflowFile = true;
        state.statusUploadWorkflowFile = null;
        state.errorUploadWorkflowFile = null;
      })
      .addCase(uploadWorkflowDocumentFile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingUploadWorkflowFile = false;
        state.statusUploadWorkflowFile = action.payload.status;
        state.errorUploadWorkflowFile = null;
      })
      .addCase(uploadWorkflowDocumentFile.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingUploadWorkflowFile = false;
        state.statusUploadWorkflowFile = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.errorUploadWorkflowFile =
          action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
      })
      .addCase(uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch.pending, (state) => {
        state.loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch = true;
        state.statusUploadWorkflowFilesBatch = null;
        state.errorUploadWorkflowFilesBatch = null;
      })
      .addCase(uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch = false;
        state.statusUploadWorkflowFilesBatch = action.payload.status;
        state.errorUploadWorkflowFilesBatch = null;
      })
      .addCase(uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch = false;
        state.statusUploadWorkflowFilesBatch = action.payload?.status || 500;
        state.errorUploadWorkflowFilesBatch =
          action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowEditableConfig.pending, (state) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowEditableConfig = true;
        state.errorWorkflowEditableConfig = null;
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowEditableConfig.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowEditableConfig = false;
        state.workflowEditableConfig = action.payload.data;
        state.errorWorkflowEditableConfig = null;

        // Synchronize workflow files and docTypes from the editable config.
        const stepFileTypes = action.payload.data?.execution?.stepFileTypes;
        state.workflowFiles = Array.isArray(stepFileTypes) ? stepFileTypes : [];
        state.workflowDocTypes = Array.isArray(action.payload.docTypes)
          ? action.payload.docTypes
          : [];
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowEditableConfig.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowEditableConfig = false;
        state.errorWorkflowEditableConfig =
          action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowStatus.pending, (state) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowStatus = true;
        state.errorWorkflowStatus = null;
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowStatus.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowStatus = false;
        state.workflowStatus = action.payload.data;
        state.errorWorkflowStatus = null;
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowStatus.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowStatus = false;
        state.errorWorkflowStatus =
          action.payload?.message || "Error inesperado";
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowConfig.pending, (state) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowConfig = true;
        state.errorWorkflowConfig = null;
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowConfig.fulfilled, (state) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowConfig = false;
        state.errorWorkflowConfig = null;
        // The sub-actions already populate workflowStatus and workflowEditableConfig
      })
      .addCase(fetchWorkflowConfig.rejected, (state) => {
        state.loadingWorkflowConfig = false;
        state.errorWorkflowConfig = "Error en la configuración del workflow";
      });
  },
});

export const { resetRequest } = requestSlice.actions;
export default requestSlice.reducer;


// ========================== FIN DE src/store/slices/requestSlice.js ==========================

// ARCHIVO #43
// Ruta relativa: src/core/document/runtime/safeIframePool.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/core/document/runtime/safeIframePool.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 120
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { incrementCounter } from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";

const iframePool = new Map();

function createIframe(key, width = 794, height = 1123) {
  const iframe = document.createElement("iframe");
  iframe.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
  iframe.dataset.poolKey = key;
  Object.assign(iframe.style, {
    position: "fixed",
    left: "-100vw",
    top: "0",
    width: `${width}px`,
    height: `${height}px`,
    border: "0",
    opacity: "0",
    pointerEvents: "none",
    visibility: "hidden",
  });
  document.body.appendChild(iframe);
  incrementCounter("iframeCreatedCount", { key });
  return iframe;
}

function getRecord(key) {
  const existing = iframePool.get(key);
  if (existing?.iframe?.isConnected) return existing;
  const iframe = createIframe(key);
  const record = {
    iframe,
    key,
    inUse: false,
  };
  iframePool.set(key, record);
  return record;
}

export function acquireIframe(key, options = {}) {
  const record = getRecord(String(key || "default"));
  const { width = 794, height = 1123 } = options || {};
  Object.assign(record.iframe.style, {
    width: `${width}px`,
    height: `${height}px`,
  });
  record.inUse = true;
  return record.iframe;
}

export async function loadIframeContent(
  iframe,
  { html, timeoutMs = 15000 } = {},
) {
  if (!iframe) throw new Error("Iframe inválido para load.");
  if (typeof html !== "string")
    throw new Error("HTML inválido para cargar en iframe.");

  await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    let done = false;
    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
      if (done) return;
      done = true;
      reject(new Error("Timeout cargando HTML en iframe pool."));
    }, timeoutMs);

    const onLoad = () => {
      if (done) return;
      done = true;
      clearTimeout(timer);
      resolve();
    };
    const onError = () => {
      if (done) return;
      done = true;
      clearTimeout(timer);
      reject(new Error("Error cargando HTML en iframe pool."));
    };

    iframe.addEventListener("load", onLoad, { once: true });
    iframe.addEventListener("error", onError, { once: true });
    iframe.srcdoc = html;
  });

  return iframe.contentDocument || iframe.contentWindow?.document || null;
}

export function releaseIframe(key) {
  const record = iframePool.get(String(key || "default"));
  if (!record) return;
  record.inUse = false;
}

export function disposeIframe(key) {
  const record = iframePool.get(String(key || "default"));
  if (!record) return;
  try {
    record.iframe.remove();
  } catch {
    if (record.iframe.parentNode) {
      record.iframe.parentNode.removeChild(record.iframe);
    }
  }
  iframePool.delete(String(key || "default"));
}

export function disposeAllIframes() {
  for (const key of iframePool.keys()) disposeIframe(key);
}

if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
  window.addEventListener("beforeunload", () => disposeAllIframes());
}

export default {
  acquireIframe,
  loadIframeContent,
  releaseIframe,
  disposeIframe,
  disposeAllIframes,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/core/document/runtime/safeIframePool.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #44
// Ruta relativa: src/core/document/services/pdfGenerationService.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/core/document/services/pdfGenerationService.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 109
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import {
  hashFormData,
  startMetric,
  getOrSetPending,
  pdfCache,
  incrementCounter,
} from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";
import { normalizePdfRenderResult } from "./remotePdfService";

export function buildPdfGenerationCacheKey({
  documentId,
  formType,
  formData,
  revisionId,
  options = {},
} = {}) {
  const resolvedRevisionId = revisionId || hashFormData(formData || {});
  const expectedAnchors = Array.isArray(options?.expectedAnchors)
    ? options.expectedAnchors
    : [];
  const expectedAnchorsToken = expectedAnchors
    .map((anchor) => {
      const key = String(anchor?.AnchorKey || anchor?.key || anchor || "").trim();
      const expectedPage = Number.isFinite(Number(anchor?.expectedPage))
        ? Number(anchor.expectedPage)
        : "";
      const optional = anchor?.optional === true ? "1" : "0";
      return `${key}:${expectedPage}:${optional}`;
    })
    .filter(Boolean)
    .sort()
    .join(",");
  const variant = [
    `anchors:${options?.resolveAnchorsInBackend || options?.isSigningFlow ? "1" : "0"}`,
    `selector:${String(options?.anchorSelector || "")}`,
    `expected:${expectedAnchorsToken}`,
  ].join("|");
  return `pdf-gen|${String(formType || "natural")}|${String(documentId || "documento")}|${resolvedRevisionId}|${variant}`;
}

/**
 * Explicit PDF generation operation.
 * @param {{
 *  documentId: string,
 *  formType: 'natural'|'linked',
 *  formData: object,
 *  options?: { returnBlob?: boolean, saveToFile?: boolean, fileName?: string }
 * }} params
 */
export async function generateFinalPdf(params = {}) {
  const { documentId, formType, formData, options = {} } = params;
  const {
    returnBlob = true,
    saveToFile = false,
    fileName = `${documentId || "documento"}.pdf`,
  } = options;
  const revisionId = hashFormData(formData || {});
  const metric = startMetric("pdfGenerationMs", {
    documentId,
    formType,
    revisionId,
  });

  const cacheKey = buildPdfGenerationCacheKey({
    documentId,
    formType,
    formData,
    revisionId,
    options,
  });

  const cached = pdfCache.get(cacheKey);
  if (cached?.arrayBuffer) {
    metric.end({ fromCache: true });
    incrementCounter && incrementCounter("cacheHits", { cacheKey });
    return normalizePdfRenderResult(cached, {
      fileName: cached.pdfFileName || cached.fileName || null,
    });
  }

  incrementCounter && incrementCounter("cacheMisses", { cacheKey });

  const result = await getOrSetPending(cacheKey, async () => {
    const { generatePdfBytes } =
      await import("@/core/engines/documentEngine/documentRuntime.js");
    const res = await generatePdfBytes(formType, formData, documentId, {
      ...options,
      returnBlob,
      saveToFile,
      fileName,
    });

    const normalized = normalizePdfRenderResult(res, { fileName });

    pdfCache.set(cacheKey, {
      ...normalized,
      updatedAt: Date.now(),
    });

    return normalized;
  });

  metric.end({
    hasArrayBuffer: Boolean(result.arrayBuffer),
    fromCache: !!result?.fromCache,
  });
  return result;
}

// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #45
// Ruta relativa: src/core/document/services/pdfPreviewService.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/core/document/services/pdfPreviewService.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 249
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import {
  pdfCache,
  hashFormData,
  getOrSetPending,
  startMetric,
  incrementCounter,
} from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";
import {
  generateFinalPdf,
  buildPdfGenerationCacheKey,
} from "./pdfGenerationService";
import { normalizePdfRenderResult } from "./remotePdfService";

const blobUrlRegistry = new Map();

function revokeUrl(cacheKey) {
  const current = blobUrlRegistry.get(cacheKey);
  if (!current) return;
  try {
    URL.revokeObjectURL(current);
  } catch {
    // noop
  }
  blobUrlRegistry.delete(cacheKey);
}

function base64ToUint8Array(base64) {
  if (!base64 || typeof base64 !== "string") return null;
  if (typeof atob !== "function") return null;
  const binary = atob(base64);
  const bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < binary.length; i++) bytes[i] = binary.charCodeAt(i);
  return bytes;
}

function toBlobFromCachedPdf(cachedPdf) {
  if (!cachedPdf) return null;
  if (cachedPdf.arrayBuffer) {
    return new Blob([cachedPdf.arrayBuffer], { type: "application/pdf" });
  }
  if (cachedPdf.pdfBytes instanceof Uint8Array) {
    return new Blob([cachedPdf.pdfBytes], { type: "application/pdf" });
  }
  const bytes = base64ToUint8Array(
    cachedPdf.pdfBase64 || cachedPdf.base64 || "",
  );
  if (bytes) return new Blob([bytes], { type: "application/pdf" });
  return null;
}

export function buildOfficialPreviewCacheKey({
  documentId,
  formType,
  formData,
  revisionId,
  resolveAnchorsInBackend = false,
  isSigningFlow = false,
  anchorSelector = "",
  expectedAnchors = [],
} = {}) {
  const anchorsToken = (Array.isArray(expectedAnchors) ? expectedAnchors : [])
    .map((anchor) => {
      const key = String(anchor?.AnchorKey || anchor?.key || anchor || "").trim();
      const expectedPage = Number.isFinite(Number(anchor?.expectedPage))
        ? Number(anchor.expectedPage)
        : "";
      const optional = anchor?.optional === true ? "1" : "0";
      return `${key}:${expectedPage}:${optional}`;
    })
    .filter(Boolean)
    .sort()
    .join(",");
  return [
    "official-preview",
    String(formType || "natural").trim() || "natural",
    String(documentId || "solicitud").trim() || "solicitud",
    String(revisionId || hashFormData(formData || {})),
    resolveAnchorsInBackend || isSigningFlow ? "anchors:1" : "anchors:0",
    `selector:${String(anchorSelector || "")}`,
    `expected:${anchorsToken}`,
  ].join("|");
}

/**
 * Generate official preview payload based on PDF.
 * @param {{
 *  documentId: string,
 *  formType: 'natural'|'linked',
 *  formData: object,
 *  revisionId?: string,
 *  force?: boolean
 * }} input
 */
export async function getOfficialPdfPreview(input = {}) {
  const {
    documentId,
    formType,
    formData,
    revisionId,
    force = false,
    resolveAnchorsInBackend = false,
    isSigningFlow = false,
    expectedAnchors = [],
    anchorSelector = "",
    waitForSelector,
    waitForTimeoutMs,
    mediaType,
    metadata = {},
  } = input;
  const normalizedExpectedAnchors = Array.isArray(expectedAnchors)
    ? expectedAnchors
    : [];
  const cacheKey = buildOfficialPreviewCacheKey({
    documentId,
    formType,
    formData,
    revisionId,
    resolveAnchorsInBackend,
    isSigningFlow,
    expectedAnchors: normalizedExpectedAnchors,
    anchorSelector,
  });
  const metric = startMetric("officialPdfPreviewMs", {
    documentId,
    formType,
    cacheKey,
  });
  incrementCounter("officialPreviewGenerationCount", { documentId });

  if (!force) {
    const cached = pdfCache.get(cacheKey);
    if (cached?.blob && cached?.blobUrl) {
      metric.end({ fromCache: true });
      incrementCounter && incrementCounter("cacheHits", { cacheKey, force });
      return {
        blob: cached.blob,
        blobUrl: cached.blobUrl,
        pagesMeta: cached.pagesMeta || [],
        cacheKey,
        fromCache: true,
      };
    }

    // Reuse previously generated PDF payload (base64/bytes) if available.
    // This avoids calling the remote renderer again for the usual preview.
    const pdfGenCacheKey = buildPdfGenerationCacheKey({
      documentId,
      formType,
      formData,
      revisionId,
      options: {
        resolveAnchorsInBackend,
        isSigningFlow,
        expectedAnchors: normalizedExpectedAnchors,
        anchorSelector,
      },
    });
    const cachedGeneratedPdf = pdfCache.get(pdfGenCacheKey);
    const blobFromGenerated = toBlobFromCachedPdf(cachedGeneratedPdf);
    if (blobFromGenerated) {
      revokeUrl(cacheKey);
      const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blobFromGenerated);
      blobUrlRegistry.set(cacheKey, blobUrl);
      const payload = {
        blob: blobFromGenerated,
        blobUrl,
        pagesMeta: [],
        updatedAt: Date.now(),
        reusedFromPdfGenCache: true,
        ...normalizePdfRenderResult(cachedGeneratedPdf),
      };
      pdfCache.set(cacheKey, payload);
      metric.end({ fromCache: true, reusedFromPdfGenCache: true });
      incrementCounter &&
        incrementCounter("cacheHits", {
          cacheKey,
          force,
          source: "pdf-gen",
        });
      return {
        ...payload,
        cacheKey,
        fromCache: true,
      };
    }
  }

  incrementCounter && incrementCounter("cacheMisses", { cacheKey, force });

  const preview = await getOrSetPending(cacheKey, async () => {
    const generated = await generateFinalPdf({
      documentId,
      formType,
      formData,
      options: {
        returnBlob: true,
        saveToFile: false,
        resolveAnchorsInBackend,
        isSigningFlow,
        expectedAnchors: normalizedExpectedAnchors,
        anchorSelector,
        waitForSelector,
        waitForTimeoutMs,
        mediaType,
        metadata,
      },
    });

    const arrayBuffer = generated?.arrayBuffer;
    if (!arrayBuffer)
      throw new Error("No fue posible generar PDF para preview oficial.");
    const blob = new Blob([arrayBuffer], { type: "application/pdf" });

    revokeUrl(cacheKey);
    const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    blobUrlRegistry.set(cacheKey, blobUrl);
    const payload = {
      blob,
      blobUrl,
      pagesMeta: [],
      updatedAt: Date.now(),
      ...normalizePdfRenderResult(generated),
    };
    pdfCache.set(cacheKey, payload);
    return {
      ...payload,
      cacheKey,
      fromCache: false,
    };
  });

  metric.end({ fromCache: !!preview?.fromCache });
  return preview;
}

export function disposeOfficialPdfPreview(cacheKey) {
  if (!cacheKey) return;
  revokeUrl(cacheKey);
  pdfCache.delete(cacheKey);
}

export function disposeAllOfficialPdfPreviews() {
  for (const key of blobUrlRegistry.keys()) revokeUrl(key);
}

if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
  window.addEventListener("beforeunload", disposeAllOfficialPdfPreviews);
}

// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #46
// Ruta relativa: src/core/document/services/previewService.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/core/document/services/previewService.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 108
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import {
  htmlCache,
  getOrSetPending,
  hashFormData,
  startMetric,
  incrementCounter,
} from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";
import { composeTemplate } from "./templateCompositionService";

function normalizeMode(mode = "screen") {
  return mode === "print" ? "print" : "screen";
}

export function buildQuickPreviewCacheKey({
  documentId,
  formType,
  formData,
  revisionId,
  mode = "screen",
} = {}) {
  const resolvedRevisionId = revisionId || hashFormData(formData || {});
  return [
    "quick-preview",
    normalizeMode(mode),
    String(formType || "natural").trim() || "natural",
    String(documentId || "solicitud").trim() || "solicitud",
    String(resolvedRevisionId || "0"),
  ].join("|");
}

function applyPreviewMode(html, mode = "screen") {
  if (!html || typeof html !== "string") return "";
  const normalizedMode = normalizeMode(mode);
  const sanitizedHtml =
    normalizedMode === "screen"
      ? html
          .replace(
            /@media screen and \(max-width:\s*520px\)\s*\{\s*body\s*\{\s*zoom:\s*\.92;\s*\}\s*\}\s*/gu,
            "",
          )
          .replace(
            /@media screen and \(max-width:\s*380px\)\s*\{\s*body\s*\{\s*zoom:\s*\.86;\s*\}\s*\}\s*/gu,
            "",
          )
      : html;
  if (sanitizedHtml.includes(`data-preview-mode="${normalizedMode}"`))
    return sanitizedHtml;
  return sanitizedHtml.replace(
    "<html",
    `<html data-preview-mode="${normalizedMode}"`,
  );
}

/**
 * Fast preview for edition (HTML).
 * @param {object} input
 * @returns {Promise<{html: string, cacheKey: string, fromCache: boolean, revisionId: string}>}
 */
export async function getQuickPreview(input = {}) {
  const { documentId, formType, formData, revisionId, mode = "screen" } = input;
  const cacheKey = buildQuickPreviewCacheKey({
    documentId,
    formType,
    formData,
    revisionId,
    mode,
  });
  const metric = startMetric("quickPreviewMs", {
    documentId,
    formType,
    mode: normalizeMode(mode),
    cacheKey,
  });
  incrementCounter("previewRegenerationsPerInteraction", {
    documentId,
    mode: normalizeMode(mode),
  });

  const cached = htmlCache.get(cacheKey);
  if (cached?.html) {
    metric.end({ fromCache: true });
    incrementCounter && incrementCounter("cacheHits", { cacheKey, mode });
    return {
      html: cached.html,
      cacheKey,
      fromCache: true,
      revisionId: revisionId || hashFormData(formData || {}),
    };
  }

  incrementCounter && incrementCounter("cacheMisses", { cacheKey, mode });

  const result = await getOrSetPending(cacheKey, async () => {
    const { html } = await composeTemplate({ documentId, formType, formData });
    const previewHtml = applyPreviewMode(html, mode);
    htmlCache.set(cacheKey, { html: previewHtml, updatedAt: Date.now() });
    return {
      html: previewHtml,
      cacheKey,
      fromCache: false,
      revisionId: revisionId || hashFormData(formData || {}),
    };
  });

  metric.end({ fromCache: !!result?.fromCache });
  return result;
}

// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #47
// Ruta relativa: src/core/document/services/remotePdfService.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/core/document/services/remotePdfService.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 879
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
