import {
  formatDateWords,
  splitDateParts,
} from "../../../shared/utils/common";
import {
  naturalPersonDocTypes,
  linkedPersonDocTypes,
} from "../../../domain/forms/schemas/factories/fieldFactories";
import {
  computeDocStatus,
  DOCUMENT_STATUS,
  getDynamicDocTypes,
} from "../../../domain/forms/rules/documentStatus";
import {
  resolveDocumentSemanticId,
  CONVENIO_SIGNER_NAME_SOURCE_PATHS,
  CONVENIO_SIGNER_CI_SOURCE_PATHS,
  CONVENIO_SIGNER_ADDRESS_SOURCE_PATHS,
  CONVENIO_SIGNER_CITY_SOURCE_PATHS,
  DATA_DECLARATION_COMPANY_NAME_SOURCE_PATHS,
  DATA_DECLARATION_RUC_SOURCE_PATHS,
  DATA_DECLARATION_REP_SOURCE_PATHS,
  resolveSemanticFieldValue,
} from "@/shared/utils/documentSemantic";

function trimPdfExtension(value) {
  return String(value || "")
    .trim()
    .replace(/\.pdf$/i, "")
    .trim();
}

function getRealChecklistLabelFromSource(item = {}) {
  const fileTypeName = String(item?.fileTypeName || "").trim();
  if (fileTypeName) return trimPdfExtension(fileTypeName);
  const name = String(item?.name || item?.fileName || "").trim();
  if (name) return trimPdfExtension(name);
  const label = String(item?.label || "").trim();
  if (label) return trimPdfExtension(label);
  return "";
}

function getChecklistRuntimeLabelMap(formData = {}) {
  const labelMap = new Map();
  const pushIfSemantic = (item) => {
    if (!item || typeof item !== "object") return;
    const rawLabel = getRealChecklistLabelFromSource(item);
    if (!rawLabel) return;
    const semanticId = resolveDocumentSemanticId(rawLabel);
    if (!semanticId) return;
    if (!labelMap.has(semanticId)) {
      labelMap.set(semanticId, rawLabel);
    }
  };

  Object.values(formData?.attachments || {}).forEach(pushIfSemantic);
  (formData?.workflowDocumentFiles || []).forEach(pushIfSemantic);
  (formData?.workflowFiles || []).forEach(pushIfSemantic);
  (formData?.stepFileTypes || []).forEach(pushIfSemantic);

  return labelMap;
}

function hasAttachment(formData, docId) {
  const attachments = formData?.attachments || {};
  const directAttachment = attachments?.[docId];
  if (directAttachment && (directAttachment.url || directAttachment.data)) {
    return true;
  }

  // Workflow attachments can be keyed by fileTypeId UUIDs instead of semantic IDs.
  // Match by semantic document name without overriding API-provided labels.
  return Object.values(attachments).some((attachment) => {
    if (!attachment || !(attachment.url || attachment.data)) return false;
    const rawLabel = getRealChecklistLabelFromSource(attachment);
    return resolveDocumentSemanticId(rawLabel) === docId;
  });
}

function resolveDocumentFieldValue(data, preferredPath, fallbackPaths = []) {
  return resolveSemanticFieldValue(data, preferredPath, fallbackPaths) || "";
}

function buildChecklistMap(formType, formData) {
  const staticDocs =
    formType === "linked" ? linkedPersonDocTypes : naturalPersonDocTypes;
  const docs = [...staticDocs, ...getDynamicDocTypes(formData)];
  const runtimeLabelMap = getChecklistRuntimeLabelMap(formData);

  return docs.reduce((acc, doc) => {
    const status = computeDocStatus(doc.id, doc, formData);
    acc[doc.id] = {
      id: doc.id,
      label: runtimeLabelMap.get(doc.id) || doc.label,
      status,
      checked:
        hasAttachment(formData, doc.id) ||
        status === DOCUMENT_STATUS.DELIVERED ||
        status === DOCUMENT_STATUS.VALIDATED,
    };
    return acc;
  }, {});
}

function buildDateInfo(value) {
  const raw = value || new Date().toISOString();
  const parts = splitDateParts(raw);
  const fallbackParts = splitDateParts(new Date().toISOString());
  return {
    raw,
    words: formatDateWords(raw),
    day: parts.day || fallbackParts.day,
    month: parts.month || fallbackParts.month,
    year: parts.year || fallbackParts.year,
  };
}

function normalizeArraySource(source) {
  if (Array.isArray(source)) return source;
  if (!source || typeof source !== "object") return [];
  return Object.values(source);
}

function extractArrayFromFlatPaths(data = {}, basePath, allowedFields = []) {
  if (!data || typeof data !== "object") return [];
  const itemsByIndex = new Map();
  const matcher = new RegExp(
    `(?:^|\\.)${basePath.replace(".", "\\.")}\\.(\\d+)\\.([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)$`,
  );

  Object.entries(data).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    const match = key.match(matcher);
    if (!match) return;
    const index = Number(match[1]);
    const field = match[2];
    if (!Number.isFinite(index) || !allowedFields.includes(field)) return;

    const current = itemsByIndex.get(index) || {};
    itemsByIndex.set(index, { ...current, [field]: value });
  });

  return Array.from(itemsByIndex.entries())
    .sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0])
    .map(([, item]) => item);
}

function pickFirstNonEmpty(...values) {
  for (const value of values) {
    if (value == null) continue;
    const text = String(value).trim();
    if (text !== "") return value;
  }
  return "";
}

function coerceNumber(val, fallback = 0) {
  if (val == null || val === "") return fallback;
  const n = Number(val);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : fallback;
}

function readAuthorizedField(item = {}, ...keys) {
  const containers = [
    item,
    item.fields || {},
    item.data || {},
    item.values || {},
    item.value || {},
    item.item || {},
    item.payload || {},
  ];

  const candidates = [];
  containers.forEach((container) => {
    keys.forEach((key) => {
      if (container && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(container, key)) {
        const raw = container[key];
        if (raw && typeof raw === "object" && "value" in raw) {
          candidates.push(raw.value);
        } else {
          candidates.push(raw);
        }
      }
    });
  });

  return pickFirstNonEmpty(...candidates);
}

function normalizeIndexedCollection(data = {}, config = {}) {
  const {
    structuredSource = () => [],
    flatBasePath = "",
    flatFields = [],
    mapItem = () => ({}),
    filterItem = null,
  } = config;

  const structured = normalizeArraySource(structuredSource(data));
  const fromFlat = flatBasePath
    ? extractArrayFromFlatPaths(data, flatBasePath, flatFields)
    : [];
  const rawLength = Math.max(structured.length, fromFlat.length);

  const items = Array.from({ length: rawLength }, (_, index) => {
    const structuredItem = structured[index] || {};
    const flatItem = fromFlat[index] || {};
    // Prioritize flat-path values when both sources exist.
    // During editing, structured items can contain empty strings that should not
    // overwrite the latest normalized values captured in flat paths.
    const mergedItem = { ...structuredItem, ...flatItem };
    return mapItem({
      data,
      index,
      structuredItem,
      flatItem,
      mergedItem,
    });
  });

  return typeof filterItem === "function"
    ? items.filter((item, index) => filterItem(item, index, data))
    : items;
}

function normalizeAuthorizedPeople(data = {}) {
  return normalizeIndexedCollection(data, {
    structuredSource: (source) =>
      source.authorizedPeople ||
      source.personasAutorizadas ||
      source.representative?.authorizedPeople ||
      source.principalAccount?.authorizedPeople ||
      [],
    flatBasePath: "authorizedPeople",
    flatFields: ["name", "role", "ci", "email"],
    mapItem: ({ mergedItem }) => ({
      name: readAuthorizedField(
        mergedItem,
        "name",
        "fullName",
        "nombre",
        "nombresApellidos",
        "nombres_apellidos",
      ),
      role: readAuthorizedField(
        mergedItem,
        "role",
        "cargo",
        "position",
        "funcion",
      ),
      ci: readAuthorizedField(
        mergedItem,
        "ci",
        "cedula",
        "identification",
        "id",
        "document",
      ),
      email: readAuthorizedField(
        mergedItem,
        "email",
        "mail",
        "correo",
        "emailAddress",
      ),
    }),
  });
}

const PERSONAL_REFERENCE_FAMILY_KEYWORDS = [
  "padre",
  "madre",
  "hermano",
  "hermana",
  "hermanos",
  "abuelo",
  "abuela",
  "hijo",
  "hija",
  "esposo",
  "esposa",
  "conyug",
  "pareja",
  "tio",
  "tia",
  "primo",
  "prima",
  "sobrino",
  "sobrina",
  "suegro",
  "suegra",
  "familia",
  "padres",
];

function normalizePersonalReferences(data = {}, representative = {}) {
  const repName = String(representative?.fullName || "").trim().toLowerCase();

  return normalizeIndexedCollection(data, {
    structuredSource: (source) =>
      source.personalReferences || source.referenciasPersonales || [],
    flatBasePath: "personalReferences",
    flatFields: [
      "name",
      "address",
      "activity",
      "conventionalPhone",
      "cellPhone",
      "relationship",
      "ci",
    ],
    mapItem: ({ mergedItem }) => ({
      name: pickFirstNonEmpty(
        mergedItem.name,
        mergedItem.fullName,
        mergedItem.nombre,
        mergedItem.nombresApellidos,
        mergedItem.nombreCompleto,
        "",
      ),
      address: pickFirstNonEmpty(
        mergedItem.address,
        mergedItem.direccion,
        mergedItem.homeAddress,
        "",
      ),
      activity: pickFirstNonEmpty(
        mergedItem.activity,
        mergedItem.actividad,
        mergedItem.occupation,
        "",
      ),
      conventionalPhone: pickFirstNonEmpty(
        mergedItem.conventionalPhone,
        mergedItem.phone,
        mergedItem.telefono,
        "",
      ),
      cellPhone: pickFirstNonEmpty(
        mergedItem.cellPhone,
        mergedItem.celular,
        mergedItem.cellphone,
        "",
      ),
      relationship: pickFirstNonEmpty(
        mergedItem.relationship,
        mergedItem.parentesco,
        mergedItem.relacion,
        "",
      ),
      ci: pickFirstNonEmpty(
        mergedItem.ci,
        mergedItem.cedula,
        mergedItem.identification,
        "",
      ),
    }),
    filterItem: (item) => {
      const rel = String(item.relationship || "").toLowerCase();
      for (const kw of PERSONAL_REFERENCE_FAMILY_KEYWORDS) {
        if (rel.includes(kw)) return false;
      }
      if (
        repName &&
        String(item.name || "").trim().toLowerCase() === repName
      ) {
        return false;
      }
      return true;
    },
  });
}

/**
 * deriveCommonFields - Normaliza y extrae campos comunes necesarios para las
 * plantillas DOCX a partir del `formData`.
 *
 * @param {Object} data - Estado del formulario
 * @returns {Object} Objeto con claves amigables para uso en plantillas
 */
function deriveCommonFields(data) {
  const business = data.business || data.businessToLink || {};
  const representative = data.representative || {};
  const principalAccount = data.principalAccount || {};
  const isLinked = data.formType === "linked";
  const declaration = data.dataDeclaration || {};
  const convenio = data.convenio || {};
  const sourceData = { ...(data || {}), convenio };
  // Normalize a business object that templates expect (english keys)
  const businessNormalized = {
    businessName:
      business.businessName || business.razonSocial || business.name || "",
    commercialActivity:
      business.commercialActivity || business.actividadComercial || "",
    businessAge: business.businessAge || business.age || "",
    ruc: business.ruc || "",
    province: business.province || "",
    city: business.city || "",
    commercialAddress: business.commercialAddress || business.direccion || "",
    phone: business.phone || "",
    electronicInvoiceEmail:
      business.electronicInvoiceEmail || business.email || "",
    billingContactName:
      business.billingContactName || business.billingContact || "",
    billingContactRole: business.billingContactRole || "",
    ownsBusinessPremise: Boolean(business.ownsBusinessPremise),
    rentedBusinessPremise: Boolean(business.rentedBusinessPremise),
    rentValue: business.rentValue || "",
    isNaturalPerson: Boolean(business.isNaturalPerson),
    isLegalEntity: Boolean(business.isLegalEntity),
  };

  const representativeNormalized = {
    fullName: representative.fullName || representative.nombreCompleto || "",
    ci: representative.ci || representative.cedula || "",
    nationality: representative.nationality || "",
    age: representative.age || "",
    maritalStatus: representative.maritalStatus || "",
    homeAddress: representative.homeAddress || representative.direccion || "",
    homePhone: representative.homePhone || "",
    cellPhone: representative.cellPhone || "",
    spouseName: representative.spouseName || "",
    spouseCi: representative.spouseCi || "",
    activity: representative.activity || "",
    spouseCellPhone: representative.spouseCellPhone || "",
    ownsHouse: Boolean(representative.ownsHouse),
    rentsHouse: Boolean(representative.rentsHouse),
    otherAssets: representative.otherAssets || "",
    appraisedValue: representative.appraisedValue || "",
    assetYear: representative.assetYear || "",
    rentValue: representative.rentValue || "",
  };

  const principalAccountNormalized = {
    principalFullName:
      principalAccount.principalFullName || principalAccount.fullName || "",
    principalCi: principalAccount.principalCi || principalAccount.ci || "",
    principalNationality: principalAccount.principalNationality || "",
    principalAge: coerceNumber(
      principalAccount.principalAge || principalAccount.age || null,
      0,
    ),
    principalHomeAddress:
      principalAccount.principalHomeAddress ||
      principalAccount.homeAddress ||
      "",
    principalHomePhone: principalAccount.principalHomePhone || "",
    principalCellPhone: principalAccount.principalCellPhone || "",
    principalRole: principalAccount.principalRole || "",
    principalSignature: principalAccount.principalSignature || "",
    principalAcceptsResponsibility: Boolean(
      principalAccount.principalAcceptsResponsibility,
    ),
    principalDeclaration: principalAccount.principalDeclaration || "",
  };

  const convenioNormalized = {
    clientDisplayName:
      convenio.clientDisplayName ||
      principalAccountNormalized.principalFullName ||
      representativeNormalized.fullName ||
      businessNormalized.businessName ||
      "",
    representedCompanyName:
      resolveSemanticFieldValue(
        sourceData,
        "convenio.representedCompanyName",
        [
          "businessToLink.businessName",
          "business.businessName",
          "businessToLink.razonSocial",
          "business.razonSocial",
          "businessToLink.name",
          "business.name",
        ],
        { family: "company" },
      ) ||
      convenio.representedCompanyName ||
      businessNormalized.businessName ||
      "",
    creditLineAmount: coerceNumber(convenio.creditLineAmount || null, 0),
    signerName: resolveDocumentFieldValue(sourceData, "convenio.signerName", [
      ...CONVENIO_SIGNER_NAME_SOURCE_PATHS,
    ]),
    signerCi: resolveDocumentFieldValue(sourceData, "convenio.signerCi", [
      ...CONVENIO_SIGNER_CI_SOURCE_PATHS,
    ]),
    signerAddress: resolveDocumentFieldValue(
      sourceData,
      "convenio.signerAddress",
      [...CONVENIO_SIGNER_ADDRESS_SOURCE_PATHS],
    ),
    signerCity: resolveDocumentFieldValue(sourceData, "convenio.signerCity", [
      ...CONVENIO_SIGNER_CITY_SOURCE_PATHS,
    ]),
    signerClientType:
      convenio.signerClientType ||
      (isLinked ? "Cliente vinculado" : "Cliente normal"),
  };

  const dataDeclarationNormalized = {
    companyName: resolveDocumentFieldValue(
      sourceData,
      "dataDeclaration.companyName",
      [...DATA_DECLARATION_COMPANY_NAME_SOURCE_PATHS],
    ),
    ruc: resolveDocumentFieldValue(sourceData, "dataDeclaration.ruc", [
      ...DATA_DECLARATION_RUC_SOURCE_PATHS,
    ]),
    legalRepresentative: resolveDocumentFieldValue(
      sourceData,
      "dataDeclaration.legalRepresentative",
      [...DATA_DECLARATION_REP_SOURCE_PATHS],
    ),
    signedDateText:
      declaration.signedDateText ||
      formatDateWords(data.currentDate || new Date().toISOString()),
  };

  // Add some commonly-used top-level aliases and numeric defaults
  businessNormalized.businessAge = coerceNumber(
    businessNormalized.businessAge || data.business?.age || null,
    0,
  );
  businessNormalized.rentValue = coerceNumber(
    businessNormalized.rentValue || data.business?.rentValue || null,
    0,
  );
  representativeNormalized.age = coerceNumber(
    representativeNormalized.age || data.representative?.age || null,
    0,
  );
  representativeNormalized.rentValue = coerceNumber(
    representativeNormalized.rentValue ||
      data.representative?.rentValue ||
      null,
    0,
  );
  representativeNormalized.appraisedValue = coerceNumber(
    representativeNormalized.appraisedValue ||
      data.representative?.appraisedValue ||
      null,
    0,
  );
  representativeNormalized.assetYear = coerceNumber(
    representativeNormalized.assetYear ||
      data.representative?.assetYear ||
      null,
    0,
  );

  // principalAccount fallbacks from guarantor or representative when missing
  principalAccountNormalized.principalFullName =
    principalAccountNormalized.principalFullName ||
    data.guarantor?.fullName ||
    representativeNormalized.fullName ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.principalCi =
    principalAccountNormalized.principalCi ||
    data.guarantor?.ci ||
    representativeNormalized.ci ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.principalNationality =
    principalAccountNormalized.principalNationality ||
    data.guarantor?.nationality ||
    representativeNormalized.nationality ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.principalAge = coerceNumber(
    principalAccountNormalized.principalAge ||
      data.guarantor?.age ||
      representativeNormalized.age ||
      null,
    0,
  );
  principalAccountNormalized.principalHomeAddress =
    principalAccountNormalized.principalHomeAddress ||
    data.guarantor?.homeAddress ||
    representativeNormalized.homeAddress ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.principalHomePhone =
    principalAccountNormalized.principalHomePhone ||
    data.guarantor?.homePhone ||
    representativeNormalized.homePhone ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.principalCellPhone =
    principalAccountNormalized.principalCellPhone ||
    data.guarantor?.cellPhone ||
    representativeNormalized.cellPhone ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.principalRole =
    principalAccountNormalized.principalRole ||
    data.guarantor?.relationship ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.principalMaritalStatus =
    principalAccountNormalized.principalMaritalStatus ||
    principalAccount.principalMaritalStatus ||
    data.guarantor?.maritalStatus ||
    representativeNormalized.maritalStatus ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.spouseName =
    principalAccount.spouseName || data.guarantor?.spouseName || "";
  principalAccountNormalized.spouseCi =
    principalAccount.spouseCi || data.guarantor?.spouseCi || "";
  // fallback to representative spouse info when available
  principalAccountNormalized.spouseName =
    principalAccountNormalized.spouseName ||
    representativeNormalized.spouseName ||
    representativeNormalized.fullName ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.spouseCi =
    principalAccountNormalized.spouseCi ||
    representativeNormalized.spouseCi ||
    representativeNormalized.ci ||
    "";

  // Principal account business-related fallbacks
  principalAccountNormalized.businessName =
    principalAccount.businessName ||
    principalAccountNormalized.businessName ||
    data.businessToLink?.businessName ||
    data.business?.businessName ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.commercialActivity =
    principalAccount.commercialActivity ||
    principalAccountNormalized.commercialActivity ||
    data.businessToLink?.commercialActivity ||
    data.business?.commercialActivity ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.businessAge = coerceNumber(
    principalAccount.businessAge ||
      principalAccount.age ||
      data.businessToLink?.businessAge ||
      data.business?.businessAge ||
      null,
    0,
  );
  principalAccountNormalized.ruc =
    principalAccount.ruc ||
    data.businessToLink?.ruc ||
    data.business?.ruc ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.province =
    principalAccount.province ||
    data.businessToLink?.province ||
    data.business?.province ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.city =
    principalAccount.city ||
    data.businessToLink?.city ||
    data.business?.city ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.commercialAddress =
    principalAccount.commercialAddress ||
    data.businessToLink?.commercialAddress ||
    data.business?.commercialAddress ||
    "";
  principalAccountNormalized.principalSignature =
    principalAccount.principalSignature ||
    data.principalSignature ||
    data.applicantSignatureName ||
    principalAccountNormalized.principalSignature ||
    "";

  return {
    currentDate: data.currentDate || new Date().toLocaleDateString("es-EC"),
    currentDateWords: formatDateWords(
      data.currentDate || new Date().toISOString(),
    ),
    applicantSignatureName:
      data.applicantSignatureName || representativeNormalized.fullName || "",
    applicantIdOrRuc:
      data.applicantIdOrRuc ||
      representativeNormalized.ci ||
      businessNormalized.ruc ||
      "",
    // English and Spanish aliases to improve robustness of templates
    business: businessNormalized,
    negocio: businessNormalized,
    businessToLink: data.businessToLink || businessNormalized,
    representative: representativeNormalized,
    representante: representativeNormalized,
    principalAccount: principalAccountNormalized,
    convenio: convenioNormalized,
    dataDeclaration: dataDeclarationNormalized,
  };
}

/**
 * mapDocumentData - Mapea el `formData` y `formType` a la estructura que
 * esperan los documentos identificados por `documentId`.
 *
 * @param {string} formType - Tipo de formulario ('natural'|'linked'...)
 * @param {Object} formData - Estado completo del formulario
 * @param {string} documentId - Identificador del documento a generar
 * @returns {Object} Datos mapeados listos para render en plantillas
 */
function mapDocumentData(formType, formData, documentId) {
  const common = deriveCommonFields({ ...(formData || {}), formType });
  const authorizedPeople = normalizeAuthorizedPeople(formData || {});
  const personalReferencesNormalized = normalizePersonalReferences(
    formData || {},
    common.representative || {},
  );

  const base = {
    formType,
    ...formData,
    ...common,
    referenciasComerciales: formData.commercialReferences || [],
    referenciasBancarias: formData.bankReferences || [],
    referenciasPersonales: personalReferencesNormalized,
    personasAutorizadas: authorizedPeople,
    motivosVinculacion: formData.motives || [],
    personalReferences: personalReferencesNormalized,
  };

  // Common top-level aliases used by some templates
  base.businessName = base.business?.businessName || base.businessName || "";
  base.ruc = base.business?.ruc || base.ruc || "";
  base.repFullName = base.representative?.fullName || base.repFullName || "";
  base.repCi = base.representative?.ci || base.repCi || "";
  base.notes =
    formData.notes ||
    formData.vendorOpinion?.comments ||
    formData.locationReference?.otherReferences ||
    base.notes ||
    "";
  base.groupName =
    formData.groupName ||
    formData.internalSegmentation?.segment ||
    base.groupName ||
    "";
  base.principalResponsibilityTextName =
    formData.principalResponsibilityTextName || "No aplica";
  base.principalResponsibilityDocument =
    formData.principalResponsibilityDocument || "No aplica";
  // Ensure guarantor address fallback from representative or guarantor homeAddress
  base.guarantor = base.guarantor || formData.guarantor || {};
  base.guarantor.address =
    base.guarantor.address ||
    formData.guarantor?.address ||
    formData.guarantor?.homeAddress ||
    base.representative?.homeAddress ||
    "";

  if (documentId === "convenio") {
    const signerFromPrincipal = formType === "linked";
    return {
      ...base,
      convenio: common.convenio,
      signerName: signerFromPrincipal
        ? common.convenio.signerName
        : common.representante.nombreCompleto,
      signerCi: signerFromPrincipal
        ? common.convenio.signerCi
        : common.representante.cedula,
      signerAddress: signerFromPrincipal
        ? common.convenio.signerAddress
        : common.representante.direccion,
      signerCity: common.convenio.signerCity,
      signerClientType: common.convenio.signerClientType,
    };
  }

  if (documentId === "declaracion") {
    return {
      ...base,
      dataDeclaration: common.dataDeclaration,
    };
  }

  return base;
}

export function mapHtmlTemplateData(formType, formData = {}, documentId) {
  const mapped = mapDocumentData(formType, formData, documentId);
  const currentDate = buildDateInfo(
    formData.currentDate || new Date().toISOString(),
  );
  const applicantDate = buildDateInfo(
    formData.applicantDate || formData.currentDate || new Date().toISOString(),
  );
  const convenioDate = buildDateInfo(
    formData.convenio?.signedDateText ||
      formData.currentDate ||
      new Date().toISOString(),
  );
  const declarationDate = buildDateInfo(
    formData.dataDeclaration?.signedDateText ||
      formData.currentDate ||
      new Date().toISOString(),
  );
  const isLinked = formType === "linked";

  const authorizedPeople = normalizeAuthorizedPeople(formData);

  return {
    ...mapped,
    meta: {
      formType,
      documentId,
      formTypeLabel: isLinked
        ? "Solicitud de Crédito clientes vinculados"
        : "Solicitud de Crédito normal",
    },
    flags: {
      isNatural: !isLinked,
      isLinked,
    },
    dates: {
      current: currentDate,
      applicant: applicantDate,
      convenio: convenioDate,
      declaration: declarationDate,
    },
    documentsChecklist: buildChecklistMap(formType, formData),
    arrays: {
      authorizedPeople,
      commercialReferences: formData.commercialReferences || [],
      bankReferences: formData.bankReferences || [],
      personalReferences: mapped.personalReferences || [],
      linkedMembers: formData.linkedMembers || [],
    },
    signatures: {
      applicantName:
        formData.applicantSignatureName ||
        mapped.representante?.nombreCompleto ||
        mapped.convenio?.signerName ||
        "",
      applicantIdOrRuc:
        formData.applicantIdOrRuc ||
        mapped.representante?.cedula ||
        mapped.negocio?.ruc ||
        "",
      applicantDate: applicantDate.raw,
      applicantDateDisplay: formData.applicantDate || currentDate.words,
      principalSignature: formData.principalAccount?.principalSignature || "",
    },
    motivations: {
      linkReason: formData.linkReason || "",
      groupName:
        formData.groupName || formData.internalSegmentation?.segment || "",
      otherExplanation:
        formData.otherExplanation ||
        formData.motivesOther ||
        formData.vendorOpinion?.comments ||
        "",
      principalIsGuarantor: !!formData.principalIsGuarantor,
      principalResponsibilityTextName:
        formData.principalResponsibilityTextName || "No aplica",
      principalResponsibilityDocument:
        formData.principalResponsibilityDocument || "No aplica",
    },
  };
}

import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { mapHtmlTemplateData } from "./documentMapper";

describe("mapHtmlTemplateData", () => {
  it("fills convenio and declaration fields from semantically similar aliases", () => {
    const formData = {
      business: {
        razonSocial: "INVERNEG S.A.",
        ruc: "0991535970001",
        city: "Guayaquil",
      },
      businessToLink: {
        name: "INVERNEG S.A.",
      },
      principalAccount: {
        nombreCompleto: "Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano",
        cedula: "0951535970",
        principalHomeAddress: "COOP LOS PARACAIDISTAS MZ#1195 SL#34",
        city: "Azogues",
        principalSignature: "Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano",
      },
      representative: {
        nombreCompleto: "Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano",
        cedula: "0951535970",
        direccion: "COOP LOS PARACAIDISTAS MZ#1195 SL#34",
        ciudad: "Azogues",
      },
      currentDate: "2026-04-07T00:00:00.000Z",
    };

    const mapped = mapHtmlTemplateData("linked", formData, "convenio");

    expect(mapped.convenio.representedCompanyName).toBe("INVERNEG S.A.");
    expect(mapped.convenio.clientDisplayName).toBe(
      "Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano",
    );
    expect(mapped.convenio.signerName).toBe(
      "Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano",
    );
    expect(mapped.convenio.signerCi).toBe("0951535970");
    expect(mapped.convenio.signerAddress).toBe(
      "COOP LOS PARACAIDISTAS MZ#1195 SL#34",
    );
    expect(mapped.convenio.signerCity).toBe("Azogues");
    expect(mapped.dataDeclaration.companyName).toBe("INVERNEG S.A.");
    expect(mapped.dataDeclaration.ruc).toBe("0991535970001");
    expect(mapped.dataDeclaration.legalRepresentative).toBe(
      "Jhonn Taylor Montenegro Arellano",
    );
    expect(mapped.dates.convenio.raw).toBe("2026-04-07T00:00:00.000Z");
  });
});

// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #57
// Ruta relativa: src/core/engines/formEngine/useFormEngine.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/core/engines/formEngine/useFormEngine.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 307
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { useState, useCallback, useMemo, useRef } from "react";
import { getInitialState } from "../../../domain/forms/state/formsStateModule";
import { getSectionsByFormType } from "../../../domain/forms/formsDomainModule";
import { validateForm, validateField } from "../validationEngine";
import { applyAutofills } from "../autofillEngine";
import {
  setValueByPath,
  updateArrayItem,
  addArrayItem,
  removeArrayItem,
} from "../../../shared/utils/common";

/**
 * useFormEngine - Core hook for managing form state, validation, autofill and
 * array operations used across the credit application form.
 *
 * @param {string} [initialFormType='natural'] - Initial form type: 'natural'|'linked'
 * @param {string} [initialRole='customer'] - Initial user role that may affect sections/visibility
 * @returns {Object} API for interacting with the form engine:
 *  - formType, role, formData, errors, sections, isDirty
 *  - handlers: switchFormType, switchRole, handleFieldChange
 *  - array helpers: handleArrayChange, handleArrayAdd, handleArrayRemove
 *  - triggerAutofill, validate, setFormData
 */
export function useFormEngine(
  initialFormType = "natural",
  initialRole = "customer",
) {
  const [formType, setFormType] = useState(initialFormType);
  const [role, setRole] = useState(initialRole);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState(() =>
    getInitialState(initialFormType),
  );
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false);
  const [dirtyFields, setDirtyFields] = useState({});

  // Sync sections with form type
  const sections = useMemo(
    () => getSectionsByFormType(formType, role),
    [formType, role],
  );
  // Hold debounce timers per-field to avoid running validation while typing
  const validationDebounceRef = useRef({});

  const markDirty = useCallback((paths) => {
    const nextPaths = Array.isArray(paths) ? paths : [paths];
    setIsDirty(true);
    setDirtyFields((prev) => {
      const next = { ...(prev || {}) };
      nextPaths
        .map((path) => String(path || "").trim())
        .filter(Boolean)
        .forEach((path) => {
          next[path] = true;
        });
      return next;
    });
  }, []);

  const runFieldValidation = useCallback((path, value, validationRules) => {
    const error = validateField(value, validationRules);
    setErrors((prev) => {
      const next = { ...(prev || {}) };
      if (error) next[path] = error;
      else delete next[path];
      return next;
    });
  }, []);

  const flushPendingValidations = useCallback(() => {
    const timers = validationDebounceRef.current || {};
    Object.keys(timers).forEach((k) => {
      const t = timers[k];
      if (t && t.fn) {
        try {
          t.fn();
        } catch {
          /* swallow */
        }
      }
      if (t && t.id) clearTimeout(t.id);
    });
    validationDebounceRef.current = {};
  }, []);

  /**
   * handleFieldChange - Update a single field value and run inline validation.
   * Also applies known side-effects (e.g. creating an attachments entry when
   * a principal signature is saved).
   *
   * @param {string} sectionPath - Path of the section (may be empty for top-level)
   * @param {string} fieldName - Field name within the section
   * @param {any} value - New value for the field
   */
  const handleFieldChange = useCallback(
    (sectionPath, fieldName, value) => {
      const fullPath = sectionPath ? `${sectionPath}.${fieldName}` : fieldName;
      let fieldDef = null;
      let sectionDef = null;

      sections.some((section) => {
        if (section.path === sectionPath || (!section.path && !sectionPath)) {
          fieldDef = section.fields.find((field) => field.name === fieldName);
          sectionDef = section;
          return !!fieldDef;
        }
        return false;
      });

      setFormData((prev) => {
        let nextState = setValueByPath(prev, fullPath, value);

        // Checkbox groups with single-selection mode behave like a semantic radio group.
        if (
          fieldDef?.type === "checkbox" &&
          fieldDef.selectionMode === "single" &&
          fieldDef.selectionGroup &&
          value === true
        ) {
          const siblingFields = (sectionDef?.fields || []).filter(
            (field) =>
              field.type === "checkbox" &&
              field.selectionGroup === fieldDef.selectionGroup &&
              field.name !== fieldName,
          );
          siblingFields.forEach((siblingField) => {
            const siblingPath = sectionPath
              ? `${sectionPath}.${siblingField.name}`
              : siblingField.name;
            nextState = setValueByPath(nextState, siblingPath, false);
          });
        }

        // If principal signature is saved, also create an attachments entry for the signed declaration
        if (fullPath === "principalAccount.principalSignature") {
          const attachments = { ...(nextState.attachments ?? undefined) };
          attachments.principal_declaration_signed = {
            data: value,
            name: "principal_declaration_signed.png",
          };
          nextState = { ...nextState, attachments };
        }
        // Logic for specific side effects can go here (like autofill triggers)
        return nextState;
      });

      markDirty(fullPath);

      // Real-time validation (debounced per-field to avoid layout thrash while typing)
      if (fieldDef) {
        // Clear any existing debounce for this field
        const existing = validationDebounceRef.current[fullPath];
        if (existing && existing.id) clearTimeout(existing.id);

        // Schedule a new validation run after quiet period
        const delay = 500; // ms
        const timerId = setTimeout(() => {
          try {
            runFieldValidation(fullPath, value, fieldDef.validation);
          } finally {
            // remove timer reference
            const t = validationDebounceRef.current || {};
            delete t[fullPath];
            validationDebounceRef.current = t;
          }
        }, delay);

        validationDebounceRef.current = {
          ...(validationDebounceRef.current || {}),
          [fullPath]: {
            id: timerId,
            fn: () => runFieldValidation(fullPath, value, fieldDef.validation),
          },
        };
      }
    },
    [sections, markDirty, runFieldValidation],
  );

  /**
   * handleArrayChange - Update a specific field of an item inside an array
   * located at `arrayPath` (dot-notation). Special-case: when `field` is
   * '__globalAttachments__' the payload will merge into the top-level
   * `attachments` object instead of editing an array item.
   *
   * @param {string} arrayPath - Dot-path to the array in formData
   * @param {number} index - Index of the array item to update
   * @param {string} field - Field name to update within the array item
   * @param {any} value - New value for the field
   */
  const handleArrayChange = useCallback((arrayPath, index, field, value) => {
    // Special case: global attachments from array member (field === '__globalAttachments__')
    if (field === "__globalAttachments__") {
      setFormData((prev) => {
        const attachments = { ...(prev.attachments ?? undefined) };
        // value expected to be an object mapping attachment keys to attachment objects
        Object.assign(attachments, value || {});
        return { ...prev, attachments };
      });
      markDirty("attachments");
      return;
    }

    setFormData((prev) =>
      updateArrayItem(prev, arrayPath, index, field, value),
    );
    markDirty(`${arrayPath}.${index}.${field}`);
  }, [markDirty]);

  /**
   * handleArrayAdd - Append a new item to an array inside formData.
   *
   * @param {string} arrayPath - Dot-path to the array
   * @param {Object} [emptyItem={}] - Item template to push
   */
  const handleArrayAdd = useCallback((arrayPath, emptyItem = {}) => {
    setFormData((prev) => addArrayItem(prev, arrayPath, emptyItem));
    markDirty(arrayPath);
  }, [markDirty]);

  /**
   * handleArrayRemove - Remove an item from an array inside formData.
   *
   * @param {string} arrayPath - Dot-path to the array
   * @param {number} index - Index to remove
   */
  const handleArrayRemove = useCallback((arrayPath, index) => {
    setFormData((prev) => removeArrayItem(prev, arrayPath, index));
    markDirty([arrayPath, `${arrayPath}.${index}`]);
  }, [markDirty]);

  /**
   * switchFormType - Change current form type and reset form state to the
   * default initial state for that type (clears errors and dirty flag).
   *
   * @param {string} type - New form type
   */
  const switchFormType = useCallback(
    (type) => {
      if (type === formType) return;
      const safeType = type === "linked" ? "linked" : "natural";
      setFormType(safeType);
      setFormData(getInitialState(safeType));
      setErrors({});
      setIsDirty(false);
      setDirtyFields({});
    },
    [formType],
  );

  /**
   * switchRole - Update the role used to compute sections/visibility. Does
   * not automatically reload formData (caller can decide to reset if needed).
   *
   * @param {string} r - New role identifier
   */
  const switchRole = useCallback((r) => {
    setRole(r);
  }, []);

  /**
   * triggerAutofill - Manually invoke autofill engines to populate derived
   * values based on the current formData.
   */
  const triggerAutofill = useCallback(() => {
    setFormData((prev) => applyAutofills(prev, true, { formType }));
  }, [formType]);

  /**
   * validate - Run full form validation against current `sections`.
   * Stores returned error map in state and returns boolean success.
   *
   * @returns {boolean} true if validation passed (no errors)
   */
  const validate = useCallback(
    (lockedFieldPaths = null) => {
      // Ensure any pending per-field debounced validations run before full validation
      flushPendingValidations();
      const newErrors = validateForm(formData, sections, lockedFieldPaths);
      setErrors(newErrors);
      return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
    },
    [formData, sections, flushPendingValidations],
  );

  return {
    formType,
    role,
    formData,
    errors,
    setErrors,
    sections,
    isDirty,
    dirtyFields,
    switchFormType,
    switchRole,
    handleFieldChange,
    handleArrayChange,
    handleArrayAdd,
    handleArrayRemove,
    triggerAutofill,
    validate,
    setFormData, // Advanced use
  };
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/core/engines/formEngine/useFormEngine.js ==========================

import { isVisible } from "../../../shared/utils/common";
import { shouldValidateTemplatedField } from "@/domain/forms/utils/templateSchemaUtils";

/**
 * FIELD_VALIDATION_MAP contains reusable logic for different field types.
 */
const FIELD_VALIDATION_MAP = {
  REQUIRED: (val) => {
    if (val === undefined || val === null || val === "")
      return "Este campo es obligatorio";
    if (Array.isArray(val) && val.length === 0)
      return "Seleccione al menos una opción";
    return null;
  },

  EMAIL: (val) => {
    if (!val) return null;
    const regex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
    return regex.test(val) ? null : "Correo electrónico inválido";
  },

  NUMERIC: (val) => {
    if (val === undefined || val === null || val === "") return null;
    if (typeof val === "number") return null;
    return /^\d+$/.test(String(val))
      ? null
      : "Solo se permiten números enteros";
  },
  NUMBER: (val) => {
    if (val === undefined || val === null || val === "") return null;
    if (typeof val === "number")
      return val >= 0 ? null : "Solo se permiten números positivos";
    // allow decimals with dot or comma, optional negative
    return /^-?\d+(?:[.,]\d+)?$/.test(String(val)) ? null : "Número inválido";
  },

  PHONE: (val) => {
    if (!val) return null;
    // Basic validation for LatAm phones (can be improved)
    return /^[0-9+\s-]{7,15}$/.test(val) ? null : "Número telefónico inválido";
  },
  CURRENCY: (val) => {
    if (val === undefined || val === null || val === "") return null;
    if (typeof val === "number")
      return val >= 0 ? null : "Monto no puede ser negativo";
    // Handle common formats: 1000, 1,000.00, $1000, $ 1,000.00, 1000.00
    const cleaned = String(val)
      .replaceAll(/^\$|\s/g, "")
      .replaceAll(",", "");
    return /^\d+(?:[.]\d{1,2})?$/.test(cleaned)
      ? null
      : "Formato de moneda inválido";
  },
  DATE: (val) => {
    if (!val) return null;
    const value = String(val).trim();
    // Accept ISO (yyyy-mm-dd) or local (dd/mm/yyyy)
    const iso = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/;
    const local = /^\d{2}\/\d{2}\/\d{4}$/;
    return iso.test(value) || local.test(value) ? null : "Fecha inválida";
  },
  YEAR: (val) => {
    if (!val) return null;
    return /^\d{4}$/.test(String(val)) ? null : "Año inválido";
  },

  CEDULA_ECUADOR: (val) => {
    if (!val) return null;
    if (val.length !== 10) return "Debe tener 10 dígitos";
    if (!/^\d+$/.test(val)) return "Solo números";

    // Algoritmo de validación de cédula ecuatoriana
    const provincia = Number.parseInt(val.substring(0, 2), 10);
    if (provincia < 1 || provincia > 24) return "Provincia inválida";

    const d3 = Number.parseInt(val.substring(2, 3), 10);
    if (d3 >= 6) return "Tercer dígito inválido";

    const ult = Number.parseInt(val.substring(9, 10), 10);
    let suma = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) {
      let digito = Number.parseInt(val.charAt(i), 10);
      if (i % 2 === 0) {
        digito *= 2;
        if (digito > 9) digito -= 9;
      }
      suma += digito;
    }
    const residuo = suma % 10;
    const verif = residuo === 0 ? 0 : 10 - residuo;
    return verif === ult ? null : "Cédula inválida";
  },

  RUC_ECUADOR: (val) => {
    if (!val) return null;
    if (val.length !== 13) return "Debe tener 13 dígitos";
    if (!val.endsWith("001")) return "Debe terminar en 001";

    // Validar los primeros 10 dígitos como cédula (simplificado para RUC PN)
    // Para RUC de personas jurídicas o extranjeros el algoritmo cambia,
    // pero para este MVP validaremos estructura básica y terminación.
    return /^\d+$/.test(val) ? null : "Solo números";
  },
};

/**
 * Validates a single value against field rules
 * @param {any} value - Value to validate
 * @param {Object} rules - Validation rules from schema
 * @returns {string|null} Error message or null
 */
export function validateField(value, rules = {}) {
  // Required
  if (rules.required) {
    const err = FIELD_VALIDATION_MAP.REQUIRED(value);
    if (err) return err;
  }

  // Pattern: either named pattern in FIELD_VALIDATION_MAP or a RegExp/string
  if (rules.pattern) {
    if (FIELD_VALIDATION_MAP[rules.pattern]) {
      const err = FIELD_VALIDATION_MAP[rules.pattern](value);
      if (err) return err;
    } else {
      try {
        const re =
          rules.pattern instanceof RegExp
            ? rules.pattern
            : new RegExp(rules.pattern);
        if (value && !re.test(String(value))) return "Formato inválido";
      } catch {
        // ignore invalid regex
      }
    }
  }

  // minLength / maxLength
  if (
    rules.minLength &&
    value != null &&
    String(value).length < rules.minLength
  ) {
    return `Mínimo ${rules.minLength} caracteres`;
  }
  if (
    rules.maxLength &&
    value != null &&
    String(value).length > rules.maxLength
  ) {
    return `Máximo ${rules.maxLength} caracteres`;
  }

  // Numeric min / max checks (for numeric values)
  if (
    (rules.min !== undefined || rules.max !== undefined) &&
    value !== undefined &&
    value !== null &&
    value !== ""
  ) {
    const asNumber =
      typeof value === "number"
        ? value
        : Number(String(value).replaceAll(/[^0-9.-]/g, ""));
    if (!Number.isNaN(asNumber)) {
      if (rules.min !== undefined && asNumber < rules.min)
        return `El valor debe ser mayor o igual a ${rules.min}`;
      if (rules.max !== undefined && asNumber > rules.max)
        return `El valor debe ser menor o igual a ${rules.max}`;
    }
  }

  // custom validator (function)
  if (rules.custom && typeof rules.custom === "function") {
    try {
      const res = rules.custom(value, rules._formData || undefined);
      if (typeof res === "string" && res) return res;
    } catch {
      return "Error en validación personalizada";
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function normalizePathSet(paths = null) {
  if (!paths) return new Set();
  if (paths instanceof Set) return paths;
  if (Array.isArray(paths)) {
    return new Set(
      paths.map((path) => String(path || "").trim()).filter(Boolean),
    );
  }
  if (typeof paths === "object") {
    return new Set(
      Object.entries(paths)
        .filter(([, value]) => Boolean(value))
        .map(([path]) => String(path || "").trim())
        .filter(Boolean),
    );
  }
  return new Set();
}

function isAutoCompletedPath(lockedFieldPaths, path) {
  if (!path) return false;
  const normalized = String(path).trim();
  if (!normalized) return false;
  return lockedFieldPaths instanceof Set && lockedFieldPaths.has(normalized);
}

function runFieldValidation(errors, hydratedFieldPaths, path, value, rules) {
  if (isAutoCompletedPath(hydratedFieldPaths, path)) return;
  const error = validateField(value, rules);
  if (error) errors[path] = error;
}

/**
 * Validates whole form data against schema
 * @param {Object} data - Form state
 * @param {Array} sections - Current schema sections
 * @returns {Object} Map of path -> error message
 */
export function validateForm(data, sections, lockedFieldPaths = null) {
  const errors = {};
  const hydratedFieldPaths = normalizePathSet(lockedFieldPaths);
  // helper to check visibility
  sections.forEach((section) => {
    if (section?.templateConfig?.visible === false) return;
    // If section-level visibleWhen hides the entire section, skip
    if (
      section.visibleWhen &&
      !isVisible(section.visibleWhen, data, section.path)
    )
      return;

    section.fields.forEach((field) => {
      if (!shouldValidateTemplatedField(field, data, section.path)) return;
      // field-level visibility
      if (
        field.visibleWhen &&
        !isVisible(field.visibleWhen, data, section.path)
      )
        return;

      const path = section.path ? `${section.path}.${field.name}` : field.name;
      const value = section.path
        ? data[section.path]?.[field.name]
        : data[field.name];

      if (isAutoCompletedPath(hydratedFieldPaths, path)) {
        return;
      }

      // Compose validation rules and attach formData for custom validators
      const rules = { ...(field.validation || {}) };
      rules._formData = data;

      if (field.type === "array") {
        const minItems = Number(
          rules.minItems ??
            field?.fieldConfig?.minItems ??
            field?.minItems ??
            0,
        );
        const items = Array.isArray(value) ? value : [];
        if (minItems > 0 && items.length < minItems) {
          errors[path] = `Debe ingresar al menos ${minItems} registro(s)`;
        }
      }

      runFieldValidation(errors, hydratedFieldPaths, path, value, rules);

      // Handle array items
      if (field.type === "array" && Array.isArray(value)) {
        value.forEach((item, index) => {
          field.fields.forEach((subField) => {
            // For subfield visibility, provide array item path as sectionPath
            if (
              subField.visibleWhen &&
              !isVisible(
                subField.visibleWhen,
                data,
                `${section.path ? section.path + "." : ""}${field.name}.${index}`,
              )
            )
              return;
            const subPath = `${path}.${index}.${subField.name}`;
            const subRules = { ...(subField.validation || {}) };
            subRules._formData = data;
            runFieldValidation(
              errors,
              hydratedFieldPaths,
              subPath,
              item[subField.name],
              subRules,
            );
          });
        });
      }
    });
  });

  return errors;
}

const CREDIT_APPROVAL_DECISIONS = Object.freeze({
  approved: 'approved',
  denied: 'denied',
});

const EXPRESS_SCORE_MIN = 500;
const EXPRESS_MAX_PRELIMINARY_AMOUNT = 1000;

const PROMISSORY_THRESHOLDS = Object.freeze({
  wholesaler: 40000,
  default: 25000,
});

const CREDIT_APPROVAL_RULES = Object.freeze({
  approved: [
    { path: 'approvedAmount', message: 'Monto aprobado requerido' },
    { path: 'approvalTerm', message: 'Plazo requerido' },
    { path: 'approvalRequirements', message: 'Requisitos requeridos' },
  ],
  denied: [
    {
      path: 'approvalObservations',
      message: 'Motivo / observaciones requeridas para negar',
    },
  ],
});

import { isNil, parseNumber, isWholesalerClient } from '@/domain/forms/utils/formUtils';

function getBusinessAge(formData = {}) {
  const naturalAge = parseNumber(formData?.business?.businessAge);
  if (Number.isFinite(naturalAge)) return naturalAge;

  const linkedAge = parseNumber(formData?.businessToLink?.businessAge);
  if (Number.isFinite(linkedAge)) return linkedAge;

  return null;
}

function getPromissoryThreshold(formData = {}) {
  return isWholesalerClient(formData) ? PROMISSORY_THRESHOLDS.wholesaler : PROMISSORY_THRESHOLDS.default;
}

function getCreditAmount(formData = {}) {
  const convenio = formData?.convenio || {};
  return parseNumber(
    convenio.creditLineAmount
    || convenio.creditAmount
    || formData?.creditDepartment?.amount,
  );
}

function isFilled(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.length > 0;
  if (typeof value === 'string') return value.trim() !== '';
  return !isNil(value) && value !== '';
}

function getValueByPath(source = {}, path = '') {
  return String(path || '')
    .split('.')
    .reduce((acc, key) => (acc && typeof acc === 'object' ? acc[key] : undefined), source);
}

function evaluateDecisionRules(decision, payload = {}) {
  const rules = CREDIT_APPROVAL_RULES[decision] || [];
  const errors = {};
  rules.forEach((rule) => {
    if (!isFilled(getValueByPath(payload, rule.path))) {
      errors[rule.path] = rule.message;
    }
  });
  return errors;
}

export function validateCreditApproval(creditDept = {}) {
  const decision = creditDept.approvalDecision;
  if (!decision || !Object.values(CREDIT_APPROVAL_DECISIONS).includes(decision)) {
    return {
      valid: false,
      errors: { approvalDecision: 'Decisión inválida (aprobado / negado requerido)' },
    };
  }

  const errors = evaluateDecisionRules(decision, creditDept);

  return { valid: Object.keys(errors).length === 0, errors };
}

export function evaluateExpressCredit(formData = {}, buroScore = null) {
  const businessAge = getBusinessAge(formData);
  const isNewClient = !Number.isFinite(businessAge) || businessAge <= 1;

  if (!isNewClient) {
    return { eligible: false, montoPreliminar: 0, reason: 'Cliente no es nuevo' };
  }

  if (isNil(buroScore)) {
    return { eligible: false, montoPreliminar: 0, reason: 'Score de buró no proporcionado' };
  }

  const score = parseNumber(buroScore);
  if (!Number.isFinite(score)) {
    return { eligible: false, montoPreliminar: 0, reason: 'Score inválido' };
  }

  if (score < EXPRESS_SCORE_MIN) {
    return { eligible: false, montoPreliminar: 0, reason: 'Score insuficiente (< 500)' };
  }

  return {
    eligible: true,
    montoPreliminar: EXPRESS_MAX_PRELIMINARY_AMOUNT,
    reason: 'Elegible para crédito exprés preliminar',
  };
}

export function evaluatePromissoryNoteRequirement(formData = {}) {
  const creditAmount = getCreditAmount(formData);
  const threshold = getPromissoryThreshold(formData);

  const backoffice = formData?.creditDepartment || {};
  const exempted = Boolean(backoffice.pagareExempted);
  const exemptionReason = backoffice.pagareExemptionReason || null;

  if (exempted) {
    return {
      applies: false, evaluation: false, required: false,
      exempted: true, reason: exemptionReason, threshold,
    };
  }

  if (!Number.isFinite(creditAmount) || creditAmount <= 0) {
    return {
      applies: false, evaluation: false, required: false,
      exempted: false, reason: 'Monto no especificado', threshold,
    };
  }

  if (creditAmount > threshold) {
    return {
      applies: true, evaluation: true, required: false,
      exempted: false, reason: `Monto ${creditAmount} sobre umbral ${threshold}`,
      amount: creditAmount, threshold,
    };
  }

  return {
    applies: false, evaluation: false, required: false,
    exempted: false, reason: `Monto ${creditAmount} dentro de umbral ${threshold}`,
    amount: creditAmount, threshold,
  };
}

export function createApprovalLogEntry(action, details = {}) {
  return { action, timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), details };
}

export const creditPolicyConstants = Object.freeze({
  CREDIT_APPROVAL_DECISIONS,
  EXPRESS_SCORE_MIN,
  EXPRESS_MAX_PRELIMINARY_AMOUNT,
  PROMISSORY_THRESHOLDS,
});


// ========================== FIN DE src/domain/forms/rules/creditPolicyRules.js ==========================

import { evaluatePromissoryNoteRequirement } from "./creditPolicyRules.js";
import { getAvailableDocumentDefinitions } from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import {
  normalizeWorkflowFlag,
  resolveWorkflowFileTypeId,
} from "@/shared/utils/workflowFileTypes";

export const DOCUMENT_STATUS = Object.freeze({
  NO_REQUIRED: "no_required",
  REQUIRED: "required",
  EVALUATION: "evaluation",
  DELIVERED: "delivered",
  VALIDATED: "validated",
  REJECTED: "rejected",
});

const REQUIRED_DOCS_BY_FORM_TYPE = Object.freeze({
  natural: new Set(["solicitud", "convenio"]),
  linked: new Set(["solicitud", "convenio", "declaracion"]),
});

function normalizeDocRuleConfig(docDef = {}) {
  const template = docDef.template || docDef.templateConfig || {};
  return {
    ...docDef,
    rule: docDef.rule || template.rule || "optional",
    visibility: docDef.visibility || template.visibility || null,
    conditions: docDef.conditions || template.conditions || null,
  };
}

function getDocumentDefinitions(formType = "natural") {
  const docs = getAvailableDocumentDefinitions(formType).map((d) =>
    normalizeDocRuleConfig({ ...d }),
  );
  const requiredDocs = REQUIRED_DOCS_BY_FORM_TYPE[formType] || new Set();
  return docs.map((doc) => ({
    ...doc,
    rule: requiredDocs.has(doc.id) ? "required" : doc.rule,
  }));
}

function getValueByPath(obj = {}, path = "") {
  return String(path || "")
    .split(".")
    .reduce(
      (acc, key) => (acc && typeof acc === "object" ? acc[key] : undefined),
      obj,
    );
}

function matchesCondition(condition = {}, formData = {}) {
  if (typeof condition === "function") return Boolean(condition(formData));
  if (!condition || typeof condition !== "object") return true;
  const targetValue = condition.path
    ? getValueByPath(formData, condition.path)
    : getValueByPath(formData, condition.field || "");
  if (Object.hasOwn(condition, "equals"))
    return targetValue === condition.equals;
  if (Object.hasOwn(condition, "notEquals"))
    return targetValue !== condition.notEquals;
  if (Object.hasOwn(condition, "includes")) {
    if (!targetValue) return false;
    if (Array.isArray(targetValue))
      return targetValue.includes(condition.includes);
    return String(targetValue).includes(condition.includes);
  }
  return Boolean(targetValue);
}

function matchesConditionalRule(rule, formData = {}) {
  if (!rule) return true;
  if (typeof rule === "function") return Boolean(rule(formData));
  if (typeof rule !== "object") return true;

  const conditions = Array.isArray(rule.conditions)
    ? rule.conditions
    : rule.conditions
      ? [rule.conditions]
      : [];
  if (
    conditions.length &&
    !conditions.every((condition) => matchesCondition(condition, formData))
  ) {
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}

function isDocumentTemplatedVisible(docDef = {}, formData = {}) {
  const visibility = docDef?.visibility || {};
  if (visibility.visible === false) return false;
  if (visibility.when) return matchesCondition(visibility.when, formData);
  if (visibility.conditions) {
    const conditions = Array.isArray(visibility.conditions)
      ? visibility.conditions
      : [visibility.conditions];
    return conditions.every((condition) =>
      matchesCondition(condition, formData),
    );
  }
  return true;
}

export function isDocApplicable(rule, formData) {
  if (typeof rule === "object") {
    return matchesConditionalRule(rule, formData);
  }
  if (
    !rule ||
    rule === "required" ||
    rule === "evaluation" ||
    rule === "optional"
  )
    return true;

  if (rule.startsWith("conditional:")) {
    const key = rule.split(":")[1];
    switch (key) {
      case "spouse":
        return (
          String(
            formData?.representative?.maritalStatus || "",
          ).toLowerCase() === "casado"
        );
      case "guarantor":
        return !!(
          formData.guarantor &&
          (formData.guarantor.fullName || formData.guarantor.ci)
        );
      case "guarantorSpouse":
        return !!formData.guarantor?.spouseName;
      default:
        return true;
    }
  }

  return true;
}

export function computeDocStatus(docId, docDef, formData = {}) {
  const attachments = formData.attachments || {};
  const meta =
    (formData.attachmentsMeta && formData.attachmentsMeta[docId]) || {};
  const normalizedDoc = normalizeDocRuleConfig(docDef);

  if (meta.status) {
    switch (meta.status) {
      case "delivered":
        return DOCUMENT_STATUS.DELIVERED;
      case "validated":
        return DOCUMENT_STATUS.VALIDATED;
      case "rejected":
        return DOCUMENT_STATUS.REJECTED;
      case "evaluation":
        return DOCUMENT_STATUS.EVALUATION;
      case "required":
        return DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED;
      case "no_required":
        return DOCUMENT_STATUS.NO_REQUIRED;
      default:
        break;
    }
  }

  if (
    attachments[docId] &&
    (attachments[docId].url || attachments[docId].data)
  ) {
    return DOCUMENT_STATUS.DELIVERED;
  }

  if (!isDocumentTemplatedVisible(normalizedDoc, formData)) {
    return DOCUMENT_STATUS.NO_REQUIRED;
  }

  if (docId === "pagare") {
    const res = evaluatePromissoryNoteRequirement(formData);
    if (res.exempted) return DOCUMENT_STATUS.NO_REQUIRED;
    if (res.evaluation) return DOCUMENT_STATUS.EVALUATION;
    if (res.required) return DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED;
  }

  const rule = normalizedDoc?.rule || "optional";
  if (rule === "required") return DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED;
  if (rule === "evaluation") return DOCUMENT_STATUS.EVALUATION;
  if (rule === "optional") return DOCUMENT_STATUS.NO_REQUIRED;

  if (rule && rule.startsWith("conditional:")) {
    const applies = isDocApplicable(rule, formData);
    return applies ? DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED : DOCUMENT_STATUS.NO_REQUIRED;
  }

  if (typeof rule === "object" && rule.conditions) {
    const applies = isDocApplicable(rule, formData);
    return applies ? DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED : DOCUMENT_STATUS.NO_REQUIRED;
  }

  return DOCUMENT_STATUS.NO_REQUIRED;
}

export function canClientSeeStatus(status) {
  return [DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED, DOCUMENT_STATUS.DELIVERED].includes(status);
}

export function visibleStatusForRole(status, role = "customer") {
  if (role === "customer") {
    if (status === DOCUMENT_STATUS.DELIVERED) return DOCUMENT_STATUS.DELIVERED;
    if (status === DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED) return DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED;
    if (
      [
        DOCUMENT_STATUS.EVALUATION,
        DOCUMENT_STATUS.VALIDATED,
        DOCUMENT_STATUS.REJECTED,
      ].includes(status)
    ) {
      return DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED;
    }
    return DOCUMENT_STATUS.NO_REQUIRED;
  }
  return status;
}

export function getDynamicDocTypes(formData) {
  const extras = [];
  if (!formData) return extras;

  if (formData.linkReason === "grupo_empresarial") {
    extras.push({
      id: "group_accreditation",
      label: "Documento que acredite Grupo Empresarial",
      rule: "required",
      dynamic: true,
    });
  }

  if (formData.linkReason === "nuevo_ruc") {
    extras.push({
      id: "principal_guarantee_declaration",
      label: "Declaración del deudor principal como garante",
      rule: "required",
      dynamic: true,
    });
  }

  if (formData.principalAccount?.principalAcceptsResponsibility) {
    extras.push({
      id: "principal_declaration_signed",
      label: "Declaración firmada del cliente principal",
      rule: "required",
      dynamic: true,
    });
  }

  const members = formData.linkedMembers ?? [];
  for (let idx = 0; idx < members.length; idx++) {
    const m = members[idx];
    if (m?.isLegalEntity) {
      extras.push(
        {
          id: `escritura_linked_${idx}`,
          label: `Escritura pública (miembro ${idx + 1})`,
          rule: "required",
          dynamic: true,
        },
        {
          id: `nombramiento_linked_${idx}`,
          label: `Nombramiento representante (miembro ${idx + 1})`,
          rule: "required",
          dynamic: true,
        },
      );
    }
  }

  return extras;
}

export async function getAllDocsForForm(formType, formData = {}) {
  const base = getDocumentDefinitions(formType, formData);
  const dynamic = getDynamicDocTypes(formData) || [];
  return [...base, ...dynamic];
}

export function getAllDocsForFormSync(formType, formData = {}) {
  return getDynamicDocTypes(formData);
}

export function mapWorkflowFilesToDocTypes(workflowFiles = []) {
  const map = new Map();
  workflowFiles.forEach((file) => {
    if (!file) return;
    const id = resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(file, { allowIdFallback: true });
    if (!id || map.has(id)) return;
    map.set(id, {
      id,
      label: file.fileTypeName || file.name || "Documento requerido",
      rule: normalizeWorkflowFlag(file.isRequired) ? "required" : "optional",
      dynamic: false,
      source: "workflow",
      workflowMeta: {
        documentId: file.documentId || null,
        folderId: file.folderId || null,
        fileId: file.fileId || null,
        stepId: file.stepId || null,
        executionId: file.executionId || null,
        fileTypeId: id,
        requiresSignature: normalizeWorkflowFlag(file.requiresSignature),
      },
    });
  });
  return Array.from(map.values());
}

function normalizeDocLabel(value) {
  return String(value || "")
    .normalize("NFD")
    .replaceAll(/\p{Diacritic}/gu, "")
    .toLowerCase()
    .trim();
}

// Label-pattern → form-condition rules for dynamically filtering docTypes by formData.
// Matches workflow (API) docTypes whose IDs are GUIDs but whose names follow known patterns.
const WORKFLOW_DOC_LABEL_CONDITIONS = [
  // "COPIA A COLOR DE LA ESPOSA(O)" / "copia a color de cédula del cónyuge del deudor"
  {
    test: (label) =>
      label.includes("esposa") ||
      (label.includes("conyuge") && !label.includes("garante")),
    condition: (formData) =>
      String(formData?.representative?.maritalStatus || "").toLowerCase() ===
      "casado",
  },
  // "copia de cédula del cónyuge del garante"
  {
    test: (label) =>
      label.includes("garante") &&
      (label.includes("conyuge") || label.includes("conyugue")),
    condition: (formData) => !!formData?.guarantor?.spouseName,
  },
  // "copia de cédula de garante" (without cónyuge)
  {
    test: (label) =>
      label.includes("garante") &&
      !label.includes("conyuge") &&
      !label.includes("conyugue"),
    condition: (formData) =>
      !!(
        formData?.guarantor &&
        (formData.guarantor.fullName || formData.guarantor.ci)
      ),
  },
];

export function isDocTypeVisibleForFormData(docType, formData) {
  if (!formData || !docType) return true;

  // Rule-based check takes priority (for static docTypes with 'conditional:*' rules)
  const rule = docType?.rule;
  if (rule && typeof rule === "string" && rule.startsWith("conditional:")) {
    return isDocApplicable(rule, formData);
  }

  // Label-based check for workflow (API) docTypes whose rule is 'required'/'optional'
  const rawLabel =
    docType?.label || docType?.fileTypeName || docType?.name || "";
  const label = normalizeDocLabel(rawLabel);
  if (!label) return true;

  for (const entry of WORKFLOW_DOC_LABEL_CONDITIONS) {
    if (entry.test(label)) {
      return Boolean(entry.condition(formData));
    }
  }

  return true;
}

export function filterDocTypesByFormData(docTypes, formData) {
  if (!formData || !Array.isArray(docTypes)) return docTypes || [];
  return docTypes.filter((dt) => isDocTypeVisibleForFormData(dt, formData));
}

export function isTransitionAllowed(
  currentStatus,
  nextStatus,
  role = "customer",
) {
  if (role === "customer") {
    return (
      nextStatus === "delivered" ||
      nextStatus === "required" ||
      nextStatus === "no_required"
    );
  }
  return true;
}

export function checkRequiredDocuments(formData, sections) {
  const errors = [];

  const attachmentField = sections
    ?.flatMap((s) => s.fields || [])
    .find((f) => f.type === "attachments");
  if (!attachmentField) return { ok: true, errors };

  const staticDocs = attachmentField.docTypes || [];
  const dynamicDocs = getDynamicDocTypes(formData);
  const docs = [...staticDocs, ...dynamicDocs];

  docs.forEach((d) => {
    if (d.id === "pagare") {
      const ev = evaluatePromissoryNoteRequirement(formData);
      if (ev.exempted) return;
      if (ev.evaluation) return;
    }

    const status = computeDocStatus(d.id, d, formData);
    if (status === DOCUMENT_STATUS.REQUIRED) {
      const attachments = formData.attachments || {};
      const hasAttachment = !!(
        attachments[d.id] &&
        (attachments[d.id].url || attachments[d.id].data)
      );
      const satisfiedBySignature =
        d.id === "principal_declaration_signed" &&
        !!(
          formData.principalAccount &&
          formData.principalAccount.principalSignature
        );

      if (!(hasAttachment || satisfiedBySignature)) {
        if (d.id === "cedula_garante" || d.id === "cedula_conyuge_garante") {
          const hasGuarantor = !!(
            formData.guarantor &&
            (formData.guarantor.fullName || formData.guarantor.ci)
          );
          if (!hasGuarantor) return;
        }
        errors.push({
          id: d.id,
          label: d.label,
          reason: "Documento requerido no entregado",
        });
      }
    }
  });

  return { ok: errors.length === 0, errors };
}

import { getCurrentIsoDate, deepClone } from '@/domain/forms/utils/formUtils';

const FORM_TYPES = Object.freeze({ NATURAL: 'natural', LINKED: 'linked' });

function createBaseState(dateProvider = getCurrentIsoDate) {
  return {
    applicantSignatureName: '', applicantIdOrRuc: '', applicantDate: dateProvider(),
    attachments: {}, attachmentsMeta: {},
  };
}

function createNaturalState(dateProvider = getCurrentIsoDate) {
  return {
    ...createBaseState(dateProvider),
    business: { businessName: '', commercialActivity: '', businessAge: '', ruc: '', province: '', city: '', commercialAddress: '', electronicInvoiceEmail: '', phone: '', billingContactName: '', billingContactRole: '', ownsBusinessPremise: false, rentedBusinessPremise: false, rentValue: '', isNaturalPerson: true, isLegalEntity: false },
    representative: { fullName: '', ci: '', nationality: '', age: '', maritalStatus: '', homeAddress: '', homePhone: '', cellPhone: '', spouseName: '', spouseCi: '', activity: '', spouseCellPhone: '', ownsHouse: false, rentsHouse: false, otherAssets: '', appraisedValue: '', assetYear: '', rentValue: '' },
    authorizedPeople: [],
    locationReference: { secondaryStreet: '', sector: '', otherReferences: '' },
    guarantor: { fullName: '', ci: '', nationality: '', age: '', maritalStatus: '', address: '', homePhone: '', cellPhone: '', email: '', relationship: '', activity: '' },
    collectionContact: { name: '', role: '', directPhone: '', email: '' },
    commercialReferences: [], bankReferences: [], personalReferences: [],
    clientClassification: '',
    convenio: { clientDisplayName: '', representedCompanyName: '', creditLineAmount: '' },
  };
}

function createLinkedState(dateProvider = getCurrentIsoDate) {
  return {
    ...createBaseState(dateProvider),
    businessToLink: { businessName: '', commercialActivity: '', ruc: '', province: '', city: '', commercialAddress: '', phone: '' },
    representative: { fullName: '', ci: '', nationality: '', age: '', maritalStatus: '', homeAddress: '', homePhone: '', cellPhone: '', activity: '' },
    guarantor: { fullName: '', ci: '', spouseName: '' },
    linkReason: '', groupName: '', otherExplanation: '', principalIsGuarantor: false,
    principalAccount: { businessName: '', commercialActivity: '', businessAge: '', ruc: '', province: '', city: '', commercialAddress: '', principalFullName: '', principalNationality: '', principalAge: '', principalMaritalStatus: '', principalCi: '', principalHomeAddress: '', principalHomePhone: '', principalCellPhone: '', spouseName: '', spouseCi: '', principalRole: '', principalAcceptsResponsibility: false, principalDeclaration: '', principalSignature: '' },
    linkedMembers: [],
    authorizedPeople: [],
    collectionContact: { name: '', role: '', directPhone: '', email: '' },
    locationReference: { secondaryStreet: '', sector: '', otherReferences: '' },
    principalResponsibilityTextName: '', principalResponsibilityDocument: '', clientClassification: '',
    commercialReferences: [], bankReferences: [], personalReferences: [],
    convenio: { clientDisplayName: '', representedCompanyName: '', creditLineAmount: '', signerName: '', signerCi: '', signerAddress: '', signerCity: '', signerClientType: '' },
    dataDeclaration: { companyName: '', ruc: '', legalRepresentative: '', signedDateText: '' },
  };
}

const FACTORIES = Object.freeze({ [FORM_TYPES.NATURAL]: createNaturalState, [FORM_TYPES.LINKED]: createLinkedState });

export function getInitialState(formType = FORM_TYPES.NATURAL, options = {}) {
  const { dateProvider = getCurrentIsoDate } = options;
  const factory = FACTORIES[formType] || FACTORIES[FORM_TYPES.NATURAL];
  return deepClone(factory(dateProvider));
}

// Common utilities used across form rules and state modules
export function isNil(value) {
  return value === null || value === undefined;
}

export function parseNumber(value) {
  if (isNil(value)) return NaN;
  if (typeof value === "number") return value;

  const parsed = parseFloat(String(value).replace(/[^0-9.-]/g, ""));
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : NaN;
}

export function getCurrentIsoDate() {
  return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

export function deepClone(value) {
  if (typeof globalThis.structuredClone === "function") {
    return globalThis.structuredClone(value);
  }
  return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value));
}

export function normalizeClassification(formData = {}) {
  return String(
    formData?.clientClassification ||
      formData?.business?.clientClassification ||
      "",
  ).toLowerCase();
}

export function isWholesalerClient(formData = {}) {
  const classification = normalizeClassification(formData);
  return classification === "mayoristas" || classification.includes("mayor");
}

// ARCHIVO #64

// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/domain/forms/utils/templateSchemaUtils.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 567
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
