import { isVisible } from "@/shared/utils/common";

function safeParseJson(value) {
  if (!value) return null;
  if (typeof value === "object") return value;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(String(value));
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export function normalizeTemplateConfig(template = null) {
  const parsed = safeParseJson(template) || {};
  if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== "object") return {};
  const ui = parsed.ui && typeof parsed.ui === "object" ? parsed.ui : {};
  const validation =
    parsed.validation && typeof parsed.validation === "object"
      ? parsed.validation
      : {};
  return {
    ...parsed,
    ui,
    validation,
    visible:
      parsed.visible === undefined ? undefined : Boolean(parsed.visible),
    validate:
      parsed.validate === undefined ? undefined : Boolean(parsed.validate),
    required:
      parsed.required === undefined ? undefined : Boolean(parsed.required),
  };
}

function resolvePlaceholder(baseField = {}, template = {}, fieldConfig = {}) {
  const uiPlaceholder = template?.ui?.placeholder;
  return (
    fieldConfig.placeholder ??
    template.placeholder ??
    uiPlaceholder?.visible ??
    baseField.placeholder ??
    ""
  );
}

function resolveVisibleWhen(baseField = {}, template = {}, fieldConfig = {}) {
  return (
    fieldConfig.visibleWhen ??
    template.visibleWhen ??
    baseField.visibleWhen ??
    null
  );
}

function resolveHiddenWhen(baseField = {}, template = {}, fieldConfig = {}) {
  return (
    fieldConfig.hiddenWhen ??
    template.hiddenWhen ??
    baseField.hiddenWhen ??
    null
  );
}

function resolveValidation(baseField = {}, template = {}, fieldConfig = {}) {
  const validation = {
    ...(baseField.validation || {}),
    ...(template.validation || {}),
    ...(fieldConfig.validation || {}),
  };

  if (template.required !== undefined && validation.required === undefined) {
    validation.required = template.required;
  }
  if (fieldConfig.required !== undefined && validation.required === undefined) {
    validation.required = fieldConfig.required;
  }

  return validation;
}

export function mergeFieldTemplate(baseField = {}, fieldConfig = {}) {
  const template = normalizeTemplateConfig(
    fieldConfig.template ?? fieldConfig.templateConfig ?? fieldConfig.templateJson,
  );

  const merged = {
    ...baseField,
    ...fieldConfig,
    placeholder: resolvePlaceholder(baseField, template, fieldConfig),
    validation: resolveValidation(baseField, template, fieldConfig),
    visibleWhen: resolveVisibleWhen(baseField, template, fieldConfig),
    hiddenWhen: resolveHiddenWhen(baseField, template, fieldConfig),
    templateConfig: template,
  };

  if (template.visible !== undefined && fieldConfig.visible === undefined) {
    merged.visible = template.visible;
  }
  if (template.validate !== undefined && fieldConfig.validate === undefined) {
    merged.validate = template.validate;
  }
  if (template.skipValidation === true) {
    merged.skipValidation = true;
  }

  return merged;
}

export function mergeSectionTemplate(baseSection = {}, sectionConfig = {}) {
  const template = normalizeTemplateConfig(
    sectionConfig.template ?? sectionConfig.templateConfig ?? sectionConfig.templateJson,
  );
  return {
    ...baseSection,
    ...sectionConfig,
    visibleWhen:
      sectionConfig.visibleWhen ?? template.visibleWhen ?? baseSection.visibleWhen ?? null,
    hiddenWhen:
      sectionConfig.hiddenWhen ?? template.hiddenWhen ?? baseSection.hiddenWhen ?? null,
    templateConfig: template,
  };
}

function normalizeTemplateOp(item = {}) {
  if (!item || typeof item !== "object") return {};
  return {
    ...item,
    op: String(item.op || item.action || "override").trim().toLowerCase(),
  };
}

function resolveFieldTemplatePayload(item = {}) {
  return item.field || item.value || item.template || item;
}

function resolveSectionTemplatePayload(item = {}) {
  return item.section || item.value || item.template || item;
}

function mergeTemplatePayload(base = {}, next = {}) {
  const merged = {
    ...(base && typeof base === "object" ? base : {}),
    ...(next && typeof next === "object" ? next : {}),
  };

  if (base?.templateConfig || next?.templateConfig) {
    merged.templateConfig = {
      ...(base?.templateConfig || {}),
      ...(next?.templateConfig || {}),
    };
  }

  if (Array.isArray(base?.fields) || Array.isArray(next?.fields)) {
    merged.fields = [
      ...(Array.isArray(base?.fields) ? base.fields : []),
      ...(Array.isArray(next?.fields) ? next.fields : []),
    ];
  }

  return merged;
}

function normalizeFragmentRefs(value) {
  if (!value) return [];
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value.map((item) => String(item || "").trim()).filter(Boolean);
  }
  if (typeof value === "string") {
    return [value.trim()].filter(Boolean);
  }
  return [];
}

function resolveFragmentPayload(fragmentRef, fragments = {}, seen = new Set()) {
  const key = String(fragmentRef || "").trim();
  if (!key || seen.has(key)) return null;
  const fragment = fragments?.[key];
  if (!fragment) return null;

  seen.add(key);
  const source =
    typeof fragment === "function" ? fragment() : fragment || null;
  if (!source || typeof source !== "object") return null;

  const nestedRefs = normalizeFragmentRefs(
    source.fragments ?? source.fragmentRefs ?? source.usesFragments,
  );
  let composed = { ...source };
  delete composed.fragments;
  delete composed.fragmentRefs;
  delete composed.usesFragments;

  if (nestedRefs.length) {
    const nestedPayload = nestedRefs.reduce((acc, nestedRef) => {
      const resolved = resolveFragmentPayload(nestedRef, fragments, seen);
      return resolved ? mergeTemplatePayload(acc, resolved) : acc;
    }, {});
    composed = mergeTemplatePayload(nestedPayload, composed);
  }

  return composed;
}

function applyTemplateFragments(payload = {}, fragments = {}) {
  const fragmentRefs = normalizeFragmentRefs(
    payload.fragments ?? payload.fragmentRefs ?? payload.usesFragments,
  );
  if (!fragmentRefs.length) return payload;

  const composedFromFragments = fragmentRefs.reduce((acc, fragmentRef) => {
    const resolved = resolveFragmentPayload(fragmentRef, fragments);
    return resolved ? mergeTemplatePayload(acc, resolved) : acc;
  }, {});

  const cleanedPayload = { ...payload };
  delete cleanedPayload.fragments;
  delete cleanedPayload.fragmentRefs;
  delete cleanedPayload.usesFragments;
  return mergeTemplatePayload(composedFromFragments, cleanedPayload);
}

function resolveTemplateOptions(value, optionSets = {}) {
  if (typeof value !== "string") return value;
  const key = value.trim();
  if (!key) return value;
  return optionSets?.[key] ?? value;
}

function resolveFieldReferences(field = {}, registries = {}) {
  if (!field || typeof field !== "object") return field;
  const optionSets = registries?.optionSets || {};
  const optionMaps = registries?.optionMaps || {};
  const resolved = {
    ...field,
    options: resolveTemplateOptions(field.options, optionSets),
    optionsMap: resolveTemplateOptions(field.optionsMap, optionMaps),
  };
  if (Array.isArray(field.fields)) {
    resolved.fields = field.fields.map((nested) =>
      resolveFieldReferences(nested, registries),
    );
  }
  return resolved;
}

function resolveTemplateFieldReferences(payload = {}, registries = {}) {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object") return payload;
  if (!Array.isArray(payload.fields)) return payload;
  return {
    ...payload,
    fields: payload.fields.map((field) =>
      resolveFieldReferences(field, registries),
    ),
  };
}

function findSectionIndex(section, sections = []) {
  const path = String(section?.path || "").trim();
  const title = String(section?.title || "").trim();
  return sections.findIndex((candidate) => {
    if (!candidate || typeof candidate !== "object") return false;
    if (path && String(candidate.path || "").trim() === path) return true;
    if (title && String(candidate.title || "").trim() === title) return true;
    return false;
  });
}

function findFieldIndex(field, fields = []) {
  const name = String(field?.name || "").trim();
  return fields.findIndex(
    (candidate) => candidate && String(candidate.name || "").trim() === name,
  );
}

function insertAtIndex(list = [], index, item) {
  const next = [...list];
  const safeIndex = Math.max(0, Math.min(index, next.length));
  next.splice(safeIndex, 0, item);
  return next;
}

function resolveSectionKey(section = {}) {
  const path = String(section?.path || "").trim();
  if (path) return `path:${path}`;
  const title = String(section?.title || "").trim();
  if (title) return `title:${title}`;
  return "";
}

function applyFieldTemplateOps(baseFields = [], fieldOps = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(fieldOps) || !fieldOps.length) return baseFields;
  return fieldOps.reduce((fields, rawItem) => {
    const item = normalizeTemplateOp(rawItem);
    const payload = resolveFieldTemplatePayload(item);
    if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object") return fields;

    const baseIndex = findFieldIndex(payload, fields);
    const targetIndex =
      baseIndex >= 0 ? baseIndex : findFieldIndex(item, fields);
    const mergedField = mergeFieldTemplate(payload, payload);
    const nestedFields =
      Array.isArray(payload.fields) && payload.fields.length
        ? applyFieldTemplateOps(payload.fields, payload.fields)
        : payload.fields;

    const nextField =
      nestedFields && nestedFields.length
        ? { ...mergedField, fields: nestedFields }
        : mergedField;

    switch (item.op) {
      case "remove":
        if (targetIndex >= 0) return fields.filter((_, idx) => idx !== targetIndex);
        return fields;
      case "create": {
        const position =
          item.before || item.after
            ? {
                type: item.before ? "before" : "after",
                name: String(item.before || item.after || "").trim(),
              }
            : null;
        if (position?.name) {
          const anchorIndex = fields.findIndex(
            (candidate) =>
              candidate && String(candidate.name || "").trim() === position.name,
          );
          if (anchorIndex >= 0) {
            return insertAtIndex(
              fields,
              position.type === "before" ? anchorIndex : anchorIndex + 1,
              nextField,
            );
          }
        }
        if (Number.isInteger(item.index)) {
          return insertAtIndex(fields, item.index, nextField);
        }
        return [...fields, nextField];
      }
      default: {
        if (targetIndex < 0) return [...fields, nextField];
        const existing = fields[targetIndex];
        const merged = mergeFieldTemplate(existing, payload);
        if (Array.isArray(payload.fields) && payload.fields.length) {
          merged.fields = applyFieldTemplateOps(
            existing.fields || [],
            payload.fields,
          );
        }
        const next = [...fields];
        next[targetIndex] = merged;
        return next;
      }
    }
  }, baseFields);
}

export function applySectionTemplateOps(
  baseSections = [],
  sectionOps = [],
  options = {},
) {
  if (!Array.isArray(sectionOps) || !sectionOps.length) return baseSections;
  const fragmentMap = options?.fragments || {};
  const registries = options?.registries || {};
  return sectionOps.reduce((sections, rawItem) => {
    const item = normalizeTemplateOp(rawItem);
    const payload = resolveTemplateFieldReferences(
      applyTemplateFragments(resolveSectionTemplatePayload(item), fragmentMap),
      registries,
    );
    if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object") return sections;

    const baseIndex = findSectionIndex(payload, sections);
    const targetIndex =
      baseIndex >= 0 ? baseIndex : findSectionIndex(item, sections);
    const mergedSection = mergeSectionTemplate(payload, payload);
    const fieldOps = Array.isArray(payload.fields)
      ? payload.fields
      : Array.isArray(item.fields)
        ? item.fields
        : [];
    const sourceFields = Array.isArray(mergedSection.fields)
      ? mergedSection.fields
      : [];
    const nextSection = {
      ...mergedSection,
      fields: fieldOps.length
        ? applyFieldTemplateOps(sourceFields, fieldOps)
        : sourceFields,
    };

    switch (item.op) {
      case "remove":
        if (targetIndex >= 0) return sections.filter((_, idx) => idx !== targetIndex);
        return sections;
      case "create": {
        const position =
          item.before || item.after
            ? {
                type: item.before ? "before" : "after",
                path: String(item.before || item.after || "").trim(),
              }
            : null;
        if (position?.path) {
          const anchorIndex = sections.findIndex((candidate) =>
            position.path === String(candidate?.path || "").trim() ||
            position.path === String(candidate?.title || "").trim(),
          );
          if (anchorIndex >= 0) {
            return insertAtIndex(
              sections,
              position.type === "before" ? anchorIndex : anchorIndex + 1,
              nextSection,
            );
          }
        }
        if (Number.isInteger(item.index)) {
          return insertAtIndex(sections, item.index, nextSection);
        }
        return [...sections, nextSection];
      }
      default: {
        if (targetIndex < 0) return sections;
        const existing = sections[targetIndex];
        const merged = mergeSectionTemplate(existing, payload);
        if (fieldOps.length) {
          merged.fields = applyFieldTemplateOps(existing.fields || [], fieldOps);
        }
        const next = [...sections];
        next[targetIndex] = merged;
        return next;
      }
    }
  }, baseSections);
}

export function compileSectionTemplates(
  baseSections = [],
  sectionTemplates = [],
  options = {},
) {
  const templates = Array.isArray(sectionTemplates) ? sectionTemplates : [];
  const preserveUnmappedBaseSections = options?.preserveUnmappedBaseSections !== false;
  const fragmentMap = options?.fragments || {};
  const registries = options?.registries || {};
  if (!templates.length) {
    return preserveUnmappedBaseSections ? baseSections : [];
  }

  const mergedBaseSections = baseSections.map((section) =>
    mergeSectionTemplate(section, {}),
  );
  const orderedSections = [];
  const sectionIndexByKey = new Map();
  const consumedBaseIndexes = new Set();
  const removedKeys = new Set();

  const mergeIntoOutput = (key, nextSection) => {
    if (!key) {
      orderedSections.push(nextSection);
      return;
    }
    const existingIndex = sectionIndexByKey.get(key);
    if (existingIndex === undefined) {
      sectionIndexByKey.set(key, orderedSections.length);
      orderedSections.push(nextSection);
      return;
    }
    orderedSections[existingIndex] = nextSection;
  };

  templates.forEach((rawItem) => {
    const item = normalizeTemplateOp(rawItem);
    const payload = resolveTemplateFieldReferences(
      applyTemplateFragments(resolveSectionTemplatePayload(item), fragmentMap),
      registries,
    );
    if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object") return;

    const baseIndex = findSectionIndex(payload, mergedBaseSections);
    const fallbackIndex = findSectionIndex(item, mergedBaseSections);
    const matchedIndex = baseIndex >= 0 ? baseIndex : fallbackIndex;
    const matchedBase =
      matchedIndex >= 0 ? mergedBaseSections[matchedIndex] : null;
    const key = resolveSectionKey(payload) || resolveSectionKey(item) || resolveSectionKey(matchedBase);
    if (item.op === "remove") {
      if (key) removedKeys.add(key);
      if (matchedIndex >= 0) consumedBaseIndexes.add(matchedIndex);
      const existingIndex = key ? sectionIndexByKey.get(key) : undefined;
      if (existingIndex !== undefined) {
        orderedSections.splice(existingIndex, 1);
        sectionIndexByKey.clear();
        orderedSections.forEach((section, index) => {
          const nextKey = resolveSectionKey(section);
          if (nextKey) sectionIndexByKey.set(nextKey, index);
        });
      }
      return;
    }

    const existingSection = key ? orderedSections[sectionIndexByKey.get(key)] : null;
    const baseSection = existingSection || matchedBase;
    const mergedSection = baseSection
      ? mergeSectionTemplate(baseSection, payload)
      : mergeSectionTemplate({}, payload);
    const fieldOps = Array.isArray(payload.fields)
      ? payload.fields
      : Array.isArray(item.fields)
        ? item.fields
        : [];
    const sourceFields = Array.isArray(baseSection?.fields)
      ? baseSection.fields
      : Array.isArray(mergedSection.fields)
        ? mergedSection.fields
        : [];
    const nextSection = {
      ...mergedSection,
      fields: fieldOps.length
        ? applyFieldTemplateOps(sourceFields, fieldOps)
        : sourceFields,
    };
    if (matchedIndex >= 0) consumedBaseIndexes.add(matchedIndex);
    if (key && removedKeys.has(key)) removedKeys.delete(key);
    mergeIntoOutput(key, nextSection);
  });

  mergedBaseSections.forEach((section, index) => {
    const key = resolveSectionKey(section);
    if (consumedBaseIndexes.has(index)) return;
    if (key && removedKeys.has(key)) return;
    orderedSections.push(section);
  });

  return preserveUnmappedBaseSections ? orderedSections : orderedSections.filter(Boolean);
}

export function shouldRenderTemplatedField(
  field = {},
  formData = {},
  sectionPath = "",
  showHiddenSections = false,
) {
  if (!field) return false;
  if (field.templateConfig?.visible === false || field.visible === false) {
    return showHiddenSections;
  }
  if (field.hiddenWhen && !showHiddenSections) {
    return !isVisible(field.hiddenWhen, formData, sectionPath);
  }
  if (field.visibleWhen && !showHiddenSections) {
    return isVisible(field.visibleWhen, formData, sectionPath);
  }
  return true;
}

export function shouldValidateTemplatedField(field = {}, formData = {}, sectionPath = "") {
  if (!field) return false;
  if (field.skipValidation || field.templateConfig?.validate === false) return false;
  if (field.templateConfig?.visible === false || field.visible === false) return false;
  if (field.hiddenWhen && isVisible(field.hiddenWhen, formData, sectionPath)) return false;
  if (field.visibleWhen && !isVisible(field.visibleWhen, formData, sectionPath)) {
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}

import React, { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { createApprovalLogEntry, validateCreditApproval, evaluateExpressCredit } from '@/domain/forms/rules/creditPolicyRules';

function useBackofficeDecision({ formData, setFormData }) {
  const credit = formData.creditDepartment || {};
  const patchCredit = useCallback((patch) => { setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, creditDepartment: { ...(prev.creditDepartment || {}), ...patch } })); }, [setFormData]);
  const evaluate = useCallback(() => {
    const res = evaluateExpressCredit(formData, credit.scoreBuro);
    setFormData((prev) => {
      const prevCredit = prev.creditDepartment || {};
      const next = { ...prevCredit, elegibleCreditoExpres: Boolean(res.eligible), montoPreliminar: res.montoPreliminar, expressCreditDecisionReason: res.reason };
      next.expressCreditLog = (prevCredit.expressCreditLog || []).concat([{ action: 'evaluate', timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), buroScore: credit.scoreBuro, result: res }]);
      return { ...prev, creditDepartment: next };
    });
  }, [credit.scoreBuro, formData, setFormData]);
  const saveDecision = useCallback(() => {
    const currentCredit = formData.creditDepartment || {};
    const res = validateCreditApproval(currentCredit);
    if (!res.valid) { toast.error(`Revisar: ${Object.values(res.errors).join(', ')}`); return; }
    setFormData((prev) => {
      const prevCredit = prev.creditDepartment || {};
      const next = { ...prevCredit, ...currentCredit, approvalTimestamp: new Date().toISOString() };
      if (next.approvalDecision === 'approved') { next.approvedAmount = next.approvedAmount || ''; next.approvalTerm = next.approvalTerm || ''; next.approvalRequirements = next.approvalRequirements || ''; }
      const logEntry = createApprovalLogEntry(next.approvalDecision === 'approved' ? 'approve' : 'deny', { approverName: next.approverName || 'backoffice', approverId: next.approverId || null, approvalTimestamp: next.approvalTimestamp, approvedAmount: next.approvedAmount, term: next.approvalTerm });
      next.approvalLog = (prevCredit.approvalLog || []).concat([logEntry]);
      return { ...prev, creditDepartment: next };
    });
    toast.success('Decisión registrada');
  }, [formData, setFormData]);
  return { credit, patchCredit, evaluate, saveDecision };
}

export function RoleSwitcher({ role, onChange }) {
  return (
    <div className="role-switcher">
      <label className="role-switcher__label" htmlFor="role-mode-select">Modo</label>
      <select id="role-mode-select" className="role-switcher__control" value={role} onChange={(event) => onChange(event.target.value)}>
        <option value="customer">Cliente</option><option value="sales">Ventas</option><option value="credit">Crédito</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  );
}
RoleSwitcher.propTypes = { role: PropTypes.string.isRequired, onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired };

export function BackofficeReviewModal({ visible = false, docId = null, onClose, onSubmit, initialMeta = {} }) {
  const [status, setStatus] = useState(initialMeta.status || 'evaluation');
  const [observation, setObservation] = useState(initialMeta.observation || '');
  const [reviewer, setReviewer] = useState(initialMeta.reviewer || '');
  if (!visible) return null;
  const handleSubmit = () => { onSubmit(docId, { status, observation, reviewer, reviewedAt: new Date().toISOString() }); onClose(); };
  return (
    <div className="modal modal--backoffice" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">
      <div className="modal__backdrop" onClick={onClose} />
      <div className="modal__content">
        <header className="modal__header"><h3 className="modal__title">Revisión interna: {docId}</h3></header>
        <div className="modal__body">
          <label className="modal__label">Revisor</label>
          <input className="modal__input" value={reviewer} onChange={(event) => setReviewer(event.target.value)} />
          <label className="modal__label">Estado</label>
          <select className="modal__select" value={status} onChange={(event) => setStatus(event.target.value)}>
            <option value="evaluation">Sujeto a evaluación</option><option value="delivered">Entregado</option><option value="validated">Validado</option><option value="rejected">Rechazado</option>
          </select>
          <label className="modal__label">Observación interna</label>
          <textarea className="modal__textarea" value={observation} onChange={(event) => setObservation(event.target.value)} />
        </div>
        <footer className="modal__footer">
          <button type="button" className="btn btn--ghost" onClick={onClose}>Cancelar</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn--primary" onClick={handleSubmit}>Guardar revisión</button>
        </footer>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
BackofficeReviewModal.propTypes = { visible: PropTypes.bool, docId: PropTypes.string, onClose: PropTypes.func.isRequired, onSubmit: PropTypes.func.isRequired, initialMeta: PropTypes.object };

export function CreditDecisionPanel({ formData, setFormData, role = 'customer' }) {
  const { credit, patchCredit, evaluate, saveDecision } = useBackofficeDecision({ formData, setFormData });
  const onText = (key) => (event) => patchCredit({ [key]: event.target.value });
  const onCheck = (key) => (event) => patchCredit({ [key]: Boolean(event.target.checked) });
  return (
    <section className="backoffice-admin">
      <h4 className="backoffice-admin__title">Backoffice: Pagaré</h4>
      <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label"><input type="checkbox" checked={Boolean(credit.pagareExempted)} onChange={onCheck('pagareExempted')} />{' '}Exonerar (interno)</label></div>
      {credit.pagareExempted && <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Motivo</label><textarea className="backoffice-admin__textarea" value={credit.pagareExemptionReason || ''} onChange={onText('pagareExemptionReason')} placeholder="Motivo (interno)" /></div>}
      {role === 'credit' && (
        <>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row backoffice-admin__row--spaced"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Score buró</label><input type="number" className="field__control" value={credit.scoreBuro ?? ''} onChange={onText('scoreBuro')} placeholder="Puntaje" /></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><button className="btn btn--secondary btn--sm" type="button" onClick={evaluate} title="Evaluar crédito exprés">Evaluar exprés</button></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__spacer" />
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row backoffice-admin__row--tight"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Decisión</label><select className="field__control" value={credit.approvalDecision || ''} onChange={onText('approvalDecision')}><option value="">-- Seleccionar --</option><option value="approved">Aprobar</option><option value="denied">Negar</option></select></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Solicitado</label><input type="text" className="field__control" value={credit.requestedAmount || ''} onChange={onText('requestedAmount')} /></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Aprobado</label><input type="text" className="field__control" value={credit.approvedAmount || ''} onChange={onText('approvedAmount')} /></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Plazo (meses)</label><input type="text" className="field__control" value={credit.approvalTerm || ''} onChange={onText('approvalTerm')} /></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Requisitos</label><textarea className="backoffice-admin__textarea" value={credit.approvalRequirements || ''} onChange={onText('approvalRequirements')} /></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Notas</label><textarea className="backoffice-admin__textarea" value={credit.approvalObservations || ''} onChange={onText('approvalObservations')} /></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Aprobador</label><input type="text" className="field__control" placeholder="Nombre" value={credit.approverName || ''} onChange={onText('approverName')} /></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><button className="btn btn--primary" type="button" onClick={saveDecision} title="Guardar decisión">Registrar</button></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label"><input type="checkbox" checked={Boolean(credit.expressCreditActivated)} onChange={(event) => { const activated = Boolean(event.target.checked); setFormData((prev) => { const prevCredit = prev.creditDepartment || {}; const next = { ...prevCredit, expressCreditActivated: activated }; next.expressCreditLog = (prevCredit.expressCreditLog || []).concat([{ action: activated ? 'activate' : 'deactivate', timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), actor: 'backoffice' }]); return { ...prev, creditDepartment: next }; }); }} />{' '}Exprés activo</label></div>
          <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Notas exprés</label><textarea className="backoffice-admin__textarea" value={credit.expressCreditDecisionReason || ''} onChange={onText('expressCreditDecisionReason')} placeholder="Notas internas" /></div>
        </>
      )}
      <div className="backoffice-admin__row backoffice-admin__row--spaced"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Elegible exprés</label><div>{credit.elegibleCreditoExpres ? 'Sí' : 'No'}</div></div>
      <div className="backoffice-admin__row"><label className="backoffice-admin__label">Monto preliminar</label><div>{credit.montoPreliminar ? `$ ${credit.montoPreliminar}` : '—'}</div></div>
      <div className="backoffice-admin__row backoffice-admin__row--spaced">
        <h5 className="backoffice-admin__history-title">Historial exprés</h5>
        <div className="backoffice-admin__history">
          {(credit.expressCreditLog || []).length === 0 && <div className="backoffice-admin__history-empty">Sin entradas</div>}
          {(credit.expressCreditLog || []).slice().reverse().map((entry, index) => (
            <div key={`${entry.timestamp}-${index}`} className="backoffice-admin__history-item">
              <div className="backoffice-admin__history-head">{entry.action.toUpperCase()} · {new Date(entry.timestamp).toLocaleString()}</div>
              <div className="backoffice-admin__history-meta">{[entry.details ? JSON.stringify(entry.details) : null, entry.buroScore ? `Score: ${entry.buroScore}` : null, entry.result?.reason ? entry.result.reason : null].filter(Boolean).join(' • ')}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}
CreditDecisionPanel.propTypes = { formData: PropTypes.object.isRequired, setFormData: PropTypes.func.isRequired, role: PropTypes.string };

export default CreditDecisionPanel;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/backoffice/components/BackofficeModule.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #66
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/external-flow/components/PinAccess.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/external-flow/components/PinAccess.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 493
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, {
  useCallback,
  useEffect,
  useMemo,
  useRef,
  useState,
} from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { Eye, EyeOff, LoaderCircle } from "lucide-react";

function buildEmptyPin(length) {
  return Array.from({ length }, () => "");
}

function formatPinError(message) {
  const raw = String(message || "").trim();
  if (!raw) return "";

  if (/a[uú]n es v[aá]lido para ingresar/i.test(raw)) {
    return "Ese PIN ya no está disponible. Solicita uno nuevo para continuar.";
  }

  return raw;
}

function IconToggleButton({
  onActivate,
  disabled,
  pressed,
  label,
  title,
  children,
}) {
  const handleKeyDown = (event) => {
    if (disabled) return;
    if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
      event.preventDefault();
      onActivate?.();
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      role="button"
      tabIndex={disabled ? -1 : 0}
      className="pin-access__visibility"
      onClick={disabled ? undefined : onActivate}
      onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
      aria-pressed={pressed}
      aria-label={label}
      aria-disabled={disabled}
      title={title}
    >
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

IconToggleButton.propTypes = {
  onActivate: PropTypes.func,
  disabled: PropTypes.bool,
  pressed: PropTypes.bool,
  label: PropTypes.string,
  title: PropTypes.string,
  children: PropTypes.node,
};

export default function PinAccess({
  length = 5,
  validating = false,
  generating = false,
  idPinCode,
  error,
  compact = false,
  onSubmit,
  onResend,
  recipientInfo,
}) {
  const [suppressAutoSubmit, setSuppressAutoSubmit] = useState(false);
  const [showValidationError, setShowValidationError] = useState(false);
  const isBusy = validating || generating;
  const [pin, setPin] = useState(() => buildEmptyPin(length));
  const [cooldown, setCooldown] = useState(0);
  const [detectedSource, setDetectedSource] = useState("");
  const [showPin, setShowPin] = useState(false);
  const formRef = useRef(null);
  const inputRefs = useRef([]);
  const pendingAutoSubmitRef = useRef(false);
  const lastSubmittedPinRef = useRef("");
  const pinValue = useMemo(() => pin.join(""), [pin]);
  const isComplete = pin.every((digit) => digit !== "");
  const visibleError = useMemo(() => formatPinError(error), [error]);
  const canUseWebOtp =
    typeof globalThis !== "undefined" &&
    globalThis.window &&
    typeof navigator !== "undefined" &&
    "credentials" in navigator &&
    "OTPCredential" in globalThis;

  useEffect(() => {
    if (cooldown <= 0) return undefined;
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setCooldown((current) => {
        if (current <= 1) return 0;
        return current - 1;
      });
    }, 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [cooldown]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!pendingAutoSubmitRef.current || !isComplete || isBusy || !idPinCode)
      return;
    if (suppressAutoSubmit) return;
    if (lastSubmittedPinRef.current === pinValue) return;
    pendingAutoSubmitRef.current = false;
    lastSubmittedPinRef.current = pinValue;
    formRef.current?.requestSubmit();
  }, [idPinCode, isComplete, isBusy, pinValue, suppressAutoSubmit]);

  const focusInput = useCallback((index) => {
    const input = inputRefs.current[index];
    if (input) {
      input.focus();
      input.select?.();
    }
  }, []);

  const toggleShowPin = () => {
    setShowPin((s) => !s);
    // ensure focus remains in the first empty input (or last filled)
    setTimeout(() => {
      const firstEmpty = pin.findIndex((d) => !d);
      focusInput(
        firstEmpty === -1 ? pin.length - 1 : Math.max(0, firstEmpty - 1),
      );
    }, 0);
  };

  const fillPin = useCallback(
    (raw, startIndex = 0, shouldAutoSubmit = true, source = "") => {
      const clean = String(raw || "").replace(/\D/g, "");
      if (!clean) return;

      setPin((prev) => {
        const next = [...prev];
        clean
          .slice(0, length - startIndex)
          .split("")
          .forEach((digit, offset) => {
            next[startIndex + offset] = digit;
          });
        return next;
      });

      const nextIndex = Math.min(startIndex + clean.length, length - 1);
      focusInput(nextIndex);
      pendingAutoSubmitRef.current = shouldAutoSubmit;
      if (source) setDetectedSource(source);
      // If this fill was an explicit source that should auto-submit,
      // treat it as user interaction and allow auto-submit.
      if (shouldAutoSubmit) setSuppressAutoSubmit(false);
      // Any programmatic fill should clear prior validation errors
      setShowValidationError(false);
    },
    [focusInput, length],
  );

  const handleChange = (index, event) => {
    const raw = event.target.value;
    const clean = String(raw || "").replace(/\D/g, "");

    if (clean.length > 1) {
      fillPin(clean, index, true);
      return;
    }

    setPin((prev) => {
      const next = [...prev];
      next[index] = clean;
      return next;
    });

    // User interaction should hide previous validation errors
    setShowValidationError(false);

    if (clean && index < length - 1) {
      focusInput(index + 1);
    }

    pendingAutoSubmitRef.current = true;
  };

  const handleKeyDown = (index, event) => {
    if (event.key === "Backspace" && !pin[index] && index > 0) {
      focusInput(index - 1);
    }
    if (event.key === "ArrowLeft" && index > 0) {
      event.preventDefault();
      focusInput(index - 1);
    }
    if (event.key === "ArrowRight" && index < length - 1) {
      event.preventDefault();
      focusInput(index + 1);
    }
  };

  const handlePaste = (event) => {
    const pasted = event.clipboardData?.getData("text") || "";
    const clean = pasted.replace(/\D/g, "");
    if (!clean) return;
    event.preventDefault();
    fillPin(clean, 0, true, "portapapeles");
  };

  const handleClear = useCallback(() => {
    if (isBusy) return;
    setPin(buildEmptyPin(length));
    pendingAutoSubmitRef.current = false;
    lastSubmittedPinRef.current = "";
    setDetectedSource("");
    setTimeout(() => focusInput(0), 0);
    setSuppressAutoSubmit(false);
  }, [focusInput, length, isBusy]);

  const handleSubmit = (event) => {
    event.preventDefault();
    // Only submit when user filled PIN and no ongoing generate/validate operation
    // Allow manual submit even when `idPinCode` is not present (backend can derive from validationId)
    if (!isComplete || isBusy) return;
    // mark that a validation attempt happened so any server error can be shown
    setShowValidationError(true);
    if (lastSubmittedPinRef.current !== pinValue) {
      lastSubmittedPinRef.current = pinValue;
    }
    onSubmit?.(pinValue);
  };

  const handleResend = () => {
    if (generating || cooldown > 0) return;
    setPin(buildEmptyPin(length));
    pendingAutoSubmitRef.current = false;
    lastSubmittedPinRef.current = "";
    setDetectedSource("");
    setCooldown(30);
    // Prevent accidental auto-submit immediately after requesting a new PIN
    setSuppressAutoSubmit(true);
    // clear any previous server validation error when requesting a new PIN
    setShowValidationError(false);
    onResend?.();
    setTimeout(() => focusInput(0), 0);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!canUseWebOtp || isBusy) return undefined;
    const abortController = new AbortController();

    const startWebOtp = async () => {
      try {
        const credential = await navigator.credentials.get({
          otp: { transport: ["sms"] },
          signal: abortController.signal,
        });
        const code = credential?.code;
        if (code) {
          fillPin(code, 0, true, "sms");
        }
      } catch {
        // noop: API no disponible o permiso denegado
      }
    };

    startWebOtp();
    return () => abortController.abort();
  }, [canUseWebOtp, fillPin, isBusy]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onGlobalPaste = (event) => {
      const text = event.clipboardData?.getData("text") || "";
      const clean = text.replace(/\D/g, "");
      if (!clean) return;
      fillPin(clean, 0, true, "portapapeles");
    };

    globalThis?.window?.addEventListener?.("paste", onGlobalPaste);
    return () =>
      globalThis?.window?.removeEventListener?.("paste", onGlobalPaste);
  }, [fillPin]);

  useEffect(() => {
    // Try to read clipboard when the window regains focus so copied PINs from email
    // get pasted automatically. This may require clipboard permissions in some browsers.
    if (typeof navigator === "undefined" || !navigator.clipboard)
      return undefined;
    if (isBusy) return undefined;

    let mounted = true;

    const onFocus = async () => {
      if (!mounted) return;
      try {
        const text = await navigator.clipboard.readText();
        const clean = String(text || "").replace(/\D/g, "");
        if (!clean) return;
        // If clipboard contains at least the expected digits, take the last N digits
        const candidate = clean.length >= length ? clean.slice(-length) : clean;
        if (candidate.length === length) {
          fillPin(candidate, 0, true, "portapapeles");
        }
      } catch {
        // ignore clipboard read errors (permissions/security)
      }
    };

    globalThis?.window?.addEventListener?.("focus", onFocus);
    return () => {
      mounted = false;
      globalThis?.window?.removeEventListener?.("focus", onFocus);
    };
  }, [fillPin, isBusy, length]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const el = formRef.current;
    if (!el) return undefined;

    const onClearEvent = () => {
      try {
        handleClear();
      } catch {
        // ignore
      }
    };

    el.addEventListener("pinpanel:clear", onClearEvent);
    return () => el.removeEventListener("pinpanel:clear", onClearEvent);
  }, [formRef, handleClear]);

  return (
    <div
      className={`ef-pin-container ${compact ? "ef-pin-panel--compact" : ""}`}
    >
      <div className="ef-pin-panel__intro">
        <p className="ef-pin-helper">Ingresa el PIN de {length} dígitos.</p>

        {recipientInfo ? (
          <p className="pin-access__notice">
            El PIN ha sido enviado a {recipientInfo}. Revisa tu correo y pega el
            código aquí.
          </p>
        ) : (
          <p className="pin-access__notice">
            El PIN fue enviado al correo registrado. Revisa tu bandeja de
            entrada.
          </p>
        )}
      </div>

      <form
        ref={formRef}
        className={`pin-access__form ${isComplete ? "pin-access__form--complete" : ""}`}
        onSubmit={handleSubmit}
      >
        <input
          type="text"
          className="pin-access__otp-proxy"
          autoComplete="one-time-code"
          inputMode="numeric"
          tabIndex={-1}
          aria-hidden="true"
          onChange={(event) =>
            fillPin(event.target.value, 0, true, "autocompletado")
          }
        />

        <div className="pin-access__entry">
          <div className="pin-access__otp-shell">
            <div className="pin-access__otp-track">
              <div
                className="ef-pin-input-group pin-access__inputs"
                onPaste={handlePaste}
              >
                {pin.map((digit, index) => (
                  <input
                    key={`pin-${index}`}
                    ref={(node) => {
                      inputRefs.current[index] = node;
                    }}
                    className={`ef-pin-digit pin-access__digit ${digit ? "ef-pin-digit--filled pin-access__digit--filled" : ""}`}
                    type={showPin ? "text" : "password"}
                    inputMode="numeric"
                    autoComplete={index === 0 ? "one-time-code" : "off"}
                    pattern="[0-9]*"
                    maxLength={1}
                    value={digit}
                    aria-label={`Dígito ${index + 1} del PIN`}
                    disabled={isBusy}
                    onChange={(event) => handleChange(index, event)}
                    onKeyDown={(event) => handleKeyDown(index, event)}
                  />
                ))}
              </div>

              <IconToggleButton
                onActivate={toggleShowPin}
                pressed={showPin}
                label={showPin ? "Ocultar PIN" : "Mostrar PIN"}
                title={showPin ? "Ocultar PIN" : "Mostrar PIN"}
                disabled={isBusy}
              >
                {showPin ? (
                  <EyeOff size={18} strokeWidth={2.2} />
                ) : (
                  <Eye size={18} strokeWidth={2.2} />
                )}
              </IconToggleButton>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div
          className="pin-access__feedback pin-access__limit"
          role="status"
          aria-live="polite"
        >
          {visibleError && showValidationError ? (
            <div className="ef-banner ef-banner--error pin-access__feedback-item pin-access__feedback-item--error">
              {visibleError}
            </div>
          ) : null}

          {!visibleError && detectedSource ? (
            <div className="ef-banner ef-banner--success pin-access__feedback-item pin-access__feedback-item--success">
              PIN detectado desde {detectedSource}.
            </div>
          ) : null}
        </div>

        <div className="ef-pin-footer pin-access__footer pin-access__limit">
          <button
            type="submit"
            className="ef-btn-premium ef-btn--narrow"
            disabled={isBusy || !isComplete}
          >
            {validating ? (
              <>
                <LoaderCircle
                  className="pin-access__button-spinner"
                  size={18}
                  strokeWidth={2.2}
                />
                Validando acceso...
              </>
            ) : (
              "Confirmar acceso"
            )}
          </button>

          {isComplete && (
            <div className="pin-access__status-row">
              <span className="pin-access__status pin-access__status--ready">
                PIN listo
              </span>
            </div>
          )}

          <div className="pin-access__actions">
            <button
              type="button"
              className="ef-link pin-access__action"
              onClick={handleResend}
              disabled={generating || cooldown > 0}
            >
              {cooldown > 0 ? `Reenviar en ${cooldown}s` : "Reenviar"}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  );
}

PinAccess.propTypes = {
  length: PropTypes.number,
  idPinCode: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.number]),
  error: PropTypes.string,
  compact: PropTypes.bool,
  onSubmit: PropTypes.func,
  onResend: PropTypes.func,
  recipientInfo: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  validating: PropTypes.bool,
  generating: PropTypes.bool,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/external-flow/components/PinAccess.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #67
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/external-flow/pages/ExternalFlowPagesModule.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/external-flow/pages/ExternalFlowPagesModule.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 434
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from "react-redux";
import { useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import {
  AppLoading,
  AppShell,
} from "@/shared/components/app/AppScaffoldModule.jsx";
import PinAccess from "../components/PinAccess.jsx";
import {
  generatePinForm,
  logout,
  validateAccessDataForm,
} from "@/store/slices/authSlice";
import { getExternalFlowContext } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowCrud";
import {
  buildExternalFlowContextKey,
  loadExternalFormsFlowContext,
  saveExternalFormsFlowContext,
} from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";
import { resetRequest } from "@/store/slices/requestSlice";

const PIN_LENGTH = 5;
const DEFAULT_ROUTE = "#/WorkflowExternos";
const DEFAULT_LOGO_SRC = "/assets/IconSisad.png";

const STATUS_VARIANTS = {
  success: {
    icon: "✓",
    title: "Proceso completado",
    defaultMessage: "Los documentos se generaron correctamente.",
  },
  error: {
    icon: "!",
    title: "Error",
    actionLabel: "Volver a intentar",
    defaultMessage: "Ocurrió un error inesperado.",
  },
  invalidLink: {
    icon: "!",
    title: "Enlace inválido",
    defaultMessage:
      "La ruta no contiene los parámetros requeridos para iniciar el flujo.",
  },
  unauthorized: {
    icon: "×",
    title: "Acceso restringido",
    actionLabel: "Reintentar acceso",
    defaultMessage: "No tienes permisos para continuar.",
  },
};

const getStatusConfig = (variant, overrides = {}) => {
  const base = STATUS_VARIANTS[variant] || {};
  return {
    icon: base.icon,
    title: overrides.title || base.title,
    message: overrides.message || base.defaultMessage || base.message || "",
    actionLabel: overrides.actionLabel || base.actionLabel,
  };
};

function maskEmail(email) {
  if (!email) return "";
  const raw = String(email).trim();
  // Render full email as a mailto link for clickable behavior in the UI
  try {
    return (
      <a href={`mailto:${raw}`} className="ef-mail-link">
        {raw}
      </a>
    );
  } catch {
    return raw;
  }
}

function StatusPageLayout({
  icon,
  title,
  message,
  actionLabel,
  onAction,
  actionHref = DEFAULT_ROUTE,
  logoSrc = DEFAULT_LOGO_SRC,
  logoAlt = "Sisad",
}) {
  const handleActionClick = () => {
    if (typeof onAction === "function") {
      onAction();
      return;
    }
    const win =
      typeof globalThis !== "undefined" ? globalThis.window : undefined;
    if (win && win.location && typeof win.location.assign === "function") {
      win.location.assign(actionHref);
    }
  };

  return (
    <AppShell className="workflow-externos">
      <section className="ef-status-page">
        <article className="ef-status-card">
          <div className="ef-status-icon-wrapper" aria-hidden="true">
            {icon}
          </div>
          <h1 className="ef-status-title">{title}</h1>
          <div className="ef-status-message">
            <p>{message}</p>
          </div>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="ef-status-action-btn"
            onClick={handleActionClick}
          >
            {actionLabel}
          </button>
        </article>
        <div className="ef-status-footer">
          <img src={logoSrc} alt={logoAlt} className="ef-status-logo" />
        </div>
      </section>
    </AppShell>
  );
}

StatusPageLayout.propTypes = {
  icon: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]).isRequired,
  title: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]).isRequired,
  message: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]).isRequired,
  actionLabel: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  onAction: PropTypes.func,
  actionHref: PropTypes.string,
  logoSrc: PropTypes.string,
  logoAlt: PropTypes.string,
};

export function WorkflowExternosPage() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const {
    session,
    loading,
    error,
    status,
    statusGeneratePin,
    validatePinRequestKey,
    generatePinRequestKey,
    statusValidatePin,
  } = useSelector((state) => state.auth);
  const pinGeneratedRef = useRef("");

  const routeContext = useMemo(
    () => getExternalFlowContext(location),
    [location],
  );
  const hasRouteParams = Boolean(
    routeContext.exec && routeContext.wrk && routeContext.dcmt,
  );
  const idPinCode =
    session?.idPinCode || session?.dataGeneratePin?.idPinCode || null;
  const maskedEmail = session?.email ? maskEmail(session.email) : "";

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!hasRouteParams) return;
    const nextFlowKey = buildExternalFlowContextKey(routeContext);
    const storedFlowKey = loadExternalFormsFlowContext();
    if (storedFlowKey && storedFlowKey !== nextFlowKey) {
      dispatch(logout());
      dispatch(resetRequest());
    }
    saveExternalFormsFlowContext(routeContext);
  }, [dispatch, hasRouteParams, routeContext]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!hasRouteParams) return;

    const requestKey = `${routeContext.exec}|${routeContext.wrk}|${routeContext.dcmt}`;
    if (pinGeneratedRef.current === requestKey) return;
    pinGeneratedRef.current = requestKey;

    dispatch(
      generatePinForm({
        ...routeContext,
        businessId: routeContext.exec,
        requestId: routeContext.wrk,
        validationId: routeContext.dcmt,
        formFilesHispana: "FormFilesHispana",
        token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
      }),
    );
  }, [
    dispatch,
    hasRouteParams,
    routeContext,
    session?.accessToken,
    session?.token,
  ]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (
      status === 200 &&
      (session?.validated || session?.validatedAccess === true)
    ) {
      navigate(`/forms${location.search}`, { replace: true });
    }
  }, [status, session, navigate, location.search]);

  const submitPin = (pinCode) => {
    if (!pinCode || pinCode.length !== PIN_LENGTH || loading) return;
    const resolvedIdPinCode = idPinCode || routeContext.dcmt || null;
    dispatch(
      validateAccessDataForm({
        ...routeContext,
        businessId: routeContext.exec,
        requestId: routeContext.wrk,
        validationId: routeContext.dcmt,
        idPinCode: resolvedIdPinCode,
        recipientId: session?.recipientId || null,
        email: session?.email || null,
        phoneNumber: null,
        password: null,
        pinCode,
      }),
    );
  };

  const handleResend = () => {
    // Only block resend when a PIN generation request for this flow is already in progress
    if (generatePinRequestKey) return;
    dispatch(
      generatePinForm({
        ...routeContext,
        businessId: routeContext.exec,
        requestId: routeContext.wrk,
        validationId: routeContext.dcmt,
        formFilesHispana: "FormFilesHispana",
        token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
      }),
    );
  };

  if (!hasRouteParams) {
    return <InvalidLinkPage />;
  }

  const isBootstrappingPin =
    hasRouteParams &&
    !idPinCode &&
    !error &&
    (loading || statusGeneratePin == null);

  if (isBootstrappingPin) {
    return (
      <AppShell className="workflow-externos">
        <AppLoading
          title="Preparando acceso seguro"
          subtitle="Estamos generando el PIN y validando la sesión antes de mostrar el formulario."
        />
      </AppShell>
    );
  }

  return (
    <AppShell className="workflow-externos ef-flow-shell--auth">
      <div className="pin-access-page">
        <section className="ef-auth-card ef-auth-card--pin pin-access pin-access__viewport fade-in">
          <div className="ef-auth-card__topbar">
            <div className="ef-auth-logo-wrap">
              <img
                className="ef-auth-logo"
                src={DEFAULT_LOGO_SRC}
                alt="Sisad"
              />
            </div>
            {maskedEmail ? (
              <div className="ef-meta pin-access__meta">
                <span className="pin-access__meta-chip">
                  <svg
                    className="pin-access__meta-icon"
                    fill="none"
                    stroke="currentColor"
                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                  >
                    <path
                      strokeLinecap="round"
                      strokeLinejoin="round"
                      strokeWidth="2"
                      d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                    />
                  </svg>
                  <span>
                    Destino:{" "}
                    <span className="pin-access__meta-value">
                      {maskedEmail}
                    </span>
                  </span>
                </span>
              </div>
            ) : null}
          </div>

          <header className="ef-auth-header ef-auth-header--pin pin-access__header">
            <p className="ef-eyebrow">Acceso seguro</p>
            <h3 className="ef-auth-title">Validación de PIN</h3>
            <p className="ef-auth-subtitle">
              Escribe o pega el código de acceso para continuar.
            </p>
          </header>

          <div className="ef-pin-panel pin-access__panel">
            <PinAccess
              key={`${idPinCode || "pending"}-${PIN_LENGTH}`}
              length={PIN_LENGTH}
              validating={Boolean(validatePinRequestKey)}
              idPinCode={idPinCode}
              error={statusValidatePin != null ? error : ""}
              compact={false}
              onSubmit={submitPin}
              onResend={handleResend}
              recipientInfo={maskedEmail}
            />
          </div>
        </section>
      </div>
    </AppShell>
  );
}

export function SuccessPage({
  title = STATUS_VARIANTS.success.title,
  message = STATUS_VARIANTS.success.defaultMessage,
  actionLabel = STATUS_VARIANTS.success.actionLabel,
  onAction,
} = {}) {
  const location = useLocation();
  const routeState =
    location?.state && typeof location.state === "object" ? location.state : {};
  const config = getStatusConfig("success", {
    title: routeState.title || title,
    message: routeState.message || message,
    actionLabel: routeState.actionLabel || actionLabel,
  });
  return (
    <StatusPageLayout
      icon={config.icon}
      title={config.title}
      message={config.message}
      actionLabel={config.actionLabel}
      onAction={onAction}
    />
  );
}

SuccessPage.propTypes = {
  title: PropTypes.string,
  message: PropTypes.string,
  actionLabel: PropTypes.string,
  onAction: PropTypes.func,
};

export function ErrorPage({
  message = STATUS_VARIANTS.error.defaultMessage,
  actionLabel = STATUS_VARIANTS.error.actionLabel,
  onAction,
} = {}) {
  const config = getStatusConfig("error", { message, actionLabel });
  return (
    <StatusPageLayout
      icon={config.icon}
      title={config.title}
      message={config.message}
      actionLabel={config.actionLabel}
      onAction={onAction}
    />
  );
}

ErrorPage.propTypes = {
  message: PropTypes.string,
  actionLabel: PropTypes.string,
  onAction: PropTypes.func,
};

export function InvalidLinkPage({
  message = STATUS_VARIANTS.invalidLink.defaultMessage,
  actionLabel = STATUS_VARIANTS.invalidLink.actionLabel,

} = {}) {

    <StatusPageLayout
      icon={config.icon}
      title={config.title}
      message={config.message}
      actionLabel={config.actionLabel}

    />
  );
}

InvalidLinkPage.propTypes = {

  onAction: PropTypes.func,
};

export function UnauthorizedPage({

};
