// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #68
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/ErrorsSummary.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/ErrorsSummary.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 431
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";

function humanizePath(path) {
  if (!path) return "";
  return path
    .split(".")
    .map((segment) =>
      segment.replace(/([a-z])([A-Z])/g, "$1 $2").replace(/_/g, " "),
    )
    .map((segment) =>
      segment.replace(/\b\d+\b/g, (match) => `#${Number(match) + 1}`),
    )
    .map((segment) =>
      segment ? segment.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + segment.slice(1) : segment,
    )
    .join(" › ");
}

function normalizePath(path) {
  return String(path || "").replace(/\.\d+(?=\.|$)/g, ".*");
}

function getSectionFieldPaths(section = {}) {
  const sectionPath = section?.path ? String(section.path).trim() : "";
  const paths = new Set();
  (section?.fields || []).forEach((field) => {
    if (!field?.name) return;
    const fieldName = String(field.name).trim();
    if (!fieldName) return;
    paths.add(sectionPath ? `${sectionPath}.${fieldName}` : fieldName);
    paths.add(fieldName);
    if (field.type === "array") {
      (field?.fields || []).forEach((nestedField) => {
        if (!nestedField?.name) return;
        const nestedName = String(nestedField.name).trim();
        if (!nestedName) return;
        paths.add(
          sectionPath
            ? `${sectionPath}.${fieldName}.*.${nestedName}`
            : `${fieldName}.*.${nestedName}`,
        );
      });
    }
  });
  return paths;
}

function resolveErrorTarget(path, groupedSections = []) {
  const normalizedPath = String(path || "").trim();
  if (!normalizedPath) return null;
  const topLevel = normalizedPath.split(".")[0];

  for (const group of groupedSections) {
    for (const sectionState of group?.sections || []) {
      const section = sectionState?.section || {};
      const sectionPath = section?.path ? String(section.path).trim() : "";
      const candidates = getSectionFieldPaths(section);

      if (sectionPath) {
        if (
          normalizedPath === sectionPath ||
          normalizedPath.startsWith(`${sectionPath}.`)
        ) {
          return { groupIndex: group.index, sectionPath, section };
        }
      }

      if (candidates.has(normalizedPath) || candidates.has(topLevel)) {
        return { groupIndex: group.index, sectionPath, section };
      }
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function indexFieldLabels(groupedSections = []) {
  const labelMap = new Map();

  groupedSections.forEach((group) => {
    (group?.sections || []).forEach((sectionState) => {
      const section = sectionState?.section || {};
      const sectionTitle = section?.title || "";
      const sectionPath = section?.path || "";

      (section?.fields || []).forEach((field) => {
        if (!field?.name) return;
        const basePath = sectionPath
          ? `${sectionPath}.${field.name}`
          : field.name;
        const fieldLabel = field?.label || humanizePath(field.name);
        // try to extract a format hint from common field metadata
        const formatHint =
          field?.format ||
          field?.pattern ||
          field?.example ||
          field?.placeholder ||
          field?.hint ||
          field?.formatExample ||
          field?.mask ||
          null;
        labelMap.set(basePath, { sectionTitle, fieldLabel, formatHint });

        if (field.type === "array") {
          (field?.fields || []).forEach((nestedField) => {
            if (!nestedField?.name) return;
            const nestedPath = `${basePath}.*.${nestedField.name}`;
            const nestedLabel =
              nestedField?.label || humanizePath(nestedField.name);
            labelMap.set(nestedPath, { sectionTitle, fieldLabel: nestedLabel });
          });
        }
      });
    });
  });
  return labelMap;
}

function humanizeMessage(msg) {
  if (!msg) return "";
  const text = String(msg).trim();
  if (/obligatorio/i.test(text)) return "Es obligatorio completar este campo.";
  if (/formato inválido|invalid format|invalid/i.test(text))
    return "Formato inválido. Revisa el valor y el formato solicitado.";
  if (/requerido/i.test(text)) return "Este dato es requerido.";
  return text;
}

/**
 * ErrorsSummary - Lista resumida de errores del formulario con navegación rápida.
 * Muestra hasta `max` errores y permite hacer scroll al campo correspondiente.
 *
 * @param {Object} props
 * @param {Object} [props.errors] - Mapa de errores por path { 'field.path': 'mensaje' }
 * @param {number} [props.max=8] - Límite de errores a mostrar
 * @returns {JSX.Element|null}
 */
export default function ErrorsSummary({
  errors = {},
  max = 8,
  groupedSections = [],
  goToGroup = null,
}) {
  const entries = useMemo(() => Object.entries(errors || {}), [errors]);
  const labelMap = useMemo(
    () => indexFieldLabels(groupedSections),
    [groupedSections],
  );
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const pendingFocusPathRef = useRef("");
  const focusRetryRef = useRef(null);
  const resolveFieldLabel = (path) => {
    const direct = labelMap.get(path);
    if (direct) return direct;

    const normalizedPath = normalizePath(path);
    const normalized = labelMap.get(normalizedPath);
    if (normalized) return normalized;

    return null;
  };

  const handleGo = (path) => {
    const target = resolveErrorTarget(path, groupedSections);
    if (target?.groupIndex !== undefined && typeof goToGroup === "function") {
      goToGroup(target.groupIndex);
    }

    pendingFocusPathRef.current = path;
    if (focusRetryRef.current) {
      clearTimeout(focusRetryRef.current);
      focusRetryRef.current = null;
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const focusPendingTarget = (attempt = 0) => {
      const path = pendingFocusPathRef.current;
      if (!path) return;
      const shell =
        document.querySelector(`[data-field-path="${path}"]`) ||
        document.querySelector(`[name="${path}"]`);
      if (!shell) {
        if (attempt < 10) {
          focusRetryRef.current = setTimeout(
            () => focusPendingTarget(attempt + 1),
            100,
          );
        }
        return;
      }

      const section = shell.closest(".credit-section");
      const hiddenBody = section?.querySelector(
        ".credit-section__body--hidden",
      );
      if (hiddenBody) {
        section.querySelector(".credit-section__toggle")?.click();
      }

      if (shell.scrollIntoView) {
        shell.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
      }

      const el =
        shell.querySelector?.("input,select,textarea,button,[tabindex]") ||
        shell;
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (!el || typeof el.focus !== "function") return;
        try {
          el.focus({ preventScroll: true });
        } catch {
          // ignore focus failures
        }
      }, 120);

      pendingFocusPathRef.current = "";
    };

    if (pendingFocusPathRef.current) {
      focusPendingTarget();
    }

    return () => {
      if (focusRetryRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(focusRetryRef.current);
        focusRetryRef.current = null;
      }
    };
  }, [groupedSections, entries.length]);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.body.classList.toggle("has-modal-errors-open", isModalOpen);
    if (!isModalOpen) {
      return () => document.body.classList.remove("has-modal-errors-open");
    }
    const onEsc = (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Escape") setIsModalOpen(false);
    };
    document.addEventListener("keydown", onEsc);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("keydown", onEsc);
      document.body.classList.remove("has-modal-errors-open");
    };
  }, [isModalOpen]);

  const unique = entries.slice(0, max);
  const count = entries.length;
  const hasErrors = count > 0;

  // If there are no errors, don't render the summary banner at all
  if (!hasErrors) return null;
  return (
    <>
      <div
        className="errors-summary error-digest"
        role="alert"
        aria-live="assertive"
      >
        <div className="errors-summary__header error-digest__head">
          <div>
            <h4 className="errors-summary__title error-digest__title">
              {count === 1
                ? "Hay 1 campo que requiere atención"
                : `Hay ${count} campos que requieren atención`}
            </h4>
            <p className="errors-summary__subtitle">
              {count === 0
                ? "Completa nuevos datos para mantener el formulario sin observaciones."
                : "Selecciona un elemento para ir directamente al campo y corregirlo."}
            </p>
          </div>
          <span className="errors-summary__count error-digest__count">
            {count === 1 ? "1 error" : `${count} errores`}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="errors-summary__list-wrap">
          <ul className="errors-summary__list error-digest__list">
            {hasErrors ? (
              unique.map(([path, msg]) => {
                const friendly = humanizeMessage(msg);
                const resolved = resolveFieldLabel(path);
                const label =
                  resolved?.fieldLabel || humanizePath(path) || path;
                const sectionLabel = resolved?.sectionTitle || "";
                const formatHint = resolved?.formatHint || null;
                return (
                  <li
                    key={path}
                    className="errors-summary__item error-digest__item"
                  >
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className="errors-summary__link error-digest__link"
                      onClick={() => handleGo(path)}
                      aria-label={`${label}: ${friendly}. Ir al campo`}
                    >
                      <span className="errors-summary__path">
                        {sectionLabel ? `${sectionLabel} › ${label}` : label}
                      </span>
                      <span className="errors-summary__msg"> — {friendly}</span>
                      {/formato inválido/i.test(friendly) && formatHint ? (
                        <div className="errors-summary__format-hint">
                          Formato esperado: {formatHint}
                        </div>
                      ) : null}
                    </button>
                  </li>
                );
              })
            ) : (
              <li className="errors-summary__item error-digest__item errors-summary__item--empty">
                <span className="errors-summary__empty-copy">
                  Sin errores activos.
                </span>
              </li>
            )}
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div className="errors-summary__actions">
          <button
            type="button"
            className="link-button errors-summary__expand-btn"
            onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(true)}
            disabled={!hasErrors}
            aria-disabled={!hasErrors}
            title={
              !hasErrors
                ? "No hay errores para mostrar."
                : "Ver listado completo de errores"
            }
          >
            Ver más
          </button>
        </div>
        <p
          className={`errors-summary__more ${count > unique.length ? "" : "errors-summary__more--empty"}`.trim()}
        >
          {count > unique.length
            ? `Y ${count - unique.length} ${count - unique.length === 1 ? "campo más" : "campos más"}.`
            : "\u00A0"}
        </p>
      </div>
      {isModalOpen && hasErrors && (
        <div
          className="modal-overlay modal-overlay--errors"
          role="dialog"
          aria-modal="true"
          aria-label="Listado completo de errores del formulario"
          onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)}
        >
          <div
            className="modal modal--errors"
            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
          >
            <header className="modal__header">
              <div>
                <h3 className="modal__title">Campos pendientes</h3>
                <p className="modal__subtitle">
                  {count === 1
                    ? "Hay 1 error por corregir."
                    : `Hay ${count} errores por corregir.`}
                </p>
              </div>
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn btn--ghost btn--sm"
                onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)}
              >
                Cerrar
              </button>
            </header>
            <div className="modal__body errors-summary-modal__body">
              <ul className="errors-summary-modal__list">
                {entries.map(([path, msg]) => {
                  const friendly = humanizeMessage(msg);
                  const resolved = resolveFieldLabel(path);
                  const label =
                    resolved?.fieldLabel || humanizePath(path) || path;
                  const sectionLabel = resolved?.sectionTitle || "";
                  return (
                    <li
                      key={`modal-${path}`}
                      className="errors-summary-modal__item"
                    >
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        className="errors-summary-modal__link"
                        onClick={() => {
                          handleGo(path);
                          setIsModalOpen(false);
                        }}
                        aria-label={`${label}: ${friendly}. Ir al campo`}
                      >
                        <span className="errors-summary-modal__path">
                          {sectionLabel ? `${sectionLabel} › ${label}` : label}
                        </span>
                        <span className="errors-summary-modal__msg">
                          {" "}
                          — {friendly}
                        </span>
                      </button>
                    </li>
                  );
                })}
              </ul>
            </div>
            <footer className="modal__footer">
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn btn--primary"
                onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)}
              >
                Entendido
              </button>
            </footer>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
}

ErrorsSummary.propTypes = {
  errors: PropTypes.object,
  max: PropTypes.number,
  groupedSections: PropTypes.array,
  goToGroup: PropTypes.func,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/ErrorsSummary.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #69
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/FormsMainContent.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/FormsMainContent.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 184
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useState } from "react";
import ErrorsSummary from "./ErrorsSummary.jsx";
import { ApprovalBanner } from "./FormsUiModule.jsx";
import MobileDocsToolbar from "./MobileDocsToolbar.jsx";
import StickyCTA from "./StickyCTA.jsx";
import FormSection from "./section/FormSection.jsx";

export default function MainContent({
  formType,
  progressPercent,
  errors,
  formData,
  groupedSections,
  safeActiveGroupIndex,
  goToGroup,
  activeGroupSections,
  handleFieldChange,
  handleArrayChange,
  handleArrayAdd,
  handleArrayRemove,
  showHiddenSections,
  goPrevStep,
  primaryLabel,
  primaryDisabled,
  primaryTitle,
  primaryAction,
  isSigningStep = false,
  handleGenerate,
  loadingSaveForm,
  statusSaveForm,
  activePreviewDocId,
  setPreviewDocId,
  availableDocuments = [],
  errorSaveForm,
  lockedFieldPaths,
  workflowFiles,
  workflowDocumentFiles,
  statusWorkflowFiles,
  handleWorkflowFileTarget,
  workflowUploadStatus,
  handlePrintPreview,
  handleExportPdf,
}) {
  const [openSheet, setOpenSheet] = useState(null); // null | "preview" | "attachments"

  const isFirstStep = safeActiveGroupIndex === 0;
  const isLastStep = safeActiveGroupIndex === 3; // Cap at Step 4

  return (
    <div
      className={`forms-main form-workspace__main ${openSheet ? "form-workspace--sheet-open" : ""}`}
    >

      <nav className="forms-stepper form-workspace__stepper" aria-label="Grupos del formulario">
        {groupedSections.slice(0, 4).map((group) => {
          const isActive = safeActiveGroupIndex === group.index;
          return (
            <button
              key={`group-${group.index}`}
              type="button"
              className={`forms-stepper__item forms-stepper__item--group ${isActive ? "forms-stepper__item--active" : ""} ${group.errorsCount > 0 ? "forms-stepper__item--error" : ""}`}
              onClick={() => goToGroup(group.index)}
              title={group.label}
              aria-label={`Paso ${group.index + 1}: ${group.label}`}
            >
              <span className={`forms-stepper__index ${isActive ? "forms-stepper__index--active" : ""}`}>{group.index + 1}</span>
              <small className="forms-stepper__label">{group.label}</small>
            </button>
          );
        })}
      </nav>

      <div className="forms-progress form-workspace__progress">
        <div className="forms-progress__label">
          <strong>{progressPercent}%</strong> completado
        </div>
        <div className="form-progress">
          <div className="form-progress__fill" style={{ width: `${progressPercent}%` }} />
        </div>
      </div>

      <ErrorsSummary
        errors={errors}
        groupedSections={groupedSections}
        goToGroup={goToGroup}
      />
      <ApprovalBanner creditDepartment={formData?.creditDepartment} />

      <div className="forms-group__sections form-workspace__sections">
        {activeGroupSections.map((sectionState, localIndex) => (
          <div
            key={`${sectionState.section.title}-${localIndex}`}
            className="forms-group__section forms-group__section--active"
          >
            <FormSection
              formType={formType}
              section={sectionState.section}
              formData={formData}
              errors={errors}
              lockedFieldPaths={lockedFieldPaths}
              onChange={handleFieldChange}
              onArrayChange={handleArrayChange}
              onArrayAdd={handleArrayAdd}
              onArrayRemove={handleArrayRemove}
              isExpanded
              hasData={sectionState.hasData}
              showHiddenSections={showHiddenSections}
            />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {statusSaveForm === 200 && (
        <div className="ef-banner ef-banner--success">Formulario enviado correctamente.</div>
      )}
      {errorSaveForm && <div className="ef-banner ef-banner--error">{errorSaveForm}</div>}

      {/* Desktop-only nav buttons */}
      <div className="forms-nav form-workspace__nav forms-nav--desktop">
        <button
          type="button"
          className="btn btn--secondary"
          onClick={goPrevStep}
          disabled={isFirstStep}
        >
          Anterior
        </button>
        {!isLastStep && (
          <button type="button" className="btn btn--secondary" onClick={primaryAction} disabled={primaryDisabled}>
            {primaryLabel}
          </button>
        )}
        {isLastStep && (
          <button
            type="button"
            className={`btn ${isSigningStep ? 'btn--primary' : 'btn--secondary'}`}
            onClick={primaryAction}
            disabled={primaryDisabled}
            title={primaryTitle}
          >
            {primaryLabel}
          </button>
        )}
        <button type="button" className="btn btn--primary" onClick={handleGenerate}>
          Generar documentos
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Unified Mobile Components */}
      <MobileDocsToolbar
        formData={formData}
        formType={formData?.formType}
        primaryDocumentId={activePreviewDocId || formData?.primaryDocumentId || ""}
        availableDocuments={availableDocuments}
        onSelectDocument={setPreviewDocId}
        openSheet={openSheet}
        onClose={() => setOpenSheet(null)}
        workflowFiles={workflowFiles}
        workflowDocumentFiles={workflowDocumentFiles}
        statusWorkflowFiles={statusWorkflowFiles}
        handleWorkflowFileTarget={handleWorkflowFileTarget}
        workflowUploadStatus={workflowUploadStatus}
        handlePrintPreview={handlePrintPreview}
        handleExportPdf={handleExportPdf}
      />

      <StickyCTA
        primaryLabel={primaryLabel}
        onPrimary={primaryAction}
        onPrev={goPrevStep}
        onOpenPreview={() => setOpenSheet("preview")}
        onOpenAttachments={() => setOpenSheet("attachments")}
        isFirstStep={isFirstStep}
        isLastStep={isLastStep}
        onGenerate={handleGenerate}
        disabled={loadingSaveForm || primaryDisabled}
        primaryTitle={primaryTitle}
        isMobileSheetOpen={!!openSheet}
      />
    </div>

  );
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/FormsMainContent.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #70
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/FormsSidebar.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/FormsSidebar.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 361
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { getAvailableDocumentDefinitions as getPdfDocuments } from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import { disposeOfficialPdfPreview } from "@/core/document/services/pdfPreviewService";
import {
  isPersistedRemoteFile,
  isResolvablePreviewUrl,
} from "@/shared/components/attachments/attachmentsDocTypes";
import { EMPTY_DOCUMENTS, safeRevokeBlobUrl } from "./signingHelpers";

export function FormsSidebar({
  formType,
  activePreviewDocId,
  setPreviewDocId,
  workflowFiles,
  workflowDocumentFiles,
  statusWorkflowFiles,
  handleWorkflowFileTarget,
  formData,
  workflowUploadStatus,
  signState,
  handleSigning,
  handleRemoveAttachment,
  openPreviewModal,
  canStartSigning = false,
}) {
  const docs = getPdfDocuments(formType);
  const [preview, setPreview] = useState({
    open: false,
    url: null,
    type: null,
    name: null,
    loading: false,
  });
  const previewBlobUrlRef = useRef("");
  const previewCacheKeyRef = useRef("");
  const uploadedByFileTypeId = new Map(
    (workflowDocumentFiles || [])
      .filter(Boolean)
      .filter((file) => isPersistedRemoteFile(file))
      .map((file) => [
        String(file.fileTypeId || file.fileid || file.id || ""),
        file,
      ]),
  );

  const handlePreview = (attachment) => {
    if (!attachment) return;
    if (attachment?.file instanceof File) {
      const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(attachment.file);
      previewBlobUrlRef.current = objectUrl;
      setPreview({
        open: true,
        url: objectUrl,
        type: attachment.type || attachment.file.type || "application/pdf",
        name: attachment.name || attachment.file.name || "Archivo",
        loading: false,
      });
      return;
    }
    const url = attachment.url || attachment.path;
    if (!url) return;
    setPreview({
      open: true,
      url,
      type: attachment.type,
      name: attachment.name,
      loading: false,
    });
  };

  useEffect(
    () => () => {
      if (previewCacheKeyRef.current) {
        disposeOfficialPdfPreview(previewCacheKeyRef.current);
        previewCacheKeyRef.current = "";
      }
      safeRevokeBlobUrl(previewBlobUrlRef.current);
      previewBlobUrlRef.current = "";
    },
    [],
  );

  const closePreview = () => {
    if (previewCacheKeyRef.current) {
      disposeOfficialPdfPreview(previewCacheKeyRef.current);
      previewCacheKeyRef.current = "";
    }
    safeRevokeBlobUrl(previewBlobUrlRef.current || preview.url);
    previewBlobUrlRef.current = "";
    setPreview({
      open: false,
      url: null,
      type: null,
      name: null,
      loading: false,
    });
  };

  const previewBodyContent = (() => {
    if (preview.loading) {
      return (
        <div className="forms-empty-state">
          <div className="ef-spinner ef-spinner--lg" />
          <p>Generando documento en memoria...</p>
        </div>
      );
    }
    if (!preview.url) {
      return (
        <div className="forms-empty-state">
          <p>
            {preview.error ||
              "No es posible previsualizar este archivo directamente."}
          </p>
        </div>
      );
    }
    if ((preview.type || "").startsWith("image/")) {
      return (
        <img
          className="attachments-preview__img responsive-media"
          src={preview.url}
          alt={preview.name || ""}
          loading="lazy"
        />
      );
    }
    return (
      <iframe
        className="document-preview-frame"
        title="Vista previa de archivo"
        aria-label={preview.name || "Vista previa de archivo"}
        src={preview.url}
        loading="lazy"
        referrerPolicy="no-referrer"
      />
    );
  })();

  return (
    <aside className="forms-sidebar form-workspace__sidebar">
      <div className="sidebar-card form-workspace__sidebar-card">
        <div className="pdf-card__head">
          <h3 className="sidebar-card__title">Vista previa HTML</h3>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn--ghost btn--sm"
            onClick={openPreviewModal}
          >
            Ver PDF
          </button>
        </div>
        <div
          className="pdf-tabs"
          role="tablist"
          aria-label="Selector de documento"
        >
          {docs.map((doc) => (
            <button
              key={doc.id}
              type="button"
              role="tab"
              aria-selected={activePreviewDocId === doc.id}
              className={`pdf-tabs__item ${activePreviewDocId === doc.id ? "pdf-tabs__item--active" : ""}`}
              onClick={() => setPreviewDocId(doc.id)}
            >
              {doc.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <p className="forms-empty-state forms-empty-state--tight">
          Documento activo:{" "}
          {docs.find((d) => d.id === activePreviewDocId)?.label || "Solicitud"}
        </p>
      </div>
      <div className="sidebar-card form-workspace__sidebar-card">
        <div className="pdf-card__head">
          <h3 className="sidebar-card__title">Archivos requeridos</h3>
        </div>
        {workflowFiles.length > 0 ? (
          <ul className="required-files-list">
            {workflowFiles.map((file) => {
              const fileTypeKey = String(file.fileTypeId || file.id || "");
              const uploadedFile = uploadedByFileTypeId.get(fileTypeKey);
              const attachment = formData?.attachments?.[fileTypeKey];
              const hasLocalFile = Boolean(attachment?.file instanceof File);
              const hasLocalResolvableUrl = isResolvablePreviewUrl(
                attachment?.url || attachment?.path,
              );
              const isUploaded = Boolean(
                isPersistedRemoteFile(uploadedFile) || hasLocalFile,
              );
              const canPreview = Boolean(
                (uploadedFile &&
                  isResolvablePreviewUrl(
                    uploadedFile?.path || uploadedFile?.url,
                  )) ||
                hasLocalFile ||
                (attachment && hasLocalResolvableUrl),
              );
              const isSignable = file.requiresSignature;
              const isSigned =
                formData?.signatureBatch?.completed ||
                formData?.signing?.signedAt ||
                attachment?.signed;
              return (
                <li
                  key={fileTypeKey}
                  className={`required-files-list__item ${isUploaded ? "required-files-list__item--uploaded" : ""}`}
                >
                  <div className="required-files-list__content">
                    <div className="required-files-list__head">
                      <strong className="required-files-list__name">
                        {file.fileTypeName || file.name || "Archivo requerido"}
                        {file.isRequired && (
                          <span
                            className="attachment-row__required"
                            title="Documento requerido"
                          >
                            ●
                          </span>
                        )}
                      </strong>
                    </div>
                    <div className="required-files-list__meta">
                      {isUploaded ? (
                        <span className="status-pill status-pill--success">
                          Cargado
                        </span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="status-pill">Pendiente</span>
                      )}
                      {uploadedFile?.name && (
                        <span className="required-files-list__filename">
                          {uploadedFile.name}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="attachment-row__controls">
                    <div className="attachment-row__actions">
                      {isSignable && !isSigned && (
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          className={`btn-icon btn-icon--secondary icon-signature ${signState?.isSigning ? "btn-icon--loading" : ""} ${!canStartSigning ? "btn-icon--disabled" : ""}`}
                          title={
                            !canStartSigning
                              ? "Completa los documentos habilitantes para revisar la firma"
                              : "Firmar documento"
                          }
                          onClick={() => canStartSigning && handleSigning(file)}
                          disabled={signState?.isSigning || !canStartSigning}
                        />
                      )}
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        className={`btn-icon btn-icon--secondary icon-upload ${isSignable ? "btn-icon--disabled" : ""}`}
                        title={
                          isSignable
                            ? "Este documento requiere firma y no se puede subir manualmente"
                            : "Subir archivo"
                        }
                        onClick={() =>
                          !isSignable && handleWorkflowFileTarget(file)
                        }
                        disabled={isSignable}
                      />
                      {canPreview && (
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          className="btn-icon btn-icon--secondary icon-eye"
                          title="Previsualizar"
                          onClick={() => {
                            handlePreview(uploadedFile || attachment);
                          }}
                        />
                      )}
                      {isUploaded && (
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          className="btn-icon btn-icon--danger icon-trash"
                          title="Eliminar"
                          onClick={() => handleRemoveAttachment(fileTypeKey)}
                        />
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </li>
              );
            })}
          </ul>
        ) : (
          <p className="forms-empty-state">
            {statusWorkflowFiles === 200
              ? "No se encontraron archivos requeridos para el workflow."
              : "Cargando archivos requeridos..."}
          </p>
        )}
        {(workflowUploadStatus && (
          <p className="forms-empty-state forms-empty-state--tight forms-empty-state--success">
            {workflowUploadStatus}
          </p>
        )) || (
          <p className="forms-empty-state forms-empty-state--tight">
            Usa los controles para gestionar tus documentos.
          </p>
        )}
      </div>
      {preview.open && (
        <div
          className="modal-overlay attachments-preview"
          role="dialog"
          aria-modal="true"
          aria-label="Vista previa de archivo"
          tabIndex={-1}
          onClick={closePreview}
          onKeyDown={(event) => {
            if (event.key === "Escape") closePreview();
          }}
        >
          <div className="modal attachments-preview__panel">
            <header className="modal__header attachments-preview__header">
              <h3>{preview.name || "Archivo"}</h3>
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn-close-preview"
                onClick={closePreview}
                title="Cerrar vista previa"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </header>
            <div className="modal__body attachments-preview__body">
              {previewBodyContent}
            </div>
            <footer className="modal__footer attachments-preview__footer">
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn btn--ghost"
                onClick={closePreview}
              >
                Cerrar
              </button>
              {preview.url && (
                <a
                  className="btn btn--primary"
                  href={preview.url}
                  target="_blank"
                  rel="noreferrer"
                >
                  Ver por separado
                </a>
              )}
            </footer>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </aside>
  );
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/FormsSidebar.jsx ==========================

import React, { memo } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";

export function ApprovalBanner({ creditDepartment }) {
  if (!creditDepartment?.approvalDecision) return null;
  const {
    approvalDecision,
    approvedAmount,
    approvalTerm,
    approverName,
    approvalTimestamp,
  } = creditDepartment;
  const isApproved = approvalDecision === "approved";
  const dateLabel = approvalTimestamp
    ? new Date(approvalTimestamp).toLocaleString("es-EC")
    : null;
  return (
    <div
      className={`approval-banner approval-notice approval-banner--${isApproved ? "approved" : "denied"} approval-notice--${isApproved ? "approved" : "denied"}`}
    >
      <div className="approval-banner__headline approval-notice__headline">
        <span
          className="approval-banner__icon approval-notice__icon"
          aria-hidden="true"
        >
          {isApproved ? "✓" : "✕"}
        </span>
        <span className="approval-banner__title">
          Solicitud {isApproved ? "APROBADA" : "NEGADA"}
        </span>
        {isApproved && approvedAmount && (
          <span className="approval-banner__meta">
            {" "}
            · Monto: ${approvedAmount}
          </span>
        )}
        {isApproved && approvalTerm && (
          <span className="approval-banner__meta">
            {" "}
            · Plazo: {approvalTerm} meses
          </span>
        )}
      </div>
      {approverName && (
        <div className="approval-banner__footer approval-notice__footer">
          {isApproved ? "Aprobado" : "Decisión tomada"} por{" "}
          <span className="approval-banner__by-strong">{approverName}</span>
          {dateLabel && <> · {dateLabel}</>}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export function SectionStatusLegend() {
  return (
    <div className="summary-card">
      <h4 className="summary-card__title">Estado de secciones</h4>
      <div className="summary-card__list">
        <div className="legend-row">
          <span className="credit-section__badge" aria-hidden>
            ✓
          </span>
          <span>Sección completa</span>
        </div>
        <div className="legend-row">
          <span className="credit-section__errors-badge" aria-hidden>
            !
          </span>
          <span>Sección incompleta (errores)</span>
        </div>
        <div className="legend-row">
          <span
            className="credit-section__badge credit-section__badge--info"
            aria-hidden
          >
            ●
          </span>
          <span>Sección con datos</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function InternalFormSelector({ formType, onSelect }) {
  return (
    <div
      className="hero__actions form-type-switcher form-switch"
      role="tablist"
      aria-label="Tipo de solicitud"
    >
      <button
        type="button"
        role="tab"
        className={`switcher__button form-switch__button ${formType === "natural" ? "switcher__button--active form-switch__button--active" : ""}`}
        onClick={() => onSelect("natural")}
        aria-pressed={formType === "natural"}
        aria-selected={formType === "natural"}
      >
        <strong>Crédito individual</strong>
        <small>Persona natural o jurídica</small>
      </button>
      <button
        type="button"
        role="tab"
        className={`switcher__button form-switch__button ${formType === "linked" ? "switcher__button--active form-switch__button--active" : ""}`}
        onClick={() => onSelect("linked")}
        aria-pressed={formType === "linked"}
        aria-selected={formType === "linked"}
      >
        <strong>Clientes vinculados</strong>
        <small>Grupo económico y relacionados</small>
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

export const FormSelector = memo(InternalFormSelector);

export function FormsHeader({
  formType,
  switchFormType,
  showHiddenSections,
  setShowHiddenSections,
  handleClearDraft,
  detectedFormType = null,
}) {
  return (
    <header className="forms-hero form-workspace__hero">
      {/* Brand section */}
      <div className="forms-hero__brand">
        <div className="forms-hero__topline">
          <img
            className="forms-hero__logo"
            src="/assets/IconSisad.png"
            alt="Sisad"
          />
          <span className="forms-hero__eyebrow">Inverneg</span>
        </div>
        <h1 className="forms-hero__title">Solicitud de Crédito</h1>
      </div>

      {/* Toolbar */}
      <div className="forms-toolbar form-workspace__toolbar">
        {!detectedFormType && (
          <div className="forms-toolbar__form-type">
            <FormSelector formType={formType} onSelect={switchFormType} />
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="forms-toolbar__actions">
          <button
            type="button"
            className={`forms-toolbar__toggle ${showHiddenSections ? "forms-toolbar__toggle--active" : ""}`}
            aria-pressed={showHiddenSections}
            aria-label={
              showHiddenSections
                ? "Ocultar campos condicionados"
                : "Mostrar campos condicionados"
            }
            onClick={() => setShowHiddenSections(!showHiddenSections)}
          >
            {showHiddenSections ? (
              <svg
                className="forms-toolbar__toggle-icon"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                fill="none"
                aria-hidden
              >
                <path
                  d="M3 3l18 18"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="1.5"
                  strokeLinecap="round"
                  strokeLinejoin="round"
                />
                <path
                  d="M10.94 10.94a3 3 0 0 0 4.24 4.24"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="1.5"
                  strokeLinecap="round"
                  strokeLinejoin="round"
                />
              </svg>
            ) : (
              <svg
                className="forms-toolbar__toggle-icon"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                fill="none"
                aria-hidden
              >
                <path
                  d="M1 12s4-7 11-7 11 7 11 7-4 7-11 7S1 12 1 12z"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="1.2"
                  strokeLinecap="round"
                  strokeLinejoin="round"
                />
                <circle
                  cx="12"
                  cy="12"
                  r="3"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="1.2"
                  strokeLinecap="round"
                  strokeLinejoin="round"
                />
              </svg>
            )}
            <span className="sr-only">
              {showHiddenSections
                ? "Ocultar condicionados"
                : "Mostrar condicionados"}
            </span>
            <span className="forms-toolbar__toggle-label">
              {showHiddenSections
                ? "Ocultar condicionados"
                : "Mostrar condicionados"}
            </span>
            <span className="forms-toolbar__toggle-label--short">
              {showHiddenSections ? "Ocultar" : "Condicionados"}
            </span>
          </button>

          <button
            type="button"
            className="forms-toolbar__clear"
            onClick={handleClearDraft}
            aria-label="Limpiar borrador"
          >
            <svg
              className="forms-toolbar__clear-icon"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              fill="none"
              aria-hidden
            >
              <path
                d="M3 6h18M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2m3 0v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6h14z"
                stroke="currentColor"
                strokeWidth="1.5"
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
              />
            </svg>
            <span className="forms-toolbar__clear-label">Limpiar</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>
  );
}

export function PreviewModal({
  isOpen,
  close,
  printPreview,
  frameRef,
  previewState,
  title,
}) {
  if (!isOpen) return null;
  return (
    <div
      className="modal-overlay attachments-preview fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-2 sm:p-4"
      role="dialog"
      aria-modal="true"
      aria-label="Vista previa del documento"
    >
      <div className="modal attachments-preview__panel bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-4xl max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col">
        <header className="modal__header attachments-preview__header flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-2 p-4 border-b border-gray-200">
          <div className="attachments-preview__heading">
            <p className="attachments-preview__eyebrow text-xs text-gray-500">
              Vista previa de impresión
            </p>
            <h3 className="modal__title text-sm sm:text-base font-semibold text-gray-900">
              {title || "Documento PDF"}
            </h3>
          </div>
          <div className="attachments-preview__actions flex gap-2">
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn--primary attachments-preview__action px-3 py-1.5 text-xs sm:text-sm rounded bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors"
              onClick={printPreview}
            >
              Imprimir / Guardar PDF
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn-close-preview w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors text-gray-500"
              onClick={close}
              title="Cerrar vista previa"
            >
              ✕
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>
        <div className="modal__body attachments-preview__body flex-1 overflow-auto p-2 sm:p-4">
          <div className="attachments-preview__stage h-full min-h-[300px] sm:min-h-[500px]">
            {previewState.loading && (
              <div className="attachments-preview__empty flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full">
                <div className="ef-spinner ef-spinner--lg" />
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                  Generando documento...
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
            {previewState.error && (
              <div className="attachments-preview__empty flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full">
                <div className="attachments-preview__empty-icon text-3xl text-red-500">
                  !
                </div>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-red-600">
                  {previewState.error}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
            {!previewState.loading &&
              !previewState.error &&
              previewState.blobUrl && (
                <iframe
                  title="Vista previa PDF"
                  className="document-preview-frame w-full h-full min-h-[300px] sm:min-h-[500px] border-0 rounded"
                  src={previewState.blobUrl}
                  ref={frameRef}
                  loading="lazy"
                  referrerPolicy="no-referrer"
                />
              )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default {
  ApprovalBanner,
  SectionStatusLegend,
  FormSelector,
  FormsHeader,
  PreviewModal,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/FormsUiModule.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #72
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/MobileDocsToolbar.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/MobileDocsToolbar.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 275
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useMemo, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from "react-redux";
import { useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
import DocumentPreview from "@/shared/components/preview/DocumentPreview.jsx";
import { AttachmentsDialog } from "@/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsModule.jsx";
import { getExternalFlowContext } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowCrud";
import { uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch } from "@/store/slices/requestSlice";
import { logger } from "@/shared/utils/common";

const MobileWorkflowAttachmentsWrapper = ({
  workflowFiles,
  formData,
  formType,
  onCancel,
  onSaveSuccess,
}) => {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const location = useLocation();
  const { session } = useSelector((state) => state.auth);
  const { loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch } = useSelector(
    (state) => state.request,
  );
  const routeContext = useMemo(
    () => getExternalFlowContext(location),
    [location],
  );

  // Convierte los archivos del workflow en el formato docTypes que entiende AttachmentsDialog
  const docTypes = useMemo(() => {
    return (workflowFiles || []).map((wf) => ({
      id: wf.fileTypeId || wf.id,
      label: wf.fileTypeName || wf.name || "Archivo requerido",
      rule: wf.isRequired ? "required" : "optional",
      workflowFileTypeId: wf.fileTypeId || wf.id,
      workflowMeta: {
        requiresSignature: Boolean(
          wf.requiresSignature ?? wf.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature ?? false,
        ),
      },
    }));
  }, [workflowFiles]);

  const handleSave = async (attachments) => {
    const uploadEntries = Object.entries(attachments)
      .filter(([, val]) => val && val.file)
      .map(([docTypeId, attachment]) => {
        const wfItem = workflowFiles.find(
          (w) => w.fileTypeId === docTypeId || w.id === docTypeId,
        );
        return {
          exec: routeContext.exec,
          wrk: routeContext.wrk,
          dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
          documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
          folderId: session?.folderId,
          token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
          fileTypeId: wfItem?.fileTypeId || docTypeId,
          name: attachment.name,
          description: wfItem?.fileTypeName || attachment.name,
          file: attachment.file,
        };
      });

    if (uploadEntries.length > 0) {
      try {
        const action = dispatch(
          uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch({
            uploads: uploadEntries,
            refreshPayload: {
              exec: routeContext.exec,
              wrk: routeContext.wrk,
              dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
              documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
              folderId: session?.folderId,
              token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
            },
          }),
        );
        if (action && typeof action.unwrap === "function") {
          await action.unwrap();
        } else {
          await action;
        }
      } catch (err) {
        logger.error("Error al subir adjuntos agrupados:", err);
      }
    }
    onSaveSuccess();
  };

  return (
    <AttachmentsDialog
      docTypes={docTypes}
      value={formData?.attachments || {}}
      onCancel={onCancel}
      onSave={handleSave}
      saving={loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch}
      routeContext={routeContext}
      session={session}
      formData={formData}
      formType={formType}
    />
  );
};

MobileWorkflowAttachmentsWrapper.propTypes = {
  workflowFiles: PropTypes.array,
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  onCancel: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onSaveSuccess: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
};

/**
 * MobileDocsToolbar — Bottom Sheet manager.
 */
const MobileDocsToolbar = ({
  formData,
  formType = "natural",
  primaryDocumentId,
  availableDocuments = [],
  onSelectDocument,
  openSheet = null, // "preview" | "attachments" | null
  onClose,
  workflowFiles = [],
  workflowUploadStatus,
  handlePrintPreview,
  handleExportPdf,
}) => {
  const isSheetOpen = Boolean(openSheet);
  const isPreview = openSheet === "preview";
  const sheetRef = useRef(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    // If the sheet is being closed while a descendant retains focus, blur it
    if (!isSheetOpen && typeof document !== "undefined") {
      const active = document.activeElement;
      if (
        active &&
        sheetRef.current &&
        typeof sheetRef.current.contains === "function" &&
        sheetRef.current.contains(active) &&
        typeof active.blur === "function"
      ) {
        // move focus to body to avoid aria-hidden on focused element
        active.blur();
        // Optionally focus the close trigger or another sensible element
        // document.body.focus();
      }
    }
  }, [isSheetOpen]);

  return (
    <div
      ref={sheetRef}
      className={`mobile-bottom-sheet md:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-40 bg-white rounded-t-2xl shadow-2xl transition-transform duration-300 ${isSheetOpen ? "open translate-y-0" : "translate-y-full"} ${isPreview ? "mobile-bottom-sheet--preview" : ""}`}
      aria-hidden={!isSheetOpen}
      role="dialog"
    >
      <div className="mobile-bottom-sheet__header flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200">
        {!isPreview && (
          <div className="mobile-bottom-sheet__title text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">
            Archivos requeridos
          </div>
        )}

        {isPreview && primaryDocumentId && (
          <>
            <button
              type="button"
              className="mobile-preview-action-btn w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors text-sm"
              onClick={handlePrintPreview}
              aria-label="Imprimir PDF"
              title="Imprimir"
            >
              🖨️
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              className="mobile-preview-action-btn w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors text-sm"
              onClick={() => handleExportPdf(primaryDocumentId)}
              aria-label="Descargar PDF"
              title="Descargar PDF"
            >
              💾
            </button>
          </>
        )}

        <button
          type="button"
          className="mobile-bottom-sheet__close w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors text-gray-500 ml-auto"
          onClick={onClose}
          aria-label="Cerrar"
        >
          ✕
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="mobile-bottom-sheet__content">
        {isPreview && primaryDocumentId ? (
          <div className="mobile-preview-container">
            <DocumentPreview
              formType={formType}
              documentId={primaryDocumentId}
            />

            {/* Overlay document selector tabs at the bottom to save space */}
            {availableDocuments.length > 1 && (
              <div
                className="mobile-doc-tabs floating-tabs absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 flex gap-1 px-3 py-2 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm border-t border-gray-200 overflow-x-auto"
                role="tablist"
              >
                {availableDocuments.map((doc) => (
                  <button
                    key={doc.id}
                    type="button"
                    role="tab"
                    aria-selected={primaryDocumentId === doc.id}
                    className={`mobile-doc-tabs__item flex-shrink-0 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors ${primaryDocumentId === doc.id ? "active bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 font-medium" : "text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50"}`}
                    onClick={() => onSelectDocument?.(doc.id)}
                  >
                    {/* Compact label: only key words */}
                    {doc.label
                      .replace("Solicitud de Crédito normal", "Solicitud")
                      .replace("Convenio de Crédito", "Convenio")}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        ) : isPreview ? (
          <div className="mobile-empty-sheet">
            No hay documento seleccionado.
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {openSheet === "attachments" && (
          <div className="mobile-attachments-container">
            <MobileWorkflowAttachmentsWrapper
              workflowFiles={workflowFiles}
              formData={formData}
              formType={formType}
              onCancel={onClose}
              onSaveSuccess={onClose}
            />
            {workflowUploadStatus && (
              <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-3 px-3">
                {workflowUploadStatus}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

MobileDocsToolbar.propTypes = {
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  primaryDocumentId: PropTypes.string,
  availableDocuments: PropTypes.array,
  onSelectDocument: PropTypes.func,
  openSheet: PropTypes.oneOf(["preview", "attachments", null]),
  onClose: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  workflowFiles: PropTypes.array,
  workflowUploadStatus: PropTypes.string,
  handlePrintPreview: PropTypes.func,
  handleExportPdf: PropTypes.func,
};

export default MobileDocsToolbar;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/MobileDocsToolbar.jsx ==========================

import React, { useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import {
  getSigningAnchorDefinitions,
  SIGNING_UI_STATES,
} from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import { IconButton, InfoIcon } from "./MobileSigningIcons";
import { EMPTY_DOCUMENTS } from "./signingHelpers";

export function MobileSigningDocList({
  documents = EMPTY_DOCUMENTS,
  activeDocumentId,
  onSelectDocument,
  formType,
  activeDocument,
  resolvedSigningUiState,
}) {
  const [showMetadata, setShowMetadata] = useState(false);

  const metadataAnchors = Array.isArray(activeDocument?.signatureAnchors)
    ? activeDocument.signatureAnchors
    : getSigningAnchorDefinitions(activeDocument?.id, formType);

  const metadataSigners = Array.isArray(activeDocument?.signers)
    ? activeDocument.signers
    : [];

  const handleSelectDocument = (docId) => {
    if (
      typeof onSelectDocument !== "function" ||
      !docId ||
      docId === activeDocumentId
    )
      return;
    onSelectDocument(docId);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <section className="rounded-2xl border border-white/80 bg-white/90 p-2 shadow-sm backdrop-blur">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
          <div className="min-w-0">
            <p className="text-[0.68rem] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-500">
              Documentos
            </p>
            <p className="mt-0.5 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900">
              Selecciona documento
            </p>
          </div>
          <span
            className={`inline-flex shrink-0 items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-[0.7rem] font-semibold ${resolvedSigningUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO ? "border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 text-amber-800" : "border-cyan-200 bg-cyan-50 text-cyan-700"}`}
          >
            {resolvedSigningUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO
              ? "Firmando..."
              : "Vista A4"}
          </span>
        </div>

        <div className="mobile-signing-doc-list__scroll mt-2 flex snap-x snap-mandatory gap-1.5 overflow-x-auto pb-1 [scrollbar-width:none]">
          {documents.map((doc) => {
            const isActive = doc.id === activeDocument?.id;
            const ready = Boolean(doc.readyToSign);
            return (
              <button
                key={doc.id}
                type="button"
                onClick={() => handleSelectDocument(doc.id)}
                aria-pressed={isActive}
                className={`snap-start inline-flex h-10 min-w-[7.6rem] max-w-44 shrink-0 items-center gap-2 rounded-full border px-3 text-left transition focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500/60 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 ${isActive ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50" : "border-slate-200 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50"}`}
                title={doc.label}
                aria-label={`Seleccionar ${doc.label}`}
              >
                <span
                  className={`h-2 w-2 shrink-0 rounded-full ${ready ? "bg-emerald-500" : "bg-amber-500"}`}
                />
                <span className="truncate text-[0.8rem] font-semibold text-slate-900">
                  {doc.label}
                </span>
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="mt-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2.5 shadow-sm">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
          <div className="min-w-0">
            <p className="text-[0.68rem] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-500">
              Datos y anclas
            </p>
            <h2 className="mt-0.5 truncate text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900">
              {activeDocument?.label || "Documento"}
            </h2>
          </div>
          <IconButton
            label={
              showMetadata ? "Ocultar datos y anclas" : "Mostrar datos y anclas"
            }
            title={showMetadata ? "Ocultar datos" : "Ver datos"}
            onClick={() => setShowMetadata((value) => !value)}
            pressed={showMetadata}
          >
            <InfoIcon />
          </IconButton>
        </div>

        {showMetadata ? (
          <div className="mt-2 space-y-2.5">
            <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-2">
              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                <span
                  className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-[0.72rem] font-semibold ${activeDocument?.readyToSign ? "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700" : "bg-amber-50 text-amber-800"}`}
                >
                  {activeDocument?.readyToSign
                    ? "Listo para firmar"
                    : "Pendiente"}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">
                  {activeDocument?.policyNote ||
                    "Documento contractual que requiere firma para continuar el proceso."}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-2">
              {metadataSigners.length > 0 ? (
                metadataSigners.map((signer) => (
                  <article
                    key={`${activeDocument?.id || "doc"}-${signer.role || "signer"}-${signer.name || "pending"}`}
                    className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2.5 shadow-sm"
                  >
                    {signer.role ? (
                      <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-500">
                        {signer.role}
                      </p>
                    ) : null}
                    <dl className="mt-1.5 grid gap-1 text-xs leading-5 text-slate-700">
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <dt className="w-16 shrink-0 font-semibold text-slate-900">
                          Nombre:
                        </dt>
                        <dd className="min-w-0 wrap-anywhere">
                          {signer.name || "Pendiente"}
                        </dd>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <dt className="w-16 shrink-0 font-semibold text-slate-900">
                          ID/RUC:
                        </dt>
                        <dd className="min-w-0 wrap-anywhere">
                          {signer.id || "Pendiente"}
                        </dd>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <dt className="w-16 shrink-0 font-semibold text-slate-900">
                          Empresa:
                        </dt>
                        <dd className="min-w-0 wrap-anywhere">
                          {signer.company || "Pendiente"}
                        </dd>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <dt className="w-16 shrink-0 font-semibold text-slate-900">
                          Fecha:
                        </dt>
                        <dd className="min-w-0 wrap-anywhere">
                          {signer.date || "Pendiente"}
                        </dd>
                      </div>
                    </dl>
                  </article>
                ))
              ) : (
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-3 text-xs leading-5 text-slate-600">
                  Este documento no expone firmantes adicionales.
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2.5 shadow-sm">
              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-500">
                Anclas de firma
              </p>
              <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                {metadataAnchors.length > 0 ? (
                  metadataAnchors.map((anchor) => (
                    <span
                      key={anchor.key}
                      className="inline-flex rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-[0.7rem] font-semibold text-slate-700"
                    >
                      {anchor.label}
                    </span>
                  ))
                ) : (
                  <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">
                    No se detectaron anclas de firma para este documento.
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-2.5 text-xs leading-5 text-slate-600">
            Metadatos ocultos. Usa el botón de información para ver firmantes y
            anclas.
          </div>
        )}
      </section>
    </>
  );
}

MobileSigningDocList.propTypes = {
  documents: PropTypes.array,
  activeDocumentId: PropTypes.string,
  onSelectDocument: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  activeDocument: PropTypes.object,
  resolvedSigningUiState: PropTypes.string,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/MobileSigningDocList.jsx ==========================

import React from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";

export function IconButton({
  label,
  title,
  onClick,
  children,
  pressed = null,
  disabled = false,
  className = "",
}) {
  return (
    <button
      type="button"
      onClick={onClick}
      disabled={disabled}
      aria-label={label}
      title={title}
      {...(typeof pressed === "boolean" ? { "aria-pressed": pressed } : {})}
      className={`inline-flex min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-slate-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500/60 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 ${className}`}
    >
      {children}
    </button>
  );
}

IconButton.propTypes = {
  label: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  title: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  onClick: PropTypes.func,
  children: PropTypes.node.isRequired,
  pressed: PropTypes.bool,
  disabled: PropTypes.bool,
  className: PropTypes.string,
};
