import React, { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import OfficialPdfPageList from "@/shared/components/document-preview/OfficialPdfPageList";
import {
  IconButton,
  RefreshIcon,
  ExpandIcon,
  CloseIcon,
} from "./MobileSigningIcons";

function getRemoteStatusLabel({
  officialPreviewError,
  officialPreviewReady,
  officialPreviewState,
}) {
  if (officialPreviewError) return "Error remoto";
  if (officialPreviewReady) return "PDF oficial";
  if (officialPreviewState === "syncing") return "Generando";
  return "Pendiente";
}

function getStatusPillClass(officialPreviewError, officialPreviewReady) {
  if (officialPreviewError)
    return "border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 text-rose-800";
  if (officialPreviewReady)
    return "border border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-800";
  return "border border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 text-slate-500";
}

function StaleClockIcon() {
  return (
    <svg
      width="10"
      height="10"
      viewBox="0 0 16 16"
      fill="none"
      aria-hidden="true"
    >
      <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6.5" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
      <path
        d="M8 4.5v3.75l2.5 2.5"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
    </svg>
  );
}

function PreviewStatusPillAddon({ previewLoading, officialPreviewStale }) {
  if (previewLoading) {
    return (
      <span className="h-2.5 w-2.5 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-slate-300 border-t-slate-600" />
    );
  }
  if (officialPreviewStale) {
    return <StaleClockIcon />;
  }
  return null;
}

PreviewStatusPillAddon.propTypes = {
  previewLoading: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  officialPreviewStale: PropTypes.bool,
};

function PreviewStatusBanner({ previewLoading, officialPreviewStale }) {
  if (previewLoading) return null;
  if (officialPreviewStale) {
    return (
      <div className="absolute bottom-2 left-2 right-2 rounded-lg border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50/95 px-3 py-1.5 text-[0.68rem] font-semibold text-amber-900 shadow-sm">
        Vista oficial desactualizada. Pulsa actualizar para sincronizar.
      </div>
    );
  }
  return null;
}

PreviewStatusBanner.propTypes = {
  previewLoading: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  officialPreviewStale: PropTypes.bool,
};

function PreviewLoadingOverlay({ hasOfficialPreview }) {
  return (
    <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/55 backdrop-blur-[1px]">
      <div className="flex min-h-38 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/95 p-3 text-center shadow-md">
        <div className="h-7 w-7 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-slate-200 border-t-slate-700" />
        <p className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-700">
          Generando vista oficial...
        </p>
        {!hasOfficialPreview ? (
          <p className="max-w-60 text-[0.68rem] leading-5 text-slate-500">
            Estamos solicitando el PDF remoto, puede tardar unos segundos.
          </p>
        ) : null}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

PreviewLoadingOverlay.propTypes = {
  hasOfficialPreview: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
};

function PreviewErrorOverlay({
  previewError,
  hasContent,
  onRetry,
  previewLoading,
}) {
  if (previewLoading) return null;
  if (!previewError) return null;
  if (!hasContent) {
    return (
      <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/45 backdrop-blur-[1px]">
        <div className="max-w-88 rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 bg-white/95 p-4 text-center shadow-lg">
          <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-rose-700">
            No fue posible generar la vista previa
          </p>
          <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-600">
            {previewError}
          </p>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={onRetry}
            className="mt-4 rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 shadow-sm"
          >
            Reintentar
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }
  return (
    <div className="absolute left-2 right-2 top-2 rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50/95 px-3 py-2 text-xs leading-5 text-amber-900 shadow-md">
      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
        <p className="min-w-0">{previewError}</p>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={onRetry}
          className="shrink-0 rounded-full border border-amber-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1 text-[0.68rem] font-semibold text-amber-900 shadow-sm"
        >
          Reintentar
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

PreviewErrorOverlay.propTypes = {
  previewError: PropTypes.string,
  hasContent: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  onRetry: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  previewLoading: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
};

function InlinePreviewHint({ previewLoading }) {
  if (previewLoading) return null;
  return (
    <div className="pointer-events-none absolute bottom-2 left-2 rounded-md bg-slate-900/55 px-2 py-1 text-[0.64rem] font-medium text-white">
      Desliza la pagina. Usa pantalla completa para navegar el PDF.
    </div>
  );
}

InlinePreviewHint.propTypes = {
  previewLoading: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
};

function resolvePreviewFrameKey({
  hasOfficialPreview,
  previewBlobUrl,
  previewLabel,
}) {
  if (hasOfficialPreview) return `official:${previewBlobUrl}`;
  return `official-pending:${previewLabel}`;
}

export function MobileSigningPreview({
  previewLabel,
  previewLoading,
  previewError,
  previewBlobUrl,
  officialPreviewStale,
  officialPreviewState,
  officialPreviewError,
  officialPreviewReady,
  onRequestOfficialRefresh,
  isPreviewFullscreen,
  onSetIsPreviewFullscreen,
}) {
  const previewViewportRef = useRef(null);
  const hasOfficialPreview = Boolean(previewBlobUrl);
  const hasNoContent = !hasOfficialPreview;
  // Keep the inline preview compact on mobile; full reading happens in fullscreen.
  const previewMinHeight = hasNoContent
    ? "min(34dvh, 14rem)"
    : "clamp(12rem, 34dvh, 20rem)";
  const previewViewportClass = hasNoContent
    ? "mobile-signing-preview__viewport mobile-signing-preview__viewport--empty"
    : "mobile-signing-preview__viewport mobile-signing-preview__viewport--content";
  const previewFrameKey = resolvePreviewFrameKey({
    hasOfficialPreview,
    previewBlobUrl,
    previewLabel,
  });
  const remoteStatusLabel = getRemoteStatusLabel({
    officialPreviewError,
    officialPreviewReady,
    officialPreviewState,
  });

  const handleRetry = () => {
    if (typeof onRequestOfficialRefresh === "function") {
      onRequestOfficialRefresh();
    }
  };

  const closeFullscreenPreview = () => {
    onSetIsPreviewFullscreen(false);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof document === "undefined") return undefined;
    if (!isPreviewFullscreen) return undefined;
    const previousOverflow = document.body.style.overflow;
    document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
    return () => {
      document.body.style.overflow = previousOverflow;
    };
  }, [isPreviewFullscreen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!previewViewportRef.current) return;
    // Keep navigation fluid when switching documents by resetting inner scroll.
    previewViewportRef.current.scrollTop = 0;
  }, [previewFrameKey]);

  const openPreviewInNewTab = () => {
    if (!previewBlobUrl || !globalThis.window) return;
    globalThis.window.open(previewBlobUrl, "_blank", "noopener,noreferrer");
  };

  return (
    <>
      <section className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2.5 shadow-sm">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
          <div className="min-w-0">
            <p className="text-[0.68rem] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-500">
              Previsualización
            </p>
            <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900">
              {previewLabel}
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-1">
            {/* Single adaptive pill: icon changes with state */}
            <span
              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-[0.68rem] font-semibold ${getStatusPillClass(officialPreviewError, officialPreviewReady)}`}
            >
              <PreviewStatusPillAddon
                previewLoading={previewLoading}
                officialPreviewStale={officialPreviewStale}
              />
              {remoteStatusLabel}
            </span>
            <IconButton
              label="Actualizar previsualización oficial"
              title="Actualizar"
              onClick={handleRetry}
              disabled={previewLoading}
            >
              <RefreshIcon />
            </IconButton>
            <IconButton
              label="Abrir previsualización en pantalla completa"
              title="Pantalla completa"
              onClick={() => onSetIsPreviewFullscreen(true)}
            >
              <ExpandIcon />
            </IconButton>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div
          ref={previewViewportRef}
          className={`relative mt-2 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-[#d9d9d9] ${previewViewportClass}`}
        >
          <div className="h-full overflow-hidden">
            {hasOfficialPreview ? (
              <OfficialPdfPageList
                key={previewFrameKey}
                blobUrl={previewBlobUrl}
                className="mt-0 border-0 bg-transparent"
                frameClassName="w-full"
                minHeight={previewMinHeight}
                title={`Vista previa oficial ${previewLabel}`}
              />
            ) : null}

            {!hasOfficialPreview && !previewLoading && !previewError ? (
              <div className="absolute bottom-2 left-2 right-2 flex items-center justify-between gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-white/95 px-3 py-1.5 shadow-sm">
                <p className="truncate text-[0.68rem] font-semibold text-slate-500">
                  Sin vista previa · área de carga
                </p>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={handleRetry}
                  className="shrink-0 rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-2.5 py-1 text-[0.68rem] font-semibold text-slate-700"
                >
                  Actualizar
                </button>
              </div>
            ) : null}

            {previewLoading ? (
              <PreviewLoadingOverlay hasOfficialPreview={hasOfficialPreview} />
            ) : null}

            <PreviewErrorOverlay
              previewError={previewError}
              hasContent={hasOfficialPreview}
              onRetry={handleRetry}
              previewLoading={previewLoading}
            />
            {/* stale > quickFallback: never simultaneous, both at bottom-2 */}
            <PreviewStatusBanner
              previewLoading={previewLoading}
              officialPreviewStale={officialPreviewStale}
            />

            {previewLoading ? null : (
              <InlinePreviewHint previewLoading={previewLoading} />
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {isPreviewFullscreen && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-80 flex flex-col bg-slate-950/95">
          <header className="mobile-signing-preview__fullscreen-header flex items-center justify-between gap-2 border-b border-slate-700 px-3 py-2 text-white">
            <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
              <p className="truncate text-sm font-semibold">{previewLabel}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-300">
                Previsualización en pantalla completa
              </p>
            </div>
            {hasOfficialPreview ? (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={openPreviewInNewTab}
                className="shrink-0 rounded-full border border-slate-600 bg-slate-800 px-2.5 py-1 text-[0.68rem] font-semibold text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-700"
              >
                Abrir en pestaña
              </button>
            ) : null}
            <IconButton
              label="Cerrar pantalla completa"
              title="Cerrar"
              onClick={closeFullscreenPreview}
              className="border-slate-600 bg-slate-800 text-white hover:bg-slate-700"
            >
              <CloseIcon color="#ffffff" />
            </IconButton>
          </header>
          <div className="mobile-signing-preview__fullscreen-body flex-1 overflow-auto p-2">
            <div className="relative mx-auto h-full max-w-5xl overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-white">
              {hasOfficialPreview ? (
                <OfficialPdfPageList
                  key={`${previewFrameKey}:fullscreen`}
                  blobUrl={previewBlobUrl}
                  className="mt-0 h-full border-0 bg-transparent"
                  frameClassName="h-full min-h-[82vh]"
                  minHeight="82vh"
                  title={`Vista previa oficial completa ${previewLabel}`}
                />
              ) : null}
              {!hasOfficialPreview ? (
                <div className="flex h-full items-center justify-center p-6 text-center text-slate-700">
                  {previewError || "No hay vista previa disponible"}
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
}

MobileSigningPreview.propTypes = {
  previewLabel: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  previewLoading: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  previewError: PropTypes.string,
  previewBlobUrl: PropTypes.string,
  officialPreviewStale: PropTypes.bool,
  officialPreviewState: PropTypes.string,
  officialPreviewError: PropTypes.bool,
  officialPreviewReady: PropTypes.bool,
  onRequestOfficialRefresh: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  isPreviewFullscreen: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  onSetIsPreviewFullscreen: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/MobileSigningPreview.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #76
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/SigningDocumentsModal.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/SigningDocumentsModal.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 383
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import {
  getSigningAnchorDefinitions,
  SIGNING_UI_STATES,
} from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import {
  getLivenessStatusCopy,
  resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessState";
import { copyTextToClipboard } from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessStorage";
import { SigningPreviewPane } from "./SigningPreviewPane";
import {
  EMPTY_DOCUMENTS,
  getSigningUiState,
  getSigningUiCopy,
} from "./signingHelpers";

// Delegated to signingHelpers: getSigningUiState, getSigningUiCopy

export function SigningDocumentsModal({
  open,
  documents = EMPTY_DOCUMENTS,
  formType,
  formData,
  onClose,
  onConfirm,
  busy = false,
  isReopeningLiveness = false,
  signingUiState: signingUiStateProp = null,
  livenessSession = null,
  onCancelLiveness,
  onReopenLiveness,
}) {
  const total = documents.length;
  const readyCount = documents.filter((doc) => doc.readyToSign).length;
  const allReady = total > 0 && readyCount === total;
  const signingUiState = getSigningUiState({
    signingUiState: signingUiStateProp,
    busy,
    allReady,
  });
  const signingCopy = getSigningUiCopy(signingUiState, { allReady });
  const recoveryState = resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState({
    formData,
    livenessSession,
  });
  const livenessCopy = getLivenessStatusCopy(recoveryState.status);
  const livenessStatus = String(recoveryState.status || "");
  const isLivenessActive = recoveryState.canResume || recoveryState.canRestart;
  const [copyFeedback, setCopyFeedback] = useState("");
  const livenessResumeUrl = recoveryState.resumeUrl;
  const primaryActionLabel = isReopeningLiveness
    ? "Verificando prueba de vida..."
    : recoveryState.canSign
      ? "Firmar documentos"
      : recoveryState.canResume
        ? "Reabrir prueba de vida"
        : recoveryState.canRestart || livenessStatus === "error"
          ? "Reintentar prueba de vida"
          : signingCopy.action.label;
  const primaryActionTitle = isReopeningLiveness
    ? "Verificando el estado de la prueba de vida."
    : recoveryState.canSign
      ? "La prueba de vida ya terminó. Firma los documentos."
      : recoveryState.canResume
        ? "Abre de nuevo la prueba de vida en una nueva pestaña."
        : recoveryState.canRestart || livenessStatus === "error"
          ? "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo."
          : signingCopy.action.title;
  const [activeDocumentId, setActiveDocumentId] = useState(
    documents[0]?.id || "",
  );
  const [previewRetryNonce, setPreviewRetryNonce] = useState(0);
  const documentsWithAnchors = useMemo(
    () =>
      documents.map((doc) => ({
        ...doc,
        anchors: Array.isArray(doc.signatureAnchors)
          ? doc.signatureAnchors
          : getSigningAnchorDefinitions(doc.id, formType),
      })),
    [documents, formType],
  );
  const activeDocument = useMemo(
    () =>
      documentsWithAnchors.find((doc) => doc.id === activeDocumentId) ||
      documentsWithAnchors[0] ||
      null,
    [activeDocumentId, documentsWithAnchors],
  );
  const handlePrimaryFooterAction = () => {
    if (isLivenessActive) {
      if (typeof onReopenLiveness === "function") {
        void onReopenLiveness();
        return;
      }
      if (typeof window === "undefined" || !livenessResumeUrl) return;
      window.open(livenessResumeUrl, "_blank");
      return;
    }
    onConfirm();
  };

  const handleCopyLivenessLink = async () => {
    if (!livenessResumeUrl) return;
    const copied = await copyTextToClipboard(livenessResumeUrl);
    if (!copied) return;
    setCopyFeedback("Copiado");
    window.setTimeout(() => setCopyFeedback(""), 1500);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!open) return undefined;
    const nextId = documentsWithAnchors[0]?.id || "";
    const t = setTimeout(() => {
      setActiveDocumentId((current) =>
        documentsWithAnchors.some((doc) => doc.id === current)
          ? current
          : nextId,
      );
    }, 0);
    return () => clearTimeout(t);
  }, [documentsWithAnchors, open]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!open) return undefined;
    document.body.classList.add("has-signing-modal-open");
    return () => {
      document.body.classList.remove("has-signing-modal-open");
    };
  }, [open]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!open) return undefined;
    const handleEscape = (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Escape") onClose();
    };
    document.addEventListener("keydown", handleEscape);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("keydown", handleEscape);
  }, [onClose, open]);

  if (!open) return null;

  return (
    <div
      className="modal-overlay"
      role="dialog"
      aria-modal="true"
      aria-label="Documentos que requieren firma"
      tabIndex={-1}
    >
      <button
        type="button"
        className="modal-overlay__dismiss"
        aria-label="Cerrar modal de firma"
        onClick={onClose}
      />
      <div className="modal modal--signing-docs w-full max-w-[95vw] md:max-w-[72rem]">
        <header className="modal__header signing-docs-modal__summary flex flex-col gap-3 md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between">
          <div className="min-w-0 space-y-2">
            <div className="space-y-1">
              <h3 className="modal__title">Documentos que requieren firma</h3>
              <p className="modal__subtitle">
                {signingCopy.subtitle} {readyCount}/{total} documento(s) listos
                para firma.
              </p>
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-xs sm:text-sm">
              <span
                className={`status-badge status-badge--${signingCopy.badge.tone}`}
              >
                {signingCopy.badge.label}
              </span>
              <span className="text-slate-500">
                {total} documento(s) en revisión
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </header>
        <div className="modal__body signing-docs-modal__body signing-docs-modal__body--split grid gap-4 md:gap-6">
          {Boolean(
            livenessSession?.status && livenessSession.status !== "idle",
          ) && (
            <section className="col-span-full rounded-2xl border border-cyan-200 bg-cyan-50/70 p-3">
              <div className="mb-1.5 flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-cyan-900">
                    {livenessCopy.label}
                  </h4>
                  <p className="text-xs text-cyan-800">
                    {livenessSession?.message || livenessCopy.message}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </section>
          )}

          <aside className="signing-docs-review min-w-0 gap-4">
            <div className="signing-docs-review__heading sticky top-0 z-[1] rounded-2xl bg-white/95 pb-2 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/85">
              <h4 className="signing-docs-review__title">
                Documentos a firmar
              </h4>
              <p className="signing-docs-review__subtitle">
                Selecciona un documento para revisar la previsualización y sus
                puntos de firma.
              </p>
            </div>
            <ul className="signing-docs-list grid gap-3">
              {documentsWithAnchors.map((doc) => {
                const anchors = doc.anchors || [];
                const isActive = activeDocument?.id === doc.id;
                return (
                  <li
                    key={doc.id}
                    className={`signing-docs-list__item ${isActive ? "signing-docs-list__item--active" : ""}`}
                  >
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className="signing-docs-list__select rounded-xl p-0 text-left focus:outline-none"
                      onClick={() => setActiveDocumentId(doc.id)}
                    >
                      <div className="signing-docs-list__header flex flex-col gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:items-start sm:justify-between">
                        <strong className="pr-2">{doc.label}</strong>
                        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                          <span
                            className={`status-badge ${doc.required ? "status-badge--warning" : "status-badge--info"}`}
                          >
                            {doc.required ? "Requerido" : "Evaluación"}
                          </span>
                          <span
                            className={`status-badge ${doc.readyToSign ? "status-badge--success" : "status-badge--warning"}`}
                          >
                            {doc.readyToSign
                              ? "Listo para firmar"
                              : "Pendiente"}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      {doc.policyNote && (
                        <p className="signing-docs-list__note">
                          {doc.policyNote}
                        </p>
                      )}
                      <div className="signing-docs-signers">
                        {doc.signers.map((signer) => (
                          <div
                            key={`${doc.id}-${signer.role || "signer"}-${signer.name || "pending"}-${signer.id || "pending"}`}
                            className="signing-docs-signers__row"
                          >
                            {signer.role && (
                              <p className="signing-docs-signers__role">
                                {signer.role}
                              </p>
                            )}
                            <div className="signing-docs-signers__cols grid gap-2">
                              <span>
                                <strong>Nombre:</strong>{" "}
                                {signer.name || "Pendiente"}
                              </span>
                              <span>
                                <strong>ID/RUC:</strong>{" "}
                                {signer.id || "Pendiente"}
                              </span>
                              <span>
                                <strong>Empresa:</strong>{" "}
                                {signer.company || "Pendiente"}
                              </span>
                              <span>
                                <strong>Fecha:</strong>{" "}
                                {signer.date || "Pendiente"}
                              </span>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      <div className="signing-docs-anchors flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                        {anchors.map((anchor) => (
                          <span
                            key={anchor.key}
                            className="signing-docs-anchors__item"
                          >
                            {anchor.label}
                          </span>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      {!doc.readyToSign && (
                        <p className="signing-docs-list__warning">
                          Hay datos faltantes para este documento. Completa los
                          campos del formulario antes de firmar.
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </button>
                  </li>
                );
              })}
            </ul>
          </aside>
          <SigningPreviewPane
            open={open}
            activeDocument={activeDocument}
            formType={formType}
            formData={formData}
            previewRetryNonce={previewRetryNonce}
            onSetPreviewRetryNonce={setPreviewRetryNonce}
          />
        </div>
        <footer className="modal__footer sticky bottom-0 z-[2] flex flex-col-reverse gap-3 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/90 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-end">
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn--ghost min-h-11 w-full sm:w-auto"
            onClick={isLivenessActive ? onCancelLiveness : onClose}
            title={
              isLivenessActive
                ? "Cancelar la prueba de vida en curso."
                : "Cerrar el modal."
            }
          >
            {isLivenessActive ? "Cancelar" : "Cerrar"}
          </button>
          {isLivenessActive && livenessResumeUrl && (
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn--secondary min-h-11 w-full sm:w-auto"
              onClick={handleCopyLivenessLink}
              title="Copia el enlace de la prueba de vida."
            >
              {copyFeedback || "Copiar enlace"}
            </button>
          )}
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn--primary min-h-11 w-full sm:w-auto"
            onClick={handlePrimaryFooterAction}
            disabled={
              signingCopy.action.disabled ||
              busy ||
              isReopeningLiveness ||
              !allReady
            }
            title={
              isReopeningLiveness
                ? "Verificando el estado de la prueba de vida."
                : isLivenessActive && livenessResumeUrl
                  ? "Reabre la prueba de vida y valida si debes continuar o reiniciarla."
                  : isLivenessActive
                    ? "Valida la prueba de vida activa y reiníciala si es necesario."
                    : busy
                      ? "Generando y firmando documentos..."
                      : primaryActionTitle
            }
          >
            {busy ? "Firmando..." : primaryActionLabel}
          </button>
        </footer>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

SigningDocumentsModal.propTypes = {
  open: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  documents: PropTypes.array,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  onClose: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onConfirm: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  busy: PropTypes.bool,
  isReopeningLiveness: PropTypes.bool,
  signingUiState: PropTypes.string,
  livenessSession: PropTypes.shape({
    open: PropTypes.bool,
    livenessId: PropTypes.string,
    link: PropTypes.string,
    transactionId: PropTypes.string,
    status: PropTypes.string,
    message: PropTypes.string,
    startedAt: PropTypes.string,
  }),
  onCancelLiveness: PropTypes.func,
  onReopenLiveness: PropTypes.func,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/SigningDocumentsModal.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #77
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/signingHelpers.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/signingHelpers.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 100
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

export const EMPTY_PREVIEW_STATE = {
  loading: false,
  error: "",
  html: "",
  label: "",
  cacheKey: "",
  lastSuccessfulHtml: "",
};

export const EMPTY_DOCUMENTS = [];

export function safeRevokeBlobUrl(url) {
  if (!url || typeof url !== "string" || !url.startsWith("blob:")) return;
  try {
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  } catch {
    // noop
  }
}

export function getSigningUiState({ signingUiState, busy, allReady }) {
  if (signingUiState) return signingUiState;
  if (busy) return "FIRMANDO";
  if (allReady) return "LISTO_PARA_FIRMAR";
  return "REQUIERE_COMPLETAR_DATOS";
}

export function getSigningUiCopy(state, { allReady }) {
  switch (state) {
    case "LISTO_PARA_FIRMAR":
      return {
        badge: { tone: "success", label: "Listo para firmar" },
        subtitle:
          "Revisa la lista, abre la prueba de vida y luego confirma el firmado.",
        action: {
          label: "Continuar",
          title: "Continuar con la prueba de vida.",
          disabled: false,
        },
      };
    case "FIRMANDO":
      return {
        badge: { tone: "warning", label: "Firmando documentos" },
        subtitle:
          "El lote de firma está en proceso. Mantén el contexto visible hasta finalizar.",
        action: {
          label: "Firmando...",
          title: "Generando y firmando documentos...",
          disabled: true,
        },
      };
    case "FIRMADO":
      return {
        badge: { tone: "success", label: "Documentos firmados" },
        subtitle:
          "La firma terminó correctamente. Ya puedes continuar con el envío.",
        action: {
          label: "Documentos firmados",
          title: "Los documentos ya fueron firmados.",
          disabled: true,
        },
      };
    case "PENDIENTE":
      return {
        badge: { tone: "warning", label: "Pendiente" },
        subtitle: "Aún no está lista la revisión de firma.",
        action: {
          label: "Revisar documentos",
          title: "Revisa el estado de los documentos antes de firmar.",
          disabled: true,
        },
      };
    case "REQUIERE_COMPLETAR_DATOS":
    default:
      return {
        badge: {
          tone: allReady ? "success" : "warning",
          label: allReady ? "Listo para firmar" : "Requiere completar datos",
        },
        subtitle: allReady
          ? "Todo está listo para continuar con la prueba de vida."
          : "Debes completar todos los datos de firma pendientes antes de continuar.",
        action: {
          label: "Continuar",
          title:
            "Completa los datos pendientes de firma para habilitar el proceso.",
          disabled: true,
        },
      };
  }
}

export default {
  EMPTY_PREVIEW_STATE,
  EMPTY_DOCUMENTS,
  safeRevokeBlobUrl,
  getSigningUiState,
  getSigningUiCopy,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/signingHelpers.js ==========================

// ARCHIVO #78
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/SigningPreviewPane.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/SigningPreviewPane.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 196
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { getOfficialPdfPreview } from "@/core/document/services/pdfPreviewService";
import { getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument } from "@/domain/signing/signingUtils";
import OfficialPdfPageList from "@/shared/components/document-preview/OfficialPdfPageList";

const SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR =
  ".sign-anchor-marker[data-sign-anchor], [data-sign-anchor]";

const EMPTY_PDF_PREVIEW_STATE = {
  loading: false,
  error: "",
  blobUrl: "",
  label: "",
  cacheKey: "",
  lastSuccessfulBlobUrl: "",
};

export function SigningPreviewPane({
  open,
  activeDocument,
  formType,
  formData,
  previewRetryNonce,
  onSetPreviewRetryNonce,
}) {
  const [previewState, setPreviewState] = useState(EMPTY_PDF_PREVIEW_STATE);
  const activeDocumentId = String(activeDocument?.id || "").trim();
  const activeDocumentLabel =
    String(activeDocument?.label || "").trim() || "Documento";
  const expectedAnchors = useMemo(
    () =>
      getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(activeDocumentId, formType).filter(
        (anchor) => String(anchor?.key || "").trim().length > 0,
      ),
    [activeDocumentId, formType],
  );
  const previewCacheKey = useMemo(() => {
    const revision =
      JSON.stringify(formData || {})
        .split("")
        .reduce((acc, c) => ((acc << 5) - acc + c.charCodeAt(0)) | 0, 0) || 0;
    return `official-preview|${String(formType || "natural")}|${activeDocumentId}|${String(revision)}`;
  }, [activeDocumentId, formData, formType]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!open) return undefined;
    let cancelled = false;
    let debounceTimer = null;

    async function loadPreview(force = false) {
      if (!activeDocumentId) {
        setPreviewState((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          loading: false,
          error: "Seleccione un documento para previsualizar.",
          blobUrl: prev.lastSuccessfulBlobUrl || "",
          label: "",
          cacheKey: "",
        }));
        return;
      }

      setPreviewState((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        loading: true,
        error: "",
        blobUrl: prev.lastSuccessfulBlobUrl || prev.blobUrl || "",
        label: activeDocumentLabel,
        cacheKey: previewCacheKey,
      }));
      try {
        const result = await getOfficialPdfPreview({
          documentId: activeDocumentId,
          formType,
          formData,
          force: Boolean(force),
          resolveAnchorsInBackend: true,
          isSigningFlow: true,
          expectedAnchors,
          anchorSelector: SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR,
          waitForSelector: SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR,
          waitForTimeoutMs: 15000,
          mediaType: "print",
          metadata: {
            hideAnchorMarkersBeforePdf: true,
            resolveAnchorsInBackend: true,
            documentId: activeDocumentId,
          },
        });
        const blobUrl = result?.blobUrl || "";
        if (cancelled) return;
        setPreviewState((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          loading: false,
          error: "",
          blobUrl,
          label: activeDocumentLabel,
          cacheKey: result?.cacheKey || previewCacheKey,
          lastSuccessfulBlobUrl: blobUrl,
        }));
      } catch (error) {
        if (cancelled) return;
        setPreviewState((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          loading: false,
          error:
            error?.message ||
            "No se pudo generar la vista previa del documento.",
          blobUrl: prev.lastSuccessfulBlobUrl || prev.blobUrl || "",
          label: activeDocumentLabel,
          cacheKey: previewCacheKey,
        }));
      }
    }
    debounceTimer = setTimeout(loadPreview, 300);
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
      clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
    };
  }, [
    activeDocumentId,
    activeDocumentLabel,
    expectedAnchors,
    formData,
    formType,
    open,
    previewCacheKey,
    previewRetryNonce,
  ]);

  return (
    <section className="signing-docs-preview min-w-0 h-full">
      <div className="signing-docs-preview__stage">
        <div className="signing-docs-preview__viewport">
          {previewState.blobUrl && (
            <OfficialPdfPageList
              blobUrl={previewState.blobUrl}
              className="mt-0 border-0 bg-transparent"
              frameClassName="signing-docs-preview__frame"
              minHeight="min(58dvh, 42rem)"
              title={`Vista previa ${previewState.label || activeDocument?.label || "documento"}`}
            />
          )}
          {!previewState.blobUrl && previewState.loading && (
            <div className="attachments-preview__empty flex min-h-[18rem] flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 p-4 text-center">
              <div className="ef-spinner ef-spinner--lg" />
              <p>Generando previsualización PDF...</p>
            </div>
          )}
          {!previewState.blobUrl &&
            !previewState.loading &&
            previewState.error && (
              <div className="attachments-preview__empty flex min-h-[18rem] flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 p-4 text-center">
                <div className="attachments-preview__empty-icon">!</div>
                <p>{previewState.error}</p>
              </div>
            )}
          {previewState.loading && previewState.blobUrl && (
            <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/55 backdrop-blur-[1px]">
              <div className="attachments-preview__empty pointer-events-auto flex min-h-[11rem] flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/95 p-4 text-center shadow-lg">
                <div className="ef-spinner ef-spinner--lg" />
                <p>Actualizando vista previa...</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {!previewState.loading && previewState.error && (
            <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/35 backdrop-blur-[1px]">
              <div className="attachments-preview__empty pointer-events-auto flex min-h-[11rem] max-w-[22rem] flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 bg-white/95 p-4 text-center shadow-lg">
                <div className="attachments-preview__empty-icon">!</div>
                <p>{previewState.error}</p>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="btn btn--secondary btn--sm min-h-10 px-4"
                  onClick={() => onSetPreviewRetryNonce((value) => value + 1)}
                >
                  Reintentar
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

SigningPreviewPane.propTypes = {
  open: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  activeDocument: PropTypes.object,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  previewRetryNonce: PropTypes.number.isRequired,
  onSetPreviewRetryNonce: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/SigningPreviewPane.jsx ==========================

import React, {
  useCallback,
  useEffect,
  useMemo,
  useRef,
  useState,
} from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import {
  getDocumentDisplayLabel,
  SIGNING_UI_STATES,
} from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import { PREVIEW_STATE } from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";
import { useDocumentPreviewCoordinator } from "@/modules/forms/hooks/useDocumentPreviewCoordinator";
import { useAllDocumentsPreviewWarm } from "@/modules/forms/hooks/useAllDocumentsPreviewWarm";
import {
  getLivenessStatusCopy,
  resolveLivenessResumeUrl,
  resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessState";
import { getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument } from "@/domain/signing/signingUtils";
import { copyTextToClipboard } from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessStorage";
