import { IconButton, CloseIcon, BackIcon } from "./MobileSigningIcons";
import {
  EMPTY_DOCUMENTS,
  getSigningUiState,
  getSigningUiCopy,
} from "./signingHelpers";

const SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR =
  ".sign-anchor-marker[data-sign-anchor], [data-sign-anchor]";

function ActionIcon({ state }) {
  if (state === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMADO) {
    return (
      <svg
        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
        className="h-5 w-5"
        fill="none"
        aria-hidden="true"
      >
        <path
          d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"
          stroke="#ffffff"
          strokeWidth="2.2"
          strokeLinecap="round"
          strokeLinejoin="round"
        />
      </svg>
    );
  }
  if (state === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO) {
    return (
      <svg
        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
        className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin"
        fill="none"
        aria-hidden="true"
      >
        <circle
          cx="12"
          cy="12"
          r="8.5"
          stroke="#ffffff"
          strokeWidth="2.2"
          strokeOpacity="0.25"
        />
        <path
          d="M20.5 12A8.5 8.5 0 0 0 12 3.5"
          stroke="#ffffff"
          strokeWidth="2.2"
          strokeLinecap="round"
        />
      </svg>
    );
  }
  return (
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
      <path
        d="M8 6h9M8 12h9M8 18h9M5 6h.01M5 12h.01M5 18h.01"
        stroke="#ffffff"
        strokeWidth="2.1"
        strokeLinecap="round"
      />
    </svg>
  );
}

ActionIcon.propTypes = {
  state: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
};
// Use canonical helpers from `signingHelpers` directly — avoid alias wrappers.

function getFooterAction({ state, onConfirm, onClose }) {
  switch (state) {
    case SIGNING_UI_STATES.LISTO_PARA_FIRMAR:
      return {
        label: "Continuar",
        title: "Continuar con la prueba de vida.",
        disabled: false,
        onClick: onConfirm,
      };
    case SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO:
      return {
        label: "Firmando...",
        title: "El lote de firma está en proceso.",
        disabled: true,
        onClick: onConfirm,
      };
    case SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMADO:
      return {
        label: "Cerrar",
        title: "Cerrar la pantalla de revisión.",
        disabled: false,
        onClick: onClose,
      };
    case SIGNING_UI_STATES.PENDIENTE:
      return {
        label: "Revisar documentos",
        title: "Revisa el estado de los documentos antes de firmar.",
        disabled: true,
        onClick: onConfirm,
      };
    case SIGNING_UI_STATES.REQUIERE_COMPLETAR_DATOS:
    default:
      return {
        label: "Completar datos",
        title: "Completa los datos pendientes para habilitar el proceso.",
        disabled: true,
        onClick: onConfirm,
      };
  }
}

function resolveDocumentStatusTone(doc, activeState) {
  if (activeState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO) return "warning";
  if (activeState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMADO) return "success";
  if (doc?.readyToSign) return "success";
  return "warning";
}

function getToneClass(tone) {
  if (tone === "success")
    return "border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700";
  if (tone === "warning") return "border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 text-amber-800";
  return "border-cyan-200 bg-cyan-50 text-cyan-700";
}

function getPrimaryActionClass(state) {
  if (state === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMADO)
    return "bg-gradient-to-br from-teal-700 to-teal-800";
  if (state === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO)
    return "bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-600 to-amber-700";
  return "bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-blue-700";
}

function resolvePrimaryActionLabel({
  isReopeningLiveness,
  isLivenessActive,
  livenessResumeUrl,
  livenessStatus,
  fallbackLabel,
}) {
  if (isReopeningLiveness) return "Verificando prueba de vida...";
  if (isLivenessActive && livenessResumeUrl) return "Reabrir prueba de vida";
  if (livenessStatus === "error") return "Reintentar prueba de vida";
  if (livenessStatus === "returned_ready" || livenessStatus === "approved") {
    return "Firmar documentos";
  }
  return fallbackLabel;
}

function resolvePrimaryActionTitle({
  isReopeningLiveness,
  isLivenessActive,
  livenessResumeUrl,
  livenessStatus,
  fallbackTitle,
}) {
  if (isReopeningLiveness) return "Verificando el estado de la prueba de vida.";
  if (isLivenessActive && livenessResumeUrl) {
    return "Abre de nuevo la prueba de vida en una nueva pestaña.";
  }
  if (livenessStatus === "error") {
    return "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo.";
  }
  if (livenessStatus === "returned_ready" || livenessStatus === "approved") {
    return "La prueba de vida ya terminó. Firma los documentos.";
  }
  return fallbackTitle;
}

function resolvePrimaryAriaLabel({
  isReopeningLiveness,
  busy,
  resolvedSigningUiState,
  primaryActionLabel,
}) {
  if (isReopeningLiveness) return "Verificando prueba de vida...";
  if (busy && resolvedSigningUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO) {
    return "Firmando...";
  }
  return primaryActionLabel;
}

function resolvePrimaryHoverTitle({
  isReopeningLiveness,
  isLivenessActive,
  livenessResumeUrl,
  busy,
  primaryActionTitle,
}) {
  if (isReopeningLiveness) return "Verificando el estado de la prueba de vida.";
  if (isLivenessActive && livenessResumeUrl) {
    return "Reabre la prueba de vida y valida si debes continuar o reiniciarla.";
  }
  if (isLivenessActive) {
    return "Valida la prueba de vida activa y reiníciala si es necesario.";
  }
  if (busy) return "El lote de firma está en proceso.";
  return primaryActionTitle;
}

export function SigningReviewMobilePage({
  documents = EMPTY_DOCUMENTS,
  activeDocumentId,
  onSelectDocument,
  formType,
  formData,
  signingUiState,
  busy = false,
  isReopeningLiveness = false,
  livenessSession = null,
  onConfirm,
  onClose,
  onReopenLiveness,
}) {
  const total = documents.length;
  const readyCount = documents.filter((doc) => doc?.readyToSign).length;
  const allReady = total > 0 && readyCount === total;
  const resolvedSigningUiState = getSigningUiState({
    signingUiState,
    busy,
    allReady,
  });
  const _coreSigningCopy = getSigningUiCopy(resolvedSigningUiState, {
    allReady,
  });
  const signingCopy = {
    tone: _coreSigningCopy?.badge?.tone,
    label: _coreSigningCopy?.badge?.label,
    subtitle: _coreSigningCopy?.subtitle,
    actionLabel: _coreSigningCopy?.action?.label,
    actionTitle: _coreSigningCopy?.action?.title,
    actionDisabled: _coreSigningCopy?.action?.disabled,
  };
  const footerAction = getFooterAction({
    state: resolvedSigningUiState,
    onConfirm,
    onClose,
  });
  const recoveryState = resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState({
    formData,
    livenessSession,
  });
  const isLivenessActive = recoveryState.canResume || recoveryState.canRestart;
  const livenessResumeUrl =
    recoveryState.resumeUrl ||
    resolveLivenessResumeUrl({
      livenessSession,
      formData,
    });
  const primaryActionLabel = resolvePrimaryActionLabel({
    isReopeningLiveness,
    isLivenessActive: recoveryState.canResume,
    livenessResumeUrl,
    livenessStatus: recoveryState.canSign
      ? "approved"
      : recoveryState.canRestart
        ? "error"
        : livenessSession?.status,
    fallbackLabel: footerAction.label,
  });
  const primaryActionTitle = resolvePrimaryActionTitle({
    isReopeningLiveness,
    isLivenessActive: recoveryState.canResume,
    livenessResumeUrl,
    livenessStatus: recoveryState.canSign
      ? "approved"
      : recoveryState.canRestart
        ? "error"
        : livenessSession?.status,
    fallbackTitle: footerAction.title,
  });
  const activeDocument = useMemo(() => {
    if (!documents.length) return null;
    return (
      documents.find((doc) => doc.id === activeDocumentId) ||
      documents[0] ||
      null
    );
  }, [activeDocumentId, documents]);
  const [isPreviewFullscreen, setIsPreviewFullscreen] = useState(false);
  const [officialRefreshNonce, setOfficialRefreshNonce] = useState(0);
  const [copyFeedback, setCopyFeedback] = useState("");
  const [suppressSwitchLoading, setSuppressSwitchLoading] = useState(false);
  const previousDocumentIdRef = useRef(activeDocumentId || "");
  const livenessCopy = getLivenessStatusCopy(recoveryState.status);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!documents.length || typeof onSelectDocument !== "function") return;
    const isValidSelection = documents.some(
      (doc) => doc.id === activeDocumentId,
    );
    if (!activeDocumentId || !isValidSelection)
      onSelectDocument(documents[0].id);
  }, [activeDocumentId, documents, onSelectDocument]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof onClose !== "function") return undefined;
    const handleEscape = (event) => {
      if (event.key !== "Escape") return;
      if (isPreviewFullscreen) {
        setIsPreviewFullscreen(false);
        return;
      }
      onClose();
    };
    document.addEventListener("keydown", handleEscape);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("keydown", handleEscape);
  }, [isPreviewFullscreen, onClose]);

  const activeDocumentLabel = activeDocument
    ? getDocumentDisplayLabel(activeDocument.id, formType) ||
      activeDocument.label ||
      "Documento"
    : "Documento";
  const expectedAnchors = useMemo(
    () =>
      getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(activeDocument?.id || "", formType),
    [activeDocument?.id, formType],
  );
  const signingPreviewMetadata = useMemo(
    () => ({
      hideAnchorMarkersBeforePdf: true,
      resolveAnchorsInBackend: true,
      documentId: String(activeDocument?.id || "").trim(),
    }),
    [activeDocument?.id],
  );

  const previewTriggers = useMemo(
    () => ({
      enterOfficial: Boolean(activeDocument?.id),
      manualRefreshNonce: officialRefreshNonce,
      sectionSaveNonce: 0,
    }),
    [activeDocument?.id, officialRefreshNonce],
  );
  const previewPolicy = useMemo(
    () => ({ quickDebounceMs: 240, officialDebounceMs: 1800 }),
    [],
  );

  // Pre-warm all documents' PDFs in parallel at mount so the pdfCache is hot
  // before the coordinator's 1800ms debounce fires. Switching docs shows cached
  // content immediately instead of a full loading cycle.
  const { getDocBlobUrl } = useAllDocumentsPreviewWarm({
    documents,
    formType,
    formData,
    enabled: Boolean(documents.length && formType && formData),
  });

  const previewCoordinator = useDocumentPreviewCoordinator({
    documentId: activeDocument?.id || "",
    formType,
    formData,
    enabled: Boolean(activeDocument?.id),
    officialMode: true,
    quickMode: false,
    resolveAnchorsInBackend: true,
    isSigningFlow: true,
    expectedAnchors,
    anchorSelector: SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR,
    waitForSelector: SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR,
    waitForTimeoutMs: 15000,
    mediaType: "print",
    metadata: signingPreviewMetadata,
    triggers: previewTriggers,
    policy: previewPolicy,
  });

  const officialPreview = previewCoordinator.official;
  const isOfficialSyncing = officialPreview.state === PREVIEW_STATE.SYNCING;
  const isOfficialReady = officialPreview.state === PREVIEW_STATE.READY;
  const isOfficialError = officialPreview.state === PREVIEW_STATE.ERROR;
  const isOfficialDirtyOrStale =
    officialPreview.state === PREVIEW_STATE.DIRTY ||
    officialPreview.state === PREVIEW_STATE.STALE;
  const hasOfficialBlob = Boolean(officialPreview.blobUrl);
  const previewBlobUrl = officialPreview.blobUrl;
  // Use warm cache only while official preview is syncing/dirty/stale to avoid
  // painting stale URLs when coordinator already resolved a newer state.
  const warmBlobUrl = getDocBlobUrl(activeDocument?.id) || "";
  const canUseWarmBlob =
    !previewBlobUrl && (isOfficialSyncing || isOfficialDirtyOrStale);
  const stablePreviewBlobUrl = canUseWarmBlob ? warmBlobUrl : previewBlobUrl;
  const hasAnyPreviewSource = Boolean(stablePreviewBlobUrl);
  const previewShouldSync =
    isOfficialSyncing || (!hasOfficialBlob && isOfficialDirtyOrStale);
  const previewError = officialPreview.error;
  const previewLabel = activeDocumentLabel;
  const previewLoadingRaw = previewShouldSync && !hasAnyPreviewSource;
  const previewLoading =
    suppressSwitchLoading && hasAnyPreviewSource ? false : previewLoadingRaw;
  const previewDisplayState =
    suppressSwitchLoading && officialPreview.state === PREVIEW_STATE.SYNCING
      ? PREVIEW_STATE.STALE
      : officialPreview.state;

  useEffect(() => {
    const currentId = activeDocument?.id || "";
    const previousId = previousDocumentIdRef.current;
    previousDocumentIdRef.current = currentId;

    if (!previousId || !currentId || previousId === currentId) return undefined;

    const startTimeout = globalThis.setTimeout(() => {
      setSuppressSwitchLoading(true);
    }, 0);
    const timeout = globalThis.setTimeout(() => {
      setSuppressSwitchLoading(false);
    }, 1400);

    return () => {
      globalThis.clearTimeout(startTimeout);
      globalThis.clearTimeout(timeout);
    };
  }, [activeDocument?.id]);

  const onRequestOfficialRefresh = useCallback(() => {
    setOfficialRefreshNonce((value) => value + 1);
  }, []);

  const handlePrimaryAction = () => {
    if (isLivenessActive) {
      if (typeof onReopenLiveness === "function") {
        onReopenLiveness();
        return;
      }
      if (!globalThis.window || !livenessResumeUrl) return;
      globalThis.window.open(livenessResumeUrl, "_blank");
      return;
    }
    if (footerAction.disabled) return;
    if (typeof footerAction.onClick === "function") {
      footerAction.onClick();
      return;
    }
    if (typeof onConfirm === "function") onConfirm();
  };

  const handleCopyLivenessLink = async () => {
    if (!livenessResumeUrl) return;
    const copied = await copyTextToClipboard(livenessResumeUrl);
    if (!copied) return;
    setCopyFeedback("Copiado");
    globalThis.setTimeout(() => setCopyFeedback(""), 1500);
  };

  const isPrimaryActionDisabled = isLivenessActive
    ? isReopeningLiveness
    : footerAction.disabled || busy || isReopeningLiveness;
  const primaryAriaLabel = resolvePrimaryAriaLabel({
    isReopeningLiveness,
    busy,
    resolvedSigningUiState,
    primaryActionLabel,
  });
  const primaryActionHoverTitle = resolvePrimaryHoverTitle({
    isReopeningLiveness,
    isLivenessActive: recoveryState.canResume,
    livenessResumeUrl,
    busy,
    primaryActionTitle,
  });

  if (!documents.length) {
    return (
      <div className="flex min-h-dvh flex-col bg-slate-100 text-slate-900">
        <header className="border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/95 px-3 py-2.5 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
            <div className="min-w-0">
              <p className="text-[0.65rem] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-500">
                Revisión de firma
              </p>
              <h1 className="mt-0.5 text-base font-semibold text-slate-900">
                Documentos que requieren firma
              </h1>
            </div>
            <IconButton
              label="Cerrar revisión de firma"
              title="Cerrar"
              onClick={onClose}
            >
              <CloseIcon />
            </IconButton>
          </div>
        </header>
        <main className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center px-4 py-8 text-center">
          <div className="max-w-sm rounded-3xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-sm">
            <p className="text-base font-semibold text-slate-900">
              No hay documentos para revisar
            </p>
            <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-600">
              El flujo de firma no encontró documentos activos para mostrar en
              esta pantalla.
            </p>
          </div>
        </main>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const documentTone = resolveDocumentStatusTone(
    activeDocument,
    resolvedSigningUiState,
  );

  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-dvh flex-col bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fafc_0%,#eef2ff_100%)] text-slate-900">
      <header className="border-b border-white/70 bg-white/95 px-3 py-2 shadow-[0_1px_0_rgba(15,23,42,0.04)] backdrop-blur sm:px-4">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
          <div className="min-w-0">
            <p className="text-[0.64rem] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-slate-500">
              Revisión de firma
            </p>
            <h1 className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[1.02rem] font-semibold leading-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-[1.12rem]">
              {getDocumentDisplayLabel(activeDocument?.id, formType) ||
                "Documento a firmar"}
            </h1>
          </div>
          <IconButton
            label="Cerrar revisión de firma"
            title="Cerrar"
            onClick={onClose}
          >
            <CloseIcon />
          </IconButton>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-1.5 flex min-w-0 items-center gap-2">
          <span
            className={`inline-flex shrink-0 items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-[0.72rem] font-semibold ${getToneClass(documentTone)}`}
          >
            {signingCopy.label}
          </span>
          <span className="truncate text-[0.82rem] text-slate-500">
            {readyCount}/{total} documento(s) listos para firma
          </span>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main className="signing-review-mobile__main flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-2 py-2 sm:px-3 sm:py-3">
        {Boolean(
          livenessSession?.status && livenessSession.status !== "idle",
        ) && (
          <section className="mb-2 rounded-2xl border border-cyan-200 bg-cyan-50/70 p-2.5 shadow-sm">
            <div className="mb-1.5 flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
              <div className="min-w-0">
                <p className="text-[0.68rem] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-cyan-800">
                  {livenessCopy.label}
                </p>
                <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs text-cyan-900">
                  {livenessSession?.message || livenessCopy.message}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>
        )}

        <MobileSigningPreview
          previewLabel={previewLabel}
          previewLoading={previewLoading}
          previewError={previewError}
          previewBlobUrl={stablePreviewBlobUrl}
          officialPreviewStale={officialPreview.stale || suppressSwitchLoading}
          officialPreviewState={previewDisplayState}
          officialPreviewError={isOfficialError}
          officialPreviewReady={isOfficialReady}
          onRequestOfficialRefresh={onRequestOfficialRefresh}
          isPreviewFullscreen={isPreviewFullscreen}
          onSetIsPreviewFullscreen={setIsPreviewFullscreen}
        />

        <MobileSigningDocList
          documents={documents}
          activeDocumentId={activeDocumentId}
          onSelectDocument={onSelectDocument}
          formType={formType}
          activeDocument={activeDocument}
          resolvedSigningUiState={resolvedSigningUiState}
        />
      </main>

      <footer className="signing-review-mobile__footer sticky bottom-0 z-20 border-t border-slate-200 bg-white/95 px-3 py-2.5 backdrop-blur">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <IconButton
            label="Volver"
            title="Volver"
            onClick={onClose}
            className="bg-white text-slate-700"
          >
            <BackIcon />
          </IconButton>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            {isLivenessActive && livenessResumeUrl && (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={handleCopyLivenessLink}
                className="inline-flex min-h-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-slate-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500/60 focus-visible:ring-offset-2"
                title="Copia el enlace de la prueba de vida."
              >
                {copyFeedback || "Copiar enlace"}
              </button>
            )}
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handlePrimaryAction}
              disabled={isPrimaryActionDisabled}
              aria-label={primaryAriaLabel}
              title={primaryActionHoverTitle}
              className={`inline-flex min-h-12 min-w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-white shadow-lg transition focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500/60 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 ${getPrimaryActionClass(resolvedSigningUiState)}`}
            >
              <ActionIcon state={resolvedSigningUiState} />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>
  );
}

SigningReviewMobilePage.propTypes = {
  documents: PropTypes.array,
  activeDocumentId: PropTypes.string,
  onSelectDocument: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  signingUiState: PropTypes.string,
  busy: PropTypes.bool,
  isReopeningLiveness: PropTypes.bool,
  livenessSession: PropTypes.shape({
    open: PropTypes.bool,
    livenessId: PropTypes.string,
    link: PropTypes.string,
    transactionId: PropTypes.string,
    status: PropTypes.string,
    message: PropTypes.string,
    startedAt: PropTypes.string,
  }),
  onConfirm: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onClose: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onReopenLiveness: PropTypes.func,
};

export default SigningReviewMobilePage;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/SigningReviewMobilePage.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #80
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/StickyCTA.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/StickyCTA.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 128
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';

const StickyCTA = ({
  primaryLabel,
  onPrimary,
  onPrev,
  onOpenPreview,
  onOpenAttachments,
  isFirstStep,
  isLastStep,
  onGenerate,
  disabled,
  primaryTitle,
  isMobileSheetOpen = false,
}) => {
  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);

  const toggleMenu = () => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen);
  const closeMenu = () => setMenuOpen(false);

  const containerClass = `sticky-cta ${isMobileSheetOpen ? 'sticky-cta--hidden' : 'sticky-cta--visible'}`;

  return (
    <div
      className={`${containerClass} md:hidden`}
      role="region"
      aria-label="Acciones principales"
      aria-hidden={isMobileSheetOpen}
    >
      {/* 1. Back Button - hidden on first step */}
      <button
        type="button"
        className={`sticky-cta__btn-utility sticky-cta__btn-prev transition-all active:scale-[0.98] ${isFirstStep ? 'invisible' : ''}`}
        aria-label="Anterior"
        onClick={onPrev}
        disabled={disabled || isMobileSheetOpen || isFirstStep}
      >
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none"><path d="M12.5 15L7.5 10L12.5 5" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"/></svg>
      </button>

      {/* 2. Preview */}
      <button
        type="button"
        className="sticky-cta__btn-utility transition-all active:scale-[0.98]"
        aria-label="Vista previa"
        onClick={onOpenPreview}
        disabled={disabled || isMobileSheetOpen}
      >
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/><line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"/><line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"/></svg>
      </button>

      {/* 3. Attachments */}
      <button
        type="button"
        className="sticky-cta__btn-utility transition-all active:scale-[0.98]"
        aria-label="Adjuntos"
        onClick={onOpenAttachments}
        disabled={disabled || isMobileSheetOpen}
      >
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2"><path d="M21.44 11.05l-9.19 9.19a6 6 0 0 1-8.49-8.49l9.19-9.19a4 4 0 0 1 5.66 5.66l-9.2 9.19a2 2 0 0 1-2.83-2.83l8.49-8.48"/></svg>
      </button>

      {/* 4. Main CTA */}
      <button
        type="button"
        className="sticky-cta__main truncate"
        onClick={onPrimary}
        disabled={disabled || isMobileSheetOpen}
        title={primaryTitle}
      >
        {primaryLabel}
      </button>

      {/* 5. More Actions */}
      {isLastStep && onGenerate ? (
        <div className="relative">
          <button
            type="button"
            className="sticky-cta__btn-utility sticky-cta__more transition-all active:scale-[0.98]"
            aria-label="Más acciones"
            aria-expanded={menuOpen}
            onClick={toggleMenu}
            disabled={disabled || isMobileSheetOpen}
          >
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="1.5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.5"/><circle cx="12" cy="19" r="1.5"/></svg>
          </button>

          {menuOpen && (
            <>
              <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40" aria-hidden="true" onClick={closeMenu} />
              <ul className="absolute bottom-14 right-0 z-50 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-gray-200 py-1.5 min-w-[180px]" role="menu">
                <li role="menuitem">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    className="sticky-cta__menu-item"
                    onClick={() => { onGenerate(); closeMenu(); }}
                  >
                    Generar documentos
                  </button>
                </li>
              </ul>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="w-0" />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

StickyCTA.propTypes = {
  primaryLabel: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  onPrimary: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onPrev: PropTypes.func,
  onOpenPreview: PropTypes.func,
  onOpenAttachments: PropTypes.func,
  isFirstStep: PropTypes.bool,
  isLastStep: PropTypes.bool,
  onGenerate: PropTypes.func,
  disabled: PropTypes.bool,
  primaryTitle: PropTypes.string,
  isMobileSheetOpen: PropTypes.bool,
};

export default StickyCTA;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/StickyCTA.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #81
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/controllers/formsController.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/controllers/formsController.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 171
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { validateForm } from "@/core/engines/validationEngine";
import { validateLinkedBusinessRules } from "@/domain/forms/formsDomainModule";
import {
  generateDocuments,
  getAvailableDocuments,
} from "@/core/engines/documentEngine/documentRuntime";
import { clearFormDraft } from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";
import { getInitialState } from "@/domain/forms/state/formsStateModule";
import { sendForm } from "@/store/slices/requestSlice";
import { groupSectionsForSteps } from "../runtime/formsWorkflowModule";

export function useFormsController({
  formType,
  formData,
  sections,
  setFormData,
  setErrors,
  dispatch,
  routeContext,
  session,
  toast,
  requestSigningDocsReview,
  lockedFieldPaths,
} = {}) {
  const [wizardPosition, setWizardPosition] = useState({ groupIndex: 0 });

  const sectionStates = useMemo(() => {
    return (sections || []).map((section) => {
      const hasData = Boolean(
        section && section.path && formData && Object.keys(formData).length,
      );
      // errors count is set by consumer via setErrors; leave 0 here by default
      const errorsCount = 0;
      return {
        section,
        hasData,
        errorsCount,
        completed: hasData && errorsCount === 0,
      };
    });
  }, [sections, formData]);

  const groupedSections = useMemo(
    () => groupSectionsForSteps(sectionStates),
    [sectionStates],
  );

  const safeActiveGroupIndex = groupedSections.length
    ? Math.min(wizardPosition.groupIndex, groupedSections.length - 1)
    : 0;

  const buildValidationErrors = useCallback(() => {
    const nextErrors = validateForm(formData, sections, lockedFieldPaths);
    if (formType === "linked") {
      const businessRuleErrors = validateLinkedBusinessRules(formData);
      businessRuleErrors.forEach((error) => {
        if (!nextErrors[error.path]) nextErrors[error.path] = error.message;
      });
    }
    return nextErrors;
  }, [formData, sections, formType, lockedFieldPaths]);

  const validateAndPersist = () => {
    const nextErrors = buildValidationErrors();
    setErrors && setErrors(nextErrors);
    return nextErrors;
  };

  // Keep error state reactive to any input change so the summary and section states
  // reflect the latest validation results without waiting for submit/generate actions.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!setErrors) return;
    setErrors(buildValidationErrors());
  }, [buildValidationErrors, setErrors]);

  const goToGroup = (index) => {
    if (!groupedSections.length) return;
    const nextIndex = Math.max(0, Math.min(index, groupedSections.length - 1));
    setWizardPosition({ groupIndex: nextIndex });
  };

  const goPrevStep = () => goToGroup(Math.max(safeActiveGroupIndex - 1, 0));
  const goNextStep = () =>
    goToGroup(Math.min(safeActiveGroupIndex + 1, groupedSections.length - 1));

  const handleGenerate = async () => {
    const nextErrors = validateAndPersist();
    if (Object.keys(nextErrors || {}).length > 0) {
      toast?.warn(
        "Existen errores. Corrígelos antes de generar los documentos.",
      );
      return;
    }
    try {
      toast?.info("Generando documentos...");
      await generateDocuments(formType, formData);
      toast?.success("Documentos generados.");
    } catch (error) {
      toast?.error(error?.message || "No fue posible generar los documentos.");
    }
  };

  const handleSend = async ({ skipSigningReview = false } = {}) => {
    const nextErrors = validateAndPersist();
    if (Object.keys(nextErrors || {}).length > 0) {
      toast?.warn("Existen errores. Corrígelos antes de enviar.");
      return;
    }
    const signatureBatchCompleted = Boolean(
      formData?.signatureBatch?.completed,
    );
    if (
      !skipSigningReview &&
      !signatureBatchCompleted &&
      requestSigningDocsReview
    ) {
      requestSigningDocsReview();
      return;
    }
    try {
      const action = sendForm({
        exec: routeContext.exec,
        wrk: routeContext.wrk,
        dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
        formType,
        role: session?.role,
        formData,
        session,
      });
      const result = dispatch(action);
      if (result && typeof result.unwrap === "function") {
        await result.unwrap();
      } else {
        await result;
      }
      toast?.success("Formulario enviado.");
    } catch (error) {
      toast?.error(error?.message || "No se pudo enviar el formulario.");
    }
  };

  const handleClearDraft = () => {
    clearFormDraft(formType, routeContext);
    setFormData && setFormData(getInitialState(formType));
    setErrors && setErrors({});
    setWizardPosition({ groupIndex: 0 });
    toast?.info("Borrador limpiado.");
  };

  const availableDocuments = getAvailableDocuments(formType);

  return {
    wizardPosition,
    setWizardPosition,
    sectionStates,
    groupedSections,
    safeActiveGroupIndex,
    validateAndPersist,
    goToGroup,
    goPrevStep,
    goNextStep,
    handleGenerate,
    handleSend,
    handleClearDraft,
    availableDocuments,
  };
}

export default useFormsController;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/controllers/formsController.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #82
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/hooks/formsFlowModule.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/hooks/formsFlowModule.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 506
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { getInitialState } from "@/domain/forms/state/formsStateModule";
import {
  fetchWorkflowConfig,
  fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles,
} from "@/store/slices/requestSlice";
import { loadFormDraft, saveFormDraft } from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";
import { isTokenValid } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowTransport";
import { redirectToWorkflowExternos } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowCrud";
import {
  loadWorkflowFormStateDraft,
  saveWorkflowFormStateDraft,
} from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowDocumentOps";
import useFormsController from "../controllers/formsController";
import {
  getInitialFormType,
  useFormsWorkflowModule,
} from "../runtime/formsWorkflowModule";
import {
  hydrateFormDataFromIndexValues,
  loadHydrationBackendData,
} from "../services/indexHydrationService";
import { getSessionToken } from "@/shared/utils/common";

function hasHydrationSection(sections = []) {
  return sections.some((section) => section?.hydrateOnEnter === true);
}
function buildHydrationKey({ formType, routeContext }) {
  const wrk = String(routeContext?.wrk || "").trim();
  const exec = String(routeContext?.exec || "").trim();
  return `${formType}|${wrk}|${exec}`;
}

function canHydrateIndexData({ enabled, sections, routeContext }) {
  return (
    enabled &&
    hasHydrationSection(sections) &&
    String(routeContext?.wrk || "").trim()
  );
}

function useIndexHydrationState({
  enabled = true,
  formType,
  role,
  sections,
  formData,
  setFormData,
  dirtyFields,
  routeContext,
  session,
}) {
  const [state, setState] = useState({
    loading: false,
    hydratedFields: [],
    unmatchedIndexes: [],
    skippedDirtyFields: [],
    backend: null,
    error: null,
    lastRunAt: null,
  });

  const hydrationKey = useMemo(
    () => buildHydrationKey({ formType, routeContext }),
    [formType, routeContext],
  );

  const canHydrate = useMemo(
    () => canHydrateIndexData({ enabled, sections, routeContext }),
    [enabled, routeContext, sections],
  );

  const lastHydrationKeyRef = useRef("");
  const activeRunIdRef = useRef("");
  const formDataRef = useRef(formData);
  const dirtyFieldsRef = useRef(dirtyFields);
  const sectionsRef = useRef(sections);

  useEffect(() => {
    formDataRef.current = formData;
  }, [formData]);

  useEffect(() => {
    dirtyFieldsRef.current = dirtyFields;
  }, [dirtyFields]);

  useEffect(() => {
    sectionsRef.current = sections;
  }, [sections]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!canHydrate) {
      activeRunIdRef.current = "";
      setState((prev) => (prev.loading ? { ...prev, loading: false } : prev));
      return;
    }

    if (lastHydrationKeyRef.current === hydrationKey) return;

    let cancelled = false;
    const runId = `${hydrationKey}:${Date.now()}`;
    activeRunIdRef.current = runId;

    async function runHydration() {
      setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, loading: true, error: null }));

      try {
        const backend = await loadHydrationBackendData({
          exec: routeContext?.exec,
          workflowId: routeContext?.wrk || routeContext?.workflowId,
          token: getSessionToken(session),
        });

        const hydrationResult = hydrateFormDataFromIndexValues({
          formData: formDataRef.current,
          formType,
          role,
          sections: sectionsRef.current,
          indexValues: backend.indexValues,
          indexDefinitions: backend.indexDefinitions,
          listElementsByListId: backend.listElementsByListId,
          dirtyPaths: Object.keys(dirtyFieldsRef.current || {}).filter(
            (path) => dirtyFieldsRef.current[path],
          ),
        });

        if (cancelled || activeRunIdRef.current !== runId) return;

        if (hydrationResult.hydratedFields.length > 0) {
          setFormData(hydrationResult.nextFormData);
        }

        const nextState = {
          loading: false,
          hydratedFields: hydrationResult.hydratedFields,
          unmatchedIndexes: hydrationResult.unmatchedIndexes,
          skippedDirtyFields: hydrationResult.skippedDirtyFields,
          backend,
          error: null,
          lastRunAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };

        setState(nextState);
        lastHydrationKeyRef.current = hydrationKey;

        if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
          globalThis.__indexHydrationDebug = {
            key: hydrationKey,
            formType,
            role,
            ...nextState,
          };
        }
      } catch (error) {
        if (cancelled || activeRunIdRef.current !== runId) return;
        setState((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          loading: false,
          error:
            error?.message || "No fue posible hidratar indices del workflow",
        }));
      } finally {
        if (activeRunIdRef.current === runId) {
          activeRunIdRef.current = "";
        }
      }
    }

    runHydration();

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [
    canHydrate,
    formType,
    hydrationKey,
    role,
    session,
    routeContext?.workflowId,
    routeContext?.exec,
    routeContext?.wrk,
    setFormData,
  ]);

  return {
    ...state,
    canHydrate: Boolean(canHydrate),
    resolved: !canHydrate || Boolean(state.lastRunAt || state.error),
  };
}

export function useFormsFlow({
  formType,
  role,
  formData,
  sections,
  visibleSections,
  routeContext,
  session,
  toast,
  setFormData,
  setErrors,
  dirtyFields,
  dispatch,
  switchFormType,
  switchRole,
  requestSigningDocsReview,
  workflowFilesLoaded = true,
  lockedFieldPaths = null,
}) {
  const workflowFilesRequestKeyRef = useRef("");
  const remoteDraftFileRef = useRef(null);
  const remoteDraftSaveTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
  const hasUserChanges = useMemo(
    () => Object.values(dirtyFields || {}).some(Boolean),
    [dirtyFields],
  );
  const [remoteDraftReady, setRemoteDraftReady] = useState(false);
  const [draftRestoreLoading, setDraftRestoreLoading] = useState(true);

  const indexHydration = useIndexHydrationState({
    enabled: remoteDraftReady && Boolean(workflowFilesLoaded),
    formType,
    role,
    sections,
    formData,
    setFormData,
    dirtyFields,
    routeContext,
    session,
  });

  const computedLockedFieldPaths = useMemo(
    () =>
      new Set(
        (indexHydration.hydratedFields || [])
          .map((item) => String(item?.path || "").trim())
          .filter(Boolean),
      ),
    [indexHydration.hydratedFields],
  );

  const persistSystemDraft = useMemo(
    () => async (nextFormData) => {
      if (!nextFormData || typeof nextFormData !== "object") return null;
      saveFormDraft(formType, nextFormData, routeContext);
      if (!routeContext?.dcmt || !indexHydration.resolved) return null;

      const persisted = await saveWorkflowFormStateDraft({
        exec: routeContext.exec,
        wrk: routeContext.wrk,
        dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
        folderId: session?.folderId,
        token: getSessionToken(session),
        formType,
        formData: nextFormData,
        fileId: remoteDraftFileRef.current?.fileId,
      });

      if (persisted?.savedFileId) {
        const nextRemoteDraftFile = remoteDraftFileRef.current
          ? { ...remoteDraftFileRef.current }
          : {};
        remoteDraftFileRef.current = {
          ...nextRemoteDraftFile,
          fileId: persisted.savedFileId,
          fileTypeId: persisted.fileTypeId,
          documentId: persisted.documentId,
          name: persisted.fileName,
          description: `SISAD_INVERNEG_FORM_STATE:${routeContext.dcmt}`,
        };
      }

      return persisted;
    },
    [formType, indexHydration.resolved, routeContext, session],
  );

  const formsController = useFormsController({
    formType,
    formData,
    sections: visibleSections,
    setFormData,
    setErrors,
    dispatch,
    routeContext,
    session,
    toast,
    requestSigningDocsReview,
    lockedFieldPaths: lockedFieldPaths || computedLockedFieldPaths,
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!session) return;

    if (session.formType || session.flowType || session.isLinked != null) {
      switchFormType(getInitialFormType(session));
    }

    if (session.role) {
      switchRole(session.role);
    }
  }, [session, switchFormType, switchRole]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;
    setDraftRestoreLoading(true);
    setRemoteDraftReady(false);
    remoteDraftFileRef.current = null;

    async function restoreDraft() {
      const localDraft = loadFormDraft(formType, routeContext);

      if (!routeContext?.dcmt) {
        if (localDraft && !cancelled) {
          setFormData({ ...getInitialState(formType), ...localDraft });
        }
        if (!cancelled) {
          setRemoteDraftReady(true);
          setDraftRestoreLoading(false);
        }
        return;
      }

      try {
        const remoteDraft = await loadWorkflowFormStateDraft({
          exec: routeContext.exec,
          wrk: routeContext.wrk,
          dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
          folderId: session?.folderId,
          token: getSessionToken(session),
        });

        if (cancelled) return;

        if (remoteDraft?.remoteFile) {
          remoteDraftFileRef.current = remoteDraft.remoteFile;
        }

        const resolvedDraft = remoteDraft?.formData || localDraft;
        if (resolvedDraft) {
          setFormData({ ...getInitialState(formType), ...resolvedDraft });
        }
      } catch {
        if (!cancelled && localDraft) {
          setFormData({ ...getInitialState(formType), ...localDraft });
        }
      } finally {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setRemoteDraftReady(true);
          setDraftRestoreLoading(false);
        }
      }
    }

    restoreDraft();

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [
    formType,
    routeContext,
    routeContext?.dcmt,
    routeContext?.exec,
    routeContext?.wrk,
    session,
    setFormData,
  ]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!remoteDraftReady) return undefined;

    if (!hasUserChanges) return undefined;

    saveFormDraft(formType, formData, routeContext);
    if (!routeContext?.dcmt || !indexHydration.resolved) return undefined;

    if (remoteDraftSaveTimeoutRef.current) {
      globalThis.clearTimeout(remoteDraftSaveTimeoutRef.current);
    }

    remoteDraftSaveTimeoutRef.current = globalThis.setTimeout(async () => {
      try {
        const persisted = await saveWorkflowFormStateDraft({
          exec: routeContext.exec,
          wrk: routeContext.wrk,
          dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
          folderId: session?.folderId,
          token: getSessionToken(session),
          formType,
          formData,
          fileId: remoteDraftFileRef.current?.fileId,
        });

        if (persisted?.savedFileId) {
          const nextRemoteDraftFile = remoteDraftFileRef.current
            ? { ...remoteDraftFileRef.current }
            : {};
          remoteDraftFileRef.current = {
            ...nextRemoteDraftFile,
            fileId: persisted.savedFileId,
            fileTypeId: persisted.fileTypeId,
            documentId: persisted.documentId,
            name: persisted.fileName,
            description: `SISAD_INVERNEG_FORM_STATE:${routeContext.dcmt}`,
          };
        }
      } catch {
        // do not block the UI when remote draft persistence fails
      }
    }, 1200);

    return () => {
      if (remoteDraftSaveTimeoutRef.current) {
        globalThis.clearTimeout(remoteDraftSaveTimeoutRef.current);
      }
    };
  }, [
    formData,
    formType,
    hasUserChanges,
    indexHydration.resolved,
    remoteDraftReady,
    routeContext,
    session,
  ]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!routeContext?.wrk) return;

    const requestKey = `${routeContext.wrk}|${getSessionToken(session)}`;
    if (workflowFilesRequestKeyRef.current === requestKey) return;

    workflowFilesRequestKeyRef.current = requestKey;
    // centralize workflow configuration fetch (Status + Editable Config)
    dispatch(
      fetchWorkflowConfig({
        wrk: routeContext.wrk,
        token: getSessionToken(session),
      }),
    );
  }, [dispatch, routeContext?.wrk, session]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!routeContext?.dcmt) return;

    dispatch(
      fetchWorkflowDocumentFiles({
        exec: routeContext.exec,
        wrk: routeContext.wrk,
        dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
        folderId: session?.folderId,
        token: getSessionToken(session),
      }),
    );
  }, [
    dispatch,
    routeContext?.dcmt,
    routeContext?.exec,
    routeContext?.wrk,
    session?.folderId,
    session,
  ]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const validateCurrentToken = () => {
      const token = getSessionToken(session);
      if (!token) return;
      if (typeof document !== "undefined" && document.hidden) return;

      if (!isTokenValid(token)) {
        redirectToWorkflowExternos(routeContext);
      }
    };

    validateCurrentToken();
    const timer = globalThis.setInterval(validateCurrentToken, 30000);
    return () => globalThis.clearInterval(timer);
  }, [routeContext, session]);

  const workflowModule = useFormsWorkflowModule({
    formType,
    formData,
    routeContext,
    session,
    toast,
    setFormData,
    dispatch,
    initialDocId: "solicitud",
  });

  return {
    formsController,
    draftRestoreLoading,
    indexHydration,
    lockedFieldPaths: lockedFieldPaths || computedLockedFieldPaths,
    persistSystemDraft,
    ...workflowModule,
  };
}

export { useIndexHydrationState as useIndexHydration };
export default useFormsFlow;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/hooks/formsFlowModule.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #83
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/hooks/useAllDocumentsPreviewWarm.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/hooks/useAllDocumentsPreviewWarm.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 147
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { hashFormData } from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";
import { getOfficialPdfPreview } from "@/core/document/services/pdfPreviewService";
import { getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument } from "@/domain/signing/signingUtils";

const SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR =
  ".sign-anchor-marker[data-sign-anchor], [data-sign-anchor]";

/**
 * @typedef {'warming'|'ready'|'error'} WarmState
 * @typedef {{ state: WarmState, blobUrl: string, error: string }} DocWarmEntry
 */

/**
 * Fire-and-forget parallel PDF cache warmer for all signing documents.
 *
 * Calls getOfficialPdfPreview in parallel for every doc on mount so the
 * pdfCache is populated before useDocumentPreviewCoordinator needs it.
 * When the coordinator fires after its 1800ms debounce, it finds a cache hit
 * and returns immediately without an HTTP call or spinner.
 *
 * CONTRACT:
 * - Does NOT revoke blobUrls. The parent must call disposeAllOfficialPdfPreviews
 *   on unmount to avoid memory leaks.
 * - Safe when documents is empty, formData is falsy, or enabled is false (no-op).
 * - Re-warms when formData content OR doc list actually changes (content-hash guard).
 *
 * @param {{
 *   documents: Array<{ id: string }>,
 *   formType: 'natural'|'linked',
 *   formData: object,
 *   enabled?: boolean
 * }} params
 * @returns {{
 *   warmStates: Record<string, DocWarmEntry>,
 *   isAllWarm: boolean,
 *   getDocBlobUrl: (docId: string) => string
 * }}
 */
export function useAllDocumentsPreviewWarm({
  documents = [],
  formType,
  formData,
  enabled = true,
}) {
  const [warmStates, setWarmStates] = useState(
    /** @type {Record<string, DocWarmEntry>} */ ({}),
  );
  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
  const lastWarmKeyRef = useRef("");

  useEffect(() => {
    mountedRef.current = true;
    return () => {
      mountedRef.current = false;
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!enabled || !documents.length || !formType || !formData) return;

    // hashFormData is WeakMap-cached — O(1) for same reference
    const revisionId = hashFormData(formData);
    const docIds = documents.map((d) => d.id).join(",");
    const warmKey = `${revisionId}|${formType}|${docIds}`;

    // Guard: skip if revision + doc list hasn't changed
    if (warmKey === lastWarmKeyRef.current) return;
    lastWarmKeyRef.current = warmKey;

    const initial = /** @type {Record<string, DocWarmEntry>} */ ({});
    for (const doc of documents) {
      initial[doc.id] = { state: "warming", blobUrl: "", error: "" };
    }
    const resetTimer = setTimeout(() => {
      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
      setWarmStates(initial);
    }, 0);

    // Parallel warm — getOrSetPending inside getOfficialPdfPreview deduplicates
    // concurrent requests for the same cacheKey automatically.
    for (const doc of documents) {
      const documentId = String(doc?.id || "").trim();
      const expectedAnchors = getExpectedAnchorsConfigForDocument(
        documentId,
        formType,
      );
      getOfficialPdfPreview({
        documentId,
        formType,
        formData,
        revisionId,
        force: false,
        resolveAnchorsInBackend: true,
        isSigningFlow: true,
        expectedAnchors,
        anchorSelector: SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR,
        waitForSelector: SIGNING_ANCHOR_SELECTOR,
        waitForTimeoutMs: 15000,
        mediaType: "print",
        metadata: {
          hideAnchorMarkersBeforePdf: true,
          resolveAnchorsInBackend: true,
          documentId,
        },
      })
        .then((result) => {
          if (!mountedRef.current) return;
          setWarmStates((prev) => ({
            ...prev,
            [documentId]: {
              state: "ready",
              blobUrl: result.blobUrl || "",
              error: "",
            },
          }));
        })
        .catch((err) => {
          if (!mountedRef.current) return;
          setWarmStates((prev) => ({
            ...prev,
            [documentId]: {
              state: "error",
              blobUrl: "",
              error: err?.message || "Error al pre-generar preview",
            },
          }));
        });
    }
    return () => clearTimeout(resetTimer);
  }, [documents, enabled, formData, formType]);

  const isAllWarm =
    documents.length > 0 &&
    documents.every((doc) => warmStates[doc.id]?.state === "ready");

  const getDocBlobUrl = useCallback(
    /** @param {string} docId */
    (docId) => (docId ? (warmStates[docId]?.blobUrl ?? "") : ""),
    [warmStates],
  );

  return { warmStates, isAllWarm, getDocBlobUrl };
}

export default useAllDocumentsPreviewWarm;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/hooks/useAllDocumentsPreviewWarm.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #84
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/hooks/useDocumentPreviewCoordinator.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/hooks/useDocumentPreviewCoordinator.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 333
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import {
  hashFormData,
  PREVIEW_STATE,
  createDocumentStateCoordinator,
} from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";
import { getQuickPreview } from "@/core/document/services/previewService";
import {
  getOfficialPdfPreview,
  disposeOfficialPdfPreview,
} from "@/core/document/services/pdfPreviewService";
// NOTE: PREVIEW_STATE and createDocumentStateCoordinator are provided by coreCacheMetrics

/**
 * @typedef {'idle'|'dirty'|'syncing'|'ready'|'error'|'stale'} PreviewState
 */

const DEFAULT_POLICY = Object.freeze({
  quickDebounceMs: 260,
  officialDebounceMs: 1800,
});

/**
 * Coordinates quick and official preview states with debounce + cancellation.
 * @param {{
 *  documentId: string,
 *  formType: 'natural'|'linked',
 *  formData: object,
 *  enabled: boolean,
 *  officialMode: boolean,
 *  triggers: { enterOfficial?: boolean, manualRefreshNonce?: number, sectionSaveNonce?: number },
 *  policy?: { quickDebounceMs?: number, officialDebounceMs?: number }
 * }} params
 */
export function useDocumentPreviewCoordinator(params = {}) {
  const {
    documentId,
    formType,
    formData,
    enabled = true,
    officialMode = false,
    quickMode = false,
    expectedAnchors = [],
    anchorSelector = "",
    resolveAnchorsInBackend = false,
    isSigningFlow = false,
    waitForSelector,
    waitForTimeoutMs,
    mediaType,
    metadata = {},
    triggers = {},
    policy = {},
  } = params;

  const resolvedPolicy = {
    quickDebounceMs: policy.quickDebounceMs ?? DEFAULT_POLICY.quickDebounceMs,
    officialDebounceMs:
      policy.officialDebounceMs ?? DEFAULT_POLICY.officialDebounceMs,
  };
  const stablePolicy = useMemo(
    () => ({
      quickDebounceMs: resolvedPolicy.quickDebounceMs,
      officialDebounceMs: resolvedPolicy.officialDebounceMs,
    }),
    [resolvedPolicy.quickDebounceMs, resolvedPolicy.officialDebounceMs],
  );
  const enterOfficial = Boolean(triggers?.enterOfficial);
  const sectionSaveNonce = triggers?.sectionSaveNonce ?? 0;
  const manualRefreshNonce = triggers?.manualRefreshNonce ?? 0;

  const revisionId = useMemo(() => hashFormData(formData || {}), [formData]);
  const coordinatorRef = useRef(createDocumentStateCoordinator());
  const latestOfficialRequestIdRef = useRef(0);
  const officialCacheKeyRef = useRef("");
  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
  const [quick, setQuick] = useState({
    state: PREVIEW_STATE.IDLE,
    html: "",
    error: "",
    fromCache: false,
  });
  const [official, setOfficial] = useState({
    state: PREVIEW_STATE.IDLE,
    blobUrl: "",
    error: "",
    stale: false,
    generatedAt: null,
    cacheKey: "",
  });

  const officialTimersRef = useRef({ debounce: null });
  const quickTimersRef = useRef({ debounce: null });
  const lastRevisionRef = useRef(revisionId);
  const lastDocumentIdRef = useRef(documentId || "");
  const lastFormTypeRef = useRef(formType || "");
  const lastManualRefreshNonceRef = useRef(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const coordinator = coordinatorRef.current;
    const quickTimers = quickTimersRef.current;
    const officialTimers = officialTimersRef.current;
    return () => {
      mountedRef.current = false;
      coordinator.cancelAll();
      if (quickTimers.debounce) clearTimeout(quickTimers.debounce);
      if (officialTimers.debounce) clearTimeout(officialTimers.debounce);
      // Keep official blob cache alive across React.StrictMode mount cycles.
      // The cache is cleaned by explicit actions and beforeunload lifecycle.
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!enabled || !documentId || !formType) return;

    const previousDocumentId = lastDocumentIdRef.current;
    const previousFormType = lastFormTypeRef.current;
    const hasDocumentChanged =
      Boolean(previousDocumentId) && previousDocumentId !== documentId;
    const hasFormTypeChanged =
      Boolean(previousFormType) && previousFormType !== formType;

    lastDocumentIdRef.current = documentId;
    lastFormTypeRef.current = formType;

    if (!hasDocumentChanged && !hasFormTypeChanged) return;

    coordinatorRef.current.cancelAll();
    latestOfficialRequestIdRef.current += 1;

    setQuick({
      state: PREVIEW_STATE.DIRTY,
      html: "",
      error: "",
      fromCache: false,
    });

    setOfficial((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      state: prev.blobUrl ? PREVIEW_STATE.STALE : PREVIEW_STATE.DIRTY,
      blobUrl: "",
      cacheKey: "",
      stale: true,
      error: "",
    }));
  }, [enabled, documentId, formType]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!quickMode) return;
    if (!enabled || !documentId || !formType) return;
    if (quickTimersRef.current.debounce)
      clearTimeout(quickTimersRef.current.debounce);
    setQuick((prev) => ({ ...prev, state: PREVIEW_STATE.SYNCING, error: "" }));

    quickTimersRef.current.debounce = setTimeout(async () => {
      try {
        const result = await getQuickPreview({
          documentId,
          formType,
          formData,
          revisionId,
          mode: "screen",
        });
        if (!mountedRef.current) return;
        setQuick({
          state: PREVIEW_STATE.READY,
          html: result.html || "",
          error: "",
          fromCache: Boolean(result.fromCache),
        });
      } catch (error) {
        if (!mountedRef.current) return;
        setQuick((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          state: PREVIEW_STATE.ERROR,
          error: error?.message || "No se pudo generar la vista previa rápida.",
        }));
      }
    }, resolvedPolicy.quickDebounceMs);
  }, [
    documentId,
    enabled,
    formData,
    formType,
    quickMode,
    revisionId,
    resolvedPolicy.quickDebounceMs,
  ]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!enabled || !documentId || !formType) return;
    if (revisionId === lastRevisionRef.current) return;
    lastRevisionRef.current = revisionId;
    setOfficial((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      state: prev.blobUrl ? PREVIEW_STATE.STALE : PREVIEW_STATE.DIRTY,
      stale: true,
    }));
  }, [documentId, enabled, formType, revisionId]);

  const requestOfficialPreview = useCallback(
    async ({ force = false } = {}) => {
      if (!enabled || !documentId || !formType) return;
      const request = coordinatorRef.current.beginRequest();
      latestOfficialRequestIdRef.current = request.requestId;
      setOfficial((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        state: PREVIEW_STATE.SYNCING,
        error: "",
      }));

      try {
        const result = await getOfficialPdfPreview({
          documentId,
          formType,
          formData,
          revisionId,
          force,
          expectedAnchors,
          anchorSelector,
          resolveAnchorsInBackend,
          isSigningFlow,
          waitForSelector,
          waitForTimeoutMs,
          mediaType,
          metadata,
        });
        coordinatorRef.current.completeRequest(request.requestId);
        if (!mountedRef.current) return;
        if (request.requestId !== latestOfficialRequestIdRef.current) return;
        officialCacheKeyRef.current = result.cacheKey || "";
        setOfficial({
          state: PREVIEW_STATE.READY,
          blobUrl: result.blobUrl || "",
          error: "",
          stale: false,
          generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          cacheKey: result.cacheKey || "",
        });
      } catch (error) {
        coordinatorRef.current.completeRequest(request.requestId);
        if (!mountedRef.current) return;
        if (request.requestId !== latestOfficialRequestIdRef.current) return;
        setOfficial((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          state: PREVIEW_STATE.ERROR,
          error: error?.message || "No se pudo generar el preview oficial PDF.",
        }));
      }
    },
    [
      enabled,
      documentId,
      formType,
      formData,
      revisionId,
      expectedAnchors,
      anchorSelector,
      resolveAnchorsInBackend,
      isSigningFlow,
      waitForSelector,
      waitForTimeoutMs,
      mediaType,
      metadata,
    ],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!officialMode || !enabled) return;
    const timers = officialTimersRef.current;
    if (timers.debounce) clearTimeout(timers.debounce);
    timers.debounce = setTimeout(
      () => requestOfficialPreview({ force: false }),
      stablePolicy.officialDebounceMs,
    );
    return () => {
      if (timers.debounce) clearTimeout(timers.debounce);
    };
  }, [
    officialMode,
    enabled,
    documentId,
    formType,
    revisionId,
    stablePolicy.officialDebounceMs,
    enterOfficial,
    sectionSaveNonce,
    requestOfficialPreview,
  ]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!officialMode || !enabled) return;
    if (!manualRefreshNonce) return;
    if (manualRefreshNonce === lastManualRefreshNonceRef.current) return;
    lastManualRefreshNonceRef.current = manualRefreshNonce;
    requestOfficialPreview({ force: true });
  }, [officialMode, enabled, requestOfficialPreview, manualRefreshNonce]);

  return {
    revisionId,
    quick,
    official,
    actions: {
      markDirty() {
        setOfficial((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          state: prev.blobUrl ? PREVIEW_STATE.STALE : PREVIEW_STATE.DIRTY,
          stale: true,
        }));
      },
      refreshOfficial() {
        return requestOfficialPreview({ force: true });
      },
      invalidateDocument() {
        setQuick((prev) => ({ ...prev, state: PREVIEW_STATE.DIRTY }));
        setOfficial((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          state: prev.blobUrl ? PREVIEW_STATE.STALE : PREVIEW_STATE.DIRTY,
          stale: true,
        }));
      },
      clearResources() {
        coordinatorRef.current.cancelAll();
        if (officialCacheKeyRef.current) {
          disposeOfficialPdfPreview(officialCacheKeyRef.current);
          officialCacheKeyRef.current = "";
        }
      },
    },
  };
}

export default useDocumentPreviewCoordinator;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/hooks/useDocumentPreviewCoordinator.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #85
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningFlowController.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningFlowController.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 226
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import {
  pickSigningDocument,
  getOfficialAnchorsByDocumentId,
  getPrimaryOfficialAnchorByDocumentId,
  getAnchorDiagnosticsByDocumentId,
  getMissingExpectedAnchorsDiagnostics,
  hasOfficialAnchorsReady,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingFlowSelectors";
import { useSigningLiveness } from "@/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningLiveness";
import { useSigningReviewSurface } from "@/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningReviewSurface";

export function useSigningFlowController({
  documents = [],
  workflow = {},
  onComplete,
} = {}) {
  const requestedDocumentId = workflow?.requestedDocumentId || "";

  const activeDocument = useMemo(() => {
    return pickSigningDocument(documents || [], requestedDocumentId || "");
  }, [documents, requestedDocumentId]);

  const [state, setState] = useState({
    status: "idle",
    reviewOpen: false,
    officialPdfByDocumentId: {},
  });

  const setOfficialPdfRenderForDocument = useCallback(
    (documentId, payload = {}) => {
      const resolvedId = String(documentId || "").trim();
      if (!resolvedId) return;
      setState((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        officialPdfByDocumentId: {
          ...(prev?.officialPdfByDocumentId || {}),
          [resolvedId]: {
            officialPdfBase64:
              payload?.officialPdfBase64 || payload?.base64 || "",
            officialPdfBytes:
              payload?.officialPdfBytes || payload?.pdfBytes || null,
            resolvedAnchors: Array.isArray(payload?.resolvedAnchors)
              ? payload.resolvedAnchors
              : Array.isArray(payload?.anchors)
                ? payload.anchors
                : [],
            anchorDiagnostics:
              payload?.anchorDiagnostics || payload?.diagnostics || {},
            renderMetadata: payload?.renderMetadata || payload?.metadata || {},
            updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          },
        },
      }));
    },
    [],
  );

  const startSigning = useCallback(() => {
    setState({ status: "liveness", reviewOpen: false });
    setTimeout(() => {
      setState({ status: "completed", reviewOpen: false });
      try {
        onComplete?.({ success: true, document: activeDocument });
      } catch {
        /* noop */
      }
    }, 10);
  }, [activeDocument, onComplete]);

  const openReview = useCallback(
    () => setState((s) => ({ ...s, reviewOpen: true })),
    [],
  );
  const closeReview = useCallback(
    () => setState((s) => ({ ...s, reviewOpen: false })),
    [],
  );
  const triggerLiveness = useCallback(
    () => setState((s) => ({ ...s, status: "liveness" })),
    [],
  );

  const activeDocumentId = String(
    activeDocument?.id || activeDocument?.documentId || "",
  ).trim();
  const activeDocumentOfficialAnchors = useMemo(
    () => getOfficialAnchorsByDocumentId(state, activeDocumentId),
    [state, activeDocumentId],
  );
  const activeDocumentPrimaryOfficialAnchor = useMemo(
    () =>
      getPrimaryOfficialAnchorByDocumentId(
        state,
        activeDocumentId,
        workflow?.formType || "natural",
      ),
    [state, activeDocumentId, workflow?.formType],
  );
  const activeDocumentAnchorDiagnostics = useMemo(
    () => getAnchorDiagnosticsByDocumentId(state, activeDocumentId),
    [state, activeDocumentId],
  );
  const activeDocumentMissingAnchorDiagnostics = useMemo(
    () =>
      getMissingExpectedAnchorsDiagnostics(
        state,
        activeDocumentId,
        workflow?.formType || "natural",
      ),
    [state, activeDocumentId, workflow?.formType],
  );
  const activeDocumentHasOfficialAnchors = useMemo(
    () => hasOfficialAnchorsReady(state, activeDocumentId),
    [state, activeDocumentId],
  );

  return {
    activeDocument,
    startSigning,
    openReview,
    closeReview,
    state,
    triggerLiveness,
    setOfficialPdfRenderForDocument,
    activeDocumentOfficialAnchors,
    activeDocumentPrimaryOfficialAnchor,
    activeDocumentAnchorDiagnostics,
    activeDocumentMissingAnchorDiagnostics,
    activeDocumentHasOfficialAnchors,
  };
}

export function useIntegratedSigningFlowController(params = {}) {
  const {
    formType,
    formData,
    session,
    setFormData,
    persistSystemDraft,
    signingStorageScope,
    routeContext,
    toast,
    navigate,
    signingReviewBaseSearch,
    signingReviewActiveDocumentId = "",
    batchSigningStatus = { running: false, message: "" },
    isLivenessCallbackPage = false,
    handleSignBatch,
    isSigningReviewMobilePage = false,
    isSigningStep = false,
    loadingSaveForm = false,
    requiredWorkflowAttachmentsReady = false,
    hasFingerprintCode = false,
    canStartSigning = false,
    setIsSigningDocsModalOpen,
    locationSearch = "",
    signingDocumentsChecklist = [],
    queryDocId = "",
    queryFormType = "",
    panelParam = "",
    queryStep = "",
    dispatch,
  } = params;

  const liveness = useSigningLiveness({
    formType,
    formData,
    session,
    setFormData,
    persistSystemDraft,
    signingStorageScope,
    routeContext,
    toast,
    navigate,
    signingReviewBaseSearch,
    signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
    batchSigningStatus,
    isLivenessCallbackPage,
  });

  const review = useSigningReviewSurface({
    formType,
    formData,
    session,
    setFormData,
    persistSystemDraft,
    signingStorageScope,
    handleSignBatch,
    toast,
    navigate,
    signingReviewBaseSearch,
    signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
    isSigningReviewMobilePage,
    isSigningStep,
    batchSigningStatus,
    loadingSaveForm,
    requiredWorkflowAttachmentsReady,
    hasFingerprintCode,
    canStartSigning,
    setIsSigningDocsModalOpen,
    locationSearch,
    isLivenessCallbackPage,
    signingDocumentsChecklist,
    queryDocId,
    queryFormType,
    panelParam,
    queryStep,
    routeContext,
    dispatch,
    livenessSession: liveness.livenessSession,
    setLivenessSession: liveness.setLivenessSession,
    isSubmittingSignature: liveness.isSubmittingSignature,
    setIsSubmittingSignature: liveness.setIsSubmittingSignature,
    applyLivenessReturn: liveness.applyLivenessReturn,
    buildSigningCallbackUrl: liveness.buildSigningCallbackUrl,
    closeSigningReviewSurface: liveness.closeSigningReviewSurface,
    lastAutoResumeKeyRef: liveness.lastAutoResumeKeyRef,
  });

  return {
    ...liveness,
    ...review,
  };
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningFlowController.js ==========================

// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningLiveness.js
// Extensión: .js

import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { logger, getSessionToken } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import {
  buildLivenessCallbackUrl,
  buildLivenessCheckSnapshot,
  normalizeLivenessPhase,
  normalizeProviderLivenessStatus,
  isLivenessRecoverableFailureMessage,
  resolveEffectiveWorkflowIdentity,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessState";
import {
  buildSigningRuntimeState,
  clearLivenessReturnPayload,
  clearLivenessPendingSession,
  clearSigningProcessState,
  resetSigningProcessAfterRecoverableFailure,
  readLivenessPendingSession,
  setActiveSigningStorageScope,
  updateLivenessPendingSession,
  updateSigningProcessState,
  broadcastLivenessReturn,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessStorage";
import { buildSearchWithParams } from "@/shared/utils/urlHelpers";
import { checkLivenessTransaction } from "@/infrastructure/signature/signatureProviderApi";

const SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL = "sign-review";
const SIGN_REVIEW_STEP = "4";
const FORMS_PATHNAME = "/forms";
const LIVENESS_POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 3500;
const LIVENESS_POLL_INITIAL_DELAY_MS = 1200;
const LIVENESS_POLL_MAX_ATTEMPTS = 600; // defensive cap to avoid infinite polling (~35 minutes)

function useLivenessPolling({
  livenessSession,
  formDataRef,
  sessionToken,
  commitSystemFormData,
  signatureBatchCompleted,
  batchSigningStatus,
  isLivenessCallbackPage,
  applyLivenessReturn,
  toast,
  setLivenessSession,
}) {
  const livenessPollRequestIdRef = useRef(0);
  const livenessPollInFlightRef = useRef(false);
  const livenessPollAttemptsRef = useRef(0);
  const livenessLastPollAtRef = useRef(0);
  const missingTokenWarnedRef = useRef(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return undefined;

    const phase = normalizeLivenessPhase(livenessSession?.status);
    const shouldPoll =
      !signatureBatchCompleted &&
      !batchSigningStatus.running &&
      Boolean(livenessSession?.livenessId) &&
      ["opening", "in_liveness_tab", "popup_blocked"].includes(phase) &&
      !isLivenessCallbackPage;

    if (!shouldPoll) return undefined;
    if (!sessionToken) {
      if (!missingTokenWarnedRef.current) {
        missingTokenWarnedRef.current = true;
        logger.warn(
          "[liveness] polling skipped because session token is missing",
        );
      }
      return undefined;
    }

    let cancelled = false;
    let timer = null;

    const scheduleNext = (delay = LIVENESS_POLL_INTERVAL_MS) => {
      if (cancelled) return;
      if (timer) window.clearTimeout(timer);
      timer = window.setTimeout(() => {
        void pollLivenessStatus();
      }, delay);
    };

    const pollLivenessStatus = async () => {
      livenessPollAttemptsRef.current =
        (livenessPollAttemptsRef.current || 0) + 1;
      if (livenessPollAttemptsRef.current > LIVENESS_POLL_MAX_ATTEMPTS) {
        logger.warn("[liveness] max poll attempts reached, stopping polling");
        setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          status: "error",
          message:
            "Se alcanzó el tiempo máximo de espera para la prueba de vida.",
        }));
        try {
          updateLivenessPendingSession({
            ...(readLivenessPendingSession() || {}),
            status: "error",
          });
        } catch (error) {
          void error;
        }
        return;
      }

      const now = Date.now();
      if (livenessPollInFlightRef.current) return;
      if (now - livenessLastPollAtRef.current < LIVENESS_POLL_INTERVAL_MS) {
        scheduleNext(LIVENESS_POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
        return;
      }

      const projectReference =
        formDataRef?.current?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
        "FirmasInverneg";
      const requestId = ++livenessPollRequestIdRef.current;
      livenessPollInFlightRef.current = true;
      livenessLastPollAtRef.current = now;

      try {
        const response = await checkLivenessTransaction(
          { livenessId: livenessSession.livenessId, projectReference },
          { token: sessionToken, projectReference },
        );
        if (cancelled || requestId !== livenessPollRequestIdRef.current) return;

        const providerStatus = normalizeProviderLivenessStatus(response);
        if (providerStatus === "approved") {
          const returnPayload = {
            status: "approved",
            transactionId: livenessSession.transactionId || "",
            livenessId: livenessSession.livenessId || "",
            returnToken: livenessSession.returnToken || "",
            callbackUrl: livenessSession.callbackUrl || "",
            providerStatus,
            providerResponse: response,
          };
          applyLivenessReturn(returnPayload);
          broadcastLivenessReturn(returnPayload, { skipCustomEvent: true });
          clearLivenessReturnPayload();
          livenessPollAttemptsRef.current = 0;
          return;
        }

        if (providerStatus === "rejected") {
          resetSigningProcessAfterRecoverableFailure({
            setLivenessSession,
            setFormData: commitSystemFormData,
            toast,
            livenessStatus: "error",
            message: "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo.",
          });
        }
      } catch (error) {
        if (cancelled) return;
        logger.warn("[liveness] polling failed:", error?.message || error);
      } finally {
        livenessPollInFlightRef.current = false;
        if (!cancelled) scheduleNext(LIVENESS_POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
      }
    };

    scheduleNext(LIVENESS_POLL_INITIAL_DELAY_MS);

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
      livenessPollInFlightRef.current = false;
      if (timer) window.clearTimeout(timer);
    };
  }, [
    batchSigningStatus.running,
    formDataRef,
    livenessSession?.callbackUrl,
    livenessSession?.livenessId,
    livenessSession?.returnToken,
    livenessSession?.status,
    livenessSession?.transactionId,
    signatureBatchCompleted,
    isLivenessCallbackPage,
    toast,
    sessionToken,
    setLivenessSession,
    commitSystemFormData,
    applyLivenessReturn,
  ]);
}

export function useSigningLiveness({
  formType,
  formData,
  session,
  setFormData,
  persistSystemDraft,
  signingStorageScope,
  routeContext,
  toast,
  navigate,
  signingReviewBaseSearch,
  signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
  batchSigningStatus,
  isLivenessCallbackPage,
}) {
  useEffect(() => {
    setActiveSigningStorageScope(signingStorageScope);
  }, [signingStorageScope]);
  const [livenessSession, setLivenessSession] = useState({
    open: false,
    livenessId: "",
    link: "",
    transactionId: "",
    status: "idle",
    message: "",
    startedAt: null,
    callbackUrl: "",
    returnToken: "",
  });
  const [isSubmittingSignature, setIsSubmittingSignature] = useState(false);
  const lastAutoResumeKeyRef = useRef("");
  const immediateCheckProcessedKeyRef = useRef("");
  const pendingSessionToken = String(
    readLivenessPendingSession()?.authToken || "",
  ).trim();

  // Stable ref for formData so callbacks and effects can access latest values
  const formDataRef = useRef(formData);
  useEffect(() => {
    formDataRef.current = formData;
  }, [formData]);

  const commitSystemFormData = useCallback(
    (updater) => {
      const nextFormData =
        typeof updater === "function"
          ? updater(formDataRef.current || {})
          : updater;
      formDataRef.current = nextFormData;
      setFormData(nextFormData);
      if (typeof persistSystemDraft === "function") {
        void persistSystemDraft(nextFormData);
      }
      return nextFormData;
    },
    [persistSystemDraft, setFormData],
  );

  const sessionToken = String(
    getSessionToken(session) ||
      formData?.signatureBatch?.token ||
      formData?.signing?.token ||
      pendingSessionToken ||
      "",
  ).trim();

  const applyLivenessReturn = useCallback(
    (payload = {}) => {
      const currentPendingSession = readLivenessPendingSession() || {};
      const effectiveIdentity = resolveEffectiveWorkflowIdentity({
        routeContext,
        formData: formDataRef.current,
        livenessSession,
        pendingSession: currentPendingSession,
      });
      const transactionId = String(payload?.transactionId || "").trim();
      const livenessId = String(payload?.livenessId || "").trim();
      const callbackUrl = String(payload?.callbackUrl || "").trim();
      const returnToken = String(payload?.returnToken || "").trim();
      const activeReturnToken = String(
        formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.returnToken ||
          currentPendingSession.returnToken ||
          "",
      ).trim();
      const activeLivenessId = String(
        formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.livenessId ||
          currentPendingSession.livenessId ||
          "",
      ).trim();
      const activeTransactionId = String(
        effectiveIdentity.transactionId ||
          formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.transactionId ||
          currentPendingSession.transactionId ||
          "",
      ).trim();
      if (
        (returnToken &&
          activeReturnToken &&
          returnToken !== activeReturnToken) ||
        (livenessId && activeLivenessId && livenessId !== activeLivenessId) ||
        (transactionId &&
          activeTransactionId &&
          transactionId !== activeTransactionId)
      ) {
        logger.info("[liveness] ignoring stale return payload", {
          transactionId,
          livenessId,
          returnToken,
        });
        return;
      }
      const nextStatus =
        normalizeLivenessPhase(payload?.status) || "returned_ready";
      const returnedAt = new Date().toISOString();
      const projectReference =
        formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
        "FirmasInverneg";
      const providerResponse =
        payload?.providerResponse || payload?.checkResponse || null;
      const providerPassed =
