        providerResponse?.details?.tests?.liveness_results?.passed ??
        providerResponse?.tests?.liveness_results?.passed ??
        providerResponse?.passed ??
        null;
      const checkSnapshot = buildLivenessCheckSnapshot({
        status: nextStatus,
        checkedAt: returnedAt,
        source: "liveness_return",
        transactionId,
        livenessId,
        callbackUrl,
        returnToken,
        projectReference,
        passed: providerPassed,
        response: providerResponse,
      });

      setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        open: false,
        status: nextStatus,
        message:
          nextStatus === "approved"
            ? "La prueba de vida fue aprobada. Ya puedes firmar los documentos."
            : "Prueba de vida completada. Ya puedes continuar con la firma.",
        transactionId: transactionId || prev.transactionId || "",
        livenessId: livenessId || prev.livenessId || "",
        callbackUrl: callbackUrl || prev.callbackUrl || "",
        returnToken: returnToken || prev.returnToken || "",
        startedAt: prev.startedAt || returnedAt,
      }));

      const pendingSession = currentPendingSession;
      updateLivenessPendingSession({
        ...pendingSession,
        status: nextStatus,
        transactionId: transactionId || pendingSession.transactionId || "",
        livenessId: livenessId || pendingSession.livenessId || "",
        callbackUrl: callbackUrl || pendingSession.callbackUrl || "",
        returnToken: returnToken || pendingSession.returnToken || "",
        returnedAt,
        lastCheckAt: returnedAt,
        lastCheckStatus: nextStatus,
        lastCheckPassed: providerPassed,
        lastCheckResponse: providerResponse,
        providerStatus: payload?.providerStatus || null,
        providerResponse,
      });
      updateSigningProcessState({
        phase: nextStatus,
        source: "liveness_return",
        livenessId: livenessId || pendingSession.livenessId || "",
        transactionId: transactionId || pendingSession.transactionId || "",
        callbackUrl: callbackUrl || pendingSession.callbackUrl || "",
        returnToken: returnToken || pendingSession.returnToken || "",
        lastCheckAt: returnedAt,
        lastCheckStatus: nextStatus,
        lastCheckPassed: providerPassed,
        lastCheckResponse: providerResponse,
      });

      commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
        ...(prev || {}),
        signatureBatch: {
          ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
          livenessStatus: nextStatus,
          livenessId: livenessId || prev?.signatureBatch?.livenessId || "",
          transactionId:
            transactionId || prev?.signatureBatch?.transactionId || "",
          callbackUrl: callbackUrl || prev?.signatureBatch?.callbackUrl || "",
          returnToken: returnToken || prev?.signatureBatch?.returnToken || "",
          returnedAt,
          lastLivenessCheck: checkSnapshot,
          runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
            phase: nextStatus,
            source: "liveness_return",
            lastLivenessCheck: checkSnapshot,
          }),
        },
        signing: {
          ...(prev?.signing || {}),
          livenessStatus: nextStatus,
          livenessId: livenessId || prev?.signing?.livenessId || "",
          transactionId: transactionId || prev?.signing?.transactionId || "",
          returnToken: returnToken || prev?.signing?.returnToken || "",
          lastLivenessCheck: checkSnapshot,
          runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
            phase: nextStatus,
            source: "liveness_return",
            lastLivenessCheck: checkSnapshot,
          }),
        },
      }));

      if (livenessId && nextStatus !== "approved") {
        void (async () => {
          const immediateCheckKey = [transactionId, livenessId, returnToken]
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join(":");
          if (
            immediateCheckKey &&
            immediateCheckProcessedKeyRef.current === immediateCheckKey
          ) {
            return;
          }
          immediateCheckProcessedKeyRef.current = immediateCheckKey;
          if (!sessionToken) {
            logger.warn(
              "[liveness] immediate check skipped because session token is missing",
            );
            return;
          }
          try {
            const providerResponse = await checkLivenessTransaction(
              {
                livenessId,
                projectReference:
                  formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
                  "FirmasInverneg",
              },
              {
                token: sessionToken,
                projectReference:
                  formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
                  "FirmasInverneg",
              },
            );
            const providerStatus =
              normalizeProviderLivenessStatus(providerResponse);
            if (providerStatus === "approved") {
              const checkedAt = new Date().toISOString();
              const approvedSnapshot = buildLivenessCheckSnapshot({
                status: "approved",
                checkedAt,
                source: "liveness_return_check",
                transactionId,
                livenessId,
                callbackUrl,
                returnToken,
                projectReference:
                  formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
                  "FirmasInverneg",
                passed: true,
                response: providerResponse,
              });
              setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
                ...prev,
                status: "approved",
                message:
                  "La prueba de vida fue aprobada. Ya puedes firmar los documentos.",
              }));
              updateLivenessPendingSession({
                ...(readLivenessPendingSession() || {}),
                status: "approved",
                livenessId,
                transactionId,
                callbackUrl,
                returnToken,
                providerStatus,
                providerResponse,
                approvedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                lastCheckAt: checkedAt,
                lastCheckStatus: "approved",
                lastCheckPassed: true,
                lastCheckResponse: providerResponse,
              });
              updateSigningProcessState({
                phase: "approved",
                source: "liveness_return",
                livenessId,
                transactionId,
                callbackUrl,
                returnToken,
                lastCheckAt: checkedAt,
                lastCheckStatus: "approved",
                lastCheckPassed: true,
                lastCheckResponse: providerResponse,
              });
              commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
                ...(prev || {}),
                signatureBatch: {
                  ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
                  livenessStatus: "approved",
                  livenessId:
                    livenessId || prev?.signatureBatch?.livenessId || "",
                  transactionId:
                    transactionId || prev?.signatureBatch?.transactionId || "",
                  callbackUrl:
                    callbackUrl || prev?.signatureBatch?.callbackUrl || "",
                  returnToken:
                    returnToken || prev?.signatureBatch?.returnToken || "",
                  lastLivenessCheck: approvedSnapshot,
                  runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
                    phase: "approved",
                    source: "liveness_return_check",
                    lastLivenessCheck: approvedSnapshot,
                  }),
                },
                signing: {
                  ...(prev?.signing || {}),
                  livenessStatus: "approved",
                  livenessId: livenessId || prev?.signing?.livenessId || "",
                  transactionId:
                    transactionId || prev?.signing?.transactionId || "",
                  returnToken: returnToken || prev?.signing?.returnToken || "",
                  lastLivenessCheck: approvedSnapshot,
                  runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
                    phase: "approved",
                    source: "liveness_return_check",
                    lastLivenessCheck: approvedSnapshot,
                  }),
                },
              }));
              return;
            }
            if (
              providerStatus === "rejected" ||
              isLivenessRecoverableFailureMessage(
                String(providerResponse?.message || ""),
              )
            ) {
              const checkedAt = new Date().toISOString();
              const rejectedSnapshot = buildLivenessCheckSnapshot({
                status: "error",
                checkedAt,
                source: "liveness_return_check",
                transactionId,
                livenessId,
                callbackUrl,
                returnToken,
                projectReference:
                  formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
                  "FirmasInverneg",
                passed: false,
                response: providerResponse,
              });
              updateLivenessPendingSession({
                ...(readLivenessPendingSession() || {}),
                status: "error",
                livenessId,
                transactionId,
                callbackUrl,
                returnToken,
                providerStatus,
                providerResponse,
                checkedAt,
                lastCheckAt: checkedAt,
                lastCheckStatus: "error",
                lastCheckPassed: false,
                lastCheckResponse: providerResponse,
              });
              updateSigningProcessState({
                phase: "error",
                source: "liveness_return",
                livenessId,
                transactionId,
                callbackUrl,
                returnToken,
                lastCheckAt: checkedAt,
                lastCheckStatus: "error",
                lastCheckPassed: false,
                lastCheckResponse: providerResponse,
              });
              commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
                ...(prev || {}),
                signatureBatch: {
                  ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
                  livenessStatus: "error",
                  livenessId:
                    livenessId || prev?.signatureBatch?.livenessId || "",
                  transactionId:
                    transactionId || prev?.signatureBatch?.transactionId || "",
                  callbackUrl:
                    callbackUrl || prev?.signatureBatch?.callbackUrl || "",
                  returnToken:
                    returnToken || prev?.signatureBatch?.returnToken || "",
                  lastLivenessCheck: rejectedSnapshot,
                  runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
                    phase: "error",
                    source: "liveness_return_check",
                    lastLivenessCheck: rejectedSnapshot,
                  }),
                },
                signing: {
                  ...(prev?.signing || {}),
                  livenessStatus: "error",
                  livenessId: livenessId || prev?.signing?.livenessId || "",
                  transactionId:
                    transactionId || prev?.signing?.transactionId || "",
                  returnToken: returnToken || prev?.signing?.returnToken || "",
                  lastLivenessCheck: rejectedSnapshot,
                  runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
                    phase: "error",
                    source: "liveness_return_check",
                    lastLivenessCheck: rejectedSnapshot,
                  }),
                },
              }));
              setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
                ...prev,
                open: false,
                status: "error",
                message: "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo.",
                transactionId: transactionId || prev.transactionId || "",
                livenessId: livenessId || prev.livenessId || "",
                callbackUrl: callbackUrl || prev.callbackUrl || "",
                returnToken: returnToken || prev.returnToken || "",
              }));
              toast?.error(
                "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo.",
              );
              return;
            }
            setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
              ...prev,
              status: "in_liveness_tab",
              message:
                "La prueba de vida sigue en proceso. Completa la verificación para continuar.",
            }));
            updateLivenessPendingSession({
              ...(readLivenessPendingSession() || {}),
              status: "in_liveness_tab",
              livenessId,
              transactionId,
              callbackUrl,
              returnToken,
              providerStatus,
              providerResponse,
              checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
              lastCheckAt: new Date().toISOString(),
              lastCheckStatus: "in_liveness_tab",
              lastCheckPassed: false,
              lastCheckResponse: providerResponse,
            });
            updateSigningProcessState({
              phase: "in_liveness_tab",
              source: "liveness_return",
              livenessId,
              transactionId,
              callbackUrl,
              returnToken,
              lastCheckAt: new Date().toISOString(),
              lastCheckStatus: "in_liveness_tab",
              lastCheckPassed: false,
              lastCheckResponse: providerResponse,
            });
            const checkedAt = new Date().toISOString();
            const pendingSnapshot = buildLivenessCheckSnapshot({
              status: "in_liveness_tab",
              checkedAt,
              source: "liveness_return_check",
              transactionId,
              livenessId,
              callbackUrl,
              returnToken,
              projectReference:
                formDataRef.current?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
                "FirmasInverneg",
              passed: false,
              response: providerResponse,
            });
            commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
              ...(prev || {}),
              signatureBatch: {
                ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
                livenessStatus: "in_liveness_tab",
                livenessId:
                  livenessId || prev?.signatureBatch?.livenessId || "",
                transactionId:
                  transactionId || prev?.signatureBatch?.transactionId || "",
                callbackUrl:
                  callbackUrl || prev?.signatureBatch?.callbackUrl || "",
                returnToken:
                  returnToken || prev?.signatureBatch?.returnToken || "",
                lastLivenessCheck: pendingSnapshot,
                runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
                  phase: "in_liveness_tab",
                  source: "liveness_return_check",
                  lastLivenessCheck: pendingSnapshot,
                }),
              },
              signing: {
                ...(prev?.signing || {}),
                livenessStatus: "in_liveness_tab",
                livenessId: livenessId || prev?.signing?.livenessId || "",
                transactionId:
                  transactionId || prev?.signing?.transactionId || "",
                returnToken: returnToken || prev?.signing?.returnToken || "",
                lastLivenessCheck: pendingSnapshot,
                runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
                  phase: "in_liveness_tab",
                  source: "liveness_return_check",
                  lastLivenessCheck: pendingSnapshot,
                }),
              },
            }));
          } catch (error) {
            logger.warn(
              "[liveness] check inmediato tras retorno falló:",
              error?.message || error,
            );
          }
        })();
      }
    },
    [
      commitSystemFormData,
      livenessSession,
      routeContext,
      sessionToken,
      setLivenessSession,
      toast,
    ],
  );

  const buildSigningCallbackUrl = useCallback(
    (transactionId, livenessId = "", returnToken = "") => {
      const nextSearch = buildSearchWithParams(signingReviewBaseSearch, {
        panel: SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL,
        doc: signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
        formType,
        step: SIGN_REVIEW_STEP,
        livenessCallback: "1",
        signatureLiveness: "returned",
        livenessReturn: "1",
        livenessReturnToken: returnToken,
        transactionId,
        livenessId,
      });
      return buildLivenessCallbackUrl({
        pathname: FORMS_PATHNAME,
        search: nextSearch,
      });
    },
    [formType, signingReviewActiveDocumentId, signingReviewBaseSearch],
  );

  const closeSigningReviewSurface = useCallback(() => {
    clearLivenessPendingSession();
    clearLivenessReturnPayload();
    clearSigningProcessState();
    setLivenessSession((prev) => ({ ...prev, open: false }));
    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
      const currentHref = window.location.href;
      window.history.back();
      window.setTimeout(() => {
        if (window.location.href === currentHref) {
          navigate(
            { pathname: FORMS_PATHNAME, search: signingReviewBaseSearch },
            { replace: true },
          );
        }
      }, 120);
      return;
    }
    navigate(
      { pathname: FORMS_PATHNAME, search: signingReviewBaseSearch },
      { replace: true },
    );
  }, [navigate, signingReviewBaseSearch]);

  const handleCancelLiveness = useCallback(() => {
    clearLivenessPendingSession();
    clearLivenessReturnPayload();
    clearSigningProcessState();
    lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
    setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      open: false,
      status: "cancelled",
      message: "Verificación de identidad cancelada por el usuario.",
      returnToken: "",
      callbackUrl: "",
    }));
    commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
      ...(prev || {}),
      signatureBatch: {
        ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
        livenessStatus: "cancelled",
        livenessId: "",
        transactionId: "",
        callbackUrl: "",
        returnToken: "",
        livenessUrl: "",
        pendingAt: "",
        runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
          phase: "cancelled",
          source: "user_cancel",
        }),
      },
      signing: {
        ...(prev?.signing || {}),
        livenessStatus: "cancelled",
        livenessId: "",
        transactionId: "",
        returnToken: "",
        runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
          phase: "cancelled",
          source: "user_cancel",
        }),
      },
    }));
  }, [commitSystemFormData]);

  useLivenessPolling({
    livenessSession,
    formDataRef,
    sessionToken,
    commitSystemFormData,
    signatureBatchCompleted: Boolean(formData?.signatureBatch?.completed),
    batchSigningStatus,
    isLivenessCallbackPage,
    applyLivenessReturn,
    toast,
    setLivenessSession,
  });

  return {
    livenessSession,
    setLivenessSession,
    isSubmittingSignature,
    setIsSubmittingSignature,
    handleCancelLiveness,
    closeSigningReviewSurface,
    applyLivenessReturn,
    buildSigningCallbackUrl,
    lastAutoResumeKeyRef,
  };
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningLiveness.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #87
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningReviewSurface.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningReviewSurface.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 1590
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { getSessionToken } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import {
  buildLivenessCheckSnapshot,
  createLivenessReturnToken,
  isLivenessReturnSignal,
  normalizeLivenessPhase,
  normalizeProviderLivenessStatus,
  isLivenessTerminalPhase,
  isLivenessReturnPayload,
  isLivenessRecoverableFailureMessage,
  resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState,
  resolveEffectiveWorkflowIdentity,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessState";
import {
  clearLivenessReturnPayload,
  clearLivenessPendingSession,
  clearSigningProcessStorage,
  buildSigningRuntimeState,
  getSigningDeviceId,
  resetSigningProcessAfterRecoverableFailure,
  readLivenessPendingSession,
  readLivenessReturnPayload,
  updateLivenessPendingSession,
  updateSigningProcessState,
  setActiveSigningStorageScope,
  subscribeToLivenessReturn,
  broadcastLivenessReturn,
  focusOpenerAndCloseWindow,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessStorage";
import { clearFormDraft } from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";
import {
  isFinalSigningResult,
  pickSigningDocument,
} from "@/domain/signing/signingFlowSelectors";
import {
  getQueryParams,
  buildSearchWithParams,
} from "@/shared/utils/urlHelpers";
import { checkLivenessTransaction } from "@/infrastructure/signature/signatureProviderApi";
import {
  resolvePrimarySigner,
  startLivenessStep,
} from "@/infrastructure/signature/signatureBatchService.js";
import { SIGNING_UI_STATES } from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import { resetRequest } from "@/store/slices/requestSlice";

const SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL = "sign-review";
const SIGN_REVIEW_STEP = "4";
const FORMS_PATHNAME = "/forms";
const ACTIVE_LIVENESS_STATUSES = new Set([
  "opening",
  "in_liveness_tab",
  "popup_blocked",
  "error",
]);

function isActiveLivenessStatus(status = "") {
  return ACTIVE_LIVENESS_STATUSES.has(String(status || "").trim());
}

function resolveSigningRuntimeState(formData = {}) {
  return (
    formData?.signatureBatch?.runtimeState ||
    formData?.signing?.runtimeState ||
    null
  );
}

function isCrossDeviceSigningRuntime(runtimeState = {}) {
  const runtimeDeviceId = String(runtimeState?.deviceId || "").trim();
  if (!runtimeDeviceId) return false;
  return runtimeDeviceId !== getSigningDeviceId();
}

export function useSigningReviewSurface({
  formType,
  formData,
  session,
  setFormData,
  persistSystemDraft,
  signingStorageScope,

  handleSignBatch,
  toast,
  navigate,
  signingReviewBaseSearch,
  signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
  isSigningReviewMobilePage,
  isSigningStep,
  batchSigningStatus,
  loadingSaveForm,
  requiredWorkflowAttachmentsReady,
  hasFingerprintCode,
  canStartSigning,
  setIsSigningDocsModalOpen,
  locationSearch,
  isLivenessCallbackPage,
  signingDocumentsChecklist,
  queryDocId,
  queryFormType,
  panelParam,
  queryStep,
  routeContext,
  dispatch,
  livenessSession,
  setLivenessSession,
  isSubmittingSignature,
  setIsSubmittingSignature,
  applyLivenessReturn,
  buildSigningCallbackUrl,
  closeSigningReviewSurface,
  lastAutoResumeKeyRef,
}) {
  const processedReturnKeyRef = useRef("");
  const reopenLivenessRequestKeyRef = useRef("");
  const [isReopeningLiveness, setIsReopeningLiveness] = useState(false);
  const formDataRef = useRef(formData);

  useEffect(() => {
    setActiveSigningStorageScope(signingStorageScope);
  }, [signingStorageScope]);

  useEffect(() => {
    formDataRef.current = formData;
  }, [formData]);

  const commitSystemFormData = useCallback(
    (updater) => {
      const nextFormData =
        typeof updater === "function"
          ? updater(formDataRef.current || {})
          : updater;
      formDataRef.current = nextFormData;
      setFormData(nextFormData);
      if (typeof persistSystemDraft === "function") {
        void persistSystemDraft(nextFormData);
      }
      return nextFormData;
    },
    [persistSystemDraft, setFormData],
  );

  const closeSigningReviewAfterSuccess = useCallback(() => {
    clearSigningProcessStorage();
    clearFormDraft(formType, routeContext || {});
    if (typeof dispatch === "function") {
      dispatch(resetRequest());
    }
    lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
    setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      open: false,
      status: "completed",
      message: "Documentos firmados correctamente.",
      returnToken: "",
      callbackUrl: "",
    }));
    commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
      ...(prev || {}),
      signatureBatch: {
        ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
        completed: true,
        completedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        livenessStatus: "completed",
      },
    }));
    if (typeof navigate === "function") {
      navigate("/success", {
        replace: true,
        state: {
          title: "Solicitud ingresada con éxito",
          message:
            "La solicitud fue ingresada correctamente y el proceso de firma finalizó con éxito.",
        },
      });
    }
    if (isSigningReviewMobilePage) closeSigningReviewSurface();
    else setIsSigningDocsModalOpen(false);
  }, [
    closeSigningReviewSurface,
    dispatch,
    formType,
    isSigningReviewMobilePage,
    navigate,
    routeContext,
    setIsSigningDocsModalOpen,
    lastAutoResumeKeyRef,
    setLivenessSession,
    commitSystemFormData,
  ]);

  const persistLivenessSnapshot = useCallback(
    ({
      status,
      source,
      message,
      transactionId = "",
      livenessId = "",
      callbackUrl = "",
      returnToken = "",
      livenessUrl = "",
      projectReference = "",
      providerCheck = null,
      open = false,
    } = {}) => {
      const checkedAt = new Date().toISOString();
      const passed =
        providerCheck?.details?.tests?.liveness_results?.passed ??
        providerCheck?.tests?.liveness_results?.passed ??
        providerCheck?.passed ??
        null;
      const normalizedStatus = normalizeLivenessPhase(status);
      const pendingSession = readLivenessPendingSession() || {};
      const resolvedAuthToken = String(
        getSessionToken(session) ||
          formData?.signatureBatch?.token ||
          formData?.signing?.token ||
          pendingSession.authToken ||
          "",
      ).trim();
      const snapshot = buildLivenessCheckSnapshot({
        status: normalizedStatus,
        checkedAt,
        source,
        transactionId,
        livenessId,
        callbackUrl,
        returnToken,
        projectReference,
        passed,
        response: providerCheck,
      });
      const nextProjectReference =
        projectReference ||
        formData?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
        pendingSession.projectReference ||
        "FirmasInverneg";
      updateLivenessPendingSession({
        ...pendingSession,
        ...snapshot,
        status: normalizedStatus,
        livenessStatus: normalizedStatus,
        transactionId: transactionId || pendingSession.transactionId || "",
        livenessId: livenessId || pendingSession.livenessId || "",
        callbackUrl: callbackUrl || pendingSession.callbackUrl || "",
        returnToken: returnToken || pendingSession.returnToken || "",
        livenessUrl: livenessUrl || pendingSession.livenessUrl || "",
        projectReference: nextProjectReference,
        lastCheckAt: checkedAt,
        lastCheckStatus: normalizedStatus,
        lastCheckPassed: passed,
        lastCheckResponse: providerCheck,
        authToken: resolvedAuthToken,
      });
      updateSigningProcessState({
        phase: normalizedStatus,
        source,
        transactionId,
        livenessId,
        callbackUrl,
        returnToken,
        livenessUrl,
        projectReference: nextProjectReference,
        lastCheckAt: checkedAt,
        lastCheckStatus: normalizedStatus,
        lastCheckPassed: passed,
        lastCheckResponse: providerCheck,
      });
      setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        open:
          typeof open === "boolean"
            ? open
            : isActiveLivenessStatus(normalizedStatus),
        status: normalizedStatus,
        message:
          message ||
          (normalizedStatus === "approved"
            ? "La prueba de vida fue aprobada. Ya puedes firmar los documentos."
            : normalizedStatus === "rejected" || normalizedStatus === "error"
              ? "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo."
              : normalizedStatus === "returned_ready"
                ? "Prueba de vida completada. Ya puedes continuar con la firma."
                : "La prueba de vida sigue en curso. Completa la verificación para continuar."),
        transactionId: transactionId || prev.transactionId || "",
        livenessId: livenessId || prev.livenessId || "",
        callbackUrl: callbackUrl || prev.callbackUrl || "",
        returnToken: returnToken || prev.returnToken || "",
        link: livenessUrl || prev.link || "",
        startedAt: prev.startedAt || checkedAt,
      }));
      commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
        ...(prev || {}),
        signatureBatch: {
          ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
          livenessStatus: normalizedStatus,
          livenessId: livenessId || prev?.signatureBatch?.livenessId || "",
          transactionId:
            transactionId || prev?.signatureBatch?.transactionId || "",
          callbackUrl: callbackUrl || prev?.signatureBatch?.callbackUrl || "",
          livenessUrl: livenessUrl || prev?.signatureBatch?.livenessUrl || "",
          returnToken: returnToken || prev?.signatureBatch?.returnToken || "",
          pendingAt:
            isActiveLivenessStatus(normalizedStatus) &&
            !prev?.signatureBatch?.pendingAt
              ? checkedAt
              : prev?.signatureBatch?.pendingAt || "",
          lastLivenessCheck: snapshot,
          runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
            phase: normalizedStatus,
            source,
            livenessId,
            transactionId,
            callbackUrl,
            returnToken,
            livenessUrl,
            lastLivenessCheck: snapshot,
          }),
        },
        signing: {
          ...(prev?.signing || {}),
          livenessStatus: normalizedStatus,
          livenessId: livenessId || prev?.signing?.livenessId || "",
          transactionId: transactionId || prev?.signing?.transactionId || "",
          callbackUrl: callbackUrl || prev?.signing?.callbackUrl || "",
          returnToken: returnToken || prev?.signing?.returnToken || "",
          lastLivenessCheck: snapshot,
          runtimeState: buildSigningRuntimeState({
            phase: normalizedStatus,
            source,
            livenessId,
            transactionId,
            callbackUrl,
            returnToken,
            livenessUrl,

            lastLivenessCheck: snapshot,
          }),
        },
      }));
      return { checkedAt, passed, snapshot, normalizedStatus };
    },
    [commitSystemFormData, formData, session, setLivenessSession],
  );

  const continueSigningAfterLiveness = useCallback(
    async (payload = {}) => {
      const signBatch = handleSignBatch;
      if (typeof signBatch !== "function") return null;

      const transactionId = String(
        payload?.transactionId || livenessSession?.transactionId || "",
      ).trim();
      const livenessId = String(
        payload?.livenessId || livenessSession?.livenessId || "",
      ).trim();
      const callbackURL = String(
        payload?.callbackUrl || livenessSession?.callbackUrl || "",
      ).trim();
      const returnToken = String(
        payload?.returnToken || livenessSession?.returnToken || "",
      ).trim();
      const resumeKey = [transactionId, livenessId, returnToken]
        .filter(Boolean)
        .join(":");
      if (!resumeKey) {
        return null;
      }
      if (isSubmittingSignature) return null;
      if (lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current === resumeKey) {
        // Previous attempt with same key ended without completion; allow manual retry.
        lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
      }

      lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = resumeKey;
      setIsSubmittingSignature(true);
      setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        status: "signing",
        message: "Procesando firma de documentos...",
        transactionId: transactionId || prev.transactionId || "",
        livenessId: livenessId || prev.livenessId || "",
        callbackUrl: callbackURL || prev.callbackUrl || "",
        returnToken: returnToken || prev.returnToken || "",
      }));

      let continueResult = null;
      let signingFailed = false;
      try {
        const sessionToken = String(
          getSessionToken(session) ||
            formData?.signatureBatch?.token ||
            formData?.signing?.token ||
            readLivenessPendingSession()?.authToken ||
            "",
        ).trim();
        const providerCheck = await checkLivenessTransaction(
          {
            livenessId,
            projectReference:
              formData?.signatureBatch?.projectReference || "FirmasInverneg",
          },
          {
            token: sessionToken,
            projectReference:
              formData?.signatureBatch?.projectReference || "FirmasInverneg",
          },
        );
        const providerStatus = normalizeProviderLivenessStatus(providerCheck);
        if (providerStatus !== "approved" || providerCheck?.rejected === true) {
          const rejectionMessage =
            providerStatus === "rejected"
              ? "La prueba de vida fue rechazada por el proveedor."
              : "La prueba de vida todavía no está aprobada.";
          const recoverable = isLivenessRecoverableFailureMessage(
            String(
              providerCheck?.message || providerCheck?.response?.message || "",
            ),
          );
          setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
            ...prev,
            open: Boolean(prev?.open),
            status: recoverable
              ? "error"
              : providerStatus === "rejected"
                ? "error"
                : "in_liveness_tab",
            message: recoverable
              ? "La prueba de vida no se completó. Puedes iniciar nuevamente el proceso."
              : rejectionMessage,
          }));
          if (providerStatus === "rejected" || recoverable) {
            resetSigningProcessAfterRecoverableFailure({
              setLivenessSession,
              setFormData: commitSystemFormData,
              toast,
              livenessStatus: "error",
              message: "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo.",
            });
            lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
          }
          if (providerStatus !== "approved") {
            lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
          }
          toast?.error(
            recoverable
              ? "La prueba de vida no se ha realizado o falló. Puedes intentarlo nuevamente."
              : rejectionMessage,
          );
          return null;
        }
        continueResult = await signBatch({
          continueAfterLiveness: true,
          livenessId,
          transactionId,
          callbackURL,
          livenessApproved: true,
        });
      } catch (error) {
        signingFailed = true;
        const recoverable = isLivenessRecoverableFailureMessage(
          String(error?.message || ""),
        );
        toast?.error(
          recoverable
            ? "La prueba de vida no se ha realizado o falló. Puedes intentarlo nuevamente."
            : error?.message || "No se pudo completar el firmado.",
        );
        lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
        setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          open: Boolean(prev?.open),
          status: recoverable ? "error" : "returned_ready",
          message: recoverable
            ? "La prueba de vida no se completó. Puedes volver a iniciar el proceso."
            : error?.message ||
              "No se pudo firmar. Puedes reintentar cuando termines la prueba de vida.",
        }));
        if (recoverable) {
          resetSigningProcessAfterRecoverableFailure({
            setLivenessSession,
            setFormData: commitSystemFormData,
            toast,
            livenessStatus: "error",
            message: "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Vuelve a intentarlo.",
          });
        }
      }
      setIsSubmittingSignature(false);

      if (!continueResult) {
        if (signingFailed) {
          return null;
        }
        lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
        setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          open: false,
          status: "returned_ready",
          message:
            "No se pudo firmar. Puedes reintentar cuando termines la prueba de vida.",
        }));
        return null;
      }

      if (isFinalSigningResult(continueResult)) {
        closeSigningReviewAfterSuccess();
      }

      return continueResult;
    },
    [
      closeSigningReviewAfterSuccess,
      formData?.signatureBatch?.projectReference,
      formData?.signatureBatch?.token,
      formData?.signing?.token,
      handleSignBatch,
      isSubmittingSignature,
      livenessSession?.callbackUrl,
      livenessSession?.livenessId,
      livenessSession?.returnToken,
      livenessSession?.transactionId,
      session,
      setIsSubmittingSignature,
      setLivenessSession,
      commitSystemFormData,
      toast,
      lastAutoResumeKeyRef,
    ],
  );

  const handleReopenLiveness = useCallback(async () => {
    if (isReopeningLiveness || isSubmittingSignature) return null;

    const storedPendingSession = readLivenessPendingSession() || {};
    const baseRecoveryState = resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState({
      formData,
      livenessSession,
      pendingSession: storedPendingSession,
      routeContext,
    });
    const effectiveIdentity = resolveEffectiveWorkflowIdentity({
      routeContext,
      formData,
      livenessSession,
      pendingSession: storedPendingSession,
    });
    const currentLivenessId = String(
      baseRecoveryState.livenessId ||
        formData?.signatureBatch?.livenessId ||
        livenessSession?.livenessId ||
        storedPendingSession?.livenessId ||
        "",
    ).trim();
    const currentTransactionId = String(
      baseRecoveryState.transactionId ||
        formData?.signatureBatch?.transactionId ||
        livenessSession?.transactionId ||
        storedPendingSession?.transactionId ||
        "",
    ).trim();
    const currentReturnToken = String(
      formData?.signatureBatch?.returnToken ||
        livenessSession?.returnToken ||
        storedPendingSession?.returnToken ||
        "",
    ).trim();
    const currentCallbackUrl = String(
      baseRecoveryState.callbackUrl ||
        formData?.signatureBatch?.callbackUrl ||
        livenessSession?.callbackUrl ||
        storedPendingSession?.callbackUrl ||
        "",
    ).trim();
    const currentStatus = baseRecoveryState.status;
    const currentResumeUrl = baseRecoveryState.resumeUrl;
    const requestKey = [
      currentTransactionId,
      currentLivenessId,
      currentReturnToken,
      currentStatus,
    ]
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join(":");
    if (requestKey && reopenLivenessRequestKeyRef.current === requestKey) {
      return null;
    }
    reopenLivenessRequestKeyRef.current = requestKey;
    setIsReopeningLiveness(true);

    try {
      const sessionToken = String(
        getSessionToken(session) ||
          formData?.signatureBatch?.token ||
          formData?.signing?.token ||
          storedPendingSession?.authToken ||
          "",
      ).trim();
      const resolvedTransactionId =
        effectiveIdentity.transactionId ||
        currentTransactionId ||
        storedPendingSession?.workflowId ||
        "";
      const signer = resolvePrimarySigner({
        formType,
        formData,
        session,
      });
      if (!signer?.cedula || !signer?.codigoDactilar) {
        toast?.error(
          "No se pudo resolver el firmante para reabrir la prueba de vida.",
        );
        return null;
      }
      if (!sessionToken) {
        toast?.error(
          "No se encontró la sesión autenticada para consultar la prueba de vida.",
        );
        return null;
      }
      if (!resolvedTransactionId) {
        toast?.error(
          "No se encontró el identificador del workflow para continuar con la prueba de vida.",
        );
        return null;
      }

      const projectReference =
        formData?.signatureBatch?.projectReference ||
        formData?.signing?.projectReference ||
        storedPendingSession?.projectReference ||
        "FirmasInverneg";
      const checkTargetLivenessId = currentLivenessId;
      if (!checkTargetLivenessId) {
        toast?.info(
          "No se encontró un livenessId activo. Se reiniciará la prueba de vida.",
        );
      }

      let providerCheck = null;
      let providerStatus = "pending";
      if (checkTargetLivenessId) {
        providerCheck = await checkLivenessTransaction(
          {
            livenessId: checkTargetLivenessId,
            projectReference,
          },
          {
            token: sessionToken,
            projectReference,
          },
        );
        providerStatus = normalizeProviderLivenessStatus(providerCheck);
      }

      const providerPassed =
        providerCheck?.details?.tests?.liveness_results?.passed ??
        providerCheck?.tests?.liveness_results?.passed ??
        providerCheck?.passed ??
        null;
      const providerRecoverableFailure = isLivenessRecoverableFailureMessage(
        String(
          providerCheck?.message || providerCheck?.response?.message || "",
        ),
      );
      const shouldRestart =
        effectiveIdentity.workflowMismatch ||
        baseRecoveryState.workflowMismatch ||
        baseRecoveryState.isCrossDevice ||
        baseRecoveryState.kind === "stale_returned_ready" ||
        baseRecoveryState.kind === "cross_device_restartable" ||
        !checkTargetLivenessId ||
        providerPassed === false ||
        providerStatus === "rejected" ||
        providerRecoverableFailure ||
        (!currentResumeUrl && isActiveLivenessStatus(currentStatus));

      if (providerStatus === "approved" || providerPassed === true) {
        persistLivenessSnapshot({
          status: "returned_ready",
          source: "manual_reopen_check",
          message:
            "La prueba de vida fue aprobada. Ya puedes firmar los documentos.",
          transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
          livenessId: checkTargetLivenessId,
          callbackUrl:
            currentCallbackUrl ||
            buildSigningCallbackUrl(
              resolvedTransactionId || "",
              checkTargetLivenessId || "",
              currentReturnToken || "",
            ),
          returnToken: currentReturnToken,
          livenessUrl: currentResumeUrl,
          projectReference,
          providerCheck,
          open: false,
        });
        clearLivenessReturnPayload();
        lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
        setIsSubmittingSignature(true);
        setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          status: "signing",
          message: "Procesando firma de documentos...",
        }));
        try {
          const signingResult = await handleSignBatch({
            continueAfterLiveness: true,
            livenessId: checkTargetLivenessId,
            transactionId: resolvedTransactionId || undefined,
            callbackURL:
              currentCallbackUrl ||
              buildSigningCallbackUrl(
                resolvedTransactionId || "",
                checkTargetLivenessId || "",
                currentReturnToken || "",
              ),
            livenessApproved: true,
          });
          if (isFinalSigningResult(signingResult)) {
            closeSigningReviewAfterSuccess();
          }
          return signingResult;
        } finally {
          setIsSubmittingSignature(false);
        }
      }

      if (shouldRestart) {
        persistLivenessSnapshot({
          status:
            providerPassed === false ||
            providerStatus === "rejected" ||
            providerRecoverableFailure
              ? "error"
              : "in_liveness_tab",
          source: "manual_reopen_check",
          message:
            providerPassed === false ||
            providerStatus === "rejected" ||
            providerRecoverableFailure
              ? "La prueba de vida no se pasó. Se reiniciará la sesión."
              : "No se encontró un enlace activo. Se reiniciará la prueba de vida.",
          transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
          livenessId: checkTargetLivenessId,
          callbackUrl:
            currentCallbackUrl ||
            buildSigningCallbackUrl(
              resolvedTransactionId || "",
              checkTargetLivenessId || "",
              currentReturnToken || "",
            ),
          returnToken: currentReturnToken,
          livenessUrl: currentResumeUrl,
          projectReference,
          providerCheck,
          open: false,
        });
        clearLivenessReturnPayload();
        lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
      }

      if (!shouldRestart && currentResumeUrl && checkTargetLivenessId) {
        persistLivenessSnapshot({
          status:
            currentStatus === "opening" || currentStatus === "popup_blocked"
              ? currentStatus
              : "in_liveness_tab",
          source: "manual_reopen_check",
          message:
            "La prueba de vida sigue activa. Se reabrirá la pestaña para continuar.",
          transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
          livenessId: checkTargetLivenessId,
          callbackUrl:
            currentCallbackUrl ||
            buildSigningCallbackUrl(
              resolvedTransactionId || "",
              checkTargetLivenessId || "",
              currentReturnToken || "",
            ),
          returnToken: currentReturnToken,
          livenessUrl: currentResumeUrl,
          projectReference,
          providerCheck,
          open: true,
        });
        if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
          const opened = window.open(currentResumeUrl, "_blank");
          if (opened) return null;
        }
        persistLivenessSnapshot({
          status: "popup_blocked",
          source: "manual_reopen_check",
          message:
            "El navegador bloqueó la pestaña nueva. Permite ventanas emergentes y vuelve a intentar.",
          transactionId: resolvedTransactionId,
          livenessId: checkTargetLivenessId,
          callbackUrl:
            currentCallbackUrl ||
            buildSigningCallbackUrl(
              resolvedTransactionId || "",
              checkTargetLivenessId || "",
              currentReturnToken || "",
            ),
          returnToken: currentReturnToken,
          livenessUrl: currentResumeUrl,
          projectReference,
          providerCheck,
          open: true,
        });
        toast?.warn(
          "El navegador bloqueó la pestaña nueva. Permite ventanas emergentes para continuar con la prueba de vida.",
        );
        return null;
      }

      const restartResult = await startLivenessStep({
        signer,
        dniDetails: null,
        filesPayload: [],
        resolvedTransactionId,
        resolvedCallbackUrl:
          currentCallbackUrl ||
          buildSigningCallbackUrl(
            resolvedTransactionId || "",
            checkTargetLivenessId || "",
            currentReturnToken || "",
          ),

        resolvedProjectReference: projectReference,
        sessionToken,
        signatureBatch: formData?.signatureBatch || {},
      });

      const nextLivenessUrl = restartResult.livenessUrl || "";
      const opened =
        typeof window !== "undefined" && nextLivenessUrl
          ? Boolean(window.open(nextLivenessUrl, "_blank"))
          : false;
      const nextStatus = opened ? "in_liveness_tab" : "popup_blocked";
      persistLivenessSnapshot({
        status: nextStatus,
        source: "manual_reopen_restart",
        message:
          nextStatus === "in_liveness_tab"
            ? "Se abrió una nueva prueba de vida en una pestaña externa."
            : "El navegador bloqueó la pestaña nueva. Permite ventanas emergentes y vuelve a intentar.",
        transactionId:
          restartResult.transactionId ||
          currentTransactionId ||
          storedPendingSession?.transactionId ||
          "",
        livenessId: restartResult.livenessId || checkTargetLivenessId || "",
        callbackUrl:
          restartResult.callbackUrl ||
          currentCallbackUrl ||
          buildSigningCallbackUrl(
            restartResult.transactionId ||
              resolvedTransactionId ||
              storedPendingSession?.transactionId ||
              "",
            restartResult.livenessId || checkTargetLivenessId || "",
            currentReturnToken || "",
          ),
        returnToken: currentReturnToken,
        livenessUrl: nextLivenessUrl,

        projectReference,
        providerCheck,
        open: true,
      });
      if (!opened) {
        toast?.warn(
          "El navegador bloqueó la pestaña nueva. Permite ventanas emergentes para continuar con la prueba de vida.",
        );
      }
      return restartResult;
    } catch (error) {
      toast?.error(error?.message || "No se pudo reabrir la prueba de vida.");
      return null;
    } finally {
      setIsReopeningLiveness(false);
      reopenLivenessRequestKeyRef.current = "";
    }
  }, [
    buildSigningCallbackUrl,
    closeSigningReviewAfterSuccess,
    formData,
    formType,
    handleSignBatch,
    isReopeningLiveness,
    isSubmittingSignature,
    livenessSession,
    persistLivenessSnapshot,
    routeContext,
    session,
    setIsSubmittingSignature,
    setLivenessSession,
    toast,
    lastAutoResumeKeyRef,
  ]);

  const signingRuntimeState = resolveSigningRuntimeState(formData);
  const pendingLivenessSession = readLivenessPendingSession() || {};
  const recoveryState = resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState({
    formData,
    livenessSession,
    pendingSession: pendingLivenessSession,
    routeContext,
  });
  const activeStatus = recoveryState.status;
  const isStaleDeviceLiveness =
    Boolean(signingRuntimeState) &&
    isCrossDeviceSigningRuntime(signingRuntimeState) &&
    (isActiveLivenessStatus(activeStatus) ||
      recoveryState.kind === "stale_returned_ready" ||
      recoveryState.kind === "cross_device_restartable");
  const staleDeviceResetKey = [
    signingRuntimeState?.deviceId || "",
    formData?.signatureBatch?.livenessId || "",
    formData?.signatureBatch?.transactionId || "",
  ]
    .map((value) => String(value || "").trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .join(":");

  const staleDeviceResetRef = useRef("");

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isStaleDeviceLiveness) return;
    if (staleDeviceResetRef.current === staleDeviceResetKey) return;
    staleDeviceResetRef.current = staleDeviceResetKey;
    clearSigningProcessStorage();
    clearLivenessPendingSession();
    clearLivenessReturnPayload();
    updateSigningProcessState({
      phase: "idle",
      source: "device_switch_reset",
      staleDeviceId: signingRuntimeState?.deviceId || "",
      currentDeviceId: getSigningDeviceId(),
      canRestartLiveness: true,
    });
    setLivenessSession((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      open: false,
      status: "idle",
      livenessId: "",
      transactionId: "",
      callbackUrl: "",
      returnToken: "",
      link: "",
      message:
        "La prueba de vida se inició en otro dispositivo. Puedes volver a iniciarla.",
    }));
    commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
      ...(prev || {}),
      signatureBatch: {
        ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
        livenessStatus: "",
        livenessId: "",
        transactionId: "",
        callbackUrl: "",
        returnToken: "",
        livenessUrl: "",
        pendingAt: "",
        runtimeState: {
          ...(prev?.signatureBatch?.runtimeState || {}),
          staleDeviceDetectedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          staleDeviceId: signingRuntimeState?.deviceId || "",
          currentDeviceId: getSigningDeviceId(),
          canRestartLiveness: true,
        },
      },
      signing: {
        ...(prev?.signing || {}),
        livenessStatus: "",
        livenessId: "",
        transactionId: "",
        returnToken: "",
        runtimeState: {
          ...(prev?.signing?.runtimeState || {}),
          staleDeviceDetectedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          staleDeviceId: signingRuntimeState?.deviceId || "",
          currentDeviceId: getSigningDeviceId(),
          canRestartLiveness: true,
        },
      },
    }));
    toast?.info(
      "La prueba de vida se inició en otro dispositivo. Puedes volver a iniciarla.",
    );
  }, [
    isStaleDeviceLiveness,
    commitSystemFormData,
    setLivenessSession,
    signingRuntimeState?.deviceId,
    staleDeviceResetKey,
    toast,
  ]);

  const handleConfirmSigningDocuments = useCallback(async () => {
    const signBatch = handleSignBatch;
    if (typeof signBatch !== "function") return;
    if (isSubmittingSignature) {
      toast?.info(
        "Hay una validación en curso. Espera un momento e intenta nuevamente.",
      );
      return;
    }

    const storedPendingSession = readLivenessPendingSession() || {};
    const currentRecoveryState = resolveEffectiveLivenessRecoveryState({
      formData,
      livenessSession,
      pendingSession: storedPendingSession,
      routeContext,
    });
    const effectiveIdentity = resolveEffectiveWorkflowIdentity({
      routeContext,
      formData,
      livenessSession,
      pendingSession: storedPendingSession,
    });
    const activeLivenessId =
      currentRecoveryState.livenessId ||
      formData?.signatureBatch?.livenessId ||
      livenessSession?.livenessId ||
      storedPendingSession?.livenessId ||
      "";
    const activeTransactionId =
      effectiveIdentity.transactionId ||
      currentRecoveryState.transactionId ||
      formData?.signatureBatch?.transactionId ||
      livenessSession?.transactionId ||
      storedPendingSession?.transactionId ||
      "";
    const activeReturnToken =
      currentRecoveryState.returnToken ||
      formData?.signatureBatch?.returnToken ||
      livenessSession?.returnToken ||
      storedPendingSession?.returnToken ||
      "";
    const activeCallbackUrl =
      currentRecoveryState.callbackUrl ||
      formData?.signatureBatch?.callbackUrl ||
      livenessSession?.callbackUrl ||
      storedPendingSession?.callbackUrl ||
      "";

    const signatureBatchCompleted = Boolean(
      formData?.signatureBatch?.completed,
    );

    if (signatureBatchCompleted || currentRecoveryState.completed) {
      toast?.info(
        "Los documentos ya quedaron firmados. Puedes continuar con el envío del formulario.",
      );
      return;
    }

    if (currentRecoveryState.canSign && activeLivenessId) {
      await continueSigningAfterLiveness({
        livenessId: activeLivenessId,
        transactionId: activeTransactionId || null,
        callbackUrl:
          activeCallbackUrl ||
          buildSigningCallbackUrl(
            activeTransactionId || "",
            activeLivenessId || "",
            activeReturnToken || "",
          ),
        returnToken: activeReturnToken || "",
      });
      return;
    }

    if (currentRecoveryState.canResume || currentRecoveryState.canRestart) {
      await handleReopenLiveness();
      return;
    }

    if (storedPendingSession?.livenessId && !signatureBatchCompleted) {
      await handleReopenLiveness();
      return;
    }

    setIsSubmittingSignature(true);
    const returnToken = createLivenessReturnToken();
    processedReturnKeyRef.current = "";
    const callbackURL = buildSigningCallbackUrl("", "", returnToken);
    const sessionToken = String(
      getSessionToken(session) ||
        formData?.signatureBatch?.token ||
        formData?.signing?.token ||
        "",
    ).trim();
    const initialResult = await signBatch({ callbackURL }).catch((error) => {
      toast?.error(error?.message || "No se pudo iniciar el flujo de firma.");
      return null;
    });
    setIsSubmittingSignature(false);
    if (!initialResult) return;
    if (isFinalSigningResult(initialResult)) {
      clearSigningProcessStorage();
      lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
      if (isSigningReviewMobilePage) {
        closeSigningReviewSurface();
      } else {
        setIsSigningDocsModalOpen(false);
      }
      return;
    }

    const shouldStartLiveness = Boolean(
      initialResult.requiresLiveness &&
      initialResult.livenessUrl &&
      initialResult.livenessId,
    );
    if (!shouldStartLiveness) return;

    const openInNewTab =
      typeof window !== "undefined" && initialResult.livenessUrl
        ? Boolean(window.open(initialResult.livenessUrl, "_blank"))
        : false;
    const activeIdentity = resolveEffectiveWorkflowIdentity({
      routeContext,
      formData,
      livenessSession,
      pendingSession: readLivenessPendingSession() || {},
    });
    const workflowId = String(
      activeIdentity.workflowId || initialResult.transactionId || "",
    ).trim();
    const executionId = String(
      activeIdentity.executionId || routeContext?.exec || "",
    ).trim();
    const documentId = String(
      activeIdentity.documentId || routeContext?.dcmt || "",
    ).trim();
    lastAutoResumeKeyRef.current = "";
    updateLivenessPendingSession({
      status: "in_liveness_tab",
      transactionId: initialResult.transactionId || "",
      livenessId: initialResult.livenessId || "",
      callbackUrl: callbackURL,
      livenessUrl: initialResult.livenessUrl || "",
      workflowId,
      executionId,
      documentId,
      startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      activeDocumentId: signingReviewActiveDocumentId || "",
      returnToken,
      authToken: sessionToken || "",
    });
    clearLivenessReturnPayload();
    updateSigningProcessState({
      phase: openInNewTab ? "in_liveness_tab" : "popup_blocked",
      source: "start_liveness",
      transactionId: initialResult.transactionId || "",
      livenessId: initialResult.livenessId || "",
      callbackUrl: callbackURL,
      livenessUrl: initialResult.livenessUrl || "",
      returnToken,
    });
    const runtimeState = buildSigningRuntimeState({
      phase: "in_liveness_tab",
      source: "start_liveness",
      livenessId: initialResult.livenessId || "",
      transactionId: initialResult.transactionId || "",
      callbackUrl: callbackURL,
      returnToken,
    });
    commitSystemFormData((prev) => ({
      ...(prev || {}),
      signatureBatch: {
        ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
        livenessStatus: openInNewTab ? "in_liveness_tab" : "popup_blocked",
        livenessId: initialResult.livenessId || "",
        transactionId: initialResult.transactionId || "",
        callbackUrl: callbackURL,
        livenessUrl: initialResult.livenessUrl || "",
        pendingAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        returnToken,
        runtimeState,
      },
      signing: {
        ...(prev?.signing || {}),
        livenessStatus: openInNewTab ? "in_liveness_tab" : "popup_blocked",
        livenessId: initialResult.livenessId || "",
        transactionId: initialResult.transactionId || "",
        returnToken,
        runtimeState,
      },
    }));
    setLivenessSession({
      open: true,
      livenessId: initialResult.livenessId || "",
      link: initialResult.livenessUrl || "",
      transactionId: initialResult.transactionId || "",
      status: openInNewTab ? "in_liveness_tab" : "popup_blocked",
      message: openInNewTab
        ? "Se abrió la prueba de vida en una nueva pestaña. Completa la selfie para continuar con la firma."
        : "El navegador bloqueó la pestaña nueva. Permite ventanas emergentes y vuelve a intentar.",
      startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      callbackUrl: callbackURL,
      returnToken,
    });

    if (!openInNewTab) {
      toast?.warn(
        "El navegador bloqueó la pestaña nueva. Permite ventanas emergentes para continuar con la prueba de vida.",
      );
    }
  }, [
    buildSigningCallbackUrl,
    closeSigningReviewSurface,
    continueSigningAfterLiveness,
    formData,
    handleSignBatch,
    isSubmittingSignature,
    isSigningReviewMobilePage,
    livenessSession,
    lastAutoResumeKeyRef,
    routeContext,
    session,
    setIsSubmittingSignature,
    setIsSigningDocsModalOpen,
    setLivenessSession,
    signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
    handleReopenLiveness,
    commitSystemFormData,
    toast,
  ]);

  // Liveness return handling: URL params, stored sessions, cross-tab subscription
  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return undefined;

    const currentParams = getQueryParams(locationSearch);
    const storedPendingSession = readLivenessPendingSession() || {};
    const storedReturnPayload = readLivenessReturnPayload() || {};
    const currentReturnToken = String(
      currentParams.get("livenessReturnToken") || "",
    ).trim();
    const storedReturnToken = String(
      storedPendingSession?.returnToken ||
        storedReturnPayload?.returnToken ||
        "",
    ).trim();
    const currentTransactionId = String(
      currentParams.get("transactionId") || "",
    ).trim();
    const currentIdentity = resolveEffectiveWorkflowIdentity({
      routeContext,
      formData,
      livenessSession,
      pendingSession: storedPendingSession,
    });
    const routeWorkflowId = String(currentIdentity.workflowId || "").trim();
    const storedTransactionId = String(
      storedPendingSession?.transactionId ||
        storedReturnPayload?.transactionId ||
        "",
    ).trim();
    const routeMismatch =
      Boolean(routeWorkflowId && currentTransactionId) &&
      currentTransactionId !== routeWorkflowId;
    const shouldAcceptReturn =
      !routeMismatch &&
      (isLivenessReturnSignal(currentParams) ||
        isLivenessReturnPayload(storedReturnPayload) ||
        Boolean(
          currentReturnToken &&
          storedReturnToken &&
          currentReturnToken === storedReturnToken,
        ) ||
        Boolean(
          storedPendingSession?.status === "in_liveness_tab" &&
          currentTransactionId &&
          storedTransactionId &&
          currentTransactionId === storedTransactionId,
        ));

    if (shouldAcceptReturn) {
      const returnTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
        const pendingSession =
          readLivenessPendingSession() || storedPendingSession || {};
        const returnPayload = {
          status: "returned_ready",
          transactionId:
            currentParams.get("transactionId") ||
            pendingSession.transactionId ||
            storedReturnPayload.transactionId ||
            "",
          livenessId:
            currentParams.get("livenessId") ||
            pendingSession.livenessId ||
            storedReturnPayload.livenessId ||
            "",
          returnToken:
            currentReturnToken ||
            pendingSession.returnToken ||
            storedReturnPayload.returnToken ||
            "",
          callbackUrl:
            pendingSession.callbackUrl ||
            storedReturnPayload.callbackUrl ||
            buildSigningCallbackUrl(
              currentParams.get("transactionId") ||
                pendingSession.transactionId ||
                "",
              currentParams.get("livenessId") ||
                pendingSession.livenessId ||
                "",
              currentReturnToken || pendingSession.returnToken || "",
            ),
        };
        const returnKey = [
          returnPayload.transactionId,
          returnPayload.livenessId,
          returnPayload.returnToken,
        ]
          .map((value) => String(value || "").trim())
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join(":");
        if (returnKey && processedReturnKeyRef.current === returnKey) {
          return;
        }
        processedReturnKeyRef.current = returnKey;
        applyLivenessReturn(returnPayload);
        broadcastLivenessReturn(returnPayload, { skipCustomEvent: true });
        clearLivenessReturnPayload();
        if (isLivenessCallbackPage) {
          focusOpenerAndCloseWindow({ delayMs: 1200 });
        }
      }, 0);
      return () => window.clearTimeout(returnTimer);
    }

    if (isLivenessCallbackPage) {
      return undefined;
    }

    const pendingStatus = normalizeLivenessPhase(storedPendingSession?.status);
    if (
      !storedPendingSession?.livenessId ||
      isLivenessTerminalPhase(pendingStatus)
    ) {
      return undefined;
    }

    const shouldHydrateAsActive =
      pendingStatus === "in_liveness_tab" ||
      pendingStatus === "opening" ||
      pendingStatus === "popup_blocked";
    if (pendingStatus === "returned_ready" || pendingStatus === "approved") {
      setLivenessSession((prev) => {
        const next = {
          ...prev,
          open: false,
          status: pendingStatus,
          livenessId: storedPendingSession.livenessId || prev.livenessId || "",
          link: storedPendingSession.livenessUrl || prev.link || "",
          transactionId:
            storedPendingSession.transactionId || prev.transactionId || "",
          callbackUrl:
            storedPendingSession.callbackUrl || prev.callbackUrl || "",
          returnToken:
            storedPendingSession.returnToken || prev.returnToken || "",
          message:
            pendingStatus === "approved"
              ? "La prueba de vida fue aprobada. Ya puedes firmar los documentos."
              : "Prueba de vida completada. Puedes continuar con la firma.",
        };
        const unchanged =
          prev.open === next.open &&
          prev.status === next.status &&
          prev.livenessId === next.livenessId &&
          prev.link === next.link &&
          prev.transactionId === next.transactionId &&
          prev.callbackUrl === next.callbackUrl &&
          prev.returnToken === next.returnToken &&
          prev.message === next.message;
        return unchanged ? prev : next;
      });
    } else if (shouldHydrateAsActive) {
      setLivenessSession((prev) => {
        const next = {
          ...prev,
          open: true,
          status: pendingStatus,
          livenessId: storedPendingSession.livenessId || prev.livenessId || "",
          link: storedPendingSession.livenessUrl || prev.link || "",
          transactionId:
            storedPendingSession.transactionId || prev.transactionId || "",
          callbackUrl:
            storedPendingSession.callbackUrl || prev.callbackUrl || "",
          returnToken:
            storedPendingSession.returnToken || prev.returnToken || "",
          message:
            pendingStatus === "popup_blocked"
              ? "El navegador bloqueó la pestaña nueva. Permite ventanas emergentes y vuelve a intentar."
              : "La prueba de vida sigue en curso en una pestaña externa.",
        };
        const unchanged =
          prev.open === next.open &&
          prev.status === next.status &&
          prev.livenessId === next.livenessId &&
          prev.link === next.link &&
          prev.transactionId === next.transactionId &&
          prev.callbackUrl === next.callbackUrl &&
          prev.returnToken === next.returnToken &&
          prev.message === next.message;
        return unchanged ? prev : next;
      });
    }

    const unsubscribe = subscribeToLivenessReturn((payload = {}) => {
      if (!isLivenessReturnPayload(payload)) return;
      const payloadTransactionId = String(payload?.transactionId || "").trim();
      const payloadReturnToken = String(payload?.returnToken || "").trim();
      if (
        storedPendingSession.transactionId &&
        payloadTransactionId &&
        storedPendingSession.transactionId !== payloadTransactionId
      )
        return;
      if (
        storedPendingSession.returnToken &&
        payloadReturnToken &&
        storedPendingSession.returnToken !== payloadReturnToken
      )
        return;
      applyLivenessReturn(payload);
      clearLivenessReturnPayload();
    });

    return unsubscribe;
  }, [
    applyLivenessReturn,
    buildSigningCallbackUrl,
    formData,
    formType,
    isLivenessCallbackPage,
    livenessSession,
    locationSearch,
    routeContext,
    signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
    signingReviewBaseSearch,
    setLivenessSession,
  ]);

  // Signing review URL normalization for mobile
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isLivenessCallbackPage || !isSigningReviewMobilePage) return;
    const preferredDocument = pickSigningDocument(
      signingDocumentsChecklist,
      queryDocId,
    );
    const preferredDocumentId = preferredDocument?.id || "";
    const normalizedFormType =
      queryFormType === "linked"
        ? "linked"
        : queryFormType === "natural"
          ? "natural"
          : formType;
    const shouldNormalize =
      panelParam !== SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL ||
      queryStep !== SIGN_REVIEW_STEP ||
      queryFormType !== normalizedFormType ||
      queryDocId !== preferredDocumentId;

    if (!shouldNormalize) return;

    const nextSearch = buildSearchWithParams(signingReviewBaseSearch, {
      panel: SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL,
      doc: preferredDocumentId,
      formType: normalizedFormType,
      step: SIGN_REVIEW_STEP,
    });
    navigate(
      { pathname: FORMS_PATHNAME, search: nextSearch },
      { replace: true },
    );
  }, [
    formType,
    isLivenessCallbackPage,
    isSigningReviewMobilePage,
    navigate,
    panelParam,
    queryDocId,
    queryFormType,
    queryStep,
    signingDocumentsChecklist,
    signingReviewBaseSearch,
  ]);

  const isAwaitingLivenessReturn = Boolean(
    livenessSession?.status === "opening" ||
    livenessSession?.status === "in_liveness_tab" ||
    livenessSession?.status === "signing",
  );

  const persistedLivenessStatus = String(recoveryState.status || "").trim();

  const signingUiState = (() => {
    if (!isSigningStep) return SIGNING_UI_STATES.PENDIENTE;
    if (batchSigningStatus.running) return SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO;
    if (recoveryState.completed || formData?.signatureBatch?.completed)
      return SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMADO;
    if (recoveryState.canSign) return SIGNING_UI_STATES.LISTO_PARA_FIRMAR;
    if (!requiredWorkflowAttachmentsReady || !hasFingerprintCode)
      return SIGNING_UI_STATES.REQUIERE_COMPLETAR_DATOS;
    return SIGNING_UI_STATES.LISTO_PARA_FIRMAR;
  })();

  const primaryActionLabel = (() => {
    if (!isSigningStep) return "Siguiente";
    if (signingUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO)
      return "Firmando documentos...";
    if (signingUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMADO)
      return "Enviar formulario";
    if (recoveryState.canSign) return "Firmar documentos";
    if (recoveryState.canResume)
      return isReopeningLiveness
        ? "Verificando prueba de vida..."
        : "Reabrir prueba de vida";
    if (recoveryState.canRestart)
      return isReopeningLiveness
        ? "Verificando prueba de vida..."
        : persistedLivenessStatus === "error" ||
            recoveryState.kind === "rejected_restartable"
          ? "Reintentar prueba de vida"
          : "Reabrir prueba de vida";
    if (signingUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.LISTO_PARA_FIRMAR)
      return "Continuar";
    return "Continuar";
  })();

  const primaryActionDisabled =
    loadingSaveForm ||
    batchSigningStatus.running ||
    isSubmittingSignature ||
    isReopeningLiveness ||
    (isSigningStep &&
      !recoveryState.completed &&
      !canStartSigning &&
      !recoveryState.canSign &&
      !recoveryState.canRestart &&
      !recoveryState.canResume);

  const primaryActionTitle = (() => {
    if (!isSigningStep) return undefined;
    if (signingUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMANDO)
      return (
        batchSigningStatus.message ||
        "Se está ejecutando el firmado de documentos."
      );
    if (signingUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.FIRMADO)
      return "Los documentos ya fueron firmados. Ahora puedes enviar la solicitud.";
    if (recoveryState.canSign)
      return "La verificación terminó. Pulsa Firmar documentos para enviar el lote.";
    if (recoveryState.kind === "active_with_link")
      return "Completa la prueba de vida en la pestaña abierta y vuelve para firmar.";
    if (recoveryState.canRestart || recoveryState.canResume)
      return recoveryState.canResume
        ? "Pulsa Reabrir prueba de vida para validar y abrir de nuevo la prueba de vida."
        : "Pulsa Reabrir prueba de vida para validar la sesión y reiniciar la prueba de vida si es necesario.";
    if (signingUiState === SIGNING_UI_STATES.LISTO_PARA_FIRMAR)
      return "Pulsa Continuar para abrir la prueba de vida.";
    return "Pulsa Continuar para iniciar la prueba de vida.";
  })();

  return {
    closeSigningReviewAfterSuccess,
    continueSigningAfterLiveness,
    handleConfirmSigningDocuments,
    signingUiState,
    primaryActionLabel,
    primaryActionDisabled,
    primaryActionTitle,
    isAwaitingLivenessReturn,
    persistedLivenessStatus,
    handleReopenLiveness,
    isReopeningLiveness,
  };
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/hooks/useSigningReviewSurface.js ==========================

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from "react-redux";
import { Navigate, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import {
  AppLoading,
  ToastStack,
  useToast,
} from "@/shared/components/app/AppScaffoldModule.jsx";
import { useFormEngine } from "@/core/engines/formEngine/useFormEngine";
import { hasSectionData } from "@/domain/forms/formsDomainModule";
import { isVisible } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { getExternalFlowContext } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowCrud";
import { getSigningDocumentsChecklist } from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
