const SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL = "sign-review";
const SIGN_REVIEW_STEP = "4";
const FORMS_PATHNAME = "/forms";

function useMediaQuery(query) {
  const getMatches = () => {
    if (
      !globalThis.window ||
      typeof globalThis.window.matchMedia !== "function"
    ) {
      return false;
    }
    return globalThis.window.matchMedia(query).matches;
  };

  const [matches, setMatches] = useState(getMatches);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (
      !globalThis.window ||
      typeof globalThis.window.matchMedia !== "function"
    ) {
      return undefined;
    }

    const mediaQuery = globalThis.window.matchMedia(query);
    const handleChange = (event) => setMatches(event.matches);

    mediaQuery.addEventListener("change", handleChange);
    return () => mediaQuery.removeEventListener("change", handleChange);
  }, [query]);

  return matches;
}

export default function FormsHomePage() {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const location = useLocation();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { session } = useSelector((state) => state.auth);
  const {
    loadingSaveForm,
    statusSaveForm,
    errorSaveForm,
    workflowFiles,
    workflowDocumentFiles,
    loadingWorkflowFiles,
    statusWorkflowFiles,
  } = useSelector((state) => state.request);
  const { toasts, toast, dismiss } = useToast();
  const routeContext = useMemo(
    () => getExternalFlowContext(location),
    [location],
  );
  const canStartSigningRef = useRef(false);
  const isMobileOrTablet = useMediaQuery("(max-width: 1024px)");
  const searchParams = useMemo(
    () => getQueryParams(location.search),
    [location.search],
  );
  const panelParam = searchParams.get("panel") || "";
  const queryDocId = searchParams.get("doc") || "";
  const queryFormType = searchParams.get("formType") || "";
  const queryStep = searchParams.get("step") || "";
  const isLivenessCallbackPage = searchParams.get("livenessCallback") === "1";
  const signingReviewPanelActive = panelParam === SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL;
  const signingReviewBaseSearch = useMemo(
    () => getSearchWithoutSigningReviewParams(location.search),
    [location.search],
  );

  const {
    formType,
    role,
    formData,
    errors,
    sections,
    switchFormType,
    switchRole,
    handleFieldChange,
    handleArrayChange,
    handleArrayAdd,
    handleArrayRemove,
    setErrors,
    setFormData,
    dirtyFields,
  } = useFormEngine(getInitialFormType(session), session?.role || "customer");

  const signingStorageScope = useMemo(
    () =>
      buildSigningStorageScope({
        routeContext,
        session,
        formType,
      }),
    [formType, routeContext, session],
  );

  const NORMAL_FILETYPE_ID = "4c571d9d-2a79-4af1-91d4-397dee553fa5";
  const LINKED_FILETYPE_ID = "3df0b11b-ba05-4441-898d-5cb0c0c4c1cf";

  const detectedFormType = useMemo(() => {
    const all = [...(workflowFiles || []), ...(workflowDocumentFiles || [])];
    const ids = new Set(
      all
        .map((f) => String(f?.fileTypeId || f?.id || "").trim())
        .filter(Boolean),
    );
    if (ids.has(LINKED_FILETYPE_ID)) return "linked";
    if (ids.has(NORMAL_FILETYPE_ID)) return "natural";
    return null;
  }, [workflowFiles, workflowDocumentFiles]);

  const didAutoSwitchRef = useRef(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!detectedFormType) return;
    if (didAutoSwitchRef.current) return;
    if (detectedFormType !== formType) {
      switchFormType(detectedFormType);
    }
    didAutoSwitchRef.current = true;
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [detectedFormType]);

  const [showHiddenSections, setShowHiddenSections] = useState(false);
  const [isSigningDocsModalOpen, setIsSigningDocsModalOpen] = useState(false);

  const signingDocumentsChecklist = useMemo(
    () => getSigningDocumentsChecklist(formType, formData),
    [formType, formData],
  );
  const selectedSigningReviewDocument = useMemo(
    () => pickSigningDocument(signingDocumentsChecklist, queryDocId),
    [signingDocumentsChecklist, queryDocId],
  );
  const signingReviewActiveDocumentId = selectedSigningReviewDocument?.id || "";
  const isSigningReviewMobilePage =
    signingReviewPanelActive && isMobileOrTablet;

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof document === "undefined") return undefined;
    document.body.classList.toggle(
      "has-signing-review-page",
      isSigningReviewMobilePage,
    );
    return () => {
      document.body.classList.remove("has-signing-review-page");
    };
  }, [isSigningReviewMobilePage]);

  const visibleSections = useMemo(() => {
    if (showHiddenSections) return sections;
    return sections.filter(
      (section) =>
        !section.visibleWhen ||
        isVisible(section.visibleWhen, formData, section.path),
    );
  }, [sections, formData, showHiddenSections]);

  const flowControllers = useFormsFlow({
    formType,
    role,
    formData,
    sections,
    visibleSections,
    routeContext,
    session,
    toast,
    setFormData,
    setErrors,
    dirtyFields,
    dispatch,
    switchFormType,
    switchRole,
    requestSigningDocsReview: () => {
      if (!canStartSigningRef.current) {
        toast?.warn(
          "Completa los documentos habilitantes antes de revisar la firma.",
        );
        return;
      }
      if (isMobileOrTablet) {
        const nextDocument = pickSigningDocument(
          signingDocumentsChecklist,
          signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
        );
        const nextSearch = buildSearchWithParams(signingReviewBaseSearch, {
          panel: SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL,
          doc: nextDocument?.id || "",
          formType,
          step: SIGN_REVIEW_STEP,
        });
        navigate(
          { pathname: FORMS_PATHNAME, search: nextSearch },
          { replace: false },
        );
        setIsSigningDocsModalOpen(false);
        return;
      }
      setIsSigningDocsModalOpen(true);
    },
    workflowFilesLoaded: !loadingWorkflowFiles,
  });
  const {
    formsController,
    draftRestoreLoading,
    indexHydration,
    lockedFieldPaths,
    persistSystemDraft,
    previewController,
    workflowUpload,
    signingFlow,
  } = flowControllers;

  const {
    groupedSections,
    safeActiveGroupIndex,
    goToGroup,
    goPrevStep,
    goNextStep,
    handleGenerate,
    handleSend,
    handleClearDraft,
    availableDocuments,
  } = formsController;
  const {
    setPreviewDocId,
    isPreviewModalOpen,
    closePreviewModal,
    previewModalState,
    previewFrameRef,
    handlePrintPreview,
    handleExportPdf,
    activePreviewDocId,
  } = previewController;

  const {
    workflowFileInputRef,
    workflowUploadStatus,
    handleWorkflowFileSelect,
    handleWorkflowFileTarget,
  } = workflowUpload;

  const { handleSignBatch, batchSigningStatus } = signingFlow;

  const hasFingerprintCode = Boolean(
    String(formData?.codigoDactilar || formData?.codDactilar || "").trim(),
  );

  const requiredWorkflowAttachmentsReady = useMemo(() => {
    return hasAllRequiredWorkflowAttachments({
      workflowFiles,
      workflowDocumentFiles,
      attachments: formData?.attachments,
    });
  }, [formData?.attachments, workflowDocumentFiles, workflowFiles]);

  const isSigningStep = safeActiveGroupIndex === 3;

  const canStartSigning = useMemo(
    () =>
      Boolean(
        isSigningStep &&
        requiredWorkflowAttachmentsReady &&
        hasFingerprintCode &&
        !formData?.signatureBatch?.completed,
      ),
    [
      hasFingerprintCode,
      isSigningStep,
      requiredWorkflowAttachmentsReady,
      formData?.signatureBatch?.completed,
    ],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    canStartSigningRef.current = canStartSigning;
  }, [canStartSigning]);

  const {
    livenessSession,
    handleCancelLiveness,
    closeSigningReviewAfterSuccess: closeSigningReviewSurface,
    handleConfirmSigningDocuments,
    handleReopenLiveness,
    signingUiState,
    primaryActionLabel,
    primaryActionDisabled,
    primaryActionTitle,
    isReopeningLiveness,
  } = useIntegratedSigningFlowController({
    formType,
    formData,
    session,
    setFormData,
    persistSystemDraft,
    signingStorageScope,
    routeContext,
    toast,
    navigate,
    signingReviewBaseSearch,
    signingReviewActiveDocumentId,
    batchSigningStatus,
    isLivenessCallbackPage,
    handleSignBatch,
    isSigningReviewMobilePage,
    isSigningStep,
    loadingSaveForm,
    requiredWorkflowAttachmentsReady,
    hasFingerprintCode,
    canStartSigning,
    setIsSigningDocsModalOpen,
    locationSearch: location.search,
    signingDocumentsChecklist,
    queryDocId,
    queryFormType,
    panelParam,
    queryStep,
    dispatch,
  });

  const primaryActionHandler = isSigningStep ? handleSend : goNextStep;

  const sectionStates = visibleSections.map((section) => {
    const hasData = hasSectionData(formData, section);
    const errorsCount = countErrorsBySection(errors, section);
    return {
      section,
      hasData,
      errorsCount,
      completed: hasData && errorsCount === 0,
    };
  });

  const activeGroup = groupedSections[safeActiveGroupIndex] || null;
  const activeGroupSections = activeGroup?.sections || [];

  const completedCount = sectionStates.filter(
    (section) => section.completed,
  ).length;
  const totalSections = sectionStates.length;
  const progressPercent = totalSections
    ? Math.round((completedCount / totalSections) * 100)
    : 0;

  const handleClearDraftPage = () => {
    handleClearDraft();
    setPreviewDocId(availableDocuments[0]?.id || "solicitud");
  };

  if (
    !isLivenessCallbackPage &&
    !session?.validated &&
    !session?.validatedAccess &&
    !session?.token
  ) {
    return <Navigate to={`/WorkflowExternos${location.search}`} replace />;
  }

  const isWorkflowBootLoading =
    Boolean(routeContext.wrk) && loadingWorkflowFiles;
  const isDraftBootLoading = Boolean(draftRestoreLoading);
  const isHydrationBootLoading = Boolean(indexHydration.loading);
  const isFormBootLoading =
    isWorkflowBootLoading || isDraftBootLoading || isHydrationBootLoading;
  const shouldShowFormBootLoading =
    isFormBootLoading && !isSigningReviewMobilePage;

  if (isLivenessCallbackPage) {
    return (
      <div className="flex min-h-dvh items-center justify-center bg-slate-100 px-4 text-slate-900">
        <div className="w-full max-w-md rounded-3xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-6 text-center shadow-xl">
          <div className="mx-auto mb-4 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600">
            <svg
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              className="h-7 w-7"
              fill="none"
              aria-hidden="true"
            >
              <path
                d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"
                stroke="currentColor"
                strokeWidth="2.4"
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
              />
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">
            Prueba de vida completada
          </h1>
          <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-600">
            Ya puedes volver a la pestaña anterior y continuar con la firma de
            documentos.
          </p>
          <div className="mt-5 flex justify-center gap-3">
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn--secondary min-h-11 px-4"
              onClick={() => {
                focusOpenerAndCloseWindow();
              }}
            >
              Cerrar pestaña
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (shouldShowFormBootLoading) {
    return (
      <div>
        <AppLoading
          title="Cargando formulario"
          subtitle="Estamos consultando los datos del workflow y preparando la información inicial antes de pintar el proceso."
        />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (isSigningReviewMobilePage) {
    return (
      <div>
        <ToastStack toasts={toasts} onDismiss={dismiss} />
        <SigningReviewMobilePage
          documents={signingDocumentsChecklist}
          activeDocumentId={signingReviewActiveDocumentId}
          onSelectDocument={(documentId) => {
            const nextSearch = buildSearchWithParams(signingReviewBaseSearch, {
              panel: SIGN_REVIEW_PANEL,
              doc: documentId,
              formType,
              step: SIGN_REVIEW_STEP,
            });
            navigate(
              { pathname: FORMS_PATHNAME, search: nextSearch },
              { replace: true },
            );
          }}
          formType={formType}
          formData={formData}
          signingUiState={signingUiState}
          busy={batchSigningStatus.running}
          isReopeningLiveness={isReopeningLiveness}
          livenessSession={livenessSession}
          onCancelLiveness={handleCancelLiveness}
          onConfirm={handleConfirmSigningDocuments}
          onReopenLiveness={handleReopenLiveness}
          onClose={closeSigningReviewSurface}
        />
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div>
      <ToastStack toasts={toasts} onDismiss={dismiss} />

      <FormsHeader
        formType={formType}
        switchFormType={switchFormType}
        showHiddenSections={showHiddenSections}
        setShowHiddenSections={setShowHiddenSections}
        handleClearDraft={handleClearDraftPage}
        detectedFormType={detectedFormType}
      />

      <div className="w-full max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        <div
          className="forms-layout form-workspace__layout 
          grid grid-cols-1 
          lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_280px] 
          xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_320px] 
          gap-3 lg:gap-4 
          px-3 sm:px-4 lg:px-6 
          pb-24 md:pb-6"
        >
          <FormsMainContent
            formType={formType}
            progressPercent={progressPercent}
            errors={errors}
            formData={formData}
            groupedSections={groupedSections}
            safeActiveGroupIndex={safeActiveGroupIndex}
            goToGroup={goToGroup}
            activeGroupSections={activeGroupSections}
            handleFieldChange={handleFieldChange}
            handleArrayChange={handleArrayChange}
            handleArrayAdd={handleArrayAdd}
            handleArrayRemove={handleArrayRemove}
            showHiddenSections={showHiddenSections}
            goPrevStep={goPrevStep}
            primaryLabel={primaryActionLabel}
            primaryDisabled={primaryActionDisabled}
            primaryTitle={primaryActionTitle}
            primaryAction={primaryActionHandler}
            isSigningStep={isSigningStep}
            handleGenerate={handleGenerate}
            loadingSaveForm={loadingSaveForm}
            statusSaveForm={statusSaveForm}
            errorSaveForm={errorSaveForm}
            lockedFieldPaths={lockedFieldPaths}
            activePreviewDocId={activePreviewDocId}
            setPreviewDocId={setPreviewDocId}
            availableDocuments={availableDocuments}
            workflowFiles={workflowFiles}
            workflowDocumentFiles={workflowDocumentFiles}
            statusWorkflowFiles={statusWorkflowFiles}
            handleWorkflowFileTarget={handleWorkflowFileTarget}
            workflowUploadStatus={workflowUploadStatus}
            handlePrintPreview={handlePrintPreview}
            handleExportPdf={handleExportPdf}
            canStartSigning={canStartSigning}
          />

          {/* <FormsSidebar
          formType={formType}
          activePreviewDocId={activePreviewDocId}
          setPreviewDocId={setPreviewDocId}
          workflowFiles={workflowFiles}
          workflowDocumentFiles={workflowDocumentFiles}
          statusWorkflowFiles={statusWorkflowFiles}
          handleWorkflowFileTarget={handleWorkflowFileTarget}
          formData={formData}
          workflowUploadStatus={workflowUploadStatus}
          signState={signState}
          setSignState={setSignState}
          handleSigning={handleSigning}
          workflowFileInputRef={workflowFileInputRef}
          handleWorkflowFileSelect={handleWorkflowFileSelect}
          handleRemoveAttachment={handleRemoveAttachment}
          openPreviewModal={openPreviewModal}
          canStartSigning={canStartSigning}
        /> */}
        </div>
      </div>

      <input
        type="file"
        ref={workflowFileInputRef}
        onChange={handleWorkflowFileSelect}
        className="hidden"
        accept="application/pdf,image/*"
      />

      <PreviewModal
        isOpen={isPreviewModalOpen}
        close={closePreviewModal}
        printPreview={handlePrintPreview}
        exportPreview={handleExportPdf}
        frameRef={previewFrameRef}
        previewState={previewModalState}
        title={
          availableDocuments.find((doc) => doc.id === activePreviewDocId)?.label
        }
      />

      <SigningDocumentsModal
        open={isSigningDocsModalOpen}
        documents={signingDocumentsChecklist}
        formType={formType}
        formData={formData}
        signingUiState={signingUiState}
        onClose={() => {
          setIsSigningDocsModalOpen(false);
          handleCancelLiveness();
        }}
        onConfirm={handleConfirmSigningDocuments}
        busy={batchSigningStatus.running}
        isReopeningLiveness={isReopeningLiveness}
        livenessSession={livenessSession}
        onCancelLiveness={handleCancelLiveness}
        onReopenLiveness={handleReopenLiveness}
      />
    </div>
  );
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/pages/FormsHomePage.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #89
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/runtime/formsWorkflowHelpers.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/runtime/formsWorkflowHelpers.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 69
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

export const DEFAULT_PREVIEW_DOC_ID = 'solicitud';

export const INITIAL_SIGN_STATE = Object.freeze({
  type: 'electronic',
  password: '',
  file: null,
  message: '',
  isSigning: false,
});

export const initialPreviewState = {
  htmlPreview: '',
  loading: false,
  error: '',
};

export function previewReducer(state, action) {
  switch (action.type) {
    case 'loading':
      return { ...state, loading: true, error: '' };
    case 'success':
      return { htmlPreview: action.payload, loading: false, error: '' };
    case 'error':
      return { htmlPreview: '', loading: false, error: action.payload };
    default:
      return state;
  }
}

export function getInitialFormType(session) {
  if (session?.formType === 'linked' || session?.flowType === 'linked' || session?.isLinked === true) return 'linked';
  return 'natural';
}

function sanitizeStepLabel(raw) {
  if (!raw) return '';
  return String(raw).trim().replace(/^\d+(?:\.\d+)*\s*[-.:)]\s*/u, '').replace(/\s+/gu, ' ').trim();
}

export function groupSectionsForSteps(sectionStatesList) {
  if (!Array.isArray(sectionStatesList) || sectionStatesList.length === 0) return [];
  const groups = [];
  let currentGroup = null;
  sectionStatesList.forEach((sectionState) => {
    const stepGroup = Number(sectionState.section?.stepGroup || 0);
    if (!currentGroup || currentGroup.stepGroup !== stepGroup) {
      currentGroup = { index: groups.length, stepGroup, sections: [] };
      groups.push(currentGroup);
    }
    currentGroup.sections.push(sectionState);
  });
  return groups.map((group, index) => {
    const completed = group.sections.every((st) => st.completed);
    const hasData = group.sections.some((st) => st.hasData);
    const errorsCount = group.sections.reduce((sum, st) => sum + (st.errorsCount || 0), 0);
    const firstTitle = group.sections[0]?.section?.title || `Paso ${index + 1}`;
    const label = sanitizeStepLabel(firstTitle);
    return { ...group, index, completed, hasData, errorsCount, label };
  });
}

export function countErrorsBySection(errors = {}, section) {
  const keys = Object.keys(errors || {});
  if (!keys.length) return 0;
  if (section?.path) return keys.filter((path) => path === section.path || path.startsWith(`${section.path}.`)).length;
  const fieldNames = new Set((section?.fields || []).map((field) => field?.name).filter(Boolean));
  return keys.filter((path) => fieldNames.has(String(path).split('.')[0])).length;
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/runtime/formsWorkflowHelpers.js ==========================

import {
  useCallback,
  useEffect,
  useMemo,
  useReducer,
  useRef,
  useState,
} from "react";
import {
  getAvailableDocumentDefinitions as getAvailableDocuments,
  getDocumentDisplayLabel,
  getSigningDocumentsChecklist,
} from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import { getOfficialPdfPreview } from "@/core/document/services/pdfPreviewService";
import { generateFinalPdf } from "@/core/document/services/pdfGenerationService";
import { submitSigningRequest } from "@/infrastructure/signature/signingUtils";
import { uploadWorkflowDocumentFile } from "@/store/slices/requestSlice";
import { executeProviderSigningBatch } from "@/infrastructure/signature/signatureBatchService";
import { logger, getSessionToken } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import {
  DEFAULT_PREVIEW_DOC_ID,
  INITIAL_SIGN_STATE,
  getInitialFormType,
  groupSectionsForSteps,
  countErrorsBySection,
} from "./formsWorkflowHelpers";
import { validateSigningInput } from "../../../domain/signing/signingUtils.js";
import { sanitizeSigningStoragePayload } from "@/domain/signing/signingLivenessStorage";
export { getInitialFormType, groupSectionsForSteps, countErrorsBySection };

const FORMS_WORKFLOW_TRACE =
  String(import.meta.env.VITE_FORMS_WORKFLOW_TRACE || "").toLowerCase() ===
  "true";

function traceFormsWorkflow(...args) {
  if (!FORMS_WORKFLOW_TRACE) return;
  logger.info(...args);
}

function resolveActivePreviewDocId(
  availableDocuments,
  previewDocId,
  initialDocId,
) {
  traceFormsWorkflow(
    "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] resolveActivePreviewDocId called",
    {
      availableDocuments,
      previewDocId,
      initialDocId,
    },
  );
  if (availableDocuments.some((doc) => doc.id === previewDocId))
    return previewDocId;
  if (availableDocuments.some((doc) => doc.id === initialDocId))
    return initialDocId;
  return availableDocuments[0]?.id || DEFAULT_PREVIEW_DOC_ID;
}

function createInitialPreviewState() {
  traceFormsWorkflow(
    "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] createInitialPreviewState called",
  );
  return {
    loading: false,
    error: "",
    blobUrl: "",
    cacheKey: "",
    lastSuccessfulBlobUrl: "",
  };
}

function previewModalReducer(state, action) {
  traceFormsWorkflow(
    "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] previewModalReducer called",
    {
      actionType: action?.type,
    },
  );
  switch (action?.type) {
    case "loading": {
      const payload = action.payload || {};
      return {
        ...state,
        loading: true,
        error: "",
        cacheKey: payload.cacheKey || state.cacheKey,
      };
    }
    case "success": {
      const payload = action.payload || {};
      const blobUrl =
        payload.blobUrl || state.blobUrl || state.lastSuccessfulBlobUrl || "";
      return {
        ...state,
        loading: false,
        error: "",
        blobUrl,
        lastSuccessfulBlobUrl: blobUrl || state.lastSuccessfulBlobUrl || "",
        cacheKey: payload.cacheKey || state.cacheKey,
      };
    }
    case "error": {
      const payload = action.payload || {};
      const errorMessage =
        typeof payload === "string"
          ? payload
          : payload.error ||
            payload.message ||
            "No fue posible generar la vista previa.";
      return {
        ...state,
        loading: false,
        error: errorMessage,
        blobUrl: state.blobUrl || state.lastSuccessfulBlobUrl || "",
        cacheKey: payload.cacheKey || state.cacheKey,
      };
    }
    default:
      return state;
  }
}

async function resolvePreviewPdf({
  documentId,
  formType,
  formData,
  force = false,
} = {}) {
  traceFormsWorkflow("[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] resolvePreviewPdf called", {
    documentId,
    formType,
    force,
  });
  const result = await getOfficialPdfPreview({
    documentId,
    formType,
    formData,
    force: Boolean(force),
  });
  return {
    blobUrl: result?.blobUrl || "",
    cacheKey: result?.cacheKey || "",
    fromCache: Boolean(result?.fromCache),
  };
}

function useSigningFlow({
  formType,
  formData,
  routeContext,
  session,
  toast,
  setFormData,
}) {
  traceFormsWorkflow("[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] useSigningFlow called", {
    formType,
  });
  const [signState, setSignState] = useState(INITIAL_SIGN_STATE);
  const [batchSigningStatus, setBatchSigningStatus] = useState({
    running: false,
    message: "",
  });

  const handleSigning = useCallback(() => {
    traceFormsWorkflow("[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] handleSigning called", {
      signStateType: signState.type,
    });
    const validationError = (validateSigningInput || (() => null))({
      signType: signState.type,
      password: signState.password,
      p12File: signState.file,
    });
    const token = getSessionToken(session) || null;
    if (validationError) {
      toast?.error(validationError);
      return;
    }
    setSignState((prev) => ({ ...prev, isSigning: true }));
    submitSigningRequest({
      exec: routeContext?.exec,
      wrk: routeContext?.wrk,
      dcmt: routeContext?.dcmt,
      token,
      signType: signState.type,
      password: signState.password,
      p12File: signState.file,
      metadata: { formType: undefined, typesOfSignAllowed: [signState.type] },
    })
      .then((result) => {
        const responseMessage =
          result?.data?.message || "Firma preparada correctamente.";
        setSignState((prev) => ({ ...prev, message: responseMessage }));
        toast?.success("Firma procesada.");
        setFormData((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          signing: {
            ...(prev.signing || {}),
            signType: signState.type,
            hasP12: true,
            signedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          },
        }));
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        toast?.error(error?.message || "No se pudo completar la firma.");
      })
      .finally(() => {
        setSignState((prev) => ({ ...prev, isSigning: false }));
      });
  }, [routeContext, session, setFormData, signState, toast]);

  const handleSignBatch = useCallback(
    async (options = {}) => {
      traceFormsWorkflow(
        "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] handleSignBatch called",
        {
          options,
        },
      );
      try {
        const docsChecklist = getSigningDocumentsChecklist(
          formType,
          formData || {},
        );
        const documentsToSign = (docsChecklist || [])
          .filter((d) => d.readyToSign)
          .map((doc) => ({
            ...doc,
            documentId: doc.id,
          }));
        if (documentsToSign.length === 0) {
          toast?.error("No hay documentos listos para firmar.");
          return null;
        }
        const workflowId =
          routeContext?.wrk ||
          routeContext?.workflowId ||
          routeContext?.requestId;
        if (!workflowId) {
          toast?.error(
            "No se encontró el workflowId (wrk) para continuar con la firma.",
          );
          return null;
        }
        setBatchSigningStatus({
          running: true,
          message: options?.continueAfterLiveness
            ? "Verificacion completada. Reanudando el firmado de documentos..."
            : "Preparando la revision final y el paquete de firma...",
        });
        const result = await executeProviderSigningBatch({
          formType,
          formData,
          session,
          routeContext,
          documents: documentsToSign,
          continueAfterLiveness: Boolean(options?.continueAfterLiveness),
          livenessId: options?.livenessId || null,
          livenessApproved:
            Boolean(options?.livenessApproved) ||
            Boolean(options?.continueAfterLiveness),
          transactionId: options?.transactionId || workflowId,
          dniDetails: options?.dniDetails || null,
          callbackURL: options?.callbackURL || null,
          onStatus: (status) => setBatchSigningStatus(status),
        });
        if (!result) return null;
        if (result.requiresLiveness) {
          const nextBatchState = sanitizeSigningStoragePayload(
            result.signatureBatch || {},
          );
          setFormData((prev) => ({
            ...(prev || {}),
            signatureBatch: {
              ...(prev?.signatureBatch || {}),
              ...nextBatchState,
              livenessStatus: "in_liveness_tab",
              livenessId: result.livenessId || nextBatchState.livenessId || "",
              transactionId:
                result.transactionId || nextBatchState.transactionId || "",
              callbackUrl:
                nextBatchState.callbackUrl || options?.callbackURL || "",
              livenessUrl:
                result.livenessUrl || nextBatchState.livenessUrl || "",
              pendingAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            },
            signing: {
              ...(prev?.signing || {}),
              livenessStatus: "in_liveness_tab",
              livenessId: result.livenessId || nextBatchState.livenessId || "",
              transactionId:
                result.transactionId || nextBatchState.transactionId || "",
            },
          }));
          setBatchSigningStatus({
            running: false,
            message:
              "Se abrió la prueba de vida en una nueva pestaña. Completa la verificacion para continuar.",
          });
          toast?.info("Se requiere verificacion de identidad para continuar.");
          return result;
        }
        if (result.signatureBatch?.completed) {
          const nextBatchState = sanitizeSigningStoragePayload(
            result.signatureBatch,
          );
          setFormData((prev) => ({
            ...(prev || {}),
            signatureBatch: nextBatchState,
            signing: {
              ...(prev?.signing || {}),
              completed: true,
              signedAt: nextBatchState.completedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
              transactionId: nextBatchState.transactionId,
              livenessId: nextBatchState.livenessId,
            },
          }));
          setBatchSigningStatus({
            running: false,
            message:
              "Todos los documentos quedaron firmados y listos para envio.",
          });
          toast?.success("Documentos firmados y descargados correctamente.");
          return result;
        }
        setBatchSigningStatus({
          running: false,
          message: "La revision de firma finalizo sin incidencias.",
        });
        return result;
      } catch (error) {
        setBatchSigningStatus({
          running: false,
          message:
            error?.message || "No se pudo completar el firmado de documentos.",
        });
        if (!options?.silent) {
          toast?.error(
            error?.message || "No se pudo completar la firma por lote.",
          );
        }
        return null;
      }
    },
    [formData, formType, routeContext, session, setFormData, toast],
  );

  const handleStartLiveness = useCallback((livenessId) => {
    traceFormsWorkflow(
      "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] handleStartLiveness called",
      {
        livenessId,
      },
    );
    if (!livenessId) {
      return Promise.reject(new Error("Missing livenessId"));
    }
    setBatchSigningStatus({
      running: false,
      message: "Completa la prueba de vida y luego confirma la firma.",
    });
    return Promise.resolve({ started: true, livenessId });
  }, []);

  return {
    signState,
    setSignState,
    handleSigning,
    batchSigningStatus,
    handleSignBatch,
    handleStartLiveness,
  };
}

export function useFormsWorkflowModule({
  formType,
  formData,
  routeContext,
  session,
  toast,
  setFormData,
  dispatch,
  initialDocId = DEFAULT_PREVIEW_DOC_ID,
} = {}) {
  traceFormsWorkflow(
    "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] useFormsWorkflowModule called",
    {
      formType,
      initialDocId,
    },
  );
  const availableDocuments = useMemo(
    () => getAvailableDocuments(formType),
    [formType],
  );
  const [previewDocId, setPreviewDocId] = useState(initialDocId);
  const [isPreviewModalOpen, setIsPreviewModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [previewModalState, dispatchPreviewModal] = useReducer(
    previewModalReducer,
    undefined,
    createInitialPreviewState,
  );
  const previewFrameRef = useRef(null);
  const activePreviewDocId = useMemo(
    () =>
      resolveActivePreviewDocId(availableDocuments, previewDocId, initialDocId),
    [availableDocuments, previewDocId, initialDocId],
  );
  const activePreviewTitle = useMemo(
    () => getDocumentDisplayLabel(activePreviewDocId, formType) || "documento",
    [activePreviewDocId, formType],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isPreviewModalOpen) return;
    let cancelled = false;
    const loadPreview = async () => {
      try {
        dispatchPreviewModal({
          type: "loading",
          payload: { cacheKey: "" },
        });
        const { blobUrl, cacheKey } = await resolvePreviewPdf({
          documentId: activePreviewDocId,
          formType,
          formData,
          force: false,
        });
        if (!cancelled)
          dispatchPreviewModal({
            type: "success",
            payload: { blobUrl, cacheKey },
          });
      } catch (error) {
        if (!cancelled) {
          dispatchPreviewModal({
            type: "error",
            payload: {
              error:
                error?.message || "No fue posible generar la vista previa.",
              cacheKey: "",
            },
          });
        }
      }
    };
    loadPreview();
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [
    activePreviewDocId,
    dispatchPreviewModal,
    formData,
    formType,
    isPreviewModalOpen,
  ]);

  const openPreviewModal = useCallback(() => setIsPreviewModalOpen(true), []);
  const closePreviewModal = useCallback(() => setIsPreviewModalOpen(false), []);

  const handlePrintPreview = useCallback(async () => {
    traceFormsWorkflow(
      "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] handlePrintPreview called",
    );
    try {
      const { blobUrl } = await resolvePreviewPdf({
        documentId: activePreviewDocId,
        formType,
        formData,
        force: false,
      });
      if (!blobUrl) return;
      const printFrame = document.createElement("iframe");
      printFrame.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
      Object.assign(printFrame.style, {
        position: "fixed",
        left: "-100vw",
        top: "0",
        width: "794px",
        height: "1123px",
        border: "0",
        opacity: "0",
        pointerEvents: "none",
      });
      document.body.appendChild(printFrame);
      const printWindow = printFrame.contentWindow;
      if (!printWindow)
        throw new Error("No se pudo abrir la ventana de impresión.");
      const cleanup = () => {
        printWindow.removeEventListener("afterprint", handleAfterPrint);
        printFrame.remove();
      };
      const handleAfterPrint = () => {
        cleanup();
      };
      const onLoad = () => {
        printWindow.focus?.();
        printWindow.print?.();
        setTimeout(cleanup, 1500);
      };
      printFrame.addEventListener("load", onLoad, { once: true });
      printWindow.addEventListener("afterprint", handleAfterPrint, {
        once: true,
      });
      printFrame.src = blobUrl;
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error("Error printing preview:", error);
    }
  }, [activePreviewDocId, formData, formType]);

  const handleExportPdf = useCallback(
    async (maybeReturnBlob) => {
      traceFormsWorkflow(
        "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] handleExportPdf called",
        {
          maybeReturnBlob,
        },
      );
      const returnBlob =
        typeof maybeReturnBlob === "boolean" ? maybeReturnBlob : false;
      try {
        const result = await generateFinalPdf({
          documentId: activePreviewDocId,
          formType,
          formData,
          options: {
            returnBlob,
            saveToFile: !returnBlob,
            fileName: `${activePreviewTitle}.pdf`,
          },
        });
        if (returnBlob) return result;
        return null;
      } catch (error) {
        logger.error("Error exporting preview PDF:", error);
        return null;
      }
    },
    [activePreviewDocId, activePreviewTitle, formData, formType],
  );

  const workflowFileInputRef = useRef(null);
  const workflowFileTargetRef = useRef(null);
  const [workflowUploadStatus, setWorkflowUploadStatus] = useState("");
  const workflowExec = routeContext?.exec;
  const workflowId = routeContext?.wrk;
  const workflowDocumentId = routeContext?.dcmt;
  const workflowFolderId = session?.folderId;
  const sessionToken = getSessionToken(session);

  const handleWorkflowFileSelect = useCallback(
    async (event) => {
      const file = event.target.files?.[0];
      const target = workflowFileTargetRef.current;
      traceFormsWorkflow(
        "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] handleWorkflowFileSelect called",
        { fileName: file?.name, target },
      );
      const targetLabel = target?.label || "archivo";
      if (!file || !target?.id) {
        workflowFileTargetRef.current = null;
        if (workflowFileInputRef.current)
          workflowFileInputRef.current.value = "";
        return;
      }
      setWorkflowUploadStatus(`Cargando ${targetLabel}...`);
      try {
        const result = await dispatch(
          uploadWorkflowDocumentFile({
            exec: workflowExec,
            wrk: workflowId,
            dcmt: workflowDocumentId,
            documentId: workflowDocumentId,
            folderId: workflowFolderId,
            token: sessionToken,
            fileTypeId: target.id,
            name: file.name,
            description: targetLabel,
            file,
          }),
        );
        if (result && typeof result.unwrap === "function")
          await result.unwrap();
        else await result;
        setFormData((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          attachments: {
            ...(prev.attachments || {}),
            [target.id]: {
              name: file.name,
              url: `server://workflow-file/${target.id}/${file.name}`,
              type: file.type,
              size: file.size,
              uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            },
          },
        }));
        setWorkflowUploadStatus(`${targetLabel} adjuntado correctamente.`);
        toast?.success("Archivo adjuntado.");
      } catch (error) {
        const message = error?.message || "No fue posible adjuntar el archivo.";
        setWorkflowUploadStatus(message);
        toast?.error(message);
      }
      workflowFileTargetRef.current = null;
      if (workflowFileInputRef.current) workflowFileInputRef.current.value = "";
    },
    [
      dispatch,
      setFormData,
      sessionToken,
      toast,
      workflowDocumentId,
      workflowExec,
      workflowFolderId,
      workflowId,
    ],
  );

  const handleWorkflowFileTarget = useCallback((file) => {
    traceFormsWorkflow(
      "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] handleWorkflowFileTarget called",
      { file },
    );
    const fileId = file?.id || file?.fileTypeId;
    if (!fileId) return;
    workflowFileTargetRef.current = {
      id: fileId,
      label: file?.fileTypeName || file?.name || "Archivo requerido",
    };
    if (workflowFileInputRef.current) workflowFileInputRef.current.click();
  }, []);
  const handleRemoveAttachment = useCallback(
    (fileTypeId) => {
      traceFormsWorkflow(
        "[TRACE][formsWorkflowModule] handleRemoveAttachment called",
        { fileTypeId },
      );
      setFormData((prev) => {
        const nextAttachments = { ...(prev.attachments || {}) };
        delete nextAttachments[fileTypeId];
        return { ...prev, attachments: nextAttachments };
      });
      toast?.info("Archivo removido del borrador local.");
    },
    [setFormData, toast],
  );

  const signingFlow = useSigningFlow({
    formType,
    formData,
    routeContext,
    session,
    toast,
    setFormData,
  });

  return {
    availableDocuments,
    previewController: {
      previewDocId,
      setPreviewDocId,
      isPreviewModalOpen,
      openPreviewModal,
      closePreviewModal,
      previewModalState,
      dispatchPreviewModal,
      previewFrameRef,
      handlePrintPreview,
      handleExportPdf,
      activePreviewDocId,
    },
    workflowUpload: {
      workflowFileInputRef,
      workflowFileTargetRef,
      workflowUploadStatus,
      handleWorkflowFileSelect,
      handleWorkflowFileTarget,
      handleRemoveAttachment,
    },
    signingFlow,
  };
}

export default useFormsWorkflowModule;


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/runtime/formsWorkflowModule.js ==========================

import { getValueByPath, setValueByPath } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import {
  INDEX_VALUE_TRANSFORMS,
  normalizeDataTypeName,
  normalizeIndexName,
  resolveIndexTargets,
} from "@/domain/forms/formsDomainModule";
import { WorkflowServer, CoreServer } from "@/config/api";
import { requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl } from "@/infrastructure/httpTransport";
import { getPersistedSessionToken } from "@/infrastructure/formPersistence";
const LOG_ENABLED =
  Boolean(import.meta.env?.DEV) && Boolean(globalThis?.__indexHydrationDebug);

function resolveToken(explicitToken) {
  const token = String(explicitToken || getPersistedSessionToken() || "").trim();

  return token;
}

function normalizeComparableValue(value) {
  const normalized = normalizeIndexName(value);

  return normalized;
}

function buildRequestHeaders(token, extra = {}) {
  const resolvedToken = resolveToken(token);

  const headers = {
    Accept: "application/json, text/plain, */*",
    ...(resolvedToken ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${resolvedToken}` } : {}),
    ...extra,
  };

  return headers;
}

async function requestJson(url, token, options = {}) {
  const headers = buildRequestHeaders(token, options.headers || {});
  return requestJsonFromAbsoluteUrl(url, { ...options, headers });
}

export async function fetchWorkflowExecutionById(executionId, token) {
  if (!executionId) {
    return null;
  }

  const url = `${String(WorkflowServer).replace(/\/$/, "")}/workflow/exec/byId/${executionId}`;

  const result = await requestJson(url, token, { method: "GET" });

  return result;
}

export async function fetchWorkflowStatusById(workflowId, token) {
  if (!workflowId) {
    return null;
  }

  const url = `${String(WorkflowServer).replace(/\/$/, "")}/workflow/${workflowId}`;

  const result = await requestJson(url, token, { method: "GET" });

  return result;
}

export async function fetchWorkflowEditableConfig(workflowId, token) {
  if (!workflowId) {
    return null;
  }

  const url = `${String(WorkflowServer).replace(/\/$/, "")}/Workflow/editable/${workflowId}`;

  const result = await requestJson(url, token, { method: "GET" });

  return result;
}

export async function fetchWorkflowIndexValuesByWorkflowId(workflowId, token) {
  if (!workflowId) {
    return [];
  }

  const url = `${String(WorkflowServer).replace(/\/$/, "")}/workflow/exec/indexformbyWfId/${workflowId}`;

  const data = await requestJson(url, token, { method: "GET" });
  const result = Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];

  return result;
}

export async function fetchAllIndexNamesData(token) {
  const url = `${String(CoreServer).replace(/\/$/, "")}/index/getallnamesdata`;

  const data = await requestJson(url, token, { method: "GET" });
  const result = Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];

  return result;
}

export async function fetchLists(token) {
  const url = `${String(CoreServer).replace(/\/$/, "")}/list`;

  const data = await requestJson(url, token, { method: "GET" });
  const result = Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];

  return result;
}

export async function fetchListElementsByListId(listId, token) {
  if (!listId) {
    return [];
  }

  const url = `${String(CoreServer).replace(/\/$/, "")}/listelement/bylist/${listId}`;

  const data = await requestJson(url, token, { method: "GET" });

  if (Array.isArray(data)) {
    return data;
  }

  if (data && typeof data === "object") {
    return [data];
  }

  return [];
}

async function fetchListElementsMap(token, lists = []) {
  const entries = await Promise.all(
    lists
      .map((listItem) => ({
        ...listItem,
        _id: listItem?.id || listItem?.listId || null,
      }))
      .filter((listItem) => listItem?._id)
      .map(async (listItem) => {
        return [
          listItem._id,
          await fetchListElementsByListId(listItem._id, token),
        ];
      }),
  );

  const result = Object.fromEntries(entries);

  return result;
}

function getIndexDefinitionByName(indexDefinitions = []) {
  const map = new Map();

  (indexDefinitions || []).forEach((definition) => {
    const key = normalizeComparableValue(definition?.name);
    if (!key) return;
    map.set(key, definition);
  });

  return map;
}

function collectListIdsNeeded(indexValues = [], indexDefinitions = []) {
  const definitionMap = getIndexDefinitionByName(indexDefinitions);
  const ids = new Set();

  (indexValues || []).forEach((item) => {
    const isListType = normalizeDataTypeName(item?.dataTypeName) === "list";
    if (!isListType) return;

    const def = definitionMap.get(normalizeComparableValue(item?.indexName));
    const listId = String(def?.listId || "").trim();

    if (listId) ids.add(listId);
  });

  const result = Array.from(ids);

  return result;
}

export async function loadHydrationBackendData({ exec, workflowId, token }) {
  const resolvedToken = resolveToken(token);
  let effectiveWorkflowId = String(workflowId || "").trim();
  let workflowStatus = null;
  let execution = null;

  const executionId = String(exec || "").trim();
  let editableConfig = null;

  if (effectiveWorkflowId) {
    workflowStatus = await fetchWorkflowStatusById(
      effectiveWorkflowId,
      resolvedToken,
    ).catch(() => {
      return null;
    });

    editableConfig = await fetchWorkflowEditableConfig(
      effectiveWorkflowId,
      resolvedToken,
    ).catch(() => {
      return null;
    });
  }

  if (executionId && !editableConfig) {
    execution = await fetchWorkflowExecutionById(executionId, resolvedToken);

    if (!effectiveWorkflowId) {
      effectiveWorkflowId = String(execution?.workflowId || "").trim();
    }
  }

  if (editableConfig) {
    execution = editableConfig.execution;
    if (!effectiveWorkflowId) effectiveWorkflowId = editableConfig.id;
  } else if (!execution && workflowStatus?.nextExecutionId) {
    execution = await fetchWorkflowExecutionById(
      workflowStatus.nextExecutionId,
      resolvedToken,
    ).catch(() => {
      return null;
    });
  }

  if (!effectiveWorkflowId) {
    return {
      workflowId: null,
      execution,
      indexValues: [],
      indexDefinitions: [],
      lists: [],
      listElementsByListId: {},
    };
  }

  const indexValues =
    Array.isArray(execution?.stepIndexForms) &&
    execution.stepIndexForms.length > 0
      ? execution.stepIndexForms
      : await fetchWorkflowIndexValuesByWorkflowId(
          effectiveWorkflowId,
          resolvedToken,
        );

  const indexDefinitions = await fetchAllIndexNamesData(resolvedToken);

  const listIdsNeeded = collectListIdsNeeded(indexValues, indexDefinitions);

  const lists =
    listIdsNeeded.length > 0
      ? (await fetchLists(resolvedToken)).filter((listItem) => {
          const id = String(listItem?.id || listItem?.listId || "").trim();
          return id && listIdsNeeded.includes(id);
        })
      : [];

  const listElementsByListId =
    listIdsNeeded.length > 0
      ? await fetchListElementsMap(
          resolvedToken,
          listIdsNeeded.map((id) => ({ id })),
        )
      : {};

  const result = {
    workflowId: effectiveWorkflowId,
    execution,
    indexValues,
    indexDefinitions,
    lists,
    listElementsByListId,
  };

  return result;
}

function isValuableHydrationValue(value) {
  let result = true;

  if (value === null || value === undefined) result = false;
  else if (typeof value === "string") result = value.trim() !== "";

  return result;
}

function isSchemaBindingApplicable(
  binding,
  { indexName, formType, role, dataTypeName },
) {
  if (!binding || binding.hydrateOnLoad === false) {
    return false;
  }

  const bindingIndexNames = Array.isArray(binding.indexNames)
    ? binding.indexNames.map(normalizeIndexName)
    : [];

  if (!bindingIndexNames.includes(normalizeIndexName(indexName))) {
    return false;
  }

  const allowedFormTypes = Array.isArray(binding.formTypes)
    ? binding.formTypes
    : [];
  if (
    allowedFormTypes.length > 0 &&
    formType &&
    !allowedFormTypes.includes(formType)
  ) {
    return false;
  }

  const allowedRoles = Array.isArray(binding.roles) ? binding.roles : [];
  if (allowedRoles.length > 0 && role && !allowedRoles.includes(role)) {
    return false;
  }

  const allowedDataTypes = Array.isArray(binding.dataTypeName)
    ? binding.dataTypeName.map(normalizeDataTypeName)
    : [];

  const normalizedDataType = normalizeDataTypeName(dataTypeName);

  if (
    allowedDataTypes.length > 0 &&
    normalizedDataType &&
    !allowedDataTypes.includes(normalizedDataType)
  ) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

function collectSchemaBindingTargets(sections, options) {
  const safeOptions = options || {};
  const { indexName, formType, role, dataTypeName } = safeOptions;
  const targets = [];

  (Array.isArray(sections) ? sections : []).forEach((section) => {
    const sectionPath = section?.path ? `${section.path}.` : "";
    const fields = Array.isArray(section?.fields) ? section.fields : [];

    fields.forEach((field) => {
      const binding = field?.backendBinding;
      if (
        !isSchemaBindingApplicable(binding, {
          indexName,
          formType,
          role,
          dataTypeName,
        })
      )
        return;

      const path = String(
        binding.path || `${sectionPath}${field?.name || ""}`,
      ).trim();
      if (!path) return;

      const transformName = String(binding.transform || "identity").trim();
      const transformFn =
        INDEX_VALUE_TRANSFORMS[transformName] ||
        INDEX_VALUE_TRANSFORMS.identity;

      targets.push({
        path,
        priority: Number.isFinite(binding.priority) ? binding.priority : 5,
        transform: transformName,
        transformFn,
      });
    });
  });

  return targets;
}

function mergeAndDeduplicateTargets(schemaTargets, mapTargets) {
  const safeSchemaTargets = Array.isArray(schemaTargets) ? schemaTargets : [];
  const safeMapTargets = Array.isArray(mapTargets) ? mapTargets : [];
  const merged = [...safeSchemaTargets, ...safeMapTargets].sort(
    (a, b) => (a?.priority ?? 100) - (b?.priority ?? 100),
  );

  const seen = new Set();

  const result = merged.filter((target) => {
    if (!target?.path || seen.has(target.path)) return false;
    seen.add(target.path);
    return true;
  });

  return result;
}

function normalizeListIndexValue(
  item,
  indexDefinitions = [],
  listElementsByListId = {},
  indexDefinitionMap,
  listElementMapsByListId,
) {
  const isListType = normalizeDataTypeName(item?.dataTypeName) === "list";
  if (!isListType) {
    return item?.value;
  }

  const definitionMap =
    indexDefinitionMap || getIndexDefinitionByName(indexDefinitions);
  const definition = definitionMap.get(
    normalizeComparableValue(item?.indexName),
  );
  const listId = String(definition?.listId || "").trim();
  const listElements = listId ? listElementsByListId[listId] || [] : [];

  if (!Array.isArray(listElements) || listElements.length === 0) {
    return item?.value;
  }

  const tokens = String(item?.value || "")
    .split("|")
    .map((token) => token.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (tokens.length === 0) {
    return item?.value;
  }

  const cachedMaps = listId ? listElementMapsByListId?.[listId] : null;
  const elementMapByName =
    cachedMaps?.byName ||
    new Map(
      listElements.map((element) => [
        normalizeComparableValue(element?.name),
        String(element?.name || "").trim(),
      ]),
    );

  const elementMapById =
    cachedMaps?.byId ||
    new Map(
      listElements.map((element) => [
        String(element?.id || "").trim(),
        String(element?.name || "").trim(),
      ]),
    );

  const normalizedTokens = tokens.map((token) => {
    const byId = elementMapById.get(String(token).trim());
    if (byId) return byId;

    const byName = elementMapByName.get(normalizeComparableValue(token));
    return byName || token;
  });

  const result = normalizedTokens.join(" | ");

  return result;
}

export function hydrateFormDataFromIndexValues({
  formData,
  formType,
  role,
  sections,
  indexValues,
  indexDefinitions,
  listElementsByListId,
  dirtyPaths = [],
}) {
  const dirtySet = new Set((dirtyPaths || []).filter(Boolean));
  let nextFormData = formData;
  const indexDefinitionMap = getIndexDefinitionByName(indexDefinitions);
  const listElementMapsByListId = Object.fromEntries(
    Object.entries(listElementsByListId || {}).map(([listId, elements]) => [
      listId,
      {
        byName: new Map(
          (elements || []).map((element) => [
            normalizeComparableValue(element?.name),
            String(element?.name || "").trim(),
          ]),
        ),
        byId: new Map(
          (elements || []).map((element) => [
            String(element?.id || "").trim(),
            String(element?.name || "").trim(),
          ]),
        ),
      },
    ]),
  );

  const hydratedFields = [];
  const hydratedPaths = new Set();
  const unmatchedIndexes = [];
  const skippedDirtyFields = [];

  (indexValues || []).forEach((item) => {
    const normalizedRawValue = normalizeListIndexValue(
      item,
      indexDefinitions,
      listElementsByListId,
      indexDefinitionMap,
      listElementMapsByListId,
    );
    const hydratedItem = {
      ...item,
      value: normalizedRawValue,
    };

    const mapTargets = resolveIndexTargets(item?.indexName, {
      formType,
      role,
      dataTypeName: item?.dataTypeName,
    });

    const schemaTargets = collectSchemaBindingTargets(sections, {
      indexName: item?.indexName,
      formType,
      role,
      dataTypeName: item?.dataTypeName,
    });

    const targets = mergeAndDeduplicateTargets(schemaTargets, mapTargets);

    if (!targets.length) {
      unmatchedIndexes.push({
        indexName: item?.indexName,
        dataTypeName: item?.dataTypeName,
        value: item?.value,
        id: item?.id,
      });

      return;
    }

    targets.forEach((target) => {
      if (dirtySet.has(target.path)) {
        skippedDirtyFields.push({
          indexName: item?.indexName,
          path: target.path,
          value: hydratedItem?.value,
        });

        return;
      }

      const transformedValue = target.transformFn(
        hydratedItem?.value,
        hydratedItem,
      );

      if (!isValuableHydrationValue(transformedValue)) {
        return;
      }

      const currentValue = getValueByPath(nextFormData, target.path);

      if (currentValue !== transformedValue) {
        nextFormData = setValueByPath(
          nextFormData,
          target.path,
          transformedValue,
        );
      }

      if (hydratedPaths.has(target.path)) {
        return;
      }

      hydratedPaths.add(target.path);
      hydratedFields.push({
        indexName: item?.indexName,
        dataTypeName: item?.dataTypeName,
        path: target.path,
        rawValue: hydratedItem?.value,
        transformedValue,
        priority: target.priority,
      });
    });
  });

  const result = {
    nextFormData,
    hydratedFields,
    unmatchedIndexes,
    skippedDirtyFields,
  };

  return result;
}

export default {
  fetchWorkflowExecutionById,
  fetchWorkflowIndexValuesByWorkflowId,
  fetchAllIndexNamesData,
  fetchLists,
  fetchListElementsByListId,
  loadHydrationBackendData,
  hydrateFormDataFromIndexValues,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/services/indexHydrationService.js ==========================

/* eslint-disable react-refresh/only-export-components */
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import "./../../../styles/preload.css";

/**
 * AppScaffoldModule
 *
 * Módulo único para elementos transversales del scaffold UI de la app.
 * Incluye:
 * - AppShell
 * - AppLoading
 * - Toast
 * - ToastStack
 * - StatusBadge
 * - useToast
 *
 */

const TOAST_ICONS = {
  success: "✓",
  error: "✕",
  warn: "⚠",
  info: "ℹ",
};

const TOAST_TYPES = new Set(Object.keys(TOAST_ICONS));

let toastUid = 0;

function normalizeToastType(type) {
  if (TOAST_TYPES.has(type)) return type;
  return "info";
}

function ensureSafeDuration(duration, fallback) {
  if (typeof duration !== "number" || Number.isNaN(duration)) return fallback;
  return duration;
}

/**
 * AppShell - Contenedor principal con fondo y capa de contenido.
 */
export function AppShell({ children, className }) {
  return (
    <div className={`ef-flow-shell app-shell ${className || ""}`}>
      <div className="ef-flow-shell__content">{children}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

AppShell.propTypes = {
  children: PropTypes.node,
  className: PropTypes.string,
};

/**
 * AppLoading - Loader reutilizable para estados de bootstrap/carga.
 */
export function AppLoading({
  title = "Cargando información",
  subtitle = "Espera un momento mientras preparamos el flujo.",
  variant = "full",
}) {
  return (
    <div
      className={`ef-loading-container ef-loading--${variant}`}
      role="status"
      aria-live="polite"
    >
      <div className="ef-loading-content">
        <div className="ef-loading-spinner-wrap">
          <div className="ef-loading-spinner" />
        </div>
        <div className="ef-loading-text">
          {title ? <h2 className="ef-loading-title">{title}</h2> : null}
          {subtitle ? <p className="ef-loading-subtitle">{subtitle}</p> : null}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

AppLoading.propTypes = {
  title: PropTypes.string,
  subtitle: PropTypes.string,
  variant: PropTypes.oneOf(["full", "inline"]),
};

/**
 * Toast - Notificación simple temporal.
 */
export function Toast({ message, visible, onClose, duration = 1800 }) {
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!visible) return undefined;

    const id = setTimeout(() => {
      if (typeof onClose === "function") onClose();
    }, duration);

    return () => clearTimeout(id);
  }, [visible, duration, onClose]);

  if (!visible || !message) return null;

  return (
    <div className="toast toast--soft" role="status" aria-live="polite">
      {message}
    </div>
  );
}

Toast.propTypes = {
  message: PropTypes.string,
  visible: PropTypes.bool,
  onClose: PropTypes.func,
  duration: PropTypes.number,
};

/**
 * ToastStack - Hub de notificaciones.
 */
export function ToastStack({ toasts = [], onDismiss }) {
  if (!Array.isArray(toasts) || toasts.length === 0) return null;

  return (
    <div
      className="toast-stack toast-hub"
      role="region"
      aria-live="polite"
      aria-label="Notificaciones"
    >
      {toasts.map((toastItem) => {
        const tone = normalizeToastType(toastItem.type);
        return (
          <div
            key={toastItem.id}
            className={`toast toast-card toast-card--${tone} toast--${tone}`}
          >
            <span className="toast__icon toast-card__icon" aria-hidden="true">
              {TOAST_ICONS[tone]}
            </span>
            <span className="toast__message toast-card__message">
              {toastItem.message}
            </span>
            <button
              type="button"
              className="toast__close toast-card__close"
              aria-label="Cerrar notificación"
              onClick={() => onDismiss(toastItem.id)}
            >
              ×
            </button>
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

ToastStack.propTypes = {
  toasts: PropTypes.arrayOf(
    PropTypes.shape({
      id: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.number]).isRequired,
      message: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
      type: PropTypes.oneOf(["success", "error", "warn", "info"]).isRequired,
    }),
  ),
  onDismiss: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
};

/**
 * StatusBadge - Badge de estado/tone genérico.
 */
export function StatusBadge({ text, tone = "info" }) {
  return <span className={`status-badge status-badge--${tone}`}>{text}</span>;
}

StatusBadge.propTypes = {
  text: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]).isRequired,
  tone: PropTypes.string,
};

/**
 * useToast - Hook para manejar un stack de notificaciones toast.
 * Devuelve: { toasts, toast, dismiss }
 */
export function useToast(defaultDuration = 4500) {
  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState([]);
  const timersRef = useRef({});

  const dismiss = useCallback((id) => {
    clearTimeout(timersRef.current[id]);
    delete timersRef.current[id];
    setToasts((prev) => prev.filter((item) => item.id !== id));
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      Object.values(timersRef.current).forEach((timerId) =>
        clearTimeout(timerId),
      );
      timersRef.current = {};
    };
  }, []);

  const push = useCallback(
    (message, type = "info", duration = defaultDuration) => {
      const id = ++toastUid;
      const tone = normalizeToastType(type);
      const safeDuration = ensureSafeDuration(duration, defaultDuration);

      setToasts((prev) => [...prev, { id, message, type: tone }]);

      if (safeDuration > 0) {
        timersRef.current[id] = setTimeout(() => dismiss(id), safeDuration);
      }

      return id;
    },
    [defaultDuration, dismiss],
  );

  const toast = {
    success: (message, duration) => push(message, "success", duration),
    error: (message, duration) => push(message, "error", duration ?? 7000),
    warn: (message, duration) => push(message, "warn", duration),
    info: (message, duration) => push(message, "info", duration),
  };

  return { toasts, toast, dismiss };
}
