import React, { useMemo, useRef } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import {
  isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment,
  needsWorkflowSignatureAttachmentGeneration,
  isPersistedRemoteFile,
  isResolvablePreviewUrl,
} from "./attachmentsDocTypes";

export function AttachmentRow({
  attachment,
  docType,
  onAttachmentChange,
  onRemove,
  onPreview,
  onStatusChange,
  status,
  uploadedRemoteFile = null,
  showWorkflowStatus = false,
  canRemove = true,
}) {
  const requiresSignature = Boolean(docType?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature);
  const fileInputRef = useRef(null);

  const signatureState = useMemo(() => {
    const statusProp = status;
    if (!requiresSignature) return "idle";
    if (attachment) return "ready";
    if (statusProp) return statusProp;
    return needsWorkflowSignatureAttachmentGeneration(attachment, docType)
      ? "queued"
      : "ready";
  }, [requiresSignature, attachment, docType, status]);

  const canUploadManually = !requiresSignature;
  const isGeneratingSignature =
    signatureState === "queued" || signatureState === "generating";
  const isSignatureError = signatureState === "error";
  const isGeneratedAttachment = Boolean(
    attachment && isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(attachment),
  );

  const label = useMemo(
    () =>
      docType?.label || docType?.fileTypeName || docType?.name || "Documento",
    [docType],
  );
  const uploadedName = String(
    attachment?.name || uploadedRemoteFile?.name || "",
  ).trim();
  const isGeneratedInMemory = Boolean(
    attachment &&
    isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(attachment) &&
    attachment?.file instanceof File &&
    !String(attachment?.url || attachment?.path || "").trim(),
  );
  const isLocalManual = Boolean(
    attachment?.file instanceof File &&
    !isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(attachment),
  );
  const isRemoteUploaded = isPersistedRemoteFile(uploadedRemoteFile);
  const hasPreviewUrl = isResolvablePreviewUrl(
    attachment?.url || attachment?.path || uploadedRemoteFile?.path,
  );
  const isUploaded = Boolean(isRemoteUploaded || isLocalManual);
  const hasAttachmentInMemory = Boolean(attachment?.file instanceof File);
  const canShowAttachmentMeta = Boolean(
    attachment && (isUploaded || hasAttachmentInMemory),
  );

  const handleGeneratePdf = () => {
    if (!requiresSignature) return;
    onStatusChange?.(docType.id, "queued");
  };

  const handleRemoveClick = () => {
    onRemove?.(docType.id);
    if (requiresSignature) {
      onStatusChange?.(docType.id, "queued");
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      className={`attachment-row ${isUploaded ? "attachment-row--uploaded" : ""}`}
    >
      <div className="attachment-row__info">
        {isUploaded && (
          <span
            className="attachment-row__check-icon"
            title="Archivo cargado"
          />
        )}
        <label className="attachment-row__label">
          {label}
          {requiresSignature && isGeneratedAttachment && (
            <small className="attachment-row__dynamic">
              (generado automáticamente)
            </small>
          )}
          {requiresSignature && !attachment && (
            <small className="attachment-row__dynamic">
              (generando PDF...)
            </small>
          )}
          {requiresSignature && isGeneratedInMemory && !isUploaded && (
            <small className="attachment-row__dynamic">
              (generado en memoria, pendiente de guardar)
            </small>
          )}
          {requiresSignature && isSignatureError && !attachment && (
            <small className="attachment-row__dynamic">
              (error generando PDF)
            </small>
          )}
          {docType.rule === "required" && !attachment && (
            <span
              className="attachment-row__required-dot"
              title="Documento requerido"
            />
          )}
          {docType.dynamic && (
            <small className="attachment-row__dynamic">
              (requerido por motivo)
            </small>
          )}
        </label>
        {showWorkflowStatus ? (
          <div className="required-files-list__meta">
            {isUploaded ? (
              <span className="status-pill status-pill--success">Cargado</span>
            ) : (
              <span className="status-pill">Pendiente</span>
            )}
            {uploadedName ? (
              <span className="required-files-list__filename">
                {uploadedName}
              </span>
            ) : null}
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </div>
      <div className="attachment-row__actions">
        {requiresSignature && !attachment && !isGeneratingSignature && (
          <button
            type="button"
            className={`btn-icon btn-icon--sign ${isSignatureError ? "btn-icon--error" : ""}`}
            title={isSignatureError ? "Reintentar generación" : "Generar PDF"}
            onClick={handleGeneratePdf}
          />
        )}
        {canUploadManually && !attachment && !isGeneratingSignature && (
          <>
            <input
              type="file"
              ref={fileInputRef}
              className="attachment-row__file-input"
              accept="application/pdf,image/*"
              onChange={(e) => {
                const files = e.target.files;
                if (!files || files.length === 0) return;
                onAttachmentChange?.(docType.id, {
                  name: files[0].name,
                  type: files[0].type,
                  size: files[0].size,
                  file: files[0],
                  origin: "manual",
                });
              }}
            />
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn-icon btn-icon--upload"
              title="Subir archivo"
              onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
            />
          </>
        )}
        {canShowAttachmentMeta && (
          <div className="attachment-row__meta-pill">
            <span className="attachment-row__filename" title={attachment.name}>
              {attachment.name}
            </span>
            <div className="attachment-row__meta-buttons">
              {hasPreviewUrl || hasAttachmentInMemory ? (
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="btn-icon btn-icon--preview"
                  title="Previsualizar"
                  onClick={() => onPreview?.(attachment)}
                />
              ) : null}
              {canRemove ? (
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="btn-icon btn-icon--remove"
                  title="Eliminar"
                  onClick={handleRemoveClick}
                />
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

AttachmentRow.propTypes = {
  attachment: PropTypes.object,
  docType: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  onAttachmentChange: PropTypes.func,
  onRemove: PropTypes.func,
  onPreview: PropTypes.func,
  onStatusChange: PropTypes.func,
  status: PropTypes.string,
  uploadedRemoteFile: PropTypes.object,
  showWorkflowStatus: PropTypes.bool,
  canRemove: PropTypes.bool,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentRow.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #94
// Ruta relativa: src/shared/components/attachments/attachmentsCache.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/shared/components/attachments/attachmentsCache.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 122
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

const store = new Map();
const previewPathStore = new Map();

function keyOf(k) {
  if (k === null || typeof k === "undefined" || k === "")
    return "__attachments__";
  return String(k);
}

export function getGeneratedAttachments(cacheKey) {
  const k = keyOf(cacheKey);
  const m = store.get(k);
  if (!m) return {};
  const out = {};
  for (const [id, entry] of m.entries()) {
    out[id] = entry?.attachment ?? entry;
  }
  return out;
}

export function getGeneratedAttachmentsByRevision(cacheKey, revisionId) {
  const k = keyOf(cacheKey);
  const m = store.get(k);
  if (!m) return {};
  const normalizedRevisionId = String(revisionId || "");
  const out = {};
  for (const [id, entry] of m.entries()) {
    if (!entry) continue;
    if (String(entry.revisionId || "") !== normalizedRevisionId) continue;
    out[id] = entry.attachment ?? null;
  }
  return out;
}

export function getGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, docTypeId, options = {}) {
  const k = keyOf(cacheKey);
  const m = store.get(k);
  if (!m) return undefined;
  const entry = m.get(String(docTypeId));
  if (!entry) return undefined;
  const normalizedRevisionId = String(options?.revisionId || "");
  if (
    normalizedRevisionId &&
    String(entry?.revisionId || "") !== normalizedRevisionId
  ) {
    return undefined;
  }
  return entry?.attachment ?? entry;
}

export function hasGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, docTypeId, options = {}) {
  return Boolean(getGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, docTypeId, options));
}

export function setGeneratedAttachment(
  cacheKey,
  docTypeId,
  attachment,
  options = {},
) {
  const k = keyOf(cacheKey);
  let m = store.get(k);
  if (!m) {
    m = new Map();
    store.set(k, m);
  }
  m.set(String(docTypeId), {
    attachment,
    revisionId: String(options?.revisionId || ""),
    updatedAt: Date.now(),
  });
}

export function clearGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, docTypeId) {
  const k = keyOf(cacheKey);
  const m = store.get(k);
  if (!m) return;
  m.delete(String(docTypeId));
}

export function clearCacheForKey(cacheKey) {
  store.delete(keyOf(cacheKey));
  previewPathStore.delete(keyOf(cacheKey));
}

export function getPreviewFilePath(cacheKey, fileTypeId) {
  const k = keyOf(cacheKey);
  const m = previewPathStore.get(k);
  if (!m) return "";
  return String(m.get(String(fileTypeId)) || "");
}

export function setPreviewFilePath(cacheKey, fileTypeId, path) {
  const k = keyOf(cacheKey);
  let m = previewPathStore.get(k);
  if (!m) {
    m = new Map();
    previewPathStore.set(k, m);
  }
  m.set(String(fileTypeId), String(path || ""));
}

export function clearPreviewFilePath(cacheKey, fileTypeId) {
  const k = keyOf(cacheKey);
  const m = previewPathStore.get(k);
  if (!m) return;
  m.delete(String(fileTypeId));
}

export default {
  getGeneratedAttachments,
  getGeneratedAttachmentsByRevision,
  getGeneratedAttachment,
  hasGeneratedAttachment,
  setGeneratedAttachment,
  clearGeneratedAttachment,
  clearCacheForKey,
  getPreviewFilePath,
  setPreviewFilePath,
  clearPreviewFilePath,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/shared/components/attachments/attachmentsCache.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #95
// Ruta relativa: src/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsDialog.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsDialog.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 898
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, {
  useCallback,
  useEffect,
  useMemo,
  useState,
  useRef,
} from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { LoaderCircle } from "lucide-react";
import { hashFormData } from "@/core/document/coreCacheMetrics";
import {
  EMPTY_ATTACHMENTS,
  EMPTY_DOC_TYPES,
  sanitizeAttachmentsForDocTypes,
  getOrGenerateWorkflowSignatureAttachment,
  yieldToBrowser,
} from "./attachmentsWorkflowHelpers";
import { fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesRequest } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowDocumentOps";
import { AttachmentRow } from "./AttachmentRow";
import {
  hasGeneratedAttachment,
  getGeneratedAttachmentsByRevision,
  clearGeneratedAttachment,
  setPreviewFilePath,
  getPreviewFilePath,
  clearPreviewFilePath,
} from "./attachmentsCache";
import {
  isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment,
  isPersistedRemoteFile,
} from "./attachmentsDocTypes";

const ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS = {
  SIGNABLE: "signable",
  OTHERS: "others",
};

function normalizeFileTypeKey(value) {
  return String(value || "").trim();
}

function resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(docType = {}) {
  return normalizeFileTypeKey(
    docType?.workflowFileTypeId ||
      docType?.workflowMeta?.fileTypeId ||
      docType?.id,
  );
}

function buildWorkflowFilesByTypeMap(files = []) {
  const byTypeId = new Map();
  (files || []).forEach((file) => {
    if (!isPersistedRemoteFile(file)) return;
    const key = normalizeFileTypeKey(
      file?.fileTypeId || file?.FileTypeId || file?.fileType || file?.id,
    );
    if (!key || byTypeId.has(key)) return;
    byTypeId.set(key, file);
  });
  return byTypeId;
}

function hasSignablePending(statusMap, docTypes) {
  return docTypes.some((docType) => {
    if (String(docType?.rule || "").toLowerCase() !== "required") return false;
    if (!docType?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature) return false;
    const status = statusMap[docType.id] || "queued";
    return status === "queued" || status === "generating";
  });
}

function hasSignableError(statusMap, docTypes) {
  return docTypes.some((docType) => {
    if (String(docType?.rule || "").toLowerCase() !== "required") return false;
    if (!docType?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature) return false;
    return (statusMap[docType.id] || "queued") === "error";
  });
}

export function AttachmentsDialog({
  docTypes = EMPTY_DOC_TYPES,
  value = EMPTY_ATTACHMENTS,
  onCancel,
  onSave,
  saving = false,
  routeContext = null,
  session = null,
  formData = null,
  formType = null,
}) {
  const cacheKey = String(
    routeContext?.dcmt ||
      (formData && (formData.id || formData.documentId)) ||
      formType ||
      "__attachments__",
  );
  const revisionId = useMemo(() => hashFormData(formData || {}), [formData]);
  const cached = getGeneratedAttachmentsByRevision(cacheKey, revisionId) || {};

  const [local, setLocal] = useState(() => ({ ...(value || {}), ...cached }));
  const [preview, setPreview] = useState({
    open: false,
    url: null,
    type: null,
    name: null,
    objectUrl: null,
  });
  const [localSaving, setLocalSaving] = useState(false);
  const fallbackTimerRef = useRef(null);
  const savingSyncModeRef = useRef("idle");
  const [signatureStates, setSignatureStates] = useState(() => {
    const s = {};
    Object.keys(cached || {}).forEach((id) => {
      s[id] = "ready";
    });
    return s;
  });
  const [workflowUploadedFiles, setWorkflowUploadedFiles] = useState([]);
  const generatedRef = React.useRef(new Set());

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof document === "undefined") return undefined;
    document.body.classList.add("has-signing-modal-open");
    return () => {
      document.body.classList.remove("has-signing-modal-open");
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof document === "undefined") return undefined;

    if (!preview.open) {
      document.body.classList.remove("has-attachments-preview-open");
      return undefined;
    }

    document.body.classList.add("has-attachments-preview-open");

    const active = document.activeElement;
    if (active && typeof active.blur === "function") {
      const tagName = String(active.tagName || "").toLowerCase();
      const shouldBlur =
        tagName === "select" ||
        tagName === "input" ||
        tagName === "textarea" ||
        tagName === "button";
      if (shouldBlur) active.blur();
    }

    return () => {
      document.body.classList.remove("has-attachments-preview-open");
    };
  }, [preview.open]);

  const previewTitle = preview.name || "preview";
  const hasPendingSignatureAttachments = useMemo(
    () => hasSignablePending(signatureStates, docTypes),
    [docTypes, signatureStates],
  );
  const signatureGenerationError = useMemo(
    () => hasSignableError(signatureStates, docTypes),
    [docTypes, signatureStates],
  );

  const workflowFilesByType = useMemo(
    () => buildWorkflowFilesByTypeMap(workflowUploadedFiles),
    [workflowUploadedFiles],
  );

  const rowModels = useMemo(() => {
    return (docTypes || []).map((docType) => {
      const workflowFileTypeId = resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(docType);
      const uploadedRemoteFile =
        workflowFilesByType.get(workflowFileTypeId) || null;
      const localAttachment =
        local[docType.id] ||
        (workflowFileTypeId && workflowFileTypeId !== docType.id
          ? local[workflowFileTypeId]
          : null) ||
        null;
      const requiresSignature = Boolean(
        docType?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature,
      );
      const hasLocalManual = Boolean(
        localAttachment?.file instanceof File &&
        !isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(localAttachment),
      );
      const hasRemoteUploaded = isPersistedRemoteFile(uploadedRemoteFile);
      const hasGeneratedInMemory = Boolean(
        localAttachment &&
        isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(localAttachment) &&
        localAttachment?.file instanceof File &&
        !String(localAttachment?.url || localAttachment?.path || "").trim(),
      );
      const status =
        hasRemoteUploaded || hasLocalManual
          ? "ready"
          : hasGeneratedInMemory
            ? "queued"
            : "queued";

      return {
        key: `${docType.id}:${workflowFileTypeId || docType.id}`,
        docType,
        workflowFileTypeId,
        uploadedRemoteFile,
        localAttachment,
        requiresSignature,
        hasGeneratedInMemory,
        status,
      };
    });
  }, [docTypes, local, workflowFilesByType]);

  const groupedRows = useMemo(() => {
    const signable = [];
    const others = [];
    rowModels.forEach((row) => {
      if (row.requiresSignature) {
        signable.push(row);
        return;
      }
      others.push(row);
    });
    return { signable, others };
  }, [rowModels]);

  const [expandedGroups, setExpandedGroups] = useState({
    [ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.SIGNABLE]: true,
    [ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.OTHERS]: true,
  });

  const toggleGroup = useCallback((groupKey) => {
    setExpandedGroups((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      [groupKey]: !prev[groupKey],
    }));
  }, []);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;

    async function loadWorkflowFiles() {
      if (!routeContext?.dcmt) {
        if (!cancelled) setWorkflowUploadedFiles([]);
        return;
      }

      const result = await fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesRequest({
        exec: routeContext.exec,
        wrk: routeContext.wrk,
        dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
        documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
        folderId: session?.folderId,
        token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
      }).catch(() => ({ uploadedFiles: [] }));

      if (!cancelled) {
        const uploadedFiles = Array.isArray(result?.uploadedFiles)
          ? result.uploadedFiles
          : [];
        setWorkflowUploadedFiles(uploadedFiles);
      }
    }

    void loadWorkflowFiles();
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [
    routeContext?.dcmt,
    routeContext?.exec,
    routeContext?.wrk,
    session?.accessToken,
    session?.folderId,
    session?.token,
  ]);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const validAttachmentKeys = new Set(
      (docTypes || []).flatMap((item) => [
        String(item?.id || "").trim(),
        resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(item),
      ]),
    );
    setLocal((prev) => {
      const next = { ...prev };
      Object.keys(next).forEach((docTypeId) => {
        if (validAttachmentKeys.has(String(docTypeId || "").trim())) return;
        delete next[docTypeId];
      });
      const prevKeys = Object.keys(prev);
      const nextKeys = Object.keys(next);
      if (
        prevKeys.length === nextKeys.length &&
        prevKeys.every((key) => key in next)
      ) {
        return prev;
      }
      return next;
    });
  }, [docTypes]);

  const handleAttachmentChange = useCallback((id, attachment) => {
    setLocal((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      [id]: attachment,
    }));
    setSignatureStates((prev) => {
      if (!attachment) return prev;
      return { ...prev, [id]: "ready" };
    });
  }, []);

  const handleRemove = useCallback(
    (id) => {
      setLocal((prev) => {
        const next = { ...prev };
        delete next[id];
        return next;
      });
      try {
        generatedRef.current.delete(id);
      } catch {
        /* ignore */
      }
      try {
        clearGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, id);
      } catch {
        /* ignore */
      }
      clearPreviewFilePath(cacheKey, id);
      setSignatureStates((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        [id]: "queued",
      }));
    },
    [cacheKey],
  );

  const closePreview = useCallback(() => {
    if (preview.objectUrl && typeof URL.revokeObjectURL === "function") {
      URL.revokeObjectURL(preview.objectUrl);
    }
    setPreview({
      open: false,
      url: null,
      type: null,
      name: null,
      objectUrl: null,
    });
  }, [preview.objectUrl]);

  const handlePreview = useCallback(
    async (attachment, docType) => {
      if (!attachment) return;

      if (attachment.file instanceof File) {
        const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(attachment.file);
        setPreview({
          open: true,
          url: objectUrl,
          type: attachment.type,
          name: attachment.name,
          objectUrl,
        });
        return;
      }

      const rawUrl = String(attachment.url || attachment.data || "").trim();
      const workflowFileTypeId = resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(docType);

      if (
        rawUrl.startsWith("data:") ||
        rawUrl.startsWith("blob:") ||
        rawUrl.startsWith("http") ||
        rawUrl.startsWith("/")
      ) {
        setPreview({
          open: true,
          url: rawUrl,
          type: attachment.type,
          name: attachment.name,
          objectUrl: null,
        });
        return;
      }

      if (rawUrl.startsWith("server://workflow-file")) {
        const explicitParts = rawUrl.split("/");
        const explicitTypeId = normalizeFileTypeKey(
          explicitParts[2] || explicitParts[1] || workflowFileTypeId,
        );
        const previewPathFromCache = getPreviewFilePath(
          cacheKey,
          explicitTypeId,
        );

        const fileFromList =
          workflowFilesByType.get(explicitTypeId) ||
          workflowUploadedFiles.find(
            (f) =>
              String(f?.name || "").trim() ===
              String(attachment.name || "").trim(),
          ) ||
          null;
        const resolvedPath =
          String(previewPathFromCache || fileFromList?.path || "").trim() ||
          null;

        if (resolvedPath) {
          setPreviewFilePath(cacheKey, explicitTypeId, resolvedPath);
          setPreview({
            open: true,
            url: resolvedPath,
            type: attachment.type,
            name: attachment.name,
            objectUrl: null,
          });
          return;
        }

        setPreview({
          open: true,
          url: null,
          type: attachment.type,
          name: attachment.name,
          objectUrl: null,
        });
        return;
      }

      setPreview({
        open: true,
        url: rawUrl || null,
        type: attachment.type,
        name: attachment.name,
        objectUrl: null,
      });
    },
    [cacheKey, workflowFilesByType, workflowUploadedFiles],
  );

  const handleSave = useCallback(async () => {
    const payload = sanitizeAttachmentsForDocTypes(local, docTypes, {
      excludeRequiresSignature: true,
      excludeAutoGenerated: true,
    });

    if (fallbackTimerRef.current) {
      clearTimeout(fallbackTimerRef.current);
      fallbackTimerRef.current = null;
    }

    try {
      const result = onSave(payload);
      if (result && typeof result.then === "function") {
        savingSyncModeRef.current = "promise";
        setLocalSaving(true);
        try {
          await result;
        } finally {
          setLocalSaving(false);
          savingSyncModeRef.current = "idle";
          if (fallbackTimerRef.current) {
            clearTimeout(fallbackTimerRef.current);
            fallbackTimerRef.current = null;
          }
        }
      } else {
        // Parent may manage `saving` prop; set local saving and rely on `saving` watcher to clear it.
        savingSyncModeRef.current = "prop";
        setLocalSaving(true);
        // Fallback: clear spinner after 60s in case parent never flips `saving`.
        fallbackTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
          setLocalSaving(false);
          savingSyncModeRef.current = "idle";
          fallbackTimerRef.current = null;
        }, 60000);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setLocalSaving(false);
      savingSyncModeRef.current = "idle";
      if (fallbackTimerRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(fallbackTimerRef.current);
        fallbackTimerRef.current = null;
      }
      throw err;
    }
  }, [docTypes, local, onSave]);

  // Sync localSaving with parent `saving` prop when present
  useEffect(() => {
    if (savingSyncModeRef.current !== "prop") return;
    if (!saving && localSaving) {
      setLocalSaving(false);
      savingSyncModeRef.current = "idle";
      if (fallbackTimerRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(fallbackTimerRef.current);
        fallbackTimerRef.current = null;
      }
    }
  }, [saving, localSaving]);

  useEffect(
    () => () => {
      if (fallbackTimerRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(fallbackTimerRef.current);
        fallbackTimerRef.current = null;
      }
    },
    [],
  );

  const handleStatusChange = useCallback((id, status) => {
    setSignatureStates((prev) => {
      if (prev[id] === status) return prev;
      return { ...prev, [id]: status };
    });
  }, []);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;

    async function preGenerateSignatures() {
      if (!formData || !Array.isArray(docTypes) || docTypes.length === 0)
        return;

      const toGenerate = docTypes
        .filter((dt) => Boolean(dt?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature))
        .filter((dt) => {
          const workflowFileTypeId = resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(dt);
          const hasRemote = Boolean(
            workflowFilesByType.get(workflowFileTypeId),
          );
          if (hasRemote) return false;

          const localAttachment = local[dt.id];
          if (
            localAttachment &&
            !isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(localAttachment)
          ) {
            return false;
          }
          if (
            localAttachment &&
            isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(localAttachment) &&
            String(localAttachment.generatedRevisionId || "") ===
              String(revisionId)
          ) {
            return false;
          }

          if (generatedRef.current.has(dt.id)) return false;
          return !hasGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, dt.id, { revisionId });
        });

      if (toGenerate.length === 0) return;

      for (const dt of toGenerate) {
        if (cancelled) break;
        setSignatureStates((prev) => ({ ...prev, [dt.id]: "generating" }));
        try {
          await yieldToBrowser();
          const generated = await getOrGenerateWorkflowSignatureAttachment({
            cacheKey,
            docType: dt,
            formData,
            formType,
            revisionId,
          });
          if (cancelled) break;

          const generatedWithRevision = {
            ...generated,
            generatedRevisionId: revisionId,
          };

          setLocal((prev) => {
            const current = prev[dt.id];
            if (
              current &&
              isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(current) &&
              String(current.generatedRevisionId || "") === String(revisionId)
            ) {
              return prev;
            }
            return { ...prev, [dt.id]: generatedWithRevision };
          });
          generatedRef.current.add(dt.id);
          setSignatureStates((prev) => ({ ...prev, [dt.id]: "ready" }));
        } catch {
          setSignatureStates((prev) => ({ ...prev, [dt.id]: "error" }));
        }
        await yieldToBrowser();
      }
    }

    void preGenerateSignatures();
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [
    cacheKey,
    docTypes,
    formData,
    formType,
    local,
    revisionId,
    workflowFilesByType,
  ]);

  return (
    <div className="modal-overlay attachments-dialog">
      <div className="modal attachments-dialog__panel">
        <header className="modal__header attachments-dialog__header">
          <h3>Adjuntar documentos</h3>
        </header>
        <div className="modal__body attachments-dialog__body">
          <p className="attachments-dialog__copy">
            Adjunta solo lo necesario para este proceso. Puedes volver a esta
            ventana sin perder el avance.
          </p>
          <div className="attachments-dialog__groups">
            {groupedRows.signable.length > 0 ? (
              <section className="attachments-group attachments-group--signable">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="attachments-group__header"
                  onClick={() => toggleGroup(ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.SIGNABLE)}
                  aria-expanded={Boolean(
                    expandedGroups[ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.SIGNABLE],
                  )}
                >
                  <div className="attachments-group__title-wrap">
                    <h4 className="attachments-group__title">
                      Documentos que requieren firma
                    </h4>
                    <p className="attachments-group__subtitle">
                      Se generan o validan para el proceso de firma.
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <span className="attachments-group__meta">
                    {groupedRows.signable.length}
                  </span>
                  <span
                    className={`attachments-group__chevron ${expandedGroups[ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.SIGNABLE] ? "attachments-group__chevron--open" : ""}`}
                    aria-hidden="true"
                  >
                    ▾
                  </span>
                </button>
                {expandedGroups[ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.SIGNABLE] ? (
                  <div className="attachments-grid attachments-dialog__grid attachments-group__body">
                    {groupedRows.signable.map((row) => {
                      const remoteAsAttachment = row.uploadedRemoteFile
                        ? {
                            name:
                              row.uploadedRemoteFile?.name ||
                              row.docType?.label ||
                              "Archivo",
                            type:
                              row.uploadedRemoteFile?.type || "application/pdf",
                            url:
                              row.uploadedRemoteFile?.path ||
                              `server://workflow-file/${row.workflowFileTypeId}/${row.uploadedRemoteFile?.name || "archivo"}`,
                            origin: "remote",
                          }
                        : null;
                      const effectiveAttachment =
                        row.localAttachment || remoteAsAttachment;

                      return (
                        <AttachmentRow
                          key={row.key}
                          attachment={effectiveAttachment}
                          uploadedRemoteFile={row.uploadedRemoteFile}
                          docType={row.docType}
                          formData={formData}
                          formType={formType}
                          onAttachmentChange={handleAttachmentChange}
                          onRemove={handleRemove}
                          onPreview={(attachment) =>
                            handlePreview(attachment, row.docType)
                          }
                          onStatusChange={handleStatusChange}
                          status={row.status}
                          showWorkflowStatus
                          canRemove={Boolean(row.localAttachment)}
                        />
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </section>
            ) : null}

            {groupedRows.others.length > 0 ? (
              <section className="attachments-group attachments-group--others">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="attachments-group__header"
                  onClick={() => toggleGroup(ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.OTHERS)}
                  aria-expanded={Boolean(
                    expandedGroups[ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.OTHERS],
                  )}
                >
                  <div className="attachments-group__title-wrap">
                    <h4 className="attachments-group__title">
                      Documentos de respaldo
                    </h4>
                    <p className="attachments-group__subtitle">
                      Adjuntos manuales y de soporte del expediente.
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <span className="attachments-group__meta">
                    {groupedRows.others.length}
                  </span>
                  <span
                    className={`attachments-group__chevron ${expandedGroups[ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.OTHERS] ? "attachments-group__chevron--open" : ""}`}
                    aria-hidden="true"
                  >
                    ▾
                  </span>
                </button>
                {expandedGroups[ATTACHMENT_GROUP_KEYS.OTHERS] ? (
                  <div className="attachments-grid attachments-dialog__grid attachments-group__body">
                    {groupedRows.others.map((row) => {
                      const remoteAsAttachment = row.uploadedRemoteFile
                        ? {
                            name:
                              row.uploadedRemoteFile?.name ||
                              row.docType?.label ||
                              "Archivo",
                            type:
                              row.uploadedRemoteFile?.type || "application/pdf",
                            url:
                              row.uploadedRemoteFile?.path ||
                              `server://workflow-file/${row.workflowFileTypeId}/${row.uploadedRemoteFile?.name || "archivo"}`,
                            origin: "remote",
                          }
                        : null;
                      const effectiveAttachment =
                        row.localAttachment || remoteAsAttachment;

                      return (
                        <AttachmentRow
                          key={row.key}
                          attachment={effectiveAttachment}
                          uploadedRemoteFile={row.uploadedRemoteFile}
                          docType={row.docType}
                          formData={formData}
                          formType={formType}
                          onAttachmentChange={handleAttachmentChange}
                          onRemove={handleRemove}
                          onPreview={(attachment) =>
                            handlePreview(attachment, row.docType)
                          }
                          onStatusChange={handleStatusChange}
                          status={row.status}
                          showWorkflowStatus
                          canRemove={Boolean(row.localAttachment)}
                        />
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </section>
            ) : null}
          </div>
        </div>
        <footer className="modal__footer attachments-dialog__footer">
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn--ghost"
            onClick={onCancel}
            disabled={saving}
          >
            Cancelar
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn--primary"
            onClick={handleSave}
            disabled={saving || localSaving}
            aria-busy={saving || localSaving}
          >
            {saving || localSaving ? (
              <>
                <LoaderCircle
                  className="attachments-dialog__button-spinner"
                  size={16}
                  strokeWidth={2.2}
                />
                {hasPendingSignatureAttachments
                  ? "Generando PDFs..."
                  : "Guardando adjuntos..."}
              </>
            ) : hasPendingSignatureAttachments ? (
              "Generando PDFs..."
            ) : signatureGenerationError ? (
              "Error generando PDFs"
            ) : (
              "Guardar adjuntos"
            )}
          </button>
        </footer>
      </div>
      {preview.open && (
        <div className="modal-overlay attachments-preview">
          <div className="modal attachments-preview__panel">
            <header className="modal__header attachments-preview__header">
              <div className="attachments-preview__heading">
                <div className="attachments-preview__eyebrow">Vista previa</div>
                <h3>{preview.name || "Archivo"}</h3>
                <div className="attachments-preview__meta">
                  <span className="attachments-preview__chip">PDF</span>
                  <span className="attachments-preview__hint">
                    Revisa el contenido antes de descargar o guardar
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="attachments-preview__actions">
                {preview.url ? (
                  <a
                    className="btn btn--ghost btn--sm attachments-preview__action"
                    href={preview.url}
                    target="_blank"
                    rel="noreferrer"
                  >
                    Descargar
                  </a>
                ) : null}
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="btn btn--primary btn--sm attachments-preview__action"
                  onClick={closePreview}
                  title="Cerrar vista previa"
                >
                  Cerrar
                </button>
              </div>
            </header>
            <div className="modal__body attachments-preview__body">
              <div className="attachments-preview__stage">
                {preview.url ? (
                  (preview.type || "").startsWith("image/") ? (
                    <img
                      className="attachments-preview__img responsive-media"
                      src={preview.url}
                      alt={preview.name || ""}
                      loading="lazy"
                    />
                  ) : (
                    <iframe
                      className="document-preview-frame attachments-preview__frame"
                      title={previewTitle}
                      src={preview.url}
                      loading="lazy"
                      referrerPolicy="no-referrer"
                    />
                  )
                ) : (
                  <div className="attachments-preview__empty">
                    <div className="attachments-preview__empty-icon">PDF</div>
                    <p>
                      No es posible previsualizar este archivo en la aplicación.
                    </p>
                    <p>
                      Nombre: <strong>{preview.name}</strong>
                    </p>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

AttachmentsDialog.propTypes = {
  docTypes: PropTypes.array,
  value: PropTypes.object,
  onCancel: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onSave: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  saving: PropTypes.bool,
  routeContext: PropTypes.shape({
    dcmt: PropTypes.string,
  }),
  session: PropTypes.shape({
    folderId: PropTypes.string,
  }),
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsDialog.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #96
// Ruta relativa: src/shared/components/attachments/attachmentsDocTypes.js
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/shared/components/attachments/attachmentsDocTypes.js
// Extensión: .js
// Líneas aproximadas: 279
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"

function normalizeLabel(value) {
  return String(value || "")
    .normalize("NFD")
    .replaceAll(/\p{Diacritic}/gu, "")
    .toLowerCase()
    .trim();
}

import { normalizeAttachmentsInput } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { filterDocTypesByFormData } from "@/domain/forms/rules/documentStatus";
import {
  normalizeWorkflowFlag,
  resolveWorkflowFileTypeId,
  firstNonEmptyWorkflowText,
} from "@/shared/utils/workflowFileTypes";

export function isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(attachment = {}) {
  return Boolean(
    attachment?.generatedBySignature ||
    attachment?.origin === "signature" ||
    attachment?.source === "signature" ||
    attachment?.sourceType === "signature" ||
    attachment?.workflowGenerated === true,
  );
}

export function resolveWorkflowSignatureTemplateDocumentId(docType = {}) {
  const label = normalizeLabel(
    [docType?.fileTypeName, docType?.label, docType?.name]
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join(" "),
  );

  if (!label) return null;
  if (label.includes("solicitud")) return "solicitud";
  if (label.includes("convenio")) return "convenio";
  if (
    label.includes("proteccion") ||
    label.includes("tratamiento de datos") ||
    label.includes("datos personales") ||
    label.includes("declaracion")
  ) {
    return "declaracion";
  }
  return null;
}

export function resolveWorkflowSignatureFileName(
  docType = {},
  documentId = null,
) {
  const base = String(
    docType?.fileTypeName ||
      docType?.label ||
      docType?.name ||
      documentId ||
      "documento",
  ).trim();
  return `${base || "documento"}.pdf`;
}

export function needsWorkflowSignatureAttachmentGeneration(
  attachment = {},
  docType = {},
) {
  const requiresSignature = normalizeWorkflowFlag(
    docType?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature,
  );
  if (!requiresSignature) return false;
  if (!attachment) return true;
  if (attachment?.url || attachment?.data) return false;
  if (attachment?.file && isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(attachment))
    return false;
  return true;
}

export function isPersistedRemoteFile(remoteFile = {}) {
  const fileId = String(remoteFile?.fileId || remoteFile?.FileId || "").trim();
  const path = String(
    remoteFile?.path ||
      remoteFile?.Path ||
      remoteFile?.url ||
      remoteFile?.Url ||
      "",
  ).trim();
  return Boolean(fileId || path);
}

export function isResolvablePreviewUrl(value = "") {
  const raw = String(value || "").trim();
  if (!raw) return false;
  if (raw.startsWith("server://workflow-file")) return false;
  return (
    raw.startsWith("http://") ||
    raw.startsWith("https://") ||
    raw.startsWith("blob:") ||
    raw.startsWith("data:") ||
    raw.startsWith("/")
  );
}

export function isWorkflowDocumentFilePresent(docType = {}, remoteFiles = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(remoteFiles) || remoteFiles.length === 0) return false;

  const workflowFileTypeId = resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(docType, {
    allowIdFallback: true,
  });

  return remoteFiles.some((remoteFile) => {
    if (!isPersistedRemoteFile(remoteFile)) return false;
    const remoteFileTypeId = firstNonEmptyWorkflowText(
      remoteFile?.fileTypeId,
      remoteFile?.FileTypeId,
      remoteFile?.fileType,
      remoteFile?.fileTypeName,
    );
    if (workflowFileTypeId && remoteFileTypeId === workflowFileTypeId)
      return true;
    return false;
  });
}

export function shouldDisplayAttachmentDocType(
  docType = {},
  attachment = null,
  remoteFiles = [],
) {
  if (!docType?.id) return false;
  const requiresSignature = normalizeWorkflowFlag(
    docType?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature,
  );
  if (requiresSignature) return true;
  if (attachment?.file) return true;
  return isWorkflowDocumentFilePresent(docType, remoteFiles);
}

export function isWorkflowAttachmentVisible(
  docType = {},
  attachment = null,
  remoteFiles = [],
) {
  return shouldDisplayAttachmentDocType(docType, attachment, remoteFiles);
}

function normalizeDocTypesList(docTypes = []) {
  if (!Array.isArray(docTypes)) return [];
  return docTypes.filter((docType) => docType?.id);
}

function getDynamicDocTypesSafe(formData, getDynamicDocTypes) {
  try {
    return getDynamicDocTypes(formData || {});
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

function mergeAndDedupeDocTypes(...lists) {
  const dedupedById = new Map();

  lists.forEach((list) => {
    normalizeDocTypesList(list).forEach((docType) => {
      if (!dedupedById.has(docType.id)) {
        dedupedById.set(docType.id, docType);
      }
    });
  });

  return Array.from(dedupedById.values());
}

export function buildWorkflowAwareDocTypes({
  staticDocTypes = [],
  workflowDocTypes = [],
  formData = null,
  getDynamicDocTypes,
} = {}) {
  const normalizedWorkflowDocTypes = normalizeDocTypesList(workflowDocTypes);
  if (normalizedWorkflowDocTypes.length === 0) {
    return filterDocTypesByFormData(
      mergeAndDedupeDocTypes(
        staticDocTypes,
        getDynamicDocTypesSafe(formData, getDynamicDocTypes),
      ),
      formData,
    );
  }
  const resolved = normalizedWorkflowDocTypes.map((workflowDocType) => {
    return {
      ...workflowDocType,
      workflowFileTypeId:
        resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(workflowDocType, { allowIdFallback: true }) ||
        workflowDocType.id,
    };
  });
  return filterDocTypesByFormData(resolved, formData);
}

export function canonicalizeAttachmentsByDocTypes(attachments = {}) {
  return normalizeAttachmentsInput(attachments);
}

export function sanitizeAttachmentsForDocTypes(
  attachments = {},
  docTypes = [],
  options = {},
) {
  const {
    requiredOnly = false,
    excludeRequiresSignature = false,
    excludeAutoGenerated = false,
  } = options || {};

  const normalizedAttachments = normalizeAttachmentsInput(attachments);
  if (!Array.isArray(docTypes) || docTypes.length === 0)
    return normalizedAttachments;

  const docTypesById = new Map(
    docTypes
      .filter((docType) => docType?.id)
      .flatMap((docType) => {
        const idKey = String(docType.id).trim();
        const workflowKey = String(
          docType?.workflowFileTypeId ||
            docType?.workflowMeta?.fileTypeId ||
            "",
        ).trim();

        if (!workflowKey || workflowKey === idKey) return [[idKey, docType]];
        return [
          [idKey, docType],
          [workflowKey, docType],
        ];
      }),
  );

  const sanitizedAttachments = {};
  Object.entries(normalizedAttachments).forEach(
    ([attachmentId, attachment]) => {
      const docType = docTypesById.get(String(attachmentId).trim());
      const requiresSignature = normalizeWorkflowFlag(
        docType?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature,
      );
      const normalizedRule = String(docType?.rule || "").toLowerCase();
      const isConditionallyRequiredDocType =
        normalizedRule.startsWith("conditional:");
      const isRequiredDocType =
        normalizedRule === "required" || isConditionallyRequiredDocType;
      const isAutoGenerated = Boolean(
        attachment && isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(attachment),
      );

      if (requiredOnly && !isRequiredDocType) {
        return;
      }

      if (excludeRequiresSignature && requiresSignature) {
        return;
      }

      if (excludeAutoGenerated && isAutoGenerated) {
        return;
      }

      if (
        requiresSignature &&
        attachment?.file &&
        !isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(attachment)
      ) {
        return;
      }

      sanitizedAttachments[attachmentId] = attachment;
    },
  );

  return sanitizedAttachments;
}


// ========================== FIN DE src/shared/components/attachments/attachmentsDocTypes.js ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #97
// Ruta relativa: src/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsModule.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsModule.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 493
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from "react-redux";
import { useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
import { FieldBase } from "@/shared/components/fields/FieldsRuntimeModule.jsx";
import { getDynamicDocTypes } from "@/domain/forms/rules/documentStatus";
import { logger } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { saveAttachmentsDraft } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowTransport";
import {
  getExternalFlowContext,
  fetchWorkflowExecutionByIdRequest,
} from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowCrud";
import { uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch } from "@/store/slices/requestSlice";
import {
  buildWorkflowAwareDocTypes,
  buildWorkflowUploadEntries,
  canonicalizeAttachmentsByDocTypes,
  createLinkedMemberDocTypes,
  syncWorkflowEditStateAfterUpload,
  normalizeAttachmentsInput,
  getOrGenerateWorkflowSignatureAttachment,
  yieldToBrowser,
} from "./attachmentsWorkflowHelpers";
import { AttachmentsDialog } from "./AttachmentsDialog";
import { hasGeneratedAttachment } from "./attachmentsCache";
import {
  isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment,
  isPersistedRemoteFile,
} from "./attachmentsDocTypes";

export { AttachmentsDialog };

export function AttachmentsField({
  field,
  value = {},
  error,
  onChange,
  formData = {},
  formType = null,
  required,
  fieldPath,
  hint,
  status,
}) {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const location = useLocation();
  const routeContext = useMemo(
    () => getExternalFlowContext(location),
    [location],
  );
  const { session } = useSelector((state) => state.auth);
  const {
    workflowDocTypes,
    workflowDocumentFiles,
    loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch,
  } = useSelector((state) => state.request);
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const pregenInFlightRef = useRef(new Set());

  const docTypes = useMemo(
    () =>
      buildWorkflowAwareDocTypes({
        staticDocTypes: field.docTypes || [],
        workflowDocTypes,
        formData,
        getDynamicDocTypes,
      }),
    [field.docTypes, formData, workflowDocTypes],
  );

  const uploaded = useMemo(
    () => canonicalizeAttachmentsByDocTypes(value || {}, docTypes),
    [docTypes, value],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;

    const normalizeFileTypeKey = (v) => String(v || "").trim();
    const resolveWorkflowFileTypeId = (dt = {}) =>
      normalizeFileTypeKey(
        dt?.workflowFileTypeId || dt?.workflowMeta?.fileTypeId || dt?.id,
      );

    async function preGenerateSignatureAttachments() {
      if (!Array.isArray(docTypes) || docTypes.length === 0) return;

      const cacheKey = String(
        routeContext?.dcmt ||
          (formData && (formData.id || formData.documentId)) ||
          formType ||
          "__attachments__",
      );

      const persistedByTypeId = new Set(
        (workflowDocumentFiles || [])
          .filter((file) => isPersistedRemoteFile(file))
          .map((file) =>
            normalizeFileTypeKey(
              file?.fileTypeId ||
                file?.FileTypeId ||
                file?.fileType ||
                file?.id,
            ),
          )
          .filter(Boolean),
      );

      const signableDocTypes = docTypes.filter((dt) =>
        Boolean(dt?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature),
      );

      for (const dt of signableDocTypes) {
        if (cancelled) break;
        const workflowFileTypeId = resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(dt);
        if (!workflowFileTypeId) continue;
        if (persistedByTypeId.has(workflowFileTypeId)) continue;

        const localAttachment =
          uploaded?.[dt.id] || uploaded?.[workflowFileTypeId];
        const hasManualLocal = Boolean(
          localAttachment?.file instanceof File &&
          !isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(localAttachment),
        );
        if (hasManualLocal) continue;

        const pregenKey = `${cacheKey}|${dt.id}`;
        if (pregenInFlightRef.current.has(pregenKey)) continue;
        if (hasGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, dt.id)) continue;

        pregenInFlightRef.current.add(pregenKey);
        try {
          await yieldToBrowser();
          await getOrGenerateWorkflowSignatureAttachment({
            cacheKey,
            docType: dt,
            formData,
            formType,
          });
          } catch {
            // Error during pre-generation, silently ignore
          } finally {
          pregenInFlightRef.current.delete(pregenKey);
        }
      }
    }

    void preGenerateSignatureAttachments();
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [
    docTypes,
    formData,
    formType,
    routeContext?.dcmt,
    uploaded,
    workflowDocumentFiles,
  ]);

  const handleSave = async (next) => {
    const normalizedEntries = Object.entries(
      canonicalizeAttachmentsByDocTypes(next, docTypes),
    );
    const uploadedAttachments = {};
    const uploadEntries = buildWorkflowUploadEntries({
      attachments: next,
      docTypes,
      routeContext,
      session,
    });

    let uploadResults = [];
    if (uploadEntries.length > 0) {
      const action = dispatch(
        uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch({
          uploads: uploadEntries.map((entry) => entry.payload),
          refreshPayload: {
            exec: routeContext.exec,
            wrk: routeContext.wrk,
            dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
            documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
            folderId: session?.folderId,
            token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
          },
        }),
      );
      const batchResult =
        action && typeof action.unwrap === "function"
          ? await action.unwrap()
          : await action;
      uploadResults = Array.isArray(batchResult?.data) ? batchResult.data : [];
    }

    if (routeContext?.wrk) {
      await syncWorkflowEditStateAfterUpload({
        routeContext,
        session,
      }).catch((error) => {
        logger.error(
          "Error synchronizing workflow edit state after attachment save",
          error,
        );
      });
    }

    for (const [docTypeId, attachment] of normalizedEntries) {
      const uploadIndex = uploadEntries.findIndex(
        (entry) => entry.localDocTypeId === docTypeId,
      );
      const uploadEntry = uploadIndex >= 0 ? uploadEntries[uploadIndex] : null;
      const uploadResult = uploadIndex >= 0 ? uploadResults[uploadIndex] : null;
      if (uploadEntry) {
        const savedFileId =
          String(
            uploadResult?.savedFileId ||
              uploadResult?.data?.savedFileId ||
              uploadResult?.data?.id ||
              uploadEntry.payload.fileId ||
              "",
          ).trim() || null;
        uploadedAttachments[docTypeId] = {
          name: attachment.name,
          type: attachment.type,
          size: attachment.size,
          fileTypeId: uploadEntry.workflowFileTypeId,
          fileId: savedFileId,
          savedFileId,
          url: `server://workflow-file/${uploadEntry.workflowFileTypeId}/${attachment.name}`,
          uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };
        if (uploadEntry.workflowFileTypeId !== docTypeId) {
          uploadedAttachments[uploadEntry.workflowFileTypeId] =
            uploadedAttachments[docTypeId];
        }
        continue;
      }
      uploadedAttachments[docTypeId] = attachment;
    }

    if (routeContext?.exec) {
      const execution = await fetchWorkflowExecutionByIdRequest(
        routeContext.exec,
      ).catch(() => null);
      const fileTypes =
        execution?.stepFileTypes || execution?.StepFileTypes || [];
      Object.keys(uploadedAttachments).forEach((key) => {
        const item = uploadedAttachments[key];
        if (!item || typeof item.url !== "string") return;
        const match = item.url.match(/^server:\/\/workflow-file\/(.+?)\/(.+)$/);
        if (!match) return;
        const fileTypeId = match[1];
        const name = match[2];
        const candidate = (fileTypes || []).find((ft) => {
          if (!ft) return false;
          if (
            ft.fileTypeId &&
            String(ft.fileTypeId) === String(fileTypeId) &&
            ft.path
          )
            return true;
          if (ft.name && String(ft.name) === String(name) && ft.path)
            return true;
          if (ft.path && String(ft.path).endsWith(name)) return true;
          if (ft.fileId && String(ft.fileId) === String(name)) return true;
          return false;
        });
        if (candidate?.path) item.url = candidate.path;
      });
    }

    saveAttachmentsDraft(uploadedAttachments);
    onChange(uploadedAttachments);
    setOpen(false);
  };

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={field.label}
      required={required}
      error={error}
      className="attachments-field attachment-field"
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
    >
      <div className="attachments-field__summary attachment-field__summary">
        <span className="attachment-field__count">
          {Object.keys(uploaded).length} documento(s) adjuntado(s)
        </span>
        <button
          type="button"
          className="btn btn--ghost btn--sm attachment-field__action"
          onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
        >
          Adjuntar / Ver
        </button>
      </div>

      {open && (
        <AttachmentsDialog
          docTypes={docTypes}
          value={uploaded}
          onCancel={() => setOpen(false)}
          onSave={handleSave}
          saving={loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch}
          routeContext={routeContext}
          session={session}
          formData={formData}
          formType={formType || formData?.formType || null}
        />
      )}
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

AttachmentsField.propTypes = {
  field: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  value: PropTypes.object,
  error: PropTypes.string,
  onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  required: PropTypes.bool,
  fieldPath: PropTypes.string,
  hint: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  status: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
};

export function LinkedMemberDocumentsField({
  index,
  currentAttachments = {},
  formType = null,
  onSave,
}) {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const location = useLocation();
  const routeContext = useMemo(
    () => getExternalFlowContext(location),
    [location],
  );
  const { session } = useSelector((state) => state.auth);
  const { loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch } = useSelector(
    (state) => state.request,
  );
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const docTypes = useMemo(() => createLinkedMemberDocTypes(index), [index]);

  const handleSave = async (next) => {
    const normalizedEntries = Object.entries(normalizeAttachmentsInput(next));
    const uploadedAttachments = {};
    const uploadEntries = buildWorkflowUploadEntries({
      attachments: next,
      docTypes,
      routeContext,
      session,
      options: { includeNonGeneratedSignables: true },
    });

    let uploadResults = [];
    if (uploadEntries.length > 0) {
      const action = dispatch(
        uploadWorkflowDocumentFilesBatch({
          uploads: uploadEntries.map((entry) => entry.payload),
          refreshPayload: {
            exec: routeContext.exec,
            wrk: routeContext.wrk,
            dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
            documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
            folderId: session?.folderId,
            token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
          },
        }),
      );
      const batchResult =
        action && typeof action.unwrap === "function"
          ? await action.unwrap()
          : await action;
      uploadResults = Array.isArray(batchResult?.data) ? batchResult.data : [];
    }

    if (routeContext?.wrk) {
      await syncWorkflowEditStateAfterUpload({
        routeContext,
        session,
      }).catch((error) => {
        logger.error(
          "Error synchronizing workflow edit state after member attachment save",
          error,
        );
      });
    }

    for (const [docTypeId, attachment] of normalizedEntries) {
      const uploadIndex = uploadEntries.findIndex(
        (entry) => entry.localDocTypeId === docTypeId,
      );
      const uploadEntry = uploadIndex >= 0 ? uploadEntries[uploadIndex] : null;
      const uploadResult = uploadIndex >= 0 ? uploadResults[uploadIndex] : null;
      if (uploadEntry) {
        const savedFileId =
          String(
            uploadResult?.savedFileId ||
              uploadResult?.data?.savedFileId ||
              uploadResult?.data?.id ||
              uploadEntry.payload.fileId ||
              "",
          ).trim() || null;
        uploadedAttachments[docTypeId] = {
          name: attachment.name,
          type: attachment.type,
          size: attachment.size,
          fileId: savedFileId,
          savedFileId,
          url: `server://workflow-file/${docTypeId}/${attachment.name}`,
          uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };
        continue;
      }

      uploadedAttachments[docTypeId] = attachment;
    }

    if (routeContext?.exec) {
      const execution = await fetchWorkflowExecutionByIdRequest(
        routeContext.exec,
      ).catch(() => null);
      const fileTypes =
        execution?.stepFileTypes || execution?.StepFileTypes || [];
      Object.keys(uploadedAttachments).forEach((key) => {
        const item = uploadedAttachments[key];
        if (!item || typeof item.url !== "string") return;
        const match = item.url.match(/^server:\/\/workflow-file\/(.+?)\/(.+)$/);
        if (!match) return;
        const fileTypeId = match[1];
        const name = match[2];
        const candidate = (fileTypes || []).find((ft) => {
          if (!ft) return false;
          if (
            ft.fileTypeId &&
            String(ft.fileTypeId) === String(fileTypeId) &&
            ft.path
          )
            return true;
          if (ft.name && String(ft.name) === String(name) && ft.path)
            return true;
          if (ft.path && String(ft.path).endsWith(name)) return true;
          if (ft.fileId && String(ft.fileId) === String(name)) return true;
          return false;
        });
        if (candidate?.path) item.url = candidate.path;
      });
    }

    saveAttachmentsDraft(uploadedAttachments);
    onSave(uploadedAttachments);
    setOpen(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="array-field__member-attachments array-editor__member-attachments">
      <button
        type="button"
        className="btn btn--ghost btn--sm array-editor__member-trigger"
        onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
      >
        Adjuntar documentos del miembro
      </button>

      {open ? (
        <AttachmentsDialog
          docTypes={docTypes}
          value={currentAttachments}
          onCancel={() => setOpen(false)}
          onSave={handleSave}
          saving={loadingUploadWorkflowFilesBatch}
          routeContext={routeContext}
          session={session}
          formData={null}
          formType={formType}
        />
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );
}

LinkedMemberDocumentsField.propTypes = {
  index: PropTypes.number.isRequired,
  currentAttachments: PropTypes.object,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  onSave: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsModule.jsx ==========================

import {
  fetchWorkflowByIdRequest,
  fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest,
  bindWorkflowFilesRequest,
  fetchWorkflowExecutionByIdRequest,
  buildWorkflowEditPayload,
  updateWorkflowExecutionRequest,
} from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowCrud";
import { fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesRequest } from "@/infrastructure/workflow/workflowDocumentOps";
import { buildDocumentSigningContext } from "@/domain/signing/signingUtils.js";
import {
  isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment,
  resolveWorkflowSignatureFileName,
  resolveWorkflowSignatureTemplateDocumentId,
  sanitizeAttachmentsForDocTypes,
} from "./attachmentsDocTypes";
import {
  getGeneratedAttachment,
  setGeneratedAttachment,
} from "./attachmentsCache";
import { normalizeAttachmentsInput } from "@/shared/utils/common";

  normalizeWorkflowFlag,
  resolveWorkflowFileTypeId,
} from "@/shared/utils/workflowFileTypes";

  buildWorkflowAwareDocTypes,
  canonicalizeAttachmentsByDocTypes,
  sanitizeAttachmentsForDocTypes,
} from "./attachmentsDocTypes";

export const EMPTY_DOC_TYPES = [];
export const EMPTY_ATTACHMENTS = {};

export function createLinkedMemberDocTypes(index) {
  return [
    {
      id: `escritura_linked_${index}`,
      label: "Copia de Escritura Pública (miembro)",
    },
    {
      id: `nombramiento_linked_${index}`,
      label: "Nombramiento representante (miembro)",
    },
  ];
}

export function yieldToBrowser() {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    if (
      typeof window !== "undefined" &&
      typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === "function"
    ) {
      window.requestAnimationFrame(() => resolve());
      return;
    }

    setTimeout(resolve, 0);
  });
}

const signatureAttachmentInFlight = new Map();

function buildSignatureAttachmentGenerationKey({
  cacheKey,
  docType,
  revisionId,
} = {}) {
  return [
    String(cacheKey || "__attachments__"),
    String(docType?.id || ""),
    String(revisionId || ""),
  ].join("|");
}

export async function getOrGenerateWorkflowSignatureAttachment({
  cacheKey,
  docType,
  formData,
  formType,
  revisionId,
} = {}) {
  const cached = getGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, docType?.id, { revisionId });
  if (cached) return cached;

  const generationKey = buildSignatureAttachmentGenerationKey({
    cacheKey,
    docType,
    revisionId,
  });
  if (signatureAttachmentInFlight.has(generationKey)) {
    return signatureAttachmentInFlight.get(generationKey);
  }

  const task = (async () => {
    const generated = await buildGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(
      docType,
      formData,
      formType,
    );
    setGeneratedAttachment(cacheKey, docType?.id, generated, { revisionId });
    return generated;
  })()
    .catch((error) => {
      throw error;
    })
    .finally(() => {
      signatureAttachmentInFlight.delete(generationKey);
    });

  signatureAttachmentInFlight.set(generationKey, task);
  return task;
}

// Re-export normalizeAttachmentsInput from shared util
export { normalizeAttachmentsInput };

function normalizeFileTypeKey(value) {
  return String(value || "").trim();
}

function isRequiredWorkflowFile(file = {}) {
  return normalizeWorkflowFlag(file?.isRequired);
}

export function resolveAttachmentFormType(formData) {
  return (
    (formData && (formData.formType || formData.type || formData._formType)) ||
    "natural"
  );
}

export function hasAllRequiredWorkflowAttachments({
  workflowFiles = [],
  workflowDocumentFiles = [],
  attachments = {},
} = {}) {
  if (!Array.isArray(workflowFiles) || workflowFiles.length === 0) return false;

  const normalizedAttachments = normalizeAttachmentsInput(attachments);
  const uploadedByFileTypeId = new Map(
    (workflowDocumentFiles || [])
      .filter(Boolean)
      .map((file) => [
        resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(file, { allowIdFallback: false }),
        file,
      ])
      .filter(([key]) => normalizeFileTypeKey(key)),
  );

  return workflowFiles.every((file) => {
    if (!isRequiredWorkflowFile(file)) return true;

    const fileTypeKey = normalizeFileTypeKey(
      resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(file, { allowIdFallback: false }),
    );
    if (!fileTypeKey) return false;

    const uploadedFile = uploadedByFileTypeId.get(fileTypeKey);
    const attachment = normalizedAttachments[fileTypeKey];
    return Boolean(uploadedFile || attachment);
  });
}

function base64ToUint8Array(base64 = "") {
  if (!base64 || typeof base64 !== "string") return null;
  if (typeof atob !== "function") return null;
  const binary = atob(base64);
  const bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < binary.length; i += 1) bytes[i] = binary.charCodeAt(i);
  return bytes;
}

export async function buildGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(
  docType,
  formData,
  formType,
) {
  const templateDocumentId = resolveWorkflowSignatureTemplateDocumentId(
    docType,
    formType,
  );
  if (!templateDocumentId) {
    throw new Error(
      `No se encontró plantilla PDF para ${docType?.fileTypeName || docType?.label || docType?.id || "este documento"}.`,
    );
  }

  const resolvedFormType =
    String(
      formType || resolveAttachmentFormType(formData) || "natural",
    ).trim() === "linked"
      ? "linked"
      : "natural";
  const signingContext = await buildDocumentSigningContext({
    formType: resolvedFormType,
    formData,
    documentEntry: { id: templateDocumentId, formType: resolvedFormType },
    includePdfBase64: true,
  });
  const pdfBytes =
    signingContext?.officialPdfBytes instanceof Uint8Array
      ? signingContext.officialPdfBytes
      : base64ToUint8Array(
          signingContext?.officialPdfBase64 || signingContext?.pdfBase64 || "",
        );
  if (!(pdfBytes instanceof Uint8Array) || pdfBytes.byteLength === 0) {
    throw new Error("No se pudo generar el archivo PDF en memoria.");
  }
  const generatedFileName = resolveWorkflowSignatureFileName(
    docType,
    templateDocumentId,
  );
  const generatedFile = new File([pdfBytes], generatedFileName, {
    type: "application/pdf",
  });

  const signaturePositions = Array.isArray(signingContext?.normalizedPositions)
    ? signingContext.normalizedPositions
    : Array.isArray(signingContext?.resolvedAnchors)
      ? signingContext.resolvedAnchors
      : [];
  const primarySignaturePosition =
    signingContext?.primaryPosition ||
    signingContext?.oneshotPositions?.[0] ||
    signaturePositions[0] ||
    null;

  return {
    name: generatedFile.name,
    type: generatedFile.type || "application/pdf",
    size: generatedFile.size || 0,
    file: generatedFile,
    origin: "signature",
    generatedBySignature: true,
    workflowGenerated: true,
    templateDocumentId,
    signaturePositions,
    primarySignaturePosition,
  };
}

export function buildWorkflowUploadEntries({
  attachments,
  docTypes,
  routeContext,
  session,
  options = {},
}) {
  const resolvePdfUploadName = (docType, attachment) => {
    const rawTypeName = String(
      docType?.fileTypeName ||
        docType?.workflowMeta?.fileTypeName ||
        docType?.label ||
        attachment?.name ||
        "documento",
    ).trim();
    const withoutExtension = rawTypeName.replace(/\.pdf$/i, "").trim();
    return `${withoutExtension || "documento"}.pdf`;
  };

  const { includeNonGeneratedSignables = false } = options || {};
  const sanitizedAttachments = sanitizeAttachmentsForDocTypes(
    attachments,
    docTypes,
  );

  return Object.entries(normalizeAttachmentsInput(sanitizedAttachments))
    .map(([docTypeId, attachment]) => {
      const docType = docTypes.find((item) => item.id === docTypeId);
      const workflowFileTypeId =
        resolveWorkflowFileTypeId(docType, { allowIdFallback: true }) ||
        docTypeId;
      const requiresSignature = normalizeWorkflowFlag(
        docType?.workflowMeta?.requiresSignature,
      );

      if (!attachment?.file || !routeContext?.dcmt || !workflowFileTypeId) {
        return null;
      }

      if (
        requiresSignature &&
        !includeNonGeneratedSignables &&
        !isGeneratedWorkflowAttachment(attachment)
      ) {
        return null;
      }

      return {
        localDocTypeId: docTypeId,
        workflowFileTypeId,
        payload: {
          exec: routeContext.exec,
          wrk: routeContext.wrk,
          dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
          documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
          folderId: session?.folderId,
          token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
          fileTypeId: workflowFileTypeId,
          name: resolvePdfUploadName(docType, attachment),
          description:
            docType?.fileTypeName ||
            docType?.workflowMeta?.fileTypeName ||
            docType?.label ||
            attachment.name,
          file: attachment.file,
        },
        attachment,
      };
    })
    .filter(Boolean);
}

export async function syncWorkflowEditStateAfterUpload({
  routeContext,
  session,
}) {
  if (!routeContext?.wrk) return null;

  const [
    workflowStatus,
    editableConfig,
    executionSnapshot,
    documentFilesSnapshot,
  ] = await Promise.all([
    fetchWorkflowByIdRequest(routeContext.wrk, {
      exec: routeContext.exec,
      wrk: routeContext.wrk,
      dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
      documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
      folderId: session?.folderId,
      token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
    }).catch(() => null),
    fetchWorkflowEditableConfigRequest(routeContext.wrk, {
      exec: routeContext.exec,
      wrk: routeContext.wrk,
      dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
      documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
      folderId: session?.folderId,
      token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
    }),
    routeContext?.exec
      ? fetchWorkflowExecutionByIdRequest(routeContext.exec, {
          exec: routeContext.exec,
          wrk: routeContext.wrk,
          dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
          documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
          folderId: session?.folderId,
          token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
        }).catch(() => null)
      : Promise.resolve(null),
    fetchWorkflowDocumentFilesRequest({
      exec: routeContext.exec,
      wrk: routeContext.wrk,
      dcmt: routeContext.dcmt,
      documentId: routeContext.dcmt,
      folderId: session?.folderId,
      token: session?.token || session?.accessToken || "",
    }).catch(() => null),
  ]);

  const editPayload = buildWorkflowEditPayload({
    workflowStatus,
    editableConfig,
    executionSnapshot,
    documentFilesSnapshot: Array.isArray(documentFilesSnapshot?.uploadedFiles)
      ? documentFilesSnapshot.uploadedFiles
      : [],
  });

  await updateWorkflowExecutionRequest(editPayload);
  await bindWorkflowFilesRequest(routeContext.wrk);
  return editPayload;
}

import React from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";

export default function OfficialPdfPageList({
  blobUrl,
  className = "",
  frameClassName = "",
  minHeight = "100%",
  title = "Vista previa oficial PDF",
}) {
  if (!blobUrl) return null;
  const viewerUrl = blobUrl.includes("#")
    ? blobUrl
    : `${blobUrl}#view=FitH&zoom=page-width`;
  return (
    <div
      className={`relative w-full h-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 flex flex-col ${className}`}
    >
      <iframe
        title={title}
        className={`block w-full h-full flex-1 ${frameClassName}`}
        src={viewerUrl}
        loading="lazy"
        referrerPolicy="no-referrer"
        style={{ border: 0, background: "#f8fafc", minHeight }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

OfficialPdfPageList.propTypes = {
  blobUrl: PropTypes.string,
  className: PropTypes.string,
  frameClassName: PropTypes.string,
  minHeight: PropTypes.string,
  title: PropTypes.string,
};

import React from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import OfficialPdfPageList from './OfficialPdfPageList';

function StateOverlay({ label }) {
  return (
    <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/45 backdrop-blur-[1px]">
      <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/95 px-4 py-3 text-center shadow-md">
        <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700">{label}</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

StateOverlay.propTypes = {
  label: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
};

export default function OfficialPdfPreviewPanel({
  state = 'idle',
  error = '',
  stale = false,
  blobUrl = '',
  onRefresh,
}) {
  return (
    <section className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2.5 shadow-sm">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
        <div className="min-w-0">
          <p className="text-[0.68rem] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-500">Vista oficial</p>
          <h3 className="truncate text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900">Preview PDF</h3>
        </div>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={onRefresh}
          className="rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 shadow-sm"
        >
          Actualizar documento
        </button>
      </div>

      {state === 'error' ? (
        <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 p-3 text-xs text-rose-800">
          {error || 'No fue posible generar el preview oficial.'}
        </div>
      ) : null}

      {stale ? (
        <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 p-2 text-xs text-amber-900">
          Vista oficial desactualizada. Presiona “Actualizar documento”.
        </div>
      ) : null}

      <div className="relative">
        <OfficialPdfPageList blobUrl={blobUrl} />
        {state === 'syncing' ? <StateOverlay label="Generando PDF oficial..." /> : null}
        {!blobUrl && state !== 'error' && state !== 'syncing' ? (
          <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-3 text-xs text-slate-600">
            El preview oficial aún no está disponible.
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

OfficialPdfPreviewPanel.propTypes = {
  state: PropTypes.oneOf(['idle', 'dirty', 'syncing', 'ready', 'error', 'stale']),
  error: PropTypes.string,
  stale: PropTypes.bool,
  blobUrl: PropTypes.string,
  onRefresh: PropTypes.func,
};

import React from "react";
