export default function QuickHtmlPreviewPane({
  title,
  blobUrl,
  loading = false,
  error = "",
  minHeight = "min(58dvh, 42rem)",
}) {
  return (
    <div
      className="relative mt-2 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-[#d9d9d9]"
      style={{ minHeight }}
    >
      <div
        className="h-full overflow-auto [scrollbar-width:thin]"
        style={{ WebkitOverflowScrolling: "touch" }}
      >
        {blobUrl ? (
          <iframe
            title={title}
            className="block w-full"
            src={blobUrl}
            loading="lazy"
            referrerPolicy="no-referrer"
            style={{
              minHeight,
              border: 0,
              width: "100%",
              background: "#d9d9d9",
            }}
          />
        ) : null}
        {loading ? (
          <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/55 backdrop-blur-[1px]">
            <div className="flex min-h-[8rem] flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/95 p-3 text-center shadow-md">
              <div className="h-7 w-7 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-slate-200 border-t-slate-700" />
              <p className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-700">
                Actualizando vista previa...
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}
        {!loading && error && !blobUrl ? (
          <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/45 backdrop-blur-[1px]">
            <div className="max-w-[22rem] rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 bg-white/95 p-4 text-center shadow-lg">
              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-rose-700">
                No fue posible generar la vista previa
              </p>
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-600">{error}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

QuickHtmlPreviewPane.propTypes = {
  title: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  blobUrl: PropTypes.string,
  loading: PropTypes.bool,

};

import React, { memo, useCallback, useId, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { getValueByPath } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import {
  CheckboxField,
  DateField,
  MultiCheckboxField,
  RadioField,
  SelectField,
  TextareaField,
  TextField,
} from "./fields/standardFields.jsx";
import { AttachmentsField } from "@/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsModule.jsx";

function mergeClass(existing, added) {
  if (!existing) return added;
  return `${existing} ${added}`;
}

export function FieldBase({
  label,
  required,
  error,
  children,
  className,
  id,
  hint,
  status,
  fieldPath,
}) {
  const autoId = useId();
  const controlId = id || `field-${autoId}`;
  const hasHint = Boolean(hint);
  const hasError = Boolean(error);
  const hintId = `${controlId}-hint`;
  const errorId = `${controlId}-error`;
  const describedBy =
    [hasHint ? hintId : null, hasError ? errorId : null]
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join(" ") || undefined;
  const wrapperClass =
    `field field-shell ${error ? "field--error field-shell--error" : ""} ${className || ""}`.trim();

  const control = React.isValidElement(children)
    ? React.cloneElement(children, {
      className: mergeClass(children.props.className, "field__control"),
      "aria-invalid": !!error,
      "aria-describedby":
        [children.props["aria-describedby"], describedBy]
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join(" ") || undefined,
      id: children.props.id || controlId,
    })
    : children;

  return (
    <div className={wrapperClass} data-field-path={fieldPath}>
      {label ? (
        <div className="field-shell__header">
          <label
            className="field__label field-shell__label"
            htmlFor={controlId}
          >
            {label} {required && <span className="field__required">*</span>}
          </label>
          {status ? (
            <span className="field-shell__status">{status}</span>
          ) : null}
        </div>
      ) : null}

      {control}

      {hasError &&
        <span
          className={`field__error field-shell__error ${hasError ? "" : "field__error--empty"}`.trim()}
          id={errorId}
          aria-hidden={!hasError}
        >
          {hasError ? error : "\u00A0"}
        </span>
      }

      {hasHint &&
        <p
          className={`field__hint field-shell__hint ${hasHint ? "" : "field__hint--empty"}`.trim()}
          id={hintId}
          aria-hidden={!hasHint}
        >
          {hasHint ? hint : "\u00A0"}
        </p>
      }
    </div>
  );
}

FieldBase.displayName = "FieldBase";
FieldBase.propTypes = {
  label: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  required: PropTypes.bool,
  error: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  children: PropTypes.node,
  className: PropTypes.string,
  id: PropTypes.string,
  hint: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  status: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  fieldPath: PropTypes.string,
};

export function SignatureField({
  label,
  value,
  error,
  onChange,
  required,
  fieldPath,
  hint,
  status,
}) {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const canvasRef = useRef(null);
  const [isDrawing, setIsDrawing] = useState(false);

  const start = (event) => {
    const rect = canvasRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
    const ctx = canvasRef.current.getContext("2d");
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.lineCap = "round";
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(event.clientX - rect.left, event.clientY - rect.top);
    setIsDrawing(true);
  };

  const move = (event) => {
    if (!isDrawing) return;
    const rect = canvasRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
    const ctx = canvasRef.current.getContext("2d");
    ctx.lineTo(event.clientX - rect.left, event.clientY - rect.top);
    ctx.stroke();
  };

  const clear = () => {
    const ctx = canvasRef.current.getContext("2d");
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvasRef.current.width, canvasRef.current.height);
  };

  const save = () => {
    onChange(canvasRef.current.toDataURL("image/png"));
    setOpen(false);
  };

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={label}
      required={required}
      error={error}
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
      className="signature-capture"
    >
      <div className="signature-field__actions signature-capture__actions">
        <button
          type="button"
          className="btn btn--ghost btn--sm signature-capture__trigger"
          onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
        >
          Firmar
        </button>
        {value && (
          <small className="signature-field__ok signature-capture__status">
            Firma capturada
          </small>
        )}
      </div>

      {open && (
        <div className="modal-overlay">
          <div className="modal">
            <header className="modal__header">
              <h3>Firmar declaración</h3>
            </header>
            <div className="modal__body">
              <canvas
                ref={canvasRef}
                width={600}
                height={200}
                className="signature-field__canvas"
                onMouseDown={start}
                onMouseMove={move}
                onMouseUp={() => setIsDrawing(false)}
                onMouseLeave={() => setIsDrawing(false)}
              />
            </div>
            <footer className="modal__footer">
              <button type="button" className="btn btn--ghost" onClick={clear}>
                Limpiar
              </button>
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn btn--ghost"
                onClick={() => setOpen(false)}
              >
                Cancelar
              </button>
              <button type="button" className="btn btn--primary" onClick={save}>
                Guardar firma
              </button>
            </footer>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

SignatureField.propTypes = {
  label: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  value: PropTypes.any,
  error: PropTypes.string,
  onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  required: PropTypes.bool,
  fieldPath: PropTypes.string,
  hint: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  status: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
};

function InternalFieldRenderer({
  field,
  value,
  error,
  onChange,
  formData,
  formType,
  disabled = false,
  readOnly = false,
  fieldPath,
  hint,
  status,
}) {
  function computePlaceholder(f) {
    if (!f) return undefined;
    if (f.placeholder) return f.placeholder;
    if (f.example) return `Ej: ${f.example}`;
    const pattern = f.validation && f.validation.pattern;
    if (f.type === "date") {
      const mode =
        f.dateMode ||
        (f.validation && f.validation.pattern === "YEAR" ? "year" : "date");
      return mode === "year" ? "YYYY" : "DD/MM/AAAA";
    }
    if (pattern === "YEAR") return "YYYY";
    if (pattern === "NUMERIC" || f.inputType === "number") return "Ej: 10";
    if (f.mask) return f.mask;
    if (f.hint) return f.hint;
    return undefined;
  }

  const resolvedOptions = useMemo(() => {
    if (field?.type !== "select") return field?.options;
    if (!field?.dependsOn || !field?.optionsMap) return field?.options;

    const rawDependencyPath = String(field.dependsOn || "").trim();
    if (!rawDependencyPath) return field?.options;

    const parentPath =
      fieldPath && String(fieldPath).includes(".")
        ? String(fieldPath).split(".").slice(0, -1).join(".")
        : "";
    const dependencyPath = rawDependencyPath.startsWith("$root.")
      ? rawDependencyPath.slice(6)
      : parentPath
        ? `${parentPath}.${rawDependencyPath}`
        : rawDependencyPath;

    const dependencyValue = getValueByPath(formData || {}, dependencyPath);
    const scopedOptions = field.optionsMap?.[dependencyValue];
    return Array.isArray(scopedOptions) ? scopedOptions : field.options;
  }, [field, fieldPath, formData]);

  const resolvedPlaceholder = computePlaceholder(field);

  const commonProps = {
    field,
    value,
    error,
    onChange,
    formData,
    formType,
    disabled,
    readOnly,
    required: !!field?.validation?.required,
    label: field?.label,
    fieldPath,
    hint: hint || field?.hint || field?.description,
    status,
  };

  switch (field.type) {
    case "radio":
      return <RadioField {...commonProps} options={field.options} />;
    case "checkbox":
      return <CheckboxField {...commonProps} checked={Boolean(value)} />;
    case "textarea":
      return (
        <TextareaField {...commonProps} placeholder={resolvedPlaceholder} />
      );
    case "date":
      return <DateField {...commonProps} placeholder={resolvedPlaceholder} />;
    case "select":
      return (
        <SelectField
          {...commonProps}
          options={resolvedOptions}
          placeholder={resolvedPlaceholder}
        />
      );
    case "multi-checkbox":
    case "multiCheckbox":
      return <MultiCheckboxField {...commonProps} options={field.options} />;
    case "attachments":
      return <AttachmentsField {...commonProps} />;
    case "signature":
      return <SignatureField {...commonProps} />;
    default:
      if (
        field.inputType === "date" ||
        field.inputType === "datetime-local" ||
        field.inputType === "time"
      ) {
        return <DateField {...commonProps} />;
      }
      return (
        <TextField
          {...commonProps}
          placeholder={resolvedPlaceholder}
          type={field.inputType || "text"}
        />
      );
  }
}

export const FieldRenderer = memo(InternalFieldRenderer);
FieldRenderer.displayName = "FieldRenderer";
FieldRenderer.propTypes = {
  field: PropTypes.shape({
    type: PropTypes.string,
    name: PropTypes.string,
    label: PropTypes.string,
    options: PropTypes.array,
    placeholder: PropTypes.string,
    inputType: PropTypes.string,
    validation: PropTypes.object,
  }).isRequired,
  value: PropTypes.any,
  error: PropTypes.string,
  onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  disabled: PropTypes.bool,
  readOnly: PropTypes.bool,
  fieldPath: PropTypes.string,
  hint: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
  status: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]),
};

function InternalArrayField({
  label,
  items = [],
  fields,
  errors = {},
  basePath = "",
  formData,
  formType,
  onChange,
  onAdd,
  onRemove,
  canAdd = true,
  canRemove = true,
  extraContentByIndex,
  lockedFieldPaths,
  minItems = 0,
}) {
  const effectiveMin = Math.max(0, Number(minItems) || 0);
  const actualCount = Array.isArray(items) ? items.length : 0;
  const displayItems =
    actualCount >= effectiveMin
      ? items
      : [
          ...items,
          ...Array.from({ length: effectiveMin - actualCount }).map(() => ({})),
        ];
  const recordsLabel =
    displayItems.length === 1
      ? "1 registro"
      : `${displayItems.length} registros`;
  const handleAddItem = useCallback(() => onAdd?.(), [onAdd]);
  const handleRemoveItem = useCallback(
    (index) => onRemove?.(index),
    [onRemove],
  );

  const handleItemChange = useCallback(
    (index, name, value) => {
      // If editing a padded (virtual) item, create real items up to that index first
      if (index >= actualCount) {
        if (!onAdd) {
          // cannot create new items, ignore
          return;
        }
        for (let i = actualCount; i <= index; i += 1) {
          onAdd();
        }
      }
      onChange(index, name, value);
    },
    [actualCount, onAdd, onChange],
  );

  return (
    <div className="array-field array-editor">
      <div className="array-field__header array-editor__header">
        <div className="array-field__heading array-editor__heading">
          <h4 className="array-field__title array-editor__title">{label}</h4>
          <p className="array-field__caption array-editor__caption">
            Gestiona {recordsLabel} sin salir del flujo principal.
          </p>
        </div>
        {canAdd && (
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn--ghost btn--sm array-field__add-btn array-editor__add"
            onClick={handleAddItem}
            aria-label={`Agregar ${label}`}
          >
            + Agregar
          </button>
        )}
      </div>

      <div className="array-field__items array-editor__items">
        {displayItems.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="array-field__empty array-editor__empty">
            Aun no hay registros cargados. Agrega el primero para continuar.
          </div>
        ) : null}
        {displayItems.map((item, index) => (
          <div
            key={`${label}-${index}`}
            className="array-field__item array-editor__item"
          >
            <div className="array-field__item-header array-editor__item-header">
              <span className="array-field__item-index array-editor__item-index">
                Registro {index + 1}
              </span>
              {canRemove &&
                index < actualCount &&
                actualCount > Math.max(1, effectiveMin) && (
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    className="btn btn--ghost btn--sm array-field__remove-btn array-editor__remove"
                    onClick={() => handleRemoveItem(index)}
                    aria-label={`Eliminar registro ${index + 1}`}
                  >
                    ✕
                  </button>
                )}
            </div>
            <div className="array-field__grid array-editor__grid grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
              {fields.map((field) => {
                const itemPath = `${basePath}.${index}.${field.name}`;
                const isLocked = Boolean(lockedFieldPaths?.has(itemPath));
                return (
                  <FieldRenderer
                    key={field.name}
                    field={field}
                    value={item[field.name]}
                    error={errors[itemPath]}
                    onChange={(nextValue) => {
                      if (!isLocked)
                        handleItemChange(index, field.name, nextValue);
                    }}
                    formData={formData}
                    formType={formType}
                    fieldPath={itemPath}
                    disabled={isLocked}
                    readOnly={isLocked}
                  />
                );
              })}
              {typeof extraContentByIndex === "function"
                ? extraContentByIndex(index, item)
                : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export const ArrayField = memo(InternalArrayField);
ArrayField.displayName = "ArrayField";
ArrayField.propTypes = {
  label: PropTypes.string,
  items: PropTypes.array,
  fields: PropTypes.array.isRequired,
  errors: PropTypes.object,
  basePath: PropTypes.string,
  formData: PropTypes.object,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onAdd: PropTypes.func,
  onRemove: PropTypes.func,
  canAdd: PropTypes.bool,
  canRemove: PropTypes.bool,
  minItems: PropTypes.number,
  extraContentByIndex: PropTypes.func,
  lockedFieldPaths: PropTypes.instanceOf(Set),
};

export default {
  FieldBase,
  SignatureField,
  FieldRenderer,
  ArrayField,
};

// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 97
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { getDocumentDisplayLabel } from "@/domain/documents/documentModule";
import { getOfficialPdfPreview } from "@/core/document/services/pdfPreviewService";
import OfficialPdfPreviewPanel from "@/shared/components/document-preview/OfficialPdfPreviewPanel";

/**
 * DocumentPreview — Muestra la vista previa oficial en PDF en lugar de HTML.
 * Usa `getOfficialPdfPreview` para obtener un `blobUrl` y renderizarlo
 * con `OfficialPdfPreviewPanel`. Permite forzar la regeneración desde UI.
 */
function DocumentPreview({ formType, data, documentId }) {
  const [state, setState] = useState("idle");
  const [blobUrl, setBlobUrl] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState("");
  const [stale, setStale] = useState(false);

  const templateLabel = useMemo(
    () => getDocumentDisplayLabel(documentId, formType),
    [documentId, formType],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;
    async function loadPreview(force = false) {
      setError("");
      setState("syncing");
      try {
        const res = await getOfficialPdfPreview({
          documentId,
          formType,
          formData: data,
          force: Boolean(force),
        });
        if (cancelled) return;
        setBlobUrl(res?.blobUrl || "");
        setStale(false);
        setState("ready");
      } catch (e) {
        if (cancelled) return;
        setError(e?.message || "No fue posible generar el preview PDF.");
        setState("error");
      }
    }

    // Debounce small interactions
    const id = setTimeout(() => loadPreview(false), 180);
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
      clearTimeout(id);
    };
  }, [formType, data, documentId]);

  async function handleRefresh() {
    setStale(false);
    setState("syncing");
    try {
      const res = await getOfficialPdfPreview({
        documentId,
        formType,
        formData: data,
        force: true,
      });
      setBlobUrl(res?.blobUrl || "");
      setState("ready");
    } catch (e) {
      setError(e?.message || "No fue posible regenerar el preview PDF.");
      setState("error");
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="pdf-preview">
      <div className="pdf-preview__loading">
        <strong>Plantilla:</strong> {templateLabel}
      </div>
      <div className="pdf-preview__frame-wrapper">
        <OfficialPdfPreviewPanel
          state={state}
          error={error}
          stale={stale}
          blobUrl={blobUrl}
          onRefresh={handleRefresh}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

DocumentPreview.propTypes = {
  formType: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  data: PropTypes.object,
  documentId: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
};

export default DocumentPreview;


// ========================== FIN DE src/shared/components/preview/DocumentPreview.jsx ==========================

import { mergeFieldTemplate } from "../../utils/templateSchemaUtils";

const withOptionalConfig = (baseField, fieldConfig = {}) => ({
  ...mergeFieldTemplate(baseField, fieldConfig || {}),
});

export const maritalStatusOptions = [
  { value: "Soltero", label: "Soltero" },
  { value: "Casado", label: "Casado" },
  { value: "Divorciado", label: "Divorciado" },
  { value: "Viudo", label: "Viudo" },
  { value: "Union libre", label: "Union libre" },
];

export const text = (
  name,
  label,
  placeholder = "",
  validation = {},
  fieldConfig = {},
) =>
  withOptionalConfig(
    { type: "text", name, label, placeholder, validation },
    fieldConfig,
  );

export const textarea = (
  name,
  label,
  placeholder = "",
  validation = {},
  fieldConfig = {},
) =>
  withOptionalConfig(
    { type: "textarea", name, label, placeholder, validation },
    fieldConfig,
  );

export const date = (
  name,
  label,
  placeholder = "",
  validation = {},
  fieldConfig = {},
) =>
  withOptionalConfig(
    { type: "date", name, label, placeholder, validation },
    fieldConfig,
  );

export const attachments = (
  name,
  label,
  docTypes = [],
  validation = {},
  fieldConfig = {},
) =>
  withOptionalConfig(
    { type: "attachments", name, label, docTypes, validation },
    fieldConfig,
  );
export const naturalPersonDocTypes = [
  {
    id: "solicitud",
    label: "Solicitud de Crédito normal firmada",
    rule: "required",
  },
  { id: "convenio", label: "Convenio de Crédito firmado", rule: "required" },
  { id: "ruc", label: "Copia de R.U.C. actualizado", rule: "required" },
  {
    id: "cedula_deudor",
    label: "Copia a color de cédula del deudor",
    rule: "required",
  },
  {
    id: "cedula_conyuge_deudor",
    label: "Copia a color de cédula del cónyuge del deudor",
    rule: "conditional:spouse",

  },
];

// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #106
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/section/FormSection.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/section/FormSection.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 530
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, { memo, useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { getValueByPath, isVisible } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { LinkedMemberDocumentsField } from "@/shared/components/attachments/AttachmentsModule.jsx";
import { ArrayField } from "@/shared/components/fields/FieldsRuntimeModule.jsx";
import SectionFieldsRenderer from "./SectionFieldsRenderer.jsx";
import { countErrorsBySection } from "../../runtime/formsWorkflowModule";
import { shouldRenderTemplatedField } from "@/domain/forms/utils/templateSchemaUtils";

const EMPTY_ERRORS = {};

function computeSectionErrors(
  section,
  formData,
  errors = {},
  sectionData,
  showHiddenSections = false,
) {
  for (const field of section.fields) {
    if (
      !shouldRenderTemplatedField(field, formData, section.path, showHiddenSections)
    )
      continue;
    if (
      field.visibleWhen &&
      !showHiddenSections &&
      !isVisible(field.visibleWhen, formData, section.path)
    )
      continue;

    const fieldPath = section.path
      ? `${section.path}.${field.name}`
      : field.name;
    if (field.type === "array") {
      const items = sectionData?.[field.name] || [];
      for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i += 1) {
        for (const subField of field.fields || []) {
          const basePath = `${section.path ? `${section.path}.` : ""}${field.name}.${i}`;
          if (
            !shouldRenderTemplatedField(
              subField,
              formData,
              basePath,
              showHiddenSections,
            ) ||
            (subField.visibleWhen &&
              !showHiddenSections &&
              !isVisible(subField.visibleWhen, formData, basePath))
          )
            continue;

          const subPath = `${fieldPath}.${i}.${subField.name}`;
          if (errors[subPath]) return true;
          if (subField.validation?.required) {
            const val = items[i][subField.name];
            if (val === undefined || val === null || val === "") return true;
          }
        }
      }
    } else {
      if (errors[fieldPath]) return true;
      if (field.validation?.required) {
        const val = sectionData?.[field.name];
        if (val === undefined || val === null || val === "") return true;
      }
    }
  }

  return false;
}

function computeSectionMeta(section, errorsCount, initialHasData) {
  const visibleFields = Array.isArray(section?.fields)
    ? section.fields.length
    : 0;
  if (errorsCount > 0) {
    return {
      status: "Requiere corrección",
      summary: `${errorsCount} pendiente(s) detectados`,
      visibleFields,
    };
  }

  if (initialHasData) {
    return {
      status: "Lista para continuar",
      summary: `${visibleFields} campo(s) visibles en esta sección`,
      visibleFields,
    };
  }
  return {
    status: "Pendiente",
    summary: `${visibleFields} campo(s) por completar`,
    visibleFields,
  };
}

function SectionStatus({ sectionMeta, hasData, errorsCount }) {
  return (
    <div className="credit-section__title-wrapper section-card__title-wrap">
      <div>
        <h3 className="credit-section__title section-card__title">
          {sectionMeta.title}
        </h3>
        <div className="section-card__meta">
          <span
            className={`credit-section__badge section-card__status ${errorsCount > 0 ? "credit-section__errors-badge" : hasData ? "credit-section__badge--info" : ""}`}
          >
            {sectionMeta.status}
          </span>
          <span className="section-card__meta-copy">{sectionMeta.summary}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      {hasData && (
        <span className="credit-section__badge" title="Sección con datos">
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none">
            <path
              d="M2 6L5 9L10 3"
              stroke="currentColor"
              strokeWidth="2"
              strokeLinecap="round"
              strokeLinejoin="round"
            />
          </svg>
        </span>
      )}
      {errorsCount > 0 && (
        <span
          className="credit-section__badge credit-section__errors-badge section-card__errors"
          title={`${errorsCount} error(es)`}
        >
          {errorsCount}
        </span>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

SectionStatus.propTypes = {
  sectionMeta: PropTypes.shape({
    title: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
    status: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
    summary: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  }).isRequired,
  hasData: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  errorsCount: PropTypes.number.isRequired,
};

function SectionCard({
  section,
  isExpanded,
  setIsExpanded,
  hasData,
  sectionHasErrors,
  errorsCount,
  sectionMeta,
  children,
}) {
  const sectionStateClass = sectionHasErrors
    ? "credit-section--incomplete section-card--incomplete"
    : hasData
      ? "credit-section--complete section-card--complete credit-section--has-data section-card--has-data"
      : "";

  const toggleSection = (event) => {
    // Ignore programmatic clicks (e.g. element.click() from scripts) to avoid
    // unexpected expands when other code jumps to fields. Only allow trusted
    // user events to toggle the section.
    if (event) {
      // Prevent default browser behaviour for real events
      try {
        if (event.preventDefault) event.preventDefault();
      } catch {
        // ignore errors from preventDefault in some environments
      }
      // If the native event exists and it's not trusted, bail out.
      if (event.nativeEvent && event.nativeEvent.isTrusted === false) return;
    }
    setIsExpanded((prev) => !prev);
  };

  return (
    <section
      className={`credit-section section-card ${isExpanded ? "credit-section--expanded section-card--expanded" : "credit-section--collapsed"} ${sectionStateClass}`}
    >
      <header
        className="credit-section__header section-card__header"
        onClick={toggleSection}
        role="button"
        tabIndex={0}
        onKeyDown={(event) => {
          if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
            event.preventDefault();
            toggleSection(event);
          }
        }}
      >
        <SectionStatus
          sectionMeta={{ ...sectionMeta, title: section.title }}
          hasData={hasData}
          errorsCount={errorsCount}
        />

        <button
          className="credit-section__toggle"
          aria-label={isExpanded ? "Colapsar sección" : "Expandir sección"}
          type="button"
          onClick={(event) => {
            event.stopPropagation();
            toggleSection(event);
          }}
          aria-expanded={isExpanded}
        >
          <svg
            className={`credit-section__icon section-card__icon ${isExpanded ? "credit-section__icon--expanded section-card__icon--expanded" : ""}`}
            width="20"
            height="20"
            viewBox="0 0 20 20"
            fill="none"
            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          >
            <path
              d="M5 7.5L10 12.5L15 7.5"
              stroke="currentColor"
              strokeWidth="2"
              strokeLinecap="round"
              strokeLinejoin="round"
            />
          </svg>
        </button>
      </header>

      {section.description ? (
        <p className="credit-section__description section-card__description">
          {section.description}
        </p>
      ) : null}

      <div
        className={`credit-section__body section-card__body ${isExpanded ? "credit-section__body--visible section-card__body--visible" : "credit-section__body--hidden section-card__body--hidden"}`}
      >
        {children}
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

SectionCard.propTypes = {
  section: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  isExpanded: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  setIsExpanded: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  hasData: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  sectionHasErrors: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  errorsCount: PropTypes.number.isRequired,
  sectionMeta: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  children: PropTypes.node.isRequired,
};

function SectionArrayRenderer({
  section,
  fields,
  sectionData,
  formData,
  formType,
  errors,
  lockedFieldPaths,
  onArrayChange,
  onArrayAdd,
  onArrayRemove,
}) {
  return (
    <>
      {fields
        .filter((field) => field.type === "array")
        .map((field) => {
          const fieldPath = section.path
            ? `${section.path}.${field.name}`
            : field.name;
          const arrayItems =
            (section.path ? sectionData?.[field.name] : formData[field.name]) ||
            [];
          const colspanAttr = field.colspan
            ? { "data-colspan": field.colspan }
            : {};
          const isLinkedMembers = String(fieldPath).endsWith("linkedMembers");

          return (
            <div
              key={field.name}
              className="credit-section__cell section-card__cell"
              data-field-type={field.type}
              {...colspanAttr}
            >
              <ArrayField
                label={field.label}
                items={arrayItems}
                fields={field.fields}
                errors={errors}
                basePath={fieldPath}
                formData={formData}
                formType={formType}
                lockedFieldPaths={lockedFieldPaths}
                minItems={
                  field.validation?.minItems || field.fieldConfig?.minItems || 0
                }
                onChange={(index, name, value) => {
                  const fullPath = section.path
                    ? `${section.path}.${field.name}`
                    : field.name;
                  onArrayChange(fullPath, index, name, value);
                }}
                onAdd={
                  onArrayAdd
                    ? () => {
                        const fullPath = section.path
                          ? `${section.path}.${field.name}`
                          : field.name;
                        onArrayAdd(fullPath);
                      }
                    : undefined
                }
                onRemove={
                  onArrayRemove
                    ? (index) => {
                        const fullPath = section.path
                          ? `${section.path}.${field.name}`
                          : field.name;
                        onArrayRemove(fullPath, index);
                      }
                    : undefined
                }
                canAdd={Boolean(onArrayAdd)}
                canRemove={Boolean(onArrayRemove)}
                extraContentByIndex={
                  isLinkedMembers
                    ? (index) => (
                        <LinkedMemberDocumentsField
                          index={index}
                          currentAttachments={formData?.attachments || {}}
                          formType={formType}
                          onSave={(attachmentsObj) => {
                            const fullPath = section.path
                              ? `${section.path}.${field.name}`
                              : field.name;
                            onArrayChange(
                              fullPath,
                              index,
                              "__globalAttachments__",
                              attachmentsObj,
                            );
                          }}
                        />
                      )
                    : undefined
                }
              />
            </div>
          );
        })}
    </>
  );
}

SectionArrayRenderer.propTypes = {
  section: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  fields: PropTypes.array.isRequired,
  sectionData: PropTypes.object,
  formData: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  errors: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  onArrayChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onArrayAdd: PropTypes.func,
  onArrayRemove: PropTypes.func,
};

function FormSection({
  section,
  formData,
  formType,
  errors = EMPTY_ERRORS,
  lockedFieldPaths,
  onChange,
  onArrayChange,
  onArrayAdd,
  onArrayRemove,
  isExpanded: initialExpanded = true,
  hasData: initialHasData = false,
  showHiddenSections = false,
}) {
  const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(initialExpanded);
  const sectionData = section.path
    ? getValueByPath(formData, section.path)
    : formData;
  const sectionHasErrors = computeSectionErrors(
    section,
    formData,
    errors,
    sectionData,
    showHiddenSections,
  );
  const errorsCount = countErrorsBySection(errors, section);
  // Avoid visual flicker when a user is actively typing by debouncing the
  // section-level error indicator. We still suppress the header if the only
  // error is the currently-focused field.
  const debounceRef = useRef(null);
  const [displaySectionHasErrors, setDisplaySectionHasErrors] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const computeImmediateHasErrors = () => {
      if (!sectionHasErrors) return false;
      const keys = Object.keys(errors || {});
      if (keys.length === 0) return false;

      const sectionPrefix = section.path ? `${section.path}.` : "";
      const sectionErrorPaths = keys.filter((p) =>
        section.path ? p.startsWith(sectionPrefix) : !p.includes("."),
      );
      if (sectionErrorPaths.length === 0) return false;

      const active =
        typeof document !== "undefined" ? document.activeElement : null;
      const activeShell =
        active && typeof active.closest === "function"
          ? active.closest("[data-field-path]")
          : null;
      const focusedPath = activeShell
        ? activeShell.getAttribute("data-field-path")
        : null;

      if (
        sectionErrorPaths.length === 1 &&
        focusedPath &&
        sectionErrorPaths[0] === focusedPath
      ) {
        return false;
      }

      return sectionHasErrors;
    };

    const immediate = computeImmediateHasErrors();
    // Delay both showing and hiding to avoid layout flicker caused by
    // very short-lived validation results while the user types.
    if (debounceRef.current) {
      clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
      debounceRef.current = null;
    }
    // Use a slightly longer delay to wait for typing to stop.
    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
      setDisplaySectionHasErrors(immediate);
      debounceRef.current = null;
    }, 5000);

    return () => {
      if (debounceRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
        debounceRef.current = null;
      }
    };
  }, [sectionHasErrors, errors, section.path]);

  const displayErrorsCount = displaySectionHasErrors ? errorsCount : 0;
  const sectionMeta = computeSectionMeta(
    section,
    displayErrorsCount,
    initialHasData,
  );

  return (
    <SectionCard
      section={section}
      isExpanded={isExpanded}
      setIsExpanded={setIsExpanded}
      hasData={initialHasData}
      sectionHasErrors={displaySectionHasErrors}
      errorsCount={displayErrorsCount}
      sectionMeta={sectionMeta}
    >
      <SectionFieldsRenderer
        section={section}
        fields={section.fields}
        sectionData={sectionData}
        formData={formData}
        formType={formType}
        errors={errors}
        lockedFieldPaths={lockedFieldPaths}
        showHiddenSections={showHiddenSections}
        onChange={onChange}
      />
      <SectionArrayRenderer
        section={section}
        fields={section.fields}
        sectionData={sectionData}
        formData={formData}
        formType={formType}
        errors={errors}
        lockedFieldPaths={lockedFieldPaths}
        onArrayChange={onArrayChange}
        onArrayAdd={onArrayAdd}
        onArrayRemove={onArrayRemove}
      />
    </SectionCard>
  );
}

FormSection.displayName = "FormSection";

FormSection.propTypes = {
  section: PropTypes.shape({
    title: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
    description: PropTypes.string,
    path: PropTypes.string,
    fields: PropTypes.arrayOf(PropTypes.object).isRequired,
  }).isRequired,
  formData: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  errors: PropTypes.object,
  lockedFieldPaths: PropTypes.instanceOf(Set),
  onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onArrayChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  onArrayAdd: PropTypes.func,
  onArrayRemove: PropTypes.func,
  isExpanded: PropTypes.bool,
  hasData: PropTypes.bool,
  showHiddenSections: PropTypes.bool,
};

export { SectionStatus, SectionCard, SectionArrayRenderer };
export default memo(FormSection);


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/section/FormSection.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #107
// Ruta relativa: src/modules/forms/components/section/SectionFieldsRenderer.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/modules/forms/components/section/SectionFieldsRenderer.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 226
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import { FieldRenderer } from "@/shared/components/fields/FieldsRuntimeModule.jsx";
import { isVisible } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { shouldRenderTemplatedField } from "@/domain/forms/utils/templateSchemaUtils";

function hasValue(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return false;
  if (typeof value === "string") return value.trim() !== "";
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.length > 0;
  if (typeof value === "object") return Object.keys(value).length > 0;
  return true;
}

function buildRenderableItems(visibleFields = []) {
  const processedGroups = new Set();
  const items = [];

  visibleFields.forEach((field) => {
    if (field.type === "checkbox" && field.selectionGroup) {
      if (processedGroups.has(field.selectionGroup)) return;
      const groupFields = visibleFields.filter(
        (candidate) =>
          candidate.type === "checkbox" &&
          candidate.selectionGroup === field.selectionGroup,
      );
      processedGroups.add(field.selectionGroup);
      items.push({
        kind: "checkbox-group",
        key: `group-${field.selectionGroup}`,
        groupId: field.selectionGroup,
        label: field.selectionGroupLabel || "Opciones",
        description:
          field.selectionGroupDescription ||
          (field.selectionMode === "single"
            ? "Selecciona una sola opción."
            : "Puedes seleccionar una o varias opciones."),
        selectionMode: field.selectionMode || "multiple",
        fields: groupFields,
      });
      return;
    }

    items.push({
      kind: "field",
      key: field.name,
      field,
    });
  });
  return items;
}

function resolveFieldDisabledState(
  fieldName,
  sectionData = {},
  isLocked = false,
) {
  if (isLocked) return true;
  const meta = sectionData?._meta || {};
  if (meta && Array.isArray(meta.disabledFields)) {
    return meta.disabledFields.includes(fieldName);
  }
  return false;
}

export default function SectionFieldsRenderer({
  section,
  fields,
  sectionData,
  formData,
  formType,
  errors,
  lockedFieldPaths,
  showHiddenSections,
  onChange,
}) {
  const visibleFields = fields.filter((field) => {
    if (field.type === "array") return false;
    if (!shouldRenderTemplatedField(field, formData, section.path, showHiddenSections)) {
      return false;
    }
    if (
      field.visibleWhen &&
      !showHiddenSections &&
      !isVisible(field.visibleWhen, formData, section.path)
    )
      return false;
    return true;
  });

  const renderItems = buildRenderableItems(visibleFields);

  return (
    <>
      {renderItems.map((item) => {
        if (item.kind === "checkbox-group") {
          return (
            <div
              key={item.key}
              className="credit-section__cell section-card__cell checkbox-context"
              data-field-type="checkbox-group"
              data-selection-mode={item.selectionMode}
            >
              <div className="checkbox-context__header">
                <p className="checkbox-context__label">{item.label}</p>
                <p className="checkbox-context__description">
                  {item.description}
                </p>
              </div>
              <div
                className="checkbox-context__options"
                role="group"
                aria-label={item.label}
              >
                {item.fields.map((field) => {
                  const fieldPath = section.path
                    ? `${section.path}.${field.name}`
                    : field.name;
                  const checked = Boolean(sectionData?.[field.name]);
                  const isLockedByHydration = Boolean(
                    lockedFieldPaths?.has(fieldPath),
                  );
                  const isDisabled = resolveFieldDisabledState(
                    field.name,
                    sectionData,
                    isLockedByHydration,
                  );
                  const error = errors[fieldPath];

                  return (
                    <div key={field.name} className="checkbox-context__option">
                      <label
                        className={`checkbox-control checkbox-control--choice ${checked ? "checkbox-control--selected" : ""}`}
                      >
                        <input
                          type="checkbox"
                          checked={checked}
                          disabled={isDisabled}
                          onChange={(event) => {
                            if (isDisabled) return;
                            onChange(
                              section.path,
                              field.name,
                              event.target.checked,
                            );
                          }}
                          className="form-checkbox h-4 w-4"
                        />
                        <span className="text-sm">{field.label}</span>
                      </label>
                      {error ? (
                        <span className="field__error text-xs text-red-600">
                          {error}
                        </span>
                      ) : null}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        }

        const field = item.field;
        const fieldPath = section.path
          ? `${section.path}.${field.name}`
          : field.name;
        const value = sectionData?.[field.name];
        const isLockedByHydration = Boolean(lockedFieldPaths?.has(fieldPath));
        const isDisabled = resolveFieldDisabledState(
          field.name,
          sectionData,
          isLockedByHydration,
        );

        return (
          <div
            key={field.name}
            className="credit-section__cell section-card__cell"
            data-field-type={field.type}
          >
            <FieldRenderer
              field={field}
              value={value}
              error={errors[fieldPath]}
              onChange={(nextValue) => {
                if (isDisabled) return;
                onChange(section.path, field.name, nextValue);
              }}
              formData={formData}
              formType={formType}
              disabled={isDisabled}
              readOnly={isDisabled}
              fieldPath={fieldPath}
              status={
                isLockedByHydration
                  ? "Autocompletado"
                  : hasValue(value)
                    ? "Completo"
                    : null
              }
              hint={
                isLockedByHydration
                  ? "Dato cargado automáticamente desde el flujo externo."
                  : field.description
              }
            />
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </>
  );
}

SectionFieldsRenderer.propTypes = {
  section: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  fields: PropTypes.array.isRequired,
  sectionData: PropTypes.object,
  formData: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  formType: PropTypes.string,
  errors: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  lockedFieldPaths: PropTypes.instanceOf(Set),
  showHiddenSections: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
};


// ========================== FIN DE src/modules/forms/components/section/SectionFieldsRenderer.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #108
// Ruta relativa: src/shared/components/fields/fields/SearchableSelectInput.jsx

// Extensión: .jsx

import React, { memo, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import SearchSelect from "./SearchSelect.jsx";

function toOption(child, index) {
  if (!child || child.type !== "option") return null;
  const value = child.props?.value ?? "";
  const rawLabel = child.props?.children;
  const label =
    typeof rawLabel === "string" ? rawLabel : String(rawLabel ?? "");
  return {
    id: `${String(value)}-${index}`,
    value,
    label,
    disabled: Boolean(child.props?.disabled),
    hidden: Boolean(child.props?.hidden),
  };
}

function SearchableSelectInput({
  options,
  children,
  className = "",
  disabled = false,
  readOnly = false,
  value,
  defaultValue,
  onChange,
  placeholder = "Seleccione",
  ...rest
}) {
  const fromChildren = useMemo(
    () => React.Children.toArray(children).map(toOption).filter(Boolean),
    [children],
  );

  const normalizedOptions = useMemo(() => {
    const source =
      Array.isArray(options) && options.length > 0 ? options : fromChildren;
    return source
      .map((item, index) => ({
        id:
          item?.id ??
          item?.value ??
          item?.key ??
          `${String(item?.value ?? item?.label ?? "")}-${index}`,
        value: item?.value ?? item?.id ?? item?.key ?? item?.label ?? "",
        label: String(
          item?.label ?? item?.value ?? item?.id ?? item?.key ?? "",
        ),
        disabled: Boolean(item?.disabled),
        hidden: Boolean(item?.hidden),
      }))
      .filter(Boolean);
  }, [fromChildren, options]);

  const isControlled = value !== undefined;
  const [internalValue, setInternalValue] = useState(defaultValue ?? "");
  const effectiveValue = isControlled ? value : internalValue;

  const placeholderOption = normalizedOptions.find(
    (item) => item.hidden && (item.value === "" || item.value == null),
  );

  return (
    <SearchSelect
      className={className}
      options={normalizedOptions.filter((item) => !item.hidden)}
      value={effectiveValue}
      onChange={(nextValue) => {
        const next = String(nextValue ?? "");
        if (!isControlled) {
          setInternalValue(next);
        }
        onChange?.(next);
      }}
      placeholder={placeholderOption?.label || placeholder}
      filter
      showClear={!disabled && !readOnly}
      clearable={!disabled && !readOnly}
      disabled={disabled}
      readOnly={readOnly}
      size="compact"
      changePayload="value"
      optionLabel="label"
      optionValue="value"
      optionDisabled="disabled"
      filterPlaceholder="Buscar..."
      noOptionsMessage="Sin coincidencias"
      {...rest}
    />
  );
}

SearchableSelectInput.propTypes = {
  options: PropTypes.array,
  children: PropTypes.node,
  className: PropTypes.string,
  disabled: PropTypes.bool,
  readOnly: PropTypes.bool,
  value: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.number]),
  defaultValue: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.number]),
  onChange: PropTypes.func,
  placeholder: PropTypes.string,
};

export default memo(SearchableSelectInput);


// ========================== FIN DE src/shared/components/fields/fields/SearchableSelectInput.jsx ==========================


// ====================================================================
// ARCHIVO #109
// Ruta relativa: src/shared/components/fields/fields/SearchSelect.jsx
// Ruta absoluta: /Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg/src/shared/components/fields/fields/SearchSelect.jsx
// Extensión: .jsx
// Líneas aproximadas: 442
// Fuente: tomado desde la carpeta base "/Users/desarrollo1/Documents/PROJECT-CF/FRONTENDS/Sisad-Web-Form_Solicitudes_Inverneg"
// ====================================================================

import React, {
  forwardRef,
  memo,
  useCallback,
  useEffect,
  useId,
  useMemo,
  useRef,
  useState,
} from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import "./SearchSelect.css";

const DEFAULT_FILTER = (label, query) => label.includes(query);

const SearchSelect = forwardRef(function SearchSelect(
  {
    id,
    options = [],
    value = "",
    onChange,
    placeholder = "Seleccione",
    disabled = false,
    readOnly = false,
    className = "",
    filter = true,
    filterPlaceholder = "Buscar...",
    noOptionsMessage = "Sin coincidencias",
    showClear = true,
    clearable = true,
    optionLabel = "label",
    optionValue = "value",
    optionDisabled = "disabled",
    changePayload = "value",
    size = "compact",
    "aria-invalid": ariaInvalid,
    "aria-describedby": ariaDescribedBy,
  },
  ref,
) {
  const generatedId = useId();
  const inputId = id || `search-select-${generatedId}`;
  const rootRef = useRef(null);
  const inputRef = useRef(null);
  const listboxId = `search-select-listbox-${inputId}`;
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const [query, setQuery] = useState("");
  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);
  const isLocked = disabled || readOnly;

  const normalizedOptions = useMemo(
    () =>
      (options || []).map((option, index) => ({
        key: `${String(option?.[optionValue] ?? option?.value ?? "")}-${index}`,
        label: String(option?.[optionLabel] ?? option?.label ?? ""),
        value: option?.[optionValue] ?? option?.value ?? "",
        disabled: Boolean(option?.[optionDisabled] ?? option?.disabled),
        original: option,
      })),
    [optionDisabled, optionLabel, optionValue, options],
  );

  const selectedOption = useMemo(
    () =>
      normalizedOptions.find(
        (option) => String(option.value) === String(value ?? ""),
      ) || null,
    [normalizedOptions, value],
  );

  const visibleOptions = useMemo(() => {
    if (!filter || !query.trim()) return normalizedOptions;
    const normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();
    return normalizedOptions.filter((option) => {
      const label = option.label.toLowerCase();
      const optionValueText = String(option.value ?? "").toLowerCase();
      return (
        DEFAULT_FILTER(label, normalizedQuery) ||
        DEFAULT_FILTER(optionValueText, normalizedQuery)
      );
    });
  }, [filter, normalizedOptions, query]);

  const commitValue = useCallback(
    (option) => {
      if (!option || option.disabled) return;
      const payload =
        changePayload === "option"
          ? option.original
          : changePayload === "both"
            ? { value: option.value, option: option.original }
            : option.value;
      onChange?.(payload);
      setOpen(false);
      setQuery("");
      setActiveIndex(-1);
    },
    [changePayload, onChange],
  );

  const closeMenu = useCallback(() => {
    setOpen(false);
    setQuery("");
    setActiveIndex(-1);
  }, []);

  const clearSelection = useCallback(() => {
    onChange?.("");
    closeMenu();
    inputRef.current?.focus();
  }, [closeMenu, onChange]);

  const resolveOptionFromText = useCallback(
    (text) => {
      const normalizedText = String(text ?? "").trim().toLowerCase();
      if (!normalizedText) return null;
      return (
        normalizedOptions.find((option) => {
          if (option.disabled) return false;
          return option.label.trim().toLowerCase() === normalizedText;
        }) || null
      );
    },
    [normalizedOptions],
  );

  const commitTypedValue = useCallback(() => {
    if (!filter || isLocked) return false;

    const exactMatch = resolveOptionFromText(query);
    if (exactMatch) {
      commitValue(exactMatch);
      return true;
    }

    if (!query.trim()) {
      closeMenu();
      return false;
    }

    const sameAsSelected =
      selectedOption &&
      selectedOption.label.trim().toLowerCase() === query.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (sameAsSelected) {
      closeMenu();
      return true;
    }

    return false;
  }, [
    closeMenu,
    commitValue,
    filter,
    isLocked,
    query,
    resolveOptionFromText,
    selectedOption,
  ]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onPointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!rootRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        closeMenu();
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("pointerdown", onPointerDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("pointerdown", onPointerDown);
  }, [closeMenu]);

  const openMenu = useCallback(() => {
    if (isLocked) return;
    setOpen(true);
    setActiveIndex((prev) => {
      if (prev >= 0 && prev < visibleOptions.length) return prev;
      const selectedIndex = visibleOptions.findIndex(
        (option) => String(option.value) === String(value ?? ""),
      );
      return selectedIndex >= 0
        ? selectedIndex
        : visibleOptions.length > 0
          ? 0
          : -1;
    });
  }, [isLocked, value, visibleOptions]);

  const onInputKeyDown = useCallback(
    (event) => {
      if (isLocked) return;

      if (event.key === "ArrowDown") {
        event.preventDefault();
        openMenu();
        setActiveIndex((prev) => {
          if (!visibleOptions.length) return -1;
          return prev < visibleOptions.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0;
        });
        return;
      }

      if (event.key === "ArrowUp") {
        event.preventDefault();
        openMenu();
        setActiveIndex((prev) => {
          if (!visibleOptions.length) return -1;
          return prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : visibleOptions.length - 1;
        });
        return;
      }

      if (event.key === "Enter") {
        if (open && activeIndex >= 0 && visibleOptions[activeIndex]) {
          event.preventDefault();
          commitValue(visibleOptions[activeIndex]);
          return;
        }
        if (commitTypedValue()) {
          event.preventDefault();
        }
        return;
      }

      if (event.key === "Tab") {
        if (open && activeIndex >= 0 && visibleOptions[activeIndex]) {
          commitValue(visibleOptions[activeIndex]);
          return;
        }
        commitTypedValue();
        return;
      }

      if (event.key === "Escape") {
        event.preventDefault();
        closeMenu();
      }
    },
    [
      activeIndex,
      commitTypedValue,
      closeMenu,
      commitValue,
      isLocked,
      open,
      openMenu,
      visibleOptions,
    ],
  );

  const inputDisplayValue = open
    ? query || selectedOption?.label || ""
    : selectedOption?.label || "";

  const showClearButton =
    !isLocked &&
    Boolean(selectedOption) &&
    Boolean(showClear ?? true) &&
    Boolean(clearable ?? true);

  return (
    <div
      ref={(node) => {
        rootRef.current = node;
        if (typeof ref === "function") ref(node);
        else if (ref) ref.current = node;
      }}
      className={`search-select ${open ? "search-select--open" : ""} ${className}`.trim()}
      data-ss-size={size}
      role="combobox"
      aria-expanded={open}
      aria-haspopup="listbox"
      aria-controls={listboxId}
      aria-invalid={ariaInvalid}
    >
      <div
        className="search-select__control"
        onMouseDown={(event) => {
          if (event.target.closest("button")) return;
          event.preventDefault();
          inputRef.current?.focus();
          openMenu();
        }}
      >
        <input
          id={inputId}
          ref={inputRef}
          type="text"
          className="search-select__input"
          value={inputDisplayValue}
          placeholder={open && filter ? filterPlaceholder : placeholder}
          disabled={disabled}
          readOnly={isLocked || !filter}
          onFocus={openMenu}
          onChange={(event) => {
            if (isLocked || !filter) return;
            setQuery(event.target.value);
            if (!open) setOpen(true);
            setActiveIndex(0);
          }}
          onBlur={() => {
            commitTypedValue();
          }}
          onKeyDown={onInputKeyDown}
          aria-describedby={ariaDescribedBy}
          aria-invalid={ariaInvalid}
          aria-autocomplete="list"
          aria-activedescendant={
            activeIndex >= 0 && visibleOptions[activeIndex]
              ? `search-select-option-${inputId}-${visibleOptions[activeIndex].key}`
              : undefined
          }
        />

        {showClearButton ? (
          <button
            type="button"
            className="search-select__clear"
            onMouseDown={(event) => {
              event.preventDefault();
              event.stopPropagation();
            }}
            onClick={(event) => {
              event.stopPropagation();
              clearSelection();
            }}
            aria-label="Limpiar selección"
          >
            <svg
              xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              width="12"
              height="12"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              strokeWidth="2.5"
              strokeLinecap="round"
              strokeLinejoin="round"
              aria-hidden="true"
            >
              <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18" />
              <line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18" />
            </svg>
          </button>
        ) : null}

        <button
          type="button"
          className="search-select__toggle"
          onMouseDown={(event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
          }}
          onClick={(event) => {
            event.stopPropagation();
            if (open) {
              closeMenu();
              inputRef.current?.blur();
              return;
            }
            inputRef.current?.focus();
            openMenu();
          }}
          aria-label={open ? "Cerrar opciones" : "Mostrar opciones"}
          tabIndex={-1}
        >
          <span className="search-select__arrow" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg
              xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              width="14"
              height="14"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              strokeWidth="2.5"
              strokeLinecap="round"
              strokeLinejoin="round"
            >
              <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9" />
            </svg>
          </span>
        </button>
      </div>

      {open ? (
        <div id={listboxId} className="search-select__menu" role="listbox">
          {visibleOptions.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="search-select__no-result">{noOptionsMessage}</div>
          ) : (
            visibleOptions.map((option, index) => {
              const isActive = index === activeIndex;
              const isSelected =
                String(option.value) === String(selectedOption?.value ?? "");
              return (
                <div
                  key={option.key}
                  id={`search-select-option-${inputId}-${option.key}`}
                  role="option"
                  aria-selected={isSelected}
                  aria-disabled={option.disabled}
                  className={`search-select__option ${isActive ? "search-select__option--highlighted" : ""} ${isSelected ? "search-select__option--selected" : ""} ${option.disabled ? "search-select__option--disabled" : ""}`.trim()}
                  onMouseEnter={() => {
                    if (!option.disabled) setActiveIndex(index);
                  }}
                  onMouseDown={(event) => {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    commitValue(option);
                  }}
                >
                  {option.label}
                </div>
              );
            })
          )}
        </div>
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );
});

SearchSelect.propTypes = {
  id: PropTypes.string,
  options: PropTypes.array,
  value: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.number]),
  onChange: PropTypes.func,
  placeholder: PropTypes.string,
  disabled: PropTypes.bool,
  readOnly: PropTypes.bool,
  className: PropTypes.string,
  filter: PropTypes.bool,
  filterPlaceholder: PropTypes.string,
  noOptionsMessage: PropTypes.string,
  showClear: PropTypes.bool,
  clearable: PropTypes.bool,
  optionLabel: PropTypes.string,
  optionValue: PropTypes.string,
  optionDisabled: PropTypes.string,
  changePayload: PropTypes.oneOf(["value", "option", "both"]),
  size: PropTypes.oneOf(["compact", "normal", "large"]),
  "aria-invalid": PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.bool, PropTypes.string]),
  "aria-describedby": PropTypes.string,
};

export default memo(SearchSelect);


// ========================== FIN DE src/shared/components/fields/fields/SearchSelect.jsx ==========================

import React, { memo, useCallback, useMemo } from "react";
import PropTypes from "prop-types";
import DatePicker from "react-datepicker";
import { format, isValid } from "date-fns";
import { normalizeOptions } from "@/shared/utils/common";
import { FieldBase } from "../FieldsRuntimeModule.jsx";
import SearchableSelectInput from "./SearchableSelectInput.jsx";
import "react-datepicker/dist/react-datepicker.css";

const labelType = PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]);
const hintType = PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.string, PropTypes.node]);

const baseProps = {
  field: PropTypes.object,
  label: labelType,
  value: PropTypes.any,
  error: PropTypes.string,
  onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  required: PropTypes.bool,
  disabled: PropTypes.bool,
  readOnly: PropTypes.bool,
  hint: hintType,
  status: hintType,
  fieldPath: PropTypes.string,
};

function resolveTextInputConfig(field = {}, explicitType) {
  const validation = field.validation || {};
  const inputType = explicitType || field.inputType || "text";
  const isNumeric = inputType === "number" || validation.pattern === "NUMERIC";

  return {
    validation,
    inputType,
    isNumeric,
    pattern:
      typeof validation.pattern === "string" &&
      !/^[A-Z_]+$/.test(validation.pattern)
        ? validation.pattern
        : undefined,
  };
}

function normalizeTextValue(rawValue, isNumeric) {
  if (!isNumeric) return rawValue;
  if (rawValue === "") return "";

  const cleaned = rawValue.replaceAll(/[^0-9.-]/g, "");
  const numericValue = Number(cleaned);
  return Number.isNaN(numericValue) ? rawValue : numericValue;
}

function parseDateValue(value, mode) {
  if (!value) return null;
  if (value instanceof Date) return value;

  if (mode === "year") {
    const year = Number(String(value).slice(0, 4));
    if (!Number.isFinite(year)) return null;
    return new Date(year, 0, 1);
  }

  const parsed = new Date(value);
  return Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? null : parsed;
}

function formatDateValue(date, mode) {
  if (!date || !isValid(date)) return "";
  return mode === "year" ? format(date, "yyyy") : format(date, "yyyy-MM-dd");
}

function getDateMode(field = {}) {
  if (field.dateMode) return field.dateMode;
  return field.validation?.pattern === "YEAR" ? "year" : "date";
}

function InputTextField({
  field,
  label,
  value,
  error,
  onChange,
  placeholder,
  type = "text",
  required,
  disabled = false,
  readOnly = false,
  hint,
  status,
  fieldPath,
}) {
  const { validation, inputType, isNumeric, pattern } = resolveTextInputConfig(
    field,
    type,
  );

  const handleChange = useCallback(
    (event) => {
      onChange(normalizeTextValue(event.target.value, isNumeric));
    },
    [onChange, isNumeric],
  );

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={label}
      required={required}
      error={error}
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
    >
      <input
        type={inputType}
        inputMode={isNumeric ? "numeric" : undefined}
        pattern={pattern}
        value={value || ""}
        onChange={handleChange}
        placeholder={placeholder || ""}
        min={validation.min}
        max={validation.max}
        step={validation.step}
        disabled={disabled}
        readOnly={readOnly || disabled}
      />
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

InputTextField.propTypes = {
  ...baseProps,
  placeholder: PropTypes.string,
  type: PropTypes.string,
};

function InputTextareaField({
  field,
  label,
  value,
  error,
  onChange,
  placeholder,
  rows = 3,
  required,
  disabled = false,
  readOnly = false,
  hint,
  status,
  fieldPath,
}) {
  const validation = field?.validation || {};

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={label}
      required={required}
      error={error}
      className="field--textarea"
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
    >
      <textarea
        value={value || ""}
        onChange={(event) => onChange(event.target.value)}
        placeholder={placeholder || ""}
        rows={rows}
        maxLength={validation.maxLength}
        disabled={disabled}
        readOnly={readOnly || disabled}
      />
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

InputTextareaField.propTypes = {
  ...baseProps,
  placeholder: PropTypes.string,
  rows: PropTypes.number,
};

function InputSelectField({
  label,
  value,
  error,
  onChange,
  options = [],
  placeholder = "Seleccione",
  required,
  disabled = false,
  readOnly = false,
  hint,
  status,
  fieldPath,
}) {
  const normalizedOptions = useMemo(() => normalizeOptions(options), [options]);

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={label}
      required={required}
      error={error}
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
    >
      <SearchableSelectInput
        options={normalizedOptions}
        value={value ?? ""}
        onChange={onChange}
        placeholder={placeholder || ""}
        disabled={disabled}
        readOnly={readOnly}
      />
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

InputSelectField.propTypes = {
  ...baseProps,
  options: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.array, PropTypes.object]),
  placeholder: PropTypes.string,
};

function InputCheckboxField({
  label,
  checked,
  error,
  onChange,
  inline = false,
  required,
  disabled = false,
  hint,
  status,
  fieldPath,
}) {
  const className = `field--checkbox ${inline ? "field--checkbox-inline" : ""}`;

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={null}
      error={error}
      className={className}
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
    >
      <label className="checkbox-control">
        <input
          type="checkbox"
          checked={Boolean(checked)}
          onChange={(event) => onChange(event.target.checked)}
          disabled={disabled}
        />
        <span>
          {label} {required && <span className="field__required">*</span>}
        </span>
      </label>
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

InputCheckboxField.propTypes = {
  label: labelType,
  checked: PropTypes.bool,
  error: PropTypes.string,
  onChange: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  inline: PropTypes.bool,
  required: PropTypes.bool,
  disabled: PropTypes.bool,
  hint: hintType,
  status: hintType,
  fieldPath: PropTypes.string,
};

function InputRadioField({
  label,
  value,
  error,
  onChange,
  options = [],
  required,
  disabled = false,
  hint,
  status,
  fieldPath,
}) {
  const normalizedOptions = useMemo(() => normalizeOptions(options), [options]);

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={label}
      required={required}
      error={error}
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
    >
      <div className="field__group field__group--multi">
        {normalizedOptions.map((opt) => (
          <label
            key={opt.value}
            className="checkbox-control checkbox-control--inline"
          >
            <input
              type="radio"
              name={String(label || "radio-group")}
              value={opt.value}
              checked={value === opt.value}
              onChange={() => onChange(opt.value)}
              disabled={disabled}
            />
            <span>{opt.label}</span>
          </label>
        ))}
      </div>
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

InputRadioField.propTypes = {
  ...baseProps,
  options: PropTypes.array,
};

function InputMultiCheckboxField({
  label,
  value,
  error,
  onChange,
  options = [],
  required,
  disabled = false,
  hint,
  status,
  fieldPath,
}) {
  const normalizedOptions = useMemo(() => normalizeOptions(options), [options]);
  const selected = useMemo(() => (Array.isArray(value) ? value : []), [value]);

  const handleChange = useCallback(
    (optionValue, isChecked) => {
      if (isChecked) {
        onChange([...selected, optionValue]);
        return;
      }
      onChange(selected.filter((item) => item !== optionValue));
    },
    [onChange, selected],
  );

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={label}
      required={required}
      error={error}
      className="field--multi-checkbox"
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
    >
      <div className="field__group field__group--multi">
        {normalizedOptions.map((opt) => (
          <label
            key={opt.value}
            className="checkbox-control checkbox-control--inline"
          >
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={selected.includes(opt.value)}
              onChange={(event) =>
                handleChange(opt.value, event.target.checked)
              }
              disabled={disabled}
            />
            <span>{opt.label}</span>
          </label>
        ))}
      </div>
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

InputMultiCheckboxField.propTypes = {
  ...baseProps,
  options: PropTypes.array,
  value: PropTypes.array,
};

function InputDateField({
  field,
  label,
  value,
  error,
  onChange,
  required,
  disabled = false,
  readOnly = false,
  hint,
  status,
  fieldPath,
  placeholder,
}) {
  const mode = getDateMode(field);
  const selectedDate = useMemo(
    () => parseDateValue(value, mode),
    [value, mode],
  );

  return (
    <FieldBase
      label={label}
      required={required}
      error={error}
      hint={hint}
      status={status}
      fieldPath={fieldPath}
    >
      <DatePicker
        selected={selectedDate}
        onChange={(date) => onChange(formatDateValue(date, mode))}
        showYearPicker={mode === "year"}
        dateFormat={mode === "year" ? "yyyy" : "dd/MM/yyyy"}
        placeholderText={
          placeholder ||
          field?.placeholder ||
          (mode === "year" ? "YYYY" : "DD/MM/AAAA")
        }
        disabled={disabled || readOnly}
        className="field__control"
        popperPlacement="bottom-start"
        showPopperArrow={false}
      />
    </FieldBase>
  );
}

InputDateField.propTypes = {
  ...baseProps,
  placeholder: PropTypes.string,
};

export const TextField = memo(InputTextField);
export const TextareaField = memo(InputTextareaField);
export const SelectField = memo(InputSelectField);
export const CheckboxField = memo(InputCheckboxField);
export const RadioField = memo(InputRadioField);
export const MultiCheckboxField = memo(InputMultiCheckboxField);
export const DateField = memo(InputDateField);

TextField.displayName = "TextField";
TextareaField.displayName = "TextareaField";
SelectField.displayName = "SelectField";
CheckboxField.displayName = "CheckboxField";
RadioField.displayName = "RadioField";
MultiCheckboxField.displayName = "MultiCheckboxField";
DateField.displayName = "DateField";
